Ezra5:8 Makwazeke kukumkani, ukuba saya elizwaneni le‐Judeya, endlwini yake utixo omkulu, eyakiwa ngamatye amakulu, esel’ ifakiwe nemiti ezindongeni; kanjalo lomsebenzi uyenzwa ngokunxama, uhambiseka ezandleni zabo." 
Matthew1:1 INCWADI yokuvelakuka‐Yesu Kristu, unyana ka‐Davide, unyana ka‐Abrahame." 
Matthew1:2 U‐Abrahame wazala u‐Yisake; no‐Yisake wazala u‐Yakobi; no‐Yakobi wazala u‐Juda nabazalwana bake; 
Matthew1:3 waza u‐Juda wazala u‐Faretse no‐Zera ngo‐Tamare; wati u‐Faretse wazala u‐Hetserone; no‐Hetserone wazala u‐Rame; 
Matthew1:4 no‐Rame wazala u‐Haminadabi; no‐Haminadabi wazala u‐Nahashone; no‐Nahashone wazala u‐Salimone; 
Matthew1:5 no‐Salimone wazala u‐Bohazi ngo‐Rakabi; waza u‐Bohazi wazala u‐Obedi ngo‐Rute; wati u‐Obedi wazala u‐Jese; 
Matthew1:6 no‐Jese wazala u‐Davide ukumkani. Waza u‐Davide ukumkani wazala u‐Solomone ngo bengumfazi ka‐Huriya; 
Matthew1:7 wati u‐Solomone wazala u‐Rehobome; no‐Rehobome wazala u‐Abiya; no‐Abiya wazala u‐Asa: 
Matthew1:8 no‐Asa wazala u‐Yehoshafate; no‐Yehoshafate wazala u‐Yorame; no‐Yorame wazala u‐Huziya; 
Matthew1:9 no‐Huziya wazala u‐Yotame; no‐Yotame wazala u‐Ahazi; no‐Ahazi wazala u‐Hezekiya; 
Matthew1:10 no‐Hezekiya wazala u‐Manase; no‐Manase wazala u‐Amoni; no‐Amoni wazala u‐Josiya; 
Matthew1:11 no‐Josiya wazala u‐Yekoniya nabazalwana bake, ngexesha lokufuduselwa e‐Babilone." 
Matthew1:12 Nasemveni kwokufuduselwa e‐Babilone, u‐Yekoniya wazala u‐Shalatiyeli; no‐Shalatiyeli wazala u‐Zerubabeli;" 
Matthew1:13 no‐Zerubabeli wazala u‐Abihude; no‐Abihude wazala u‐Eliyakime; no‐Eliyakime wazala u‐Hazore; 
Matthew1:14 no‐Hazore wazala u‐Tsadoki; no‐Tsadoki wazala u‐Akime; no‐Akime wazala u‐Elihude; 
Matthew1:15 no‐Elihude wazala u‐Elezari: no‐Elezari wazala u‐Matane; no‐Matane wazala u‐Yakobi: 
Matthew1:16 no‐Yakobi wazala u‐Josefe indoda ka‐Mariya, okungaye wazalwa u‐Yesu, okutiwa ngu‐Kristu." 
Matthew1:17 Zonke izizukulwana ke ezivela ku‐Abrahame kude kube ku‐Davide, zizizukulwana ezilishumi linazine; naku‐Davide kude kube sekufuduselweni e‐Babilone, zizizukulwana ezilishumi linazine; nakuko ukufuduselwa e‐Babilone kude kube ku‐Kristu, zizizukulwana ezilishumi linazine." 
Matthew1:18 KEKALOKU ukuzalwa kuka‐Yesu Kristu kwaye kungoku: ukuba unina wake u‐Mariya exanyelwe u‐Josefe nje, bengekahlangani, wafunyanwa emiti ngomoya oyingcwele." 
Matthew1:19 Waza u‐Josefe, indoda yake, engolungileyo nje, kanti engatandi ukumhlazisa ekuhleni, wafuna ukumlahla ngasese." 
Matthew1:20 Kodwa esacinga ezizinto, bona ke, ingelosi yenkosi yabonakala kuye epupeni, isiti: Josefe, nyana ka‐Davide! ungoyiki ukutabatela kuwe u‐Mariya umfazi wako; ngokuba oko kukaulweyo pakati kwake kungomoya oyingcwele." 
Matthew1:21 Wozala unyana ke, wauya kubiza igama lake ngo— Yesu; ngokuba yena eya kusindisa abantu bake ezonweni zabo." 
Matthew1:22 (Kekaloku oku konke kwenzekile, ukuze kuzaliseke oko kwatetwayo yinkosi ngomprofite, isiti:" 
Matthew1:23 Bona ke, intombi iya kumita, izale unyana, babeya kumbiza ngegama elingu‐Yimanuweli, oko kukuti ngokukunyushwa, Utixo enati.)" 
Matthew1:24 Wandula u‐Josefe, akuba evukile ebutongweni, wenza njengokuba ibimyalele ingelosi yenkosi, watabatela kuye umfazi wake:" 
Matthew1:25 kanti wayengamazi kwada kwazalwa nguye unyana wake owamazibulo; waza wabiza igama lake ngo— Yesu. 
Matthew2:1 KEKALOKU xeshekweni u‐Yesu ebezalelwe e‐Beteleheme yase‐Judeya, emihleni ka‐Herodi ukumkani, bona ke, izilumko zivela empumalanga zafika e‐Yerusaleme," 
Matthew2:1 KEKALOKU xeshekweni u‐Yesu ebezalelwe e‐Beteleheme yase‐Judeya, emihleni ka‐Herodi ukumkani, bona ke, izilumko zivela empumalanga zafika e‐Yerusaleme," 
Matthew2:2 zisiti: Upina lowo uzelweyo engukumkani wama‐Juda? ngokuba sibe sibona inkwenkwezi yake empumalanga, sasize ukumbedesha." 
Matthew2:3 Kekaloku u‐Herodi ukumkani akuva oko, waxa̔liswa, kwa nayo yonke i‐Yerusaleme kunye naye." 
Matthew2:4 Wati ke akuba ebahlanganisile bonke abaperisite abakulu nababa̔li babantu, wabuza kubo ukuba uzalwa pina u‐Kristu." 
Matthew2:5 Baza bati kuye: e‐Beteleheme yase‐Judeya; ngokuba kuba̔liwe njalo ngomprofite, ukuti:" 
Matthew2:5 Baza bati kuye: e‐Beteleheme yase‐Judeya; ngokuba kuba̔liwe njalo ngomprofite, ukuti:" 
Matthew2:6 Nawe, Beteleheme, lizwe lakwa‐Juda! akunguye omncinane kuzo zonke pakati kwenkosi zakwa‐Juda nakanye; ngokuba kuya kupuma umpati kuwe, oya kwalusa abantu bam o‐Sirayeli." 
Matthew2:7 Wandula u‐Herodi, akuba ezibizile ngasese izilumko, wakolisa ukubuza kuzo ixesha lokubonakala kwenkwenkwezi." 
Matthew2:8 Waza wazituma e‐Beteleheme, wati: Hambani niye nibuze kunene umntwana lowo; niti nxa nimfumeneyo, nindishumayeze, ukuba nam ndize ndimbedeshe." 
Matthew2:9 Zati zimvile nje ukumkani, zemka; kekaloku bona ke, inkwenkwezi, leyo zibe ziyibonile empumalanga, yahamba pambili kuzo, yada yeza yema pezu kwalapo umntwana wayekona." 
Matthew2:10 Zati zakubona lonkwenkwezi, zavuya ngovuyo olukulu kunene." 
Matthew2:11 Zaza zangena endlwini, zambona umntwana eno‐Mariya unina, zawa pantsi zambedesha, zavula ityeyandyebo zazo, zamnikela amabaso, igolide, nentlakamhlope, nemore." 
Matthew2:12 Zaza zati, ziyaliwe ngutixo epupeni ukuba mazingabuyi ziye ku‐Herodi, zemka ngenye indlela ukuya ezweni lakowazo." 
Matthew2:13 Nxa zimkile zona, bona ke, ingelosi yenkosi yabonakala epupeni ku‐Josefe, isiti: Suka, utabate umntwana nonina, usabele e‐Jipete, uze ubeko kona ndide ndikuxelele; ngokuba u‐Herodi eza kufuna umntwana ukuba ambubise." 
Matthew2:14 Wesuka ke, watabata umntwana nonina ebusuku, wemka waya e‐Jipete:" 
Matthew2:15 waye ebeko kona kwada kwafa u‐Herodi; ukuze kuzaliseke oko kwatetwayo yinkosi ngomprofite, isiti: Ndambiza unyana wam apume e‐Jipete." 
Matthew2:16 Wandula u‐Herodi, akubona ukuba ukohlisiwe zizilumko, wanomsindo kakulu, watuma ke, wabulala bonke abantwana abase‐Beteleheme nakuyo yonke imida yayo, ababudala buyiminyaka mibini nangapantsi, njengexesha wayekolisile ukubuza lona kuzo izilumko." 
Matthew2:17 Kwandula kwazaliseka oko kwatetwayo ngu‐Jeremiya umprofite, esiti:" 
Matthew2:18 Ilizwi lavakala e‐Rama isikalo, nesililo, nesijwili esikulu, u‐Rakele elilela abantwana bake, engavumi ukututuzelwa, ngokuba bengaseko." 
Matthew2:19 Nxa abefile u‐Herodi, bona ke, ingelosi yenkosi yabonakala epupeni ku‐Josefe e‐Jipete," 
Matthew2:20 isiti: Suka, utabate umntwana nonina, uye ezweni lakwa‐Sirayeli; ngokuba befile abo babefuna ubomi bomntwana." 
Matthew2:21 Wesuka ke, watabata umntwana nonina, weza ezweni lakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Matthew2:22 Kodwa akuva ukuba u‐Arakelosi ungukumkani e‐Judeya esikundleni sika‐Herodi uyise, woyika ukuhambela kona; koko, eyaliwe ngutixo epupeni, wemkela kwizahlulo zase‐Galili," 
Matthew2:22 Kodwa akuva ukuba u‐Arakelosi ungukumkani e‐Judeya esikundleni sika‐Herodi uyise, woyika ukuhambela kona; koko, eyaliwe ngutixo epupeni, wemkela kwizahlulo zase‐Galili," 
Matthew2:23 weza wema esixekweni esi‐kutiwa yi‐Nazarete, ukuze kuzaliseke oko kwatetwayo ngabaprofite ukuti: Uya kubizwa ngokuti ungum‐Nazarete." 
Matthew3:1 KULEYO imihla kwavela u‐Johane umbapitizeshi, eshumayela entlango yase‐Judeya," 
Matthew3:1 KULEYO imihla kwavela u‐Johane umbapitizeshi, eshumayela entlango yase‐Judeya," 
Matthew3:2 esiti nokuti: Guqukani; ngokuba ubukumkani bezulu sebukufupi. 
Matthew3:3 Ngokuba enguye lo kwatetwa ngaye ngu‐Yisaya umprofite, esiti: Ilizwi lodandulukayo entlango: Lungisani indlela kayehova; yenzani imendo yake ilungelelane." 
Matthew3:4 Kekaloku lowo u‐Johane wayenengubo yake yenziwe ngoboya benkamela, enombinqo wolusu esinqeni sake; nokutya kwake bekuzinkumbi nobusi basendle." 
Matthew3:5 Yandula yapumela kuye i‐Yerusaleme, nayo yonke i‐Judeya, nalo lonke ilizwe langase‐Yoredane;" 
Matthew3:5 Yandula yapumela kuye i‐Yerusaleme, nayo yonke i‐Judeya, nalo lonke ilizwe langase‐Yoredane;" 
Matthew3:6 babapitizeshwa nguye e‐Yoredane apo, bevuma izono zabo." 
Matthew3:7 Kodwa akubona abaninzi babafarisi nabasadusi bezela ubapitizesho lwake, wati kubo: Sizukulwanandini senyoka! ngubanina onibonisileyo ukuba nibaleke umsindo oza kuza?" 
Matthew3:8 Velisani ngoko izixakato eziyelelana noguquko; 
Matthew3:9 nize ningabi niti ngokwenu: Sinaye U‐Abrahame engubawo; ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Utixo angavusela u‐Abrahame usapo kulamatye. 
Matthew3:10 Kanjako izembe lise libekwe ngasezingcanjeni zemiti: iti ngoko yonke imiti engavelisi izixakato ezilungileyo igaulwe, iposwe emlilweni." 
Matthew3:11 Mna okunene ndiyanibapitizesha ngamanzi lube luguquko; kodwa lowo uzayo emva kwam unamandla amakulu kwawam, endingafanelekile ukutwala izihlangu zake; yena wonibapitizesha ngomoya oyingcwele nangomlilo:" 
Matthew3:12 omnyazi wokwela usesandleni sake, waeya kucokisa isibaya sake, ati inqolowa yake ayihlanganisele esiseleni, kodwa umququ wowutshisa ngomlilo ongacimekiyo." 
Matthew3:13 Wandula u‐Yesu wavela e‐Galili weza e‐Yoredane ku‐Johane, ukuba abapitizeshwe nguye." 
Matthew3:14 Kuloko u‐Johane wabemalela, esiti: Mna ndifanele ukubapitizeshwa nguwe nje, uza wena kum na?" 
Matthew3:15 Kodwa wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Kauvume kube kaloku nje; ngokuba ngokunjalo kufanelekile kuti ukuzalisekisa bonke ubulungisa. Wandula ukumvumela. 
Matthew3:16 Waza wati u‐Yesu, akuba ebapitizeshiwe, waselenyuka emanzini; kekaloku bona ke, izulu lavulekela kuye, waza wabona umoya katixo esihla njengehobe, esiza pezu kwake." 
Matthew3:17 Kanjalo bona ke, ilizwi lavela ezulwini, lisiti: Lo ungunyana wam otandiweyo, endikolisiweyo kakuhle nguye." 
Matthew4:1 WANDULA u‐Yesu wakatshelwa entlango ngumoya, ukuba alingwe ngu‐Satane." 
Matthew4:2 Wati akuba ezilile ukutya imini ezimashumi mane, nobusuku obumashumi mane, wada walamba." 
Matthew4:3 Waza umlingi ezile kuye wati: Ukuba ungunyana katixo, xela ukuba enziwe izonka amatye la." 
Matthew4:4 Kodwa wapendula wati: Kuba̔liwe ngokuti: Akungaso isonka sodwa aya kupila umntu, koko kungawo onke amazwi apumayo emlonyeni katixo." 
Matthew4:5 Wandula u‐Satane wamtabatela esixekweni esingcwele, wammisa pezu kwepiko letempile," 
Matthew4:6 wati kuye: Ukuba ungunyana katixo, ziwise pantsi; ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Uya kuyalela ingelosi zake ngawe, eziya kukufunqula ngezandla, hleze uku̔bekise unyawo lwako ngasetyeni." 
Matthew4:7 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Kuba̔liwe kanjako ngokuti: Akuyi kumlinga uyehova, utixo wako." 
Matthew4:8 Wati kanjako u‐Satane wamtabatela entabeni ende kakulu, wambonisa bonke ubukumkani belizwe nobungcwalisa babo," 
Matthew4:9 wati kuye: Ezizinto zonke ndozinika kuwe, ukuba uya kuwa pantsi undibedeshe." 
Matthew4:10 Wandula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Suka, Satane! ngokuba kuba̔liwe ngokuti: Uyehova, utixo wako, uya kumbedesha, umkonze yena yedwa." 
Matthew4:11 Wandula u‐Satane wamshiya: zaza, bona ke, zafika ingelosi zamkonza." 
Matthew4:12 KEKALOKU akuva u‐Yesu ukuba u‐Johane unikelwe entolongweni, wemka waya e‐Galili." 
Matthew4:13 Waza wati, eshiyile i‐Nazarete, weza wema e‐Kapenayume engaselwandle, emideni yakwa‐Zebulone neyakwa‐Nefatali;" 
Matthew4:14 ukuze kuzaliseke oko kwatetwayo ngu‐Yisaya umprofite, esiti:" 
Matthew4:15 Ilizwe lakwa‐Zebulone nelizwe lakwa‐Nefatali, elendlela yaselwandle, pesheya kwe‐Yoredane, i‐Galili yabaheyideni," 
Matthew4:16 abantu ababehleli ebumnyameni, babonile ukukanya okukulu, nabo babehleli ezweni nasetunzini lokufa, ukukanya kubapumele." 
Matthew4:17 Kwa oko waqala u‐Yesu ukushumayela nokuti: Guqukani; ngokuba ubukumkani bezulu sebukufupi. 
Matthew4:18 Waza u‐Yesu, ehamba ngaselwandle lwase‐Galili, wabona abazalwana ababini, u‐Simone o‐kutiwa ngu‐Petrosi, no‐Andreya umninawe wake, beposa utambo elwandle: ngokuba bebengabalobi bentlanzi." 
Matthew4:19 Wayesiti kubo: Yizani emva kwam, ndandiya kunenza abalobi babantu." 
Matthew4:20 Basuka bazishiya intambo, bamlandela." 
Matthew4:21 Kanjalo egqitile apo, wabona abanye abazalwana ababini, u‐Yakobi unyana ka‐Zebedi, no‐Johane umninawe wake, besenqanaweni no‐Zebedi uyise wabo, belungisa intambo zabo; waza wababiza." 
Matthew4:22 Basuka bashiya inqanawa noyise wabo, bamlandela." 
Matthew4:23 Waza u‐Yesu wajikajikela yonke i‐Galili, efundisa ezindlwini zentlanganiso zabo, eshumayela ivangeli yobukumkani, epilisa zonke izifo nazo zonke izikuhlane pakati kwabantu." 
Matthew4:24 Lwaza udumo lwake lwapumela kuyo yonke i‐Siriya; bada bazisa kuye bonke abafayo, ababanjwa zizifo nezibulawa ezininzi, nabangenelwa zidemoni, nabanesatutwane, nabanesifo sokushwabanisa; wabapilisa ke." 
Matthew4:25 Zaza izihlwele ezininzi zamlandela, zivela e‐Galili, nase‐Dekapolisi, nase‐Yerusaleme, nase‐Judeya, napesheya kwe‐Yoredane." 
Matthew4:25 Zaza izihlwele ezininzi zamlandela, zivela e‐Galili, nase‐Dekapolisi, nase‐Yerusaleme, nase‐Judeya, napesheya kwe‐Yoredane." 
Matthew5:1 KEKALOKU akuzibona izihlwele, wenyukela entabeni; kwati akuba ehleli pantsi, beza kuye abadisipile bake." 
Matthew5:2 Waza wavula umlomo wake, wabafundisa, esiti:" 
Matthew5:3 Banetamsanqa ababuhlwempu ngomoya; ngokuba bubobabo ubukumkani bezulu. 
Matthew5:4 Banetamsanqa abalusizi; ngokuba bona beya kututuzelwa. 
Matthew5:5 Banetamsanqa abalulamileyo; ngokuba umhlaba uya kuba lilifa labo. 
Matthew5:6 Banetamsanqa abanokulambela nokunxanelwa ubulungisa; ngokuba bona beya kuhlutiswa. 
Matthew5:7 Banetamsanqa abanofefe; ngokuba bona beya kupatwa ngofefe. 
Matthew5:8 Banetamsanqa abacocekileyo ngentliziyo; ngokuba bona beya kubona utixo. 
Matthew5:9 Banetamsanqa abangabaxolelanisi; ngokuba bona beya kubizwa ngokuba lusapo lukatixo. 
Matthew5:10 Banetamsanqa abatshutshisiweyo ngenxa yobulungisa; ngokuba bubobabo ubukumkani bezulu. 
Matthew5:11 Ninetamsanqa, nxa abantu baya kunituka, banitshutshise, batete into zonke ezikohlakeleyo ngakuni ngokuxoka, ngenxa yam:" 
Matthew5:12 vuyani nigcobe, ngokuba umvuzo wenu umkulu ezulwini; ngokuba benje njalo ukubatshutshisa abaprofite ababepambili kuni." 
Matthew5:13 Nina niyityuwa yomhlaba: kodwa xeshekweni ityuwa ingabi nasongo, iya kuvakaliswa nganina? ayisafanelekele nto, kupela ukuba ilahlelwe pandle, inyatelwe ngabantu." 
Matthew5:14 Nina nilukanyiso lwelizwe; isixeko esimiyo pezu kwentaba asingefihleke. 
Matthew5:15 Kanjako abantu abasibaneki isibane, basibeke pantsi kwento yokulinganisa, koko basibeka pezu kwekandelare, size sikanyele bonke abasendlwini." 
Matthew5:16 Kwa njalo makukanye ukukanya kwenu pambi kwabantu, ukuze babone imisebenzi yenu elungileyo, badumise uyihlo osezulwini." 
Matthew5:17 Ningabi ndeza ukutshabalalisa umteto, umhlaumbi abaprofite; andizanga ukutshabalalisa, koko ndize ukuzalisekisa." 
Matthew5:18 Ngokuba ngokwenene ndisiti kuni: Kude kudlule izulu nomhlaba, alisayi kuza lidlule nalinye iganyana umhlaumbi namnye umgcanyana emtetweni, kungekenzekanga konke." 
Matthew5:19 Ngako osukuba ewutshitshisa omnye walemiyalelo noko umncinane kuyo yonke, afundise abantu ngokunjalo, uya kubizwa ngokuba ngomncinane kubo bonke ebukumkanini bezulu; kodwa osukuba e y enza, e yi fundisa noku yi fundisa, lowo uya kubizwa ngokuba ngomkulu ebukumkanini bezulu." 
Matthew5:20 Ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Xeshekweni ubulungisa benu bungagqitisanga kw o?-? bababa̔li nabafarisi, anisayi kuza ningene ebukumkanini bezulu." 
Matthew5:21 Nivile ukuba kwatiwa kubo abakudala: Akuyi kubulala; woti osukuba ebulala amelwe ngamatyala amancinane. 
Matthew5:22 Mna kanti nditi kuni: Osukuba equmbela umzalwana wake kungeko nto, uya kumelwa ngamatyala amancinane; nosukuba esiti kumzalwana wake: Geza! uya kumelwa ngamatyala amakulu; kodwa osukuba esiti: Nkewundini! uya kumelwa kukuposwa esihogweni somlilo." 
Matthew5:23 Ngako xeshekweni uwuzisa umnikelo wako esibingelweni, uti ulapo ukumbule ukuba umzalwana wako unendawo ngakuwe;" 
Matthew5:24 wushiye apo umnikelo wako pambi kwesibingelo, uhambe ke, uti kuqala uxolelane nomzalwana wako, wandule uze unikele umnikelo wako." 
Matthew5:25 Nxa̔ma ukuvumelana nalowo ukumangeleleyo, nxa usenaye endleleni; hleze omangeleyo akunikele emgwebini, ati umgwebi akunikele emsileni, uze uposwe entolongweni." 
Matthew5:26 Ngokwenene nditi kuwe: Akusayi kuza upume kona, ungekahlauli imalana yokugqibela." 
Matthew5:27 Nivile ukuba kwatiwa kubo abakudala: Akuyi kuṙexeza. 
Matthew5:28 Mna kanti nditi kuni: Osukuba ekangela umfazi ngokunga angamkanuka, usele wenzile uṙexezo naye ngentliziyo yake." 
Matthew5:29 Ukuba ngoko iliso lako lokunene liyakuxakanisa, lincotule, ulilahle kuwe; ngokuba kulungele wena ukuba kubube libe linye emalungwini ako, kuze kungaposwa wonke umzimba wako esihogweni somlilo." 
Matthew5:30 Kanjalo ukuba isandla sako sokunene siyakuxakanisa, sinqumle, usilahle kuwe; ngokuba kulungele wena ukuba kubube libe linye emalungwini ako, kuze kungaposwa wonke umzimba wako esihogweni somlilo." 
Matthew5:31 Kwatwa ke: Osukuba elahla umfazi wake, makamnike isiba̔lo sokwahlukanisa." 
Matthew5:32 Mna kanti nditi kuni: Osukuba elahla umfazi wake, enga mlahli ngenxa yombulo kupela, uyamṙexezisa; nosukuba ezeka umfazi olahliweyo, uyaṙexeza naye." 
Matthew5:33 Kanjako nivile ukuba kwatiwa kubo abakudala: Akuyi kwapula ukufunga kwako; uya kufezela uyehova izifungo zako. 
Matthew5:34 Mna kanti nditi kuni: Ningake nifunge; ninga lifungi izulu, ngokuba liyiterone katixo;" 
Matthew5:35 nomhlaba ngokuba usisitulo senyawo zake; ne‐Yerusaleme, ngokuba isisixeko sokumkani omkulu." 
Matthew5:36 Kanjalo intloko yako akuyi kuyifunga, ngokuba ungenamandla okwenza nalunye unwele lube mhlope, umhlaumbi lube mnyama." 
Matthew5:37 Maliti kodwa ilizwi lenu libe lelokuti, ewe, ewe; hai, hai; ngokuba oko kugqitileyo koku kuvela kokukohlakeleyo." 
Matthew5:38 Nivile ukuba kwatiwa: Iliso ngenxa yeliso, nezinyo ngenxa yezinyo." 
Matthew5:39 Mna kanti nditi kuni: Musani ukumelana nokohlakeleyo; kodwa Osukuba ekutywakaza esidleleni sako sokunene, mnikele esinye naso" 
Matthew5:40 Kanjalo osukuba efuna ukukumema, nokuhluta isivato sako sapantsi, myekele nengubo." 
Matthew5:41 Nosukuba ekunyanzela uye imeyile ibe nye, hamba naye zibe mbini." 
Matthew5:42 Yipa lowo ucelayo kuwe; nalowo ofuna ukuboleka kuwe, ungapambuki kuye." 
Matthew5:43 Nivile ukuba kwatiwa: Uya kutanda umhlobo wako, utiye utshaba lwako." 
Matthew5:44 Mna kanti nditi kuni: Tandani intshaba zenu, tamsanqelisani abo baniqalekisayo, benzeleni okulungileyo abo banitiyayo, nitandazele abo banipata kakubi nabanitshutshisayo;" 
Matthew5:45 ukuze nibe lusapo lwoyihlo osezulwini; ngokuba ilanga lake elipumisa pezu kwabakohlakeleyo nabalungileyo, nemvula eyinisa pezu kwabalungisayo nabangalungisiyo." 
Matthew5:46 Ngokuba, xeshekweni nitanda abo banitandayo nina, niba nomvuzo omnina? abenzi into ekwa yiyo na nababuti beminikelo?" 
Matthew5:47 Naxeshekweni nibulisa abazalwana benu bodwa, niyenza nto nina egqitiseleyo? abenje njalo na nababuti beminikelo?" 
Matthew5:48 Ize nina ngoko nibe nifezekile: njengokuba uyihlo osezulwini efezekile. 
Matthew6:1 LUMKANI ukuba ningenzi amalizo enu ebusweni babantu, ngokunga ningabonelwa ngabo; okanye, aninawo umvuzo kuyihlo osezulwini." 
Matthew6:2 Ngako nxa uwenza amalizo, ungahlokomisi ixilongo pambi kwako, njengokuba abahanahanisi besenza ezindlwini zentlanganiso nasezindleleni, ukuze badunyiswe ngabantu. Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Sebewamkele umvuzo wabo." 
Matthew6:3 Kodwa wena wakuwenza amalizo, masingazi isandla sako sokohlo into eyenziwayo sesokunene sako:" 
Matthew6:4 ukuze amalizo ako abe semfihlekweni; noyihlo obonayo emfihlekweni, kwa yena wokuvuza ekuhleni." 
Matthew6:5 Kanjalo nxa utandazayo, akuyi kuba njengabahanahanisi; ngokuba betanda ukutandaza bemi ezindlwini zentlanganiso nasekujikeni kwezitarate, ukuze babonakale ebantwini. Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Sebewamkele umvuzo wabo." 
Matthew6:6 Kodwa wena, nxa utandazayo, ngena enkambilini yako, uti wakuba uvalile ucango lwako, utandaze kuyihlo osemfihlekweni; noyihlo obonayo emfihlekweni, uya kukuvuza ekuhleni." 
Matthew6:7 Kodwa nakutandaza, ningenzi imilembelele engendawo, njengabaheyideni; ngokuba beba baya kuviwa ngokuteta kwabo okuninzi." 
Matthew6:8 Ize ningafani nabo ke; ngokuba uyihlo ezazi into enizisweleyo, ningekaceli kuye." 
Matthew6:9 Ngako tandazani nina ngokunje, niti: Bawo wetu osezulwini! Malipatwe ngobungcwele igama lako." 
Matthew6:10 Ubukumkani bako mabufike. Intando yako mayenziwe emhlabeni, njengokuba isenziwa ezulwini." 
Matthew6:11 Sipe namhla nje ukutya kwetu kwemihla ngemihla. 
Matthew6:12 Usixolele izono zetu, njengokuba nati sixolela abo basonayo tina." 
Matthew6:13 Ungasingenisi ekulingweni, zusisindise enkohlakalweni. Ngokuba bubobako ubukumkani, namandla, nobungcwalisa, kude kube ngunapakade. Amene." 
Matthew6:14 Ngokuba xeshekweni nibaxolela abantu iziposo zabo, uyihlo wasezulwini wonixolela nani:" 
Matthew6:15 kodwa xeshekweni ningabaxoleli abantu iziposo zabo, kanjalo uyihlo akayi ku ni xolela iziposo zenu." 
Matthew6:16 Kanjako nxa nizilayo ukutya, ningabi njengabahanahanisi nisiti kunubembe; ngokuba bebenza bubi ubuso babo, ukuze babonakale ebantwini bezila. Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Sebewamkele umvuzo wabo." 
Matthew6:17 Wena kodwa, wakuzila ukutya, tambisa intloko yako, nobuso bako buhlambe;" 
Matthew6:18 ukuze ungabonakali ebantwini uzila, kodwa ubonakale kuyihlo osemfihlekweni; noyihlo obonayo emfihlekweni, uya kukuvuza ekuhleni." 
Matthew6:19 Ningazibekeli indyebo emhlabeni, apo kugugisayo inundu nomhlwa, nalapo amasela agqoboza ebe̔ kona:" 
Matthew6:20 kodwa zibekeleni indyebo ezulwini, apo kungagugisi nenundu nomhlwa, nalapo amasela angagqobozi angebi̔ kona:" 
Matthew6:21 ngokuba apo ikona indyebo yenu, yoba kwa kona nentliziyo yenu." 
Matthew6:22 Isibane somzimba sililiso: ngako xeshekweni iliso lako lingenanto, wonke umzimba wako woba nokukanya:" 
Matthew6:23 kodwa xeshekweni iliso lako lenzakele, wonke umzimba wako woba mnyama. Ukuba ngoko ukukanya okupakati kwako kububumnyama, ubumnyama obo bukulu kangakananina!" 
Matthew6:24 Akuko mntu ongakonzayo inkosi ezimbini: ngokuba eya kutiya enye, atande enye; okanye, uya kubambelela kwenye, adele enye. Aningekonze utixo nobutyebi kunye." 
Matthew6:25 Ngako oku nditi kuni: Musani kutukutezelela ubomi benu, ukuba notya nto nina, nokuba nosela nto nina; ninga tukutezel eli nomzimba wenu, ukuba niya kwambata nto nina: ubomi abukulu na kuko ukutya? nomzimba awumkulu na kuzo izivato?" 
Matthew6:26 Kangelani intaka zezulu, okokuba azihlwayeli, azivuni, azibuteli eziseleni, kanti uyihlo wasezulwini uyazondla noko: kekaloku nina anigqitisele zona kakulu na?" 
Matthew6:27 Nguwupina ke kuni ongati ngokutukutezela ongezelele ebudeni bake ikubite ibe nye? 
Matthew6:28 Kanjalo yinina ukuba nitukutuzelele izivato? Gqalani inyibiba zasendle, ukuba ziti nina ukuhluma; azisebenzi, azisonti kanjako:" 
Matthew6:29 kanti nditi kuni, kwa u‐Solomone kubo bonke ubungcwalisa bake akavatiswanga njengenye yezi." 
Matthew6:30 Ukuba ke inca yasendle, eti namhla ibeko, iti ngomso iposwe eziko, utixo uyenje njalo ukuyambatisa, akayi kunambatisa nina kakulu ngakumbi na, nina balukolo luncinane?" 
Matthew6:31 Ngako ningabi nakutukutezela, nisiti: Sotya nto nina? umhlaumbi: Sosela nto nina? umhlaumbi: Sovata nto nina?" 
Matthew6:32 (ngokuba zonke ezizinto abaheyideni bezifuna:) ngokuba esazi uyihlo wasezulwini ukuba niziswele ezizinto zonke. 
Matthew6:33 Kodwa funani kuqala ubukumkani bukatixo, nobulungisa bake, zaziya kuti zonke ezizinto zongezelelwe kuni." 
Matthew6:34 Ngako ningatukutezeleli imini yangomso; ngokuba imini yangomso iya kutukutezelela okwayo. Kwanele imini yanamhla eyayo inkatazo. 
Matthew7:1 NINGABEKI tyala, ukuze ningabekelwa tyala nani:" 
Matthew7:2 ngokuba ukubekwa kwetyala enibeka ngako, niya kubekelwa kona; nokulinganisa enilinganisa ngako, kwobuya kulinganiselwe nina." 
Matthew7:3 Kuyinina ukuba ukangela icetyana elisesweni lomzalwana wako, kodwa umqadi osesweni lako akuwunakani?" 
Matthew7:4 Woti nina nokuti kumzalwana wako: Vuma ndiliku̔pe icetyana esweni lako; kanti nangu umqadi kwelako iliso? 
Matthew7:5 Sihanahanisindini! wuku̔pe kuqala umqadi esweni lako, wauya kwandula ukolise ukubona ukuliku̔pa icetyana esweni lomzalwana wako." 
Matthew7:6 Ninganiki okungcwele ezinjeni; kanjako ningaposi iperule zenu pambi kwehangu, hleze zizinyatele ngamanqina azo, zijike ziniqwenge." 
Matthew7:7 Celani, naniya kupiwa; funani, naniya kufumana: qongqotani, naniya kuvulelwa." 
Matthew7:8 Ngokuba bonke abacelayo besamkela, nofunayo uyafumana, noqongqotayo uya kuvulelwa." 
Matthew7:9 Nguwupina ke kuni engumntu oya kuti, ukuba unyana wake uyacela isonka, amnikele ilitye?" 
Matthew7:10 ati, ukuba uyacela intlanzi, amnikele inyoka?" 
Matthew7:11 Ngako ukuba nina, nikohlakele nje, niyazi ukupa abantwana benu izipo ezilungileyo, kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi aya kuti uyihlo osezulwini ape abo bacelayo kuye into ezilungileyo?" 
Matthew7:12 Ngako zonke izinto enitanda ukuba abantu bazenze kuni, yenzani nani ngokunjalo kubo; ngokuba oku kungumteto nabaprofite." 
Matthew7:13 Ngenani ngesango elixineneyo; ngokuba libanzi isango, inkulu nendlela esinga entshabalalweni, bebaninzi nabo abangenayo ngalo:" 
Matthew7:14 ngokuba lixinene isango, icutekile nendlela esinga ebomini, bebancinane nabo abayifumanayo." 
Matthew7:15 Lumkelani ke abaprofite ababuxoki, abezayo kuni ngezivato zegusha, kanti ngapakati bazincu̔ka ezixwilayo." 
Matthew7:16 Niya kubazi ngezixakato zabo. Kuka kukiwe idreyive emitolweni na? umhlaumbi amakiwane ezipingweni na? 
Matthew7:17 Kwa njalo yonke imiti elungileyo iyahlanza izixakato ezilungileyo; kodwa umti obolileyo uyahlanza izixakato ezikohlakeleyo. 
Matthew7:18 Umti olungileyo awungehlanze izixakato ezikohlakeleyo; kanjalo umti obolileyo awungehlanze izixakato ezilungileyo. 
Matthew7:19 Yonke imiti engahlanziyo izixakato ezilungileyo iyagaulwa, iposwe emlilweni." 
Matthew7:20 Ngoko ke niya kubazi ngezixakato zabo. 
Matthew7:21 Asi ngabo bonke abati kum: Nkosi, Nkosi! abaya kungena ebukumkanini bezulu; koko ngowenzayo intando kabawo osezulwini." 
Matthew7:22 Baninzi abaya kuti kum ngalomini: Nkosi, Nkosi! asati na ngegama lako saprofitesha, nangegama lako saziku̔pa idemoni, nangegama lako senza izenzo zamandla ezininzi?" 
Matthew7:23 ndandiya kwandula ndixele kubo ukuti: Andizanga ndinazi; mukani kum, nina bakwenzayo okungalungileyo!" 
Matthew7:24 Ngako lowo usukuba eweva lamazwi am, awenze, ndomfanekisa nomntu olumkileyo, owakayo indlu yake elulwalweni:" 
Matthew7:25 yaza yehla imvula, yeza nemisinga, yaquta nemimoya, yayiwela leyondlu; ayawa noko; ngokuba ibisekelwe elulwalweni." 
Matthew7:26 Kanjalo osukuba eweva lamazwi am, angawenzi, wofanekiswa nomntu osidenge, owakayo indlu yake entlabatini:" 
Matthew7:27 yaza yehla imvula, yeza nemisinga, yaquta nemimoya, yabeta kuleyondlu; yawa ke; sati isiwo sayo sasikulu." 
Matthew7:28 Kwaye kute, okuya abezigqibile u‐Yesu iziteto ezi, izihlwele zibe zimangaliswa pezu kwokufundisa kwake;" 
Matthew7:29 ngokuba ebezifundisa njengonegunya, bekungenjengababa̔li." 
Matthew8:1 KEKALOKU akuhla entabeni, zamlandela izihlwele ezininzi." 
Matthew8:2 Kwaza kwati, bona ke, ileperi leza lambedesha, lisiti: Nkosi! ukuba uyatanda, ungandihlambulula." 
Matthew8:3 Waza u‐Yesu wasolula isandla, walicu̔kumisa, esiti: Ndiyatanda; hlambuluka. Sasesihlanjululwa kwa oko isilepero salo." 
Matthew8:4 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kulo: Lumka ungaxeleli mntu; kodwa hamba, zibonakalise kumperisite, unikele umnikelo wabeyalela wona u‐Mosesi, ube sisinqi̔no kubo." 
Matthew8:5 Kekaloku akuba u‐Yesu engene e‐Kapenayume, kweza kuye inkosikulu imbongoza," 
Matthew8:6 isiti nokuti: Nkosi! isicaka sam silele ngendlu sinesifo sokushwabanisa, sibulawa kakulu." 
Matthew8:7 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuyo: Ndiya kuza ndisipilise. 
Matthew8:8 Yaza yapendula inkosikulu yati: Nkosi! andifanelekile ukuba ungene ngapantsi kwentungo yendlu yam; teta libe lilizwi kodwa, sasiya kuti isicaka sam sipiliswe." 
Matthew8:9 Ngokuba nam ndingumntu pantsi kwegunya labanye, ndinamasodati pantsi kwam; nditi ke kwelinye: Yiya! liye ke; nakwelinye: Yiza! lize ke; nakwisicaka sam: Yenza oku! senze ke." 
Matthew8:10 Waza u‐Yesu akuva oku wati nqa, wati kwabalandelayo: Ngokwenene nditi kuni, andifumananga lukolo olungaka nakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Matthew8:11 Kanjalo nditi kuni: Baninzi abaya kuza bevela empumalanga nasentshonalanga, bahlale pantsi ndawonye no‐Abrahame, no‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi, ebukumkanini bezulu:" 
Matthew8:12 kodwa usapo lwobukumkani luya kulahlelwa ebumnyameni bangapandle; apo kwobako ukulila nokuqaqazela kwamazinyo. 
Matthew8:13 Waza wati u‐Yesu kwinkosikulu: Hamba, makube njalo kuwe njengokukolwa kwako. Sati isicaka sayo sapiliswa kwa ngeloxeshana." 
Matthew8:14 Kekaloku xeshekweni u‐Yesu ebengene endlwini ka‐Petrosi, wabona umkwekazi wake elele, esifa licesine." 
Matthew8:15 Waza wacu̔kumisa isandla sake, lamyeka icesine: wesuka ke, wabakonza." 
Matthew8:16 Kwati kwakuhlwa, kwaziswa kuye abangenelwa zidemoni abaninzi; waza wabaku̔pa omoya ngelizwi, nabo bonke ababesifa wabapilisa:" 
Matthew8:17 ukuze kuzaliseke oko kwatetwayo ngu‐Yisaya umprofite, esiti: Yena izilwelwe zetu wazitabata, nezifo zetu wazitwala." 
Matthew8:18 Kekaloku akubona u‐Yesu izihlwele ezininzi zimpahla, waxela ukuba kumkiwe kuyiwe ecaleni elingapesheya." 
Matthew8:19 Waza umba̔li otile weza wati kuye: Mfundisi! ndokulandela, apo usukuba uhambela kona." 
Matthew8:20 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Impungutye zineminxuma, nentaka zezulu zinendawo zokuhlala; kanti unyana wesintu akanandawo apo angalalisa kona intloko." 
Matthew8:21 Kanjalo omnye wabadisipile bake wati kuye: Nkosi! ndivumele nditi tanci ndihambe ndiye kuncw̔aba ubawo. 
Matthew8:22 Kodwa u‐Yesu wati kuye: Ndilandele, uze uyekele abafileyo ukuncw̔aba abafileyo bakowabo." 
Matthew8:23 Kwati akungena enqanaweni, bamlandela abadisipile bake." 
Matthew8:24 Kekaloku bona ke, uqwitela olukulu lwesuka elwandle, yada inqanawa yafun’ ukuselelwa ngamaza; kodwa yena ebelele." 
Matthew8:25 Baza abadisipile bake beza bamvusa, besiti: Nkosi, sisindise, siyabuba!" 
Matthew8:26 Wayesiti kubo: Yinina ukuba ninobugwala, nina balukolo luncinane? Wandula wavuka wakalimela imimoya nolwandle, kwaza kwabako ukuzola okukulu." 
Matthew8:27 Bati nqa ke abantu abo, besiti: ngumntu ote nina lo, lento aviwa nayimimoya nalulwandle!" 
Matthew8:28 Kwati akufika ecaleni elingapesheya, ezweni lama‐Giregashe, kwamkaulela abangenelwa zidemoni ababini bepuma emancw̔abeni, benobuṙalaṙume kunene, kwada akwabiko mntu ongadlulayo ngaleyo indlela." 
Matthew8:29 Kekaloku bona ke, badanduluka, besiti: Siyinto nina kuwe, Yesu, Nyana katixo? uze apa ukuza kusimbela ixesha lingekabiko na?" 
Matthew8:30 Kwabekuko ukude nabo umhlambi wehangu ezininzi usidla. 
Matthew8:31 Zaza idemoni zambongoza, zisiti: Ukuba uyasiku̔pa, sivumele siye singene emhlambini wehangu." 
Matthew8:32 Wayesiti kuzo: Hambani. Zapuma ke, zaya zangena emhlambini wehangu; kekaloku bona ke, wonke umhlambi wehangu wagalelekela ngeliwa apo elwandle, zabubela emanzini." 
Matthew8:33 Baza abo babesalusa babaleka, baya esixekweni, bashumayela konke, nendawo zabangenelwa zidemoni." 
Matthew8:34 Sati, bona ke, sonke isixeko sapuma ukuya kumhlangabeza u‐Yesu: bati bakumbona, babongoza ukuba makesuke emideni yabo." 
Matthew9:1 Waza wangena enqanaweni, wawela, weza kwesake isixeko." 
Matthew9:2 Kekaloku bona ke, bazisa kuye umntu onesifo sokushwabanisa elele eluku̔kweni: waza u‐Yesu wabona ukolo lwabo, wati konesifo sokushwabanisa: Yomelela, nyanandini! uxolelwe izono zako." 
Matthew9:3 Kekaloku bona ke, ababa̔li abatile bati ngapakati kwabo: Lo uyagxeka u‐Tixo." 
Matthew9:4 Waza u‐Yesu wabona izicingo zabo, wati: Yinina ukuba nizicinge izinto ezikohlakeleyo ezintliziyweni zenu?" 
Matthew9:5 ngokuba okona kulula kukupina; ukuti: Uxolelwe izono zako; ukuti: Suka, uhambe; kusinina?" 
Matthew9:6 kodwa ukuze nazi ukuba unyana wesintu unegunya emhlabeni ukuxolela izono, (wandula wati konesifo sokushwabanisa:) Suka, upate uku̔lo lwako, uye endlwini yako." 
Matthew9:7 Wesuka ke, wemka waya endlwini yake." 
Matthew9:8 Zati izihlwele zakubona oku zati nqa, zamdumisa utixo, obenike igunya elingakanana ebantwini." 
Matthew9:9 WAZA u‐Yesu edlula apo wabona umntu ehleli endaweni yokwamkela iminikelo, o‐kutiwa ngu‐Mateyu, wati kuye: Ndilandele. Wesuka ke, wamlandela." 
Matthew9:10 Kwaza kwati, nxa abehleli ekutyeni endlwini, kekaloku bona ke, into eninzi yababuti beminikelo naboni beza bahlala ekutyeni ndawonye no‐Yesu nabadisipile bake." 
Matthew9:11 Baza abafarisi, bakubona oku, bati kubadisipile bake: Kunganina ukuba atye umfundisi wenu kunye nababuti beminikelo naboni?" 
Matthew9:12 Koko u‐Yesu, evile nje, wati kubo: Abomeleleyo abasweli gqir̔a; ngabafayo abalisweleyo." 
Matthew9:13 Kodwa hambani nifunde ukuba kuti nina, — Ndiyafuna ububele, andi funi umbingo; ngokuba ndingezanga ukubiza abalungileyo, koko ndize ukubiza aboni baguquke." 
Matthew9:14 Kwandula kweza kuye abadisipile baka‐Johane, besiti: Kunganina ukuba kufuti tina nabafarisi sizila ukutya, kanti abadisipile bako abakuzili?" 
Matthew9:15 Waza wati u‐Yesu kubo: Usapo lwenkambili yomtshakazi lungaba lusizi na, nxa asenalo umyeni? kodwa iya kuza imihla okuya umyeni aya kususwa kulo, lwaluya kuzila ukutya oko ke." 
Matthew9:16 Akuko mntu ubeka isiziba sencawa engatutyulwanga engutyeni endala; ngokuba into efakiweyo iṙazula kwingubo, siti isiṙoba senzwe sibi ngakumbi." 
Matthew9:17 Kanjalo akutiwa iveyine entsha ezintsubeni ezindala; okanye, ziyagqoboka intsuba, ize ipalale iveyine, zitshabalale nentsuba: koko kutiwa iveyine entsha ezintsubeni ezikwa zintsha, zandul’ ukugcinwa zombini." 
Matthew9:18 Esateta ezizinto kubo, bona ke, kwafika umpati otile wambedesha, esiti: Intombi yam isand’ ukufa ngoku; kodwa yiza ubeke isandla sako pezu kwayo, yaiya kupila." 
Matthew9:19 Wesuka u‐Yesu wamlandela, kwa nabadisipile bake." 
Matthew9:20 Kekaloku bona ke, umfazi obenetombo legazi iminyaka yalishumi linamibini, weza ngasemva, wacu̔kumisa umqukumbelo wengubo yake:" 
Matthew9:21 ngokuba ebesiti ngapakati kwake: Ukuba ndiyacu̔kumisa ingubo yake kodwa, ndiya kupiliswa." 
Matthew9:22 Wajika ke u‐Yesu, wambona, wati: Yomelela, ntombi! ukolo lwako lukupilisile. Waza wapiliswa umfazi lowo kwa ngeloxeshana." 
Matthew9:23 Waza wangena u‐Yesu endlwini yompati, wabona abagwali nomhlambi ungxola," 
Matthew9:24 wati kubo: Kwelelani; ngokuba intombazana ingafile, ilele butongo. Basuka bamhleka." 
Matthew9:25 Kuloko wati, wakuku̔tshelwa pandle umhlambi, wangena, wabamba isandla sayo, yavuka ke intombazana." 
Matthew9:26 Lwaza udumo lwalento lwapumela kulo lonke elolizwe. 
Matthew9:27 Kekaloku akuba ebedlula apo u‐Yesu, kwamlandela imfama ezimbini, zidanduluka, zisiti nokuti: Yiba netaṙu kuti, Nyana ka‐Davide!" 
Matthew9:28 Kwati akungena endlwini, zeza kuye imfama ezo; waza wati kuzo u‐Yesu: Niyakolwa na ukuba ndinamandla okwenza oku? Zati kuye: Ewe, Nkosi!" 
Matthew9:29 Wandula wacu̔kumisa amehlo azo, esiti: Makube njalo kuni njengokolo lwenu." 
Matthew9:30 Avulwa ke amehlo azo. Waza u‐Yesu waziyala kakulu, esiti: Lumkani kungaziwa mntu." 
Matthew9:31 Kodwa zapuma zavakalisa udumo lwake kulo lonke elozwe. 
Matthew9:32 Kekaloku nxa zibe zipuma, bona ke, kwaziswa kuye umntu osisidenge ongenelwe yidemoni." 
Matthew9:33 Kwati kwakuku̔tshwa idemoni, sateta isidenge; zaza zati nqa izihlwele, zisiti: Akuzanga kubonwe ngokunjalo kwa‐Sirayeli." 
Matthew9:34 Kodwa abafarisi bati: Uyaziku̔pa idemoni ngayo inkosi yedemoni. 
Matthew9:35 WAZA u‐Yesu wajikajikela izixeko zonke nemizi, efundisa ezindlwini zentlanganiso zabo, eshumayela ivangeli yobukumkani, epilisa zonke izifo nazo zonke izikuhlane ebantwini." 
Matthew9:36 Wati akubona izihlwele, wabetwa lusizi ngazo, ngokuba zibe zicubukile zilahliwe njengezimvu ezingenamalusi." 
Matthew9:37 Wandul’ ukuti kubadisipile bake: Isivuno okunene sininzi, kodwa abasebenzi bancinane;" 
Matthew9:38 tandazani ngoko kwinkosi yesivuno, ize iku̔pele esivunweni sayo abasebenzi." 
Matthew10:1 Waza wabiza abadisipile bake abalishumi linababini, wabanika igunya pezu kwomoya abanco̔lileyo, lokuba babaku̔pe, nelokupilisa zonke izifo nazo zonke izikuhlane." 
Matthew10:2 Kekaloku amagama abapostile abalishumi linababini ngawo la: Owokuqala, u‐Simone o‐kutiwa ngu‐Petrosi, no‐Andreya umninawe wake; u‐Yakobi unyana ka‐Zebedi, no‐Johane umninawe wake;" 
Matthew10:3 u‐Filipi, no‐Batolomeyu; u‐Tomasi, no‐Mateyu umbuti weminikelo; u‐Yakobi unyana ka‐Alefeyu, no‐Lebeyu owatiywa elinye igama elingu‐Tadeyu;" 
Matthew10:4 u‐Simone umkanani, no‐Jude Sikariyoti, okwa nguye owamngcatshayo." 
Matthew10:4 u‐Simone umkanani, no‐Jude Sikariyoti, okwa nguye owamngcatshayo." 
Matthew10:5 Aba balishumi linababini wabatuma u‐Yesu, wabayalela, esiti: Ningemkeli endleleni yabaheyideni, nasesixekweni sama‐Samariya ningangeni;" 
Matthew10:6 yiyani kodwa ngakumbi ezigusheni ezilahlekileyo zendlu ka‐Sirayeli. 
Matthew10:7 Niti ke ekuyeni kwenu nishumayele, nisiti: Ubukumkani bezulu sebukufupi." 
Matthew10:8 Pilisani abafayo, hlambululani amaleperi, vusani abafileyo, ku̔pani idemoni: namkele ngesisa, yipani ngesisa." 
Matthew10:9 Ningazizuzeli igolide, nesilivere, nobedu, zibe semibinqweni yenu;" 
Matthew10:10 kwa nenxowa ibe yeyendlela, nengubo ezimbini, nezihlangu, nentonga; ngokuba umsebenzi efanele ukutya kwake." 
Matthew10:11 Kanjalo isixeko umhlaumbi umzi onisukuba ningena kuwo, buzani ofanelekileyo kuwo ungubanina; nize nihlale kona, nide nimke." 
Matthew10:12 Niti nakungena endlwini, niyibulise:" 
Matthew10:13 ukuba ke ifanelekile indlu leyo, maluze uxolo lwenu pezu kwayo; ukuba kodwa ayifanelekile, uxolo lwenu malubuyele kuni." 
Matthew10:14 Nosukuba enganamkeli nina, engaweva namazwi enu, niti nakupuma kulondlu umhlaumbi kwesosixeko, nivutulule utuli lwenyawo zenu." 
Matthew10:15 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Kwonyamezelekela ilizwe lase‐Sodome ne‐Gomora ngomhla womgwebo, ngapezu kwesosixeko." 
Matthew10:16 Bona ke, ndiyanituma njengezimvu pakati kwencu̔ka: yibani ngoko ninobulumko njengenyoka, nibe ningenabuqokolo njengamahobe." 
Matthew10:17 Kodwa lumkelani abantu: ngokuba beya kuninikela ematyaleni, banibete ezindlwini zentlanganiso zabo;" 
Matthew10:18 ewe, naniya kusiwa pambi kwenkosi nokumkani ngenxa yam, kube sisinqi̔no kubo nakulaheyideni." 
Matthew10:19 Kodwa okuya baninikelayo, ningabi nasitukutezi sokuba noteta ngokunjanina umhlaumbi noteta nto nina; ngokuba niya kunikwa ngeloxeshana into eniya kuyiteta:" 
Matthew10:20 ngokuba kungenini abatetayo, kungumoya woyihlo otetayo pakati kwenu." 
Matthew10:21 Woti umzalwana anikele umzalwana ekufeni, noyise wonikela umntwana; kanjalo abantwana baya kusukela abazali, babatise:" 
Matthew10:22 naniya kutiywa nga bantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam; kodwa onyamezelayo kude kube sekupeleni, oyena uya kusindiswa." 
Matthew10:23 Koko xeshekweni banitshutshisayo kwesisixeko, sabelani kwesinye; ngokuba ngokwenene ndisiti kuni: Anisayi kuba nigqibile izixeko zakwa‐Sirayeli ukuzihamba, engekafiki unyana wesintu." 
Matthew10:24 Umdisipile akapezulu kumfundisi; nesicaka asipezulu kwinkosi yaso. 
Matthew10:25 Kwanele umdisipile ukuba abe njengomfundisi wake, nesicaka ukuba sibe njengenkosi yaso. Ukuba umninindlu bambizile ngo‐Belezebule, kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi ukubiza kwabo abendlu yake?" 
Matthew10:26 Ize ningaboyiki ke: ngokuba kungeko nto egujungelweyo, engayi kutyilwa; nefihlakeleyo, engayi kwaziwa." 
Matthew10:27 Oko ndikutetayo kuni ebumnyameni, kuxeleni ekukanyeni; noko nikuvayo endlebeni, kushumayeleni pezu kwentungo zezindlu." 
Matthew10:28 Kanjalo ningaboyiki abo babulala umzimba, kanti umpefumlo abanamandla okuwubulala: niti kodwa ngakumbi noyike lowo unamandla okububisa kwa nompefumlo nomzimba esihogweni somlilo." 
Matthew10:29 Akutengiswa amahobohobo mabini ngedobulitye na? noko akuyi kuwa nalinye kuwo pezu kwomhlaba engazi uyihlo. 
Matthew10:30 Kodwa nina, kwa inwele zentloko zenu zibaliwe zonke." 
Matthew10:31 Ize ningoyiki ke; nigqitisele amahobohobo amaninzi nina. 
Matthew10:32 Ngako osukuba endivuma mna ebusweni babantu, nam ndiya kumvuma yena ebusweni bobawo osezulwini:" 
Matthew10:33 kodwa osukuba endikanyela mna ebusweni babantu, nam ndiya kumkanyela yena ebusweni bobawo osezulwini." 
Matthew10:34 Ningabi ndeza ukutuma uxolo emhlabeni; andeza ukutuma uxolo, koko ndize ukutuma isiṙele." 
Matthew10:35 Ngokuba ndize ukubambanisa umntu noyise, nentombi nonina, nomolokazana nonina wendoda:" 
Matthew10:36 ewe, intshaba zomntu zoba ngabendlu yake." 
Matthew10:37 Otandayo uyise umhlaumbi unina ngapezu kwam, akandifanele; notandayo unyana umhlaumbi intombi ngapezu kwam, akandifanele." 
Matthew10:38 Kanjalo lowo ungatabati ikuruse yake, alandele emva kwam, akandifanele." 
Matthew10:39 Ofumene ubomi bake, buya kumlahleka; nolahlekene nobomi bake ngenxa yam, wobufumana." 
Matthew10:40 Owamkela nina, uyandamkela mna; nowamkela mna, uyamamkela owanditumayo." 
Matthew10:41 Owamkela umprofite egameni lomprofite, uya kuwamkela umvuzo womprofite; nowamkela ilunga egameni lelunga, uya kuwamkela umvuzo welunga:" 
Matthew10:42 nosukuba eseza omnye waba bancinane indebe y amanzi abandayo odwa egameni lomdisipile, ngokwenene nditi kuni, akayi kulahlekana nomvuzo wake nakanye." 
Matthew11:1 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni abegqibile u‐Yesu ukuyalela abadisipile bake abalishumi linababini, wesuka apo ukuya kufundisa nokushumayela ezixekweni zabo." 
Matthew11:2 KEKALOKU u‐Johane akuyiva entolongweni imisebenzi ka‐Kristu, watuma ababini bakubadisipile bake," 
Matthew11:3 wati kuye: Unguye ozayo na, silinde wumbi kusinina?" 
Matthew11:4 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Hambani nishumayeze u‐Johane izinto enizivileyo nenizibonileyo: 
Matthew11:5 imfama ziyamkela ukubona kwazo, neziqwala ziyahamba; amaleperi ayahlanjululwa, nezitulu ziyeva; abafileyo bayavuswa, namahlwempu indaba ezilungileyo ziyashunyayelwa kuwo." 
Matthew11:6 Kanjalo unetamsanqa osukuba engaxakaniswa ngam. 
Matthew11:7 Kekaloku bakumka aba, waqala u‐Yesu ukuti kwizihlwele ngaye u‐Johane: Napuma naya entlango ukuya kubonela nto nina? ingcongolo izanyazanyiswa ngumoya na?" 
Matthew11:8 Kodwa napuma ukuya kubona nto nina? umntu evatisiwe ngezivato ezitambileyo na? bona ke, abo bambata izivato ezitambileyo basezindlwini zokumkani." 
Matthew11:9 Kodwa napuma ukuya kubona nto nina? umprofite na? ewe, nditi kuni, nogqitisele umprofite." 
Matthew11:10 Ngokuba enguye lo kuba̔liwe ngaye ukuti: Bona ke, ndiyatuma isitunywa sam pambi kwobuso bako, esiya kulungisa indlela yako pambi kwako." 
Matthew11:11 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Akuvukanga pakati kwabazelweyo ngabafazi omkulu ku‐Johane umbapitizeshi; kodwa lowo umncinane kwabanye ebukumkanini bezulu umkulu kuye. 
Matthew11:12 Nakuselokwemihla ka‐Johane umbapitizeshi kwada kwakaloku nje, ubukumkani bezulu bunokunyanzelwa, bati abanyanzelayo banxamele ukububamba." 
Matthew11:13 Ngokuba bekuprofitesha bonke abaprofite nomteto kwada kwako u‐Johane. 
Matthew11:14 Kanjalo, ukuba niyavuma ukwamkela oku, yena ungu‐Elija obeza kuza." 
Matthew11:15 Onendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Matthew11:16 Kodwa ndosifanisa nanto nina isizukulwana esi? Siyafana nabantwana behleli ezindaweni zentengo, bememeza amakolwane abo," 
Matthew11:17 besiti nokuti: Sanigwalela, anaduda ke; sanenzela isililo, anenza sijwili ke." 
Matthew11:18 Ngokuba u‐Johane weza engatyi engaseli, baza bati: Unedemoni." 
Matthew11:19 Unyana wesintu weza esitya esela, baza bati: Nanku umntu ozinxalayo olinxila, umhlobo wababuti beminikelo naboni. Kanti ubulumko bugwetyelwe lusapo lwabo." 
Matthew11:20 Wandula waqala ukutetisa izixeko ekwenzelwa kuzo kakulu izenzo zake zamandla, ngokuba zingaguqukanga, esiti:" 
Matthew11:21 Hai ubunzima bako, Korazine! hai ubunzima bako, Betesayida! ngokuba izenzo zamandla ezenzelwa kuni ukuba zazenzelwe e‐Tire nase‐Tsidone, zinga zibe ziguqukile kade zinentlakantlaka notutu." 
Matthew11:22 Kanjako nditi kuni: Kwo‐nyamezelekela i‐Tire ne‐Tsidone ngomhla womgwebo, ngapezu kwenu." 
Matthew11:23 Nawe, Kapenayume! opakanyiselweyo kwa sezulwini, uya kuhliselwa kwa sehadesi: ngokuba izenzo zamandla ezenzelwa kuwe ukuba zazenzelwe e‐Sodome, inga iba isahleli kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Matthew11:24 Kanjako nditi kuni: Kwonyamezelekela ilizwe lase‐Sodome ngomhla womgwebo, ngapezu kwako." 
Matthew11:25 Ngeloxesha wapendula u‐Yesu wati: Ndiyakubulela, Bawo, Nkosi yezulu nomhlaba! ukuba ufihlele izilumko nezazi ezizinto, wazityilela intsana:" 
Matthew11:26 ewe, Bawo! ngokuba okunjalo bekukolekile ebusweni bako." 
Matthew11:27 Zonke izinto zinikelwe kum ngubawo: kanjako akuko mntu omaziyo unyana, kupela nguyise; noyise akuko mntu omaziyo, kupela ngunyana, nosukuba unyana etanda ukumtyilela yena." 
Matthew11:28 Yizani kum, nonke nina nidiniweyo nitwesiwe kakulu, ndandiya kuti mna ndinipumze." 
Matthew11:29 Twalani iyokwe yam pezu kwenu, nifunde ngam; ngokuba ndilulamile ndinentliziyo etobekileyo: naniya kufumanela imipefumlo yenu ukupumla." 
Matthew11:30 Ngokuba iyokwe yam iyolile, nomtwalo wam ulula." 
Matthew12:1 NGELOXESHA wacanda u‐Yesu emasimini ngemini yesabata: baza abadisipile bake balamba, baqala ukuka izikwebu, nokutya." 
Matthew12:2 Koko abafarisi, bakubona oko, bati kuye: Bona ke, abadisipile bako bayakwenza oko ekungafanelekile ukukwenza ngesabata." 
Matthew12:3 Waza wati kubo: Anileseshanga na into wayenzayo u‐Davide, okuya wabelambile yena nabo babenaye;" 
Matthew12:4 okokuba wangena endlwini katixo, watya izonka zokubonakala, ekube kungafanelekile kuye ukuzitya, kwa nakubo ababenaye, kupela bekufanelekile kubaperisite bodwa?" 
Matthew12:5 Kanjalo anileseshanga emtetweni na, ukuba ngemini yesabata abaperisite etempileni bayapula isabata, bengazeki tyala noko?" 
Matthew12:6 Kekaloku nditi kuni: Uko apa omkulu kuyo itempile. 
Matthew12:7 Kodwa ukuba benikwazile ukuba kuti nina, — Ndiyafuna ububele, andi funi umbingo; ngeningagwebanga abangenatyala." 
Matthew12:8 Ngokuba unyana wesintu eyinkosi yesabata nayo. 
Matthew12:9 Waza esukile apo waya wangena endlwini yentlanganiso yabo. 
Matthew12:10 Kekaloku bona ke, bekuko umntu enesandla esishwabeneyo: baza bambuza, besiti: Kufanelekile na ngemini yesabata ukupilisa? ukuze bamnike ityala." 
Matthew12:11 Wayesiti kubo: Woba nguwupina kuni engumntu, oya kuba nayo igusha, ongayi kuti, nxa yeyele le emnxu̔nyeni ngemini yesabata, ayibambe yona ayinyuse?" 
Matthew12:12 Kungento engakananina pofu umntu agqitisele igusha? Kwa njalo ke kufanelekile ngemini yesabata ukwenza okulungileyo. 
Matthew12:13 Wandula wati emntwini: Yolula isandla sako. Wayesolula ke, saza sabuya senziwa sipilile njengesinye." 
Matthew12:14 Baza bapuma abafarisi bacebisana ngakuye, ukuze bambubise." 
Matthew12:15 Kodwa u‐Yesu wakwazi oko, wemka apo: zaza zamlandela izihlwele ezininzi, wabapilisa bonke abafayo," 
Matthew12:16 wabayala ukuba mabangamtyili; 
Matthew12:17 kuze kuzaliseke oko kwatetwayo ngu‐Yisaya umprofite, esiti:" 
Matthew12:18 Kangela isicaka sam, endisinyulileyo; umtandwa wam, oti umpefumlo wam ukoliswe nguye; ndobeka umoya wam pezu kwake, nesigwebo uya kusishumayela kubaheyideni." 
Matthew12:19 Akayi kupika, akayi kudanduluka kanjako; aliyi kuviwa mntu nasezitarateni ilizwi lake." 
Matthew12:20 Ingcongolo etyumzekileyo akayi kuyapula, nomsonto wesibane oqu̔mayo akayi kuwucima, ade aku̔pe isigwebo ngokwoyisa:" 
Matthew12:21 nasegameni lake abaheyideni baya kutemba. 
Matthew12:22 Kwandula kwaziswa kuye ongenelwe yidemoni, oyimfama nesidenge; waza wampilisa, wada oyimfama nesidenge wanokuteta nokubona." 
Matthew12:23 Zamangaliswa ke zonke izihlwele, zati: Lo unguye unyana ka‐Davide na?" 
Matthew12:24 Kodwa abafarisi, bakuva, bati: Lo akaziku̔pi idemoni, kupela uyaziku̔pa ngo‐Belezebule inkosi yedemoni." 
Matthew12:25 Kuloko u‐Yesu wazazi izicingo zabo, wati kubo: Bonke ubukumkani obupambeneyo ngokwabo buyaci̔takaliswa; nazo zonke izixeko, umhlaumbi izindlu, ezipambeneyo ngokwazo, aziyi kuma." 
Matthew12:26 No‐Satane ukuba uyaku̔pa u‐Satane, upambene ngokwake; boti nina pofu ubukumkani bake ukuma?" 
Matthew12:27 Kanjalo ukuba ndiyaziku̔pa idemoni ngo‐Belezebule mna, bayaziku̔pa ngobanina onyana benu? ngako oko bona boba ngabagwebi benu." 
Matthew12:28 Kodwa ukuba ndiyaziku̔pa idemoni mna ngomoya katixo, kukona sebunifikele ubukumkani bukatixo." 
Matthew12:29 Kanjalo angati nina umntu ukungena endlwini yonamandla, apange impahla zake, nxa angatanga kuqala wamnxiba onamandla? waeya kwandul’ ukupanga indlu yake oko." 
Matthew12:30 Ongengecala lam, uyalana nam; nongabutani nam, uyaci̔ta." 
Matthew12:31 Ngako oko nditi kuni: Konke ukwona nokugxeka baya kuxolelwa kona abantu; kodwa ukumgxeka umoya oyingcwele abayi kuxolelwa kona abantu. 
Matthew12:32 Nosukuba eteta ilizwi ngakuye unyana wesintu, uya kuxolelwa; kodwa osukuba eteta ngakuye umoya oyingcwele, akayi kuxolelwa, nakwelilizwe likoyo, nakwelo liza kuza." 
Matthew12:33 Yenzani umti ulunge, kulunge nokuqa̔ma kwawo; okanye, yenzani umti ubole, kubole nokuqa̔ma kwawo; ngokuba umti usaziwa ngokuqa̔ma kwawo." 
Matthew12:34 Sizukulwanandini senyoka! ningati nina ukuteta izinto ezilungileyo, nikohlakele nje? ngokuba umlomo uteta okuvela ekupupumeni kwentliziyo." 
Matthew12:35 Umntu olungileyo kwimbekelo elungileyo yentliziyo yake uyaku̔pa izinto ezilungileyo; nomntu okohlakeleyo kwimbekelo ekohlakeleyo uyaku̔pa izinto ezikohlakeleyo. 
Matthew12:36 Kodwa nditi kuni: Onke amazwi angendawo, abasukuba bewateta abantu, baya kupendulela wona ngomhla womgwebo:" 
Matthew12:37 ngokuba ngawo amazwi ako uya kugwetyelwa, nangawo amazwi ako uya kugwetywa." 
Matthew12:38 Kwandula kwapendula abatile bakubo ababa̔li nabafarisi, besiti: Mfundisi! singa singabona umqondiso kuwe." 
Matthew12:39 Kodwa wapendula wati kubo: Isizukulwana esikohlakeleyo nesibuṙexeza siyafuna umqondiso; kanti asiyi kunikwa mqondiso, kupela umqondiso ka‐Jona umprofite." 
Matthew12:40 Ngokuba, njengokuba u‐Jona ebemini ntatu nobusuku butatu esiswini sentlanzi enkulu, kwa njalo unyana wesintu woba mini ntatu nobusuku butatu embilini womhlaba." 
Matthew12:41 Abantu base‐Nineve baya kusuka beme emgwetyweni kunye nesisizukulwana, basigwebe; ngokuba baguqukayo ngokushumayela kuka‐Jona: kanti nanku omkulu ku‐Jona apa." 
Matthew12:42 Ukumkanikazi wasesuyide uya kuvuka eme emgwetyweni kunye nesisizukulwana, asigwebe; ngokuba wavela ezipelweni zomhlaba ukuza kuva ubulumko buka‐Solomone: kanti nanku omkulu ku‐Solomone apa." 
Matthew12:43 Kodwa xeshekweni umoya onco̔lileyo apumile emntwini, uyacanda ezindaweni ezingenamanzi, efuna ukupumla, kanti akakufumani." 
Matthew12:44 Andule ukuti: Ndiya kubuyela endlwini yam, apo ndapuma kona. Ati akufika ayifumane ingenamntu, itshayelwe, ihonjiwe." 
Matthew12:45 Andule ukuya atabate naye abanye omoya abasixe̔nxe, abakohlakeleyo ngakumbi kuye, abati bangene bahlale kona: kuze kuti okwokupela kwalomntu kube kubi kokwokuqala. Kwoba njalo ke nakwesisizukulwana sikohlakeleyo." 
Matthew12:46 Kekaloku nxa abesateta kwizihlwele, bona ke, unina nabazalwana bake bebemi ngapandle, befuna ukuteta naye." 
Matthew12:47 Wayesiti otile kuye: Nanku unyoko nabazalwana bako bemi ngapandle, befuna ukuteta nawe." 
Matthew12:48 Koko wapendula wati kulowo ubetshilo kuye: Uma ungubanina? nabazalwana bam bangobanina? 
Matthew12:49 Waza wasolula isandla sake ngakubadisipile bake, wati: Nanku uma nabazalwana bam!" 
Matthew12:50 ngokuba lowo usukuba esenza intando kabawo osezulwini, ekwa nguye umzalwana wam, nodade wam, noma." 
Matthew13:1 KWA ngalomini wapuma u‐Yesu endlwini, wahlala pantsi ngaselwandle." 
Matthew13:2 Zaza zabutela kuye izihlwele ezininzi, wada wangena enqanaweni, wahlala pantsi: saye sonke isihlwele sibe simi elunxwemeni." 
Matthew13:3 Waza wateta kubo indawo ezininzi ngemizekeliso, esiti: Bona ke, umhlwayeli wapuma ukuya kuhlwayela;" 
Matthew13:4 nasekuhlwayeleni kwake, ezinye inkozo zawa ngasendleleni, zati intaka zeza zazidla." 
Matthew13:5 Zawa nezinye endaweni ebulwalwa, apo bezingenawo umhlaba omninzi; zaza zasezipuma kamsinya, ngokuba zingenabo ubunzulu bomhlaba:" 
Matthew13:6 zati nxa ilanga belipumile, zatshiswa; nangokuba zingenangcambo, zabuna." 
Matthew13:7 Zawa nezinye endaweni yemitolo; yaza imitolo yahluma, yazitshwencisa." 
Matthew13:8 Zawa nezinye emhlabeni olungileyo, zanika isiqa̔mo ke, olunye ngekulu, nolunye ngamashumi matandatu, nolunye ngamashumi matatu." 
Matthew13:9 Onendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Matthew13:10 Beza ke abadisipile bati kuye: Kunganina ukuba utete nabo ngemizekeliso? 
Matthew13:11 Wapendula wati kubo: Kungokuba kunikiwe nina ukwazi imfihlakalo zobukumkani bezulu, kodwa akunikwanga bona abo." 
Matthew13:12 Ngokuba lowo usukuba enako, kuya kupiwa yena, waeya kwanezelelwa; kanti osukuba engenako, uya kuhlutwa kwa oko anako." 
Matthew13:13 Kungenxa yoku enditeta nabo ngemizekeliso; ukuba bebona nje bengaboni, nokuba besiva nje bengeva, bengaqondi nokuqonda." 
Matthew13:14 Kuze kuzalisekiswe kubo isiprofitesho sika‐Yisaya sokuti: Ngokuva niya kuva, ningezi niqonde; nibona nje niya kubona, ningezi niqiqe:" 
Matthew13:15 ngokuba intliziyo yababantu idikiwe, nendlebe bazenze nzima ukuva kwazo, namehlo abo bawacimile; hleze babone ngamehlo, beve ngendlebe, baqonde ngentliziyo, baguquke, ndibapilise." 
Matthew13:16 Kodwa nina anetamsanqa amehlo enu, ukuba ebona; nendlebe zenu, ukuba zisiva." 
Matthew13:17 Ngokuba ngokwenene ndisiti kuni: Baninzi abaprofite n abantu abalungileyo ababenqwenela ukubona izinto enizibonayo, kanti abazibonanga; nokuva izinto enizivayo, kanti abazivanga." 
Matthew13:18 Nina ngoko yivani umzekeliso womhlwayeli: 
Matthew13:19 Nxa sukuba umntu esiva ilizwi lobukumkani, engaqondi ke, uyeza okohlakeleyo, ahlute oko kuhlwayelweyo entliziyweni yake: nguye lo owayehlwayelwa ngasendleleni." 
Matthew13:20 Nowayehlwayelwa endaweni ebulwalwa, nguye lo oti ilizwi alive, asuke alamkele ngovuyo;" 
Matthew13:21 koko engenangcambo pakati kwake, uyenza umzuzu kodwa; kuze kuti, kwakuhla imbandezelo umhlaumbi intshutshiso ngenxa yelizwi, asuke axakaniswe." 
Matthew13:22 Nowayehlwayelwa endaweni yemitolo, nguye lo oti ilizwi alive; kanti isitukutezi selilizwe likoyo, nenkohliso yobutyebi, ziyaṙwisha ilizwi, lize liputiswe." 
Matthew13:23 Nowayehlwayelwa emhlabeni olungileyo, nguye lo oti ilizwi alive, aliqonde; oti kanjalo axakate izixakato, enze omnye ngokulikulu, nomnye ngokungamashumi matandatu, nomnye ngokungamashumi matatu." 
Matthew13:24 Omnye umzekeliso wawubeka pambi kwabo, esiti: Ubukumkani bezulu bufanekiswa nomntu owahlwayela imbewu elungileyo entsimini yake;" 
Matthew13:25 koko, nxa bekulala abantu, kweza utshaba lwake lwahlwayela izizani kwa pakati kwayo inqolowa, lwemka ke." 
Matthew13:26 Kwaza kwati, okuya besihlumile isitombo, savelisa isiqa̔mo, kwandul’ ukubonakala izizani nazo." 
Matthew13:27 Zaye zisiza izicaka zomninindlu zati kuye: Nkosi! akwahlwayela imbewu elungileyo na entsimini yako? izuze pina pofu izizani? 
Matthew13:28 Waza wati kuzo: Ngumntu olutshaba okwenzileyo oku. Zati izicaka kuye: Uze utande na ukuba siye sizibute? 
Matthew13:29 Wati: Hai; hleze niti, nakuzibuta izizani, niyidonyule kunye nazo inqolowa:" 
Matthew13:30 ziyekeni zombini zimile ndawonye kude kuvunwe; nangexesha lokuvuna ndiya kuti kubavuni: Zibuteni tanci izizani, nibope zona ngezitungu zitshiswe; kodwa inqolowa yinlanganiseleni esiseleni sam." 
Matthew13:31 Omnye umzekeliso wawubeka pambi kwabo, esiti: Ubukumkani bezulu bufana nokozo lwembewu yemositade, owalutabatayo umntu, waluhlwayela entsimini yake:" 
Matthew13:32 eti okunene leyombewu ibe ncinane kuzo zonke imbewu; iti kodwa nxa imilileyo, ibe nkulu kayo imifuno, ibe ngumti, zide zize intaka zezulu, zihlale emasebeni awo." 
Matthew13:33 Omnye umzekeliso wawuteta kubo, esiti: Ubukumkani bezulu bufana negwele, owalitabatayo umfazi, walifihlela ezilinganisweni zitatu zomgubo, wada wabiliswa wonke." 
Matthew13:34 Ezizinto zonke waziteta u‐Yesu ngemizekeliso kwizihlwele; wabengateti ke kuzo kungeko umzekeliso; 
Matthew13:35 ukuze kuzaliseke oko kwatetwayo ngumprofite, esiti: Ndiya kuvula umlomo wam ngemizekeliso; ndiya kuxela izinto ezifihliweyo kwa sekumisweni kwelizwe." 
Matthew13:36 Wati akuba ezindulule izihlwele, wandula wangena u‐Yesu endlwini. Kekaloku beza kuye abadisipile bake, besiti: Sityilele umzekeliso wezizani zentsimi." 
Matthew13:37 Waza wapendula wati kubo: Ohlwayela imbewu elungileyo ungunyana wesintu; 
Matthew13:38 intsimi ililizwe; imbewu elungileyo, eyona ilusapo lwobukumkani; izizani zilusapo lwokohlakeleyo;" 
Matthew13:39 utshaba olwazihlwayelayo lungu‐Satane; ukuvuna kukugqityelwa kwelizwe elikoyo; abavuni bazingelosi. 
Matthew13:40 Njengokuba ke zibutwa izizani, zitshiswe ngomlilo, kwoba njalo ekugqityelweni kwelilizwe likoyo:" 
Matthew13:41 unyana wesintu wotuma ingelosi zake, eziya kubuta ebukumkanini bake zonke izixakanisi, nabo bakwenza okungalungileyo," 
Matthew13:42 zibapose esidlangalaleni somlilo; apo kwobako ukulila nokuqaqazela kwamazinyo. 
Matthew13:43 Oko abalungileyo baya kukanya njengelanga ebukumkanini boyise wabo. Onendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Matthew13:44 Kanjalo ubukumkani bezulu bufana nendyebo ifihlelwe entsimini, ati akuyifumana umntu, ayifihle, aze ngovuyo lwake aye atengise ngako konke anako, ayitenge leyontsimi." 
Matthew13:45 Kanjalo ubukumkani bezulu bufana nomtengi efuna iperule ezintle; 
Matthew13:46 owati akuyifumana iperule inye exabiso likulu, waya watengisa ngako konke abenako, wayitenga." 
Matthew13:47 Kanjalo ubukumkani bezulu bufana notambo oluposiweyo elwandle, lwahlanganisa kwintlobo zonke;" 
Matthew13:48 olwati lwakuzaliswa, balur̔olela pezu kwonxweme, baza behleli pantsi ke ezilungileyo bazibutela ezityeni, kodwa ezibolileyo bazilahla." 
Matthew13:49 Kwoba njalo ekugqityelweni kwelizwe elikoyo: ziya kupuma ingelosi, zahlule abakohlakeleyo kwa kubo abalungileyo," 
Matthew13:50 zibapose esidlangalaleni somlilo; apo kwobako ukulila nokuqaqazela kwamazinyo. 
Matthew13:51 Wati u‐Yesu kubo: Niziqondile na zonke ezizinto? Bati kuye: Ewe, Nkosi!" 
Matthew13:52 Waza wati kubo: Ngako oko bonke ababa̔li abafundiselwe ubukumkani bezulu bafana nomninindlu, owaku̔payo kwimbekelo yake into ezintsha nezindala." 
Matthew13:53 Kwaye kute, xeshekweni abeyigqibile u‐Yesu lemizekeliso, wesuka kona." 
Matthew13:54 Waza wati akufika ezweni lakowabo, wabafundisa endlwini yentlanganiso yabo, bada bamangaliswa bati: Uzuze pina lo obubulumko nezizenzo zamandla?" 
Matthew13:55 lo asi nguye unyana wencibi yemiti na? unina asi ngo‐kutiwa ngu‐Mariya na? nabazalwana bake asi ngabo o‐Yakobi, no‐Jose, no‐Simone, no‐Jude na?" 
Matthew13:55 lo asi nguye unyana wencibi yemiti na? unina asi ngo‐kutiwa ngu‐Mariya na? nabazalwana bake asi ngabo o‐Yakobi, no‐Jose, no‐Simone, no‐Jude na?" 
Matthew13:56 nodade bake abako na kuti bonke? uzuze pina pofu lo zonke ezizinto? 
Matthew13:57 Baza baxakaniswa ngaye. Kuloko u‐Yesu wati kubo: Umprofite akangongenakubekwa, kupela ungonjalo ezweni lakowabo nasendlwini yake." 
Matthew13:58 Waza akenza zininzi izenzo zamandla kona apo, ngenxa yokungakolwa kwabo." 
Matthew14:1 NGELOXESHA weva u‐Herodi inkosi udumo luka‐Yesu," 
Matthew14:2 wati ezicakeni zake: Lo unguye u‐Johane umbapitizeshi; uvukile ekufeni; kungako oku ezizenzo zamandla zisebenzeka kuye. 
Matthew14:3 Ngokuba u‐Herodi ebembambile u‐Johane, wamnxiba, wamfaka entolongweni, ngenxa ka‐Herodiya, umfazi ka‐Filipi umninawe wake." 
Matthew14:4 Ngokuba u‐Johane ebesiti kuye: Akufanelekile kuwe ukuba ube naye. 
Matthew14:5 Wati akufuna ukumbulala, waboyika abantu, ngokuba bebembala ukuba ungumprofite." 
Matthew14:6 Kodwa kwakugcinwa imini yokuzalwa kuka‐Herodi, yaduda intombi ka‐Herodiya pakati kwabo, yamkolisa u‐Herodi." 
Matthew14:7 Kukona wavumayo ngesifungo ukuba uya kuyinika oko isukuba icela kona. 
Matthew14:8 Yaza yona, iqu̔tyiwe ngunina nje, yati: Ndinike apa pezu kwesikotile intloko ka‐Johane umbapitizeshi." 
Matthew14:9 Wayelusizi ke ukumkani lowo; kodwa, ngenxa yesifungo nabo babehleli ekutyeni ndawonye naye, waxela ukuba mayinikwe." 
Matthew14:10 Watuma ke, wanqumla u‐Johane intloko entolongweni apo." 
Matthew14:11 Yaza yaziswa intloko yake pezu kwesikotile, yanikwa kwintombazana leyo; yati yona ya yi sa kunina." 
Matthew14:12 Beza abadisipile bake, bawususa umzimba, bawuncw̔aba, baya bamshumayeza u‐Yesu." 
Matthew14:13 Wati u‐Yesu akuva oko, wemka apo ngenqanawa waya endaweni elubala ngasese; zati zakuva izihlwele, zamlandela ngenyawo zivela ezixekweni." 
Matthew14:14 Waza u‐Yesu epumile nje wabona abantu abaninzi, wabetwa lusizi pezu kwabo, wabapilisa abafayo babo." 
Matthew14:15 Kekaloku kwakuhlwa, beza kuye abadisipile bake, besiti: Lendawo ilubala; ixesha selidlule kanjalo; zindulule izihlwele, ize zimke ziye emizini zizitengele ukudla." 
Matthew14:16 Kodwa u‐Yesu wati kubo: Azifanele ukumka; zipeni nina ukuba zitye. 
Matthew14:17 Baza bati kuye: Asinanto apa, kupela izonka zizihlanu nentlanzi zizimbini." 
Matthew14:18 Wayesiti: Zisani zona kum apa. 
Matthew14:19 Waza wayalela izihlwele ukuba zihlale pantsi etyanini, watabata izonka zozihlanu nentlanzi zombini, wati, ekangele ngasezulwini, wabulela, waqezula, wanikela izonka kubadisipile, bati abadisipile banikela kwizihlwele." 
Matthew14:20 Batya ke bonke, bahluta: kanjalo kwasuswa amaqezu aseleyo, izitya zazilishumi linazibini zizele." 
Matthew14:21 Kekaloku abo babesitya bebengamadoda anga amawaka mahlanu, ngapandle kwabafazi nabantwana." 
Matthew14:22 Waza u‐Yesu kwa oko wanyanzela abadisipile bake bangene enqanaweni, bamandulele ukuya ecaleni elingapesheya, nxa abezindulula izihlwele." 
Matthew14:23 Wati akuba ezindulule izihlwele, wenyukela entabeni ngasese ukuya kutandaza: kwati kwakuba kuhlwile, wayekona apo eyedwa." 
Matthew14:24 Kodwa inqanawa ibisel’ ipakati kwolwandle, ibulawa ngamaza; ngokuba umoya ubuvela pambili." 
Matthew14:25 Kekaloku kwelesine ivaṙasho lobusuku, wemka waya kubo u‐Yesu, ehamba pezu kwolwandle." 
Matthew14:26 Bati abadisipile, bakumbona ehamba pezu kwolwandle, baxaliswa, besiti: ngumshologu! bakala kukwoyika ke." 
Matthew14:27 Wasuka wateta kubo u‐Yesu, esiti: Yomelelani; ndim, musani ukwoyika." 
Matthew14:28 Waza u‐Petrosi wapendula kuye wati: Nkosi! ukuba nguwe, xela ukuba ndize kuwe pezu kwamanzi." 
Matthew14:29 Wayesiti: Yiza. Waza wehla u‐Petrosi enqanaweni, wahamba pezu kwamanzi, ukuya ku‐Yesu." 
Matthew14:30 Kodwa ebona umoya unamandla woyika; wati esel’ eqala ukuntywila wakala, esiti: Nkosi, ndisindise!" 
Matthew14:31 Wasuka wolula isandla u‐Yesu, wambamba, wati kuye: Wena ukolo luncinane! wabutandabuza nganina?" 
Matthew14:32 Kwaza kwati, bakungena enqanaweni, wadamba umoya." 
Matthew14:33 Bandula abo basenqanaweni beza bambedesha, besiti: Ngenyaniso ungunyana katixo." 
Matthew14:34 Kekaloku nxa sebewelile, bafika ezweni le‐Genesarete." 
Matthew14:35 Baza abantu balondawo bakumazi, batumela kulo lonke elolizwe langakona, bazisa kuye bonke abafayo," 
Matthew14:36 bambongoza ukuba mabacu̔kumise kodwa umqukumbelo wengubo yake; baza bonke abacukumisayo bapiliswa. 
Matthew15:1 BANDULA beza ku‐Yesu ababa̔li nabafarisi base‐Yerusaleme, besiti:" 
Matthew15:2 Kunganina ukuba abadisipile bako bagqite isinikelo sabadala? ngokuba bengahlambi izandla zabo, okuya basitya isonka." 
Matthew15:3 Koko wapendula wati kubo: Nani kunganina ukuba nigqite umyalelo katixo ngenxa yesinikelwa senu? 
Matthew15:4 Ngokuba utixo eyalele, esiti: Beka uyihlo nonyoko; esiti kanjalo: Otukayo uyise, umhlaumbi unina, makafe ngokufa." 
Matthew15:5 Kanti nina niti: Osukuba esitsho kuyise, umhlaumbi kunina, ukuti: Ngumnikelo, into esukuba iyiyo ubungaba ngayo uncedwa ndim; akayi kwandula abeke uyise, umhlaumbi unina." 
Matthew15:6 Kwa njalo ke niwutshitshisile umyalelo katixo ngenxa yesinikelwa senu. 
Matthew15:7 Zihanahanisindini! ulungisile ukuprofitesha ngani u‐Yisaya, esiti:" 
Matthew15:8 Ababantu bayasondela kum ngomlomo wabo, bandidumise ngenteto zabo, kanti intliziyo yabo iyakwelela kude kum:" 
Matthew15:9 kodwa bafumana bendibedesha, befundisa ngezifundiso eziziziyalelo zabantu." 
Matthew15:10 Waza wabiza isihlwele, wati kubo: Yivani niqonde ke:" 
Matthew15:11 oko kungena emlonyeni akunco̔lisi umntu; oko kupuma emlonyeni, kuko oku okunco̔lisayo umntu." 
Matthew15:12 Bandula beza abadisipile bake bati kuye: Uyazi na ukuba abafarisi badubuleka, bakuva elozwi?" 
Matthew15:13 Koko wapendula wati: Zonke izityalo, ezingatyalwanga ngubawo wasezulwini, ziya kudonyulwa." 
Matthew15:14 Bayekeni; ngabakokeli bemfama abakwa zimfama: kekaloku imfama ukuba iyakokela imfama, ziya kweyela emnxu̔nyeni zombini." 
Matthew15:15 Waza wapendula u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Sityilele lomzekeliso. 
Matthew15:16 Wayesiti u‐Yesu: Kwa ngoku nisengabo abangenakuqonda nani na? 
Matthew15:17 Anikaqondi na, ukuba konke okungenayo emlonyeni kuyadlulela esiswini, kulahlelwe endaweni yasese?" 
Matthew15:18 Kanti izinto ezipumayo emlonyeni zivela entliziyweni, ziti ezo ke zinco̔lise umntu." 
Matthew15:19 Ngokuba kuvela entliziyweni izicamango ezikohlakeleyo, izibulalo, iziṙexezo, imibulo, izibo̔, ukunqi̔na okubuxoki, izigxeko:" 
Matthew15:20 zizo ezi izinto ezinco̔lisa umntu; kodwa ukutya ngezandla ezingahlanjwanga, akunco̔lisi umntu oku." 
Matthew15:21 Waza u‐Yesu wapuma apo, wemkela kwizahlulo zase‐Tire ne‐Tsidone." 
Matthew15:22 Kekaloku bona ke, um‐Kananekazi wavela kuleyomida wadandulukela kuye, esiti: Yiba netaṙu kum, Nkosi, nyana ka‐Davide! intombi yam ingenelwe yidemoni kakubi." 
Matthew15:23 Kodwa akampendula nalinye ilizwi. Bada beza abadisipile bake bamtandaza, besiti: Mndulule; ngokuba ekala emva kwetu." 
Matthew15:24 Koko wapendula wati: Nditunyelwe ezigusheni ezilahlekileyo zendlu ka‐Sirayeli kupela. 
Matthew15:25 Waselesiza wambedesha, esiti: Nkosi, ndisize!" 
Matthew15:26 Koko wapendula wati: Akufanelekile ukuba kutatyatwe isonka sabantwana, siposwe ezinjeni." 
Matthew15:27 Wayesiti: Ewe, Nkosi! ngokuba nezinja zisitya kwimvutuluka eziwayo etafileni yabanini bazo." 
Matthew15:28 Wandula wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Hai, mfazi! lukulu ukolo lwako; makube njalo kuwe njengokutanda kwako. Yaza intombi yake yapiliswa kwa ngeloxeshana." 
Matthew15:29 Kekaloku wesuka apo u‐Yesu weza ngaselwandle lwase‐Galili, wenyukela entabeni, wahlala pantsi kona." 
Matthew15:30 Zati izihlwele ezininzi zeza kuye, zizisa nazo iziqwala, imfama, izidenge, izilima, nabanye abaninzi, zabawisa pantsi ngasezinyaweni zika‐Yesu; waza wabapilisa;" 
Matthew15:31 zada zati nqa izihlwele, zakubona izidenge ziteta, izilima zipilile, iziqwala zihamba, nemfama zibona; zaza zamdumisa utixo wo‐Sirayeli." 
Matthew15:32 Wandula u‐Yesu wabiza abadisipile bake, wati: Ndibetwa lusizi pezu kwesihlwele, ukuba kuse kuntsuku ntatu behlala nam, bengenanto yokutya; kanjalo anditandi ukubandulula bengatyanga, hleze bacubuke endleleni." 
Matthew15:33 Baza abadisipile bake bati kuye: Sozuza pina entlango izonka ezininzi kangaka, ukuba sihlutiswe isihlwele esingakanana?" 
Matthew15:34 Wayesiti kubo u‐Yesu: Zingapina izonka eninazo? Bati ke: Zisixe̔nxe, nento encinane yentlanzana." 
Matthew15:35 Waza wayalela izihlwele ukuba zihlale pantsi emhlabeni. 
Matthew15:36 Waza watabata izonka zozixe̔nxe nentlanzi, wabulela, waqezula, wanikela kubadisipile bake, nabadisipile banikela kwisihlwele." 
Matthew15:37 Batya ke bonke, bahluta: kanjalo kwasuswa amaqezu aseleyo, ingobozi zazisixe̔nxe zizele." 
Matthew15:38 Kekaloku abo babesitya bebengamawaka mane amadoda, ngapandle kwabafazi nabantwana." 
Matthew15:39 Wati akuba ezindulule izihlwele, wangena enqanaweni, weza emideni yase‐Magadala." 
Matthew16:1 BAZA bafika abafarisi nabasadusi be m linga, bacela kuye ukuba makababonise umqondiso uvela ezulwini." 
Matthew16:2 Koko wapendula wati kubo: kwakuba kuhlwile niti: Kwobako ukuzola; ngokuba izulu libomvu. 
Matthew16:3 Kanjalo kwakusa niti; Namhla kwobako uqwitela; ngokuba izulu libomvu lisibekela. Zihanahanisindini! ukubonakala kwezulu okunene niyazi ukukuqiqa; kodwa aningeyi qiqe na imiqondiso yalamaxesha? 
Matthew16:4 Isizukulwana esikohlakeleyo nesibuṙexeza siyafuna umqondiso; kanti asiyi kunikwa mqondiso, kupela umqondiso ka‐Jona umprofite. Waza wabashiya, wemka." 
Matthew16:5 Kekaloku bakufika abadisipile bake ecaleni elingapesheya, bebelibele ukutabata nabo izonka." 
Matthew16:6 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kubo: Lumkani nilumkele igwele labafarisi nabasadusi. 
Matthew16:7 Baza bapikisana omnye nomnye, besiti: Utsho, ngokuba singatabatanga nati izonka." 
Matthew16:8 Wayekwazi oku u‐Yesu, wati kubo: Yinina ukuba nipikisane omnye nomnye, nina balukolo luncinane! ngokuba ningatabatanga nani izonka?" 
Matthew16:9 Anikaqondi na, anizikumbuli na kanjalo izonka ezihlanu zamawaka amahlanu, nezitya enazicolayo ukuba zingapina?" 
Matthew16:10 kwa nezonka ezisixe̔nxe zamawaka amane, nengobozi enazicolayo ukuba zingapina?" 
Matthew16:11 Yinina lento ningaqondi ukuba bekungengaso isonka endatshoyo kuni ukuti manilumkele igwele labafarisi nabasadusi? 
Matthew16:12 Bandula baqonda ukuba akatshongo ukuti mabalumkele igwele lesonka, kodwa mabalumkele imfundiso yabafarisi nabasadusi." 
Matthew16:13 Kekaloku akufika u‐Yesu ezahlulweni zase‐Kesareya‐filipi, wabuza kubadisipile bake, esiti: Ngubanina abati abantu ndinguye, mna nyana wesintu?" 
Matthew16:14 Baye besiti: Bati inxenye ngu‐Johane umbapitizeshi; bati abanye ngu‐Elija; bati abanye ngu‐Jeremiya, umhlaumbi ngowabaprofite." 
Matthew16:15 Wati kubo: Kodwa ngubanina eniti nina ndinguye? 
Matthew16:16 Wapendula u‐Simone Petrosi wati: Wena unguye u‐Kristu, unyana katixo ohleliyo." 
Matthew16:17 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Unetamsanqa, Simone, Bara‐jona! ngokuba ingeyiyo inyama negazi ekutyileleyo oku, ngubawo osezulwini." 
Matthew16:18 Kanjalo nam nditi kuwe: Wena ungu‐Petrosi, ndandiya kuyaka pezu kwolulwalwa iṙemente yam, ati amasango ehadesi angayoyisi." 
Matthew16:19 Ndandiya kunika kuwe izilotile zobukumkani bezulu; yoti into usukuba uyinxiba emhlabeni inxitywe ezulwini; yoti into usukuba uyikulula emhlabeni ikululwe ezulwini. 
Matthew16:20 Wandula wabayala abadisipile bake, ukuba mabangaxeleli mntu ukuba ungu‐Yesu u‐Kristu." 
Matthew16:21 Emveni kwoko waqala u‐Yesu ukubonisa abadisipile bake okokuba ufanele ukumka aye e‐Yerusaleme, nokuva intlungu ezininzi ngabo abadala nabaperisite abakulu nababa̔li, nokubulawa, nokuvuswa ngomhla wesitatu." 
Matthew16:22 Waza u‐Petrosi wamtabatela kuye waqala ukumtetisa, esiti: Mawenzelwe ufefe, Nkosi! lento ayisayi kubako kuwe." 
Matthew16:23 Koko wajika wati ku‐Petrosi: Yiya emva kwam, Satane! usisixakaniso kum; ngokuba unganyamekeli izinto zikatixo, unyamekela izinto zabantu nje." 
Matthew16:24 Wandula u‐Yesu wati kubadisipile bake: Ukuba umntu uyafuna ukuza emva kwam, makazikanyeze, apate ikuruse yake, andilandele." 
Matthew16:25 Ngokuba lowo usukuba efuna ukulondoloza ubomi bake, buya kumlahleka; nosukuba elahlekana nobomi bake ngenxa yam, wobufumana." 
Matthew16:26 Ngokuba uncedwa nto nina umntu, ukuba ilizwe lonke walizuza, nompefumlo wake walahlekelwa nguwo? kanjalo uya kunika nto nina umntu ibe lixabiso elilingana nawo umpefumlo wake?" 
Matthew16:27 Ngokuba unyana wesintu eya kuza ebungcwaliseni boyise kunye nengelosi zake; waeya kwandula ukuvuza abanye ngabanye ngokwokwenza kwabo. 
Matthew16:28 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Bako inxenye yabemiyo apa, abangasayi kuva ukufa, bade babone unyana wesintu esiza ebukumkanini bake." 
Matthew17:1 WAZA u‐Yesu emveni kwentsuku ntandatu watabata naye u‐Petrosi, no‐Yakobi, no‐Johane umninawe wake, wabanyusela entabeni ende ngasese." 
Matthew17:2 Waza wenziwa ngakumbi isimilo sake pambi kwabo, bati ubuso bake bakazimla njengalo ilanga, nezivato zake zaba mhlope njengako ukukanya." 
Matthew17:3 Kekaloku bona ke, kwabonakala kubo u‐Mosesi no‐Elija beteta naye." 
Matthew17:4 Waza wapendula u‐Petrosi wati ku‐Yesu: Nkosi! kulungile ukuba sibe lapa; ukuba uyatanda, masenze apa amapempe abe matatu, elinye libe lelako, elinye libe lelika‐Mosesi, elinye libe lelika‐Elija." 
Matthew17:5 Nxa abesateta, bona ke, ilifu elikanyayo labasibekelela; kanjalo bona ke, ilizwi lavela elifini, lisiti: Lo ungunyana wam otandiweyo, endikolisiweyo kakuhle nguye; mveni yena." 
Matthew17:6 Baza abadisipile bakuva oko bawa ngobuso babo, boyika kakulu." 
Matthew17:7 Waselesiza u‐Yesu wabacu̔kumisa, wati: Vukani, ize ningoyiki." 
Matthew17:8 Bati bakupakamisa amehlo abo, ababona mntu, kupela u‐Yesu yedwa." 
Matthew17:9 Kekaloku bakuhla entabeni, u‐Yesu wabayalela, esiti: Ningaxeleli mntu esisibonakalo, ade avuke unyana wesintu ekufeni." 
Matthew17:10 Baza abadisipile bake bambuza, besiti: Yinina pofu ukuba ababa̔li bati: u‐Elija ufanele ukuza tanci?" 
Matthew17:11 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: u‐Elija okunene uyeza tanci, waeya kubuya amise into zonke." 
Matthew17:12 Kodwa nditi kuni: u‐Elija usel’ ezile, baye bengamazanga ke, koko benza kuye konke bakwenzayo. Kwa njalo ke nonyana wesintu uza kuva intlungu kwa ngabo." 
Matthew17:13 Bandula baqonda abadisipile, ukuba watsho kubo ngaye u‐Johane umbapitizeshi." 
Matthew17:14 Kekaloku bakufika esihlweleni, kweza kuye umntu eguqa pantsi kuye, esiti nokuti:" 
Matthew17:15 Nkosi! yiba netaṙu kunyana wam, ukuba enesatutwane, ebulalekile kakubi; ngokuba esiwa futi emlilweni, nafuti emanzini." 
Matthew17:16 Ndaza ndamzisa kubadisipile bako, bakohlwa ke ukumpilisa." 
Matthew17:17 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati: Sizukulwana esingakolwayo esigwenxa! ndobako nani kude kube ninina? ndoninyamezela kude kube ninina? mziseni kum apa. 
Matthew17:18 Waza u‐Yesu wayitetisa idemoni, eyapuma kuye; wati umfana wapiliswa kwa ngeloxeshana." 
Matthew17:19 Bandula abadisipile beza ku‐Yesu ngasese, bati: Kunganina ukuba besikohliwe kukuyiku̔pa tina?" 
Matthew17:20 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kubo: Kungokungakolwa kwenu; ngokuba ngokwenene ndisiti kuni: xeshekweni ninokolo olungangokozo lwembewu yemositade, niya kutsho kulentaba ukuti: Suka apa uye paya: yaiya kusuka ke: kanjako akuko nto eya kunikohla." 
Matthew17:21 Kodwa oluhlobo luyapuma ngokutandaza nangokuzila ukutya kupela. 
Matthew17:22 Kekaloku bakuba bebesahamba e‐Galili, wati u‐Yesu kubo: Unyana wesintu uza kunikelwa ezandleni zabantu," 
Matthew17:23 abaya kumbulala, waeya kuvuswa ngomhla wesitatu. Baza baba lusizi kakulu." 
Matthew17:24 Bati bakufika e‐Kapenayume, beza abo bayamkelayo imali yetempile ku‐Petrosi, batsho ukuti: Umfundisi wenu akayinikeli na imali yetempile?" 
Matthew17:25 Wati: Ewe. Kekaloku okuya ebengene endlwini, u‐Yesu wampangela, esiti: Uti nina wena, Simone? okumkani bomhlaba bamkela kubapina iminikelo nencamlo? kubo onyana babo, kubo abasemzini, kusinina?" 
Matthew17:26 Wati u‐Petrosi kuye: Kubo abasemzini. Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Kukona onyana bakululekile. 
Matthew17:27 Kodwa ukuze singabadubuli, hamba uye elwandle, upose iqeṙu, uyibambe intlanzi enyuka tanci; wauya kuti wakuvula umlomo wayo, ufumane ishekele: leyo yitabate, unikele mna nawe kubo." 
Matthew18:1 NGELOXESHANA beza abadisipile ku‐Yesu, besiti: Ngubanina ke omkulu kwabanye ebukumkanini bezulu?" 
Matthew18:2 Waza u‐Yesu wabiza umntwana, wammisa pakati kwabo," 
Matthew18:3 watsho ukuti: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Xeshekweni ningaguqulwanga naba njengabo abantwana, anisayi kuza ningene ebukumkanini bezulu." 
Matthew18:4 Ngako osukuba ezitoba njengomntwana lo, nguye lowo omkulu kwabanye ebukumkanini bezulu." 
Matthew18:5 Kanjalo osukuba esamkela umntwana onje emnye egameni lam, uyamkela mna:" 
Matthew18:6 kodwa osukuba exakanisa omnye waba bancinane abakolwayo kum, kulungele yena ngakumbi, ukuba ilitye lapezulu lokusila lixo̔nyelwe entanyeni yake, aze antywiliswe enzulwini yolwandle." 
Matthew18:7 Kwoba nzima elizweni ngetuba lezixakaniso! ngokuba kufanele ziya kuza izixakaniso; kodwa kwoba nzima kulowamntu isixakaniso siza ngaye! 
Matthew18:8 Ukuba ngoko isandla sako umhlaumbi unyawo lwako luyakuxakanisa, zinqumle, uzilahle kuwe: kulungele wena ukuba ungene ebomini usisiqwala, umhlaumbi usisilima, ngapezu kwokuba uti, unezandla zibini, umhlaumbi unenyawo mbini, uposwe emlilweni ongunapakade." 
Matthew18:9 Kanjalo ukuba iliso lako liyakuxakanisa, lincotule, ulilahle kuwe: kulungele wena ukuba ungene ebomini uneliso linye, ngapezu kwokuba uti, unamehlo mabini, uposwe esihogweni somlilo." 
Matthew18:10 Lumkani ukuba ningadeli namnye waba bancinane; ngokuba ndisiti kuni, ingelosi zabo ezulwini zimana zibona ubuso bukabawo osezulwini." 
Matthew18:11 Ngokuba unyana wesintu weza ukusindisa okulahlekileyo. 
Matthew18:12 Niti nina ke? Ukuba umntu uba nekulu legusha, ize ilahleke enye kuzo; akati na azishiye ezimashumi alitoba enesitoba, ahambe aye ezintabeni, ayifune leyo ilahlekayo?" 
Matthew18:13 Nokuba kuti ayifumane, ngokwenene nditi kuni, uyavuyela yona leyo, ngapezu kwokuba uyavuy ela ezo zimashumi alitoba enesitoba zingalahlekanga." 
Matthew18:14 Kwa njalo asi yintando yake uyihlo wenu osezulwini, ukuba kubube omnye waba bancinane." 
Matthew18:15 Ukuba ke umzalwana wako uyona ngakuwe, yiya umohlwaye kube pakati kwako naye yedwa: ukuba uyakuva, uzuzile umzalwana wako." 
Matthew18:16 Kodwa ukuba akeva, tabata kunye nawe kanjalo abe mnye, umhlaumbi babe babini, ukuze onke amazwi amiswe ngomlomo wamanqi̔na amabini umhlaumbi amatatu." 
Matthew18:17 Ukuba ke uyala ukuva bona, xelela iṙemente: kodwa ukuba uyala ukuva neṙemente, makabe njengomheyideni nombuti weminikelo kuwe." 
Matthew18:18 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Into enisukuba nizinxiba emhlabeni, ziya kunxitywa ezulwini; nento enisukuba nizikulula emhlabeni, ziya kukululwa ezulwini." 
Matthew18:19 Kanjako nditi kuni: Ukuba ababini kuni baya kuvumelana emhlabeni apa ngayo enye indawo basukuba becela yona, iya kwenzelwa bona ngubawo osezulwini." 
Matthew18:20 Ngokuba apo bahlanganisene kona ababini umhlaumbi abatatu egameni lam, ndiko kwa kona pakati kwabo." 
Matthew18:21 Wandula weza u‐Petrosi kuye, wati: Nkosi! woba futi kangakananina umzalwana wam esona ngakum, ndimxolele? kude kube ngamaxesha asixe̔nxe na?" 
Matthew18:22 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Anditi kuwe, kude kube ngamaxesha asixe̔nxe, nditi, kude kube sisixe̔nxe samaxesha angamashumi asixe̔nxe." 
Matthew18:23 Ngako oku ubukumkani bezulu bufanekiswa nokumkani otile, owafuna ukubuza izicaka zake." 
Matthew18:24 Kwati, akuqala ukubuza, kwaziswa kuye esinye esinetyala letalente ezilishumi lamawaka." 
Matthew18:25 Kekaloku singenanto yokuhlaula nje, yaxela inkosi yaso ukuba kutengiswe ngaso, nangomfazi waso, nangabantwana, nangento zonke sinazo, kuhlaulwe ke." 
Matthew18:26 Sandula isicaka eso sawa pantsi, sayibedesha, sisiti: Nkosi! kaubeke kade pezu kwam, ndandiya kuhlaula konke kuwe." 
Matthew18:27 Yaza inkosi yesicaka eso yabetwa lusizi, yasikulula, yasixolela lonke elotyala." 
Matthew18:28 Kodwa sakupuma isicaka eso safumanana nesinye sezizizicaka naso, ebesinetyala kuso ledenari ezilikulu linye, sasibamba sasiti ṙintyi ngomqala, sisiti: Hlaula ityala lako kum." 
Matthew18:29 Sandula eso sibe sisisicaka naso sawa pantsi ngasezinyaweni zaso, sasibongoza, sisiti: Kaubeke kade pezu kwam, ndandiya kuhlaula konke kuwe." 
Matthew18:30 Asavuma ke; koko saya sasiposela entolongweni, side sihlaule elotyala." 
Matthew18:31 Zati kekaloku ezo zibe zizizicaka naso, zakubona oko kwenziweyo, zalusizi kakulu, zeza zatyela inkosi yazo konke oko kwenziweyo." 
Matthew18:32 Yandula inkosi yaso yasibiza, yati kuso: Sicaka esikohlakeleyo! Ndakuxolela lonke ityala elo, ngokokuba wabundibongoza:" 
Matthew18:33 bekungafanele nawe na ukuba ube netaṙu kuso esisisicaka nawe, njengokuba nam bendinetaṙu kuwe?" 
Matthew18:34 Yaza yaqumba inkosi yaso, yasinikela kubambeli, side sihlaule lonke ityala laso kuyo." 
Matthew18:35 Kwa nje ke nobawo wasezulwini uya kwenje njalo kuni, ukuba abazalwana benu anibaxoleli nonke ngabanye ngentliziyo zenu iziposo zabo." 
Matthew19:1 KWAYE kute, xeshekweni abezigqibile u‐Yesu iziteto ezi, wesuka e‐Galili, weza emideni yase‐Judeya, pesheya kwe‐Yoredane." 
Matthew19:1 KWAYE kute, xeshekweni abezigqibile u‐Yesu iziteto ezi, wesuka e‐Galili, weza emideni yase‐Judeya, pesheya kwe‐Yoredane." 
Matthew19:2 Zaza zamlandela izihlwele ezininzi, wabapilisa abafayo apo ke." 
Matthew19:3 Kweza kuye nabafarisi bemlinga, besiti kuye: Kufanelekile emntwini ukulahla umfazi wake ngenxa yamatuba onke na?" 
Matthew19:4 Wapendula wati kubo: Anileseshanga na ukuba umdali wabenza kwa sekuqalekeni indoda nomfazi," 
Matthew19:5 waza wati: Ngenxa yoku umntu uya kushiya uyise nonina, anamatele emfazini wake, baze abo babini babe yinyama nye?" 
Matthew19:6 Ngako oko abasebabini, bayinyama nye. Ngoko ke, oko utixo akubandakanyileyo, makungahlulwa mntu." 
Matthew19:7 Bati kuye: Pofu ibiyinina ukuba u‐Mosesi waxelela ukunika incwadi yokwahlukanisa, nokumlahla?"
