Matthew19:8 Wati kubo: u‐Mosesi, ngenxa yobulukuni bentliziyo zenu, wanivumela ukuba nilahle abafazi benu; koko kungabanga njalo kwa sekuqalekeni." 
Matthew19:9 Kodwa nditi kuni: Osukuba elahla umfazi wake, enga mlahli ngambulo kupela, aze azeke omnye, uyaṙexeza; nalowo uzeka umfazi olahliweyo, uyaṙexeza naye." 
Matthew19:10 Bati kuye abadisipile bake: Ukuba iba njalo indawo yomntu kunye nomfazi wake, aku m lungele ukuzeka." 
Matthew19:11 Koko wati kubo: Abalamkeli elilizwi bonke abantu; ngabanikiweyo abalamkelayo kupela. 
Matthew19:12 Ngokuba kuko abatenwa abazelweyo benjalo kwa sesizalweni sonina; kuko nabatenwa, abenziweyo abatenwa ngabantu; kuko nabatenwa, abazenzileyo abatenwa ngenxa yobukumkani bezulu. Ongamkela oku, maka kw amkele." 
Matthew19:13 Kwandula kwaziswa kuye abantwana, ukuze abeke izandla pezu kwabo, atandaze: bati ke abadisipile babatetisa." 
Matthew19:14 Kodwa u‐Yesu wati: Vumelani abantwana, ize ningabaleli, ukuza kum; ngokuba ubukumkani bezulu bubobabanjalo." 
Matthew19:15 Waza wabeka izandla pezu kwabo, wemka apo." 
Matthew19:16 Kekaloku bona ke, kweza umntu otile wati kuye: Mfundisi olungileyo! yiyipina into elungileyo endiya kuyenza, ukuze ndibe nabo ubomi obungunapakade?" 
Matthew19:17 Wayesiti kuye: Yinina ukuba uti ndingolungileyo? akuko olungileyo, kupela umnye, o ngutixo. Kodwa ukuba unga ungangena ebomini, gcina imiyalelo." 
Matthew19:18 Wati kuye: Yipina? Wayesiti u‐Yesu: Le yokuti: Akuyi kubulala; akuyi kuṙexeza; akuyi kuba̔; akuyi kunqi̔na ubunqi̔na obubuxoki; 
Matthew19:19 beka uyihlo nonyoko; na lo wokuti: Uya kutanda ummelwane wako njengokuzi tanda kwako. 
Matthew19:20 Yati kuye indodana leyo: Zonke ezizinto ndizibambile kwa sebutsheni bam; ndisaswele nto nina? 
Matthew19:21 Wati u‐Yesu kuyo: Ukuba unga ungaba ufezekile, hamba, uye utengise ngempahla yako, upe amahlwempu, wauya kuba nendyebo ezulwini; uze ke, ulandele mna." 
Matthew19:22 Yati ke indodana leyo yakuva elozwi, yemka ilusizi; ngokuba ibe inazo imfuyo ezininzi." 
Matthew19:23 Waza u‐Yesu wati kubadisipile bake: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Kunqabile kwisityebi ukuba singene ebukumkanini bezulu. 
Matthew19:24 Kananjalo nditi kuni: Kulula ukuba inkamela ipumele entunjeni yesinalite, pezu kwokuba isityebi singene ebukumkanini bukatixo." 
Matthew19:25 Bati ke bakuva abadisipile bake, bamangaliswa kakulu, besiti: Ngubanina pofu ongasindiswayo?" 
Matthew19:26 Koko u‐Yesu ebakangele wati kubo: Ebantwini lento ayenzeki, kodwa kutixo zonke izinto ziyenzeka." 
Matthew19:27 Wandula wapendula u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Bona ke, tina sikushiyile konke, salandela wena; sesiya kuba nanto nina ke?" 
Matthew19:28 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kubo: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Nina nindilandeleyo, ekudalweni okutsha, xeshekweni ahleli unyana wesintu pezu kweterone yobungcwalisa bake, niya kuhlala nani pezu kweterone ezilishumi linambini, nigweba izizwe ezilishumi linazibini zo‐Sirayeli." 
Matthew19:29 Nabo bonke abashiyileyo izindlu, umhlaumbi abaninawe, umhlaumbi odade, umhlaumbi uyise, umhlaumbi unina, umhlaumbi umfazi, umhlaumbi abantwana, umhlaumbi amasimi, ngenxa yegama lam, baya kwamkela ngekulu, balidle ilifa lobomi obungunapakade." 
Matthew19:30 Kodwa baninzi abangabokuqala abaya kuba ngabokugqibela, nabangabokugqibela abaya kuba ngabokuqala." 
Matthew20:1 Ngokuba ubukumkani bezulu bufana nomntu ongumninindlu, owapumayo kunye nokusa ukuya kuqesha abasebenzi baye esitiyeni sake." 
Matthew20:2 Wati akuba evumelene nabasebenzi basebenz ele idenari ngemini nye, wabatuma esitiyeni sake." 
Matthew20:3 Waza wapuma ngeyure yesitatu, wabona abanye bemi endaweni yentengo bengenamsebenzi," 
Matthew20:4 wati nakwabo: Hambani nani niye esitiyeni sam, nento esukuba ifanelekile ndoyinika kuni. Bemka baya ke." 
Matthew20:5 Wabuya wapuma ngeyesitandatu nangeyesitoba iyure, wenza kwa ngokunjalo." 
Matthew20:6 Wapuma nangeyure yeshumi elinanye, wafumana abanye bemi bengenamsebenzi, wati kubo: Yinina ukuba nimi apa lemini yonke ningenamsebenzi?" 
Matthew20:7 Bati kuye: Ngokuba kungeko mntu osiqeshileyo. Wati kubo: Hambani nani niye esitiyeni sam, nento esukuba ifanelekile niya kuyamkela." 
Matthew20:8 Kekaloku kwakuhlwa, wati umninisitiya kwigosa lake: Biza abasebenzi, ubamkelise umvuzo wabo, uqala ngabokugqibela nde ufike kwabokuqala." 
Matthew20:9 Bati bakuza abo babeqashiwe ngeyure yeshumi elinanye, bayamkela ngabanye idenari." 
Matthew20:10 Koko bakuza abokuqala, baba baya kwamkela into epezulu; baza nabo bayamkela ngabanye idenari." 
Matthew20:11 Bati bakwamkela, baṙoṙa ngakumninindlu," 
Matthew20:12 besiti: Aba bangabokugqibela basebenza iyure yanye kupela, kanti ubalinganisile nati nje, esatwalayo ubunzima bemini nobushushu obutshisayo." 
Matthew20:13 Koko wapendula wati kwomnye wabo: Sihlobo! andikwoni ke; ubungavumelananga nam ukusebenz ela idenari na? 
Matthew20:14 Pata okukokwako uhambe: nditanda ukunika nakuló wokugqibela njengoko ndinika ngako nakuwe. 
Matthew20:15 Akundifanele na ukuba ndenze oko ndikwenzayo ngezam izinto? Iliso lako likohlakele na, ngokuba ndilungile mna?" 
Matthew20:16 Kwa njalo ke abokugqibela boba ngabokuqala, nabokuqala boba ngabokugqibela; ngokuba bebaninzi ababiziweyo, koko bebancinane abaqashiweyo." 
Matthew20:17 KEKALOKU u‐Yesu, enyukela e‐Yerusaleme, watabata abadisipile abalishumi linababini ngasese endleleni, wati kubo:" 
Matthew20:18 Bona ke, siyanyukela e‐Yerusaleme, waeya kuti unyana wesintu anikelwe kubo abaperisite abakulu nababa̔li; abaya kumgweba ukuba afe," 
Matthew20:19 bamnikele kubaheyideni ahlekwe, abetwe, akuruseshwe; woti ngomhla wesitatu abuye avuke." 
Matthew20:20 Wandula weza kuye unina bonyana baka‐Zebedi kunye nonyana bake, ebedesha, ecela into etile kuye." 
Matthew20:21 Wayesiti kuye: Unga ungaba nanto nina? Wati kuye: Xela ukuba aba onyana bam ababini bahlale, omnye abe ngasekunene kuwe, omnye abe ngasekohlo, kunene kuwe, omnye abe ngasekohlo, ebukumkanini bako." 
Matthew20:22 Koko wapendula u‐Yesu wati: Aniyazi into eniyicelayo. Ningasela na endebeni endiza kusela kuyo mna? nobapitizesho endibapitizeshwa ngalo mna, ningabapitizeshwa ngalo na? Bati kuye: Singenje njalo." 
Matthew20:23 Waza wati kubo: Indebe yam okunene niya kusela kuyo, nobapitizesho endibapitizeshwa ngalo mna, niya kubapitizeshwa ngalo; kodwa ukuhlala ngasekunene kum nangasekohlo kum asi kuko okwam ukupa, kupela ukupa abo balungiselwe kona ngubawo." 
Matthew20:24 Baza bati abalishumi bakuva oku, baqumbela abobazalwana babini kakulu." 
Matthew20:25 Koko u‐Yesu wababiza wati: Niyazi ukuba inkosi zabaheyideni ziyabapata ngobukosi, nokuba abakulu bayenza ngegunya pezu kwabo." 
Matthew20:26 Kodwa akuyi kuba njalo pakati kwenu; koko osukuba efuna ukuba mkulu pakati kwenu, makabe ngumkonzi wenu;" 
Matthew20:27 nosukuba efuna ukuba ngowokuqala pakati kwenu, makabe sisicaka senu:" 
Matthew20:28 njengokuba unyana wesintu ebengezanga ukuza kukonzwa, koko weza ukukonza, nokunika ubomi bake bube yintlaulelo yabaninzi." 
Matthew20:29 Kwati nxa bebepuma e‐Jeriko, walandelwa sisihlwele esikulu." 
Matthew20:30 Kekaloku bona ke, imfama ezimbini zihleli ngasendleleni, zakuva ukuba u‐Yesu uyadlula, zadanduluka, zisiti: Yiba netaṙu kuti. Nkosi, nyana ka‐Davide!" 
Matthew20:31 Koko isihlwele saziyala, ukuba maziti tu: kodwa zazidanduluka kakulu ngakumbi, zisiti: Yiba netaṙu kuti, Nkosi, nyana ka‐Davide!" 
Matthew20:32 Waza wema u‐Yesu wazibiza, wati: Ninga ndingenza nto nina kuni?" 
Matthew20:33 Zati kuye: Nkosi! singa angavulwa amehlo etu. 
Matthew20:34 Wabetwa lusizi ke u‐Yesu, wacu̔kumisa amehlo azo; ati kwa oko aba nokubona amehlo azo, zamlandela ke." 
Matthew21:1 KEKALOKU xeshekweni babesondele e‐Yerusaleme, bese befikile e‐Betefage ngasentabeni yeminquma, wandula u‐Yesu watuma abadisipile ababini," 
Matthew21:2 esiti kubo: Hambani niye emzini omalungana nani; nose nifumana ke iqwaṙashe libotshelelwe, netole ndawonye nalo; wa kululeni ni wa zise kum." 
Matthew21:3 Nokuba umntu uyateta into kuni, niya kutsho ukuti: Inkosi iyawafuna; wosel’ ewatuma ke." 
Matthew21:4 (Kekaloku oku konke kwenzekile, ukuze kuzaliseke oko kwatetwayo ngumprofite, esiti:" 
Matthew21:5 Yitshoni kwintombi yase‐Ziyone: Bona ke, ukumkani wako uyeza kuwe; elulamile, ekwele eqwaṙasheni, kwa seqwaṙashaneni elilitole leqwaṙashekazi.)" 
Matthew21:6 Bahamba ke abadisipile, benza kwa njengokuba bebeyalelwe ngu‐Yesu," 
Matthew21:7 bazisa iqwaṙashe netole, babeka ingubo zabo pezu kwawo, ba m hlalisa pezu kwazo." 
Matthew21:8 Bati abaninzi kakulu besihlwele bandlala ingubo zabo endleleni; bebesiti abanye bagaula amasebe emitini, bawandlala endleleni." 
Matthew21:9 Zaza izihlwele ezibe zihamba pambili, nezo zibe zilandela, zadanduluka, zisiti: Hosana kuye unyana ka‐Davide! Makatanyusanqeliswe ozayo egameni likayehova! Hosana enyangweni yapezulu!" 
Matthew21:10 Kekaloku akungena e‐Yerusaleme, sapitizeliswa sonke isixeko, sisiti: Ungubanina lo?" 
Matthew21:11 Zaye izihlwele zisiti: Lo ungu‐Yesu umprofite, owase‐Nazarete yase‐Galili." 
Matthew21:12 Waza u‐Yesu wangena etempileni katixo, wabagxota bonke ababetengela nababetenga etempileni, wazipenula itafile zabananeli bemali, nezihlalo zababetengisa ngamahobe," 
Matthew21:13 wati kubo: Kuba̔liwe ngokuti: Indlu yam iya kubizwa ngokuti yindlu yokutandaza; kanti nina niyenzile umqolomba wamabada. 
Matthew21:14 Kwaye kusiza kuye imfama neziqwala etempileni apo: wazipilisa ke. 
Matthew21:15 Kekaloku abaperisite abakulu nababa̔li bakubona imimangaliso wayenzayo, nabantwana bedanduluka etempileni, besiti nokuti: Hosana kuye unyana ka‐Davide! baqumba kunene," 
Matthew21:16 bati kuye: Uyeva na into abayitetayo aba? Wayesiti u‐Yesu kubo: Ewe; anizanga nileseshe na ukuti: Ngomlomo wentsana nabanyayo umisile udumiso? 
Matthew21:17 Waza wabashiya, wapuma esixekweni waya e‐Betaniya, walalisa kona." 
Matthew21:18 Kekaloku kwakusa, xa abebuyela esixekweni, walamba." 
Matthew21:19 Wati akubona umkiwane otile ngasendleleni, weza ngakuwo; kuloko engafumananga nto kuwo, kupela amagqabi odwa: waza wati kuwo: Makungabi savela isiqa̔mo kuwe kude kube ngunapakade. Wahla wabuna kamsinya umkiwane lowo." 
Matthew21:20 Baza abadisipile, bakubona oko, bati nqa, besiti: Hai umkiwane ukubuna kamsinya kangakanana!" 
Matthew21:21 Koko wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Ukuba ninalo ukolo, ningatandabuzi, aniyi kuyenza lento yomkiwane yodwa, koko nokuba niti kulentaba: Yiba ususwa, uposelwe elwandle; kuya kwenzeka." 
Matthew21:22 Nento zonke enisukuba nizicela ekutandazeni, nikolwa, niya kuzamkela." 
Matthew21:23 Kekaloku akungena etempileni, kweza kuye, xa afundisayo, abaperisite abakulu nabadala babantu, besiti: Uzenza ezizinto ngegunya lanina? kanjalo ngubanina owanika eligunya kuwe?" 
Matthew21:24 Koko wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Nam ndobuza kuni indawo ibe nye, endiya kuti, nxa nindixelele yona, ndandul’ ukunixelela nam kungelanina igunya endizenza ezizinto:" 
Matthew21:25 Ubapitizesho luka‐Johane beluvela pina? ezulwini, ebantwini, kusinina? Baza babuzana bodwa, besiti: Ukuba siti: Ezulwini; woti kuti: Kunganina pofu ukuba anikolwanga nguye?" 
Matthew21:26 Kodwa ukuba siti: Ebantwini; siyoyika isihlwele; ngokuba bonke bebala u‐Johane ukuba ngumprofite. 
Matthew21:27 Baza bapendula ku‐Yesu bati: Asazi. Wati kubo naye: Nam andixeleli nina kungelanina igunya endizenza ezizinto. 
Matthew21:28 Kodwa niti nina ke? Umntu otile wabenonyana ababini; weza kowokuqala, wati: Nyana! yiya usebenze namhla esitiyeni sam." 
Matthew21:29 Koko wapendula wati: Andivumi: kodwa kamva waguquka, waya." 
Matthew21:30 Weza nakowesibini, watsho ngokunjalo. Waza wapendula wati: Nanku ndi siya, nkosi! kanti akaya." 
Matthew21:31 Nguwupina kwabo babini owenza intando kayise? Bati kuye: Ngowokuqala. Wati kubo u‐Yesu: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Ababuti beminikelo nabapinyiswa bayanipangela ukungena ebukumkanini bukatixo. 
Matthew21:32 Ngokuba u‐Johane weza kuni endleleni yobulungisa, kanti anakolwa nguye: kodwa ababuti beminikelo nabapinyiswa bakolwa nguye: nati ke nina nakubona oko, anaguquka kamva, nize nikolwe nguye." 
Matthew21:33 Omnye umzekeliso wuveni. Bekuko umninindlu otile, owatyala isitiya, wasibiyela ngotango, wembela kuso isincinezelo seveyine, waka inqaba, wasiqeshisela kubalimi, waza wahambela kwelinye ilizwe." 
Matthew21:34 Kwati kwakuba kufupi ixesha leziqa̔mo, watuma izicaka zake kubalimi, ukuya kwamkela iziqa̔mo zake." 
Matthew21:35 Baza abalimi batabata izicaka zake, bati ke esinye basityabula, nesinye basibulala, nesinye basigibisela ngamatye." 
Matthew21:36 Wabuya watuma ezinye izicaka, zizininzi kwezokuqala: benza nakuzo ngokunjalo." 
Matthew21:37 Wada wati kamva watuma kubo unyana wake, esiti: Baya kumhlonela unyana wam." 
Matthew21:38 Kodwa abalimi, bakubona unyana, batsho pakati kwabo ukuti: Lo uyindlalifa; yizani, masimbulale, size sibambe ilifa lake." 
Matthew21:39 Baza bamtabata, bamku̔pela ngapandle kwesitiya, bambulala." 
Matthew21:40 Ngako xeshekweni afikileyo umninisitiya, uya kwenza nto nina kubalimi abo?" 
Matthew21:41 Bati kuye: Abo bantu bakohlakeleyo wobatshabalalisa kakubi; nesitiya eso wosiqeshisela kwabanye abalimi, abaya kumamkelisa iziqa̔mo ngamaxesha azo." 
Matthew21:42 Wati kubo u‐Yesu: Anizanga nileseshe eziba̔lweni na ukuti: Ilitye babelilahlile abaki, elona laba yintloko yegumbi; bekukukwenza kukayehova oku, kungummangaliso ke emehlweni etu?" 
Matthew21:43 Ngako oko nditi kuni: Ubukumkani bukatixo buya kususwa kuni, bupiwe uhlanga oluvelisa iziqa̔mo zabo." 
Matthew21:44 Nowayo pezu kwelilitye, uya kutyunyuzwa; kodwa lowo liwa pezu kwake, liya kumti viti." 
Matthew21:45 Baza abaperisite abakulu nabafarisi, bakuba bevile imizekeliso yake, banakana ukuba uteta ngabo." 
Matthew21:46 Bati bakufuna ukumbamba, bazoyika izihlwele, ngokokuba zibe zimbala ukuba ngumprofite." 
Matthew22:1 WAZA wapendula u‐Yesu wabuya wateta kubo ngemizekeliso, esiti:" 
Matthew22:2 Ubukumkani bezulu bufanekiswa nokumkani otile owamenzela umtshato unyana wake; 
Matthew22:3 waza watuma izicaka zake ukuya kubiza abamenyiweyo beze emtshatweni; abavumanga ukuza ke. 
Matthew22:4 Wabuya watuma ezinye izicaka, esiti: Yitshoni kwabamenyiweyo ukuti: Bona ke, isidlo sam ndisilungisile, inkabi zam nenkomo zam ezityetyisiweyo zixe̔liwe, ewe, konke sekulungisiwe; yizani emtshatweni." 
Matthew22:5 Kodwa bona bengakatalanga bemka, omnye ukuya entsimini yake, omnye ukuya entengweni yake:" 
Matthew22:6 bati abaseleyo babamba izicaka zake, bazipata kakubi, bazibulala." 
Matthew22:7 Waza ukumkani, akuva oko, waqumba, watuma imikosi yake, watshabalalisa ababulali abo, nesixeko sabo wasitshisa ngomlilo." 
Matthew22:8 Wandula wati ezicakeni zake: Umtshato ke seulungisiwe, kodwa abamenyiweyo bebengafanelekile;" 
Matthew22:9 hambani ngoko niye ekuhlanganeni kwendlela, niti abo nisukuba nibafumana, nibabize beze emtshatweni," 
Matthew22:10 zapuma ke izicaka ezo zaya ezindleleni, zabuta bonke ezabafumanayo, nabakohlakeleyo nabalungileyo; yaza indawo yomtshato yazaliswa ngabahleli ekutyeni." 
Matthew22:11 Kekaloku akungena ukumkani ukuza kubonela abahleli ekutyeni, wabona apo umntu ongavatanga isivato somtshato;" 
Matthew22:12 waza wati kuye: Sihlobo! ute nina ukungena apa ungenaso isivato somtshato? Wati cwaka ke. 
Matthew22:13 Wandula wati ukumkani ebakonzini bake: Mbopeni izandla nenyawo, nimsuse, nimku̔pele ebumnyameni bangapandle: apo kwobako ukulila, nokuqaqazela kwamazinyo." 
Matthew22:14 Ngokuba bebaninzi ababiziweyo, koko bebancinane abaqashiweyo." 
Matthew22:15 Bandula abafarisi baya bacebisana ukuba bangati nina ukumtiyela ekuteteni. 
Matthew22:16 Baza batuma kuye abadisipile babo kunye nabaherodi, besiti: Mfundisi! siyazi ukuba uyinene, ufundisa indlela katixo ngokwenyaniso, ungakatali ngumntu: ngokuba ungabuki ubuso babantu:" 
Matthew22:17 sixelele ngoko, ukuba uti nina wena? kufanelekile ukunika umnikelo ku‐Kesare, aku fanelekile, kusinina?" 
Matthew22:18 Kodwa u‐Yesu wanakana inkohlakalo yabo, wati: Yinina ukuba nindilinge, Zihanahanisindini?" 
Matthew22:19 ndiboniseni iqosha lomnikelo. Bamzisela idenari ke. 
Matthew22:20 Waza wati kubo: Ngokabanina lomfanekiso nesiba̔lwa? 
Matthew22:21 Bati kuye: Ngoka‐Kesare. Wandula wati kubo: Nikelani ngoko izinto zika‐Kesare kuye u‐Kesare, nezinto zikatixo kuye utixo." 
Matthew22:22 Bati bakuva bati nqa; baza bamshiya bemka. 
Matthew22:23 Ngaleyomini kweza kuye abasadusi, abati akuko luvuko, bambuza," 
Matthew22:24 besiti: Mfundisi! u‐Mosesi watsho ukuti: Xeshekweni kufayo umntu engenabantwana, uya kuti umninawe wake atshate nomfazi wake, amvusele umkuluwe wake inzalo." 
Matthew22:25 Kekaloku bekuko kuti abazalwana abasixe̔nxe; waza owokuqala wazeka wabuba; wati engenanzalo, wamshiyela kumninawe wake umfazi wake." 
Matthew22:26 Wenje njalo nowesibini, nowesitatu, kwada kwaba ngowesixe̔nxe." 
Matthew22:27 Wati emveni kwabo bonke wafa nomfazi. 
Matthew22:28 Ngako eluvukweni, woba ngumfazi wawupina kwabo basixe̔nxe? ngokuba bonke bebenaye." 
Matthew22:29 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Niyaposisa, ningazi nje iziba̔lo, kwa namandla katixo:" 
Matthew22:30 ngokuba eluvukweni bengazeki, bengendiswa kanjako, koko benjengengelosi zikatixo ezulwini." 
Matthew22:31 Kodwa ngako ukuvuka kwabafileyo, anikuleseshanga na oko kwatetwayo kuni ngutixo, esiti:" 
Matthew22:32 Mna ndinguye utixo ka‐Abrahame, notixo ka‐Yisake, notixo ka‐Yakobi? utixo aka ngutixo wabafileyo, ungowabahleliyo." 
Matthew22:33 Zati zakuva izihlwele, Zamangaliswa pezu kwesifundiso sake." 
Matthew22:34 Kekaloku abafarisi, bakuva ukuba ubate cwaka abasadusi, bahlanganisana ndawonye." 
Matthew22:35 Waza wabuza omnye wakubo obe ngumqondisimteto, emlinga, esiti nokuti:" 
Matthew22:36 Mfundisi! owona myalelo umkulu emtetweni nguwupina? 
Matthew22:37 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Ngowokuti: Uya kumtanda uyehova, utixo wako, ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako, nangayo yonke ingqondo yako." 
Matthew22:38 Nguwo lo owokuqala nomkulu umyalelo. 
Matthew22:39 Nowesibini ufana nawo, ungowokuti: Uya kutanda ummelwane wako njengokuzi tanda kwako." 
Matthew22:40 Kulemiyalelo mibini kuyaxo̔meka wonke umteto nabaprofite. 
Matthew22:41 Kekaloku abafarisi behlanganisene nje, wababuza u‐Yesu," 
Matthew22:42 esiti: Niti nina ke ngaye u‐Kristu? ungunyana kabanina? Bati kuye: Ngoka‐Davide. 
Matthew22:43 Wati kubo: Uti nina pofu u‐Davide ngomoya ukumbiza ngenkosi, esiti:" 
Matthew22:44 Wati uyehova kwinkosi yam: Hlala ngasekunene kum, ndide ndenze intshaba zako zibe sisitulo senyawo zako?" 
Matthew22:45 Ukuba ngoko u‐Davide uyambiza ngenkosi, uti nina ukuba ngunyana wake?" 
Matthew22:46 Kwaye kungeko namnye ongampendulayo ngazwi: kanjako kuselokwa lamini akwabi sabiko mntu onokukalipa kwokumbuza nto. 
Matthew23:1 WANDULA u‐Yesu wateta kwizihlwele nakubadisipile bake," 
Matthew23:2 esiti: Ababa̔li nabafarisi bayahlala esihlalweni sika‐Mosesi: 
Matthew23:3 ngako zonke izinto abasukuba benixelela ukuba nizigcine, zigcineni nizenze; kodwa ningenzi ngayo imisebenzi yabo; ngokuba beteta, kanti abenzi." 
Matthew23:4 Ngokuba bebopa imitwalo enzima esindayo, bayibeke emagxalabeni abantu; kodwa abavumi nokuyishukumisa ngomnwe wabo." 
Matthew23:5 Kanjalo yonke imisebenzi yabo bayayenza ngokunga bangabonelwa ngabantu: bayenza zibanzi izibotshana zabo zokukumbuza, nemiqukumbelo yengubo zabo bayayenza mikulu;" 
Matthew23:6 bayatanda indawo zobukulu ezidlweni, nezihlalo zapambili ezindlwini zentlanganiso," 
Matthew23:7 nezibuliso ezindaweni zentengo, nokubizwa ngabantu ngokutiwa, Rabi, Rabi!" 
Matthew23:8 Kodwa nina maningabizwa ngokutiwa, Rabi! ngokuba emnye umpati wenu, u‐Kristu; nani ningabazalwana nonke." 
Matthew23:9 Kanjalo maningabizi mntu ngokuti unguyihlo emhlabeni apa; ngokuba emnye uyihlo, lowo usezulwini." 
Matthew23:10 Maniti kanjako ningabizwa ngokutiwa ningabapati; ngokuba emnye umpati wenu, u‐Kristu." 
Matthew23:11 Omkulu pakati kwenu makabe ngumkonzi wenu. 
Matthew23:12 Oya kuzipakamisa, uya kutotywa; noya kuzitoba, uya kupakanyiswa." 
Matthew23:13 Kwoba nzima kuni, baba̔li nabafarisi, zihanahanisi! ukuba nivalela abantu ubukumkani bezulu: ngokuba ningangeni nina, nabangenayo ningabavumeli ukuba bangene." 
Matthew23:14 Kwoba nzima kuni, baba̔li nabafarisi, zihanahanisi! ukuba nisidla izindlu zabahlolokazi, nisenza nemitandazo emide ngokuzenzisa: ngako oku niya kwamkela ukugwetywa okukulu ngakumbi." 
Matthew23:15 Kwoba nzima kuni, baba̔li nabafarisi, zihanahanisi! ukuba nijikajikela ulwandle n omhlaba owomileyo, ukuze nenze libe linye ikolwa lobujuda, eniti, lakuba njalo, nilenze umntwana wesihogo somlilo ngento epindiweyo kabini ngapezu kwenu." 
Matthew23:16 Kwoba nzima kuni, bakokeli abazimfama! eniti: Osukuba efunga itempile, asi nto yanto; kodwa osukuba efunga igolide yetempile, ufanelwe kukufeza." 
Matthew23:17 Nina bazidenge nemfama! ngokuba yiyipina enkulu, yigolide, yitempile eyingcwalisayo igolide, kusinina?" 
Matthew23:18 Eniti kanjalo: Osukuba efunga isibingelo, asi nto yanto; kodwa osukuba efunga umnikelo opezu kwaso, ufanelwe kukufeza." 
Matthew23:19 Nina bazidenge nemfama! ngokuba yiyipina into enkulu, ngumnikelo, sisibingelo esiwungcwalisayo umnikelo, kusinina?" 
Matthew23:20 Ngako ofungayo isibingelo, uyafunga sona nento zonke ezipezu kwaso:" 
Matthew23:21 nofungayo itempile, uyafunga yona nalowo umiyo kuyo:" 
Matthew23:22 nofungayo izulu, uyafunga iterone katixo nalowo uhleli pezu kwayo." 
Matthew23:23 Kwoba nzima kuni, baba̔li nabafarisi, zihanahanisi! ukuba ninika izishumi zetyeleba, nezedile, nezekumine, kanti niziyekile indawo ezinkulu zomteto, ubugwebo, nobubele, nokolo: bekufanele ezi ukuba zenzwe, neziya ukuba zingayekwa." 
Matthew23:24 Bakokeli abazimfama, abayihluzayo imbuzane, bayiginye inkamela!" 
Matthew23:25 Kwoba nzima kuni, baba̔li nabafarisi, zihanahanisi! ukuba nihlambulula indebe nesitya ngapandle, kanti ngapakati zizele bubupanga nobuncwangu." 
Matthew23:26 Farisindini oyimfama! hlambulula tanci okupakati kwendebe nesitya, ukuze kuti nokupandle kwazo kube kuhlambulukile." 
Matthew23:27 Kwoba nzima kuni, baba̔li nabafarisi, zihanahanisi! ukuba nifana namancw̔aba aqatyiweyo ngobumhlope, ati ngapandle ke abonakale emahle, kodwa ngapakati azele ngamatambo abafileyo nakuko konke ukunco̔la." 
Matthew23:28 Kwa njalo nani niti ngapandle ke nibonakale ebantwini nilungile, kodwa ngapakati nizele luhanahaniso nakokungalungileyo." 
Matthew23:29 Kwoba nzima kuni, baba̔li nabafarisi, zihanahanisi! ukuba nibuya nake amancw̔aba abaprofite, nihombe amancw̔aba abalungileyo," 
Matthew23:30 niti: Ukuba besiko emihleni yobawo betu, ngesingabi nabukolwane nabo egazini labaprofite." 
Matthew23:31 Kwa njalo ke niyazinqi̔nela ngokwenu, ukuba nilusapo lwabo babulalayo abaprofite." 
Matthew23:32 Nani zalisani isilinganiso soyihlo benu. 
Matthew23:33 Zinyokandini, sizukulwana samaṙamba! ningati nina ukusinda emgwetyweni wesihogo somlilo?" 
Matthew23:34 Ngako oko, bona ke, ndiyatuma kuni abaprofite, nezilumko, nababa̔li: naniya kuti inxenye kubo nibabulale nibakuruseshe, niti inxenye kubo nibabete ezindlwini zentlanganiso zenu, nibatshutshise kwisixeko ngesixeko;" 
Matthew23:35 ukuba kuze pezu kwenu lonke igazi elilungileyo lipalazwa emhlabeni, kutabata egazini lika‐Abele olungileyo, kude kube segazini lika‐Zekariya unyana ka‐Berekiya, lowo nambulalayo pakati kwendawo eyingcwele nesibingelo." 
Matthew23:36 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Ziya kuza zonke ezizinto pezu kwesisizukulwana. 
Matthew23:37 Yerusaleme, Yerusaleme, ebabulalayo abaprofite, ebagibisela ngamatye abo batunyiweyo kuyo! kufuti kangakananina ebendifuna ukulubutela ndawonye usapo lwako, njengokuba inkukukazi iwabutela ndawonye amatole ayo ngapantsi kwamapiko, anavuma ke!" 
Matthew23:38 Bona ke, niyashiyelwa indlu yenu ici̔takele." 
Matthew23:39 Ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Anisayi kundibona emveni kwoku, nide niti: Makatanyusanqeliswe ozayo egameni likayehova." 
Matthew24:1 KEKALOKU epumile nje u‐Yesu, ebemka etempileni: baza abadisipile bake beza kuye ukuba bambonise izakiwo zetempile." 
Matthew24:2 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kubo: Aniziboni na zonke ezizinto? ngokwenene nditi kuni: Akuyi kushiywa apa elinye ilitye pezu kwelinye, elingayi kuwiswa pantsi." 
Matthew24:3 Kekaloku nxa abehleli pezu kwentaba yeminquma, beza kuye abadisipile ngasese, besiti: Sixelele, zobako ninina ezizinto? kanjalo woba yinto nina umqondiso wokufika kwako, nowokugqityelwa kwelizwe elikoyo?" 
Matthew24:4 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo. Lumkani, ize ningalahlekiswa mntu." 
Matthew24:5 Ngokuba abaninzi beya kuza egameni lam, besiti: Mna ndinguye u‐Kristu; baze balahlekise abaninzi." 
Matthew24:6 Naniya kuba nisiva imfazwe, namaṙe emfazwe: lumkani, ize ningabi navuso; ngokuba zonke ezizinto zifanele ukuhla; kodwa ukupela akukabiko." 
Matthew24:7 Ngokuba uhlanga luya kuvukela uhlanga, nobukumkani buya kuvuk ela ubukumkani; zaziya kubako indlala, nezifo ezibubisayo, nezingcangcazelo zomhlaba ngendawo ngendawo." 
Matthew24:8 Zonke ezizinto ke zisisiqalo senimba. 
Matthew24:9 Oko niya kunikelwa ekubandezelweni, nibulawe nokubulawa; naniya kutiywa zintlanga zonke ngenxa yegama lam." 
Matthew24:10 Kanjalo oko baya kuxakaniswa abaninzi, bangcatshane, batiyane." 
Matthew24:11 Baye abaprofite ababuxoki abaninzi beya kuvuka, balahlekise abantu abaninzi." 
Matthew24:12 Kuze kuti ngenxa yokwandiswa kwokungalungileyo, kupole utando lwabaninzi." 
Matthew24:13 Kodwa onyamezelayo kude kube sekupeleni, oyena uya kusindiswa," 
Matthew24:14 yaiya kuti levangeli yobukumkani ishunyayelwe kulo lonke ilizwe, ibe sisinqi̔no kuzo zonke intlanga; kwandul’ ukufika ukupela oko ke." 
Matthew24:15 Ngako xeshekweni niyibonayo into ezondekileyo yokuci̔takalisa, ekwatetwa ngayo ngu‐Danyeli umprofite, imi endaweni engcwele; (oleseshayo makaqonde;)" 
Matthew24:16 mabati oko abo base‐Judeya basabele ezintabeni: 
Matthew24:16 mabati oko abo base‐Judeya basabele ezintabeni: 
Matthew24:17 lowo upezu kwentungo yendlu makangehli ukuya kususa into endlwini yake; 
Matthew24:18 nalowo usentsimini makangabuyeli emva ukuya kususa ingubo zake. 
Matthew24:19 Hai kodwa ubunzima babo abamitiyo nabanyisayo kuleyomihla! 
Matthew24:20 Tandazani ke ukuba mayingabiko intsabo yenu ebusika, nangemini yesabata:" 
Matthew24:21 ngokuba kuya kubako oko imbandezelo enkulu, ekungabangako enjalo kwa sekuqalekeni kwelizwe kwada kwakaloku, nekungayi kuza kubeko enjalo." 
Matthew24:22 Kanjako ukuba ibingancitshiswanga imihla leyo, bekungayi kusindiswa namnye umntu; kodwa ngenxa yabaqashwa imihla leyo iya kuncitshiswa." 
Matthew24:23 Zeniti oko, ukuba umntu utsho kuni ukuti: Nanku apa u‐Kristu; umhlaumbi ukuti: Nanku paya; ningakolwa ke." 
Matthew24:24 Ngokuba kuya kuvuka okristu ababuxoki, nabaprofite ababuxoki, babeya kubonakalisa imiqondiso emikulu nemimangaliso, ukuze bati, ukuba kungenzeka, balahlekise kwa nabaqashwa." 
Matthew24:25 Bona ke, ndinixelele ngapambili." 
Matthew24:26 Ngako ukuba batsho kuni ukuti: Nanku esentlango; ningapumi ke: nokuba bati: Nanku ezinkambilini; ningakolwa ke. 
Matthew24:27 Ngokuba, kwa njengokuba ukubaneka kuvela empumalanga, kukanye kude kube sentshonalanga, kuya kuba njalo nokufika kwonyana wesintu." 
Matthew24:28 Ngokuba apo sisukuba sikona isidumbu, kulapo aya kubutelana kona amaxalanga." 
Matthew24:29 Kwohla kuti ke emveni kwembandezelo yemihla leyo, ilanga liya kwenziwa mnyama, nenyanga ayiyi kunika ukukanya kwayo, nenkwenkwezi ziya kuwa ezulwini, namandla amazulu aya kuzanyazanyiswa:" 
Matthew24:30 kwandul’ ukubonakala umqondiso wonyana wesintu ezulwini; zandul’ ukwenza isijwili zonke izizwe zomhlaba, zibone nokubona unyana wesintu, esiza emafini ezulu, enamandla nobungcwalisa obukulu." 
Matthew24:31 Waeya kutuma ingelosi zake nentlokoma enkulu yexilongo, eziya kubutela ndawonye abaqashwa bake bevela emimoyeni yomine, kw enye incam yezulu kude kube kw enye incam yalo." 
Matthew24:32 Kanifunde umzekeliso ngomkiwane: Xeshekweni isebe lawo lise litambile, lipuma amagqabi, niyazi ukuba likufupi ihlobo:" 
Matthew24:33 kwa njalo nani, xeshekweni nibona zonke ezizinto, yazini ukuba kukufupi oko ngasemnyango." 
Matthew24:34 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Asiyi kuza sidlule Isizukulwana esi, zonke ezizinto zingekenzekanga." 
Matthew24:35 Kwodlula izulu nomhlaba; kodwa amazwi am akayi kuza adlule. 
Matthew24:36 Kodwa akuko mntu owaziyo ngayo leyomini neyure; azazi nengelosi zezulu; ngubawo yedwa owaziyo kupela. 
Matthew24:37 Kodwa njengokuba ibinjalo imihla ka‐Nowa, kwoba njalo nokufika kwonyana wesintu." 
Matthew24:38 Ngokuba, kwa njengokuba bebesiti emihleni ungekabiko umsingakazi, badla basela nokusela, bazeka bendisa nokwendisa, kwada kwaba ngumhla u‐Nowa wangena ngawo enqanaweni," 
Matthew24:39 bengaqondanga ke kwada kweza umsingakazi wabakukulisa kwa bonke, kuya kuba njalo nokufika kwonyana wesintu." 
Matthew24:40 Oko amadoda amabini obako entsimini; iti enye itatyatwe, iti enye ishiywe." 
Matthew24:41 Abafazi ababini boba besila etyeni lokusila; ati omnye atatyatwe, ati omnye ashiywe." 
Matthew24:42 Lindani ke ngoko; ngokuba ningazi yiyipina iyure inkosi yenu iza ngayo. 
Matthew24:43 Kodwa qondani oku, ukuba umninindlu ebesazi lilipina ivaṙasho isela liza ngalo, ange elinda, angavumeli ukuba igqotyozwe indlu yake." 
Matthew24:44 Ngako oko nani yibani nilungile; ngokuba ngeyure eningayikumbuleliyo unyana wesintu esiza. 
Matthew24:45 Ngubanina ke esosicaka sinyanisekileyo nesilumkileyo, eyati inkosi yaso yasimisela pezu kwabendlu yayo, ukuba sibanike ukudla ngexesha elifanelekileyo?" 
Matthew24:46 Sinetamsanqa isicaka eso, iya kuti inkosi yaso, yakufika, isifumane sisenje njalo." 
Matthew24:47 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Iya kusimisela pezu kwayo yonke impahla yayo. 
Matthew24:48 Kodwa xeshekweni esosicaka esikohlakeleyo siti entliziyweni yaso: Inkosi yam iyalibala ukuza; 
Matthew24:49 size siqale ukubeta abazizicaka naso, nokutya nokusela kunye nabanxilayo;" 
Matthew24:50 yofika inkosi yesicaka eso ngemini esingayikangeliyo ngayo, nangeyure esingayaziyo," 
Matthew24:51 isisike kubini, imise isabiwo saso kunye nabahanahanisi: apo kwobako ukulila nokuqaqazela kwamazinyo." 
Matthew25:1 OKO ubukumkani bezulu bofanekiswa nentombi ezilishumi, ezatabatayo izibane zazo, zapuma ukuya kukaulela umyeni." 
Matthew25:2 Kekaloku isihlanu kuzo zibe zilumkile, nesihlanu esinye zazinyabile." 
Matthew25:3 Ezo zinyabileyo, zitabatile nje izibane zazo, azatabata nazo ioli:" 
Matthew25:4 kodwa ezilumkileyo zatabata ioli ezityeni zazo kunye nezibane zazo. 
Matthew25:5 Zati kekaloku, xa alibalayo umyeni, zozela zonke zalala." 
Matthew25:6 Kwaza kwati pakati kwobusuku kwenziwa indanduluko yokuti: Nanku umyeni esiza; pumani ukuya kumkaulela. 
Matthew25:7 Zandula zavuka zonke intombi ezo, zalungisa izibane zazo." 
Matthew25:8 Zaza ezinyabileyo zati kwezilumkileyo: Sipeni kuyo ioli yenu, ngokuba izibane zetu zicimeka." 
Matthew25:9 Kodwa zapendula ezilumkileyo, zisiti: Hai, hleze kuti kunganeli tina nani; hambani ke niye ngokukumbi kwabo batengisayo, nizitengele." 
Matthew25:10 Koko nxa bezisiya ukutenga, wafika umyeni: zaza ezo zibe zilungile zangena naye emtshatweni; kwavalwa ke ucango." 
Matthew25:11 Zati kamva zafika nezinye intombi, zisiti: Nkosi, Nkosi, sivulele!" 
Matthew25:12 Kodwa wapendula wati: Ngokwenene nditi kuni, andinazi." 
Matthew25:13 Lindani ke ngoko; ngokuba ningayazi imini kwa neyure unyana wesintu uza ngayo. 
Matthew25:14 Ngokuba unyana wesintu e njengomntu ehambela kwelinye ilizwe, o wabiza izicaka zake, wayinikela kuzo imfuyo yake." 
Matthew25:15 Wati ke esinye wasinika italente ntlanu, nesinye wasinika mbini, nesinye wasinika nye; wanika esinye ngesinye ngokwawaso amandla: waza wahambela kwelinye ilizwe kwa oko." 
Matthew25:16 Kekaloku eso samkelayo italente ezintlanu saya sasebenza ngazo, senza esinye isihlanu setalente." 
Matthew25:17 Kwa njalo neso samkelayo ezimbini, saqweba naso esinye isibini." 
Matthew25:18 Kodwa eso samkelayo enye saya semba emhlabeni, sayifihla imali yenkosi yaso." 
Matthew25:19 Kekaloku emveni kwexesha elikulu, yeza inkosi yezicaka ezo, yazibuza." 
Matthew25:20 Sati ke eso samkelayo italente ezintlanu seza sazisa esinye isihlanu setalente, sisiti: Nkosi! italente ntlanu wabuzinikela kum; kangela, esinye isihlanu setalente ndisiqwebile pezu kwazo." 
Matthew25:21 Yaza yati kuso inkosi yaso: Ukolisile, sicaka esilungileyo esinyanisekileyo! ubunyanisekile pezu kwezinto ezincinane, ndokumisela pezu kwezinto ezininzi; ngena eluyolweni lwenkosi yako." 
Matthew25:22 Seza ke neso samkelayo italente ezimbini, sati: Nkosi! italente mbini wabuzinikela kum; kangela, esinye isibini setalente ndisiqwebile pezu kwazo." 
Matthew25:23 Yati kuso inkosi yaso: Ukolisile, sicaka esilungileyo esinyanisekileyo! ubunyanisekile pezu kwezinto ezincinane, ndokumisela pezu kwezinto ezininzi; ngena eluyolweni lwenkosi yako." 
Matthew25:24 Seza ke neso sibe samkele italente enye, sati: Nkosi! ndakwazi wena ukuba ungumntu olukuni, uvuna apo ungahlwayelanga kona, ubuta apo ungaci̔telanga kona;" 
Matthew25:25 ndaza ndoyika, ndaya ndayifihla italente yako emhlabeni; kangela, unako okukokwako." 
Matthew25:26 Yaza yapendula inkosi yaso yati kuso: Sicaka esikohlakeleyo esinqenayo! ubusazi nje ukuba ndiyavuna apo ndingahlwayelanga kona, ndibute apo ndingaci̔telanga kona:" 
Matthew25:27 ubufanele ngoko ukuba wabeka imali yam kubananisi; ndaye ndinga ndite mna, ndakufika, ndabuya ndamkela okukokwam kunye nokwanda kwako." 
Matthew25:28 Mhluteni ngoko italente yake, niyinike kulowo unetalente ezilishumi." 
Matthew25:29 Ngokuba bonke abanako beya kupiwa, babeya kwanezelelwa; kanti ongenako, uya kuhlutwa kwa oko anako." 
Matthew25:30 Nesicaka esingancedi luto siku̔peleni ebumnyameni obupandle: apo kwobako ukulila nokuqaqazela kwamazinyo. 
Matthew25:31 Kekaloku akuza unyana wesintu ebungcwaliseni bake, nazo zonke ingelosi ezingcwele kunye naye, uya kwandula ahlale pezu kweterone yobungcwalisa bake;" 
Matthew25:32 kwaye kuya kuhlanganiswa pambi kwake zonke intlanga; waeya kubahlula abanye kwabanye, njengokuba umalusi esahlula izimvu ezibokweni;" 
Matthew25:33 ati izimvu ke azimise ngasekunene kuye, ati kodwa ibokwe azimise ngasekohlo." 
Matthew25:34 Oko nya kuti ukumkani kwabo bangasekunene kuye: Yizani, nina batanyusanqelweyo ngubawo! yidlani ilifa lobukumkani obulungiselwe nina kwa sekumisweni kwelizwe:" 
Matthew25:35 ngokuba bendilambile, naza nandipa ukutya; bendinxaniwe, naza nandiseza; bendingowasemzini, naza nandamkela endlwini;" 
Matthew25:36 bendizé, naza nandambesa; bendisifa, naza nandilunguza; bendisentolongweni, neza kum ke." 
Matthew25:37 Baya kwandula ukupendula kuye abalungileyo, besiti: Nkosi! bekuninina esakubona ulambile, saza sa kw ondla; umhlaumbi unxaniwe, saza sa ku seza?" 
Matthew25:38 bekuninina esakubona ungowasemzini, saza sa kw amkela endlwini; umhlaumbi uzé, saza sa kw ambesa?" 
Matthew25:39 bekuninina esakubona usifa, umhlaumbi usentolongweni, seza kuwe ke?" 
Matthew25:40 Waeya kupendula ukumkani ati kubo: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Ngendawo yokuba nibe nisenje njalo kwomnye waba abazalwana bam noko amncinane kubo bonke, nibe nisenje njalo kum." 
Matthew25:41 Oko uya kuti nakwabo bangasekohlo: Mkani kum, nina baqalekisiweyo! niye emlilweni ongunapakade, olungiselwe u‐Satane nengelosi zake:" 
Matthew25:42 ngokuba bendilambile, anandipa ukutya ke; bendinxaniwe, anandiseza ke;" 
Matthew25:43 bendingowasemzini, anandamkela endlwini ke; bendizé, anandambesa ke; bendisifa, bendisentolongweni kanjalo, anaza kundibona ke." 
Matthew25:44 Baya kwandula ukupendula kuye nabo, besiti: Nkosi! bekuninina esakubona ulambile, umhlaumbi unxaniwe, umhlaumbi ungowasemzini, umhlaumbi uzé, umhlaumbi usifa, umhlaumbi usentolongweni, saza asakwonga?" 
Matthew25:45 Uya kwandula apendule kubo, esiti: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Ngendawo yokuba nibe ningenje njalo kwomnye waba noko amncinane kubo bonke, nibe ningenje njalo nakum." 
Matthew25:46 Babeya kumka aba ukuya ekubetweni okungunapakade, kodwa abalungileyo ukuya ebomini obungunapakade." 
Matthew26:1 KWAYE kute, okuya abezigqibile u‐Yesu zonke iziteto ezi, wati kubadisipile bake:" 
Matthew26:2 Niyazi ukuba kuti emveni kwentsuku mbini kubeko ipasika; waye unyana wesintu eya kunikelwa ukuba akuruseshwe. 
Matthew26:3 Bandula bahlanganisana abaperisite abakulu, nababa̔li, nabadala babantu, endlwini yomperisite omkulu o‐kutiwa ngu‐Kayafasi," 
Matthew26:4 bacebisana ukuba bambambe u‐Yesu ngenkohliso, bambuiale." 
Matthew26:5 Bebesiti kodwa: Makungabi semtendelekweni, ukuze kungenziwa isipitipiti pakati kwabantu." 
Matthew26:6 Kekaloku xeshekweni u‐Yesu ebese‐Betaniya, endlwini ka‐Simone ileperi," 
Matthew26:7 kweza kuye umfazi eneqaka leyalabastere linamafuta mnandi axabiso likulu, wawagalela pezu kwentloko yake xa abehleli ekutyeni." 
Matthew26:8 Koko abadisipile bake, bakubona oko, baqumba kunene, besiti: Okukuci̔takala kokwento nina?" 
Matthew26:9 ngokuba kunge kutengiwe into eninzi ngalamafuta mnandi, kwaza kwapiwa amahlwempu." 
Matthew26:10 Wazi kodwa u‐Yesu wati kubo: Yinina ukuba nimkataze umfazi? ngokuba umsebenzi olungileyo ewenzile kum. 
Matthew26:11 Ngokuba ninawo amahlwempu futi ekuni; kanti aninam futi. 
Matthew26:12 Ngokuba lo ewagalele nje amafuta mnandi la emzimbeni wam, wenzela ukuncw̔atywa kwam." 
Matthew26:13 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Apo kusukuba kushunyayelwa kona ivangeli le kulo lonke ilizwe, kuya kutyelwa nalento ayenzileyo lo, ibe sisikumbuzo sake." 
Matthew26:14 Wandula wahamba owabalishumi linababini, o‐kutiwa ngu‐Jude Sikariyoti, waya kubaperisite abakulu," 
Matthew26:14 Wandula wahamba owabalishumi linababini, o‐kutiwa ngu‐Jude Sikariyoti, waya kubaperisite abakulu," 
Matthew26:15 wati: Nivuma ukundinika nto nina? ndandiya kumnikela kuni. Baza bamlinganisela amaqosha esilivere angamashumi matatu. 
Matthew26:16 Wabesiti ke emveni kwoko wafuna ituba lokuba amngcatshe. 
Matthew26:17 Kekaloku ngowokuqala umhla wezonka ezingenagwele, beza abadisipile ku‐Yesu, besiti kuye: Utanda ukuba sikulungisele pina kutyiwe ipasika?" 
Matthew26:18 Wayesiti: Yiyani esixekweni kumntu otile, niti kuye: Uti umfundisi: Ixesha lam likufupi; ipasika ndiya kuyenza kuwe kunye nabadisipile bam." 
Matthew26:19 Baza benza abadisipile njengokuba ebebayalele u‐Yesu, bayilungisa ipasika." 
Matthew26:20 Kwati ke kwakuhlwa, wabehleli ekutyeni nabalishumi linababini." 
Matthew26:21 Waza kekaloku, nxa bebesitya, wati: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Omnye wakuni wondingcatsha." 
Matthew26:22 Babelusizi kakulu ke, baqala ukuti kuye abanye ngabanye: Ndim na. Nkosi?" 
Matthew26:23 Waza wapendula wati: Ofaka isandla esityeni kunye nam, nguye lowo oya kundingcatsha." 
Matthew26:24 Unyana wesintu uyemka okunene, njengokuba kuba̔liwe ngaye; kodwa kwoba nzima kulowamntu unyana wesintu ungcatshwa nguye! bekumlungele, ukuba ebengazalwanga lowamntu." 
Matthew26:25 Waza wapendula u‐Jude, owamngcatshayo, wati: Ndim na, Rabi? Wati kuye: Utshilo wena." 
Matthew26:25 Waza wapendula u‐Jude, owamngcatshayo, wati: Ndim na, Rabi? Wati kuye: Utshilo wena." 
Matthew26:26 Kekaloku nxa bebesitya, watabata u‐Yesu isonka, wabulela, waqezula, wanika abadisipile, wati: Tabatani, nitye; esi singumzimba wam." 
Matthew26:27 Kanjalo watabata indebe, wabulela, wabanika, esiti: Selani kuyo nonke;" 
Matthew26:28 ngokuba le iligazi lam, elocebano olutsha, elipalazelwa abaninzi kube kukuxolelwa kwezono." 
Matthew26:29 Kodwa nditi kuni: Andisayi kusela emveni kwoku kwesisiqa̔mo somti weveyine, kude kube yimini leyo, okuya ndisiselayo nani sisitsha ebukumkanini bukabawo." 
Matthew26:30 Baza bati, bakuba bevumile iculo, bapuma baya entabeni yeminquma." 
Matthew26:31 Wandula wati kubo u‐Yesu: Nina nonke niya kuxakaniswa ngam ngobubusuku; ngokuba kuba̔liwe ngokuti: Ndiya kubeta umalusi, zaziya kuci̔twa igusha zomhlambi." 
Matthew26:32 Kodwa emveni kwokuvuka kwam, ndiya kunandulela ukuya e‐Galili." 
Matthew26:33 Waza wapendula u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Nakuba bonke baya kuxakaniswa ngawe, andisayi kuza ndixakaniswe mna." 
Matthew26:34 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Ngokwenene nditi kuwe: Kwa ngobubusuku, ingekalili inkuku, uya kundikanyela katatu." 
Matthew26:35 Wati u‐Petrosi kuye: Nangona kundifanele ukuba ndife ndawonye nawe, andisayi kukukanyela. Batsho nabo bonke abadisipile kwa ngokunjalo." 
Matthew26:36 Wandula u‐Yesu weza nabo entsimini e‐kutiwa yi‐Getesemane, wati kubadisipile: Hlalani pantsi apa, nxa ndiyayo nditandaze paya." 
Matthew26:37 Waza watabata naye u‐Petrosi nonyana baka‐Zebedi bobabini, waqala ukuba lusizi nokudandateka kakulu." 
Matthew26:38 Wandula wati kubo: Umpefumlo wam ulusizi kakulu kude kube sekufeni; hlalani apa, nilinde nam." 
Matthew26:39 Waza waya umganyana ngapambili, wawa ngobuso bake, etandaza, esiti nokuti: Bawo! ukuba kungenzeka, makudlule kum indebe le: noko makungabi njengokuba nditanda mna, makube njengokuba utanda wena." 
Matthew26:40 Wayesiza kubadisipile, wabafumana belele, wati ku‐Petrosi: Kanene beningelinde nam iyure ibe nye na?" 
Matthew26:41 Lindani nitandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekulingweni: umoya okunene uyavuma, kodwa inyama ibutataka." 
Matthew26:42 Wabuya wemka ngokwesibini, waya watandaza, esiti: Bawo! ukuba lendebe ayingedlule kum, nxa ndingayiseli, makwenziwe intando yako." 
Matthew26:43 Wayesiza wabafumana belele kanjako; ngokuba amehlo abo ebenzima. 
Matthew26:44 Waza wabashiya, wemka kanjako, waya watandaza ngokwesitatu, eteta wona lomazwi." 
Matthew26:45 Wandula weza kubadisipile bake, wati kubo: Lalani ixesha eliseleyo, nipumle; nantsi iyure isel’ ikufupi, xa unyana wesintu anikelwa ezandleni zaboni:" 
Matthew26:46 vukani, sihambe; nanku esel’ ekufupi ondingcatshayo." 
Matthew26:47 Kekaloku nxa abesateta, bona ke, kweza u‐Jude, owabalishumi linababini, nesihlwele esikulu kunye naye sineziṙele nenduku, sivela kubo abaperisite abakulu nabadala babantu." 
Matthew26:47 Kekaloku nxa abesateta, bona ke, kweza u‐Jude, owabalishumi linababini, nesihlwele esikulu kunye naye sineziṙele nenduku, sivela kubo abaperisite abakulu nabadala babantu." 
Matthew26:48 Wayete obemngcatsha wabanika umqondiso, esiti: Lowo endiya kumanga, ukwa nguye; mbambeni yena." 
Matthew26:49 Waselesiza ku‐Yesu kwa oko, wati: A, Rabi! wamanga ke." 
Matthew26:50 Waza u‐Yesu wati kuye: Sihlobo! ufikele nina? Bandula beza, babeka izandla pezu kwake u‐Yesu, bambamba." 
Matthew26:51 Kekaloku bona ke, omnye wabo babenaye u‐Yesu wolula isandla, war̔ola isiṙele sake, wabeta isicaka somperisite omkulu, wasinqumla indlebe." 
Matthew26:52 Wandula wati u‐Yesu kuye: Sibuyisele endaweni yaso isiṙele sako; ngokuba bonke abasitabatayo isiṙele beya kububa ngesiṙele. 
Matthew26:53 Uba andingete na kwa kaloku nje ndikunge ubawo, waeya kundimisela amabandla amakulu engelosi apezu kwalishumi linamabini?" 
Matthew26:54 Pofu singati nina ukuzaliseka isiba̔lo sokuti, kufanele ukuba nje?" 
Matthew26:55 Kwa ngeloxeshana wati u‐Yesu kwizihlwele: Nipumile neziṙele nenduku ukuza kundibamba na, njengokungati nibe nipuma ngakulo ibada? Bendihleli imihla ngemihla kuni ndifundisa etempileni, anandibamba ke." 
Matthew26:56 Kodwa oku konke kwenzekile, ukuze zizaliseke iziba̔lo zabaprofite. Bandula bonke abadisipile bamshiya, babaleka." 
Matthew26:57 Bati kekaloku abo bambambayo u‐Yesu bamr̔olela ku‐Kayafasi umperisite omkulu, apo babehlanganisene kona ababa̔li nabadala." 
Matthew26:58 Waza u‐Petrosi wamlandela ekude, kwada kwasekusini lendlu yomperisite omkulu, wangena pakati, wahlala pantsi ndawonye namadindili, ukuba abone ukupela kwendawo." 
Matthew26:59 Kekaloku abaperisite abakulu, nabadala, nayo yonke intlanganiso yamapakati, bebefuna ubunqi̔na obubuxoki ngakuye u‐Yesu, ukuze bamfise;" 
Matthew26:60 kanti abafumana ke: ewe, akufika amanqi̔na abuxoki amaninzi, abafumana ke. Ada afika amanqi̔na abuxoki emabini," 
Matthew26:61 ati: Watsho lo ukuti: Ndingayici̔ta itempile katixo, ndibuye ndiyake ngentsuku zibe ntatu." 
Matthew26:62 Waza wesuka umperisite omkulu, wati kuye: Akupenduli nto na? banqi̔na nto nina ngakuwe aba?" 
Matthew26:63 Kuloko u‐Yesu wati tu. Waza wapendula umperisite omkulu wati kuye: Ndiyakufungisa utixo opilileyo, uze usixelele ukuba unguye na u‐Kristu, unyana katixo." 
Matthew26:64 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Utshilo wena. Kanjako nditi kuni: Emveni kwoku niya kubona unyana wesintu ehleli ngasekunene kwamandla, esiza nokuza emafini ezulu." 
Matthew26:65 Wandula umperisite omkulu waṙazula ingubo zake, esiti: Ugxekile u‐Tixo; sisafunela nina amanqi̔na? bona ke, nikuvile ngoku ukugxeka kwake;" 
Matthew26:66 niti nina ke? Baza bapendula bati: Unetyala lokuba afe. 
Matthew26:67 Bandula bamtshicela ebusweni, bamntliteka; bati inxenye bamtywakaza," 
Matthew26:68 besiti: Silaulele, Kristundini! wabetwa ngubanina?" 
Matthew26:69 Kekaloku u‐Petrosi ebehleli ngapandle ekusini; saza isicakazana esitile seza kuye, sisiti: Nawe ubuno‐Yesu wase‐Galili." 
Matthew26:70 Koko wakanyelayo ebusweni babo bonke, esiti: Andiyazi into oyitetayo." 
Matthew26:71 Kanjalo akupumela esangweni, sambona esinye, sati kwabakona: Naye lo ebeno‐Yesu wase‐Nazarete." 
Matthew26:72 Waza wabuya wakanyela ngesifungo, esiti: Andimazi umntu lowo." 
Matthew26:73 Kwati ke kwakuba mzuzwana, basondela abebemi kona bati ku‐Petrosi: Ngenyaniso nawe ungowakubo; ngokuba nokuteta kwako kukuhlakazela." 
Matthew26:74 Wandula waqala ukuqalekisa nokufunga, esiti: Andimazi umntu lowo. Yasuka yalila inkuku kwa oko." 
Matthew26:75 Waza u‐Petrosi wakumbula ilizwi lika‐Yesu, abelitshilo kuye ukuti: Ingekalili inkuku, uya kundikanyela katatu. Waselepuma ngapandle, walila ngento ebuṙaṙa." 
Matthew27:1 KEKALOKU kwakuba kusile, bacebisana bonke abaperisite abakulu nabadala babantu ngakuye u‐Yesu, ukuze bamfise." 
Matthew27:2 Baza bati bakuba bemnxibile, bamr̔ola, bamnikela ku‐Pontiyusi Pilati kwinkosi." 
Matthew27:3 Wandula u‐Jude, owamngcatshayo, akubona ukuba ugwetyiwe, wazohlwaya, wazibuyisela kubaperisite abakulu nakubadala lomaqosha esilivere angamashumi matatu," 
Matthew27:3 Wandula u‐Jude, owamngcatshayo, akubona ukuba ugwetyiwe, wazohlwaya, wazibuyisela kubaperisite abakulu nakubadala lomaqosha esilivere angamashumi matatu," 
Matthew27:4 esiti: Ndonile, igazi elingenatyala ndilingcatshile nje. Kodwa bati: Kuyinto nina kuti oko? kukangele ngokwako." 
Matthew27:5 Waza wawawisa lomaqosha esilivere etempileni apo, wemka, waya wazixo̔ma." 
Matthew27:6 Baza abaperisite abakulu batabata lomaqosha esilivere, bati: Akufanelekile ukuba afakwe etyeyeni yeminikelo, ngokokuba elinani legazi." 
Matthew27:7 Baza bacebisana, batenga ngawo intsimi yombumbi, ibe yindawo yokuncw̔atywa kwabasemzini." 
Matthew27:8 Ngoko kwabizwa intsimi leyo ngokuti yintsimi yegazi, kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Matthew27:9 Kwandula kwazaliseka oko kwatetwayo ngu‐Jeremiya umprofite, esiti: Baza batabata lomaqosha esilivere engamashumi matatu, elinani lalowo kwenziwa inani ngaye, lowo walenzelwayo inani ngabo abosapo luka‐Sirayeli," 
Matthew27:10 bawanikela intsimi yombumbi, njengokuba ebendiyalele uyehova." 
Matthew27:11 Kekaloku u‐Yesu wema ebusweni benkosi. Yaza yambuza inkosi, isiti: Ungukumkani wama‐Juda na? Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuyo: Utsho wena." 
Matthew27:12 Kanti akunikwa ityala ngabaperisite abakulu nabadala, akapendula nto." 
Matthew27:13 Wandula wati u‐Pilati kuye: Akuva na izinto zininzi kangakanana abazinqi̔nayo ngakuwe? 
Matthew27:14 Akampendula ke nalinye ilizwi; yada yati nqa inkosi leyo kakulu. 
Matthew27:15 Kekaloku ngomtendeleko lowo inkosi ibiqelile ukukululela abantu umbanjwa abe mnye, lowo bamfunayo." 
Matthew27:16 Baye benaye ke oko umbanjwa owazekileyo kunene, o‐kutiwa ngu‐Baraba." 
Matthew27:17 Ngako, behlanganisene nje, wati kubo u‐Pilati: Nguwupina enifunayo ukuba ndinikululele yena? ngu‐Baraba na, ngu‐Yesu o‐kutiwa ngu‐Kristu kusinina?" 
Matthew27:18 Ngokuba ebesazi ukuba babemnikele ngomona. 
Matthew27:19 Wati kekaloku ehleli nje esihlalweni sokugweba, umfazi wake watuma kuye; esiti: Ungenzi nto kulowamntu olungileyo; ngokuba intlungu ezininzi ndabendiziva namhla epupeni ngaye." 
Matthew27:20 Kodwa abaperisite abakulu nabadala bazicenga izihlwele, ukuba mazicele u‐Baraba, no‐Yesu mazimbubise." 
Matthew27:21 Yapendula ke inkosi yati kubo: Nguwupina kwaba babini enifunayo ukuba ndinikululele yena? Bati ke: Ngu‐Baraba. 
Matthew27:22 Wati kubo u‐Pilati: Ndize nditi nina ku‐Yesu o‐kutiwa ngu‐Kristu? Bati kuye bonke: Makakuruseshwe. 
Matthew27:23 Koko inkosi yati: Wenze ukukohlakala kunina pofu? Kodwa bebedanduluka ngakumbi, besiti: Makakuruseshwe." 
Matthew27:24 Wati kekaloku u‐Pilati, akubona ukuba akancedi luto, koko ngokukumbi kusuka isipitipiti, watabata amanzi, wahlamba izandla zake pambi kwesihlwele, esiti: Andinatyala egazini lalomntu olungileyo; kukangeleni oko ngokwenu." 
Matthew27:25 Baza bapendula bonke abantu bati: Igazi lake malibe pezu kwetu, napezu kwabantwana betu." 
Matthew27:26 Wandula wabakululela u‐Baraba; kodwa u‐Yesu, akuba emtyabule, wamnikela ukuba akuruseshwe." 
Matthew27:27 Andula amasodati enkosi amsa u‐Yesu endlwini yenkosi, ahlanganisa ngakuye lonke ibandla lawo." 
Matthew27:28 Aza amhluba ingubo zake, amfaka isivato esibomvumnyama." 
Matthew27:29 Ati akuba elukile isitsaba ngemitolo, asibeka pezu kwentloko yake, nengcongolo esandleni sake sokunene; aza aguqa ngamadolo ebusweni bake, amhleka, esiti: A, kumkani wama‐Juda!" 
Matthew27:30 Aza amtshicela, atabata ingcongolo leyo, ambeta entlokweni yake." 
Matthew27:31 Ati xeshekweni ebemhlekile, amhluba isivato eso, amambatisa ingubo zake; aza amr̔ola ukuya kukuruseshwa." 
Matthew27:32 Kekaloku nxa abepuma, afumana umntu wase‐Kirene, ogama lingu‐Simone: lowo amnyanzela ukuba atwale ikuruse yake." 
Matthew27:33 Ati akufika endaweni e‐kutiwa yi‐Gologota, oko kukuti, yindawo yenkankani," 
Matthew27:34 amnika iyasine ipitikeziwe kunye nenyongo ukuba asele; kanti aku yi va, ebengavumi ukusela." 
Matthew27:35 Kanjalo akuba ebemkuruseshile, azaba ingubo zake, esenza amaqashiso; ukuze kuzaliseke oko kwatetwayo ngumprofite, esiti: Babelana izivato zam, napezu kwengubo yam benza amaqashiso." 
Matthew27:36 Aza ati, ehleli pantsi, amgcina apo ke." 
Matthew27:37 Kwaye kubekwa ngapezu kwentloko yake ityala lake liba̔liwe ngokuti: Lo unguyesu ukumkani wamajuda. 
Matthew27:38 Kwandula kwakuruseshwa ndawonye naye amabada amabini, elinye ngasekunene, nelinye ngasekohlo." 
Matthew27:39 Bati kekaloku abadlulayo bamgxeka, behlunguzela intloko zabo," 
Matthew27:40 besiti nokuti: Wena uyici̔tayo itempile, ubuye uyake pakati kwentsuku ntatu, zisindise! ukuba ungunyana katixo, yihla ekuruseni." 
Matthew27:41 Kwa njalo ke nabaperisite abakulu, behleka, kunye nababa̔li nabadala, bebesiti:" 
Matthew27:42 Abanye wabasindisa, yena ngokwake akangezisindise: ukuba ungukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, makehle kaloku nje ekuruseni, sasiya kukolwa nguye:" 
Matthew27:43 utembele kutixo; makamhlangule kaloku nje, ukuba uyamtanda; ngokuba wabesiti: Ndingunyana katixo." 
Matthew27:44 Kanjako namabada, abekuruseshwe ndawonye naye, ebemtuka ngento enjalo." 
Matthew27:45 Kwati kekaloku kweyesitandatu iyure yada yayiyure yesitoba, kwabako ubumnyama pezu kwalo lonke ilizwe." 
Matthew27:46 Waza ngeyesitoba iyure wamemeza u‐Yesu ngelizwi elikulu, esiti: Eli! Eli! lama sabaketani? oko kukuti: Tixo wam! Tixo wam! undishiyile nganina?" 
Matthew27:47 Baye besiti inxenye yabemi kona, bakuva: Uyambiza u‐Elija lo." 
Matthew27:48 Waselesuka wagidima omnye wakubo, watabata ikepekepe, walizalisa ngeyasine, walifaka engcongolweni, wamseza ke." 
Matthew27:49 Koko abanye bebesiti: Yeka, masibone ukuba uyeza na u‐Elija ukuza kumsindisa." 
Matthew27:50 Wati ke u‐Yesu, akupinda ukudanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, waku̔pa umpefumlo." 
Matthew27:51 Laza bona ke, ikuselo lendawo eyingcwele laṙazulwa kubini kwa pezulu kwada kwasezantsi; wati umhlaba wangcangcazela, namawa acandeka;" 
Matthew27:52 aza amancw̔aba avulwa, yati imizimba emininzi yabangcwele ababelele yavuswa," 
Matthew27:53 yapuma emancw̔abeni, emveni kwokuvuka kwake, yangena esixekweni esingcwele, yabonakala kwabaninzi." 
Matthew27:54 Kekaloku inkosikulu nabo babenayo begcina u‐Yesu, bakubona isingcangcazelo somhlaba nezinto ezenzekileyo, boyika kakulu, besiti: Ngenyaniso ebengunyana katixo lo." 
Matthew27:55 Kwaye kuko kona nabafazi abaninzi bebonela bekude, abebelandele u‐Yesu evela e‐Galili, bemkonza;" 
Matthew27:56 owayeko pakati kwabo u‐Mariya wase‐Magadala, kwa no‐Mariya unina bo‐Yakobi no‐Jose, nonina bonyana baka‐Zebedi." 
Matthew27:57 Kwati ke kwakuhlwa, kweza umntu osityebi wase‐Arimateya ogama lingu‐Josefe, obengumdisipile ka‐Yesu naye:" 
Matthew27:58 weza lowo ku‐Pilati, wacela umzimba ka‐Yesu. Wandula u‐Pilati waxela ukuba kunikelwe umzimba." 
Matthew27:59 Waza u‐Josefe watabata umzimba, wawusongela eqiyeni eshiceneyo emhlope," 
Matthew27:60 wawubeka kwelake incw̔aba elitsha, abelimbile eweni apo; waza waliqengqa ilitye elikulu ngasemnyango wencw̔aba, wemka ke." 
Matthew27:61 Baye beko kona u‐Mariya wase‐Magadala, nomnye u‐Mariya, behleli pantsi malungana nencw̔aba." 
Matthew27:62 Kekaloku ngomhla olandelayo, ongowasemva kwowokulungiselela, bahlanganisana abaperisite abakulu nabafarisi ngaku‐Pilati," 
Matthew27:63 besiti: Nkosi! sikumbule ukuba lowamkohlisi watsho nxa asahleli ukuti: Emveni kwentsuku ntatu ndobuya ndivuke. 
Matthew27:64 Yalela ngoko ukuba kuqiniswe incw̔aba lude lube lolwesitatu usuku; hlezibe abadisipile bake beze ebusuku bambe̔, baze bati ebantwini: Uvukile ekufeni; ize iti inkohliso yokupela igqitise eyokuqala ngokuba mbi." 
Matthew27:65 Wayesiti kubo u‐Pilati: Seninawo umlisela; hambani, niqinise ngendawo eniyaziyo." 
Matthew27:66 Baya ke baqinisa incw̔aba, bencamatisela ilitye, bemisa umlisela kanjalo." 
Matthew28:1 KWATI ke emveni kwesabata, kwakuza kusa ngolwokuqala usuku lweveki, kweza u‐Mariya wase‐Magadala, nomnye u‐Mariya, ukuza kukangela incw̔aba." 
Matthew28:2 Kekaloku bona ke, kwabekuko isingcangcazelo somhlaba esikulu: ngokuba ingelosi yenkosi yehlayo ezulwini, yeza yaliqengqa ilitye kuwo umnyango, yahlala pantsi pezu kwalo." 
Matthew28:3 Ukubonakala kwayo bekunjengokubaneka, nezivato zayo bezimhlope njengengqweqwe." 
Matthew28:4 Bati abagcini ngokuyoyika bangcangcazela, bada baba njengabafileyo." 
Matthew28:5 Yaza yapendula ingelosi yati kubafazi abo: Musani kwoyika nina; ngokuba ndisazi ukuba niyamfuna u‐Yesu obekuruseshiwe. 
Matthew28:6 Akako apa; ngokuba evukile, njengokuba wabetshilo. Yizani, nibone indawo apo inkosi yabilele kona." 
Matthew28:7 Nize niye ngokukauleza, nixelele abadisipile bake ukuba uvukile ekufeni; kanjalo, bona ke, uyanandulela ukuya e‐Galili; kwa lapo niya kumbona. Bona ke, ndinixelele." 
Matthew28:8 Baza bapuma ngokukauleza encw̔abeni, benesoyiko novuyo olukulu, bagidima ukuya kushumayela kubadisipile bake." 
Matthew28:9 Kekaloku oko bebesiya ukushumayela kubadisipile bake, waza, bona ke, u‐Yesu wabahlangabeza, esiti: Botani! Basuka beza bambamba ngenyawo, bambedesha." 
Matthew28:10 Wandula wati kubo u‐Yesu: Musani kwoyika; hambani, nishumayele kubazalwana bam ukuba bemkele e‐Galili; kona apo ke baya kundibona." 
Matthew28:11 Kekaloku nxa bebesiya, bona ke, abatile bomlisela bafika esixekweni, bashumayeza abaperisite abakulu kwa zonke izinto ezenzekileyo." 
Matthew28:12 Baza bahlanganisana nabadala, bati bakuba becebisene, bawapa imali eninzi amasodati lawo," 
Matthew28:13 besiti: Yitshoni ukuti: Abadisipile bake beza ebusuku, bamba̔ xa sileleyo." 
Matthew28:14 Sasiya kuti xeshekweni kubikwa oku ebusweni benkosi, sitomalalise yona, sinenze ningabi nangozi nina." 
Matthew28:15 Aza atabata lomali, enza njengokuba ebefundiswa: saye isiteto esi sivakaliswa ema‐Judeni kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Matthew28:15 Aza atabata lomali, enza njengokuba ebefundiswa: saye isiteto esi sivakaliswa ema‐Judeni kwada kwanamhla nje." 
Matthew28:16 Bati ke abadisipile abalishumi linamnye baya e‐Galili, entabeni apo wabanqopisela kona u‐Yesu." 
Matthew28:17 Baza bati bakumbona, bambedesha; kodwa batandabuza inxenye." 
Matthew28:18 Waye u‐Yesu esiza wateta kubo, esiti: kunikwe mna amandla onke ezulwini nasemhlabeni." 
Matthew28:19 Hambani ngoko niye nizenze abadisipile zonke intlanga, nibabapitizeshela egameni loyise ne lonyana ne lomoya oyingcwele," 
Matthew28:20 nibafundisa ukugcina zonke izinto endiniyalele ngazo: kanjalo bona ke, ndiko mna kunye nani yonke imihla kude kube kukugqityelwa kwelizwe elikoyo. Amene." 
Mark1:1 UKUQALA kwevangeli ka‐Yesu Kristu, unyana katixo;" 
Mark1:2 njengokuba kuba̔liwe ebaprofiteni ngokuti: Bona ke, ndiyatuma isitunywa sam pambi kwobuso bako, esiya kulungisa indlela yako pambi kwako:" 
Mark1:3 nangokuti: Ilizwi lodandulukayo entlango: Lungisani indlela kayehova; yenzani imendo yake ilungelelane. 
Mark1:4 Weza u‐Johane ebapitizesha entlango, eshumayela ubapitizesho lwoguquko kube kukuxolelwa kwezono." 
Mark1:5 Laza lapumela kuye lonke ilizwe le‐Judeya, nabase‐Yerusaleme; bati bonke babapitizeshwa nguye emlanjeni we‐Yoredane, bevuma izono zabo." 
Mark1:5 Laza lapumela kuye lonke ilizwe le‐Judeya, nabase‐Yerusaleme; bati bonke babapitizeshwa nguye emlanjeni we‐Yoredane, bevuma izono zabo." 
Mark1:6 Waye kekaloku u‐Johane wambete uboya benkamela, nombinqo wolusu esinqeni sake; watya inkumbi nobusi basendle." 
Mark1:7 Washumayela ke, esiti: Uyeza onamandla amakulu kwawam emva kwam, endingafanelekile ukuba nditobe pantsi ndiwutukulule umtya wezihlangu zake." 
Mark1:8 Mna okunene ndinibapitizeshile ngamanzi; kodwa yena wonibapitizesha ngomoya oyingcwele. 
Mark1:9 Kwaye kute kuleyomihla, wavela u‐Yesu e‐Nazarete yase‐Galili, wabapitizeshwa ngu‐Johane e‐Yoredane apo." 
Mark1:10 Waza wati esel’ enyuka emanzini, wabona izulu licandekile, nomoya njengehobe esihla pezu kwake." 
Mark1:11 Kanjalo leza ilizwi livela ezulwini, lisiti: Wena ungunyana wam otandiweyo, endikolisiweyo kakuhle nguye." 
Mark1:12 Waselesiti umoya wamqu̔bela entlango. 
Mark1:13 Waza wakona entlango apo intsuku zamashumi mane, elingwa ngu‐Satane; wayendawonye namaṙamncwa ke; zaza ingelosi zamkonza." 
Mark1:14 KEKALOKU emveni kwokunikelwa kuka‐Johane entolongweni, weza u‐Yesu e‐Galili, eshumayela ivangeli yobukumkani bukatixo," 
Mark1:15 esiti nokuti: Ixesha lizalisekile; buse bukufupi ubukumkani bukatixo: guqukani, nikolwe evangelini." 
Mark1:16 Wati kekaloku ehamba ngaselwandle lwase‐Galili, wabona u‐Simone, no‐Andreya umninawe wake, beposa utambo elwandle: ngokuba bebengabalobi bentlanzi." 
Mark1:17 Waza wati kubo u‐Yesu: Yizani emva kwam, ndandiya kunenza nibe ngabalobi babantu." 
Mark1:18 Basebesuka bazishiya intambo zabo, bamlandela." 
Mark1:19 Kanjalo egqitile apo umganyana, wabona u‐Yakobi unyana ka‐Zebedi, no‐Johane umninawe wake, besenqanaweni bona nabo belungisa intambo." 
Mark1:20 Wasuka wababiza ke: baza bashiya uyise wabo u‐Zebedi enqanaweni enabaqashwa, bemka baya emva kwake." 
Mark1:21 Baya bangena e‐Kapenayume: waza wati ngemini yesabata waselengena endlwini yentlanganiso wafundisa. 
Mark1:22 Baye bemangaliswa ke pezu kwesifundiso sake; ngokuba ebebafundisa njengonegunya, bekungenjengababa̔li." 
Mark1:23 Kwaye kuko endlwini yentlanganiso yabo umntu enomoya onco̔lileyo; waza wadanduluka," 
Mark1:24 esiti: Yeka! siyinto nina kuwe, Yesu wase‐Nazarete? uze kusitshabalalisa na? ndiyakwazi wena ungubanina, ungoyingcwele katixo." 
Mark1:25 Waza u‐Yesu wamtetisa, esiti: Yiti cwaka, upume kuye." 
Mark1:26 Waza umoya onco̔lileyo wamṙuzula, wadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, wapuma kuye." 
Mark1:27 Bati nqa ke bonke, bada babuzisana omnye nomnye, besiti: Yinto nina le? lolwanina ufundiso olutsha olu, ukuba nomoya abanco̔lileyo ebayalela ngegunya, bamve ke?" 
Mark1:28 Lwaselusuka lwapuma udumo lwake lwaya kulo lonke ilizwe langase‐Galili. 
Mark1:29 Baza bati kwa oko, bakuba bepumile endlwini yentlanganiso, bangena endlwini ka‐Simone no‐Andreya, kunye no‐Yakobi no‐Johane." 
Mark1:30 Kekaloku umkwekazi ka‐Simone ebelele, esifa licesine; baza basebemxelela ngaye." 
Mark1:31 Wayesiza wabamba isandla sake, wamsukisa; lamyeka icesine kwa oko, wabakonza ke." 
Mark1:32 Kwati kwakuhlwa, lakutshona ilanga, bazisa kuye bonke abafayo nabangenelwa zidemoni." 
Mark1:33 Saye isixeko sonke sibe sibutelene ngasemnyango. 
Mark1:34 Waza wabapilisa abaninzi ababesifa zizifo ngezifo; nedemoni ezininzi waziku̔pa, engazivumeli ke ukuba zitete idemoni, ngokuba zibe zimazi yena." 
Mark1:35 Waza wati kwakuza kusa, wavuka kusesebusuku kanye, wapuma, wemka waya endaweni elubala, watandaza kona apo." 
Mark1:36 Baza bamputuma u‐Simone nabo babenaye. 
Mark1:37 Bemfumene ke, bati kuye: Bonke bayakufuna." 
Mark1:38 Wayesiti kubo: Masihambe siye ezinqilini ezikufupi, ndize ndishumayele nakona; ngokuba ndivelele oku." 
Mark1:39 Waza washumayela ezindlwini zentlanganiso zabo kuyo yonke i‐Galili, waku̔pa nedemoni." 
Mark1:40 Kwati kekaloku kweza kuye ileperi, limbongoza liguqa pantsi kuye, lisiti nokuti kuye: Ukuba uyatanda, ungandihlambulula." 
Mark1:41 Waza u‐Yesu wabetwa lusizi, wasolula isandla, walicu̔kumisa, wati kulo: Ndiyatanda; hlambuluka." 
Mark1:42 Sati nxa abesitsho semka kulo kwa oko isilepero salo, lahlambuluka ke." 
Mark1:43 Waza eliyalile kakulu nje waselelindulula," 
Mark1:44 wati kulo: Lumka ungaxeleli mntu into; kodwa hamba, zibonakalise kumperisite, unikele ngenxa yokuhlanjululwa kwako izinto wabeyalela zona u‐Mosesi, zibe sisinqi̔no kubo." 
Mark1:45 Lati kodwa lakupuma, laqala ukushumayela kakulu, nokuvakalisa londawo, wada u‐Yesu wayengasenako ukuba angangena esixekweni ekuhleni; koko wayengasendle ezindaweni ezilubala, bati abantu beza kuye bevela emacaleni onke." 
Mark2:1 WATI kekaloku, nxa sekuntsuku, wabuya wangena e‐Kapenayume; kwaye kuvakala ke ukuba usendlwini." 
Mark2:2 Kwaza kwasekuhlanganisana abaninzi, zada azabi senaku b amkela nendawo zangaselucangweni: wayeliteta kubo ilizwi ke." 
Mark2:3 Kekaloku beza kuye bezisa umntu onesifo sokushwabanisa, etwelwe sisine samadoda." 
Mark2:4 Baza bati, bekohliwe kusondela kuye ngenxa yesihlwele, banqika isifulelo apo ebekona, bati bakuba bebegqobozile, bahlisa uku̔ko wabelele kulo onesifo sokushwabanisa." 
Mark2:5 Wabona ke u‐Yesu ukolo lwabo, wati konesifo sokushwabanisa: Nyanandini! uxolelwe izono zako." 
Mark2:6 Kwaye kuko ababa̔li abatile behleli kona, becamanga ezintliziyweni zabo, ngokuti:" 
Mark2:7 Yinina ukuba lo enje njalo ukuziteta ingxeko? ngubanina ongazixolelayo izono, kupela mnye e ngutixo?" 
Mark2:8 Waselenakana u‐Yesu emoyeni wake, ukuba bacamanga njalo pakati kwabo, wati kubo: Nizicamangela nina ezizinto ezintliziyweni zenu?" 
Mark2:9 okona kulula kukupina; ukuti konesifo sokushwabanisa: Uxolelwe izono zako; ukuti: Suka, upate uku̔ko lwako, uhambe; kusinina?" 
Mark2:10 kodwa ukuze nazi ukuba unyana wesintu onegunya emhlabeni ukuxolela izono, (wati konesifo sokushwabanisa:)" 
Mark2:11 nditi kuwe: Suka, upate uku̔ko lwako, uye endlwini yako." 
Mark2:12 Waselesuka ke, walupata uku̔ko, wapuma ebusweni babo bonke; bada bamangaliswa bonke, bamdumisa utixo, besiti: Asizanga sibone okunje." 
Mark2:13 WAZA wapuma wabuya waya ngaselwandle; sati sonke isihlwele seza kuye, wabafundisa ke." 
Mark2:14 Waza edlula nje wabona u‐Levi, unyana ka‐Alefeyu, ehleli endaweni yokwamkela iminikelo, wati kuye: Ndilandele. Wesuka ke, wamlandela." 
Mark2:15 Kwaza kwati, akuhlala pantsi endlwini yake, kwahlala nento eninzi yababuti beminikelo naboni ekutyeni ndawonye no‐Yesu nabadisipile bake: ngokuba bebebaninzi, bamlandela ke." 
Mark2:16 Baza ababa̔li nabafarisi, bakumbona esitya kunye nababuti beminikelo naboni, bati kubadisipile bake: Yinina ukuba atye asele kunye nababuti beminikelo naboni?" 
Mark2:17 Waza u‐Yesu evile nje wati kubo: Abomeleleyo abasweli gqir̔a; ngabafayo abalisweleyo. Andeza ukubiza abalungileyo, koko ndize ukubiza aboni baguquke." 
Mark2:18 Kekaloku abadisipile baka‐Johane nababafarisi bebezila ukutya: baza beza bati kuye: Kunganina ukuba abadisipile baka‐Johane nabafarisi bazila ukutya, kanti abako abadisipile abakuzili?" 
Mark2:19 Waza wati u‐Yesu kubo: Usapo lwenkambili yomtshakazi lungazila ukutya na, oko umyeni analo? lonke ixesha lusenaye umyeni enalo, alungezile kutya." 
Mark2:20 Kodwa iya kuza imihla okuya umyeni aya kususwa kulo, lwaluya kwandula luzile ukutya kuleyomihla ke." 
Mark2:21 Akuko mntu utungela isiziba sencawa engatutyulwanga engutyeni endala; okanye, into entsha efakiweyo iyaṙazula kwendala, siti isiṙoba senzwe sibi ngakumbi." 
Mark2:22 Kanjalo akuko mntu uta̔ iveyine entsha ezintsubeni ezindala; okanye, iveyine entsha iyazigqoboza intsuba, ize ipalale iveyine, zitshabalale nentsuba; koko iveyine entsha ifanel’ ukuti̔wa ezintsubeni ezikwa zintsha." 
Mark2:23 KWAYE kute ukuba ebecanda emasimini ngemini yesabata: baza abadisipile bake baqala ukuhamba bezika izikwebu. 
Mark2:24 Baye abafarisi besiti kuye: Kangela, yinina ukuba bakwenze ngemini yesabata okungafanelekileyo?" 
Mark2:25 Waza yena wati kubo: Anizanga nileseshe na into wayenzayo u‐Davide, okuya wayenokuswela, walamba yena nabo babenaye;" 
Mark2:26 okokuba wangena endlwini katixo, emihleni ka‐Abiyatare umperisite omkulu, watya izonka zokubonakala, ekufanelekile ukuba zityiwe ngabaperisite kupela, wanika nabo abebendawonye naye?" 
Mark2:27 Wabesiti kubo kanjalo: Isabata yenziwa ngenxa yabantu, akw enziwa abantu ngenxa yesabata." 
Mark2:28 Ngako oko unyana wesintu uyinkosi yesabata nayo. 
Mark3:1 Waza wabuya wangena endlwini yentlanganiso. Kekaloku bekuko kona umntu enesandla esishwabeneyo: 
Mark3:2 baza bamgqala, ukuba uya kumpilisa na ngemini yesabata, ukuze bamnike ityala." 
Mark3:3 Waza wati emntwini obenesandla esishwabeneyo: Suka uze pakati. 
Mark3:4 Waza wati kubo: Kufanelekile ngemini yesabata ukwenza okulungileyo, ukwenza okukohlakeleyo, kusinina? ukulondoloza uboni, ukubulala, kusinina? Koko bebesiti tu." 
Mark3:5 Waza ebasingasingele ngengqumbo, ebuhlungu nokuba buhlungu ngenxa yobulukuni bentliziyo zabo, wati emntwini: Yolula isandla sako. Wayesolula ke; saza isandla sake sabuya senziwa sipilile njengesinye." 
Mark3:6 Bapuma ke abafarisi, basebecebisana nabaherodi ngakuye, ukuze bambubise." 
Mark3:7 Waza u‐Yesu wemka nabadisipile bake waya ngaselwandle: sati ke isihlwele esikulu samlandela sivela e‐Galili, nase‐Judeya," 
Mark3:7 Waza u‐Yesu wemka nabadisipile bake waya ngaselwandle: sati ke isihlwele esikulu samlandela sivela e‐Galili, nase‐Judeya," 
Mark3:8 nase‐Yerusaleme, nase‐Edomeya, napesheya kwe‐Yoredane; bati nabo bangase‐Tire ne‐Tsidone, isihlwele esikulu, bakuva izinto ezingakanana wazenzayo, beza kuye." 
Mark3:9 Waza waxelela abadisipile bake, ukuba mawuti umkombe umhlalele kufupi ngenxa yesihlwele, ukuze bangamxinezeli." 
Mark3:10 Ngokuba ebepilise abaninzi, bada bamxinanela ukuze bamcu̔kumise, kwa bonke abebenezibulawa." 
Mark3:11 Nomoya abanco̔lileyo, bati bakumbona, bawa pantsi pambi kwake, badanduluka, besiti: Ungunyana katixo wena." 
Mark3:12 Waza wabayala kakulu, ukuba mabangamtyili." 
Mark3:13 Waza wenyukela entabeni, wabiza abo wabetanda ukubiza bona: basuka baya kuye." 
Mark3:14 Kanjalo wamisa abalishumi linababini, ukuze babe naye, nokuze abatume ukuba bashumayele," 
Mark3:15 nokuba babe negunya lokupilisa izifo, nokuba baku̔pe idemoni:" 
Mark3:16 Wati u‐Simone wamtiya igama elingu‐Petrosi; 
Mark3:17 no‐Yakobi unyana ka‐Zebedi, no‐Johane umninawe ka‐Yakobi; (wati bona wabatiya ngamagama ango‐Bowaneregesi, okukuti, Onyana bodudumo;)" 
Mark3:18 no‐Andreya, no‐Filipi, no‐Batolomeyu, no‐Mateyu, no‐Tomasi, no‐Yakobi unyana ka‐Alefeyu, no‐Tadeyu, no‐Simone umkanani," 
Mark3:19 no‐Jude Sikariyoti, okwa nguye owamngcatshayo. BAZA bangena endlwini." 
Mark3:19 no‐Jude Sikariyoti, okwa nguye owamngcatshayo. BAZA bangena endlwini." 
Mark3:20 Sati isihlwele sabuya sabutana, bada bakohlwa nokutya isonka." 
Mark3:21 Zaza zati izihlobo zake zakuva, zapuma ukuya kumbamba; ngokuba zibe zisiti: Ulihilihili." 
Mark3:22 Kanjalo abafarisi abebehlile e‐Yerusaleme bebesitsho ukuti: Uno‐Belezebule; nokuti: Uyaziku̔pa idemoni ngayo inkosi yedemoni. 
Mark3:23 Waza wababiza, watsho kubo ngemizekeliso ukuti: Angati nina u‐Satane ukuku̔pa u‐Satane?" 
Mark3:24 Nobukumkani ukuba bupambene ngokwabo, abungeme ubukumkani obo:" 
Mark3:25 nendlu ukuba ipambene ngokwayo, ayingeme indlu leyo." 
Mark3:26 No‐Satane ukuba uyazisukela, apambane ngokwake, akangeme, uza kugqityelwa ke." 
Mark3:27 Akuko mntu ongati impahla zonamandla, akuba engene endlwini yake, azipange, nxa angatanga kuqala wamnxiba onamandla; waeya kupanga indlu yake oko." 
Mark3:28 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Zonke izono baya kuxolelwa zona onyana babantu, nezigxeko abasukuba begxeka ngazo;" 
Mark3:29 kodwa osukuba egxeka umoya oyingcwele, akanalo uxolelwa kude kube ngunapakade, koko emelwa kukugwetywa okungunapakade." 
Mark3:30 Watsho, ukuba bebesiti: Unomoya onco̔lileyo." 
Mark3:31 Bandula beza abazalwana bake nonina, abati bemi ngapandle batuma kuye, bembiza." 
Mark3:32 Kekaloku isihlwele sasihleli simpahla; bati ke kuye: Nanku unyoko nabazalwana bako ngapandle bekufuna. 
Mark3:33 Waza wapendula kubo, esiti: Ngubanina uma̔ umhlaumbi abazalwana bam?" 
Mark3:34 Waza esingasinga pezu kwabo babehleli bempahla, wati: Nanku uma̔ nabazalwana bam!" 
Mark3:35 ngokuba osukuba esenza intando katixo, enguye lowo umzalwana wam, nodade wam, noma̔." 
Mark4:1 KEKALOKU wabuya waqala ukufundisa ngaselwandle: saza sabutela kuye isihlwele esikulu, wada wangena enqanaweni, wahlala pantsi elulwandleni; saye sonke isihlwele sibe sisemhlabeni ngaselwandle." 
Mark4:2 Waza wabafundisa into ezininzi ngemizekeliso, wati kubo ekufundiseni kwake:" 
Mark4:3 Pulapulani! Bona ke, umhlwayeli wapuma ukuya kuhlwayela;" 
Mark4:4 kwaza kwati ekuhlwayeleni kwake, inxenye yembewu yawa ngasendleleni, zati intaka zezulu zeza zayidla." 
Mark4:5 Yawa nenye endaweni ebulwalwa, apo ibingenawo umhlaba omninzi; yaza yaselipuma kamsinya, ngokuba ingenabo ubunzulu bomhlaba:" 
Mark4:6 yati nxa ilanga belipumile, yatshiswa; nangokuba ingenangcambo, yabuna." 
Mark4:7 Yawa nenye endaweni yemitolo; yaza imitolo yahluma, yayitshwencisa, ayanika siqa̔mo ke." 
Mark4:8 Yawa nenye emhlabeni olungileyo; yaza yanika isiqa̔mo esasihluma samila nokumila, yavelisa inxenye ngokungamashumi matatu, nenxenye ngokungamashumi matandatu, nenxenye ngokulikulu." 
Mark4:9 Wayesiti kubo: Onendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Mark4:10 Kekaloku xeshekweni ebeyedwa, bambuza abo babempahla ndawonye nabalishumi linababini umzekeliso lowo." 
Mark4:11 Wayesiti kubo: Kunikiwe nina ukwazi imfihlakalo yobukumkani bukatixo: kodwa abo bangapandle, benzelwa zonke ezizinto ngemizekeliso;" 
Mark4:12 ukuze bati bebona nje babone, bangaqiqi; bati kanjalo besiva nje beve, bangaqondi; hleze baguquke, baze baxolelwe izono zabo." 
Mark4:13 Waza wati kubo: Aniwazi na umzekeliso lo? seniya kuti nina ke ukuyiqonda yonke imizekeliso? 
Mark4:14 Umhlwayeli uyahlwayela ilizwi. 
Mark4:15 Aba ke bangabo bangasendleleni, apo ilizwi lihlwayelwa kona; kanti xeshekweni bavileyo, kwandul’ ukuza u‐Satane asuse ilizwi elihlwayelweyo ezintliziyweni zabo." 
Mark4:16 Naba kwa njalo bangabo bahlwayelwayo endaweni ebulwalwa; abati xeshekweni balivileyo ilizwi, basuke balamkele ngovuyo;" 
Mark4:17 kanti abanangcambo pakati kwabo, koko besenza umzuzu kodwa; kwandule kuti, kwakuhla imbandezelo umhlaumbi intshutshiso ngenxa yelizwi, basuke baxakaniswe." 
Mark4:18 Naba bangabo bahlwayelwayo endaweni yemitolo; aba bangabo abati ilizwi balive; 
Mark4:19 kanti izitukutezi zelilizwe likoyo, nenkohliso yobutyebi, nenkanuko ngezinye izinto, zingena nje, ziyaṙwisha ilizwi, lize liputiswe." 
Mark4:20 Naba bangabo bahlwayelweyo emhlabeni olungileyo; abati ilizwi balive, balamkele, baxakate izixakato, inxenye ngokungamashumi matatu, nenxenye ngokungamashumi matandatu, nenxenye ngokulikulu." 
Mark4:21 Wayesiti kubo: Sika siziswe isibane na, ukuze sibekwe pantsi kwento yokulinganisa umhlaumbi pantsi kwoku̔ko? asi ziswa na ukuze sibekwe pezu kwekandelare?" 
Mark4:22 Ngokuba kungeko nto efihlakeleyo, engayi kubonakaliswa; kanjako bekungafihlwa nto, kupela ukuba ize ekuhleni." 
Mark4:23 Ukuba kuko onendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Mark4:24 Wayesiti kubo: Kulumkeni oko nikuvayo. Ukulinganisa enilinganisa ngako, kwolinganiselwa nina; kwakuya kuti kuni nivayo kwalekelwe ngakumbi." 
Mark4:25 Ngokuba osukuba enako, kuya kupiwa yena; kanti ongenako, uya kuhlutwa kwa oko anako." 
Mark4:26 Wayesiti: Bunjalo ubukumkani bukatixo, njengokungati umntu waposa imbewu emhlabeni," 
Mark4:27 waza walala wavuka ubusuku nemini, yati imbewu yantsula yakula ngendawo angayaziyo." 
Mark4:28 Ngokuba umhlaba uvelisa isiqa̔mo ngokwawo; sibe sisitombo ukuqala, kwandul’ ukuba sisikwebu, iti kamva ibe yinqolowa ezalisekileyo esikwebini." 
Mark4:29 Kodwa uti, xeshekweni sibonxile isiqa̔mo, asuke afake iṙenqa, ngokuba selifikile ixesha lokuvuna." 
Mark4:30 Wayesiti: Sobufanisa nanto nina ubukumkani bukatixo? umhlaumbi sobuzekelisa ngomzekeliso omnina? 
Mark4:31 Bunjengokozo lwembewu yemositade, oluti, xeshekweni luhlwayelweyo emhlabeni lube luncinane kuzo zonke imbewu ezisemhlabeni:" 
Mark4:32 kanti xeshekweni luhlwayelweyo luyahluma, luze lube lukulu kuyo yonke imifuno, lwenze namasebe amakulu, zide ziti intaka zezulu zibe nako ukuba zingahlala ngapantsi kwomtunzi walo." 
Mark4:33 Wabeteta ilizwi kubo nangemizekeliso enjalo emininzi, njengokuba bebenako ukuliva." 
Mark4:34 Wabengateti ke kubo kungeko umzekeliso: kodwa wabetyila zonke izinto kubadisipile bake ngasese. 
Mark4:35 KEKALOKU kwa ngalomini, kwakuba kuhlwile, wati kubo: Masiwele siye ecaleni elingapesheya." 
Mark4:36 Baza bati bakuba besindulule isihlwele, bamtabata nabo njengokuba ebenjalo enqanaweni. Kwaye kuko naye nezinye inqanawa ezincinane." 
Mark4:37 Lwaza lwesuka uqwitela lwomoya olukulu, ati amaza abeta angena enqanaweni, yada yona yafun’ ukuzaliswa ngamanzi." 
Mark4:38 Waye yena ebesendaweni yasemva, elele pezu kwomqamelo: basuka bamvusa, bati kuye: Mfundisi! akukatali na kukuba sibuba?" 
Mark4:39 Waza wavuka wakalimela umoya, wati kulwandle: Tutu, yiti cwaka! Wadamba ke umoya, kwaza kwabako ukuzola okukulu." 
Mark4:40 Wayesiti kubo: Yinina ukuba ninobugwala obungakanana? kunganina lento ningenalo ukolo? 
Mark4:41 Boyika ke ngokwoyika okululu, bati omnye kwomnye: Ngubanina kanti lo, eviwa nje nangumoya nalulwandle?" 
Mark5:1 Baza bafika ecaleni elingapesheya kwolwandle, ezweni lama‐Gadara." 
Mark5:2 Wati akupuma enqanaweni, kwandula ukumkaulela evela emancw̔abeni umntu enomoya onco̔lileyo," 
Mark5:3 obenentlalo yake emancw̔abeni; kwaye kungeko mntu obenako ukumkonxa nangemixokelelwane; 
Mark5:4 ngokuba ebekonxiwe futi ngamakamandela nangemixokelelwane, yasuka yaqaulwa nguye imixokelelwane, aqekezwa namakamandela, kwaza akwabiko mntu obenamandla okumoyisa." 
Mark5:5 Waye ngamaxesha onke, ebusuku nasemini, esezintabeni nasemancw̔abeni, edanduluka, ezityoba ngamatye." 
Mark5:6 Wati kekaloku akubona u‐Yesu ekude, wagidima waya wambedesha," 
Mark5:7 wadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, wati: Ndiyinto nina kuwe, Yesu, Nyana katixo opezu konke? ndikufungisa utixo, zungandimbeli!" 
Mark5:8 Ngokuba ebesiti kuye: Puma emntwini, wena moya onco̔lileyo!" 
Mark5:9 Wabembuza kanjalo, esiti: Ngubanina igama lako? Wapendula ke esiti: Ngu‐Bandlalikulu igama lam; ngokuba sibaninzi." 
Mark5:10 Waza wambongoza kakulu, aze angabandululi kwelozwe." 
Mark5:11 Kwabekuko apo ngasezintabeni umhlambi omkulu wehangu usidla. 
Mark5:12 Zaza zambongoza zonke idemoni, zisiti: Situme siye ezihangwini, ukuze singene kuzo." 
Mark5:13 Waselezivumela ke u‐Yesu. Baza bapuma omoya abanco̔lileyo bangena ezihangwini; kekaloku umhlambi wehangu wagalelekela ngeliwa apo elwandle, (ngati ke bezingamawaka mabini,) zamiwa elwandle." 
Mark5:14 Baza abo ababesalusa ihangu babaleka, bashumayela indawo esixekweni nasemapandleni. Bati ke abantu bapuma ukuya kubona ukuba yinto nina eyenzekileyo." 
Mark5:15 Baye besiza ku‐Yesu, babona lowo obengenelwa zidemoni, ehleli pantsi, evatile, enokuqonda kwake, lowo obenalo ibandla elikulu; basuka boyika." 
Mark5:16 Baza abo babebonile bababalisela ukuba kwatiwa nina kobengenelwa zidemoni, nokwehangu." 
Mark5:17 Baza baqala ukumbongoza ukuba emke emideni yabo. 
Mark5:18 Wati kekaloku akungena enqanaweni, lowo ubengenelwe zidemoni wambongoza ukuba makabe naye." 
Mark5:19 Kodwa u‐Yesu akamvumela, koko wati kuye: Hamba uye endlwini yako, kwabakowenu, ubashumayeze izinto ezingakanana inkosi ikwenzele zona; nokuba ibinetaṙu kuwe." 
Mark5:20 Waza wemka waqala ukushumayela e‐Dekapolisi izinto ezingakanana abemenzele zona u‐Yesu: bati nqa ke bonke. 
Mark5:21 KEKALOKU akuti u‐Yesu wabuya wawela ngenqanawa waya ecaleni elingapesheya, sabutela kuye isihlwele esikulu: wayengaselwandle ke." 
Mark5:22 Kwaza, bona ke, kwafika omnye wabapati bendlu yentlanganiso, ogama lalingu‐Yahire, owati akumbona, wawa ngasezinyaweni zake," 
Mark5:23 wambongoza kakulu, esiti: Intombazana yam ipants’ ukufa; Nditandaza ukuba uze ubeke izandla zako pezu kwayo, ukuze ipiliswe, yaiya kupila." 
Mark5:24 Wasuka waya naye; saza samlandela isihlwele esikulu, samxinezela." 
Mark5:25 Kekaloku umfazi otile obenegqita legazi iminyaka yalishumi linamibini," 
Mark5:26 obevile nezinto ezininzi ngamagqir̔a, waci̔ta konke abenako, engancedwanga luto noko, kodwa waba mandundu ngakumbi;" 
Mark5:27 wati akuva ngaye u‐Yesu, weza pakati kwesihlwele ngasemva, wayicu̔kumisa ingubo yake:" 
Mark5:28 ngokuba ebesiti: Ukuba ndika ndicu̔kumise ingubo zake zodwa, ndiya kupiliswa." 
Mark5:29 Wasuka watsha kwa oko umtombo wegazi lake, wazazela ngomzimba wake ukuba upilisiwe kwesosibulawa." 
Mark5:30 Waselesiti u‐Yesu, enakene pakati kwake ukuba amandla apumile kuye, wajikela ngasesihlweleni, wati: Ngubanina owacu̔kumisa ingubo zam?" 
Mark5:31 Baza abadisipile bake bati kuye: Ubona isihlwele sikuxinezela nje, uti ke na: Ngubanina owandicu̔kumisayo?" 
Mark5:32 Waza wasingasinga ukuba abone lowo uyenzileyo lento. 
Mark5:33 Wati kekaloku umfazi lowo enokwoyika nokungcangcazela, ekwazi nje oko kwenzekileyo kuye, weza wawa pantsi pambi kwake, wamxelela yonke inyaniso." 
Mark5:34 Wayesiti kuye: Ntombi! ukolo lwako lukupilisile; hamba ngoxolo, ube upilile kwesosibulawa sako." 
Mark5:35 Nxa abesateta, kwafika a bakokwabo umpati wendlu yentlanganiso, besiti: Intombi yako ifile; yinina ukuba usamkataza umfundisi?" 
Mark5:36 Kuloko u‐Yesu, elivile nje elozwi libe litetwa, waselesiti kumpati wendlu yentlanganiso: Ungoyiki; kolwa kodwa." 
Mark5:37 Akavumela mntu ukuba ampeleke, kupela u‐Petrosi, no‐Yakobi, no‐Johane umninawe ka‐Yakobi." 
Mark5:38 Waza wafika endlwini yompati wentlanganiso, wabona isipitipiti, nabo ababelila nababesenza isijwili esikulu." 
Mark5:39 Wayengena wati kubo: Yinina lento ningxola nilila nokulila? umntwana akafile, ulele butongo." 
Mark5:40 Basuka bamhleka. Kuloko wati, akuba ebaku̔pile bonke, watabata naye uyise womntwana, nonina, nabo abebenaye, wangena apo alele kona umntwana." 
Mark5:41 Waza wabamba isandla somntwana, wati kuye: Talita, kumi! okukuti ngokukunyushwa: Ntombazana, nditi kuwe, vuka!" 
Mark5:42 Yaselisuka ke intombazana leyo, yahamba; ngokuba ibilishumi elinesibini iminyaka yayo. Bamangaliswa ke ngokumangaliswa okukulu." 
Mark5:43 Waza wabayala kakulu, ukuba makungaziwa mntu oku; wati kanjalo waxela ukaba inikwe ukudla." 
Mark6:1 Kekaloku wapuma apo, weza emzini wakowabo; bamlandela ke abadisipile bake." 
Mark6:2 Kwati kwakufika isabata, waqala ukufundisa endlwini yentlanganiso: baza abaninzi bakuva bamangaliswa, besiti: Uzuze pina lo ezizinto? kanjalo bubulumko obunina anikwe bona, ukuba nezizenzo zamandla ezingaka zenziwa ngezandla zake?" 
Mark6:3 lo asi nguye na oyincibi yemiti, unyana ka‐Mariya, umzalwana ka‐Yakobi, no‐Jose, no‐Jude, no‐Simone? abako na nodade bake apa kuti? Baza baxakaniswa ngaye." 
Mark6:3 lo asi nguye na oyincibi yemiti, unyana ka‐Mariya, umzalwana ka‐Yakobi, no‐Jose, no‐Jude, no‐Simone? abako na nodade bake apa kuti? Baza baxakaniswa ngaye." 
Mark6:4 Kuloko wabesiti kubo u‐Yesu: Umprofite akangongenakubekwa, kupela ungonjalo emzini wakowabo, nasezalamaneni zake, nasendlwini yake." 
Mark6:5 Waza wakohlwa ukwenza izenzo zamandla kona apo; kwapela wabeka izandla pezu kwento encinane yabafayo, wabapilisa." 
Mark6:6 Wakutela nqa ke ukungakolwa kwabo. WATI kekaloku wajikajikela imizi epahlayo, efundisa." 
Mark6:7 Waza wababiza abalishumi linababini, waqala ukubatuma ngababini ngababini, wabanika igunya pezu kwomoya abanco̔lileyo," 
Mark6:8 wabayalela, ukuba bangapati nto ibe yeyendlela, kupela ibe yintonga yodwa; banga pati inxowa, nesonka, nemali embinqweni;" 
Mark6:9 koko mabafakwe izihlangu; ize bangambati ingubo ezimbini. 
Mark6:10 Wayesiti kubo: Apo nisukuba ningena kona endlwini, hlalani apo nide nimke kona."
