Mark6:11 Nabasukuba benganamkeli nina, bengaweva namazwi enu, niti nakupuma kona, nivutulule utuli olupantsi kwenyawo zenu, kube sisinqi̔no kubo. Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Kwonyamezelekela i‐Sodome ne‐Gomora ngomhla womgwebo, ngapezu kwesosixeko." 
Mark6:12 Baza bemka, bashumayela ukuba mabaguquke abantu." 
Mark6:13 Bati kanjalo baku̔pa idemoni ezininzi, babatambisa ngeoli abaninzi ababesifa, babapilisa." 
Mark6:14 Waza ukumkani u‐Herodi weva ngaye, (ngokuba igama lake libe lazekile,) wati: u‐Johane umbapitizeshi uvukile ekufeni; kungako oku ezizenzo zamandla zisebenzeka kuye." 
Mark6:15 Bati abanye: Ngu‐Elija; bati nabanye: Ngumprofite, umhlaumbi ngonjengomnye wabaprofite." 
Mark6:16 Kodwa akuva u‐Herodi, wati: Lo unguye u‐Johane, endandimnqumla intloko; uvukile yena ekufeni." 
Mark6:17 Ngokuba ebete u‐Herodi ngokwake watuma wambamba u‐Johane, wamnxiba entolongweni, ngenxa ka‐Herodiya, umfazi ka‐Filipi umninawe wake, ukuba ebemzekile." 
Mark6:18 Ngokuba u‐Johane ebesiti ku‐Herodi: Akufanelekile kuwe ukuba ube nomfazi womninawe wako. 
Mark6:19 Waza u‐Herodiya wanenzondo ngakuye, wafuna ukumbulala; kanti ebekohliwe:" 
Mark6:20 ngokuba u‐Herodi ebemoyika u‐Johane, emazi ukuba uyindoda elungileyo nengcwele, wamgcina ke; wati akumva, wenza izinto ezininzi, wamva ngokuvuya." 
Mark6:21 Kwaza kwati kwakufika imini efanelekileyo, xeshekweni u‐Herodi ngomhla wokuzalwa kwake wabenzela isidlo imiduna yake, nenkosiwaka, nabakulu base‐Galili;" 
Mark6:22 yakuti kanjalo yangena intombi ka‐Herodiya lowo, yaduda, yamkolisa u‐Herodi nabo babehleli ekutyeni ndawonye naye, wati ukumkani kuyo intombazana leyo: Cela kum into usukuba utanda ukuyicela, ndandiya kuyinika kuwe." 
Mark6:23 Waza wayifungela ngokuti: Into usukuba uyicela kum, ndokunika yona, kude kube sisiqingata sobukumkani bam." 
Mark6:24 Yapuma ke yati kunina: Ndocela nto nina? Wayesiti: Intloko ka‐Johane umbapitizeshi. 
Mark6:25 Yaza yaselingena ngobunxamo kukumkani, yacela, isiti: Nditanda ukuba undinike kwa ngoku pezu kwesikotile intloko ka‐Johane umbaptizeshi." 
Mark6:26 Waba lusizi kakulu ke ukumkani lowo; kodwa, ngenxa yesifungo sake nabo babehleli ekutyeni ndawonye naye, akatanda ukuyibandeza." 
Mark6:27 Waza ukumkani waseletuma umvaṙashi, wayalela ukuba kuziswe intloko yake. Wapuma ke waya wamnqumla intloko entolongweni apo," 
Mark6:28 wayizisa intloko yake pezu kwesikotile, wayinika kwintombazana leyo; yaza intombazana yayinika kunina." 
Mark6:29 Bati bakuva abadisipile bake, beza basusa isidumbu sake, basibeka encw̔abeni." 
Mark6:30 Baza bahlanganisana abapostile ku‐Yesu, bamshumayeza zonke izinto, nezo babezenzile, nezo babezifundisile." 
Mark6:31 Waza wati kubo: Yizani nina nedwa ngasese endaweni elubala, nize nipumle kube ngumzuzwana: ngokuba bebebaninzi ababesiza nababehamba, bada ababi nalo ixesha elifaneleyo nokuba batye." 
Mark6:32 Basuka bemkela endaweni elubala ngenqanawa ngasese. 
Mark6:33 Zati izihlwele zababona behamba, bamazi ke abaninzi, babalekela kona ngenyawo bevela kuzo zonke izixeko, babapangela, beza kunye kuye." 
Mark6:34 Waza u‐Yesu epumile nje wabona abantu abaninzi, wabetwa lusizi pezu kwabo, ukuba bebenjengegusha ezingenamalusi, waqala ukubafundisa into ezininzi." 
Mark6:35 Kekaloku sekudlule ixesha elikulu nje, beza kuye abadisipile bake, bati: Lendawo ilubala; ixesha seliza kumka kanjalo:" 
Mark6:36 bandulule, baze bemke baye emapandleni apahlayo nasemizini, bazitengele izonka; ngokuba bengenanto yokutya." 
Mark6:37 Kodwa wapendula wati kubo: Bapeni nina ukuba batye. Baza bati kuye: Simke siye kutenga izonka ngedenari zibe makulu mabini na, sibape ukuba batye?" 
Mark6:38 Wayesiti kubo: Zingapina izonka eninazo? hambani, nikangele. Bati ke bakuzazi: Zihlanu, nentlanzi ezimbini." 
Mark6:39 Waza wabayalela ukuba babahlalise pantsi bonke ngamaqela ngamaqela etyanini obuluhlaza. 
Mark6:40 Bahlala pantsi ke ngezintlu ngezintlu, ngezekulu nangezamashumi mahlanu." 
Mark6:41 Waza watabata izonka zozihlanu nentlanzi zombini, wakangela ngasezulwini, wabulela; waza waziqezula izonka, wanikela kubadisipile bake, ukuze bazibeke pambi kwabo; nentlanzi zombini wazabela kubo bonke." 
Mark6:42 Batya ke bonke, bahluta:" 
Mark6:43 kanjalo kwasuswa izitya zamaqezu zazilishumi linazibini zizele, kwa nawentlanzi." 
Mark6:44 Kekaloku abo babezityile izonka ezo bebengamadoda anga amawaka mahlanu. 
Mark6:45 Waza kwa oko wabanyanzela abadisipile bake bangene enqanaweni, bandulele ukuya ecaleni elingapesheya ngase‐Betesayida, nxa abandulula abantu yena." 
Mark6:46 Wati akuba ebandulule, wemkela entabeni ukuya kutandaza." 
Mark6:47 Kwati ke kwakuba kuhlwile, inqanawa ibipakati kwolwandle, esemhlabeni yena eyedwa." 
Mark6:48 Waza wababona bezibulala ngokuqu̔ba ngemipini; ngokuba umoya ububavelela pambili. Kekaloku ngelesine ivaṙasho lobusuku weza kubo, ehamba pezu kwolwandle, wanga wafuna ukubadlula." 
Mark6:49 Bati bakumbona ehamba pezu kwolwandle, baba ngumshologu, bakala ke:" 
Mark6:50 ngokuba bonke bebembona, baxaliswa. Waselesuka wateta nabo, wati kubo: Yomelelani; ndim, musani ukwoyika." 
Mark6:51 Waza wenyukela kubo wangena enqanaweni, wadamba ke umoya: baye bemangaliswa kakulu ke pakati kwabo pezu kwembaliso, bati nqa." 
Mark6:52 Ngokuba bebengacingelanga okwezonka; intliziyo yabo ibilukuni nje. 
Mark6:53 Kekaloku nxa sebewelile, bafika ezweni le‐Genesarete, basondela elunxwemeni apo." 
Mark6:54 Bati bakupuma enqanaweni, basebemazi ke," 
Mark6:55 bapalapala kulo lonke elozwe langakona, baqala ukubatwalatwala pezu kwenku̔ko abo banezifo, ukuya apo bebesiva ukuba ukona." 
Mark6:56 Nalapo asukuba ebengena kona, emizini, umhlaumbi ezixekweni, umhlaumbi emapandleni, babebeka abafayo ezindaweni zentengo, bambongoza ukuba makebacu̔kumise umqukumbelo wengubo yake wodwa; baza bonke ababemcu̔kumisa bapiliswa." 
Mark7:1 KWAZA kwahlanganisana kuye abafarisi, nabatile bakubaba̔li, bevela e‐Yerusaleme;" 
Mark7:2 abati bakubona inxenye yabadisipile bake besitya izonka ngezandla ezinco̔lileyo, oko kukuti ngezingahlanjwanga, bagungqa." 
Mark7:3 Ngokuba abafarisi, nawo onke ama‐Juda, bengatyi nxa bangahlambanga izandla ezifunjatiweyo, bebamba isinikelo sabadala." 
Mark7:4 Kanjalo bakuvela endaweni yentengo, abatyi nxa bangahlambanga. Ziko nezinye izinto ezininzi abazamkeleyo ukuba bazibambe, intlambo zendebe, nebekile, nemipanda yexina, nezihlalo." 
Mark7:5 Bandula abafarisi nababa̔li babuza kuye, besiti: Kunganina ukuba abadisipile bako bangahambi ngokwesinikelo sabadala, koko batye isonka ngezandla ezingahlanjwanga?" 
Mark7:6 Kodwa wapendula wati kubo: Ulungisile u‐Yisaya ukuprofitesha ngani bahanahanisi, njengokuba kuba̔liwe ngokuti: Ababantu bayandidumisa ngenteto yabo, kanti intliziyo yabo iyakwelela kude kum:" 
Mark7:7 kodwa bafumana bendibedesha, befundisa ngezifundiso eziziziyalelo zabantu." 
Mark7:8 Ngokuba, niwuyekile nje umyalelo katixo, nisibamba isinikelo sabantu, intlambo zebekile nendebe; nezinye izinto ezinjengezinjalo ezininzi niyazenza." 
Mark7:9 Wabesiti kubo kanjalo: Nikolisile ukuwulahla umyalelo katixo, ukuze nisigcine isinikelwa senu." 
Mark7:10 Ngokuba u‐Mosesi etshilo ukuti: Beka uyihlo nonyoko; nokuti: Otukayo uyise, umhlaumbi unina, makafe ngokufa." 
Mark7:11 Kanti nina niti: Xeshekweni atshoyo umntu kuyise, umhlaumbi kunina, ukuti: Yikorebane, (oku kukuti: Ngumnikelo,) into esukuba iyiyo ubungaba ngayo uncedwa ndim;" 
Mark7:12 anisamvumeli ke ukuba enzele uyise umhlaumbi unina into: 
Mark7:13 nilitshitshisa nje ilizwi likatixo ngesinikelo senu enisinikeleyo: nezinto ezinjengezinjalo ezininzi niyazenza. 
Mark7:14 Waza wabiza sonke isihlwele, wati kubo: Ndipulapuleni nonke, niqonde ke:" 
Mark7:15 Akuko nto ngapandle kwomntu engati yakungena kuye imnco̔lise; koko ezonto zipuma kuye, zizo ezi ezinco̔lisayo umntu." 
Mark7:16 Ukuba kuko onendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Mark7:17 Kwati kekaloku okuya abengene endlwini evela esihlweleni, bambuza abadisipile bake ngawo umzekeliso lowo." 
Mark7:18 Waza wati kubo: Ningabo abangenakuqonda kangaka nani na? Aniqondi na ukuba konke okungapandle kwakungena emntwini akungemnco̔lise? 
Mark7:19 ngokuba kungangeni entliziyweni yake, koko kungena esiswini, kuze kupumele endaweni yasese, okuhlanza konke ukutya." 
Mark7:20 Wayesiti: Oko kupumayo emntwini, kuko oko okunco̔lisayo umntu." 
Mark7:21 Ngokuba pakati kuyo intliziyo yabantu kupuma izicamango ezikohlakeleyo, iziṙexezo, imibulo, izibulalo," 
Mark7:22 izibo̔, ububawa, ubumenemene, inkohliso, ubutshinitshini, iliso elikohlakeleyo, ugxeko, ir̔atshi, ubugeza:" 
Mark7:23 zonke ezizinto ezikohlakeleyo ziyapuma pakati, zimnco̔lise umntu." 
Mark7:24 Waza wesuka apo, waya emideni yase‐Tire ne‐Tsidone; wati akuba engene endlwini, wafuna ukuba kungaziwa mntu; kanti ebengefihlakele." 
Mark7:25 Ngokuba umfazi, ontombazana ibinomoya onco̔lileyo, evile ngaye nje, weza wawa pantsi ngasezinyaweni zake;" 
Mark7:26 (waye kekaloku engum‐Girikekazi umfazi lowo, engowase‐Siro‐fenisi ngesizwe:) wamtandaza ukuba idemoni ayiku̔pe entombini yake." 
Mark7:27 Koko u‐Yesu wati kuye: Makuhlutiswe abantwana kuqala; ngokuba kungafanelekile ukuba kutatyatwe isonka sabantwana, siposwe ezinjeni." 
Mark7:28 Wapendula ke wati kuye: Ewe, Nkosi! ngokuba nezinja zisitya ngapantsi kwetafile kwimvutuluka zentsapo." 
Mark7:29 Waza wati kuye: Hamba ngenxa yelilizwi; idemoni ipumile kwintombi yako. 
Mark7:30 Wemka ke waya endlwini yake, wafumana idemoni ipumile, nentombi ilele eluku̔kweni." 
Mark7:31 Wati kekaloku wabuya wapuma emideni yase‐Tire ne‐Tsidone, weza ngaselwandle lwase‐Galili, ehamba pakati kwemida yase‐Dekapolisi." 
Mark7:32 Baza bazisa kuye isitulu esitintitayo, bambongoza ukuba abeke isandla pezu kwaso." 
Mark7:33 Waza wasipambukisa esihlweleni ngasese, wafaka iminwe yake ezindlebeni zaso, wati etshicile wacu̔kumisa ulwimi lwaso," 
Mark7:34 waza wakangela ngasezulwini, wagula, wati kuso: Efata! oko kukuti: Vuleka!" 
Mark7:35 Zasezivulwa ke indlebe zaso, wati umbambo wolwimi lwaso wakululeka, salungisa ukuteta." 
Mark7:36 Waza wabayala ukuba mabangaxeleli mntu: kodwa njengoko wabayalayo, bashumayela kwa ngako ngakumbi kakulu." 
Mark7:37 Kanjalo babemangaliswa pezu kwembaliso, besiti: Uzenzile zonke izinto ngokulungileyo; nezitulu uyazenza ukuba zive, nezidenge ukuba zitete." 
Mark8:1 NGALEYOMIHLA, isihlwele sisikulu kakulu nje, bengenanto yokutya kanjako, wababiza u‐Yesu abadisipile bake, wati kubo:" 
Mark8:2 Ndibetwa lusizi pezu kwesihlwele, ukuba kuse kuntsuku ntatu behlala nam, bengenanto yokutya:" 
Mark8:3 kanjalo xeshekweni ndibandulula bengatyanga ukuya ezindlwini zabo, baya kucubuka endleleni; ngokuba bevele kude inxenye yabo." 
Mark8:4 Baza bapendula kuye abadisipile bake, besiti: Umntu apa angahlutisa aba ngezonka ezivela pina besentlango?" 
Mark8:5 Wayebuza kubo, esiti: Izonka eninazo zingapina? Bati ke: Zisixe̔nxe." 
Mark8:6 Waza wayalela isihlwele ukuba sihlale pantsi emhlabeni. Waza watabata izonka zozixe̔nxe, wabulela, waqezula, wanikela kubadisipile bake, ukuze babeke pambi kwabo: baza babeka pambi kwesihlwele." 
Mark8:7 Babenayo nento encinane yentlanzana: waza wabulela, waxela ukuba bazibeke pambi kwabo nazo." 
Mark8:8 Batya ke, bahluta: kanjalo kwasuswa amaqezu aseleyo, ingobozi zazisixe̔nxe." 
Mark8:9 Kekaloku abo babetyile, ngati bebengamawaka mane: waza wabandulula." 
Mark8:10 Wati kekaloku kwa oko wangena enqanaweni kunye nabadisipile bake, weza ezahlulweni zase‐Dalamanuta." 
Mark8:11 Baza bapuma abafarisi, baqala ukubuzisana naye, befuna kuye umqondiso uvela ezulwini, bemlinga." 
Mark8:12 Waza wagula kakulu emoyeni wake, wati: Yinina ukuba esisizukulwana sifune umqondiso? ngokwenene nditi kuni: Akuyi kunikwa kwesisizukulwana umqondiso." 
Mark8:13 Wasuka wabashiya, wabuya wangena enqanaweni, wemkela ecaleni elingapesheya." 
Mark8:14 Kekaloku bebelibele ukutabata nabo izonka, benesonka sasinye sinabo enqanaweni kwapela." 
Mark8:15 Waza wabayala, esiti: Lumkani, lumkelani igwele labafarisi negwele lika‐Herodi." 
Mark8:16 Baza babuzana omnye nomnye, besiti: Utsho, ngokuba singenazo izonka." 
Mark8:17 Wayekwazi oku u‐Yesu wati kubo: Yinina ukuba nibuzane, ngokuba ningenazo izonka? Anikaqondi na? aniqiqi na kanjalo? ninentliziyo yenu iselukuni na?" 
Mark8:18 ninawo amehlo nje, aniboni na? ninazo nendlebe nje, aniva na? aninako nokukumbula na?" 
Mark8:19 Okuya ndandiqezula izonka zozihlanu pakati kwamawaka amahlanu, nasusa zazingapina izitya zizele ngamaqezu? Bati kuye: Zalishumi linesibini." 
Mark8:20 Nokuya ndandiqezula zozixe̔nxe pakati kwamawaka amane, nasusa zazingapina ingobozi zizele ngamaqezu? Baye besiti: Zasixe̔nxe." 
Mark8:21 Waza wati kubo: Yinina lento ningaqiqi? 
Mark8:22 Weza kekaloku e‐Betesayida: baza bazisa kuye imfama, bambongoza ukuba makayicu̔kumise." 
Mark8:23 Waza wabamba isandla semfama, wayitundezela ngapandle kwomzi: wati kanjalo watshicela emehlweni ayo, wabeka izandla pezu kwayo, wayibuza ukuba kuko na into iyibonayo." 
Mark8:24 Yakangela pezulu ke yati: Ndiyabona abantu, endibabonayo njengemiti behamba." 
Mark8:25 Wandula wabuya wabeka izandla pezu kwamehlo ayo, wayikangelisa pezulu; yaza yabuya yenziwa njengapambili, yababona kwa bonke ngokumhlope." 
Mark8:26 Waza wayituma iye endlwini yayo, esiti: Ungangeni emzini ke, ungaxeleli mntu emzini kanjako." 
Mark8:27 Kekaloku wapuma u‐Yesu nabadisipile bake baya emizini yase‐Kesareya‐filipi: waza wati endleleni wabuza kubadisipile bake, esiti kubo: Ngubanina abati abantu ndinguye?" 
Mark8:28 Bapendula ke, besiti: Kutwa ngu‐Johane umbapitizeshi; bati nabanye ngu‐Elija; bati kodwa abanye ngowabaprofite." 
Mark8:29 Waza yena wati kubo: Kodwa ngubanina eniti nina ndinguye? Wapendula u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Wena unguye u‐Kristu. 
Mark8:30 Waza wabayala kakulu ukuba mabangaxeleli mntu ngaye. 
Mark8:31 Wandula waqala ukubafundisa okokuba unyana wesintu ufanele ukuva intlungu ezininzi, nokulahlwa ngabo abadala nabaperisite abakulu nababa̔li, nokubulawa, nokuti emveni kwemihla mitatu abuye avuke." 
Mark8:32 Kekaloku ebeteta esositeto ekuhleni. Waza u‐Petrosi wamtabatela kuye waqala ukumtetisa. 
Mark8:33 Koko ejikile ke, wakangela abadisipile bake, wamtetisa u‐Petrosi, esiti: Yiya emva kwam, Satane! ngokuba unganyamekeli izinto zikatixo, unyamekela izinto zabantu nje." 
Mark8:34 Waza wabiza isihlwele kwa nabadisipile bake, wati kubo: Osukuba efuna ukuza emva kwam, makazikanyeze, apate ikuruse yake, andilandele." 
Mark8:35 Ngokuba lowo usukuba efuna ukulondoloza ubomi bake, buya kumlahleka; nosukuba elahlekana nobomi bake ngenxa yam na ngenxa yevangeli, oyena wobulondoloza." 
Mark8:36 Ngokuba kuya kunceda nto nina umntu, ukuba walizuza ilizwe lonke, waza walahlekelwa ngumpefumlo wake?" 
Mark8:37 kanjalo uya kunika nto nina umntu ibe lixabiso elilingana nawo umpefumlo wake? 
Mark8:38 Ngokuba lowo usukuba enentloni ngam nangamazwi am kwesisizukulwana esibuṙexeza nesonayo, woti nonyana wesintu abe nentloni ngaye, akuza ebungcwaliseni boyise kunye nengelosi ezingcwele." 
Mark9:1 Wayesiti kubo: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Bako inxenye yabemiyo apa, abangasayi kuva ukufa, bade babone ubukumkani bukatixo buzile ngamandla." 
Mark9:2 WAZA u‐Yesu emveni kwentsuku ntandatu watabata naye u‐Petrosi, no‐Yakobi, no‐Johane, wabanyusela entabeni ende ngasese bebodwa. Waza wenziwa ngakumbi isimilo sake pambi kwabo," 
Mark9:3 zati izivato zake zaba zibengezela, zimhlope kakulu njengengqweqwe, ngendawo ekungeko msuki emhlabeni ongazenzayo zibe mhlope kangaka." 
Mark9:4 Kwati kekaloku kwabonakala kubo u‐Elija ndawonye no‐Mosesi, ababeteta no‐Yesu." 
Mark9:5 Waza wapendula u‐Petrosi wati ku‐Yesu: Rabi! kulungile ukuba sibe lapa; masenze ke amapempe abe matatu, elinye libe lelako, elinye libe lelika‐Mosesi, elinye libe lelika‐Elija." 
Mark9:6 Ngokuba ebengazi ukuba woteta nto nina; ngokuba bebesoyika kakulu. 
Mark9:7 Kwaye kuko nelifu libasibekelela; kanjalo kwavela ilizwi elifini, lisiti: Lo ungunyana wam otandiweyo; mveni yena." 
Mark9:8 Baza bati bakusingasinga ngokwalama, ababi sabona mntu, kupela u‐Yesu yedwa enabo." 
Mark9:9 Kekaloku bakuhla entabeni, wabayala ukuba mabangabaliseli mntu izinto ababezibonile, xeshekweni angekatanga unyana wesintu wavuka ekufeni." 
Mark9:10 Nelozwi balibamba pakati kwabo, bebuzisana ukuba kukuti nina ukuvuka ekufeni." 
Mark9:11 Baza bambuza, besiti: Yinina lento ababa̔li bati: u‐Elija ufanele ukuza tanci?" 
Mark9:12 Wapendula wati kubo: u‐Elija okunene esiza tanci, uyabuya amise into zonke; nokuba kutiwe nina ukuba̔lwa ngaye unyana wesintu, ukuba eve intlungu ezininzi, adelwe nokudelwa." 
Mark9:13 Koko nditi kuni: u‐Elija selezile, benza ngakuye kanjako konke bakwenzayo, njengokuba kuba̔liwe ngaye." 
Mark9:14 Kekaloku akufika kubadisipile, wabona isihlwele esikulu sibapahla, nababa̔li bebuzisana nabo." 
Mark9:15 Sasesisiti ke sonke isihlwele sakumbona, samangaliswa kakulu, beza ngokubaleka bambulisa." 
Mark9:16 Waza wabuza kubaba̔li, esiti: Nibuzisana nabo ngandawo nina?" 
Mark9:17 Waza wapendula owasesihlweleni, wati: Mfundisi! ndizisile unyana wam kuwe, enomoya ongatetiyo;" 
Mark9:18 oti kekaloku apo asukuba emqubula kona, amti kahla; aze axape amagwebu, atshixize amazinyo ake, ashwabane ke: ndaza ndateta kubadisipile bako ukuba mabamku̔pe; bakohlwa ke." 
Mark9:19 Wampendula wati: Sizukulwana esingakolwayo! ndobako kuni kude kube ninina? ndoninyamezela kude kube ninina? mziseni kum. 
Mark9:20 Bamzisa ke kuye: wati akumbona, waselesiti umoya wamṙuzula; wawa pantsi emhlabeni ke, waqikileka exapa amagwebu." 
Mark9:21 Waza wabuza kuyise, esiti; Lixesha elingakananina lento isel’ imhlile? Wayesiti: Kuseloko ebengumntwana:" 
Mark9:22 waye kwa futi emposile nasemlilweni nasemanzini, ukuze ambubise: kodwa ukuba ungenza into, yiba nosizi pezu kwetu, usisize." 
Mark9:23 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Ukuba ungakolwa, zonke izinto ziyenzekela okolwayo." 
Mark9:24 Waza waseledanduluka uyise womfana, wati enenyembezi: Ndiyakolwa, Nkosi! siza ukungakolwa kwam." 
Mark9:25 Kekaloku akubona u‐Yesu ukuba abantu bebebalekela endaweni nye, watetisa umoya onco̔lileyo, wati kuye: Wena moya ongatetiyo ongevayo! ndiyakuyalela mna, puma kuye, uze ungabi sangena kuye." 
Mark9:26 Waza wadanduluka, wamṙuzula kakulu, wapuma ke; wati umfana waba njengokungati ufile, bada bati abaninzi: Ufile." 
Mark9:27 Kodwa u‐Yesu wambamba ngesandla, wamvusa; wesuka wema ke." 
Mark9:28 Wati kekaloku akungena endlwini, abadisipile bake bambuza ngasese, besiti: Yinina lento sibe sikohliwe kukumku̔pa tina?" 
Mark9:29 Waza wati kubo: Oluhlobo alungepume nganto kupela ngokutandaza nangokuzila ukutya. 
Mark9:30 Baza bapuma kona, bacanda e‐Galili; waye engavumi ke ukuba kube ngowaziyo." 
Mark9:31 Ngokuba ebefundisa abadisipile bake, wati kubo: Unyana wesintu uyanikelwa ezandleni zabantu, abaya kumbulala; waeya kuti akuba ebulewe, abuye avuke ngomhla wesitatu." 
Mark9:32 Kodwa bebengaqondi esositeto; bebesoyika ukumbuza kanjalo. 
Mark9:33 Baza bafika e‐Kapenayume: wati akuba sendlwini, wababuza, esiti: Nibe nipikisana pakati kwenu nganto nina endleleni?" 
Mark9:34 Baye besiti tu ke; ngokuba bebepike omnye nomnye endleleni, ngubanina omkulu kwabanye." 
Mark9:35 Waza wahlala pantsi, wabiza abalishumi linababini, wati kubo: Ukuba kuko ofuna ukuba ngowokuqala, uya kuba ngowokugqibela kubo bonke, nomkonzi wabo bonke." 
Mark9:36 Waza watabata umntwana, wammisa pakati kwabo; wandula wamsingata ngengalo, wati kubo:" 
Mark9:37 Osukuba esamkela omnye wabantwana abanjalo egameni lam, uyamkela mna; nosukuba esamkela mna, akamkeli mna, koko esamkela lowo wanditumayo." 
Mark9:38 Waza wapendula kuye u‐Johane, esiti: Mfundisi! sabona umntu eziku̔pa idemoni ngegama lako, ongasilandeliyo; saza samalela, ukuba engasilandeli." 
Mark9:39 Kodwa u‐Yesu wati: Ningamaleli; ngokuba kungeko mntu oya kwenza isenzo samandla egameni lam, aze ahle ange angateta kakubi ngam." 
Mark9:40 Ngokuba ongalani nati engecala letu. 
Mark9:41 Ngokuba osukuba eniseza indebe yamanzi egameni lam, ngenxa yokuba ningabaka‐Kristu, ngokwenene nditi kuni, akayi kulahlekana nomvuzo wake nakanye." 
Mark9:42 Nosukuba exakanisa omnye wabo bancinane bakolwayo kum, kulungele yena ngakumbi, ukuba ilitye lokusila belibotshwa ngasentanyeni yake, waza waposelwa elwandle." 
Mark9:43 Kanjalo xeshekweni isandla sako sikuxakanisa, sinqumle; kulungele wena ukuba ungene ebomini usisilima, ngapezu kwokuba uti, unezandla zibini, umkele esihogweni, emlilweni ongacimekiyo," 
Mark9:44 apo impetu yabo ingafiyo, nomlilo ungacinywayo." 
Mark9:45 Naxeshekweni unyawo lwako lukuxakanisa, lunqumle; kulungele wena ukuba ungene ebomini usisiqwala, ngapezu kwokuba uti, unenyawo mbini, uposwe esihogweni, emlilweni ongacimekiyo," 
Mark9:46 apo impetu yabo ingafiyo, nomlilo ungacinywayo." 
Mark9:47 Naxeshekweni iliso lako likuxakanisa, liku̔pe; kulungele wena ukuba ungene ebukumkanini bukatixo uneliso linye, ngapezu kwokuba uti, unamehlo mabini, uposwe esihogweni somlilo," 
Mark9:48 apo impetu yabo ingafiyo, nomlilo ungacinywayo." 
Mark9:49 Ngokuba bonke beya kumvumvuzelwa ngomlilo, nawo onke amadini aya kumvumvuzelwa ngetyuwa." 
Mark9:50 Ityuwa yinto elungileyo; kodwa xeshekweni ityuwa yenziwe ingenabutyuwa, niya kuyivakalisa nganto nina? Yibani netyuwa pakati kwenu, nixolane omnye nomnye." 
Mark10:1 KEKALOKU esukile apo, weza emideni yase‐Judeya, ngecala elingapesheya kwe‐Yoredane: zati izihlwele zabutela kuye kanjako; waza wazifundisa kanjako, njengokuba ebeqelile ukwenje njalo." 
Mark10:1 KEKALOKU esukile apo, weza emideni yase‐Judeya, ngecala elingapesheya kwe‐Yoredane: zati izihlwele zabutela kuye kanjako; waza wazifundisa kanjako, njengokuba ebeqelile ukwenje njalo." 
Mark10:2 Kweza kuye nabafarisi, bambuza ukuba kufanelekile endodeni na ukulahla umfazi, bemlinga." 
Mark10:3 Wapendula wati kubo: Ubeniyalele nto nina u‐Mosesi? 
Mark10:4 Bati ke: u‐Mosesi ubevumela ukuba kuba̔lwe incwadi yokwahlukanisa, nokuba kulahlwe." 
Mark10:5 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Ngenxa yobulukuni bentliziyo zenu waniba̔lela lomyalelo; 
Mark10:6 kodwa kwa sekuqaleni kwokudalwa, utixo wabenza indoda nomfazi." 
Mark10:7 Ngenxa yoku umntu uya kushiya uyise nonina, anamatele emfazini wake," 
Mark10:8 baze abo babini babe yinyama nye. Ngako oko abasebabini, bayinyama nye." 
Mark10:9 Ngoko ke, oko utixo akubandakanyileyo, makungahlulwa mntu." 
Mark10:10 Bati endlwini ke abadisipile bake babuya bambuza ngaleyo ndawo. 
Mark10:11 Waza wati kubo: Osukuba elahla umfazi wake, aze azeke omnye, uyaṙexeza ngakuye." 
Mark10:12 Kanjalo ukuba umfazi uyalahla indoda yake, aze ende kwenye, uyaṙexeza naye." 
Mark10:13 Kwaza kwaziswa kuye abantwana, ukuze abacu̔kumise; koko abadisipile babebatetisa abo babebazisa." 
Mark10:14 Kodwa akubona oko u‐Yesu, waqumba kakulu, wati kubo: Vumelani abantwana ukuza kum, ize ningabaleli; ngokuba ubukumkani bukatixo bubobabanjalo." 
Mark10:15 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Osukuba engamkeli ubukumkani bukatixo njengomntwana, akasayi kuza angene kubo." 
Mark10:16 Waza wabasingata ngengalo, wabeka izandla pezu kwabo, wabatamsanqelisa." 
Mark10:17 Kekaloku akupumela endleleni, kweza umntu otile ngokubaleka, waguqa pantsi kuye, wambuza, esiti: Mfundisi olungileyo! ndiya kwenza nto nina ukuze ndidle ilifa lobomi obungunapakade?" 
Mark10:18 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Yinina ukuba uti ndingolungileyo? akuko olungileyo, kupela umnye, o ngutixo." 
Mark10:19 Imiyalelo uyayazi: Akuyi kuṙexeza; akuyi kubulala; akuyi kuba̔; akuyi kunqi̔na ubunqi̔na obubuxoki; akuyi kulumkisa; beka uyihlo nonyoko. 
Mark10:20 Wapendula wati kuye: Mfundisi! ezizinto zonke ndizibambile kwa sebutsheni bam. 
Mark10:21 Waza u‐Yesu emkangele wamtanda, wati kuye: Inye into uyisweleyo: hamba, uye utengise ngako konke onako, upe amahlwempu, wauya kuba nendyebo ezulwini; uze ke, yipate ikuruse, ulandele mna." 
Mark10:22 Kodwa wati kunubembe ngelozwi, wemka elusizi; ngokuba ebe enazo imfuyo ezininzi." 
Mark10:23 Waza wasingasinga u‐Yesu, wati kubadisipile bake: Kungento enqabileyo kangakananina ukuba abo banobutyebi baya kungena ebukumkanini bukatixo!" 
Mark10:24 Bati kekaloku abadisipile batela nqa amazwi ake. Kodwa u‐Yesu wabuya wapendula, wati kubo: Lusapo! kunqabile kangakananina ukuba abo batembela ebutyebini bangene ebukumkanini bukatixo!" 
Mark10:25 Kulula ukuba inkamela ipumele entunjeni yesinalite, pezu kwokuba isityebi singene ebukumkanini bukatixo." 
Mark10:26 Babemangaliswa ngakumbi ke, besiti pakati kwabo: Ngubanina kanti ongasindiswayo?" 
Mark10:27 Koko u‐Yesu ebakangele wati: Ebantwini akwenzeki oku, kodwa aku kokungenzekiyo kutixo; ngokuba zonke izinto zisenzeka kutixo." 
Mark10:28 Waza waqala u‐Petrosi ukuti kuye: Bona ke, tina sikushiyile konke, salandela wena." 
Mark10:29 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Akuko mntu oshiyileyo indlu, umhlaumbi abaninawe, umhlaumbi odade, umhlaumbi uyise, umhlaumbi unina, umhlaumbi umfazi, umhlaumbi abantwana, umhlaumbi amasimi, ngenxa yam na ngenxa yevangeli," 
Mark10:30 ongayi kuti kaloku nje kwelixesha amkele ngekulu, izindlu, nabaninawe, nodade, nonina, nabantwana, namasimi, kunye nazo intshutshiso, nakwelolizwe lizayo obomi obungunapakade." 
Mark10:31 Kodwa baninzi abangabokuqala abaya kuba ngabokugqibela, nabangabokugqibela abaya kuba ngabokuqala." 
Mark10:32 KEKALOKU bebesendleleni benyukela e‐Yerusaleme: waye u‐Yesu ebehamba pambili kubo; baza bati nqa, bati belandela boyika. Wabuya watabatela kuye abalishumi linababini, waqala ukubaxelela izinto eziza kumhlela," 
Mark10:33 esiti: Bona ke, siyanyukela e‐Yerusaleme, waeya kuti unyana wesintu anikelwe kubaperisite abakulu nakubaba̔li, abaya kumgweba ukuba afe, bamnikele kubaheyideni;" 
Mark10:34 babeya kumhleka, bambete, bamtshicele, bambulale; woti ngomhla wesitatu abuye avuke." 
Mark10:35 Baza basondela kuye u‐Yakobi no‐Johane onyana baka‐Zebedi, besiti: Mfundisi! singa ungasenzela into esukuba sicela yona." 
Mark10:36 Wayesiti kubo: Ninga ndinganenzela nto nina? 
Mark10:37 Baye besiti kuye: Sipe okokuba sihlale, omnye abe ngasekunene kuwe, omnye abe ngasekohlo kuwe, ebungcwaliseni bako." 
Mark10:38 Koko u‐Yesu wati kubo: Aniyazi into eniyicelayo. Ningasela na endebeni endisela kuyo mna? nobapitizesho endibapitizeshwa ngalo mna, ningabapitizeshwa ngalo na?" 
Mark10:39 Baye besiti kuye: Singenje njalo. Wati ke u‐Yesu kubo: Londebe okunene endisela kuyo mna, niya kusela kuyo, nobapitizesho endibapitizeshwa ngalo mna, niya kubapitizeshwa ngalo;" 
Mark10:40 kodwa ukuhlala ngasekunene kum nangasekohlo kum asi kuko okwam ukupa, kupela ukupa abo balungiselwe kona." 
Mark10:41 Baza bati abalishumi bakuva oku, baqala ukuqumbela u‐Yakobi no‐Johane kakulu." 
Mark10:42 Koko u‐Yesu wababiza wati kubo: Niyazi ukuba abo babalwayo ngokuba zinkosi zabaheyideni bayabapata ngobukosi, nokuba abakulu babo bayenza ngegunya pezu kwabo." 
Mark10:43 Kodwa akuyi kuba njalo pakati kwenu; koko osukuba efuna ukuba mkulu pakati kwenu, woba ngumkonzi wenu;" 
Mark10:44 nowakuni osukuba efuna ukuba ngowokuqala, woba sisicaka sabo bonke:" 
Mark10:45 ngokuba nonyana wesintu ebengezanga ukuza kukonzwa, koko weza ukukonza, nokunika ubomi bake bube yintlaulelo yabaninzi." 
Mark10:46 Baza bafika e‐Jeriko: kwakute nxa ebepuma e‐Jeriko, kwa nabadisipile bake, nento eninzi yabantu, u‐Baratimeyu oyimfama, unyana ka‐Timeyu, wabehleli ngasendleleni enqiba." 
Mark10:47 Wati akuva ukuba ngu‐Yesu wase‐Nazarete, waqala ukudanduluka nokuti: Yesu, nyana ka‐Davide! yiba netaṙu kum." 
Mark10:48 Baza abaninzi bamyala, ukuba ati tu: kodwa wayedanduluka ngento enkulu ngakumbi, esiti: Nyana ka‐Davide! yiba netaṙu kum." 
Mark10:49 Waza wema u‐Yesu waxela ukuba makabizwe: basuka bambiza oyimfama, besiti kuye: Yomelela; vuka, uyakubiza." 
Mark10:50 Waselelahla ingubo yake, wesuka, weza ku‐Yesu." 
Mark10:51 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Unga ndingakwenzela nto nina? Wayesiti oyimfama kuye: Raboni! ndinga ndingamkela ukubona kwam. 
Mark10:52 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Hamba; ukolo lwako lukupilisile. Waza kwa oko wamkela ukubona kwake, wamlandela u‐Yesu endleleni." 
Mark11:1 KEKALOKU xeshekweni basondelayo e‐Yerusaleme, e‐Betefage nase‐Betaniya ngasentabeni yeminquma, watuma ababini bakubadisipile bake," 
Mark11:2 wati kubo: Hambani niye emzini omalungana nani; nose niti ke nakungena kuwo, nifumane iqwaṙashana libotshelelwe, ekungahlalanga namnye umntu pezu kwalo: likululeni nilizise." 
Mark11:3 Nokuba umntu uti kuni: Yinina ukuba nenze oku? yitini: Inkosi iyalifuna; wosel’ elituma apa ke. 
Mark11:4 Basuka bemka, baya balifumana iqwaṙashana libotshelelwe ngaselucangweni ngapandle ekuhlanganeni kwendlela, balikulula." 
Mark11:5 Baza inxenye yababemi kona bati kubo: Nenza nto nina nikulula nje iqwaṙashana? 
Mark11:6 Koko batsho kubo kwa njengokuba ebeyalele u‐Yesu: baza babayeka. 
Mark11:7 Bandula balizisa iqwaṙashana ku‐Yesu, baposa pezu kwalo ingubo zabo; waza wahlala pezu kwalo." 
Mark11:8 Bati abaninzi bandlala ingubo zabo endleleni; bebesiti abanye bagaula amagatya emitini, bawandlala endleleni." 
Mark11:9 Baza abo babe behamba pambili, nabo babe belandela, badanduluka, besiti: Hosana! Makatanyusanqeliswe ozayo egameni likayehova!" 
Mark11:10 Mabutanyusanqeliswe ubukumkani bobawo wetu u‐Davide, obuzayo egameni likayehova! Hosana enyangweni yapezulu!" 
Mark11:11 Waza u‐Yesu wangena e‐Yerusaleme, nasetempileni; wati akusingasingela zonke izinto, kuse kuhlwile nje, wapuma waya e‐Betaniya kunye nabalishumi linababini." 
Mark11:12 Kekaloku ngomhla olandelayo, nxa bebepumile e‐Betaniya, walamba." 
Mark11:13 Wati akubona umkiwane ekude, unamagqabi, weza ukuba umhlaumbi wofumana into kuwo; (wati akufika kuwo, wafumana amagqabi kwapela;) ngokuba bekungelixesha lamakiwane." 
Mark11:14 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu, wati kuwo: Makungabi satyiwa ngumntu isiqa̔mo kuwe kude kube ngunapakade. Babesiva ke abadisipile bake." 
Mark11:15 Baza bafika e‐Yerusaleme: waza u‐Yesu engene etempileni waqala ukugxota bonke ababetengela nababetenga etempileni, wazipenula itafile zabananeli bemali, nezihlalo zababetengisa ngamahobe," 
Mark11:16 engavumeli nokuba umntu acande etempileni etwele impahla. 
Mark11:17 Wati kanjalo wafundisa, esiti kubo: Akuba̔liwe na ukuti: Indlu yam iya kubizwa ngokuti yindlu yokutandaza kuzo zonke intlanga? kanti nina niyenzile umqolomba wamabada." 
Mark11:18 Baza beva ababa̔li nabaperisite abakulu, bafuna ukuba boti nina ukumbubisa; ngokuba bebemoyika, kuba isihlwele sonke sibe simangaliswa pezu kwesifundiso sake." 
Mark11:19 Waza wati, nxa kuse kuhlwile, wapuma pandle kwesixeko." 
Mark11:20 Kekaloku kwakusa, bakudlula, babona umkiwane ukuba ubunile kwada kwasezingcanjeni." 
Mark11:21 Waza u‐Petrosi ekumbule nje wati kuye: Rabi! kangela, umkiwane owabuqalekisa wona ubunile." 
Mark11:22 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Yibani nokolo kutixo. 
Mark11:23 Ngokuba ngokwenene ndisiti kuni: Osukuba esiti kulentaba: Yiba ususwa, uposelwe elwandle; aze angatandabuzi entliziyweni yake, koko akolwe ukuba izinto azitetayo ziyenzeka; uya kuba nako oko asukuba esitsho kona." 
Mark11:24 Ngenxa yoku nditi kuni: Zonke izinto enisukuba nizicela nitandaza, kolwani ukuba niyazamkela, naniya kuba nazo." 
Mark11:25 Naxeshekweni nimi nitandaza, xolelani, ukuba ninendawo ngasemntwini; ukuze ati noyihlo osezulwini anixolele nina iziposo zenu." 
Mark11:26 Kodwa ukuba nina anixoleli, kanjalo uyihlo osezulwini akayi ku ni xolela iziposo zenu." 
Mark11:27 Baza babuya bafika e‐Yerusaleme: kekaloku akuhamba etempileni, kweza kuye abaperisite abakulu, nababa̔li, nabadala," 
Mark11:28 bati kuye: Uzenza ezizinto ngegunya lanina? kanjalo ngubanina owanika eligunya kuwe, lokuba ezizinto uzenze?" 
Mark11:29 Koko u‐Yesu wapendula wati kubo: Nam ndobuza kuni indawo ibe nye, nize nindipendule, ndandiya kunixelela kungelanina igunya endizenza ezizinto:" 
Mark11:30 Ubapitizesho luka‐Johane beluvela ezulwini, beluvela ebantwini, kusinina? ndipenduleni." 
Mark11:31 Baza batelekelela ngokwabo, besiti: Ukuba siti: Ezulwini; woti: Kunganina pofu ukuba anikolwanga nguye?" 
Mark11:32 Koko ukuba siti: Ebantwini; bebesoyika abantu; ngokuba kwa bonke bebembala u‐Johane ukuba ebengumprofite ngokwenyaniso. 
Mark11:33 Baza bapendula bati ku‐Yesu: Asazi. Wapendula no‐Yesu wati kubo: Nam andixeleli nina kungelanina igunya endizenza ezizinto. 
Mark12:1 Waza waqala ukuteta kubo ngemizekeliso, esiti: Umntu otile watyala isitiya, wa si biyela ngotango, wembela ifatye yeveyine, waka inqaba, wasiqeshisela kubalimi, waza wahambela kwelinye ilizwe." 
Mark12:2 Wati ngexesha elifanelekileyo watuma kubalimi isicaka, ukuze samkele kubalimi kwiziqa̔mo zesitiya." 
Mark12:3 Kodwa basitabata basityabula, basindulula singenanto." 
Mark12:4 Waza wabuya watuma kubo esinye isicaka; neso basigibisela ngamatye basenzela inxeba entloko, basindulula sipetwe ngento ehlazekileyo." 
Mark12:5 Wabuya watuma nesinye; neso basibulala: kwa nezinye ezininzi, inxenye bezityabula, inxenye bezibulala." 
Mark12:6 Ngako esenonyana emnye, umtandwa wake, wamtuma naye kubo ngokugqibela, esiti: Baya kumhlonela unyana wam." 
Mark12:7 Kodwa abalimi abo batsho pakati kwabo ukuti: Lo uyindlalifa; yizani, masimbulale, lize ilifa libe leletu." 
Mark12:8 Baza bamtabata bambulala, bamku̔pela ngapandle kwesitiya." 
Mark12:9 Uya kwenza nto nina ngoko umninisitiya? uya kuza atshabalalise abobalimi, anike isitiya kwabanye." 
Mark12:10 Anileseshanga na esisiba̔lo sokuti: Ilitye babelilahlile abaki, elona laba yintloko yegumbi;" 
Mark12:11 bekukukwenza kukayehova oku, kungummangaliso ke emehlweni etu?" 
Mark12:12 Baye befuna ukumbamba, kanti basoyika isihlwele; ngokuba bebenakene ukuba lomzekeliso wawuteta ngakubo; baza bamshiya bemka." 
Mark12:13 BAZA batuma kuye abatile bakubafarisi nakubaherodi, ukuze bambambise ngokuteta." 
Mark12:14 Beza ke bona bati kuye: Mfundisi! siyazi ukuba uyinene, ungakatali ngumntu; ngokuba ungabuki ubuso babantu, koko ufundisa indlela katixo ngokwenyaniso: kufanelekile ukunika umnikelo ku‐Kesare, aku fanelekile, kusinina?" 
Mark12:15 sinike, singaniki, kusinina? Kodwa yena ebazi ubuhanahaniso babo, wati kubo: Yinina ukuba nindilinge? ndiziseleni idenari, ukuze ndi yi bone." 
Mark12:16 Ba yi zisa ke. Waza wati kubo: Ngokabanina lomfanekiso nesiba̔lwa? Bati ke kuye: Ngoka‐Kesare. 
Mark12:17 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Nikelani izinto zika‐Kesare kuye u‐Kesare, nezinto zikatixo kuye utixo. Bati nqa ke pezu kwake." 
Mark12:18 Kwaza kweza abasadusi kuye, abati akuko luvuko, bambuza, besiti:" 
Mark12:19 Mfundisi! u‐Mosesi wasiba̔lela ukuti: Xeshekweni kufayo umkuluwe womntu, aze ashiye umfazi emva kwake, angashiyi abantwana, makati umninawe wake azeke umfazi wake, amvusele umkuluwe wake inzalo." 
Mark12:20 Bekuko abazalwana abasixe̔nxe: waza owokuqala wazeka umfazi, wati ebuba nje akashiya nzalo." 
Mark12:21 Waza owesibini wamzeka, wafa, wati naye akashiya nzalo. Wenje njalo nowesitatu." 
Mark12:22 Bamzeka ke abasixe̔nxe, bengashiyanga nzalo. Emveni kwabo bonke wafa nomfazi." 
Mark12:23 Ngako eluvukweni, xeshekweni babuya bavuke, woba ngumfazi wawupina kubo? ngokuba abasixe̔nxe bebenaye engumfazi." 
Mark12:24 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Aniposisi ngako oku na, ningazi nje iziba̔lo, kwa namandla katixo?" 
Mark12:25 ngokuba, xeshekweni babuya bavuke, bengazeki, bengendiswa kanjako, koko benjengengelosi ezisezulwini." 
Mark12:26 Kodwa ngabo abafileyo, ukuba bayavuka, anileseshanga na encwadini ka‐Mosesi, endaweni yetyolo, okokuba utixo wateta kuye, esiti: Mna ndi ngutixo ka‐Abrahame, notixo ka‐Yisake, notixo ka‐Yakobi?" 
Mark12:27 aka ngutixo wabafileyo, u ngutixo wabahleliyo: nina ngoko niyaposisa kakulu." 
Mark12:28 Waza omnye wakubaba̔li, obebavile bebuzisana, esazi ukuba ulungisile ukubapendula, weza wambuza, esiti: Nguwupina owokuqala umyalelo kuyo yonke?" 
Mark12:29 Wati u‐Yesu ukumpendula: Owokuqala kuyo yonke imiyalelo ungowokuti: Pulapula, Sirayeli! uyehova, utixo wetu, u nguyehova emnye:" 
Mark12:30 wauya kumtanda uyehova, utixo wako, ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako, nangayo yonke ingqondo yako, nangawo onke amandla ako. Nguwo lo owokuqala umyalelo." 
Mark12:31 Nowesibini ufana na wo, lo wokuti: Uya kutanda ummelwane wako njengokuzi tanda kwako. Akuko myalelo wumbi umkulu kulé." 
Mark12:32 Waza umba̔li lowo wati kuye: Ulungisile, Mfundisi! ukutsho ngokwenyaniso; ngokuba utixo emnye, kungeko wumbi ngapandle kwake;" 
Mark12:33 nokutanda yena ngayo yonke intliziyo, nangayo yonke ingqondo, nangawo wonke umpefumlo, nangawo onke amandla, nokutanda ummelwane njengoko umntu a zi tanda ngako, kuyinto enkulu kuwo onke amadini okutshiswa nemibingo." 
Mark12:34 Waza u‐Yesu, akubona ukuba upendule ngobutelekelelo, wati kuye: Akukude kubo ubukumkani bukatixo. Kwaza akwabi sabiko mntu onokukalipa kwokumbuza nto." 
Mark12:35 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu efundisa etempileni, wati: Bati nina ababa̔li ukuti u‐Kristu ungunyana ka‐Davide?" 
Mark12:36 Ngokuba u‐Davide ngokwake ebesitsho ngomoya oyingcwele ukuti: Wati uyehova kwinkosi yam: Hlala ngasekunene kum, ndide ndenze intshaba zako zibe sisitulo senyawo zako." 
Mark12:37 U‐Davide ngoko ngokwake uti u yinkosi: aze ati nina ke ukuba ngunyana wake? Sati isininzi esikulu sesihlwele samva ngokuvuya. 
Mark12:38 Waza wati kubo ekufundiseni kwake: Lumkani ababa̔li, abatanda ukuhamba ngengubo ezinde, nezibuliso ezindaweni zentengo," 
Mark12:39 nezihlalo zapambili ezindlwini zentlanganiso, nendawo zobukulu ezidlweni;" 
Mark12:40 abadlayo izindlu zabahlolokazi, besenza nemitandazo emide ngokuzenzisa: aba baya kwamkela ukugwetywa okukulu ngakumbi." 
Mark12:41 Kekaloku u‐Yesu ehleli pantsi malungana nendawo yendyebo, wabekangela ukuba bati nina abantu ukufaka imali endaweni yendyebo: baye abaninzi abazityebi bebefaka into enkulu." 
Mark12:42 Wada weza umhlolokazi otile olihlwempu, wafaka imalanyana zambini, ezisesesine isahlulo sedobulitye." 
Mark12:43 Waza wabiza abadisipile bake wati kubo: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Lomhlolokazi olihlwempu ubagqitisile ngokufaka bonke abafakileyo endaweni yendyebo: 
Mark12:44 ngokuba bona bonke bebefaka kubo ubuninzi babo; kodwa lo kuko ukuswela kwake ebefaka konke oko abenako, kwa konke apila ngako." 
Mark13:1 KEKALOKU akupuma etempileni, omnye wakubadisipile bake wati kuye: Mfundisi! kangela, amatye anjanina, nezakiwo ezinjanina!" 
Mark13:2 Waza u‐Yesu wapendula wati kuye: Uyazibona na ezizakiwo zikulu? akuyi kushiywa elinye ilitye pezu kwelinye, elingayi kuwiswa pantsi." 
Mark13:3 Kekaloku nxa abehleli entabeni yeminquma, malungana netempile, bambuza ngasese u‐Petrosi, no‐Yakobi, no‐Johane, no‐Andreya, besiti:" 
Mark13:4 Sixelele, zobako ninina ezizinto? kanjalo woba yinto nina umqondiso, xeshekweni zonke ezizinto ziza kufezwa?" 
Mark13:5 Waye u‐Yesu ebapendula waqala ukuti: Lumkani, ize ningalahlekiswa mntu." 
Mark13:6 Ngokuba abaninzi beya kuza egameni lam, besiti: Mna ndinguye; baze balahlekise abaninzi." 
Mark13:7 Kodwa xeshekweni nizivayo imfazwe, namaṙe emfazwe, ningabi navuso; ngokuba ezizinto zifanele ukuhla; kodwa ukupela akukabiko." 
Mark13:8 Ngokuba uhlanga luya kuvukela uhlanga, nobukumkani buya kuvuk ela ubukumkani; zaziya kubako izingcangcazelo zomhlaba ngendawo ngendawo; zobako kanjalo indlala nezipitipiti: ziziqalo zenimba ezizinto." 
Mark13:9 Kodwa zilumkeleni nina: ngokuba beya kuninikela ematyaleni, naniya kutyatyulwa ezindlwini zentlanganiso; ewe, niya kumiswa pambi kwenkosi nokumkani ngenxa yam, kube sisinqi̔no kubo." 
Mark13:10 Kanjalo ivangeli ifanele ukuti tanci ishunyayelwe pakati kwentlanga zonke. 
Mark13:11 Kodwa okuya banir̔olayo ukuninikela, ningabi nasitukutezi ngapambili sokuba noteta nto nina, ningabi nakucinga kanjalo; koko into esukuba ninikwa yona ngeloxeshana, le yiteteni: ngokuba kungenini abatetayo, kungumoya oyingcwele." 
Mark13:12 Woti umzalwana anikele umzalwana ekufeni, noyise wonikela umntwana; kanjalo abantwana baya kusukela abazali, babafise:" 
Mark13:13 naniya kutiywa nga bantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam; kodwa onyamezelayo kude kube sekupeleni, oyena uya kusindiswa." 
Mark13:14 Kekaloku xeshekweni niyibonayo into ezondekileyo yokuci̔takalisa, ekwatetwa ngayo ngu‐Danyeli umprofite, imi apo ingafaneli ukuma kona; (oleseshayo makaqonde;) mabati oko abo base‐Judeya basabele ezintabeni:" 
Mark13:14 Kekaloku xeshekweni niyibonayo into ezondekileyo yokuci̔takalisa, ekwatetwa ngayo ngu‐Danyeli umprofite, imi apo ingafaneli ukuma kona; (oleseshayo makaqonde;) mabati oko abo base‐Judeya basabele ezintabeni:" 
Mark13:15 nalowo upezu kwentungo yendlu makangehli ukuya pakati endlwini; kanjako makangangeni ukuya kususa into endlwini yake; 
Mark13:16 nalowo osentsimini makangabuyeli emva ukuya kususa ingubo yake. 
Mark13:17 Hai kodwa ubunzima babo abamitiyo nabanyisayo kuleyomihla! 
Mark13:18 Tandazani ke ukuba mayingabiko intsabo yenu ebusika: 
Mark13:19 ngokuba imihla leyo iya kuba yimbandezelo, ekungabangako enjalo kwa sekuqaleni kwokudalwa akudalileyo utixo kwada kwakaloku, nekungayi kuza kubeko enjalo." 
Mark13:20 Kanjako ukuba inkosi ibingayincipisanga lomihla, bekungayi kusindiswa namnye umntu; kodwa ngenxa yabaqashwa ibaqashileyo, iyincipisile lomihla." 
Mark13:21 Zeniti ke oko, ukuba umntu utsho kuni ukuti: Nanku apa u‐Kristu; umhlaumbi ukuti: Nanku paya; ningakolwa ke." 
Mark13:22 Ngokuba kuya kuvuka okristu ababuxoki, nabaprofite ababuxoki, babeya kubonakalisa imiqondiso nemimangaliso, ukunga bangati, ukuba kungenzeka, balahlekise kwa nabaqashwa." 
Mark13:23 Kodwa lumkani nina: bona ke, ndinixelele ngapambili konke." 
Mark13:24 Koko kuleyo imihla, emveni kwembandezelo leyo, ilanga liya kwenziwa mnyama, nenyanga ayiyi kunika ukukanya kwayo," 
Mark13:25 nenkwenkwezi zezulu ziya kuwa ku lo, namandla asezulwini aya kuzanyazanyiswa:" 
Mark13:26 kwandul’ ukubonwa unyana wesintu esiza emafini, enamandla amakulu nobungcwalisa." 
Mark13:27 Waeya kwandula atume ingelosi zake, abutele ndawonye abaqashwa bake bevela emimoyeni yomine, kwa sencameni yomhlaba kude kube sencameni yezulu." 
Mark13:28 Kanifunde umzekeliso ngomkiwane: Xeshekweni isebe lawo lise litambile, lipuma amagqabi, niyazi ukuba likufupi ihlobo:" 
Mark13:29 kwa njalo nani, xeshekweni nibona ezizinto zisihla, yazini ukuba kukufupi oko ngasemnyango." 
Mark13:30 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Asiyi kuza sidlule isizukulwana esi, zide zonke ezizinto zibe zenzekile." 
Mark13:31 Kwodlula izulu nomhlaba; kodwa amazwi am akayi kuza adlule. 
Mark13:32 Kodwa akuko mntu owaziyo ngayo leyomini neyure; azazi ingelosi ezisezulwini, kwa nonyana; ngubawo owaziyo kupela." 
Mark13:33 Lumkani, papamani nitandaze; ngokuba ningalazi ixesha ukuba liba ninina." 
Mark13:34 Ngokuba unyana wesintu e njengomntu ohambele kwelinye ilizwe, owashiya indlu yake, wazinika izicaka zake igunya, nezinye ngezinye umsebenzi wazo, wayalela umgcinimnyango ukuba alinde." 
Mark13:35 Lindani ke ngoko; ngokuba ningazi ukuba umninindlu uyeza ninina, nokuba kungokuhlwa na, nokuba kupakati kwobusuku na, nokuba kusekulileni kwenkuku na, nokuba kungokusa na;" 
Mark13:36 hleze ati, esiza ngokwalama, anifumane nilele." 
Mark13:37 Kanjalo oko ndikutshoyo kuni, ndikutsho kubo bonke: Lindani." 
Mark14:1 KEKALOKU emveni kwentsuku mbini bekuko ipasika n omtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele: baza bafuna abaperisite abakulu nababa̔li ukuba bangati nina ukumbamba ngenkohliso bambulale. 
Mark14:2 Bebesiti kodwa: Makungabi semtendelekweni, hleze kubeko isipitipiti ebantwini." 
Mark14:3 Kekaloku ese‐Betaniya, endlwini ka‐Simone ileperi, xa abehleli pantsi, kweza umfazi eneqaka leyalabastere linamafuta mnandi enadusi anqabileyo kunene, waliqekeza iqaka leyalabastere, wawagalela amafuta entloko yake." 
Mark14:4 Kwaye kuko abatile bequmbile kunene pakati kwabo, besiti nokuti: Kwenzelwe nina okukuci̔takala kwamafuta mnandi?" 
Mark14:5 ngokuba kunge kutengiwe ngawo la okupezulu kwamakulu amatatu edenari, kwaza kwapiwa amahlwempu. Baṙoṙa ngaye ke." 
Mark14:6 Kodwa u‐Yesu wati: Myekeni; yinina ukuba nimkataze? umsebenzi olungileyo uwenzile kum. 
Mark14:7 Ngokuba ninawo amahlwempu futi ekuni; kanjalo wona ningawenzela okulungileyo, nxa nitanda ukwenje njalo; kanti aninam futi." 
Mark14:8 Oko wabenako lo, wenzile ngako; umzimba wam uwutambisele ukuncw̔atywa kwam ngokupangela." 
Mark14:9 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Apo kusukuba kushunyayelwa kona ivangeli le kulo lonke ilizwe, kuya kutyelwa nalento ayenzileyo lo, ibe sisikumbuzo sake." 
Mark14:10 Waza u‐Jude Sikariyoti, owabalishumi linababini, wemkela kubaperisite abakulu, ukuze amnikele kubo." 
Mark14:10 Waza u‐Jude Sikariyoti, owabalishumi linababini, wemkela kubaperisite abakulu, ukuze amnikele kubo." 
Mark14:11 Bati ke bona bakuva, bavuya, bambekela ngedinga lokuba baya kumnika imali. Waza wafuna ukuba angati nina ukumngcatsha ngexesha elifanelekileyo." 
Mark14:12 Kekaloku ngowokuqala umhla wezonka ezingenagwele, okuya bekubingwa ipasika, bati kuye abadisipile bake: Utanda ukuba siye silungiselele pina ukuze utye ipasika?" 
Mark14:13 Waza wasusa isibini sabadisipile bake, wati kubo: Yiyani esixekweni, naniya kukaulelwa ngumntu etwele umpanda wamanzi; mlandeleni yena;" 
Mark14:14 nalapo asukuba engena kona, niti kumninindlu: Uti umfundisi: Ipina inkambili yendwendwe, apo ndingayityela kona ipasika kunye nabadisipile bam?" 
Mark14:15 Waeya kunibonisa inkambili yapezulu enkulu eyandlalelweyo elungisiweyo: silungiseleni kona apo. 
Mark14:16 Baza bapuma abadisipile bake, bangena esixekweni, bafumana njengokuba ebetshilo kubo, bayilungisa ipasika." 
Mark14:17 Wati kwakuhlwa weza nabalishumi linababini. 
Mark14:18 Kekaloku nxa babe behleli pantsi besitya nokutya, wati u‐Yesu: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Omnye wakuni wondingcatsha, lowo utyayo kunye nam." 
Mark14:19 Baqala ukuba lusizi ke, nokuti kuye omnye ngomnye: Ndim na? wati nomnye: Ndim na?" 
Mark14:20 Waza wapendula wati kubo: Ngowabalishumi linababini, lowo ufaka isandla esityeni kunye nam." 
Mark14:21 Unyana wesintu uyemka okunene, njengokuba kuba̔liwe ngaye; kodwa kwoba nzima kulowamntu unyana wesintu ungcatshwa nguye? bekumlungele, ukuba ebengazalwanga lowamntu." 
Mark14:22 Kekaloku nxa bebesitya, watabata u‐Yesu isonka, wabulela, waqezula, wabanika, wati: Tabatani, nitye; esi singumzimba wam." 
Mark14:23 Kanjalo watabata indebe, wabulela, wabanika: baza basela kuyo bonke." 
Mark14:24 Wayesiti kubo: Le iligazi lam, elocebano olutsha, elipalazelwa abaninzi." 
Mark14:25 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Andisayi kuba sasela kwisiqa̔mo somti weveyine, kude kube yimini leyo, okuya ndisiselayo sisitsha ebukumkanini bukatixo." 
Mark14:26 Baza bati, bakuba bevumile iculo, bapuma baya entabeni yeminquma." 
Mark14:27 Wayesiti kubo u‐Yesu: Nina nonke niya kuxakaniswa ngam ngobubusuku; ngokuba kuba̔liwe ngokuti: Ndiya kubeta umalusi, zaziya kuci̔twa igusha." 
Mark14:28 Koko emveni kwokuvuka kwam, ndiya kunandulela ukuya e‐Galili." 
Mark14:29 Waza u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Nokuba bonke baya kuxakaniswa, andiyi kuxakaniswa mna noko." 
Mark14:30 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Ngokwenene nditi kuwe: Namhla nje, kwa ngobubusuku, ingekalili kabini inkuku, uya kundikanyela katatu." 
Mark14:31 Kodwa waqinisa ngakumbi ukuti: Nakuba kundifanele ukuba ndife ndawonye nawe, andisayi kukukanyela. Batsho nabo bonke kwa ngokunjalo." 
Mark14:32 Baye besiza entsimini egama liyi‐Getesemane; waza wati kubadisipile bake: Hlalani pantsi apa, ndide ndibe nditandazile." 
Mark14:33 Waza watabata u‐Petrosi no‐Yakobi no‐Johane kunye naye, waqala ukubetwa livuso nokudandateka kakulu." 
Mark14:34 Wayesiti kubo: Umpefumlo wam ulusizi kakulu kude kube sekufeni; hlalani apa, nilinde." 
Mark14:35 Waza waya umganyana ngapambili, wawa pantsi emhlabeni, watandaza ukuba makuti, ukuba kungenzeka, kudlule kuye loyure." 
Mark14:36 Wabesiti: Aba, Bawo! zonke izinto ziyenzeka kuwe; susa lendebe kum: kodwa makungabi ngokutanda kwam, makube ngokwako." 
Mark14:37 Wayesiza ke wabafumana belele, wati ku‐Petrosi: Simone! ulele na? ubungelinde iyure ibe nye na?" 
Mark14:38 Lindani nitandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekulingweni: umoya okunene uyavuma, kodwa inyama ibutataka." 
Mark14:39 Wemka kanjako, waya watandaza, eteta wona lomazwi." 
Mark14:40 Waza wabuya, wabafumana belele kanjako; ngokuba amehlo abo ebenzima; bebengazi ukuba boti nina ukumpendula kanjalo." 
Mark14:41 Wayesiza ngokwesitatu, wati kubo: Lalani ixesha eliseleyo, nipumle; kukolisekile; iyure ifikile: bona ke, unyana wesintu uyanikelwa ezandleni zaboni:" 
Mark14:42 vukani, sihambe; nanku ondingcatshayo esel’ ekufupi." 
Mark14:43 Kekaloku kwa oko, nxa abesateta, kwasondela u‐Jude, engowabalishumi linababini, nesihlwele esikulu kunye naye sineziṙele nenduku, sivela kubo abaperisite abakulu, nababa̔li, nabadala." 
Mark14:43 Kekaloku kwa oko, nxa abesateta, kwasondela u‐Jude, engowabalishumi linababini, nesihlwele esikulu kunye naye sineziṙele nenduku, sivela kubo abaperisite abakulu, nababa̔li, nabadala." 
Mark14:44 Wayete obemngcatsha wabanika isiqondiso, esiti: Lowo endiya kumanga, ukwa nguye; mbambeni yena, nimr̔ole ngokuqinisekileyo." 
Mark14:45 Wati akufika, waselesiza kuye, wati: Rabi, Rabi! wamanga ke." 
Mark14:46 Baza babeka izandla zabo pezu kwake, bambamba." 
Mark14:47 Kekaloku omnye wakubo ababemi kufupi war̔ola isiṙele sake, wabeta isicaka somperisite omkulu, wasinqumla indlebe." 
Mark14:48 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Nipumile neziṙele nenduku ukuza kundibamba na, njengokungati nibe nipuma ngakulo ibada?" 
Mark14:49 Ndandikuni imihla ngemihla etempileni ndifundisa, anandibamba ke. Kodwa kwenzekile oku, ukuze zizaliseke iziba̔lo." 
Mark14:50 Baza bamshiya bonke, babaleka." 
Mark14:51 Kekaloku indodana etile yamlandela, ineqiya etwe tyu emzimbeni; aza ati amadodana ayibamba;" 
Mark14:52 kodwa yayishiya iqiya, yabaleka zé kuwo." 
Mark14:53 Baza bamr̔olela u‐Yesu kumperisite omkulu: kwaye kubutana kuye bonke abaperisite abakulu, nabadala, nababa̔li." 
Mark14:54 Waza u‐Petrosi wamlandela ekude, kwada kwapakati ekusini lendlu yomperisite omkulu; waye ehleli pantsi ndawonye namadindili, esota ngasemlilweni." 
Mark14:55 Kekaloku abaperisite abakulu, nayo yonke intlanganiso yamapakati, bebefuna ubunqi̔na ngakuye u‐Yesu, ukuze bamfise; kanti abafumana ke." 
Mark14:56 Ngokuba abaninzi bebenqi̔na ngakuye ngobuxoki, kanti ukunqi̔na kwabo bekungalungelelani." 
Mark14:57 Baza besuka abatile banqi̔na ngakuye ngobuxoki, besiti:" 
Mark14:58 Samva tina esiti: Mna ndiya kuci̔ta letempile eyenziweyo ngezandla, ndize nditi ngentsuku zibe ntatu ndake enye ingenziwanga ngezandla." 
Mark14:59 Kwaye kungalungelelani nangokunjalo ukunqi̔na kwabo. 
Mark14:60 Waza wesuka umperisite omkulu wema pakati, wambuza u‐Yesu, esiti: Akupenduli nto na? banqi̔na nto nina ngakuwe aba?" 
Mark14:61 Kuloko wati tu, engapendulanga nto. Wabuya umperisite omkulu wambuza, wati kuye: Unguye na u‐Kristu, unyana wodumisekileyo?" 
Mark14:62 Wayesiti u‐Yesu: Ndinguye: naniya kubona unyana wesintu ehleli ngasekunene kwamandla, esiza nokuza namafu ezulu." 
Mark14:63 Waza umperisite omkulu waṙazula ingubo zake, wati: Sisafunela nina amanqi̔na?" 
Mark14:64 nikuvile ukugxeka kwake; niti nina ke? Baza bonke bamgweba ngokuti unetyala lokuba afe. 
Mark14:65 Baza baqala inxenye ukumtshicela, nokugubungela ubuso bake, nokumntliteka, nokuti kuye: Laula. Kanjalo amadindili amtywakaza ngezandla." 
Mark14:66 Kwati kekaloku, nxa u‐Petrosi ebesekusini ngasezantsi, kweza esinye sezicakazana zomperisite omkulu;" 
Mark14:67 esati sakumbona u‐Petrosi esota, samkangela sati: Nawe ubuno‐Yesu um‐Nazarete." 
Mark14:68 Koko wakanyelayo, esiti: Andi m azi, andiqondi into oyitetayo kanjalo. Waza wapumela pandle emnyango wekusi; yalila ke inkuku." 
Mark14:69 Saza isicakazana sabuya sambona, saqala ukuti kwabo babemi kufupi: Lo ungowakubo." 
Mark14:70 Kodwa wabuya wakanyela. Kwaza kwati kwakuba mzuzwana, abo babemi kufupi babuya bati ku‐Petrosi: Ngenyaniso ungowakubo; ngokuba nawe ungum‐Galili, nokuteta kwako kuyafana nokwabo." 
Mark14:71 Kuloko waqala ukuqalekisa nokufunga, esiti: Andimazi lomntu eniteta ngaye." 
Mark14:72 Yalila inkuku ngokwesibini ke. Waza u‐Petrosi wakumbula ilizwi u‐Yesu wabelitshilo kuye ukuti: Ingekalili inkuku kabini, uya kundikanyela katatu. Wati akuligqala, walila." 
Mark15:1 KWAZA kwati kwakusa, basebecebisana abaperisite abakulu kunye nabo abadala nababa̔li, kwa nayo yonke intlanganiso yamapakati, abati bakuba bemnxibile u‐Yesu, bamsa bamnikela ku‐Pilati." 
Mark15:2 Waza u‐Pilati wambuza, esiti: Ungukumkani wama‐Juda na? Wapendula wati kuye: Utsho wena." 
Mark15:3 Kekaloku abaperisite abakulu bebemnika ityala ngento ezininzi. 
Mark15:4 Waza u‐Pilati wabuya wambuza, esiti: Akupenduli nto na? kangela, izinto zininzi kangakanana abazinqi̔nayo ngakuwe." 
Mark15:5 Kodwa u‐Yesu akasapendula nto; wada wati nqa u‐Pilati. 
Mark15:6 Kekaloku ngomtendeleko lowo ebebakululela umbanjwa wamnye, kwa lowo bamcelayo." 
Mark15:7 Kwaye kuko umntu okutiwa ngu‐Baraba, enxityiwe ndawonye nabo babesenza impitimpiti kunye naye, abebete kulompitimpiti benza umbulalo." 
Mark15:8 Saza samemeza isihlwele, saqala ukucela ukuba enze njengokuba ebefuda esenza kubo." 
Mark15:9 Koko u‐Pilati wapendula kubo, esiti: Nifuna ukuba ndinikululele ukumkani wama‐Juda na?" 
Mark15:10 Ngokuba ebesazi ukuba abaperisite abakulu bebemnikele ngomona. 
Mark15:11 Kodwa abaperisite abakulu bavusa isihlwele, ukuba ngokukumbi makabakululele u‐Baraba." 
Mark15:12 Wapendula ke u‐Pilati, wabuya wati kubo: Pofu nifuna ukuba nditi nina kulowo niti ungukumkani wama‐Juda?" 
Mark15:13 Babuya badanduluka, besiti: Mkuruseshe yena." 
Mark15:14 Koko u‐Pilati wabesiti kubo: Wenze ukukohlakala kunina pofu? Kodwa badanduluka kakulu ngakumbi, besiti: Mkuruseshe yena." 
Mark15:15 Waza u‐Pilati, efuna ukunga angancamisa isihlwele, wabakululela u‐Baraba; wati u‐Yesu, akuba emtyabule, wamnikela ukuba akuruseshwe." 
Mark15:16 Aza amasodati amr̔ola aya pakati ekusini, kwelendlu yenkosi, abizela ndawonye lonke ibandla lawo." 
Mark15:17 Aza amambatisa isivato esibomvu, ati akuba elukile isitsaba semitolo, asifaka kuye," 
Mark15:18 aqala ukumbulisa, esiti: A, kumkani wama‐Juda!" 
Mark15:19 Kanjalo ambeta entloko ngengcongolo, amtshicela, aza aguqa ngamadolo ambedesha." 
Mark15:20 Ati xeshekweni ebemhlekile, amhluba isivato esibomvu, amambatisa ezake ingubo; aza amr̔olela pandle, ukuze amkuruseshe." 
Mark15:21 Aza anyanzela umntu obedlula kona, u‐Simone wase‐Kirene, evela ezindleni, uyise bo‐Aletsandere no‐Rufusi, ukuba atwale ikuruse yake." 
Mark15:22 Aza amzisa endaweni e‐ kutiwa yi‐Gologota, okukuti ngokukunyushwa, yindawo yenkankani;" 
Mark15:23 amnika iveyine ipitikeziwe nemore, ukuba asele; koko engayamkelanga." 
Mark15:24 Ati akuba ebemkuruseshile, azaba ingubo zake, esenza amaqashiso pezu kwazo, okuba asuse nto nina ngamanye." 
Mark15:25 Yabiyiyure yesitatu ke, nxa amkuruseshayo." 
Mark15:26 Saye siba̔lelwa pezulu isiba̔lwa setyala lake sokuti: Ukumkani wamajuda. 
Mark15:27 Kwaye kukuruseshwa ndawonye naye amabada amabini, elinye ngasekunene, nelinye ngasekohlo kuye." 
Mark15:28 Saza sazaliseka isiba̔lo esiti: Wabalwa nabagqita umteto. 
Mark15:29 Baza abo babedlula bamgxeka, behlunguzela intloko zabo, besiti nokuti: He ke! wena uyici̔tayo itempile, ubuye uyake pakati kwentsuku ntatu," 
Mark15:30 zisindise, uze uhle ekuruseni!" 
Mark15:31 Kwa njalo ke nabaperisite abakulu, behleka pakati kwabo, kunye nababa̔li, bebesiti: Abanye wabasindisa, yena ngokwake akangezisindise:" 
Mark15:32 u‐Kristu, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli, makehle kaloku nje ekuruseni, size sibone sikolwe nokukolwa. Kanjako abo babekuruseshwa ndawonye naye bebemtuka." 
Mark15:33 Kwati kwakufika iyure yesitandatu, kwabako ubumnyama pezu kwalo lonke ilizwe yada yayiyure yesitoba." 
Mark15:34 Waza ngeyure yesitoba wakala u‐Yesu ngelizwi elikulu, esiti: Eloi! Eloi! lama sabaketani? okukuti ngokukunyushwa: Tixo wam! Tixo wam! undishiyele nina?" 
Mark15:35 Baye besiti inxenye yabemi kufupi, bakuva: Bona ke, uyabiza u‐Elija." 
Mark15:36 Wagidima ke omnye, waya wazalisa ikepekepe ngeyasine, walifaka engcongolweni, wamseza, esiti: Yekani, masibone ukuba uyeza na u‐Elija ukuza kumtula." 
Mark15:37 Wati ke u‐Yesu waku̔pa ilizwi elikulu, waqauka umpefumlo." 
Mark15:38 Laza ikuselo lendawo eyingcwele laṙazulwa kubini kwa pezulu kwada kwasezantsi. 
Mark15:39 Kekaloku inkosikulu ebimi kufupi malungana naye, yakubona ukuba wadanduluka njalo waqauka umpefumlo, yati: Ngenyaniso umntu lo ebengunyana katixo." 
Mark15:40 Kwaye kuko nabafazi bebonela bekude, owayeko pakati kwabo no‐Mariya wase‐Magadala, kwa no‐Mariya unina bo‐Yakobi omncinane no‐Jose, no‐Salome," 
Mark15:41 (ababete kanjalo, okuya abese‐Galili, bamlandela, bamkonza nokumkonza,) nabanye abafazi abaninzi abebenyukele e‐Yerusaleme kunye naye." 
Mark15:42 Kwati kwakuba kuse kuhlwile, ngenxa yokuba ibiyimini yokulungiselela, okukuti, yimini epambili kuyo isabata," 
Mark15:43 kweza u‐Josefe, owase‐Arimateya, umpakati odumileyo, obelinda ubukumkani bukatixo naye, wakalipa wangena ku‐Pilati, wacela umzimba ka‐Yesu." 
Mark15:44 Kekaloku u‐Pilati wati nqa ukuba usel’ efile; waza wabiza inkosikulu, wabuza kuyo ukuba kwasekumzuzu efile na." 
Mark15:45 Wati akwazi ngenkosikulu, wampa u‐Josefe umzimba." 
Mark15:46 Waza watenga iqiya eshiceneyo, wamtula, wamsongela kuloqiya eshiceneyo, wamlalisa encw̔abeni ebelimbiwe eweni, waliqengqa ilitye ngasemnyango wencw̔aba." 
Mark15:47 Kekaloku u‐Mariya wase‐Magadala, no‐Mariya unina ka‐Jose, bebebonela apo wayebekelwa kona." 
Mark16:1 KWATI kwakuba kudlulile isabata, u‐Mariya wase‐Magadala, no‐Mariya unina ka‐Yakobi, no‐Salome, batenga izimnandi, ukuze beze bamtambise." 
Mark16:2 Bati kwa kusasa nje ngolwokuqala usuku lweveki, beza encw̔abeni lakupuma ilanga." 
Mark16:3 Baye besiti omnye kwomnye: Ngubanina oya kusiqengqela ilitye kuwo umnyango wencw̔aba? 
Mark16:4 (kekaloku bakubeka pezulu, babona ukuba ilitye liqengqiwe:) ngokuba libe likulu kakulu." 
Mark16:5 Baza bangena encw̔abeni, babona indodana ihleli pantsi kwelokunene icala, yambete ingubo ende emhlope; babetwa livuso ke." 
Mark16:6 Kodwa yati kubo: Musani ukuba nevuso; niyamfuna u‐Yesu um‐Nazarete obekuruseshiwe; uvukile, akako apa; kangelani indawo apo bambekela kona." 
Mark16:7 Ize nihambe ke, nixelele abadisipile bake, no‐Petrosi, ukuba uyanandulela ukuya e‐Galili; kwa lapo niya kumbona, njengokuba etshilo kuni." 
Mark16:8 Baza bapuma ngokukauleza, babaleka encw̔abeni; bebebanjwa kukungcangcazela nakukumangaliswa ke; abaxelela mntu into kanjalo; ngokuba bebesoyika." 
Mark16:9 Kekaloku xeshekweni u‐Yesu ebevukile kusasa ngolwokuqala usuku lweveki, wabonakala kuqala ku‐Mariya wase‐Magadala, owabeku̔pile kuye idemoni zasixe̔nxe." 
Mark16:10 Waya lowo washumayela kubo abebefuda benaye, belusizi belila nokulila." 
Mark16:11 Bati abo bakuva ukuba uhleli, nokuba wabonwa nguye, abakolwa." 
Mark16:12 Nasemveni kwoko wazibonakalisa ngesimilo simbi kwababini kubo, nxa bebehamba, besiya ezindleni." 
Mark16:13 Baya nabo bashumayela kwabanye; abakolwa nangabo. 
Mark16:14 Wati kamva wazibonakalisa kubo abalishumi linamnye behleli ekutyeni, watetisa ukungakolwa kwabo nobulukuni bentliziyo, ngenxa yokuba bebengakolwanga ngabo babembonile evukile." 
Mark16:15 Waza wati kubo: Hambani niye elizweni lonke, nishumayele ivangeli kulo lwonke uluntu." 
Mark16:16 Okoliweyo wabapitizeshwa, uya kusindiswa; kodwa ongakoliweyo, uya kugwetywa." 
Mark16:17 Kanjalo lemiqondiso iya kulandela abo bakoliweyo: Ngegama lam boziku̔pa idemoni; baya kuteta ngenteto ezintsha; 
Mark16:18 baya kucola inyoka; nokuba bayasela into enokubulala, ayisayi kubenzakalisa; bobeka izandla pezu kwabafayo, babeya kuzuza ukupila." 
Mark16:19 Kwa nje ke inkosi, emveni kwokuba ibitetile kubo, yamkelwa ezulwini, yahlala pantsi ngasekunene kwotixo." 
Mark16:20 Bapuma ke abo bashumayela ezindaweni zonke, inkosi isebenza kunye nabo, iqinisa nelizwi ngemiqondiso elilandelayo. Amene." 
Luke1:1 NGOKOKUBA abaninzi belingile ukulibeka kunye ngokucwangcisa ilivo lezondawo eziqiniselwe pakati kwetu ngokukolisekileyo," 
Luke1:2 njengokuba bezinikele kuti abo babengababoneli nabakonzi belizwi kutabata ekuqaleni; 
Luke1:3 kwanga kulungile nakum, ndizilandile zonke kwada kwangapambili ngokukutala nje, ukuba ndikuba̔lele zona ngokulandelana, Teyofilusi odumileyo kakulu!" 
Luke1:4 ukuze ukolise ukuyazi inyaniso yezozinto uzifundisiweyo ngomlomo. 
Luke1:5 KWAYE kuko emihleni ka‐Herodi, ukumkani we‐Judeya, umperisite otile ogama lingu‐Zekariya, engowakuso isahlulo sika‐Abiya; nomfazi wake engowasezintombini zika‐Arone, negama lake lingu‐Elizabete." 
Luke1:5 KWAYE kuko emihleni ka‐Herodi, ukumkani we‐Judeya, umperisite otile ogama lingu‐Zekariya, engowakuso isahlulo sika‐Abiya; nomfazi wake engowasezintombini zika‐Arone, negama lake lingu‐Elizabete." 
Luke1:6 Bebelungile bobabini ke ebusweni bukatixo, behamba kuyo yonke imiyalelo nemimiselo yenkosi bengohlwayeki." 
Luke1:7 Baye bengenamntwana, ngenxa yokuba u‐Elizabete ebeludlolo; kanjalo bobabini bebekolisile ukuba nobudala." 
Luke1:8 Kwabekute, ekwenzeni kwake inkonzo yomperisite pambi kwotixo, ngexesha lokukonza kwesahlulo sakowabo," 
Luke1:9 ngokwesiko lobuperisite, wabelwa ngeqashiso ukuqu̔misa, engene endaweni engcwele yenkosi:" 
Luke1:10 waye wonke umhlambi wabantu ubutandaza ngapandle ngexeshana lesiqu̔miso. 
Luke1:11 Kwati kekaloku kwabonakala kuye ingelosi yenkosi, imi ngasekunene kwesibingelo sesiqu̔miso." 
Luke1:12 Waza u‐Zekariya waxaliswa aku yi bona, wawelwa kukwoyika." 
Luke1:13 Koko ingelosi yati kuye: Ungoyiki, Zekariya! ngokuba isikungo sako siviwe; woti ke umfazi wako u‐Elizabete akuzalele unyana, wauya kubiza igama lake ngo‐Johane." 
Luke1:14 Kanjalo wena woba novuyo nomgcobo, bati nabaninzi bavuyele ukuzalwa kwake." 
Luke1:15 Ngokuba eya kuba mkulu ebusweni benkosi; angaseli ke neveyine notywala; waeya kuzaliswa ngomoya oyingcwele esapuma esizalweni sonina. 
Luke1:16 Nabaninzi bosapo luka‐Sirayeli wobaguqulela kwinkosi, utixo wabo." 
Luke1:17 Waeya kuhamba pambi kwayo emoyeni nasemandleni ka‐Elija, ukuba intliziyo zoyise aziguqulele kubantwana, nabangevayo abaguqulele ebutelekelelweni babalungileyo, ukuba alungisele inkosi abantu abalungiselelweyo." 
Luke1:18 Waza wati u‐Zekariya kuyo ingelosi: Ndiya kukwazi oku ngandawo nina? ngokuba ndilixego mna, nomfazi wam ekolisile ukuba nobudala." 
Luke1:19 Yaza yapendula ingelosi yati kuye: Mna ndingu‐Gabriyeli omiyo ngasebusweni bukatixo; ndanditunywa ukuba nditete kuwe, nokuba ndikushumayeze ezindaba ezimnandi." 
Luke1:20 Kekaloku bona ke, woba usiti cwaka, ukohlwa nokuteta, kude kube yimini eziya kuba zenzekile ezizinto; ngenxa yokokuba ubungakolwanga ngamazwi am, aya kuzalisekiswa wona ngexesha lawo." 
Luke1:21 Kekaloku abantu bebemlinda u‐Zekariya, batela nqa ukulibala kwake endaweni eyingcwele." 
Luke1:22 Wati ke akupuma, wakohlwa ukuteta kubo; baza banakana ukuba ubonile isibonakalo endaweni eyingcwele; wabe ke yena eman’ ukukoba kubo, wahlala esidenge." 
Luke1:23 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni ibizalisekile imihla yesikonzo sake, wemkela endlwini yake." 
Luke1:24 Kekaloku emveni kwezontsuku wakaula u‐Elizabete umfazi wake, wazifihla kanye inyanga zantlanu, esiti:" 
Luke1:25 Yenje nje inkosi kum emihleni ya ndi kangela ngayo ukususa ihlazo lam pakati kwabantu. 
Luke1:26 Kekaloku ngenyanga yesitandatu ingelosi engu‐Gabriyeli yatunywa ngutixo ukuya esixekweni sase‐Galili, esigama liyi‐Nazarete," 
Luke1:27 kwintombi exanyelweyo indoda egama lingu‐Josefe, ingowendlu ka‐Davide; laye igama lentombi lingu‐Mariya." 
Luke1:28 Yaza yangena ingelosi kuyo, yati: A, wena ukolelweyo! inkosi maibe nawe; utamsanqelekile wena pakati kwabafazi." 
Luke1:29 Yati kekaloku yaku yi bona, yaxaliswa kakulu pezu kwesiteto sayo, yacamanga ukuba ungaba ngoti nina umbuliso lo." 
Luke1:30 Yaza yati ingelosi kuyo: Ungoyiki, Mariya! ngokuba ufumene ufefe kutixo." 
Luke1:31 Kekaloku bona ke, uya kukaula esizalweni sako, uzale unyana, wauya kubiza igama lake ngo— Yesu." 
Luke1:32 Lowo woba mkulu, waeya kubizwa ngokuba ngunyana wopezu kwonke: kanjalo inkosi engutixo iya kumpa iterone ka‐Davide uyise;" 
Luke1:33 waeya kuba ngukumkani pezu kwendlu ka‐Yakobi kude kube ngunapakade; nobukumkani bake abuyi kuba nakupela. 
Luke1:34 Wayesiti u‐Mariya kuyo ingelosi: Kwoti nina ukubako oku, indoda ndingayazi nje?" 
Luke1:35 Yaza yapendula ingelosi yati kuye: Umoya oyingcwele wohla pezu kwako, namandla opezu kwonke okusibekelela; ngoko kanjako lonto ingcwele ezalwayo nguwe iya kubizwa ngokuba ngunyana katixo." 
Luke1:36 Kanjalo bona ke, u‐Elizabete isalamane sako, kwa naye ukaulile unyana ebudaleni bake; kekaloku le iyinyanga yesitandatu kuye obizwa ngokutiwa uludlolo:" 
Luke1:37 ngokuba kungeko nanye into eya kumnqabela utixo. 
Luke1:38 Wayesiti u‐Mariya: Nasi ke isicakakazi senkosi; makube njalo kum njengelizwi lako. Yaza yemka kuye ingelosi. 
Luke1:39 Wati kekaloku u‐Mariya kwezontsuku wesuka waya ezweni lasezintabeni ngobunxamo, esixekweni sakwa‐Juda," 
Luke1:40 wangena endlwini ka‐Zekariya, wambulisa u‐Elizabete." 
Luke1:41 Kwaye kute xeshekweni u‐Elizabete weva umbuliso ka‐Mariya, waxu̔ma umntwana esizalweni sake: waza u‐Elizabete wazaliswa ngomoya oyingcwele," 
Luke1:42 wapakamisa ukuteta ngelizwi elikulu, wati: Utamsanqelekile wena pakati kwabafazi, sitamsanqelekile nesixakato sesizalo sako." 
Luke1:43 Kuti nina ke ukundihlela oku, ukuba unina wenkosi yam eze kum?" 
Luke1:44 Ngokuba bona ke, xeshekweni ilizwi lombuliso wako langena ezindlebeni zam, umntwana waxu̔ma ngomgcobo esizalweni sam." 
Luke1:45 Unetamsanqa ke lowo okoliweyo; ngokuba kuya kubako ukufezwa kwezinto ezitetiweyo kuye zivela enkosini. 
Luke1:46 Waza wati u‐Mariya: Umpefumlo wam uyazukisa inkosi," 
Luke1:47 nomoya wam ugcobile kutixo umsindisi wam; 
Luke1:48 ukuba ebukangele ubupantsi besicakakazi sake: ngokuba bona ke, emveni kwakaloku nje zonke izizukulwana ziya kuti ndinetamsanqa." 
Luke1:49 Ngokuba usomandla endenzele izinto ezinkulu; lingcwele ke igama lake: 
Luke1:50 nobubele bake bupezu kwabamoyikayo kwizizukulwana ngezizukulwana. 
Luke1:51 Wenzile ngamandla ngengalo yake: ubaci̔tile abaner̔atshi ekucingeni kwentliziyo zabo. 
Luke1:52 Abanobukosi ubawisile eziteroneni, nabapantsi ubapakamisile." 
Luke1:53 Abalambileyo ubahlutisile ngento ezilungileyo, nabazityebi ubandulule bengenanto." 
Luke1:54 Umxasile u‐Sirayeli isicaka sake, ngokukumbula ububele bake," 
Luke1:55 (njengokuba etetile kobawo betu,) ku‐Abrahame nakwinzalo yake kude kube ngunapakade." 
Luke1:56 Wati ke u‐Mariya wahlala naye, ngati zantatu inyanga, waza wabuyela endlwini yake." 
Luke1:57 Kekaloku u‐Elizabete lamzalisekelwa ixesha lokuba azale, wazala unyana ke." 
Luke1:58 Baza abo babehleli kufupi, nabalamane bake, beva okokuba inkosi ibenze bukulu ububele bake ngakuye, bavuyelana naye." 
Luke1:59 Kwaye kute ngomhla wesibozo, beza ukuza ukwalusa umntwana; babembiza ke ngo‐Zekariya, ngegama likayise." 
Luke1:60 Waza wapendula unina wati: Nakanye; koko aya kubizwa ngo‐Johane. 
Luke1:61 Baza bati kuye: Akuko namnye pakati kwabalamane bako obizwa ngeligama. 
Luke1:62 Baye bekoba ke kuyise, ukuba unga angatiwa nina ukubizwa." 
Luke1:63 Waza wabiza icwecwana, waba̔la, esiti: Ngu‐Johane igama lake. Bati nqa ke bonke." 
Luke1:64 Waseluvulwa umlomo wake oko, nolwimi lwake lwatukululwa, wateta, embonga utixo." 
Luke1:65 Kwaza kwehla ulwoyiko pezu kwabo bonke ababehleli kufupi nabo; nakulo lonke ilizwe lasezintabeni lase‐Judeya zibe zivakaliswa zonke ezizinto. 
Luke1:65 Kwaza kwehla ulwoyiko pezu kwabo bonke ababehleli kufupi nabo; nakulo lonke ilizwe lasezintabeni lase‐Judeya zibe zivakaliswa zonke ezizinto. 
Luke1:66 Kanjalo bonke ababezivile bazibekela ezintliziyweni zabo, besiti: Woda ati nina umntwana lo? Saye isandla senkosi sibe sinaye." 
Luke1:67 Waza u‐Zekariya uyise wazaliswa ngomoya oyingcwele, waprofitesha, esiti:" 
Luke1:68 Maibongwe inkosi, utixo wo‐Sirayeli, ukuba ibakangele yabenzela inkululwa abantu bayo," 
Luke1:69 yasipakamisela upondo lwosindiso endlwini ka‐Davide isicaka sayo; 
Luke1:70 (njengokuba itetile ngomlomo wabaprofite bayo abangcwele bakudala;) 
Luke1:71 size sisindiswe ezintshabeni zetu, nasesandleni sabo bonke abasitiyayo:" 
Luke1:72 ukuba ibenzele ububele obawo betu, nokuba ikumbule ucebano lwayo olungcwele;" 
Luke1:73 isifungo eyasifungela u‐Abrahame ubawo wetu," 
Luke1:74 sokuba isipe ukuti, sihlangulwe esandleni sentshaba zetu, siyikonze singenakwoyika," 
Luke1:75 ngobungcwele nangobulungisa pambi kwayo, yonke imihla yokudla kwetu ubomi." 
Luke1:76 Nawe, mntwana! uya kubizwa ngokuba ngumprofite wopezu kwonke: ngokuba uya kwandulela pambi kwobuso benkosi ukuya kulungisa indlela zayo;" 
Luke1:77 ukunika abantu bayo ukwaziwa kwosindiswa ngokuxolelwa kwezono zabo," 
Luke1:78 ngenceba zobubele botixo wetu, ekungazo satyelela kuti isifingo sokusa sivela enyangweni," 
Luke1:79 ukuza kukanyela abo bahleli ebumnyameni nasetunzini lokufa, size inyawo zetu sizikapele endleleni yoxolo." 
Luke1:80 Wati umntwana wakula, waba namandla emoyeni; wayesezintlango apo, kwada kwangumhla wokubonakaliswa kwake ko‐Sirayeli." 
Luke2:1 KWAYE kute kwezontsuku, kwapuma umteto ku‐Kesare Auguste, wokuba lonke ilizwe maliba̔lelwe." 
Luke2:2 (Esi isiba̔lelo senzeka kuqala nxa u‐Kirenusi ebengumpati we‐Siriya.) 
Luke2:3 Baza baya bonke ukuya kuba̔lelwa, abanye ngabanye kwezakowabo izixeko." 
Luke2:4 Wati kekaloku no‐Josefe wenyuka e‐Galili, esixekweni se‐Nazarete, waya e‐Judeya, esixekweni sika‐Davide, esibizwa nge‐Beteleheme, (ngenxa yokuba ebengowendlu nesizalwane sika‐Davide,)" 
Luke2:4 Wati kekaloku no‐Josefe wenyuka e‐Galili, esixekweni se‐Nazarete, waya e‐Judeya, esixekweni sika‐Davide, esibizwa nge‐Beteleheme, (ngenxa yokuba ebengowendlu nesizalwane sika‐Davide,)" 
Luke2:5 ukuya kuba̔lelwa kunye nomfazi wake oxanyiweyo, ekulelwe yena." 
Luke2:6 Kwaye kute bakuba bebekona, zazaliseka imihla yokuba azale." 
Luke2:7 Waza wazala unyana wake owamazibulo, wamsongela eziqiyeni, wamlalisa emkombeni wesitale; ngokuba bebengenandawo pakati entangeni." 
Luke2:8 Kwaye kuko abalusi kwelona lizwe, behlala ezindle, belinda umhlambi wabo ngamavaṙasho obusuku." 
Luke2:9 Yati bona ke, ingelosi yenkosi yeza yema ngakubo, nobungcwalisa benkosi babakanyela ngokungqonga; baza boyika ngokwoyika okukulu." 
Luke2:10 Yayisiti kubo ingelosi leyo: Ningoyiki; ngokuba, bona ke, ndinishumayeza indaba zovuyo olukulu, oluya kuba lolwabantu bonke." 
Luke2:11 Ngokokuba nizalelwe namhla umsindisi, ongu‐Kristu inkosi, esixekweni sika‐Davide." 
Luke2:12 Kanjalo oku kwoba ngumqondiso kuni: Niya kufumana usana lusongiwe eziqiyeni, lulele emkombeni wesitale." 
Luke2:13 Kwaza kwabako ngokwalama ndawonye nayo ingelosi into eninzi yomkosi wasezulwini, bedumisa utixo, besiti nokuti:" 
Luke2:14 Makubeko ubungcwalisa kutixo enyangweni yapezulu, noxolo emhlabeni, ufefe ebantwini!" 
Luke2:15 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni zibe zimkile kubo ingelosi zaya ezulwini, bandula abalusi bati omnye kwomnye: Makesiye kambe kwa se‐Beteleheme, size siyibone lento ihlileyo, esazisiwe yona yinkosi." 
Luke2:16 Basuka beza ngokunxama, bafumana kwa no‐Mariya no‐Josefe, nosana lulele emkombeni wesitale." 
Luke2:17 Bati ke bakubona, bavakalisa ilizwi elalitetwa kubo ngaye umntwana lo." 
Luke2:18 Baza bonke abo bevayo bazitela nqa izinto ezazitetwa kubo ngabalusi. 
Luke2:19 Kodwa u‐Mariya wazigcinela zonke ezizinto, wazilinganisa entliziyweni yake." 
Luke2:20 Baza babuya abalusi, bebonga bedumisa utixo ngenxa yazo zonke izinto ababezivile nababezibonile, njengokuba kube kutyelwe kubo." 
Luke2:21 Kekaloku okuya ibizalisekile imihla esibozo yokuba umntwana aluswe, landula labizwa igama lake ngo‐Yesu, elibe libizwa njalo yingelosi engekakaulwa esizalweni." 
Luke2:22 Kekaloku okuya ibizalisekile imihla yokuhlanjululwa kwabo, ngokwomteto ka‐Mosesi, bamnyusela e‐Yerusaleme, ukuba bammisele enkosini;" 
Luke2:23 (njengokuba kuba̔liwe emtetweni wenkosi ukuti: Konke okubudoda ekuzityulwa ngako kwobizwa ngokuba ngcwele kuyehova;) 
Luke2:24 nokuba banikele idini, njengoko kutshiwo emtetweni wenkosi ukuti: Isibini samahobe, umhlaumbi amatole amabini amazuba." 
Luke2:25 Kekaloku bona ke, bekuko umntu e‐Yerusaleme, ogama lingu‐Simone; waye umntu lowo elungile ebubedesho, elinda ulwonwabiso lwo‐Sirayeli; kanjalo umoya oyingcwele ebepezu kwake." 
Luke2:26 Kwaye kutyilelwa yena ngumoya oyingcwele, ukuba akayi kubona kufa engekaboni u‐Kristu wenkosi." 
Luke2:27 Weza ke ngomoya etempileni: kekaloku nxa oyise babengenisa umntwana u‐Yesu, ukuba bamenzele ngesiko lomteto," 
Luke2:28 wandula yena wamtabatela ezingalweni zake, wambonga utixo, wati:" 
Luke2:29 Kaloku uyasindulula isicaka sako, Nkosi! ngoxolo, njengokwelizwi lako:" 
Luke2:30 ngokuba amehlo am ebonile usindiso lwako," 
Luke2:31 olo ululungisileyo ngasebusweni bezizwe zonke; 
Luke2:32 ukanyiso lwokutyilela abaheyideni, nolwobungcwalisa babantu bako o‐Sirayeli." 
Luke2:33 Babesiti nqa ke u‐Josefe nonina pezu kwezinto ezibe zitetwa ngaye. 
Luke2:34 Waza u‐Simone wabatamsanqelisa, wati ku‐Mariya unina: Bona ke, lo ubekelwe ukuwa nokupakama kwabaninzi kwa‐Sirayeli, nomqondiso ekupikwa nawo;" 
Luke2:35 (ewe, nowako umpefumlo isiṙele sowuhlaba;) ukuze kube kutyilwa izicamango zentliziyo ezininzi." 
Luke2:36 Kwabekuko kanjalo u‐Ana umprofitekazi, intombi ka‐Fanuweli, owesizwe sika‐Ashere: yena lo ebekolisile ukuba nobudala kakulu, obehleli nendoda iminyaka yasixe̔nxe itabata ebuntombini bake:" 
Luke2:37 wayengumhlolokazi weminyaka engati imashumi asibozo anesine, owahlala engemki etempileni, ekonza u‐Tixo ngokuzila ukutya nangokukunga ebusuku nasemini." 
Luke2:38 Wati lo emi kufupi nje kwa ngeloxeshana wabulela enkosini naye, wateta ngayo kubo bonke ababelinda inkululwa e‐Yerusaleme." 
Luke2:39 Kekaloku xeshekweni bebegqibele zonke izinto ezinjengokwomteto wenkosi, babuyela e‐Galili, esixekweni sabo e‐Nazarete." 
Luke2:40 Wati umntwana wakula, waba namandla emoyeni, ezaliswa ngobulumko; nofefe lukatixo lwalupezu kwake." 
Luke2:41 Kekaloku oyise bake bebesiya iminyaka ngeminyaka e‐Yerusaleme ngomtendeleko wepasika. 
Luke2:42 Wati akuba yiminyaka ilishumi linamibini ubudala bake, nxa bebenyukele e‐Yerusaleme ngokwesiko lomtendeleko," 
Luke2:43 nanxa bebefezile imihla, ekubuyeni kwabo, wasala umntwana u‐Yesu e‐Yerusaleme; baye bengazi u‐Josefe nonina." 
Luke2:44 Kodwa beba usemhlambini wabahambi baya ihambo yosuku lunye, baza bamfuna pakati kwabalamane babo napakati kwababesazana nabo." 
Luke2:45 Bati bengamfumananga nje, babuyela e‐Yerusaleme, bemfuna." 
Luke2:46 Kwaza kwati emveni kwentsuku ntatu, bamfumana etempileni, ehleli pakati kwabafundisi, esiva bona, ebuza nokubuza kubo." 
Luke2:47 Baye benokuti nqa ke bonke abo babemva, pezu kwokuqonda kwake nemipendulo yake." 
Luke2:48 Bati bakumbona, bamangaliswa; waza unina wati kuye: Nyana! wasenzela njalo nganina? bona ke, uyihlo nam, besikufuna sidandatekile." 
Luke2:49 Waza wati kubo: Yinina ukuba nibe nindifuna? nibe ningazi na ukuba ndifanele ukuba sendlwini kabawo? 
Luke2:50 Abaliqonda ke bona ilizwi walitetayo kubo. 
Luke2:51 Waza wehla nabo, weza e‐Nazarete, wabalulamela: wati kekaloku unina wazigcina zonke ezizinto entliziyweni yake." 
Luke2:52 Waye u‐Yesu emana ehambisa ebulumkweni nasebudeni, naselufefeni pambi kwotixo na pambi kwabantu." 
Luke3:1 KEKALOKU ngomnyaka weshumi linesihlanu wobukosi buka‐Tiberiyusi Kesare, u‐Pontiyusi Pilati engumpati we‐Judeya, no‐Herodi eyinkosi ye‐Galili, no‐Filipi umzalwana wake eyinkosi ye‐Yetureya nelizwe le‐Trakoniti, no‐Lusaniya eyinkosi ye‐Abilene," 
Luke3:1 KEKALOKU ngomnyaka weshumi linesihlanu wobukosi buka‐Tiberiyusi Kesare, u‐Pontiyusi Pilati engumpati we‐Judeya, no‐Herodi eyinkosi ye‐Galili, no‐Filipi umzalwana wake eyinkosi ye‐Yetureya nelizwe le‐Trakoniti, no‐Lusaniya eyinkosi ye‐Abilene," 
Luke3:2 emihleni yabaperisite abakulu u‐Anasi no‐Kayafasi, leza ilizwi likatixo ku‐Johane unyana ka‐Zekariya entlango." 
Luke3:3 Wayesiza kulo lonke ilizwe langase‐Yoredane, eshumayela ubapitizesho lwoguquko, kube kukuxolelwa kwezono;" 
Luke3:4 njengokuba kuba̔liwe encwadini yamazwi ka‐Yisaya umprofite, esiti: Ilizwi lodandulukayo entlango: Lungisani indlela kayehova; yenzani imendo yake ilungelelane." 
Luke3:5 Yonke imifula iya kudityelelwa, nazo zonke intaba nenduli ziya kutotyelwa pantsi; indawo eziligoso zotiwa entse, nezibugongxo zoba zindlela ezigudileyo:" 
Luke3:6 lwaye uluntu lwonke luya kubona usindiso lukatixo. 
Luke3:7 Wandula wati kwizihlwele ezibe zipuma ukuza kubapitizeshwa nguye: Sizukulwanandim senyoka! ngubanina onibonisileyo ukuba nibaleke umsindo oza kuza? 
Luke3:8 Velisani ngoko izixakato eziyelelana noguquko; nize ningaqali ukuti pakati kwenu: Sinaye u‐Abrahame engubawo; ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Utixo angavusela u‐Abrahame usapo kulamatye. 
Luke3:9 Kanjako izembe lise libekwe ngasengcanjeni yemiti: iti ngoko yonke imiti engavelisi izixakato ezilungileyo igaulwe, iposwe emlilweni." 
Luke3:10 Zaza zambuza izihlwele, zisiti: Siya kwenza nto nina pofu?" 
Luke3:11 Wapendula wati kuzo: Onengubo mbini, makabele ongenanye; nalowo unento zokutya, makenze kwa njalo." 
Luke3:12 Kweza nababuti beminikelo ukuba babapitizeshwe, bati kuye: Mfundisi! siya kwenza nto nina?" 
Luke3:13 Wayesiti kubo: Ningabangi into engapezulu kweniyimiselweyo. 
Luke3:14 Kwambuza namasodati, esiti: Nati siya kwenza nto nina? Waza wati kuwo: Ningapangi mntu, ningalumkisi mntu kanjako; ize nitomalale kukuvuzwa kwenu." 
Luke3:15 Kekaloku nxa abantu bebelinda, nanxa bonke bebecamanga ezintliziyweni zabo ngaye u‐Johane, ukuba umhlaumbi yena angaba nguye u‐Kristu na;" 
Luke3:16 wapendula u‐Johane kwa kubo bonke, esiti: Mna okunene ndiyanibapitizesha ngamanzi; kodwa uyeza onamandla amakulu kwawam, endingafanelekile ukuba ndiwutukulule umtya wezihlangu zake; yena wonibapitizesha ngomoya oyingcwele nangomlilo:" 
Luke3:17 omnyazi wokwela usesandleni sake, waeya kucokisa isibaya sake, ati inqolowa ayihlanganisele esiseleni sake, kodwa umququ wowutshisa ngomlilo ongacimekiyo." 
Luke3:18 Kwa nje ke e ba yala nangezinye izinto ezininzi ebeshumayela ivangeli ebantwini. 
Luke3:19 (Kodwa u‐Herodi inkosi, esohlwaywa nguye, ngaye u‐Herodiya umfazi ka‐Filipi umninawe wake, nangazo zonke izinto ezikohlakeleyo abezenzile u‐Herodi," 
Luke3:20 wongezelela nalento pezu kwazo zonke, yokuba wamvalela entolongweni u‐Johane.)" 
Luke3:21 Kwaye kute kekaloku, nxa bebebapitizeshiwe bonke abantu, ebapitizeshiwe u‐Yesu naye, etandaza nokutandaza, lavuleka izulu," 
Luke3:22 wehla umoya oyingcwele ngokubonakala okungumzimbaṙa njengehobe pezu kwake, leza nelizwi livela ezulwini, lisiti: Wena ungunyana wam otandiweyo, ndikolisiwe kakuhle nguwe." 
Luke3:23 Waye yena u‐Yesu wayeyiminyaka engati ngamashumi matatu ubudala bake akuqala ukufundisa, enguye (njengokuba kube kusitwa) unyana ka‐Josefe, obengoka‐Heli," 
Luke3:24 obengoka‐Matati, obengoka‐Levi, obengoka‐Maleki, obengoka‐Jana, obengoka‐Josefe," 
Luke3:25 obengoka‐Matitiya, obengoka‐Amotse, obengoka‐Nahume, obengoka‐Esili, obengoka‐Nagai," 
Luke3:26 obengoka‐Mahati, obengoka‐Matitiya, obengoka‐Shimehi, obengoka‐Josefe, obengoka‐Juda," 
Luke3:27 obengoka‐Johanane, obengoka‐Resa, obengoka‐Zerubabeli, obengoka‐Shalatiyeli, obengoka‐Neri," 
Luke3:28 obengoka‐Maleki, obengoka‐Adi, obengoka‐Kosame, obengoka‐Elemodame, obengoka‐Here," 
Luke3:29 obengoka‐Jose, obengoka‐Eliyezeri, obengoka‐Yorime, obengoka‐Matati, obengoka‐Levi," 
Luke3:30 obengoka‐Simone, obengoka‐Juda, obengoka‐Josefe, obengoka‐Jonane, obengoka‐Eliyakime," 
Luke3:31 obengoka‐Meleya, obengoka‐Menane, obengoka‐Matata, obengoka‐Natane, obengoka‐Davide," 
Luke3:32 obengoka‐Jese, obengoka‐Obedi, obengoka‐Bohazi, obengoka‐Salimone, obengoka‐Nahashone," 
Luke3:33 obengoka‐Haminadabi, obengoka‐Rame, obengoka‐Hetserone, obengoka‐Faretse, obengoka‐Juda," 
Luke3:34 obengoka‐Yakobi, obengoka‐Yisake, obengoka‐Abrahame, obengoka‐Tera, obengoka‐Nahore," 
Luke3:35 obengoka‐Seruge, obengoka‐Rehu, obengoka‐Pelege, obengoka‐Hebere, obengoka‐Sala," 
Luke3:36 obengoka‐Kenane, obengoka‐Rafatsade, obengoka‐Sheme, obengoka‐Nowa, obengoka‐Lameki," 
Luke3:37 obengoka‐Metushela, obengoka‐Enoki, obengoka‐Yeredi, obengoka‐Mahalalele, obengoka‐Kenane," 
Luke3:38 obengoka‐Enoshe, obengoka‐Shete, obengoka‐Adame, obengoka— Tixo." 
Luke4:1 KEKALOKU u‐Yesu, ezele ngumoya oyingcwele, wabuya e‐Yoredane; waza wasiwa ngomoya entlango," 
Luke4:2 elingwa ngu‐Satane intsuku zimashumi mane. Akatya nto ke kwezontsuku: wati zakuba zipelile, wada walamba." 
Luke4:3 Waza u‐Satane wati kuye: Ukuba ungunyana katixo, xela kwilitye eli ukuba lenziwe isonka." 
Luke4:4 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu kuye, esiti: Kuba̔liwe ukuti: Akungaso isonka sodwa aya kupila umntu, koko kungawo onke amazwi katixo."
