Luke4:5 Waza u‐Satane wamnyusela entabeni ende, wambonisa bonke ubukumkani belizwe ngexanyana linye." 
Luke4:6 Waza u‐Satane wati kuye: Ndiya kunika kuwe lamandla onke, nobungcwalisa babo; ngokuba enikelwe kum, nalowo enditanda ukumnika wona ndiyawanika kuye:" 
Luke4:7 wena ngoko ukuba uya kundibedesha, kwoba kokwako konke." 
Luke4:8 Waza u‐Yesu wapendula wati kuye: Yiya emva kwam, Satane! ngokuba kuba̔liwe ngokuti: Uya kubedesha uyehova, utixo wako, umkonze yena yedwa." 
Luke4:9 Kanjalo wamsa e‐Yerusaleme, wammisa pezu kwepiko letempile, wati kuye: Ukuba ungunyana katixo, ziwise pantsi kwa lapa;" 
Luke4:10 ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Uya kuyalela ingelosi zake ngawe, ukuba zikugcine:" 
Luke4:11 nokuti: Zokufunqula ngezandla, hleze uku̔bekise unyawo lwako ngasetyeni." 
Luke4:12 Waza u‐Yesu wapendula wati kuye: Kutshiwo ukuti: Akuyi kumlinga uyehova, utixo wako." 
Luke4:13 Wati kekaloku u‐Satane, akuba egqibile konke ukulinga kwake, wemka kuye kwamzuzu." 
Luke4:14 WAZA wabuya u‐Yesu ngamandla omoya weza e‐Galili; kwaye kupuma udumo ngaye lwaya kulo lonke ilizwe langakona. 
Luke4:15 Wabefundisa ezindlwini zentlanganiso zabo, edunyiswa ngabo bonke." 
Luke4:16 Waza wafika e‐Nazarete, apo abe ondlelwe kona: wati kekaloku, njengokuba belinjalo isiko lake, wangena endlwini yentlanganiso ngomhla wesabata, wesuka wema ukuba aleseshe." 
Luke4:17 Kwaza kwamnikelwa incwadi ka‐Yisaya umprofite. Wati akuba eyitwabulule incwadi, wafumana londawo apo bekuba̔lelwe kona ngokuti:" 
Luke4:18 Umoya kayehova upezu kwam; ngokokuba enditambisele ukushumayela indaba ezimnandi kumahlwempu; unditumele ukupilisa abantliziyo zigqobokileyo, ukushumayela kwabatinjiweyo inkululeko, nakwabazimfama ukubuyiswa kwokubona, ukundulula abancinezelweyo bekululekile," 
Luke4:19 ukushumayela umnyaka okolekileyo kayehova. 
Luke4:20 Waza wasonga incwadi, wayinikela kanjako kumkonzi, wahlala pantsi. Bati bonke abasendlwini yentlanganiso amehlo abo ati nama pezu kwake." 
Luke4:21 Waza waqala ukuti kubo: Namhla nje sizalisekile isiba̔lo esi ezindlebeni zenu. 
Luke4:22 Babemnqi̔nela bonke ke, bawatela nqa amazwi ofefe apumayo emlonyeni wake, bati: Lo asi nguye na unyana ka‐Josefe?" 
Luke4:23 Waza wati kubo: Nowuteta kum kambe lomzekeliswana wokuti: Gqir̔a! zipilise: konke esivileyo ukuba kwenziwe e‐Kapenayume, kwenze nalapa emzini wakowenu." 
Luke4:24 Wati kanjako: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Akuko mprofite okolekileyo emzini wakowabo. 
Luke4:25 Kodwa ngokwenyaniso nditi kuni: Bebeko abahlolokazi abaninzi emihleni ka‐Elija kwa‐Sirayeli, okuya lalivingcekile izulu ngeminyaka mitatu inenyanga zintandatu, xeshekweni yabiko indlala enkulu kulo lonke ilizwe;" 
Luke4:26 kanti u‐Elija wayengatunywa nakomnye kubo, watunywa e‐Tsarefate yase‐Tsidone kumfazi obe ngumhlolokazi kupela." 
Luke4:27 Kanjalo ebeko amaleperi amaninzi ngexesha lika‐Elisha umprofite kwa‐Sirayeli; kanti kwaye kungahlanjwa nalinye kuwo, kwahlanjwa u‐Nahamane um‐Siriya kupela." 
Luke4:28 Baza bati bonke abasendlwini yentlanganiso, bakuva ezizinto, bazaliswa ngumsindo," 
Luke4:29 besuka, bamku̔pela pandle kwesixeko, bamr̔olela kwa semgcipekweni wentaba esibe sakiwe pezu kwayo isixeko sabo, ukuze bamkahlele pantsi." 
Luke4:30 Kodwa yena ecandile pakati kwabo wemka. 
Luke4:31 Waza wehlela e‐Kapenayume, isixeko sase‐Galili, wabafundisa ngemihla yesabata." 
Luke4:32 Baye bemangaliswa ke pezu kwesifundiso sake, ngokuba ilizwi lake belinegunya." 
Luke4:33 Kwaye kuko endlwini yentlanganiso umntu obenomoya wedemoni enco̔lileyo; waza wadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu," 
Luke4:34 esiti: Yeka! siyinto nina kuwe, Yesu wase‐Nazarete? uze kusitshabalalisa na? ndiyakwazi wena ungubanina, ungoyingcwele katixo." 
Luke4:35 Waza u‐Yesu wamtetisa, esiti: Yiti cwaka, upume kuye. Yaza idemoni yakuba ibimwisile pakati yapuma kuye, ingamenzanga nto." 
Luke4:36 Bahlelwa kukuti nqa ke bonke, batetana omnye nomnye, besiti: Lelanina ilizwi eli, ukuba ebayalela omoya abanco̔lileyo ngegunya nangamandla, bapume ke?" 
Luke4:37 Lwaza lwapuma udumo ngaye lwaya kuzo zonke indawo zelizwe langakona. 
Luke4:38 Wati esukile endlwini yentlanganiso, wangena endlwini ka‐Simone. Kekaloku umkwekazi ka‐Simone wabebanjwa licesine elikulu; baza bamtandaza ngaye." 
Luke4:39 Waza wamongamela, watetisa icesine, lamyeka ke: waselesuka oko wabakonza." 
Luke4:40 Kekaloku nxa ilanga belitshona, bati bonke abo babenabo ababesifa zizifo ngezifo, babazisa kuye; waza wabeka izandla zake pezu kwabo ngabanye ngabanye, wabapilisa." 
Luke4:41 Kanjalo nedemoni zapuma kubaninzi, zidanduluka, zisiti nokuti: Wena unguye u‐Kristu, unyana katixo. Waza wati ezitetisa akazivumela ukuba zitete, ngokuba zibe zimazi ukuba unguye u‐Kristu." 
Luke4:42 Kekaloku kwakuba kusile, wapuma waya endaweni elubala; zaza izihlwele zamfuna, zeza kwa kuye, zambambezela ukuba angemki kuzo." 
Luke4:43 Koko wati kuzo: Ndifanele ukushumayela indaba ezilungileyo zobukumkani bukatixo nakwezinye izixeko; ngokuba nditunyelwe oku. 
Luke4:44 Waza washumayela ezindlwini zentlanganiso zase‐Galili. 
Luke5:1 KWAYE kute xeshekweni isihlwele sibe simxingisa ukuza kuva ilizwi likatixo, ebemi yena ngaselwandlana lwe‐Genesarete," 
Luke5:2 wabona inqanawa zambini zimi ngaselwandlana apo; kodwa abalobi bentlanzi bebepumile kuzo, bahlanza intambo zabo." 
Luke5:3 Wati engene kwenye yenqanawa, kuleyo ebiyeka‐Simone, wamtandaza ukuba makaqu̔be emhlabeni kube mganyana: waza wahlala pantsi, wafundisa izihlwele esenqanaweni." 
Luke5:4 Kekaloku nxa abepezile ukuteta, wati ku‐Simone: Qu̔belani enzulwini, nihlise intambo zenu kulotywe." 
Luke5:5 Waza wapendula u‐Simone wati kuye: Nkosi! ngobubusuku bonke sisebenzile singabambanga nto; kodwa ngelizwi lako ndiya kuhlisa utambo. 
Luke5:6 Bati bakwenje njalo, bavingcela ndawonye into eninzi kakulu yentlanzi; lwafun’ ukuqauka ke utambo lwabo." 
Luke5:7 Baza bakobela abalingane babo ababekwenye inqanawa, ukuba beze bancedane nabo. Basuka beza; baza bazalisa inqanawa zombini, zada zafun’ ukutshona." 
Luke5:8 Wati u‐Simone Petrosi akubona oko, wawa pantsi ngasemadolweni ka‐Yesu, esiti: Mka kum, ngokuba ndiyindoda engumoni, Nkosi!" 
Luke5:9 Ngokuba ebebanjwe kukuti nqa, nabo bonke abebenaye, pezu kwokulotywa kwentlanzi ababekulobile:" 
Luke5:10 bebenjalo kwa no‐Yakobi no‐Johane, onyana baka‐Zebedi, abebengamakolwane no‐Simone. Waza u‐Yesu wati ku‐Simone: Ungoyiki; emveni kwakaloku nje woba ubamba abantu." 
Luke5:11 Bati bakuba bezifikisile inqanawa ngasemhlabeni, bashiya kwa konke, bamlandela." 
Luke5:12 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni ebesesixekweni esitile, kekaloku bona ke, indoda ezele sisilepero ibikona; eyati yakubona u‐Yesu, yawa ngobuso, yamkunga, isiti: Nkosi! ukuba uyatanda, ungandihlambulula." 
Luke5:13 Waza wasolula isandla, wayicu̔kumisa, esitsho ukuti: Ndiyatanda; hlambuluka. Sati ke kwa oko semka kuyo isilepero sayo." 
Luke5:14 Waza wayiyalela ukuba ingamxeleli mntu: kodwa yiya uzibonakalise kumperisite, unikele ngenxa yokuhlanjululwa kwako, njengokuba wabeyalela u‐Mosesi, kube sisinqi̔no kubo." 
Luke5:15 Koko bekuhanjiswa ngakumbi indaba ngaye: zaza zabutana izihlwele ezikulu ukuza kuva, nokupiliswa nguye ezilwelweni zazo." 
Luke5:16 Wabesiti kodwa yena wapambukela ezindaweni ezilubala, watandaza." 
Luke5:17 Kwaza kwati ngemini etile, nxa abefundisa yena, babe behleli kona abafarisi nabafundisimteto, abebevele kuyo yonke imizi yase‐Galili, nase‐Judeya, nase‐Yerusaleme: kanjalo amandla enkosi ebeko ukubapilisa." 
Luke5:17 Kwaza kwati ngemini etile, nxa abefundisa yena, babe behleli kona abafarisi nabafundisimteto, abebevele kuyo yonke imizi yase‐Galili, nase‐Judeya, nase‐Yerusaleme: kanjalo amandla enkosi ebeko ukubapilisa." 
Luke5:18 Kekaloku bona ke, amadoda atile abezisa pezu kwoku̔ko umntu obenesifo sokushwabanisa, afuna ukumngenisa nokumbeka ebusweni bake." 
Luke5:19 Aza ati, engafumananga indawo angamngenisayo ngayo ngenxa yesihlwele, enyukele pezu kwentungo yendlu, amhlisa ngezitene zokufulela kunye noku̔ko lwake, ambeka pakati apo pambi kwo‐Yesu." 
Luke5:20 Waza wabona ukolo lwawo, wati kuye: Mntundini! uxolelwe izono zako." 
Luke5:21 Baza ababa̔li nabafarisi baqala ukucamanga, besiti: Ngubanina lo uziteta ingxeko? ngubanina ongazixolelayo izono, kupela utixo yedwa?" 
Luke5:22 Wazinakana u‐Yesu izicamango zabo, wapendula wati kubo: Nicamanga nto nina ezintliziyweni zenu?" 
Luke5:23 okona kulula kukupina; ukuti: Uxolelwe izono zako; ukuti: Suka, uhambe; kusinina?" 
Luke5:24 kodwa ukuze nazi ukuba unyana wesintu unegunya emhlabeni ukuxolela izono, (wati konesifo sokushwabanisa:) nditi kuwe: Suka, upate uku̔ko lwako, uye endlwini yako." 
Luke5:25 Waselesuka ke ebusweni babo, wapata lonto wabelele pezu kwayo, wemka waya endlwini yake, edumisa utixo." 
Luke5:26 Baza kwa bonke babanjwa kukuti nqa, badumisa utixo; bazaliswa kukwoyika kanjalo, besiti: Sibone into ezimangalisayo namhla nje." 
Luke5:27 Wati emveni kwezizinto wapuma, wabona umbuti weminikelo, ogama lingu‐Levi, ehleli endaweni yokwamkela iminikelo, wati kuye: Ndilandele." 
Luke5:28 Washiya konke ke, wesuka, wamlandela." 
Luke5:29 Waza u‐Levi wamenzela isidlo esikulu endlwini yake: kwaye kuko umhlambi omkulu wababuti beminikelo, nowabanye, abebehleli pantsi nabo." 
Luke5:30 Baza ababa̔li bakubo, kwa nabafarisi, baṙoṙa kubadisipile bake, besiti: Kunganina ukuba nitye nisele kunye nababuti beminikelo naboni?" 
Luke5:31 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Abapilileyo abasweli gqir̔a; ngabafayo abalisweleyo. 
Luke5:32 Andizanga ukubiza abalungileyo, koko ndize ukubiza aboni baguquke." 
Luke5:33 Kekaloku bati kuye: Kunganina ukuba abadisipile baka‐Johane bazile ukutya futi, benze nezikungo, kwa nababa‐Farisi kanjalo, kanti abako bayatya basele?" 
Luke5:34 Koko wati kubo: Usapo lwenkambili yomtshakazi ningalwenza luzile ukutya na, oko umyeni analo?" 
Luke5:35 Kodwa iya kuza imihla nokuya umyeni aya kususwa kulo; luya kwandula luzile ukutya kuleyomihla ke. 
Luke5:36 Wabeteta nomzekeliso kubo, esiti: Akuko mntu ubeka isiziba sengubo entsha engutyeni endala; okanye, iti entsha iṙazule endala, nakanjako isiziba esisesentsha asilungelelani nendala." 
Luke5:37 Kanjalo akuko mntu uta̔ iveyine entsha ezintsubeni ezindala; okanye, iveyine entsha yozigqoboza intsuba, ize ipalale yona, zitshabalale nentsuba;" 
Luke5:38 koko iveyine entsha ifanel’ ukuti̔wa ezintsubeni ezikwa zintsha, zandul’ ukugcinwa zombini." 
Luke5:39 Kanjalo akuko mntu oti akuba esele iveyine endala, asuke afune entsha; ngokuba esiti: Endala igqitisile ngokulunga." 
Luke6:1 KWAYE kute ngesabata yokuqala emveni kweyesibini imini yepasika, ebecanda emasimini: baza abadisipile bake baka izikwebu, batya, behlikihla ngezandla." 
Luke6:2 Koko abatile bakubafarisi bati kubo: Yinina ukuba nikwenze oko ekungafanelekile ukukwenza ngemini yesabata? 
Luke6:3 Waza u‐Yesu wapendula kubo, wati: Anike nileseshe oku na, owakwenzayo u‐Davide, okuya wabelambile yena nabo babenaye;" 
Luke6:4 okokuba wangena endlwini katixo, watabata izonka zokubonakala, waza watya, wanika nabo babenaye kanjalo, ekungafanelekile ukuba zityiwe, kupela ngabaperisite bodwa?" 
Luke6:5 Wabesiti kubo kanjalo: Unyana wesintu uyinkosi yesabata nayo. 
Luke6:6 Kwaye kute nangenye isabata, wangena endlwini yentlanganiso, wafundisa. Kekaloku bekuko kona umntu osandla sokunene sibe sishwabene." 
Luke6:7 Bati ababa̔li nabafarisi bamgqala, ukuba uya kupilisa na ngesabata, ukuze bafumane into yokumnika ityala ngayo." 
Luke6:8 Kodwa yena ebesazi izicamango zabo, wati emntwini obenesandla esishwabeneyo: Suka, ume pakati. Usukile ke wema." 
Luke6:9 Wandula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Ndobuza kuni into ibe nye: Kufanelekile ngemini yesabata ukwenza okulungileyo, ukwenza okukohlakeleyo, kusinina? ukulondoloza ubomi, ukububisa, kusinina?" 
Luke6:10 Waza ebasingasingele bonke wati emntwini: Yolula isandla sako. Wenje njalo ke; saza isandla sake sabuya senziwa sipilile njengesinye. 
Luke6:11 Kodwa bona bazaliswa bubugeza, batetana omnye nomnye, ukuba bangenza nto nina ku‐Yesu." 
Luke6:12 Kwaye kute ngaleyomihla, wapumela entabeni ukuya kutandaza, wadlulisa ubusuku bonke ekutandazeni kutixo." 
Luke6:13 Kwaza kwati kwakuba kusile, wabiza abadisipile bake, wanyula kubo ishumi linababini, owabanikayo negama labapostile:" 
Luke6:14 u‐Simone, (owamnikayo negama lika‐Petrosi,) no‐Andreya umninawe wake; u‐Yakobi, no‐Johane; u‐Filipi, no‐Batolomeyu;" 
Luke6:15 u‐Mateyu, no‐Tomasi; u‐Yakobi unyana ka‐Alefeyu, no‐Simone obebizwa ngokuti ngumzeloti;" 
Luke6:16 u‐Jude umninawe ka‐Yakobi, no‐Jude Sikariyoti, okwa nguye owaba yingcatsha." 
Luke6:16 u‐Jude umninawe ka‐Yakobi, no‐Jude Sikariyoti, okwa nguye owaba yingcatsha." 
Luke6:17 Waza wehla nabo, wema endaweni ebutafa, kwa nomhlambi wabadisipile bake, nesihlwele esikulu sabantu bevele kuyo yonke i‐Judeya nase‐Yerusaleme, nasezweni lase‐Tire ne‐Tsidone kufupi nolwandle, abebeze ukumva, nokupiliswa ezifeni zabo;" 
Luke6:17 Waza wehla nabo, wema endaweni ebutafa, kwa nomhlambi wabadisipile bake, nesihlwele esikulu sabantu bevele kuyo yonke i‐Judeya nase‐Yerusaleme, nasezweni lase‐Tire ne‐Tsidone kufupi nolwandle, abebeze ukumva, nokupiliswa ezifeni zabo;" 
Luke6:18 nabo abebekatazwa ngomoya abanco̔lileyo; baye bepiliswa ke. 
Luke6:19 Kanjalo sonke isihlwele sasifuna ukumcu̔kumisa; ngokuba kube kupuma amandla kuye, abapilisa bonke." 
Luke6:20 Waza wapakamisa amehlo ake ngakubo abadisipile bake, wati: Ninetamsanqa nina nibuhlwempu; ngokuba bubobenu ubukumkani bukatixo." 
Luke6:21 Ninetamsanqa nina nilambayo kaloku; ngokuba niya kuhlutiswa. Ninetamsanqa nina nililayo kaloku; ngokuba niya kuhleka. 
Luke6:22 Ninetamsanqa, nxa abantu baya kunitiya, nanxa baya kunahlula kubo, banituke, balahle negama lenu njengokuba likohlakele, ngenxa yake unyana wesintu." 
Luke6:23 Vuyani kuleyo imini, nixu̔me ngomgcobo; ngokuba, bona ke, umvuzo wenu umkulu ezulwini; ngokuba oyise babo bebesenza ngokunjalo kubaprofite." 
Luke6:24 Kodwa hai ubunzima benu, nina nizityebi! ngokuba senikwamkele ukwonwatyiswa kwenu." 
Luke6:25 Hai ubunzima benu, nina nihlutiyo! ngokuba niya kulamba. Hai ubunzima benu, nina nihlekayo kaloku! ngokuba niya kuba lusizi nilile." 
Luke6:26 Hai ubunzima benu, xeshekweni bonke abantu bateta kakuhle ngani! ngokuba oyise babo bebesenza ngokunjalo kubaprofite ababuxoki." 
Luke6:27 Koko ndisiti kuni nivayo: Tandani intshaba zenu, benzeleni okulungileyo abo banitiyayo," 
Luke6:28 tamsanqelisani abo baniqalekisayo, nitandazele abo banipata kakubi." 
Luke6:29 Okubetayo kw esinye isidlele, mnikele nesinye; nosusayo ingubo yako, ungamaleli ukutabata nesivato sapantsi." 
Luke6:30 Yipa bonke abacelayo kuwe; nohlutayo okukokwako, ungabuyi ukubize kuye." 
Luke6:31 Kanjako njengokuba nitanda ukuba abantu benze kuni, nani yenzani kwa njalo kubo." 
Luke6:32 Nokuba niyatanda abo banitandayo nina, niba nokubulelwa okunina? ngokuba naboni betanda abo batanda bona." 
Luke6:33 Naxeshekweni nikwenza okulungileyo kubo abo bakwenza okulungileyo kuni, niba nokubulelwa okunina? ngokuba naboni bekwenza kwa kona." 
Luke6:34 Naxeshekweni niboleka abo nitemba ukuba nobuya namkele kubo, niba nokubulelwa okunina? ngokuba naboni beboleka aboni, ukuze babuye bamkele okulingeneyo." 
Luke6:35 Kodwa tandani intshaba zenu, nenze okulungileyo, niboleke ningatembi ukuba nobuya namkele nto; waye umvuzo wenu uya kuba mkulu, nani niya kuba ngonyana bopezu kwonke: ngokuba yena enobubele kwabo bangabuleliyo nabakohlakeleyo." 
Luke6:36 Yibani nenceba ngoko, njengokuba noyihlo enenceba." 
Luke6:37 Ize ningabeki tyala, naningayi kubekelwa tyala nani: ningagwebi, naningayi kugwetywa nani: kululani, naniya kukululwa nina:" 
Luke6:38 yipani, kwakuya kupiwa nina; ukulinganiswa okulungileyo, okuhlohliweyo, nokuhlunguzelweyo, nokupalalayo, kwopiwa esifubeni senu: ngokuba okona kulinganisa enilinganisa ngako, kwobuya kulinganiselwe nina." 
Luke6:39 Waza wateta umzekeliso kubo, esiti: Imfama ingaka ikokele imfama na? aziyi kweyela emnxu̔nyeni zombini na?" 
Luke6:40 Umdisipile akapezulu kumfundisi wake; kodwa osukuba ezalisekile woba njengomfundisi wake. 
Luke6:41 Kuyinina ukuba ukangela icetyana elisesweni lomzalwana wako, kanti umqadi okwelako iliso akuwunakani?" 
Luke6:42 Ungati nina nokuti kumzalwana wako: Mzalwana! vuma ndiliku̔pe icetyana elisesweni lako; wena ngokwako umqadi osesweni lako ungawuboni nje? Sihanahanisindini! wuku̔pe kuqala umqadi esweni lako, wauya kwandula ukolise ukubona ukuliku̔pa icetyana elisesweni lomzalwana wako." 
Luke6:43 Ngokuba kungeko mti olungileyo uzihlanza iziqa̔mo ezibolileyo; kanjako akuko mti obolileyo uzihlanza iziqa̔mo ezilungileyo: 
Luke6:44 ngokuba yonke imiti ngeminye isaziwa ngezayo iziqa̔mo; ngokuba kungakiwa makiwane emingeni, kanjalo kungavunwa dreyive emtolweni." 
Luke6:45 Umntu olungileyo kwimbekelo elungileyo yentliziyo yake uyavelisa okulungileyo; nomntu okohlakeleyo kwimbekelo ekohlakeleyo yentliziyo yake uyavelisa okukohlakeleyo: ngokuba umlomo wake uteta okuvela ekupupumeni kwentliziyo. 
Luke6:46 Kodwa yinina ukuba nindibiza ngokuti, Nkosi, Nkosi! kanti anizenzi izinto endizitetayo?" 
Luke6:47 Osukuba esiza kum, eweva namazwi am, ewenza nokuwenza, ndonibonisa lowo afana naye:" 
Luke6:48 Ufana nomntu obesaka indlu, owemba wangxoka, wabeka umsekelo elulwalweni: kwati kwakubako ukukukula kwamanzi, umsinga watyobozela ngakulondlu, kanti awaba nako ukuyishukumisa; ngokuba ibisekelwe elulwalweni." 
Luke6:49 Kodwa owevayo, engenzanga ke, ufana nomntu owaka indlu emhlabeni ingenawo umsekelo: owati umsinga watyobozela ngakuyo; yasuka yawa; kwaye kukulu ke ukuci̔takala kwalondlu." 
Luke7:1 WATI emvenikweni abegqibele zonke iziteto zake ekuveni kwabantu, wangena e‐Kapenayume." 
Luke7:2 Kekaloku isicaka senkosikulu etile, esibe sibekwa yiyo, sasisifa, siza kububa." 
Luke7:3 Yati yakuva ngaye u‐Yesu, yatuma kuye abadala bama‐Juda, imtandaza ukuba eze asipilise isicaka sayo." 
Luke7:4 Kekaloku bakufika ku‐Yesu, banxamela ukumbongoza, besiti: Ufanele lowo uya kumenzela oku;" 
Luke7:5 ngokuba etanda uhlanga lwetu, enguye kanjalo owasakela indlu yentlanganiso yetu." 
Luke7:6 Waza u‐Yesu wahamba nabo. Wati akuba engekabi kude endlwini, inkosikulu yatuma izihlobo kuye, isiti kuye: Nkosi! ungakatazeki; ngokuba ndingafanelekile ukuba ungene ngapantsi kwentungo yendlu yam:" 
Luke7:7 ngoko kanjalo andaba ndifanele mna ngokwam ukuza kuwe: zutete ngelizwi, sasiya kuti isicaka sam sipiliswe." 
Luke7:8 Ngokuba nam ndingumntu omiswayo pantsi kwegunya labanye, ndinamasodati pantsi kwam; nditi ke kwelinye: Yiya! liye; nakwelinye: Yiza! lize; nakwisicaka sam: Yenza oku! senze ke." 
Luke7:9 Waza u‐Yesu akuva ezizinto wayitela nqa, wajika wati kwisihlwele esibe simlandela: Nditi kuni, andifumananga lukolo olungaka nakwa‐Sirayeli." 
Luke7:10 Baza abo babetunyiwe babuyela endlwini, basifumana isicaka esibe sisifa sipilile." 
Luke7:11 Kwaye kute ngolandelayo umhla, waya esixekweni esibizwa ngokutiwa yi‐Nayine: kwaza kwampeleka into eninzi yabadisipile bake, nesihlwele esikulu sabantu." 
Luke7:12 Kekaloku xeshekweni ebesondela esangweni lesixeko, bona ke, bekutwalelwa pandle umntu ofileyo, ekupela kwomntwana wonina, naye yena ebengumhlolokazi: saye sinaye isihlwele esikulu sasesixekweni." 
Luke7:13 Yati inkosi yakumbona, yabetwa lusizi ngaye, yati kuye: Ungalili." 
Luke7:14 Yayisiza yacu̔kumisa itala; bati abatwali bema. Yaza yati: Ndodana! nditi kuwe, vuka." 
Luke7:15 Wasuka wahlala ofileyo, waqala ukuteta. Yaza yamnikela kunina." 
Luke7:16 Babanjwa kukwoyika ke kwa bonke, baye bedumisa utixo, besiti: Umprofite omkulu uvukile pakati kwetu; nakanjalo: Utixo ubakangele abantu bake." 
Luke7:17 Yaza lendaba ngaye yapumela kuyo yonke i‐Judeya, nakulo lonke ilizwe langakona." 
Luke7:17 Yaza lendaba ngaye yapumela kuyo yonke i‐Judeya, nakulo lonke ilizwe langakona." 
Luke7:18 Kwaye kushunyayelwa ku‐Johane ngabadisipile bake ngazo zonke ezizinto. 
Luke7:19 Waza u‐Johane wabiza ababini bakubadisipile bake, wabatuma ku‐Yesu, esiti: Unguye ozayo na, silinde omnye kusinina?" 
Luke7:20 Kekaloku akufika kuye amadoda lawo, ati: u‐Johane umbapitizeshi usitumile kuwe, esiti: Unguye ozayo na, silinde omnye kusinina?" 
Luke7:21 Wati ke ngelona xeshana wapilisa abaninzi ezifeni, nasezibulaweni, nakomoya abakohlakeleyo; nemfama ezininzi wazipa ukubona." 
Luke7:22 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Hambani nishumayeze u‐Johane izinto enizibonileyo nenizivileyo; zokuba imfama ziyamkela ukubona kwazo, iziqwala ziyahamba, amaleperi ayahlanjululwa, izitulu ziyeva, abafileyo bayavuswa, amahlwempu indaba ezilungileyo ziyashunyayelwa kuwo." 
Luke7:23 Kanjalo unetamsanqa osukuba engaxakaniswa ngam. 
Luke7:24 Kekaloku zakuba zimkile izitunywa zika‐Johane, waqala ukuti kwizihlwele ngaye u‐Johane: Nipumele entlango ukuya kubonela nto nina? ingcongolo izanyazanyiswa ngumoya na?" 
Luke7:25 Kodwa nipumile ukuya kubona nto nina? umntu evatisiwe ngezivato ezitambileyo na? bona ke, abo bahleli ekuvateni okubungcwalisa nasebuyolweni basezindlwini zokumkani." 
Luke7:26 Kodwa nipumile ukuya kubona nto nina? umprofite na? ewe, nditi kuni, nogqitisele umprofite." 
Luke7:27 Nguye lo kuba̔liwe ngaye ukuti: Bona ke, ndiyatuma isitunywa sam pambi kwobuso bako, esiya kulungisa indlela yako pambi kwako." 
Luke7:28 Ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Pakati kwabazelweyo ngabafazi akuko namnye umprofite omkulu ku‐Johane umbapitizeshi; kodwa lowo umncinane kwabanye ebukumkanini bukatixo umkulu kuye. 
Luke7:29 Baza bonke abantu bakuva, kwa nababuti beminikelo, bavumela ukulunga kukatixo, bebapitizeshiwe ngobapitizesho luka‐Johane." 
Luke7:30 Kodwa abafarisi nabaqondisimteto bazilahlela icebo likatixo, bengabapitizeshwanga nguye." 
Luke7:31 Yayisiti inkosi: Ndobafanisa nanto nina abantu besisizukulwana? bafana nanto nina ke? 
Luke7:32 Bafana nabantwana behleli endaweni yentengo, bememezelana, besiti nokuti: Sanigwalela, anaduda ke; sanenzela isililo, analila ke." 
Luke7:33 Ngokuba u‐Johane umbapitizeshi ezile engatyi sonka engaseli veyine, naza nati: Unedemoni." 
Luke7:34 Unyana wesintu uzile esitya esela, naza nati: Nanku umntu ozinxalayo olinxila, umhlobo wababuti beminikelo naboni." 
Luke7:35 Kanti ubulumko bugwetyelwe lusapo lwabo lwonke. 
Luke7:36 Kekaloku owabasebafarisini wamtandaza ukuba atye naye. Waza wangena endlwini yomfarisi lowo, wahlala ekutyeni." 
Luke7:37 Waza wati, bona ke, umfazi wasesixekweni, obengumoni, akuqonda ukuba uhleli ekutyeni endlwini yomfarisi lowo, wazisa iqaka leyalabastere linamafuta mnandi," 
Luke7:38 wema ngasezinyaweni zake ngasemva elila, waqala ukunyela inyawo zake ngenyembezi, wazisula ngenwele zentloko yake, wanga inyawo zake, wazitambisa ngamafuta mnandi lawo." 
Luke7:39 Kekaloku umfarisi obemmemile, akubona oko, wateta pakati kwake, esiti: Lo, ukuba ebengumprofite, ngeeba esazi ukuba ungubanina nokuba ungonjanina lomfazi umcu̔kumisayo; ngokuba engumoni." 
Luke7:40 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Simone! ndifun’ ukuteta into kuwe: (Wayesiti: Mfundisi! yitete:) 
Luke7:41 Bekuko abantu ababini ababenetyala kumboleki etile: omnye wabenetyala ledenari ezimakulu mahlanu, omnye wabenelezimashumi mahlanu." 
Luke7:42 Kekaloku bengenanto yokuhlaula, wabaxolela bobabini. Ndixelele ngoko, nguwupina kubo oya kumtanda ngokukulu?" 
Luke7:43 Wapendula u‐Simone wati: Ndiba ngulowo wamxolelayo okukulu. Wati kuye: Ulungisile ukugweba kwako. 
Luke7:44 Waza wajikela ngakumfazi, wati ku‐Simone: Uyambona na lomfazi? Ndangena endlwini yako; amanzi akwawanikela inyawo zam; kodwa lo wanyela inyawo zam ngenyembezi, wazisula ngenwele zentloko yake:" 
Luke7:45 akwandanga; kodwa lo, kuseloko ndangenayo, akayekanga ukwanga inyawo zam:" 
Luke7:46 intloko yam akwayitambisa ngeoli; kanti lo uzitambisile inyawo zam ngamafuta mnandi. 
Luke7:47 Ngenxa yoku nditi kuwe: Zixolelwe izono zake ezininzi, ngokuba watanda kakulu: kanti lowo uxolelwayo okuncinane, uyatanda kancinane." 
Luke7:48 Wayesiti kuye: Zixolelwe izono zako. 
Luke7:49 Baza abo babehleli ekutyeni ndawonye naye baqala ukuti pakati kwabo: Ngubanina lo, oxolelayo nezono?" 
Luke7:50 Wayesiti kumfazi: Ukolo lwako lukusindisile; hamba ngoxolo. 
Luke8:1 KWAYE kute kamva, wayehamba ngezixeko ngezixeko nangemizi ngemizi, eshumayela exela nokuxela indaba ezilungileyo zobukumkani bukatixo; benaye nabalishumi linababini," 
Luke8:2 nabafazi abatile ababe bepilisiwe komoya abakohlakeleyo nasezilwelweni, u‐Mariya obizwa ngom‐Magadala, obekupumile kuye idemoni ezisixe̔nxe," 
Luke8:3 no‐Johana umfazi ka‐Kuza igosa lika‐Herodi, no‐Susana, nabanye abaninzi, abebemkonza ngempahla yabo." 
Luke8:4 Kekaloku kwakubutana isihlwele esikulu, besiza kuye abakuzo zonke isixeko, wazekelisa wati:" 
Luke8:5 Umhlwayeli wapuma ukuya kuhlwayela imbewu yake; nasekuhlwayeleni kwake, inxenye yawa ngasendleleni; yaza yanyatelwa, zati intaka zezulu zayidla." 
Luke8:6 Yawa enye elulwalweni; yati yakuba ihlumile yabuna, ngokuba ingenako ukunyakama." 
Luke8:7 Yawa nenye pakati kwemitolo; yaza imitolo yahluma kunye nayo, yayitshwencisa." 
Luke8:8 Yawa nenye emhlabeni olungileyo; yati yakuba ihlumile yavelisa iziqa̔mo ngekulu. Wati esitsho ezizinto wadanduluka, esiti: Onendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Luke8:9 Baza abadisipile bake bambuza, besiti: Ungati nina umzekeliso lo?" 
Luke8:10 Wayesiti: Kunikiwe nina ukwazi imfihlakalo zobukumkani bukatixo: kodwa abanye kutetwa kubo ngemizekeliso; ukuze bati bebona nje, bangaboni; bati kanjalo besiva nje, bangaqondi." 
Luke8:11 Kekaloku umzekeliso nguwo lo wokuti: Imbewu ililizwi likatixo. 
Luke8:12 Abo bangasendleleni ke, bangabo bevayo; kwandule ukuza u‐Satane asuse ilizwi entliziyweni yabo, ukuze bangakolwa basindiswe." 
Luke8:13 Abo baselulwalweni ke, ngabati xeshekweni bavileyo, balamkele ilizwi ngovuyo; kanti aba abanangcambo, abakolwayo kube mzuzu, bati ngexesha lokulingwa bapambuke." 
Luke8:14 Leyo ke yawayo emitolweni, aba bangabo abati bakuba bevile, bahambe baṙwishwe zizitukutezi nobutyebi nemihlali yokudliwa kwobomi, baze bangaqa̔mi kuvutwe." 
Luke8:15 Leyo ke isemhlabeni olungileyo, aba bangabo abati ngentliziyo elungileyo netambileyo, bakuba bevile, balibambe ilizwi, baxakate izixakato ngokunyamezela." 
Luke8:16 Akuko mntu oti, akubaneka isibane, asigubungele ngesitya, umhlaumbi asibeke pantsi kwesihlalo; uti asibeke pezu kwekandelare, ukuze abangenayo babone ukukanya." 
Luke8:17 Ngokuba kungeko nto efihlakeleyo, engayi kubonakaliswa; kanjako akuko nto efihliweyo, engayi kwaziwa, ize ekuhleni." 
Luke8:18 Lumkani ngoko ukuba niti nina ukuva: ngokuba osukuba enako, kuya kupiwa yena; kanti osukuba engenako, uya kuhlutwa kwa oko aba unako." 
Luke8:19 Kekaloku kwasondela kuye unina nabazalwana bake; bakohlwa ke kumfikelela ngenxa yesihlwele. 
Luke8:20 Kwaza kwashunyayelwa kuye, kusitwa: Unyoko nabazalwana bako bemi pandle, befuna ukukubona." 
Luke8:21 Koko wapendula wati kubo: Uma̔ nabazalwana bam bangaba, abalivayo ilizwi likatixo, balenze." 
Luke8:22 Kwaye kute ngemini etile, wangena yena enqanaweni, kwa nabadisipile bake; waza wati kubo: Masiwele siye kwelingapesheya icala lolwandlana, banduluka ke." 
Luke8:23 Kekaloku nxa bebeselisha, walala ubutongo: kwaza kwehla uqwitela lwomoya pezu kwolwandlana, bada bafun’ ukuzalelwa ngamanzi, baza kuba semgcipekweni ke." 
Luke8:24 Beza kuye bamvusa, besiti: Nkosi, Nkosi, siyabuba! Wavuka ke wakalimela umoya nokulwa kwamanzi; kwapeza ke, kwaza kwabako ukuzola." 
Luke8:25 Wayesiti kubo: Lupina ukolo lwenu? Kodwa bebesoyika bati nqa, besiti omnye kwomnye: Ngubanina kanti lo, eyalela nemimoya namanzi nje, zimve ke?" 
Luke8:26 Baza baselishela ezweni lama‐Gadara, elimalungana ne‐Galili." 
Luke8:27 Wati akupumela emhlabeni, kwamkaulela indoda etile yasesixekweni esekukade inazo idemoni, yayingambati ngubo, yayingahlali endlwini kanjalo, koko yahlala emancw̔abeni." 
Luke8:28 Yati kekaloku yakubona u‐Yesu, yadanduluka, yawa pantsi pambi kwake, yati ngelizwi elikulu: Ndiyinto nina kuwe, Yesu, Nyana katixo opezu konke? ndiyakukunga, zungandimbeli!" 
Luke8:29 (Ngokuba ebeyalele umoya onco̔lileyo ukuba apume emntwini lowo; ngokuba bekukaninzi ebemqubule; wabegcinwa enxityiwe ngemixokelelwane nangamakamandela; waza eqaula izinxibo wagxotelwa ezindaweni ezilubala yidemoni.) 
Luke8:30 Waza wayibuza u‐Yesu, esiti: Ngubanina igama lako? Yayisiti: Ngu‐Bandlalikulu; ngokuba idemoni ezininzi bezingene kuyo." 
Luke8:31 Zaza zambongoza, aze angaziyaleli ukuba zimke ziye esihogweni." 
Luke8:32 Kwabekuko apo umhlambi wehangu ezininzi zisidla entabeni. Zaza zambongoza ukuba azivumele zingene kuzo ezo. Wazivumela ke. 
Luke8:33 Zati idemoni zapuma emntwini lowo zangena ezihangwini; waza umhlambi wagalelekela ngeliwa apo elwandlana, wamiwa ke." 
Luke8:34 Baza abo babesalusa, bakubona oko kwenzekileyo, babaleka, baya bashumayela indawo esixekweni nasemapandleni." 
Luke8:35 Bati ke abantu bapuma ukuya kubona into eyenzekileyo, beza ku‐Yesu, bamfumana ehleli pantsi lowamntu zibe zipumile kuye idemoni, evatile, enokuqonda kwake, ngasezinyaweni zika‐Yesu; basuka boyika." 
Luke8:36 Bati kanjalo abo babebonile babashumayeza ukuba watiwa nina ukupiliswa lowo ubengenelwe zidemoni. 
Luke8:37 Saza sonke isihlwele sasezweni elipahlayo lama‐Gadara samtandaza ukuba emke kubo; ngokuba bebebanjwa kukwoyika okukulu. Waza yena wangena enqanaweni, wabuya." 
Luke8:38 Kekaloku indoda zibe zipumile kuyo idemoni ibimkunga ukuba ibe naye. Kodwa wayindulula u‐Yesu, esiti:" 
Luke8:39 Buyela endlwini yako, ubalise izinto ezingakanana akwenzele zona utixo. Yaza yemka, ishumayela kuso sonke isixeko izinto ezingakanana abeyenzele zona u‐Yesu." 
Luke8:40 Kwaza kwati akuba ebuyile u‐Yesu, abantu bamamkela ngembuko; ngokuba bonke bebemlinda." 
Luke8:41 Kekaloku bona ke, kwafika indoda egama lalingu‐Yahiri, ebingumpati wendlu yentlanganiso, yawa pantsi ngasezinyaweni zika‐Yesu, yambongoza ukuba angene endlwini yayo:" 
Luke8:42 ngokuba ibinentombi ikupela kwomntwana wayo, eminyaka yobudala ngati yalishumi linamibini, yati yona yafun’ ukufa. Kwati ekuhambeni kwake, izihlwele zamxinanela." 
Luke8:43 Kekaloku umfazi obenegqita legazi kwasekuyiminyaka ilishumi linamibini, obegqibele kanjako konke apila ngako emagqir̔eni, engabanga nako ukupiliswa mntu," 
Luke8:44 weza ngasemva, wacu̔kumisa umqukumbelo wengubo yake; laselinqamka kwa oko igqita legazi lake." 
Luke8:45 Waza wati u‐Yesu: Ngubanina owandicu̔kumisayo? Kekaloku bakukanyela bonke, wati u‐Petrosi nabo babenaye: Nkosi! izihlwele zikuxinga zikuncinezela nje, uti ke na: Ngubanina owandicu̔kumisayo?" 
Luke8:46 Koko u‐Yesu wati: Kuko owandicu̔kumisayo; ngokuba ndandisazi ukuba amandla apuma kum. 
Luke8:47 Wati ke umfazi lowo akubona ukuba akafihlakele, weza engcangcazela, wawa pantsi pambi kwake, wamshumayeza ebusweni babantu bonke ituba abemcu̔kumisile ngalo, nokokuba wapiliswa kwa oko." 
Luke8:48 Wayesiti kuye: Yomelela, ntombi! ukolo lwako lukupilisile; hamba ngoxolo." 
Luke8:49 Nxa abesateta, kwafika owakowabo umpati wendlu yentlanganiso, esiti kuye: Ifile intombi yako; ungamkatazi umfundisi." 
Luke8:50 Kuloko u‐Yesu, evile nje, wapendula kuye, esiti: Ungoyiki: kolwa kodwa, yaiya kupiliswa" 
Luke8:51 Wati akufika endlwini, akavumela mntu ukuba angene, kupela u‐Petrosi, no‐Yakobi, no‐Johane, noyise wentombazana nonina." 
Luke8:52 Kekaloku bebelila bonke, bayenzela isijwili. Kodwa wati: Ningalili; ayifile, ilele butongo." 
Luke8:53 Basuka bamhleka, besazi ukuba ifile." 
Luke8:54 Kuloko yena akuba ebaku̔pele pandle bonke, wabamba isandla sayo, wadanduluka, esiti: Ntombazana, vuka!" 
Luke8:55 Waza umoya wayo wabuya weza, yaselisuka kwa oko. Kanjalo wayalela ukuba inikwe ukudla." 
Luke8:56 Bati ke abazali bayo bamangaliswa; kodwa wabayala ukuba mabangaxeleli mntu into eyenzekileyo. 
Luke9:1 WATI kekaloku wababizela ndawonye kuye abadisipile bake abalishumi linababini, wabanika amandla negunya pezu kwazo zonke idemoni, nokuba bapilise izifo." 
Luke9:2 Waza wabatuma ukuya kushumayela ubukumkani bukatixo, nokupilisa abafayo," 
Luke9:3 wati kubo: Ningapati nto ibe yeyendlela; ningazi pati intonga, nenxowa, nesonka, nemali; ningabi nazo ingubo mbini ngabanye kanjalo." 
Luke9:4 Nendlu enisukuba ningena kuyo, hlalani kona, nimke nakona." 
Luke9:5 Nabasukuba benganamkeli nina, niti nakupuma kwesosixeko, nivutulule notuli ezinyaweni zenu, kube sisinqi̔no ngakubo." 
Luke9:6 Bapuma ke bacanda izixeko ngezixeko, beshumayela ivangeli bepilisa nokupilisa ezindaweni zonke." 
Luke9:7 Kekaloku u‐Herodi inkosi weva zonke izinto ezibe zisenziwa nguye; wayexakekile, ngokuba kube kusitwa ngabanye: u‐Johane uvukile ekufeni;" 
Luke9:8 nangabanye: u‐Elija ubonakele; nangabanye: Owabaprofite bakudala ubuye wavuka. 
Luke9:9 Waza wati u‐Herodi: u‐Johane ndandimnqumla intloko; kodwa ungubanina lo, endiziva ngaye izinto ezinje? Wabefuna ukumbona ke." 
Luke9:10 Bati abapostile bakubuya, bambalisela konke ababekwenzile. Waza wabatabata naye, wapambukela ngasese endaweni elubala yasesixekweni esibizwa nge‐Betesayida." 
Luke9:11 Zati izihlwele zakwazi, zamlandela; waza wazamkela, wateta kuzo ngobukumkani bukatixo, nabo babeswele ukupiliswa wabapilisa." 
Luke9:12 Kekalolu imini yaqala ukusangana; baza abalishumi linababini beza bati kuye: Sindulule isihlwele; baze bemke baye emizini epahlayo nasemapandleni, balalise, bafumane nento yokutya; ngokuba apa sisendaweni elubala." 
Luke9:13 Kodwa wati kubo: Bapeni nina ukuba batye. Baza bati: Asinanto epezu kwezonka ezihlanu nentlanzi ezimbini, ukuba asiti umhlaumbi siye sitengele bonke ababantu ukudla." 
Luke9:14 Ngokuba ebengati amadoda ngamawaka amahlanu. Wayesiti kubadisipile bake: Bahlaliseni pantsi ngamaqela, ngawamashumi mahlanu." 
Luke9:15 Benje njalo ke, babahlalisa pantsi kwa bonke." 
Luke9:16 Waza watabata izonka zozihlanu nentlanzi zombini, wakangela ngasezulwini, wazitamsanqelisa, waqezula, wanikela kubadisipile babeke pambi kwesihlwele." 
Luke9:17 Batya bahluta bonke: kanjalo kwasuswa amaqezu aseleyo kubo, izitya zazilishumi linazibini." 
Luke9:18 KWAYE kute xeshekweni ebeyedwa etandaza, bebeko naye abadisipile bake: waza wabuza kubo, esiti: Ngubanina ziti izihlwele ndinguye?" 
Luke9:19 Bapendula bati: Kutwa ngu‐Johane umbapitizeshi; bati kodwa abanye ngu‐Elija; bati nabanye: Omnye wabaprofite bakudala ubuye wavuka. 
Luke9:20 Wayesiti kubo: Kodwa ngubanina eniti nina ndinguye? Wapendula u‐Petrosi wati: Ngu‐Kristu katixo. 
Luke9:21 Waza wabayala kakulu, wayalela ukuba mabangaxeleli mntu oku," 
Luke9:22 esitsho ukuti: Unyana wesintu ufanele ukuva intlungu ezininzi, nokulahlwa ngabo abadala nabaperisite abakulu nababa̔li, nokubulawa, nokuvuswa ngomhla wesitatu." 
Luke9:23 Wabesiti kanjalo kubo bonke: Ukuba umntu uyafuna ukuza emva kwam, makazikanyeze, apate ikuruse yake imihla ngemihla, andilandele." 
Luke9:24 Ngokuba lowo usukuba efuna ukulondoloza ubomi bake, buya kumlahleka; nosukuba elahlekana nobomi bake ngenxa yam, oyena wobulondoloza." 
Luke9:25 Ngokuba kuya kunceda nto nina umntu, akulizuza ilizwe lonke, wati yena ngokwake walahleka, umhlaumbi wazizuzela ingozi?" 
Luke9:26 Ngokuba lowo usukuba enentloni ngam nangamazwi am, oyena unyana wesintu woba nentloni ngaye, akuza ebungcwaliseni bake, nako boyise, nakobengelosi ezingcwele." 
Luke9:27 Kodwa nditi kuni ngokwenyaniso: Bako inxenye yabemiyo apa, abangasayi kuva ukufa, bade babone ubukumkani bukatixo." 
Luke9:28 Kwaye kute intsuku zingati zisibozo emveni kweziziteto, watabata naye u‐Petrosi, no‐Johane, no‐Yakobi, wenyukela entabeni ukuya kutandaza." 
Luke9:29 Kwati ekutandazeni kwake ukubonakala kwobuso bake kwenziwa ngakumbi, nokuvata kwake kwaba kubengezela ngokumhlope." 
Luke9:30 Kekaloku bona ke, amadoda amabini ebeteta naye, abe engu‐Mosesi no‐Elija;" 
Luke9:31 ababonakalayo ebungcwaliseni, bateta ngokufa kwake abeza kukufeza e‐Yerusaleme." 
Luke9:32 Kodwa u‐Petrosi nabo bebenaye babe benzima bubutongo: bati bakuvuka, babona ubungcwalisa bake, namadoda lawo omabini abemi naye." 
Luke9:33 Kwaza kwati, nxa abesahlukana naye, wati u‐Petrosi ku‐Yesu: Nkosi! kulungile ukuba sibe lapa; masenze ke amapempe abe matatu, elinye libe lelako, elinye libe lelika‐Mosesi, elinye libe lelika‐Elija; engazi into ayitetayo." 
Luke9:34 Kekaloku nxa ebesitsho, kwafika ilifu labasibekelela; boyika ke bakungena abo elifini." 
Luke9:35 Kanjalo ilizwi lavela elifini, lisiti: Lo ungunyana wam otandiweyo; mveni yena." 
Luke9:36 Lati lakuba lidlule ilizwi, wafunyanwa u‐Yesu eyedwa. Baza bona bati cwaka, abatyela mntu kanjako kwezontsuku nanye yezozinto bazibonileyo." 
Luke9:37 Kwaye kute ngomhla olandelayo, bakuba behlile entabeni, samkaulela isihlwele esikulu." 
Luke9:38 Kekaloku bona ke, indoda yasesihlweleni yamemeza, isiti: Mfundisi! ndiyakukunga, kangela unyana wam; ngokuba ekupela kwomntwana wam." 
Luke9:39 Uti, bona ke, umoya ambambe, asuke akale ke; kanjalo uyamṙuzula ade abe nokuxapa amagwebu, aze ati emapula nje emke kuye ngento enzima:" 
Luke9:40 ndaza ndakunga abadisipile bako, ukuba mabamku̔pe; bakohlwa ke." 
Luke9:41 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati: Sizukulwana esingakolwayo ezigwenxa! ndobako kuni ndininyamezele kude kube ninina? zisela apa unyana wako. 
Luke9:42 Kekaloku nxa ebeseza, yamti kahla idemoni, yamṙuzula. Koko u‐Yesu watetisa umoya onco̔lileyo, wapilisa umfana, wamnikela kanjako kuyise." 
Luke9:43 Babemangaliswa ke bonke pezu kwobukulu bukatixo. Kanti bakuba bonke bebetela nqa zonke ezozinto wazenzayo u‐Yesu, wati kubadisipile bake:" 
Luke9:44 Wabekeleni nina lamazwi indlebe zenu: ngokuba unyana wesintu eza kunikelwa ezandleni zabantu. 
Luke9:45 Kodwa bebengaqondi isiteto esi; saye sibafihlelwe, bada abasiva; bebesoyika ukumbuza ngesiteto esi kanjalo." 
Luke9:46 Kwaye kuvuka impikisano pakati kwabo, yokuti, ngubanina wakubo ongaba mkulu kwabanye." 
Luke9:47 Wati u‐Yesu wabona ukucamanga kwentliziyo yabo, wabamba umntwana, wammisa ngakuye," 
Luke9:48 waza wati kubo: Osukuba esamkela lomntwana egameni lam, uyamkela mna; nosukuba esamkela mna, uyamkela lowo wanditumayo: ngokuba lowo umncinane kwabanye pakati kwenu nonke, nguye oya kuba mkulu." 
Luke9:49 Waza wapendula u‐Johane wati: Nkosi! sabona umntu eziku̔pa idemoni egameni lako; saza samalela, ukuba engalandeli nati." 
Luke9:50 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Ningamaleli; ngokuba ongalani nati engecala letu. 
Luke9:51 KWAYE kute nxa ibisel’ ifika imihla yokunyuselwa kwake, wati yena wabekisa ubuso bake ukuya e‐Yerusaleme." 
Luke9:52 Waza watuma izitunywa pambi kwobuso bake; ezaya zangena emzini wama‐Samariya, ukuze zimlungisele." 
Luke9:53 Akamamkela ke, kuba ubuso bake bebusinga e‐Yerusaleme." 
Luke9:54 Baza abadisipile bake u‐Yakobi no‐Johane, bakubona oko, bati: Nkosi! uyatanda na sixele ukuba umlilo uhle ezulwini, uwagqibele, njengokuba no‐Elija wenje njalo?" 
Luke9:55 Kodwa wajika wabatetisa, wati nokuti: Anazi ukuba ningabomoya omnina;" 
Luke9:56 ngokuba unyana wesintu engezanga ukububisa ubomi babantu, koko eze uku bu londoloza. Baza baya kwomnye umzi." 
Luke9:57 Kwaye kute ekuhambeni kwabo endleleni, watsho umntu otile kuye ukuti: Ndokulandela, apo usukuba uhambela kona, Nkosi!" 
Luke9:58 Waza u‐Yesu wati kuye: Impungutye zineminxu̔ma, nentaka zezulu zinendawo zokuhlala; kanti unyana wesintu akanandawo apo angalalisa kona intloko." 
Luke9:59 Wayesiti kwomnye: Ndilandele. Kodwa wati: Nkosi! ndivumele ukuba ndihambe nditi tanci ndiye kuncw̔aba ubawo. 
Luke9:60 Koko u‐Yesu wati kuye: Yekela abafileyo ukuncw̔aba abafileyo bakowabo; kodwa wena hamba uye ushumayele ubukumkani bukatixo. 
Luke9:61 Wati ke nomnye: Ndokulandela, Nkosi! kodwa kuqala ndivumele ukuba ndiye kubulisa abesendlwini yam." 
Luke9:62 Koko u‐Yesu wati kuye: Akuko mntu oti, esibekile isandla sake epuluweni, ekangela ngasemva, alungele ubukumkani bukatixo." 
Luke10:1 EMVENI kwezizinto ke yadala inkosi nabanye, bemashumi asixe̔nxe, yabatuma ngababini ngababini pambi kwobuso bayo, kuzo zonke izixeko nendawo apo ibiza kuti yona iye kona." 
Luke10:2 Yandula yati kubo: Isivuno okunene sininzi, kodwa abasebenzi bancinane; tandazani ngoko kwinkosi yesivuno, ize iku̔pele esivunweni sayo abasebenzi." 
Luke10:3 Hambani; bona ke, ndiyanituma njengemvana pakati kwencu̔ka." 
Luke10:4 Ningatwali sidla, nenxowa, nezihlangu; ningabulisi mntu endleleni kanjalo." 
Luke10:5 Nendlu enisukuba ningena kuyo, yitini kuqala: Uxolo malube kulendlu!" 
Luke10:6 Ukuba ke unyana woxolo ukona, uxolo lwenu luya kupumla pezu kwayo; okanye, luya kubuya luze kuni." 
Luke10:7 Hlalani ke kuleyo yona indlu, nisidla nisela ezonto banazo; ngokuba umsebenzi efanele umvuzo wake. Ningesuki kwenye indlu ukuya kwenye." 
Luke10:8 Nesixeko enisukuba ningena kuso, baze banamkele, yidlani ezonto zibekwayo pambi kwenu," 
Luke10:9 nipilise abafayo abakuso, niti kubo: Ubukumkani bukatixo sebukufupi kuni." 
Luke10:10 Kodwa isixeko enisukuba ningena kuso, baze banganamkeli, pumelani ezitarateni zaso, nitsho ukuti:" 
Luke10:11 Kwa notuli lwasesixekweni senu, olunamatelayo kuti, siyalusulela ngakuni: noko yazini oku, ukuba ubukumkani bukatixo sebukufupi kuni." 
Luke10:12 Kodwa nditi kuni: Kwonyamezelekela i‐Sodome ngomhla lowo, ngapezu kwesosixeko." 
Luke10:13 Hai ubunzima bako, Korazine! hai ubunzima bako, Betesayida! ngokuba izenzo zamandla ezenzelwa kuni ukuba zazenzelwe e‐Tire nase‐Tsidone, zinga zibe ziguqukile kade zihleli entlakantlakeni naselututwini." 
Luke10:14 Kanjako kwonyamezelekela i‐Tire ne‐Tsidone emgwetyweni, ngapezu kwenu." 
Luke10:15 Nawe, Kapenayume! opakanyiselweyo kwa sezulwini, uya kuhliselwa kwa sehadesi." 
Luke10:16 Ovayo nina, uyeva mna; nowalayo nina, uyala mna; nowalayo mna, uyala owanditumayo." 
Luke10:17 Bati kekaloku abamashumi asixe̔nxe babuya ngovuyo, besiti: Nkosi! kwa nedemoni ziyasilulamela ngalo igama lako." 
Luke10:18 Yayisiti kubo: Ndandibona u‐Satane esiwa ezulwini njengokubaneka. 
Luke10:19 Bona ke, ndiyanipa igunya lokunyatela inyoka nonomadudwane, napezu kwawo onke amandla otshaba; kungabiko nento eya kuka inenzakalise." 
Luke10:20 Noko ningavuyi ngoku, ukuba omoya banilulamele; kodwa vuyani ngakumbi ukuba amagama enu aba̔lelwe ezulwini." 
Luke10:21 Ngeloxeshana wagcoba u‐Yesu emoyeni, wati: Ndiyakubulela, Bawo, Nkosi yezulu nomhlaba! ukuba ufihlele izilumko nezazi ezizinto, wazityilela intsana: ewe, Bawo! ngokuba okunjalo bekukolekile ebusweni bako." 
Luke10:22 Zonke izinto zinikelwe kum ngubawo: kanjako akuko mntu owaziyo ukuba ungubanina unyana, kupela nguyise, nokuba ungubanina uyise, kupela ngunyana, nosukuba unyana etanda ukumtyilela yena." 
Luke10:23 Waza wajikela ngakubadisipile, wati ngasese: Anetamsanqa amehlo abona izinto enizibonayo;" 
Luke10:24 ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Baninzi abaprofite nokumkani ababefuna ukubona izinto enizibonayo nina, kanti abazibonanga; nokuva izinto enizivayo, kanti abazivanga." 
Luke10:25 Kekaloku bona ke, wesuka umqondisimteto otile, emlinga, esiti nokuti: Mfundisi! ndiya kwenza nto nina ukuba ndidle ilifa lobomi obungunapakade?" 
Luke10:26 Wayesiti kuye: Yinto nina eba̔liweyo emtetweni? uti nina ukulesesha? 
Luke10:27 Wapendula wati: Uya kumtanda uyehova, utixo wako, ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, nangawo wonke umpefumlo wako, nangawo onke amandla ako, nangayo yonke ingqondo yako; nommelwane wako njengokuzi tanda kwako." 
Luke10:28 Wayesiti kuye: Ulungisile ukupendula kwako; yenza oku, wauya kudla ubomi." 
Luke10:29 Kodwa yena efuna ukuzigwebela wati ku‐Yesu: Ungubanina ke ummelwane wam? 
Luke10:30 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati: Umntu otile wehla e‐Yerusaleme waya e‐Jeriko, wawa pakati kwamabada, ati wona amhluba ingubo zake, amenzela amanxeba, emka, emshiyile ngokungati uza kufa." 
Luke10:31 Kwahla kwehla umperisite otile ngaleyondlela, owati akumbona wadlula ngelinye icala." 
Luke10:32 Kwa njalo ke nom‐Levi akufika kulondawo, weza, wabona, wadlula ngelinye icala." 
Luke10:33 Kodwa um‐Samariya otile esekuhambeni weza kufupi naye, owati akumbona wabetwa lusizi," 
Luke10:34 wasondela, wabopa amanxeba ake, egalela ioli neveyine; waza wamkwelisa pezu kwelake ihashe, wamsa entangeni, wamgcina." 
Luke10:35 Wati ngomnye umhla akumka, war̔ola idenari zambini, wazinika kumninintanga, wati kuye: Mgcine ke; nento usukuba usalekela ukuyici̔ta, ndoti mna, nxa ndibuya ndize apa, ndiyibuyisele kuwe." 
Luke10:36 Nguwupina ngoko waba batatu uti wena uzenze ummelwane kulowo ubewile pakati kwamabada? 
Luke10:37 Wayesiti: Ngulowo wamenzelayo ububele. Wandula wati u‐Yesu kuye: Hamba, yenza kwa njalo nawe." 
Luke10:38 Kwaye kute ekuhambeni kwabo, wati yena wangena emzini otile; waza umfazi otile, ogama lingu‐Marita, wamamkela endlwini yake." 
Luke10:39 Wabe lo enaye udade obizwa ngo‐Mariya, obesiti yena, ehleli ngasezinyaweni zika‐Yesu, wapulapula ilizwi lake." 
Luke10:40 Kodwa u‐Marita waebideka ngokukonza okukulu; waza wema kufupi wati: Nkosi! akukatali na kukuba udade wam undiyekelele ndikonze ndedwa? mxelele ngoko ukuba andincede. 
Luke10:41 Koko wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Marita, Marita! unesitukutezi nesipitipiti ngezinto ezininzi;" 
Luke10:42 kodwa inye into eswelekayo; no‐Mariya usiqashile esosabiwo silungileyo, esingayi kususwa kuye." 
Luke11:1 KWAZA kwati, nxa ebesendaweni etile etandaza, akupeza, wati omnye wakubadisipile bake kuye: Nkosi! sifundise tina ukutandaza, njengokuba no‐Johane wafundisa abadisipile bake." 
Luke11:2 Wayesiti kubo: Xeshekweni nitandazayo, yitini: Bawo wetu osezulwini! Malipatwe ngobungcwele igama lako. Ubukumkani bako mabufike. Intando yako mayenziwe emhlabeni, njengokuba isenziwa ezulwini." 
Luke11:3 Sipe imihla ngemihla ukutya kwetu kwemihla ngemihla. 
Luke11:4 Usixolele izono zetu; ngokuba nati sixolela bonke abonayo kuti. Ungasingenisi ekulingweni, zusisindise enkohlakalweni." 
Luke11:5 Waza wati kubo: Nguwupina kuni oya kuba nomhlobo, waeya kuya kuye pakati kwobusuku, aze ati kuye: Mhlobo! ndiboleke izonka zibe zitatu;" 
Luke11:6 ngokokuba umhlobo wam efikile kum evela ekuhambeni, endingenanto yokubeka pambi kwake:" 
Luke11:7 aze lowo upakati apendule ati: Ungandikatazi; ucango seluvaliwe, nabantwana bam bako nam endaweni yokulala; andingevuke ndikunike?" 
Luke11:8 Nditi kuni: Nokuba akayi kuvuka amnike, ngenxa yokuba engumhlobo wake, woti noko, ngenxa yokujoka kwake, avuke amnike zonke azifunayo." 
Luke11:9 Kanjalo nditi mna kuni: Celani, naniya kupiwa; funani, naniya kufumana; qongqotani, naniya kuvulelwa." 
Luke11:10 Ngokuba bonke abacelayo besamkela, nofunayo uyafumana, noqongqotayo uya kuvulelwa." 
Luke11:11 Nguwupina wakuni onguyise, oya kuti, ukuba unyana wake uya kucela kuye isonka, amnikele ilitye? nokuba uya kucela intlanzi, endaweni yentlanzi amnikele inyoka?" 
Luke11:12 umhlaumbi nokuba uyacela iqanda, amnikele unomadudwane?" 
Luke11:13 Ngako ukuba nina, nikohlakele nje, niyazi ukupa abantwana benu izipo ezilungileyo, kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi aya kuti uyihlo wasezulwini ape abo bacelayo kuye umoya oyingcwele?" 
Luke11:14 Kekaloku waeku̔pa idemoni, yaisidenge ke yona. Kwabekute, nxa idemoni ibipumile, sateta isidenge: zaza zati nqa izihlwele." 
Luke11:15 Kodwa inxenye kubo bati: Uyaziku̔pa idemoni ngaye u‐Belezebule inkosi yedemoni. 
Luke11:16 Nabanye, bemlinga, bebefuna umqondiso kuye uvela ezulwini." 
Luke11:17 Kuloko yena wazazi inkumbulo zabo, wati kubo: Bonke ubukumkani obupambeneyo ngokwabo buyaci̔takaliswa; nendlu epamb eneyo nendlu iyawa." 
Luke11:18 Kanjalo no‐Satane ukuba upambene ngokwake, boti nina ubukumkani bake ukuma? ngokuba nisiti ndiyaziku̔pa idemoni ngo‐Belezebule." 
Luke11:19 Kodwa ukuba ndiyaziku̔pa idemoni ngo‐Belezebule mna, bayaziku̔pa ngobanina onyana benu? ngako oko bona boba ngabagwebi benu." 
Luke11:20 Kodwa ukuba ndiyaziku̔pa idemoni ngomnwe katixo, kukona sebunifikele ubukumkani bukatixo." 
Luke11:21 Xeshekweni onamandla exo̔bile ayigcina indlu yake, impahla zake zisekupumleni:" 
Luke11:22 kodwa emvenikweni onamandla makulu kwawake amzumileyo wamoyisa, uyasusa konke ukuxo̔ba kwake abetembele kuko, awabe amaxoba ake." 
Luke11:23 Ongengecala lam, uyalana nam; nongabutani nam, uyaci̔ta." 
Luke11:24 Xeshekweni umoya onco̔lileyo apumile emntwini, uyacanda ezindaweni ezingenamanzi, efuna ukupumla; kanti engakufumani nje, uti: Ndiya kubuyela endlwini yam, apo ndapuma kona:" 
Luke11:25 ati akufika ayifumane itshayelwe, ihonjiwe." 
Luke11:26 Andule ukuya atabate naye abanye omoya abasixe̔nxe, abakohlakeleyo ngakumbi kuye, abati bangene bahlale kona: kuze kuti okwokupela kwalomntu kube kubi kokwokuqala." 
Luke11:27 Kwaye kute ekuziteteni kwake ezizinto, umfazi otile wasesihlweleni wapakamisa ilizwi wati kuye: Sinetamsanqa isizalo esakutwalayo, namabele owawanyayo." 
Luke11:28 Kodwa yena wati: Hai gxebe, banetamsanqa abo balivayo ilizwi likatixo, balibambe." 
Luke11:29 Kekalolu nxa izihlwele zibe zibutana ndawonye ngemikumdelikane, waqala ukuti: Esisizukulwana sesikohlakeleyo; siyafuna umqondiso, kanti asiyi kunikwa mqondiso, kupela umqondiso ka‐Jona umprofite." 
Luke11:30 Ngokuba, njengokuba u‐Jona ebengumqondiso kuma‐Nineve, kwa njalo nonyana wesintu woba ngumqondiso kwesisizukulwana." 
Luke11:31 Ukumkanikazi wasesuyide uya kuvuka eme emgwetyweni kunye nabantu besisizukulwana, abagwebe: ngokuba wavela ezipelweni zomhlaba ukuza kuva ubulumko buka‐Solomone; kanti nanku omkulu ku‐Solomone apa." 
Luke11:32 Abantu base‐Nineve baya kusuka beme emgwetyweni kunye nesisizukulwana, basigwebe: ngokuba baguqukayo ngokushumayela kuka‐Jona; kanti nanku omkulu ku‐Jona apa." 
Luke11:33 Akuko mntu oti, akubaneka isibane, asibeke endaweni efihlakeleyo, napantsi kwento yokulinganisa, koko asibeka pezu kwekandelare, ukuze abangenayo babone ukukanya kwaso." 
Luke11:34 Isibane somzimba sililiso: ngako xeshekweni iliso lako lingenanto, wonke umzimba wako uba nokukanya nawo; kodwa emvenikweni lenzakeleyo, nomzimba wako umnyama." 
Luke11:35 Lumka ke kungabi ukukanya okupakati kwako kububumnyama. 
Luke11:36 Ukuba ngoko wonke umzimba wako unokukanya, ungenanye indawo imnyama, uya kuba nokukanya wonke, njengokuya isibane sikukanyiselayo ngenkazimlo yaso." 
Luke11:37 Kekaloku nxa atetileyo, umfarisi otile wamtandaza ukuba adlele kuye isidlo sasemini; wangena ke, wahlala pantsi." 
Luke11:38 Wati umfarisi akubona wati nqa ukuba ebengatanga kuqala wahlamba engeka tyi isidlo sasemini. 
Luke11:39 Koko yati inkosi kuye: Kaloku nina bafarisi okupandle kwendebe nesikotile niya kuhlambulula; kodwa okupakati kwenu kuzele bubupanga nenkohlakalo. 
Luke11:40 Zidenge! lowo wakwenzayo okupandle, akakwenza na nokupakati?" 
Luke11:41 Kodwa izinto zapakati zipeni amalizo ngazo; kukona, bona ke, zonke izinto zihlambulukile kuni." 
Luke11:42 Koko kuya kuba nzima kuni bafarisi! ukuba ninika izishumi zetyeleba, nezeruwe, nezemifuno yonke, kanti niyagqita ubugwebo, notando lukatixo: bekufanele ezi ukuba zenzwe, neziya ukuba zingayekwa." 
Luke11:43 Kwoba nzima kuni bafarisi! ukuba nitanda isihlalo sapambili ezindlwini zentlanganiso, nemibuliso ezindaweni zentengo." 
Luke11:44 Kwoba nzima kuni, baba̔li nabafarisi, zihanahanisi! ukuba ninjengamancw̔aba angabonakaliyo, bati abantu abahambayo pezu kwawo bangawazi." 
Luke11:45 Kwaza kwapendula omnye wakubaqondisimteto wati kuye: Mfundisi! usitsho nje uyasituka nati. 
Luke11:46 Koko wati: Kwoba nzima nakuni baqondisimteto! ukuba nitwesa abantu ngemitwalo esindayo, kanti nina ngokwenu anicu̔kumisi imitwalo leyo nangomnye weminwe yenu." 
Luke11:47 Kwoba nzima kuni! ukuba nibuya nake amancw̔aba abaprofite, bati ke oyihlo benu bababulala." 
Luke11:48 Kukona ninqi̔nela nivumela nokuvumela izenzo zoyihlo benu; ngokuba bona okunene bababulala, niti ke nina nibuye nake amancw̔aba abo." 
Luke11:49 Ngako oko butshilo nobulumko bukatixo ukuti: Ndiya kubatumela abaprofite nabapostile, babeya kuti inxenye kubo bababulale, babatshutshise;" 
Luke11:50 ukuze libizwe kwesisizukulwana igazi labo bonke abaprofite elipalazwayo kutabata ekumisweni kwelizwe," 
Luke11:51 kwa segazini lika‐Abele kude kube segazini lika‐Zekariya, owabubela pakati kwesibingelo nendawo eyingcwele: ewe nditi kuni, liya kubizwa kwesisizukulwana." 
Luke11:52 Kwoba nzima kuni baqondisimteto; ukuba nisusile isilotile sokwazi; anangena nina, nabo babengena nabalela." 
Luke11:53 Kekaloku nxa ebeteta ezizinto kubo, ababa̔li nabafarisi baqala ukuba nenzondo kakulu, nokumfundekela ngemibuzo ngento ezininzi," 
Luke11:54 bemlalela, befuna ukubamba into ipuma emlonyeni wake, ukuze bamnike ityala." 
Luke12:1 PAKATI kwezozinto, nxa abebutelene ndawonye amawakawaka abantu, bada banyatelana, waqala ukuti kubadisipile bake tanci: Lumkelani igwele labafarisi, elibuhanahaniso." 
Luke12:2 Akuko nto eselelweyo, engayi kutyilwa; nefihlakeleyo, engayi kwaziwa." 
Luke12:3 Ngenxa yoku, konke enikutshiloyo ebumnyameni, kuya kuviwa emhlotsheni; noko nikutetileyo endlebeni ezinkambilini, kuya kushunyayelwa pezu kwentungo zezindlu." 
Luke12:4 Nditi ke kuni zihlobo zam: Ningaboyiki abo babulala umzimba, kanti emveni kwoko abananto enkulu ngakumbi abangayenzayo." 
Luke12:5 Kodwa ndonibonisa ukuba niya kwoyika banina: yoyikani lowo unegunya lokuba ati emveni kwokubulala apose esihogweni somlilo; ewe, nditi kuni, yoyikani yena lo." 
Luke12:6 Akutengiswa amahobohobo mahlanu ngedobulitye mbini na? noko akuko nalinye kuwo lilityelwe ebusweni bukatixo. 
Luke12:7 Koko kwa inwele zentloko zenu zibaliwe zonke. Ize ningoyiki ke; nigqitisele amahobohobo amaninzi. 
Luke12:8 Nditi kuni kanjako: Osukuba endivuma mna pambi kwabantu, naye unyana wesintu uya kumvuma yena pambi kwengelosi zikatixo:" 
Luke12:9 kodwa ondikanyeleyo ebusweni babantu, uya kukanyelwa ebusweni bengelosi zikatixo." 
Luke12:10 Nosukuba eya kuteta ilizwi ngakuye unyana wesintu, uya kuxolelwa; kodwa ogxekayo umoya oyingcwele, akayi kuxolelwa." 
Luke12:11 Naxeshekweni banizisayo ezindlwini zentlanganiso, na pambi kwabanobukosi nabanegunya, ningabi nasitukutezi sokuba niya kuzipendulela ngokunjanina umhlaumbi nopendula nto nina, umhlaumbi sokuba niya kuteta nto nina:" 
Luke12:12 ngokuba umoya oyingcwele eya kunifundisa kwelona ixeshana, izinto enifanele ukuziteta." 
Luke12:13 Waza omnye wasesihlweleni wati kuye: Mfundisi! Teta kumkuluwe wam ukuba abelane nam ilifa. 
Luke12:14 Kodwa wati kuye: Mntundini! ngubanina owandimisa umgwebi nomabi pezu kwenu? 
Luke12:15 Wayesiti kubo: Lumkani nilumkele ububawa; ngokuba ebuninzini bomntu ubomi bake bungemi ngento anazo. 
Luke12:16 Waza wateta umzekeliso kubo, esiti: Umhlaba wesityebi esitile wacu̔ma kakulu:" 
Luke12:17 saza sacamanga pakati kwaso, sisiti: Ndiya kwenza nto nina, ndingenandawo nje apo ndiya kuzihlanganisela kona iziqa̔mo zam?" 
Luke12:18 Saye sisiti: Lento ndiya kuyenza: ndiya kuci̔ta inyango zam, ndake ezinkulu kuzo, ndize ndizihlanganisele kona zonke izilimo zam nempahla zam;" 
Luke12:19 ndandiya kuti kumpefumlo wam: Mpefumlo! unempahla ezininzi zibekelwa iminyaka emininzi; yiti upumle, udle, usele, ugcobe." 
Luke12:20 Kodwa utixo wati kuye: Sidenge! kwa ngobubusuku kuyabizwa umpefumlo wako kuwe; ezonto uziqwebileyo kanti, zoba zezikabanina?" 
Luke12:21 Unjalo lowo uzibekelayo indyebo, engenabutyebi ngakutixo." 
Luke12:22 Waza wati kubadisipile bake: Ngako oku nditi kuni: Musani ukutukutezelela ubomi benu, ukuba notya nto nina; ninga tukutezel eli nomzimba wenu, ukuba niya kwambata nto nina:" 
Luke12:23 ubomi bukulu kuko ukutya, nomzimba umkulu kuzo izivato." 
Luke12:24 Gqalani onomyai, okokuba abahlwayeli, abavuni nokuvuna, ekungeko kubo iqonga nasisele, kanti utixo uyabondla noko: kekaloku nina nizigqitisele intaka kakulu kangakananina?" 
Luke12:25 Nguwupina ke kuni ongati ngokutukutezela ongezelele ebudeni bake ikubite ibe nye? 
Luke12:26 Ukuba ngoko nikohlwa kukwenza into encinane kuzo zonke, yinina ukuba ninesitukutezi ngezinye?" 
Luke12:27 Gqalani inyibiba, ukuba ziti nina ukuhluma; azisebenzi, azisonti kanjako: kanti nditi kuni, kwa u‐Solomone kubo bonke ubungcwalisa bake akavatiswanga njengenye yezi." 
Luke12:28 Ukuba ke inca, eti namhla ibeko ezindle, iti ngomso iposwe eziko, utixo uyenje njalo ukuyivatisa, kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi aya kuvatisa nina, nina balukolo luncinane?" 
Luke12:29 Nize ningafuni nina ukuba notya nto nina, umhlaumbi ukuba nosela nto nina; niti kanjalo ningabi namatindala:" 
Luke12:30 ngokuba zonke ezizinto intlanga zelizwe zizifuna; kanjako uyihlo uyazi ukuba niziswele ezizinto. 
Luke12:31 Kodwa funani ubukumkani bukatixo, zaziya kuti zonke ezizinto zongezelelwe kuni." 
Luke12:32 Ungoyiki, mhlambi omncinane! ngokuba uyihlo etanda ukupa nina ubukumkani." 
Luke12:33 Tengisani ngento eninazo, nipe amalizo: zenzeleni izidla ezingabi zindala, indyebo engenakupela ezulwini, apo isela lingasondeli nenundu lingadli kona:" 
Luke12:34 ngokuba apo ikona indyebo yenu, yoba kwa kona nentliziyo yenu." 
Luke12:35 Mazibe izinqe zenu zibinqiwe, nezibane zenu zivuta;" 
Luke12:36 nani yibani nifana nabantu belinda inkosi yabo, mhlenikweni aya kunduluka emtshatweni, baze bati, yakufika yaqongqota, bayivulele kamsinya." 
Luke12:37 Zinetamsanqa izicaka ezo, iya kuti inkosi yazo, yakufika, izifumane zilinda. Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Iya kuzibinqa, izihlalise pantsi, isondele izikonze." 
Luke12:38 Nokuba iti ifike ngevaṙasho lesibini, umhlaumbi ifike ngevaṙasho lesitatu, izifumane zinjalo, zinetamsanqa izicaka ezo." 
Luke12:39 Kodwa qondani oku, ukuba umninindlu ebesazi yiyipina iyure isela liza ngayo, ange elinda, angavumeli ukuba igqotyozwe indlu yake." 
Luke12:40 Nani ngoko yibani nilungile; ngokuba ngeyure eningayikumbuleliyo unyana wesintu esiza. 
Luke12:41 Waza u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Nkosi! uwuteta lomzekeliso kuti tina, uwuteta kubo bonke, kusinina?" 
Luke12:42 Yayisiti inkosi: Ngubanina ke elogosa linyanisekileyo nelilumkileyo, eyati inkosi yalo yalimisela pezu kwabendlu yayo, ukuba li ba nike ngexesha elifanelekileyo isabelwa sokudla?" 
Luke12:43 Sinetamsanqa isicaka eso, iya kuti inkosi yaso, yakufika, isifumane sisenje njalo." 
Luke12:44 Ngenyaniso nditi kuni: Iya kusimisela pezu kwayo yonke impahla yayo. 
Luke12:45 Kodwa xeshekweni isicaka eso siti entliziyweni yaso: Inkosi yam iyalibala ukuza; size siqale ukubeta izicaka nezicakakazi, nokutya, nokusela, nokunxila;" 
Luke12:46 yofika inkosi yesicaka eso ngemini esinga yi kangeliyo ngayo, nangeyure esingayaziyo, isisike kubini, imise isabiwo saso ndawonye nabangakolwayo." 
Luke12:47 Nesosicaka esibe siyazi intando yenkosi yaso, kanti asalungiselela, asenza nokwenza ngentando yayo, siya kubetwa ngemivimbo emininzi:" 
Luke12:48 koko eso sibe singazi, kodwa senza izinto ezifanele imivimbo, siya kubetwa ngemincinane. Kanjalo osukuba epiwe okukulu, okukulu kwobizwa kuye; nalowo unikelweyo okukulu, kwocelwa kuye okukulu ngakumbi." 
Luke12:49 Ndeza kutuma umlilo emhlabeni; ngendifuna nto nina ke, ukuba ubuse uvutile?" 
Luke12:50 Kodwa kuko ubapitizesho endifanele ukubapitizeshwa ngalo; ndibandezelwa kakulu kangakananina ke lude lufezwe! 
Luke12:51 Niba ndavela ukunika uxolo emhlabeni na? Nditi kuni: Nakanye; kuya kubako ukupambana. 
Luke12:52 Ngokuba emveni kwakaloku nje kuya kubako abahlanu endlwini nye bepambene, abatatu nababini, nababini nabatatu." 
Luke12:53 Uyise uya kupambana nonyana, nonyana noyise; unina nentombi, nentombi nonina; unondoda nomolo kazana, nomolokazana nonondoda." 
Luke12:54 Wabesiti nakwizihlwele: Xeshekweni nibona ilifu elitile linyuka entshonalanga, senisiti: Isipango siyeza; kuhle njalo ke." 
Luke12:55 Naxeshekweni niva umoya wasesuyide uvutela, niti: Kwobako ubushushu; kuhle ke." 
Luke12:56 Zihanahanisindini! ukubonakala kwomhlaba nokwezulu niyazi ukukunakana; kodwa ixesha eli kunganina ukuba ningalinakani? 
Luke12:57 Ewe kanjalo yinina ukuba ningagwebi ngokwenu oko kulungileyo? 
Luke12:58 Ngokuba xeshekweni uya nalowo ukumangeleleyo pambi kwenkosi, yiti endleleni uzamele ukukululwa kuye; hleze akur̔olele emgwebini, ati umgwebi akunikele kumsila, aze umsila akupose entolongweni." 
Luke12:59 Nditi kuwe: Akusayi kuza upume kona, ude uhlaule nemalanyana yokugqibela." 
Luke13:1 KWAYE kufika abatile kwa ngeloxesha abamtyelayo ngawo ama‐Galili, abete u‐Pilati walipitikeza igazi lawo ndawonye namadini awo." 
Luke13:2 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Niba lama‐Galili ebengaboni ngapezu kwawo onke ama‐Galili na, ngokuba evile izinto ezinjalo?" 
Luke13:3 Nditi kuni: Nakanye; koko xeshekweni ningaguqukiyo, niya kububa nonke ngokunjalo." 
Luke13:4 Nabo balishumi linesibozo, abebewelwe yinqaba e‐Siloha babulawa yiyo, niba aba bebezizoni ngapezu kwabo bonke abantu ababemi e‐Yerusaleme na?" 
Luke13:5 Nditi kuni: Nakanye; koko xeshekweni ningaguqukiyo, niya kububa nonke ngokunjalo." 
Luke13:6 Wayeteta lomzekeliso: Umntu otile ebenomkiwane utyelwe esitiyeni sake; waza weza efuna iziqa̔mo kuwo, akazifumana ke." 
Luke13:7 Wayesiti kumlimi wesitiya: Bona ke, yiminyaka mitatu endiza ndifuna iziqa̔mo kumkiwane lo, ndingazifumani ke; wugaule; yinina ukuba uwonakalise nomhlaba?" 
Luke13:8 Koko wapendula yena wati kuye: Nkosi! wuyeke nalonyaka, ndide ndibe ndihlakule ngakuwo, ndagalela nomgquba;" 
Luke13:9 nokuba uyahlanza iziqa̔mo ke —; kodwa ukuba awenje njalo, woti kamva uwugaule." 
Luke13:10 Kekaloku ebefundisa kwenye yezindlu zentlanganiso ngemini yesabata: 
Luke13:11 kwaye kuko, bona ke, umfazi obenomoya wobulwelwe iminiyaka yalishumi linesibozo, owabegobile, wakohlwa kanye ukuzipakamisa." 
Luke13:12 Wati u‐Yesu akumbona, wambiza, wati kuye: Mfazi! ukululwe ebulwelweni bako." 
Luke13:13 Waza wabeka izandla pezu kwake; waselelungiswa kwa oko, wamdumisa utixo." 
Luke13:14 Waza wapendula umpati wendlu yentlanganiso, equmbile kakulu ukuba u‐Yesu ebepilisile ngesabata, wati kwisihlwele: Kuko imihla emitandatu kufanele ukusebenza ngayo; yizani ngoko ngayo le nipiliswe, kungabi ngomhla wesabata." 
Luke13:15 Yandula inkosi yampendula, yati: Sihanahanisindini! akati na omnye ngomnye wakuni ngesabata akulule inkabi yake umhlaumbi iqwaṙashe lake esitaleni, ar̔ole aye kuseza?" 
Luke13:16 Lo kanti, eyintombi ka‐Abrahame nje, obebanjiwe ngu‐Satane, bona ke, iminyaka ilishumi linesibozo, bekungafanele na ukuba akululwe kulombambo ngomhla wesabata?" 
Luke13:17 Kekaloku akutsho, bebedaniswa bonke abalane bake; saye sonke isihlwele sivuya pezu kwazo zonke izinto ezibungcwalisa ezibe zisenzwa nguye." 
Luke13:18 Wayesiti Ubukumkani bukatixo bufana nanto nina? kanjalo ndobufanisa nanto nina? 
Luke13:19 Bufana nokozo lwembewu yemositade, owalutabatayo umntu, waluposa esitiyeni sake; lwamila ke, lwaba ngumti omkulu, zaza intaka zezulu zahlala emasebeni awo." 
Luke13:20 Wayesiti kanjako: Ndobufanisa nanto nina ubukumkani bukatixo? 
Luke13:21 Bufana negwele, owalitabatayo umfazi, walifihlela ezilinganisweni zitatu zomgubo, wada wabiliswa wonke." 
Luke13:22 WAZA wacanda kwizixeko ngezixeko nakwimizi ngemizi efundisa, esenza ihambo yake ngase‐Yerusaleme." 
Luke13:23 Wayesiti omnye kuye: Nkosi! bancinane abasindiswayo kusinina? Wayesiti yena kubo: 
Luke13:24 Zamelani ukungena ngesango elixineneyo; ngokuba ndisiti kuni, abaninzi baya kufuna ukungena, bakohlwe ke." 
Luke13:25 Emvenikweni asel’ esukile umninindlu, wavala ucango, naza naqala ukuma ngapandle nokuqongqota elucangweni, nisiti: Nkosi, Nkosi, sivulele! waeya kuba ependule wati kuni: Andinazi apo nivela kona:" 
Luke13:26 niya kwandula niqala ukuti: Sadla sasela ebusweni bako, nawe wafundisa ezitarateni zetu." 
Luke13:27 Waeya kuti: Nditi kuni, andinazi apo nivela kona; mkani kum, nonke nina benzi benkohlakalo!" 
Luke13:28 Apo kwobako ukulila nokuqaqazela kwamazinyo okuya niya kubona u‐Abrahame, no‐Yisake, no‐Yakobi, nabo bonke abaprofite, ebukumkanini bukatixo, nina kodwa nilahlelwa pandle." 
Luke13:29 Babeya kuza bevela empumalanga nasentshonalanga, nasenode nasesuyide, bahlale pantsi ebukumkanini bukatixo." 
Luke13:30 Kanjalo bona ke, bako abokugqibela abaya kuba ngabokuqala; bako nabokuqala abaya kuba ngabokugqibela." 
Luke13:31 Ngayo yona imini leyo kweza abafarisi abatile, besiti kuye: Puma umke apa; ngokuba u‐Herodi efuna ukukubulala." 
Luke13:32 Waza wati kubo: Hambani niye nitsho kwimpungutye leyo ukuti: Bona ke, ndiyaziku̔pa idemoni, ndizenze nempiliso, namhla nangomso, nditi ngo mhla wesitatu ndifezeke." 
Luke13:33 Kodwa ndifanele ukuti namhla, nangomso, nangomso mnye, ndihambe; ngokuba kungebe njalo ukuba umprofite abubele ngapandle kwe‐Yerusaleme." 
Luke13:34 Yerusaleme, Yerusaleme, ebabulalayo abaprofite, ebagibisela ngamatye abo batunyiweyo kuyo! kufuti kangakananina ebendifuna ukulubutela ndawonye usapo lwako, njengokuba inkukukazi iwabutela ndawonye amatole ayo ngapantsi kwamapiko, anavuma ke!" 
Luke13:35 Bona ke, niyashiyelwa indlu yenu ici̔takele. Kanjalo ngokwenene nditi kuni: Anisayi kundibona, kude kufike ixesha eniya kuti: Makatanyusanqeliswe ozayo egameni likayehova." 
Luke14:1 KWAYE kute akuba engene endlwini yomnye wabapati bakubafarisi ngesabata ukutya isonka, bati bona bamgqala." 
Luke14:2 Kekaloku bona ke, bekuko umntu otile enesifo samanzi pambi kwake." 
Luke14:3 Waza wapendula u‐Yesu watsho kubaqondisimteto nabafarisi, esiti: Kufanelekile ngesabata ukupilisa kusinina?" 
Luke14:4 Kodwa bati cwaka. Waza wambamba, wampilisa, wamndulula;" 
Luke14:5 wapendula kubo, wati: Kuya kweyela emnxu̔nyeni iqwaṙashe umhlaumbi inkabi yawupina wakuni, ongayi kuti ahle ayinyuse ngomhla wesabata?" 
Luke14:6 Baza bakohlwa kukupind’ ukumpendula ngezindawo. 
Luke14:7 Wayeteta kwabamenyiweyo umzekeliso, akunakana okokuba bebenyula izihlalo zobukulu, esiti kubo:" 
Luke14:8 Xeshekweni umenyelwayo emtshatweni ngumntu, ungahlali pantsi esihlalweni sobukulu; hleze obekekileyo kuwe abe emenyiwe nguye;" 
Luke14:9 aze ati lowo wamemayo wena naye eze ati kuwe: Nika lo indawo; uze wandule uqale ngentloni ukubamba indawo yasezantsi. 
Luke14:10 Koko xeshekweni umenywayo, yiya uhlale pantsi endaweni yasezantsi, ukuze ke, akuza okumemileyo, abe nokuti kuwe: Sihlobo! nyukela ngasentla; uya kwandula ukuba nembeko ebusweni babo bonke abahleli ekutyeni ndawonye nawe." 
Luke14:11 Ngokuba osukuba ezipakamisa, uya kutotywa; nalowo uzitobayo, uya kupakanyiswa." 
Luke14:12 Wayeteta nakulowo ubemmemile, esiti: Xeshekweni usenza isidlo sasemini, umhlaumbi isidlo sokuhlwa, ungabizi izihlobo zako, nabazalwana bako, nezalamane zako, nabamelwane abazityebi; hleze nabo babuye bameme wena, uze wenzelwe umvuzo." 
Luke14:13 Koko xeshekweni usenzayo isidlo, mema amahlwempu, izilima, iziqwala, imfama;" 
Luke14:14 wauya kuba netamsanqa ke; kuba bona bengenako ukukuvuza: ngokuba uya kuvuzwa eluvukweni lwabalungileyo. 
Luke14:15 Kekaloku akuti omnye wabahleli ekutyeni ndawonye naye weva ezizinto, wati kuye: Unetamsanqa lowo udlayo isonka ebukumkanini bukatixo!" 
Luke14:16 Koko yena wati kuye: Umntu otile wenza isidlo sokuhlwa esikulu, wamema abaninzi." 
Luke14:17 Waza watuma isicaka sake ngexeshana lesidlo sokuhlwa ukuya kuti kwabamenyiweyo: Yizani; ngokuba kuse kulungisiwe konke. 
Luke14:18 Baza baqala bonke ngentliziyo nye ukuzilandulela. Owokuqala wati kuso: Nditengile intsimi, ndifanelwe kukuti ke ndipume ndiyibone; ndiyakutandaza, mandilandulelwe." 
Luke14:19 Wati nomnye: Nditengile izibini ezihlanu zenkabi, ndiyahamba ukuya kuzilinga ke; ndiyakutandaza, mandilandulelwe." 
Luke14:20 Wati nomnye: Ndizekile umfazi, andingeze ke ngenxa yoku." 
Luke14:21 Saza safika isicaka eso sashumayeza inkosi yaso ezizinto. Wandula umninindlu equmbile nje wati kwisciaka sake: Puma msinya uye ezitarateni nasezindleleni zesixeko, ungenise apa amahlwempu, nezilima, neziqwala, nemfama." 
Luke14:22 Saza sati isicaka: Nkosi! kwenziwe njengoko uyalele ngako; kanti kuseko indawo. 
Luke14:23 Yaza yati inkosi kwisicaka: Puma uye emendweni nasezintangweni, u ba nyanzele bangene, ize izaliswe indlu yam." 
Luke14:24 Ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Akuko namnye wabobantu bamenyiweyo oya kutya kwisidlo sokuhlwa sam. 
Luke14:25 Kekaloku izihlwele ezininzi zibe zimpeleka: waza wajika wati kuzo: 
Luke14:26 Ukuba umntu uyeza kum, engatiyi uyise, nonina, nomfazi, nabantwana, nabazalwana, nodade, ewe nobake ubomi kanjako, akangebe nguye umdisipile wam." 
Luke14:27 Nosukuba engatwali ikuruse yake, eze emva kwam, akangebe nguye umdisipile wam." 
Luke14:28 Ngokuba nguwupina kuni, efuna ukwaka inqaba, ongati tanci ahlale pantsi, abale inani, ukuba unako na okwan ele ukuyigqiba?" 
Luke14:29 hleze kekuti, akuba ebekile umsekelo wayo, ekohlwa kukufeza nje, bonke ababonelayo baqale ukumhleka," 
Luke14:30 besiti: Lomntu waqala ukwaka, wakohlwa kukufeza ke." 
Luke14:31 Kanjalo nguwupina ukumkani, esiya kungena ekulweni nomnye ukumkani, ongahlali pantsi tanci, afune icebo lokuba unamandla na okuti enamawaka alishumi ahlangane nalowo uzayo ngakuye enamawaka angamashumi mabini?" 
Luke14:32 Ukuba akangenje njalo, uti, nxa asekude yena, atume izitunywa acele indawo eziyelela uxolo." 
Luke14:33 Kwa njalo ke owakuni osukuba engancami konke anako, akangebe nguye umdisipile wam." 
Luke14:34 Ityuwa yinto elungileyo: kodwa xeshekweni ityuwa ingabi nasongo, iya kuvakaliswa nganina?" 
Luke14:35 ayilungele nomhlaba nemfumba yomgquba; iyalahlelwa pandle yona. Onendlebe zokuva, makeve." 
Luke15:1 KWAYE kusondela kuye bonke ababuti beminikelo naboni, ukuza kumva." 
Luke15:2 Baza bakalaza abafarisi nababa̔li, besiti: Lo uyamkela aboni, adlelane nabo." 
Luke15:3 Wayeteta kubo lomzekeliso, esiti:" 
Luke15:4 Nguwupina umntu kuni enekulu legusha, ongati yakumlahleka enye kuzo, azishiye ezimashumi alitoba enesitoba entlango, aputume leyo ilahlekileyo, ade ayifumane yona?" 
Luke15:5 Kekaloku akuyifumana, uyayibeka emagxalabeni ake evuya;" 
Luke15:6 ati akufika ekaya, ababizele ndawonye abahlobo bake nabamelwane bake, esiti kubo: Vuyani nam, kuba ndifumene igusha yam ebilahlekile." 
Luke15:7 Nditi kuni, kwa njalo kuya kubako uvuyo ezulwini ngenxa yomoni emnye oguqukayo, ngapezu kwolungenxa yamalunga emashumi alitoba anesitoba angafanele ukuguquka." 
Luke15:8 Kanjalo nguwupina umfazi enamaqosha esilivere alishumi, ongati, ukuba liyamlahleka libe linye, abaneke isibane, atshayele indlu, afune ngokuku̔tala, ade alifumane?" 
Luke15:9 Kekaloku akulifumana, uyababizela ndawonye kuye abahlobokazi bake nabamelwanekazi bake, esiti: Vuyani nam, kuba ndifumene iqosha lesilivere elandilahlekayo." 
Luke15:10 Kwa njalo, nditi kuni, kuko uvuyo ebusweni bengelosi zikatixo ngenxa yomoni emnye oguqukayo." 
Luke15:11 Wayesiti: Umntu otile ebenonyana ababini. 
Luke15:12 Waza omncinane wakubo wati kuyise: Bawo! ndinike isabiwo sempahla esiza kum. Waza wababela imfuyo yake. 
Luke15:13 Kekaloku emveni kwentsuku ezingeninzi unyana omncinane wahlanganisa konke, waṙanukela elizweni elikude, wati kona waci̔takalisa impahla yake, ehlala ngobubedengu." 
Luke15:14 Kwati akuba ebeci̔tile konke, kwabako indlala enkulu kwelozwe, waqala naye ukuba nokuswela." 
Luke15:15 Waza waya wazibandakanyela komnye wabemi belozwe, owamtuma emhlabeni wake ukuya kwalusa ihangu." 
Luke15:16 Waza wanqwenela ukuzalisa isisu sake ngemifuno ebidliwa zihangu; kwaye kungeko mntu owampayo. 
Luke15:17 Kekaloku kwakubuya ukuqonda kwake, wati: Baninzi kangakananina abaqashwa bakabawo abanokutya okungapezu kwokubaneleyo, kanti mna ndiyabuba kulamba!" 
Luke15:18 Ndiya kusuka ndiye kubawo, nditi kuye: Bawo! ndonile ngakulo izulu, nasebusweni bako;" 
Luke15:19 andisafanele ukubizwa ngokuha ngunyana wako; ndenze ndibe njengomnye wabaqashwa bako. 
Luke15:20 Waza wesuka waya kuyise wake. Kekaloku nxa ebesekude kakulu, wati uyise wambona, wabetwa lusizi, wagidima, wawa entanyeni yake, wamanga." 
Luke15:21 Wati ke unyana kuye: Bawo! ndonile ngakulo izulu, nasebusweni bako; andisafanele ukubizwa ngokuba ngunyana wako." 
Luke15:22 Kodwa uyise wati ezicakeni zake: Pumisani ingubo ende enqabileyo, nimambatise; nifake umsesane esandleni sake, nezihlangu ezinyaweni zake;" 
Luke15:23 niti kanjalo nizise itole elityetyisiweyo nilixe̔le, sidle sigcobe ke:" 
Luke15:24 ngokuba lo unyana wam ebefile, kanti ubuye wapila; ebelahlekile nje, kanti ufunyenwe. Baza baqala ukugcoba." 
Luke15:25 Kekaloku unyana wake omkulu ebesentsimini: wati xeshekweni ebesiza wasondela endlwini, weva ukugwala nokududa." 
Luke15:26 Waza wabiza esinye sezicaka, wabuza ukuba zingati nina ezizinto." 
Luke15:27 Sati ke sona kuye: Umninawe wako ufikile; kanjalo uyihlo uxe̔lile itole elityetyisiweyo, kuba emamkele epilile." 
Luke15:28 Waqumba ke, ebengavumi nokungena. Wati ngoko uyise wapuma wambongoza." 
Luke15:29 Koko wapendula wati kuyise: Bona ke, ndikukonza leminyaka mininzi kangaka, ndingazanga ndigqite umyalelo wako nje, akupanga mna noko ibokwana napakade, ukuze ndigcobe nezihlobo zam:" 
Luke15:30 kodwa xeshekweni wafikayo unyana wako lo, obedlile imfuyo yako ndawonye nabapinyiswa, wamxe̔lela yena itole elityetyisiweyo." 
Luke15:31 Koko wati kuye: Nyana! wena uba nam futi, nako konke okukokwam kukokwako." 
Luke15:32 Kwabekufanele ukuba kuvuywe kugcotywe: ngokuba umninawe wako lo ebefile, kanti ubuye wapila; ebelahlekile nje, kanti ufunyenwe." 
Luke16:1 WAYESITI kanjalo kubadisipile bake: Bekuko isityebi esitile, esibe sinegosa; kwaye kumangalwa kuso ngalo eli ukuba liyaci̔takalisa impahla yaso." 
Luke16:2 Saza salibiza sati kulo: Yinina lento ndiyiva ngawe? yenza ingxelo yobugosa bako; ngokuba ungebe selilo igosa. 
Luke16:3 Laza lati pakati kwalo igosa elo: Ndiya kwenza nto nina, inkosi yam ibususa ubugosa kum nje? ukumba andingekwenze; ukunqiba ndikudanele." 
Luke16:4 Sendikwazi oko ndiya kukwenza, ukuze kuti, ndakushenxiswa ebugoseni, bandamkele ezindlwini zabo." 
Luke16:5 Laza lababiza abanye ngabanye abanetyala enkosini yalo, lati kowokuqala: Unetyala elingakananina enkosini yam?" 
Luke16:6 Wayesiti yena: Lelekulu lebate zeoli. Laza lati kuye: Tabata isiba̔lelo sako, uhlale pantsi msinya, uba̔le amashumi amahlanu." 
Luke16:7 Landula lati komnye: Nawe unetyala elingakananina? Wayesiti yena: Lelekulu lekore zenqolowa. Laza lati kuye: Tabata isiba̔lelo sako, uba̔le amashumi asibozo." 
Luke16:8 Yaza inkosi yalo yabonga igosa elingalungileyo, ngokuba libe lenzile ngokulumka: ngokuba usapo lwelilizwe likoyo lugqitisile usapo lwokukanya ngokulumka kokwesalo isizukulwana." 
Luke16:9 Nam nditi kuni: Zenzeleni abahlobo ngobutyebi obungalungileyo, ukuze kuti, nakupela, banamkele ezintlalweni ezingunapakade." 
Luke16:10 Onyanisekile kokuncinane, unyanisekile nakokukulu; nalowo ungongalungile kokuncinane, ungongalungile nakokukulu." 
Luke16:11 Ukuba ngoko nibe ninganyanisekile ebutyebini obungalungileyo, ngubanina oya kubekela kuni obenyaniso?" 
Luke16:12 Nokuba nibe ninganyanisekile kokwomnye, ngubanina oya kuninika okukokwenu?" 
Luke16:13 Akuko sicaka esingakonzayo inkosi ezimbini: ngokuba siya kutiya enye, sitande enye; okanye, siya kubambelela kwenye, sidele enye. Aningekonze utixo nobutyebi kunye." 
Luke16:14 Kekaloku ezizinto zonke zibe ziviwa nangabafarisi abatanda imali, bamsinekela." 
Luke16:15 Waza wati kubo: Nina ningabazenza abalungileyo ebusweni babantu; kodwa utixo uyazazi intliziyo zenu: ngokuba oko kuyinto enkulu pakati kwabantu, kuyintshontsho ebusweni bukatixo." 
Luke16:16 Umteto nabaprofite bebeko kwada kwako u‐Johane; kuseloko ubukumkani bukatixo buyashunyayelwa, bati bonke bazinyanzelele kubo." 
Luke16:17 Kulula ukuba kudlule izulu nomhlaba, ngapezu kwokuba, kutshitshe umgcanyana mnye emtetweni." 
Luke16:18 Osukuba elahla umfazi wake, ezeka nomnye, uyaṙexeza; nosukuba ezeka olahliweyo yindoda, uyaṙexeza naye." 
Luke16:19 Kodwa bekuko isityebi esitile, esibe sisambata izivato ezibomvu nezeqiya eshiceneyo, siziyolisa imihla ngemihla ngobumnandi obukulu." 
Luke16:20 Bekuko nehlwempu elitile, eligama lingu‐Lazarusi, ebelilele ngasesangweni laso, lizele zizilonda," 
Luke16:21 linqwenela ukuhlutiswa ngemvutuluka eziwayo etafileni yesityebi; kanjako nezinja zibe zisiza zakota izilonda zalo. 
Luke16:22 Kwada kwati ke kwafa ihlwempu, lasiwa zingelosi esifubeni sika‐Abrahame. Safa ke nesityebi, sancw̔atywa." 
Luke16:23 Saza sati ehadesi sapakamisa amehlo aso, siba sebuhlungwini, sabona u‐Abrahame ekude, no‐Lazarusi esifubeni sake," 
Luke16:24 sabiza ke sati: Bawo Abrahame! yiba netaṙu kum, utume u‐Lazarusi, ukuze afake incam yomnwe wake emanzini, apolise ulwimi lwam; ngokuba ndibulawa kwelilangatye." 
Luke16:25 Koko wati u‐Abrahame: Nyana! kumbula ukuba wena wamkela izinto zako ezilungileyo ekudleni kwako ubomi, no‐Lazarusi kwa njalo izinto zobubi: kodwa kaloku nje yena uyonwatyiswa, nawe uyabulawa." 
Luke16:26 Kanjako ngapezu kwoku konke, pakati kwetu nani kumisiwe ituba elikulu, ukuze ke abo bafuna ukuwela besuka apa ukuya kuni bakohlwe, nabakona bangaweli ukuza kuti." 
Luke16:27 Saza sati: Ndiyakutandaza ngoko, bawo! ukuba umtume endlwini kabawo;" 
Luke16:28 ngokuba ndinabazalwana abahlanu; ukuze anqi̔ne kubo, ukuba bangezi nabo kulendawo yobuhlungu." 
Luke16:29 Wati u‐Abrahame kuso: Bano‐Mosesi nabaprofite; mabeve bona. 
Luke16:30 Sati ke sona: Hai, bawo Abrahame! koko xeshekweni ovela kwabafileyo aya kubo, baya kuguquka." 
Luke16:31 Kodwa wati kuso: Ukuba abeva u‐Mosesi nabaprofite, abayi kukolwa naxeshekweni umntu avuka kwabafileyo." 
Luke17:1 WAZA wati kubo abadisipile: Akungebe njalo ukuba zingezi izixakaniso; kodwa kwoba nzima kulowo eziza ngaye! 
Luke17:2 Kulungele yena ukuba ilitye lapezulu lokusila belibotshwa ngasentanyeni yake, waza weyeliswa elwandle, ngapezu kwokuba axakanise omnye waba bancinane." 
Luke17:3 Zilumkeleni: ukuba ke umzalwana wako uyona ngakuwe, mtetise; nokuba uyaguquka, mxolele:" 
Luke17:4 ewe ukuba uyona ngakuwe kasixe̔nxe ngamini nye, ati kasixe̔nxe ngamini nye abuye eze kuwe, esiti: Ndiyaguquka; uya kumxolela." 
Luke17:5 Baza abapostile bati kwinkosi: Yongezelela ukolo lwetu. 
Luke17:6 Yayisiti inkosi: Ukuba nibe ninokolo olungangokozo lwembewu yemositade, ngeniba nisiti kulomti wesikamine: Yiba udonyulwa, ube utyalwa pakati kwolwandle; wabuya kuba univile ke." 
Luke17:7 Kodwa ngubanina kuni enesicaka silima, umhlaumbi sisalusa, oya kwandula ukuti kuso, sakungena sivela entsimini: Sondela, uhlale pantsi?" 
Luke17:8 Akayi kuti ngokukumbi kuso: Lungisa into endiya kusenza isidlo sokuhlwa ngayo, uze uzibinqe, undikonze, ndide ndigqibe ukutya nokusela; woti emveni kwoko utye usele nawe?" 
Luke17:9 Uyasibulela na isicaka eso, ngokokuba senza izinto esasimiselwe zona? Ndiba akayi kubulela." 
Luke17:10 Kwa njalo nani, xeshekweni nizenzile zonke izinto enanimiselwe zona, yitini: Sizizicaka ezingancedi luto: sikwenzile oko sibe sifanelwa kukukwenza." 
Luke17:11 Kwaza kwati, nxa ebehambela e‐Yerusaleme, wacanda pakati kwe‐Samariya ne‐Galili." 
Luke17:12 Kekaloku esakungena emzini otile, kwamkaulela amadoda alishumi angamaleperi, ema kude." 
Luke17:13 Aza apakamisa ilizwi, esiti: Yesu, Nkosi, yiba netaṙu kuti!" 
Luke17:14 Waza aku wa bona wati kuwo: Hambani niye nizibonakalise kubaperisite. Kwaza kwati, nxa ebesiya, ahlanjululwa." 
Luke17:15 Yati ke enye kuwo, yakubona ukuba ipilisiwe, yabuya, imdumisa utixo ngelizwi elikulu," 
Luke17:16 yeza yawa ngobuso ngasezinyaweni zake, imbulela: yaibe yona ingum‐Samariya." 
Luke17:17 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati: Bebengahlanjululwanga abalishumi na? abalitoba pofu bapina? 
Luke17:18 akufunyanwanga ababuyayo ukuza kumnika utixo udumo, kupela lomntu wolunye uhlanga." 
Luke17:19 Waza wati kuye: Pakama, uhambe; ukolo lwako lukupilisile." 
Luke17:20 Kekaloku akubuzwa ngabafarisi, buza ninina ubukumkani bukatixo, wabapendula, wati: Abuzi ubukumkani bukatixo ngokugqalelweyo." 
Luke17:21 Akuyi kutshiwo nokutiwa: Nabu apa; umhlaumbi: Nabuya paya; ngokuba, bona ke, ubukumkani bukatixo bupakati kwenu." 
Luke17:22 Waza wati kubadisipile: Iya kufika imihla, okuya niya kunqwenela ukubona ube mnye wemihla yonyana wesintu, naningayi kuwubona ke." 
Luke17:23 Kwotshiwo kuni nokutiwa: Nanku apa; umhlaumbi: Nankuya paya; ize ningemki, ningaputumi kanjalo." 
Luke17:24 Ngokuba, kwa njengokuba umbane, obanekayo kwelinye icala pantsi kwezulu, ukanyela kwelinye icala pantsi kwezulu, woba njalo nonyana wesintu ngomhla wake." 
Luke17:25 Kodwa kuqala ufanele ukuva intlungu ezininzi, nokulahlwa sesisizukulwana." 
Luke17:26 Nanjengokuba bekusihla emihleni ka‐Nowa, kwoba njalo nasemihleni yonyana wesintu:" 
Luke17:27 bebesidla, bebesela, bebezeka, bebesendiswa, kwada kwaba ngumhla u‐Nowa wangena ngawo enqanaweni, kweza nomsingakazi, wabatshabalalisa kwa bonke." 
Luke17:28 Kwoba njalo nanjengokuba bekusihla emihleni ka‐Lote: bebesidla, bebesela, bebetenga, bebetengisa, bebetyala, bebesaka;" 
Luke17:29 kodwa ngomhla wapuma ngawo u‐Lote e‐Sodome, kwana umlilo nesufure zivela ezulwini, zabatshabalalisa kwa bonke." 
Luke17:30 Kwoba ngokunje ngomhla aya kuvela unyana wesintu. 
Luke17:31 Kulowo umhla, oya kuba pezu kwentungo yendlu, nempahla zake endlwini, makangehli ukuya kuzisusa: nalowo usentsimini, kwa njalo makangabuyeli kokwasemva." 
Luke17:32 Kumbulani umfazi ka‐Lote.
