Luke17:33 Ngokuba lowo usukuba efuna ukulondoloza ubomi bake, buya kumlahleka; nosukuba elahlekana nobomi bake, wobugcina buhleli." 
Luke17:34 Nditi kuni: Kobobusuku kwobako amadoda amabini pezu kwesihlalo sinye; yotatyatwa enye, ishiywe enye." 
Luke17:35 Abafazi ababini boba besila ndawonye; wotatyatwa omnye, ashiywe omnye." 
Luke17:36 Amadoda amabini obako entsimini; yotatyatwa enye, ishiywe enye." 
Luke17:37 Baza bapendula bati kuye: Pina, Nkosi? Wayesiti kubo: Apo ukona umzimba, kulapo aya kubutelana kona amaxalanga." 
Luke18:1 Wabeteta nomzekeliso kubo wokuti kufanele ukuba kutandazwe futi, kungadinwa," 
Luke18:2 esiti: Kube kuko umgwebi otile esixekweni esitile, obengamoyiki utixo, obengamhloneli nomntu." 
Luke18:3 Kube kuko nomhlolokazi kwesosixeko, owaman’ esiza kuye, esiti: Ndilungise elutshabeni lwam." 
Luke18:4 Kwaza kwamzuzu engavumi; kodwa kamva wati pakati kwake: Nakuba utixo ndingamoyiki, nomntu ndingamhloneli," 
Luke18:5 ndiya kuti noko, ngenxa yokuba endika taza umhlolokazi lo, ndimlungise, hleze ati ehlala esiza andiqekeze intloko." 
Luke18:6 Yaza yati inkosi: Yivani oko kutetwa ngumgwebi ongalungileyo. 
Luke18:7 Notixo akayi kulungisa abaqashwa bake na, abakalela kuye emini nasebusuku, nangona enza kade pezu kwabo?" 
Luke18:8 Nditi kuni: Wobalungisa kamsinya. Kodwa noko, akuza unyana wesintu, wolufumana ke na ukolo emhlabeni?" 
Luke18:9 Kanjalo wawuteta nakwabatile abazitembelayo ukuba balungile, badela abanye, umzekeliso lo:" 
Luke18:10 Abantu ababini benyukela etempileni ukuya kutandaza, omnye engumfarisi, omnye engumbuti weminikelo." 
Luke18:11 Umfarisi wema wenje nje ukutandaza ngokwake: Tixo! ndiyakubulela ukuba ndingenjengabo abanye abantu, abapangi, abangalungileyo, abaṙexezi, ndingenjengaye nalombuti weminikelo." 
Luke18:12 Ndiyazila ukutya kabini ngeveki; ndiyanika izishumi zako konke endikuzuzayo. 
Luke18:13 Nombuti weminikelo, emi kude, ebengavumi nokuba apakamise amehlo ngasezulwini; koko ebebeta esifubeni sake, esiti: Tixo! yiba nofefe kum endingumoni." 
Luke18:14 Nditi kuni: Wehla lo waya endlwini yake egwetyelwe, ngapezu kwalowa: ngokuba osukuba ezipakamisa, uya kutotywa; kanti ozitobayo, uya kupakanyiswa." 
Luke18:15 KEKALOKU bazisa kuye nentsana, ukuze azicu̔kumise: bati ke abadisipile, bakubona, babatetisa." 
Luke18:16 Kodwa u‐Yesu wazibiza, wati: Vumelani abantwana ukuza kum, ize ningabaleli; ngokuba ubukumkani bukatixo bubobabanjalo." 
Luke18:17 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Osukuba engamkeli ubukumkani bukatixo njengomntwana, akasayi kuza angene kubo." 
Luke18:18 Waza umpati otile wambuza, esiti: Mfundisi olungileyo! ndiya kulidla ilifa lobomi obungunapakade ndakuba ndenze nto nina?" 
Luke18:19 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Yinina ukuba uti ndingolungileyo? akuko olungileyo, kupela umnye, o ngutixo." 
Luke18:20 Imiyalelo uyayazi: Akuyi kuṙexeza; akuyi kubulala; akuyi kuba̔; akuyi kunqi̔na ubunqi̔na obubuxoki; beka uyihlo nonyoko. 
Luke18:21 Wati yena: Ezizinto zonke ndizibambile kwa sebutsheni bam. 
Luke18:22 Waza u‐Yesu akuva oku wati kuye: Inye into esaswelekileyo kuwe: tengisa ngako konke osukuba unako, wabele amahlwempu, wauya kuba nendyebo ezulwini; uze ke, ulandele mna." 
Luke18:23 Wati ke akuva oku, waba lusizi kakulu; ngokuba ebetyebile kakulu." 
Luke18:24 Waza u‐Yesu, akubona ukuba waba lusizi kakulu, wati: Kungento enqabileyo kangakananina ukuba abo banobutyebi baya kungena ebukumkanini bukatixo!" 
Luke18:25 Ngokuba kulula ukuba inkamela ipumele entunjeni yesinalite, pezu kwokuba isityebi singene ebukumkanini bukatixo." 
Luke18:26 Bati ke abo bevayo: Ngubanina pofu ongasindiswayo? 
Luke18:27 Koko wati: Izinto ezingenzekiyo ebantwini, ziyenzeka kutixo." 
Luke18:28 Wati ke u‐Petrosi: Bona ke, tina sikushiyile konke, salandela wena." 
Luke18:29 Wayesiti kubo: Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Akuko mntu oshiyileyo indlu, umhlaumbi abazali, umhlaumbi abaninawe, umhlaumbi umfazi, umhlaumbi abantwana, ngenxa yobukumkani bukatixo," 
Luke18:30 ongayi kuti kwelixesha abuye amkele into eninzi kakulu ngakumbi, nakwelolizwe lizayo ubomi obungunapakade." 
Luke18:31 Waza watabatela kuye abalishumi linababini, wati kubo; Bona ke, siyanyukela e‐Yerusaleme, zaziya kufezwa zonke izinto ezimba̔lelweyo unyana wesintu ngabaprofite." 
Luke18:32 Ngokuba eya kunikelwa kubaheyideni, ahlekwe, apatwe kakubi, atshicelwe;" 
Luke18:33 babeya kumbeta, bambulale; woti ngomhla wesitatu abuye avuke." 
Luke18:34 Abaqiqa ke bona nanye yezizinto; saye isiteto esi sibe sibafihlelwe, bebengaziqondi izinto ezibe zitetwa kanjalo." 
Luke18:35 Kwaye kute ekusondeleni kwake e‐Jeriko, imfama etile ibihleli ngasendleleni inqiba." 
Luke18:36 Yati yakuva isihlwele sidlula, yabuza ukuba kungati nina oku." 
Luke18:37 Baza bayityela ukuba u‐Yesu wase‐Nazarete uyadlula. 
Luke18:38 Yaza yamemeza, isiti: Yesu, nyana ka‐Davide! yiba netaṙu kum." 
Luke18:39 Baza abo babehamba pambili bayiyala, ukuba iti tu: kodwa yona yabidanduluka ngento enkulu ngakumbi, isiti: Nyana ka‐Davide! yiba netaṙu kum." 
Luke18:40 Wema ke u‐Yesu wayalela ukuba iziswe kuye: yati yakusondela wayibuza," 
Luke18:41 esiti: Unga ndingakwenzela nto nina? Yayisiti: Nkosi! ndinga ndingamkela ukubona kwam. 
Luke18:42 Waza u‐Yesu wati kuyo: Yamkela ukubona kwako; ukolo lwako lukupilisile. 
Luke18:43 Yaselisamkela ukubona kwayo kwa oko, yamlandela idumisa utixo: bati nabantu bonke, bakubona oku, banikela udumiso kutixo." 
Luke19:1 Waza wangena wahamba ecanda e‐Jeriko. 
Luke19:2 Kwaye kuko, bona ke, indoda ibizwa ngegama elingu‐Zakeyu, ebiyinkosi yababuti beminikelo, ebisisityebi kanjalo." 
Luke19:3 Yabifuna ukubona u‐Yesu, ukuba unjanina; yabikohlwa ke ngenxa yesihlwele, ngokokuba ibincinane ubude bayo." 
Luke19:4 Yaza yagidimela pambili, yakwela emtini wesikamore, ukuze imbone: ngokuba ebeza kudlula ngalo ndlela." 
Luke19:5 Wati akufika kulondawo, wabeka pezulu u‐Yesu, wayibona, wati kuyo: Zakeyu! nxama uhle; ngokuba namhla ndifanele ukuhlala endlwini yako." 
Luke19:6 Yaza yanxama yehla, yamamkela ivuya." 
Luke19:7 Baza bonke bakubona oku bakalaza, besiti: Uye kulalisa endlwini yendoda engumoni." 
Luke19:8 Wema ke u‐Zakeyu, wati kwinkosi: Bona ke, isiqingata sempahla yam, Nkosi! ndiyasipa amahlwempu; nokuba kuko ondimhlutileyo into ngokulumkisa, ndiyabuyekeza ngento epindiweyo kane." 
Luke19:9 Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Namhla usindiso lufikile kulendlu, ngokokuba naye ungunyana ka‐Abrahame." 
Luke19:10 Ngokuba unyana wesintu weza ukufuna nokusindisa okulahlekileyo. 
Luke19:11 Kekaloku nxa bebesiva ezizinto, walekela wateta umzekeliso, ngenxa yokuba ebekufupi ne‐Yerusaleme, nokuba bebeba ubukumkani bukatixo buza kubonakala kamsinya." 
Luke19:12 Wati ngoko: Itshawe elitile lahambela ezweni elikude, ukuya kuzamkelela ubukumkani, nokubuya." 
Luke19:13 Lati libizile izicaka zalo zilishumi, lazinika ishumi lemina, lati kuzo: Yananani, ndide ndize." 
Luke19:14 Kodwa abesixeko salo babelitiya, batuma izitunywa emva kwalo, besiti: Asivumi ukuba lo mntu abe ngukumkani pezu kwetu." 
Luke19:15 Kwaza kwati lakuba libuyele kona, libamkele ubukumkani nje, landula laxela ukuba kubizelwe kulo izicaka ezi, elati lazinika imali leyo, ukuze lazi ukuba zizuzile nto nina ngezinye ngokwanana." 
Luke19:16 Sati ke esokuqala sasondela, sisiti: Nkosi! imina yako izuzile imina ezilishumi." 
Luke19:17 Laza lati kuso: Ukolisile, sicaka esilungileyo! ngokokuba ubunyanisekile kokuncinane kakulu, yiba unegunya pezu kwezixeko zibe lishumi." 
Luke19:18 Saza seza esesibini, sisiti: Nkosi! imina yako yenzile imina ezintlanu." 
Luke19:19 Laye lisiti nakuso esi: Nawe yiba pezu kwezixeko zibe zihlanu. 
Luke19:20 Seza nesinye, sisiti: Nkosi! nantsi imina yako, ebendinayo ibekelwe eqiyeni:" 
Luke19:21 ngokuba bendikwoyika wena, kuba ungumntu olukuni: uyacola oko ungakubekanga pantsi, uyavuna oko ungakuhlwayelanga." 
Luke19:22 Lati ke kuso: Ngokupumayo emlonyeni wako ndokugweba, sicaka esikohlakeleyo! ubusazi nje ukuba ndingumntu olukuni mna, ndicola oko ndingakubekanga pantsi, ndivuna oko ndingakuhlwayelanga:" 
Luke19:23 ibiyinina pofu ukuba akwabeka imali yam ebankeni? ndaye ndinga ndite mna, ndakufika, ndabanga yona kunye nokwanda kwayo." 
Luke19:24 Laza lati kwabo babemi kufupi: Mhluteni imina yake, niyinike kulowo unemina ezilishumi." 
Luke19:25 Baza bati kulo: Nkosi! unemina ezilishumi. 
Luke19:26 Ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Bonke abanako baya kupiwa: kanti ongenako, uya kuhlutwa kwa oko anako." 
Luke19:27 Kodwa intshaba zam ezo, ezibe zingavumi ukuba ndibe ngukumkani pezu kwazo, ziziseni apa, nizibulale pambi kwam." 
Luke19:28 Waza wati akuba ebetshilo, wahamba pambili, enyukela e‐Yerusaleme." 
Luke19:29 KWAZA kwati, nxa wasondelayo e‐Betefage nase‐Betaniya ngasentabeni ebizwayo ngokuti yeyeminquma, watuma ababini bakubadisipile bake," 
Luke19:30 esiti: Hambani niye emzini omalungana nani; eniya kuti kuwo nakungena, nifumane iqwaṙashana libotshelelwe, ekungazanga kuhlale namnye umntu pezu kwalo: likululeni nilizise." 
Luke19:31 Nokuba umntu uyanibuza ngokuti: Kunganina ukuba ni li kulule? notsho kuye ukuti: Inkosi iyalifuna. 
Luke19:32 Bemka abo babetunyiwe, baya bafumana njengokuba ebetshilo kubo." 
Luke19:33 Kekaloku nxa bebelikulula iqwaṙashana, bati abaninilo kubo: Yinina ukuba nilikulule iqwaṙashana?" 
Luke19:34 Bati bona: Inkosi iyalifuna. 
Luke19:35 Baza balizisa ku‐Yesu, baposa ingubo zabo pezu kweqwaṙashana, bamkwelisa u‐Yesu." 
Luke19:36 Kanjako ekuhambeni kwake, bebesandlala ingubo zabo ngapantsi endleleni." 
Luke19:37 Kwati nxa ebesel’ esondela ngasetambekeni lentaba yeminquma, saqala sonke isihlwele sabadisipile ukuvuya, nokudumisa utixo ngelizwi elikulu, ngenxa yazo zonke izenzo zamandla ababezibonile," 
Luke19:38 besiti: Makatanyusanqeliswe ukumkani ozayo egameni likayehova! Uxolo lube sezulwini, nobungcwalisa enyangweni yapezulu!" 
Luke19:39 Baza inxenye yabafarisi basesihlweleni bati kuye: Mfundisi! tetisa abadisipile bako. 
Luke19:40 Waza wapendula wati kubo: Nditi kuni: Ukuba aba bati tu, amatye aya kudanduluka." 
Luke19:41 Wati nxa ebesondele, wabona isixeko, wasililela," 
Luke19:42 esiti: Akwaba ubute kwa wena, ewe kwa kuwo umhla wako lo, wazazi izinto eziyelela uxolo lwako! kodwa kaloku nje ziwafihlelwe amehlo ako." 
Luke19:43 Ngokuba imihla iya kuza pezu kwako, nxa ziya kuti intshaba zako zibeke udonga ngento ekungqongayo, zikuṙaule, zikuvingcele ngamacala onke," 
Luke19:44 zikuci̔tele emhlabeni, nosapo lwako pakati kwako; zaye zingayi kushiya pakati kwako elinye ilitye pezu kwelinye; ngenxa yokuba ubungalazanga ixesha lokunonelelwa kwako." 
Luke19:45 Waza wangena etempileni, waqala ukugxota abo babetengisa kuyo, nababetenga," 
Luke19:46 esiti kubo: Kuba̔liwe ngokuti: Indlu yam iyindlu yokutandaza; kanti nina niyenzile umqolomba wamabada. 
Luke19:47 Waye efundisa imihla ngemihla etempileni. Kodwa abaperisite abakulu nababa̔li bebefuna ukumbubisa, kwa nabakulu basebantwini;" 
Luke19:48 kanti bebengafumani into abangayenzayo; ngokuba abantu bonke bebesiti nama kuye ukupulapula. 
Luke20:1 Kwaza kwati ngomnye wemihla leyo, nxa ebefundisa abantu etempileni, eshumayela ivangeli, basondela abaperisite abakulu, nababa̔li, kunye nabadala," 
Luke20:2 bateta kuye, besiti: Sixelele, uzenza ezizinto ngegunya lanina? umhlaumbi ungubanina owanika kuwe eligunya?" 
Luke20:3 Koko wapendula wati kubo: Nam ndobuza kuni indawo ibe nye, nize nindixelele ke." 
Luke20:4 Ubapitizesho luka‐Johane beluvela ezulwini, beluvela ebantwini, kusinina?" 
Luke20:5 Baza babuzana omnye nomnye, besiti: Ukuba siti: Ezulwini; woti: Kunganina pofu ukuba anikolwanga nguye?" 
Luke20:6 Kodwa ukuba siti: Ebantwini; bonke abantu bosigibisela ngamatye: ngokuba bekoliwe ukuba u‐Johane ebengumprofite. 
Luke20:7 Baza bapendula ukuba abazi beluvela pina. 
Luke20:8 Wati no‐Yesu kubo: Nam andixeleli nina kungelanina igunya endizenza ezizinto. 
Luke20:9 Waza waqala ukuteta ebantwini umzekeliso lo: Umntu otile watyala isitiya, wasiqashisela kubalimi, wahambela kwelinye ilizwe kwada kwakade." 
Luke20:10 Wati ngexesha elifanelekileyo watuma kubalimi isicaka, ukuze banike kuso kwiziqa̔mo zesitiya. Kodwa abalimi basityabula, basimkisa singenanto." 
Luke20:11 Waza walekela watuma esinye isicaka; neso ke basityabula, basipata ngento ehlazekileyo, basimkisa singenanto." 
Luke20:12 Walekela watuma nesesitatu; nesi ke basilimaza, bamku̔pela pandle." 
Luke20:13 Waza wati umninisitiya: Ndiya kwenza nto nina? ndiya kutuma unyana wam otandiweyo; kungaba lo bakumbona baya kumhlonela. 
Luke20:14 Kodwa bakumbona abalimi abo, babuzana omnye nomnye, besiti: Lo uyindlalifa; yizani, masimbulale, ukuze ilifa libe leletu." 
Luke20:15 Baza bamku̔pela pandle kwesitiya, bambulala. Uya kwenza nto nina ngoko kubo umninisitiya?" 
Luke20:16 Uya kuza atshabalalise abalimi aba, anike isitiya kwabanye. Bati ke bakuva oko: Kwanga kungebe njalo!" 
Luke20:17 Kodwa ebakangele wati: Kuyinto nina oku pofu okuba̔liweyo: Ilitye babelilahlile abaki, elona laba yintloko yegumbi?" 
Luke20:18 Osukuba esiwa pezu kwelolitye, uya kutyunyuzwa; kodwa lowo liwa pezu kwake, liya kumti viti." 
Luke20:19 Baza abaperisite abakulu nababa̔li bafuna ukubeka izandla pezu kwake kwa ngeloxeshana, kanti boyika abantu: ngokuba bebenakene ukuba lomzekeliso wawuteta ngakubo." 
Luke20:20 BAZA ba m gqala, batuma intlola zizenzisa abalungileyo, ukuba zibambe amazwi ake, ukuze bamnikele emandleni nasegunyeni lenkosi." 
Luke20:21 Zaza zambuza, zisiti: Mfundisi! siyazi ukuba uyalungisa ukuteta nokufundisa; kanjalo akubuki isiqu samntu, koko ufundisa indlela katixo ngokwenyaniso:" 
Luke20:22 kufanelekile kuti ukunika umnikelo ku‐Kesare, aku fanelekile, kusinina?" 
Luke20:23 Kodwa wanakana ubuqokolo bazo, wati kuzo: Yinina ukuba nindilinge?" 
Luke20:24 ndiboniseni idenari. Ngokabanina umfanekiso nesiba̔lwa inawo? Zapendula zati: Ngoka‐Kesare. 
Luke20:25 Wayesiti kuzo: Nikelani kambe izinto zika‐Kesare kuye u‐Kesare, nezinto zikatixo kuye utixo." 
Luke20:26 Zakohlwa ke kukubamba amazwi ake ebusweni babantu: zaza zatela nqa impendulo yake, zati cwaka." 
Luke20:27 Kwaye kusiza kuye abatile bakubasadusi, abakanyelayo ukuba kuko uvuko, bambuza," 
Luke20:28 besiti: Mfundisi! u‐Mosesi wasiba̔lela ukuti: Xeshekweni kufayo umkuluwe womntu, enomfazi, afe lowo engenabantwana, makati umninawe wake azeke umfazi wake, amvusele umkuluwe wake inzalo." 
Luke20:29 Kekaloku bekuko abazalwana abasixe̔nxe: waza owokuqala wazeka umfazi, wafa engenabantwana." 
Luke20:30 Waza owesibini wazeka umfazi wake, wati naló wafa engenabantwana." 
Luke20:31 Waza owesitatu wamzeka; benje njalo kwa nabasixe̔nxe; abashiya bantwana ke, bafa nokufa." 
Luke20:32 Wati emveni kwabo bonke wafa nomfazi. 
Luke20:33 Ngako eluvukweni, uba ngumfazi wawupina kubo? ngokuba abasixe̔nxe bebenaye engumfazi." 
Luke20:34 Waza wapendula wati kubo u‐Yesu: Usapo lwelilizwe likoyo luyazeka, luyendiswa kanjako;" 
Luke20:35 kodwa abo babalwa ngokuba befanele ukuzuza elolizwe lizayo, nokuvuka ekufeni, abazeki, abendiswa kanjako:" 
Luke20:36 ngokuba bengenako nokuba babuye bafe: ngokuba befana nengelosi; kanjalo balusapo lukatixo, belusapo lwaseluvukweni." 
Luke20:37 Kodwa ukuba bayavuswa abafileyo, kuxelwe nangu‐Mosesi endaweni yetyolo, akuti uyehova u ngutixo ka‐Abrahame, notixo ka‐Yisake, notixo ka‐Yakobi." 
Luke20:38 Kekaloku aka ngutixo wabafileyo, ungowabahleliyo; ngokuba bonke behleli kuye." 
Luke20:39 Baza bapendula abatile bakubaba̔li, bati: Mfundisi! ulungisile ukutsho." 
Luke20:40 Baye bengabi senakukalipa kwokumbuza nto. 
Luke20:41 Wayesiti kubo: Bati nina ukuti u‐Kristu ungunyana ka‐Davide? 
Luke20:42 Kanti u‐Davide ngokwake uti encwadini yamaculo: Wati uyehova kwinkosi yam: Hlala ngasekunene kum," 
Luke20:43 ndide ndenze intshaba zako zibe sisitulo senyawo zako. 
Luke20:44 U‐Davide ngoko uyambiza ngenkosi; aze ati nina ke ukuba ngunyana wake? 
Luke20:45 Kekaloku nxa bebesiva bonke abantu, wati kubadisipile bake:" 
Luke20:46 Lumkelani ababa̔li, abafuna ukuhamba ngengubo ezinde, abatanda izibuliso ezindaweni zentengo, nezihlalo zapambili ezindlwini zentlanganiso, nendawo zobukulu ezidlweni;" 
Luke20:47 abadlayo izindlu zabahlolokazi, besenza nemitandazo emide ngokuzenzisa: aba baya kwamkela ukugwetywa okukulu ngakumbi." 
Luke21:1 Wati akubeka pezulu wabona abazityebi befaka iminikelo yabo endaweni yendyebo. 
Luke21:2 Wabona nomhlolokazi otile obuhlwempu efaka kona imalanyana zimbini. 
Luke21:3 Waza wati: Ngenyaniso nditi kuni: Lomhlolokazi olihlwempu ubagqitisile bonke ngokufaka: 
Luke21:4 ngokuba bonke aba bebefaka eminikelweni katixo kubo ubuninzi babo; kodwa lo kuko ukuswela kwake ebefaka kwa konke abenokupila ngako. 
Luke21:5 KEKALOKU nxa abatile bebeteta ngayo itempile, ukuba ihonjiwe ngamatye amahle nangamabaso, wati:" 
Luke21:6 Ezizinto enizikangelayo, kuya kuza imihla ekuyo kungayi; kushiywa elinye ilitye pezu kwelinye, elingayi kuwiswa pantsi." 
Luke21:7 Baza bambuza, besiti: Mfundisi! zobako ninina pofu ezizinto? kanjalo woba yinto nina umqondiso, xeshekweni ezizinto ziza kuhla?" 
Luke21:8 Wayesiti yena: Lumkani, ize ningakohliswa. Ngokuba abaninzi beya kuza egameni lam, besiti: Mna ndinguye; kanjalo ixesha selikufupi: zeningayi ke emva kwabo." 
Luke21:9 Kodwa xeshekweni nizivayo imfazwe nempitimpiti, musani ukwetuswa; ngokuba ezizinto zifanele ukuhla tanci; kodwa ukupela akuko kamsinya." 
Luke21:10 Wandula wati kubo: Uhlanga luya kuvukela uhlanga, nobukumkani buya kuvuk ela ubukumkani;" 
Luke21:11 zaziya kubako izingcangcazelo ezikulu zomhlaba ngendawo ngendawo, nendlala, nezifo ezibubisayo; yobako nemibono eyoyikekayo nemiqondiso emikulu ivela ezulwini." 
Luke21:12 Kodwa baya kuti zingekabiko zonke ezizinto, babeke izandla zabo pezu kwenu, ba ni tshutshise, be ni nikela ezindlwini zentlanganiso nasezintolongweni, nisiwa pambi kwokumkani nenkosi ngenxa yegama lam:" 
Luke21:13 okuya kuba yinzuziso yokunqi̔na kwenu. 
Luke21:14 Kumiseleni ngoko ezintliziyweni zenu, ukuba aniyi kucinga ngapambili ukuzitetelela kwenu:" 
Luke21:15 ngokuba ndiya kuninika umlomo nobulumko, abaya kuti bonke abalane benu bakohlwe kukupika nokumelana nabo." 
Luke21:16 Kanjalo niya kungcatshwa nangabazali, nabazalwana, nezalamane, nezihlobo; ewe bonifisa inxenye:" 
Luke21:17 naniya kutiywa nga bantu bonke ngenxa yegama lam. 
Luke21:18 Kanti akuyi kutshabalala nalunye unwele kwintloko yenu. 
Luke21:19 Ngokunyamezela kwenu yilondolozeni imipefumlo yenu. 
Luke21:20 Kekaloku xeshekweni niyibonayo i‐Yerusaleme ingqongiwe yimikosi, yazini oko ukuba sekukufupi ukuci̔takaliswa kwayo." 
Luke21:21 Mabati oko abo base‐Judeya basabele ezintabeni; nabo bapakati kwayo mabemke kona; nabo basezindleni mabangangeni kuyo. 
Luke21:21 Mabati oko abo base‐Judeya basabele ezintabeni; nabo bapakati kwayo mabemke kona; nabo basezindleni mabangangeni kuyo. 
Luke21:22 Ngokuba iyimihla yempindezelo le, yokuba kuzaliseke zonke izinto eziba̔liweyo." 
Luke21:23 Hai kodwa ubunzima babo abamitiyo nabanyisayo kuleyomihla! ngokuba kuya kubako ubunzima obukulu elizweni, nomsindo pakati kwabantu aba." 
Luke21:24 Babeya kuwa ngohlangoti lweṙele, batinjelwe kuzo zonke intlanga; ne‐Yerusaleme yoba inyatelwa ngabaheyideni, ade amaxesha abaheyideni azaliseke." 
Luke21:25 Kwakuya kubako imiqondiso elangeni, nasenyangeni, nasezinkwenkwezini; napezu kwomhlaba usizi olunzima lwentlanga ekuxakekeni; lugquma ulwandle namaza;" 
Luke21:26 zibohla intliziyo zabantu ngokwoyika nokukangela izinto ezizayo emhlabeni: ngokuba amandla asezulwini eya kuzanyazanyiswa. 
Luke21:27 Bandule ukubona unyana wesintu esiza elifini, enamandla nobungcwalisa obukulu." 
Luke21:28 Kekaloku zakuba ezizinto ziqala ukuhla, bekani pezulu, nipakamise intloko zenu; ngokokuba kusondela ukukululwa kwenu." 
Luke21:29 Waza wateta umzekeliso kubo: Kangelani umkiwane, nayo yonke imiti." 
Luke21:30 Xeshekweni isel’ itwasa, niyabona nazi ngokwenu ukuba lise likufupi ihlobo:" 
Luke21:31 kwa njalo nani, xeshekweni nibona ezizinto zisihla, yazini ukuba bukufupi ubukumkani bukatixo." 
Luke21:32 Ngokwenene nditi kuni: Asiyi kuza sidlule isizukulwana esi, zingekenzekanga zonke." 
Luke21:33 Kwodlula izulu nomhlaba; kodwa amazwi am akayi kuza adlule. 
Luke21:34 Zilumkeleni ke, hleze kezenzwe nzima intliziyo zenu ngokudikwa, nangokunxila, nangezitukutezi zobubomi, ize iti imini leyo inifikele ngokwalama:" 
Luke21:35 ngokuba njengomgibe iya kuza pezu kwabo bonke abahleli pezu kwobuso bomhlaba wonke. 
Luke21:36 Papamani ngoko ngamaxesha onke nitandaza, ukuze nibalwe ngokuba nifanele ukusinda kwezizinto zonke eziza kuhla, nokuma pambi kwake unyana wesintu." 
Luke21:37 Waye kekaloku ngemini efundisa etempileni; wati ngobusuku epuma walalisa entabeni ebizwa ngokuti yeyeminquma. 
Luke21:38 Baye bonke abantu besiza kusasa kuye etempileni, ukuza kumva." 
Luke22:1 KEKALOKU umtendeleko wezonka ezingenagwele ubusondela, o‐kutiwa yipasika:" 
Luke22:2 baza bafuna abaperisite abakulu nababa̔li ukuba bangati nina ukumbulala; ngokuba bebesoyika abantu. 
Luke22:3 Wati ke u‐Satane wangena ku‐Jude obebizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Sikariyoti, engowasenanini labalishumi linababini." 
Luke22:3 Wati ke u‐Satane wangena ku‐Jude obebizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Sikariyoti, engowasenanini labalishumi linababini." 
Luke22:4 Waza wemka waya wateta nabaperisite abakulu nenkosi, ukuba angati nina ukumnikela kubo." 
Luke22:5 Baza bavuya, bavumelana naye ukumnika imali." 
Luke22:6 Watakazela ke, wafuna ituba lokumnikela kubo singeko isihlwele." 
Luke22:7 Wada wafika umhla wezonka ezingenagwele, ebekufanele ngawo ukuba kubingwe ipasika." 
Luke22:8 Waza watuma u‐Petrosi no‐Johane, esiti: Hambani niye nisilungisele ipasika, ukuze siyitye." 
Luke22:9 Bati bona kuye: Utanda ukuba silungiselele pina? 
Luke22:10 Wati yena kubo: Bona ke, nakuba ningene esixekweni, niya kukaulelwa ngumntu etwele umpanda wamanzi; mlandeleni yena niye endlwini apo angena kona." 
Luke22:11 Naniya kuti kumniniyo indlu leyo: Uti kuwe umfundisi: Ipina inkambili yendwendwe, apo ndingayityela kona ipasika ndawonye nabadisipile bam?" 
Luke22:12 Waeya kuti lowo anibonise inkambili yapezulu enkulu eyandlalelweyo: lungiselelani kona apo. 
Luke22:13 Bemka ke baya bafumana njengokuba etshilo kubo, bayilungisa ipasika." 
Luke22:14 Kwati kwakufika ixeshana, wahlala pantsi, nabapostile abalishumi linababini kunye naye." 
Luke22:15 Waza wati kubo: Asi nokuba ndinqwenele lepasika ukuyitya ndawonye nani, ndingekeva intlungu:" 
Luke22:16 ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Andisayi kuba satya kuyo, ide izaliseke ebukumkanini bukatixo." 
Luke22:17 Waza wamkela indebe, wabulela, wati: Tabatani le, nabelane;" 
Luke22:18 ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Andisayi kuba sasela kwisiqa̔mo somti weveyine, kude kufike ubukumkani bukatixo." 
Luke22:19 Waza watabata isonka, wabulela, waqezula, wabanika, esiti: Esi singumzimba wam, onikelwa nina; kwenzeni oku kube kukukunjulwa kwam." 
Luke22:20 Ngokunjalo watabata nendebe emveni kwokuba kudliwe, esiti: Lendebe ilucebano olutsha egazini lam, elipalazelwa nina." 
Luke22:21 Kodwa, bona ke, isandla sondingcatshayo sinam etafileni." 
Luke22:22 Ewe unyana wesintu uyemka okunene, njengoko kumisiweyo: kodwa kwoba nzima kulowamntu angcatshwa nguye!" 
Luke22:23 Baza baqala ukubuzisana omnye nomnye, ukuba angaba nguwupina kubo oza kuyenza lento." 
Luke22:24 Kwabekuko nepike pakati kwabo, ukuba nguwupina wakubo obalwayo ngokuba mkulu kwabanye." 
Luke22:25 Waza wati kubo: Okumkani babaheyideni bayabapata ngobukosi, nabo banegunya pezu kwabo bayabizwa ngokuti bangabenzeleli." 
Luke22:26 Kodwa nina aniyi kuba njalo; koko omkulu pakati kwenu makabe njengomncinane, noyinkosi njengokonzayo." 
Luke22:27 Ngokuba nguwupina omkulu? ngohleli ekutyeni, ngokonzayo, kusinina? asi ngulowo na uhleli ekutyeni? kodwa mna ndipakati kwenu njengokonzayo." 
Luke22:28 Nina ke ningabo babemana behlala nam emalingweni am. 
Luke22:29 Nam ndiyamisela nina ubukumkani, njengokuba ubawo emisele mna;" 
Luke22:30 ukuze nitye nisele etafileni yam ebukumkanini bam, nihlale eziteroneni, nigweba izizwe ezilishumi linazibini zo‐Sirayeli." 
Luke22:31 Yayisiti inkosi: Simone, Simone! bona ke, u‐Satane uzibizele nina, ukuba a n ele njengenqolowa." 
Luke22:32 Kodwa mna ndikutandazele wena, ukuze ukolo lwako lungapeli: nawe yiti, nxa ude waguquka, uqinise abazalwana bako." 
Luke22:33 Wati yena kuyo: Nkosi! sendilungile ukuya nawe nasentolongweni nasekufeni. 
Luke22:34 Yati yona: Nditi kuwe, Petrosi! inkuku ayiyi kulila namhla nje, ungekakanyeli katatu ukuba uyandazi." 
Luke22:35 Yaza yati kubo: Okuya ndandinituma ningenasidla, nanxowa, nazihlangu, kenaswela nto na? Bati bona: Nanye." 
Luke22:36 Yandula yati kubo: Kodwa kaloku nje lowo unesidla makasipate, kwa nenxowa kanjalo: nalowo ongenaso, makatengise ngengubo yake, atenge isiṙele." 
Luke22:37 Ngokuba ndisiti kuni: Oku okuba̔liweyo kusafanele ukufezwa kum, okwokuti: Wabalwa nabagqita umteto; ngokuba izinto eziteta ngam zinesipelo." 
Luke22:38 Bati bona: Nkosi! bona ke, nazi iziṙele ezibini. Yayisiti kubo: Kwanele." 
Luke22:39 Waza wapuma u‐Yesu, waya ngokwesiko lake entabeni yeminquma; bati nabadisipile bake bamlandela." 
Luke22:40 Kekaloku akuba ebefikile kwindawo, wati kubo: Tandazani nize ningangeni ekulingweni." 
Luke22:41 Waza washenxa kubo kwanga kumgama wokujulwa kwelitye, waguqa ngamadolo, watandaza," 
Luke22:42 esiti: Bawo! ukuba uyavuma ukususa lendebe kum —: noko makungabi yintando yam eyenziwayo, makube yeyako." 
Luke22:43 Kwaye kubonakala kuye ingelosi ivela ezulwini imomeleza. 
Luke22:44 Waza esekulweni okunzima watandaza ngokunyameka ngakumbi: kwati ukubila kwake kwanga kumatontsi amakulu egazi esiwa pantsi emhlabeni. 
Luke22:45 Wati akusuka ekutandazeni, weza kubadisipile bake, wabafumana belele ubutongo ngosizi," 
Luke22:46 wati kubo: Yinina ukuba nilale? sukani nitandaze, ukuze ningangeni ekulingweni." 
Luke22:47 Kekaloku nxa abesateta, nasi isihlwele ke; nalowo kutiwa ungu‐Jude, owabalishumi linababini, ebehamba pambi kwabo, wasondela ku‐Yesu ukuza kumanga." 
Luke22:47 Kekaloku nxa abesateta, nasi isihlwele ke; nalowo kutiwa ungu‐Jude, owabalishumi linababini, ebehamba pambi kwabo, wasondela ku‐Yesu ukuza kumanga." 
Luke22:48 Waza u‐Yesu wati kuye: Jude! uyangcatsha unyana wesintu ngokwanga na? 
Luke22:48 Waza u‐Yesu wati kuye: Jude! uyangcatsha unyana wesintu ngokwanga na? 
Luke22:49 Kekaloku abo babempahla, bakubona oko kuya kubako, bati kuye: Nkosi! sobeta ngesiṙele kusinina?" 
Luke22:50 Waza umntu otile kubo wabeta isicaka somperisite omkulu, wasinqumla eyokunene indlebe." 
Luke22:51 Koko wapendula u‐Yesu wati: Vumelani kude kube lapa. Waza wacukumisa indlebe yaso, wasipilisa." 
Luke22:52 Waza u‐Yesu wati kubo abaperisite abakulu, nenkosi zetempile, nabadala, ababemzumile: Nipumile neziṙele nenduku na, njengokungati nibe nipuma ngakulo ibada?" 
Luke22:53 Ndakuba bendinani etempileni imihla ngemihla, anolula zandla ngakum: kodwa eli lixeshana lenu, namandla obumnyama." 
Luke22:54 Bati bakuba bebembambile, bamr̔ola, bamsa endlwini yomperisite omkulu. Waza u‐Petrosi walandela ekude." 
Luke22:55 Kekaloku nxa bebebasile umlilo pakati kwekusi, nanxa bebehleli pantsi ndawonye, wahlala pantsi u‐Petrosi pakati kwabo." 
Luke22:56 Sati isicakazana esitile sakumbona ehleli pantsi ngasemlilweni, samjongela, sati: Naló ebenaye." 
Luke22:57 Koko wamkanyelayo, esiti: Nkazanandini! andimazi." 
Luke22:58 Kwasekumzuzwana omnye wambona wati: Nawe ungowakubo. Koko u‐Petrosi wati: Mntundini! andinjalo. 
Luke22:59 Yati yakugqita yanga yiyure inye, omnye umntu waqinisa ukutshoza, esiti: Ngokwenyaniso naló ebenaye; ngokuba kwa yena engum‐Galili." 
Luke22:60 Koko wati u‐Petrosi: Mntundini! andiyazi into oyitetayo. Yaselisiti kwa oko, nxa ebesateta, yalila inkuku." 
Luke22:61 Yaza yajika inkosi, yamkangela u‐Petrosi. Waza u‐Petrosi wakumbula ilizwi lenkosi, okokuba ibitshilo kuye ukuti: Ingekalili inkuku, uya kundikanyela katatu." 
Luke22:62 Waselepuma ngapandle u‐Petrosi, walila ngento ebuṙaṙa." 
Luke22:63 Aza amadoda abembamba u‐Yesu amhleka, a m tyabula:" 
Luke22:64 ati akuba ebemgubungele amehlo, ambeta ebusweni, ambuza, esiti: Laula, wabetwa ngubanina?" 
Luke22:65 Nezinye izinto ezininzi ebeziteta ngakuye ngokugxeka. 
Luke22:66 Kwati kwakuba kuse kusile, kwahlanganisana abadala babantu, nabaperisite abakulu nababa̔li, bamr̔olela entlanganisweni yabo, besiti:" 
Luke22:67 Unguye u‐Kristu kusinina? sixelele. Wayesiti kubo: Ukuba ndiyanixelela, aniyi kukolwa;" 
Luke22:68 nokuba ndiyabuza nam, aniyi kundipendula, aniyi ku ndi kulula kanjako." 
Luke22:69 Emveni kwakaloku nje unyana wesintu woba ehleli ngasekunene kwamandla katixo. 
Luke22:70 Baza bati bonke: Wena pofu unguye unyana katixo na? Waza wati kubo: Nitsho nina, ukuba ndinguye." 
Luke22:71 Bati bona: Sisafunela nina ubunqi̔na? ngokuba tina ngokwetu sivile ngomlomo wake. 
Luke23:1 WAZA wesuka kwa wonke umhlambi wabo, wamr̔olela ku‐Pilati." 
Luke23:2 Kekaloku baqala ukumnika ityala, besiti: Samfumana lo epambukisa uhlanga lwetu, esalela ukunika iminikelo ku‐Kesare kanjalo, esiti kwa yena ungu‐Kristu ukumkani." 
Luke23:3 Waza u‐Pilati wambuza, esiti: Ungukumkani wama‐Juda na? Wapendula kuye wati: Utsho wena." 
Luke23:4 Waza u‐Pilati wati kubaperisite abakulu nakwizihlwele: Andifumani tyala kulomntu. 
Luke23:5 Koko bebejoka ngakumbi, besiti: Uyavuselela abantu, efundisa kuyo yonke i‐Judeya, eqalile kuyo i‐Galili kwada kwalapa." 
Luke23:5 Koko bebejoka ngakumbi, besiti: Uyavuselela abantu, efundisa kuyo yonke i‐Judeya, eqalile kuyo i‐Galili kwada kwalapa." 
Luke23:6 Wati u‐Pilati akuva i‐Galili, wabuza ukuba umntu lowo ebengum‐Galili na." 
Luke23:7 Waza akuqonda ukuba ungowasebukosini buka‐Herodi, wamtuma ku‐Herodi, obeko naye e‐Yerusaleme kwezintsuku." 
Luke23:8 Wati u‐Herodi akubona u‐Yesu, wavuya kunene; ngokuba kube kukade efuna ukumbona, ngenxa yokuba ebesiva izinto ezininzi ngaye; ebetemba nokuba uya kubona umqondiso usenziwa nguye." 
Luke23:9 Waza wambuza ngamazwi amaninzi; kodwa akampendula nto. 
Luke23:10 Bebemi nabaperisite abakulu nababa̔li, bemnika ityala ngamandla." 
Luke23:11 Waza u‐Herodi wamdela, kunye namasodati ake, wamhleka, wamambatisa isivato esikazimlayo, wabuya wamtuma ku‐Pilati." 
Luke23:12 Bati kekaloku u‐Pilati no‐Herodi kwa ngalomini baxolelana: ngokuba bebefudula benobutshaba omnye nomnye. 
Luke23:13 Waza u‐Pilati akuba ebebizele ndawonye kuye abaperisite abakulu, nabapati, nabantu," 
Luke23:14 wati kubo: Nimzisile kum umntu lo, njengokuba engosongayo abantu; kekaloku bona ke, ndimbuzile ebusweni benu nje, andifumananga tyala kulomntu, ngezozinto nimnika ityala ngazo:" 
Luke23:15 aka fumana no‐Herodi kanjalo; ngokuba ndindanituma kuye; kanti bona ke, akuko nto efanele ukufa eyenziweyo nguye:" 
Luke23:16 ndiya kuti ngoko ndimbete ndimkulule. 
Luke23:17 (Kekaloku ebefanelwe kukuti ngomtendeleko lowo abakululele umbanjwa abe mnye.) 
Luke23:18 Kodwa badanduluka wonke umhlambi kunye, besiti: Susa lo, usikululele u‐Baraba:" 
Luke23:19 (umntu obete ngenxa yempitimpiti etile ebe yenziwe esixekweni nombulalo, waposelwa entolongweni.)" 
Luke23:20 Wandula u‐Pilati wabuya wateta kubo, efuna ukukulula u‐Yesu." 
Luke23:21 Kuloko bebememeza, besiti: Mkuruseshe, mkuruseshe yena." 
Luke23:22 Waza wati kubo ngokwesitatu: Wenze ukukohlakala kunina pofu lo? andifumananga tyala lokuba afe kuye: ndiya kuti ngoko ndimbete ndimkulule. 
Luke23:23 Kodwa bebenyakatisa ngamazwi amakulu, bebiza ukuba akuruseshwe. Ada amazwi abo nawabaperisite oyisa." 
Luke23:24 Waza u‐Pilati wagweba ukuba kwenziwe ngesibizo sabo: 
Luke23:25 wabakululela ke lowo ubeposelwe entolongweni ngenxa yempitimpiti nombulalo, oyena babembiza: kodwa u‐Yesu wamnikela ekutandeni kwabo." 
Luke23:26 Baza bati bakuba bebemr̔ola, babamba u‐Simone, umntu otile wase‐Kirene, obevela ezindleni, bayibeka pezu kwake ikuruse, ukuba ayitwale emva kwo‐Yesu." 
Luke23:27 Kekaloku ebelandelwa sisihlwele esikulu sabantu, nesabafazi, abebesenza isijwili nesililo ngaye." 
Luke23:28 Koko u‐Yesu ejikele ngakubo wati: Zintombi zase‐Yerusaleme! ningalili pezu kwam, kodwa lilani pezu kwenu napezu kwabantwana benu:" 
Luke23:29 ngokuba, bona ke, imihla isiza ekuyo kuya kutiwa: Banetamsanqa abazindlolo, nezizalo ezingazalanga, namabele anganyisanga." 
Luke23:30 Baya kwandula baqale ukuti ezintabeni: Siweleni; nasezindulini: Sigubungeleni. 
Luke23:31 Ngokuba, xeshekweni bazenza ezizinto kumti oluhlaza, kuya kuhla nto nina kowomileyo?" 
Luke23:32 Kwaye kur̔olwa nabanye bebabini, abenzi benkohlakalo, ukuya kubulawa kunye naye." 
Luke23:33 Bati bakufika endaweni ebizwayo ngokuti yeyenkankani, bamkuruseshela kona, kwa nabenzi benkohlakalo, omnye ngasekunene, nomnye ngasekohlo." 
Luke23:34 Wayesiti u‐Yesu: Bawo! baxolele; ngokuba bengazi into abayenzayo. Bati bezaba ingubo zake, benza amaqashiso." 
Luke23:35 Kekaloku bebemi abantu bebonela. Baza bamsinekela, kwa nabapati kunye nabo, besiti: Wabasindisa abanye, makazisindise yena ngokwake, ukuba lo unguye u‐Kristu, umqashwa katixo." 
Luke23:36 Kanjalo namasodati ebemhleka, esiza kuye, emzisela neyasine," 
Luke23:37 esiti nokuti: Ukuba wena ungukumkani wama‐Juda, zisindise." 
Luke23:38 Kwaye kuko nesiba̔lwa siba̔liwe pezu kwake ngamagama angokwama‐Girike, nangokwama‐Roma, nangokwama‐Hebere, sokuti: Lo ungukumkani wama‐juda." 
Luke23:39 Wati kekaloku omnye wabenzi benkohlakalo abebexo̔nyiwe wamgxeka, esiti: Ukuba wena unguye u‐Kristu, zisindise nati." 
Luke23:40 Kodwa wapendula omnye wamtetisa, esiti: Akumoyiki utixo nawe na, ukwa koku kona ukugwetywa nje?" 
Luke23:41 Nati okunene sikuko ngokulungileyo; ngokuba sikwamkele okuyelelana nezinto esazenzayo; kodwa lo akenza nto esisono. 
Luke23:42 Waza wati ku‐Yesu: Ndikumbule, Nkosi! xeshekweni uzayo ebukumkanini bako." 
Luke23:43 Waza u‐Yesu wati kuye: Ngokwenene nditi kuwe: Namhla nje uya kubako nam eparadisi. 
Luke23:44 Yanga yayiyure yesitandatu, kwaza kwabako ubumnyama pezu kwalo lonke ilizwe yada yayiyure yesitoba." 
Luke23:45 Lenziwa mnyama nelanga; kanjalo ikuselo lendawo eyingcwele laṙazulwa pakati. 
Luke23:46 Waza wadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu u‐Yesu, wati: Bawo! ndiyanikela umoya wam ezandleni zako. Wati akuba ebetshilo waqauka umpefumlo." 
Luke23:47 Kekaloku inkosikulu yakubona into eyenzekileyo, yadumisa utixo, isiti: Ngokwenyaniso umntu lo ebengolungileyo." 
Luke23:48 Bati nabantu bonke abebebutanele lombonelo, bebona izinto ezenzekileyo, babuya bebeta izifuba zabo." 
Luke23:49 Bebemi nabo bonke babesazana naye bekude, kwa nabafazi abebempelekile evela e‐Galili, bekangela ezizinto." 
Luke23:50 Kekaloku bona ke, indoda egama lingu‐Josefe, ingumpakati, indoda elungileyo nenobulungisa," 
Luke23:51 (yona le ibingavumelene necebo lamanye nesenzo sawo,) eyase‐Arimateya isixeko sama‐Juda, nebilinda ubukumkani bukatixo nayo," 
Luke23:52 yona le yeza ku‐Pilati, yacela umzimba ka‐Yesu." 
Luke23:53 Yaza yawutula, yawusongela eqiyeni, yawubeka encw̔abeni elimbelweyo eweni, apo kwaye kungazanga kulale mntu kona." 
Luke23:54 Lomhla ubungowokulungiselela, nesabata ibisondela." 
Luke23:55 Bati kekaloku nabafazi, abo bebezile naye bepuma e‐Galili, balandela, babona incw̔aba, nokuba kwatiwa nina ukubeka umzimba wake." 
Luke23:56 Babuya ke, balungisa izimnandi namafuta emore; baza bapumla ngesabata njengokwomyalelo." 
Luke24:1 KEKALOKU ngolwokuqala usuku lweveki, kwakuza kuti qi̔p’ ukusa, beza encw̔abeni, bezisa izimnandi ababezilungisile, n abafazi abatile kunye nabo." 
Luke24:2 Bati ilitye balifumana liqengqiwe encw̔abeni. 
Luke24:3 Baza bakungena abafumana umzimba wenkosi u‐Yesu. 
Luke24:4 Kwaza kwati ekuxakekeni kwabo ngako oku, bona ke, amadoda amabini ema ngakubo enezivato ezibengezelayo." 
Luke24:5 Kekaloku bakuba benokwoyika bona, betoba ubuso ngasemhlabeni, ati kubo: Yinina ukuba nifune ohleliyo pakati kwabafileyo?" 
Luke24:6 Akako apa, uvukile. Kumbulani okokuba wateta kuni, nxa ebesese‐Galili," 
Luke24:7 esiti: Unyana wesintu ufanele ukunikelwa ezandleni zabantu abangaboni, nokukuruseshwa, nokuti ngomhla wesitatu abuye avuke." 
Luke24:8 Baza bakumbula amazwi ake; 
Luke24:9 bati bakuba bebuyile encw̔abeni, bashumayela ezizinto zonke kwabalishumi elinamnye, nakubo bonke abanye." 
Luke24:10 Wayengu‐Mariya wase‐Magadala, no‐Johana, no‐Mariya unina ka‐Yakobi, nabo bafazi abanye abebenabo, abaxelela abapostile ezizinto." 
Luke24:11 Aza amazwi abo ati kubo anga kukutetateta kodwa, baye bengakolwa ngabo ke." 
Luke24:12 Koko u‐Petrosi wesuka wagidimela encw̔abeni; wati etobile pantsi wabona iqiya zokubopa zilele zodwa; waza wemka ekutela nqa pakati kwake oko kwenzekileyo. 
Luke24:13 Kekaloku bona ke, ababini kubo babe kwa ngalomini besiya emzini ukude ne‐Yerusaleme izitadiya zingamashumi matandatu, ogama liyi‐Emmayusi." 
Luke24:14 Baye bencokola ke omnye nomnye ngezozinto zonke ezibe zihlile. 
Luke24:15 Kwaza kwati nxa bebencokola babuzisana, wasondela u‐Yesu ngokwake wabapeleka." 
Luke24:16 Kodwa amehlo abo ebebanjwa ukuba bangabi nakumazi. 
Luke24:17 Wayesiti kubo: Zindawo zinina ezi, enitetelana ngazo nihamba, nikedamile nje?" 
Luke24:18 Wapendula omnye, lowo ugama lingu‐Keleyopasi, wati kuye: Wena uhlala njengowasemzini kodwa e‐Yerusaleme na, ungazazanga nje izinto ezenzekileyo kuyo ngezintsuku?" 
Luke24:19 Waza wati kubo: Zipina? Bati bona kuye: Ezingaye u‐Yesu wase‐Nazarete, obengumprofite, enamandla ekwenzeni nasekuteteni ebusweni bukatixo nabo bonke abantu:" 
Luke24:20 nokokuba abaperisite abakulu nabapati betu bamnikela ekugwetyweni kwokuba afe, bamkurusesha." 
Luke24:21 Kodwa tina sibe sitemba ukuba unguye oza kukulula o‐Sirayeli. Kanjako kambe, kunye nako konke oku, namhla ngumhla wesitatu kuseloko zenzekayo ezizinto." 
Luke24:22 Ewe nabafazi abatile kwabetu basimangalisa, abebeko kusasa encw̔abeni;" 
Luke24:23 abati bengafumananga umzimba wake, beza, besiti babonile nesibonakalo sengelosi, ezati uhleli." 
Luke24:24 Kanjalo abatile babakuti baya encw̔abeni, bafumana njalo njengokuba bebetshilo nabafazi; kodwa yena abambona." 
Luke24:25 Waza yena wati kubo: Nina bangenakuqonda nabantliziyo zibutuntu ukukolwa kuko konke abakutetileyo abaprofite! 
Luke24:26 ebengafanele na u‐Kristu ukuziva ezizinto, nokungena ebungcwaliseni bake?" 
Luke24:27 Waza waqala ngo‐Mosesi nangabaprofite bonke, wabatyilela kuzo zonke iziba̔lo izinto eziteta ngaye yena." 
Luke24:28 Bada basondela emzini apo bebesiya kona: wati yena wenza ngokungati uya kugqita. 
Luke24:29 Baza bamqu̔ba, besiti: Hlala nati, kuba kuza kuhlwa, isangene imini ke. Waza wangena ukuya kuhlala nabo." 
Luke24:30 Kwaye kute akuba ebehleli pantsi ndawonye nabo, watabata isonka wabulela, waza waqezula wanikela kubo." 
Luke24:31 Asuka agatyulwa amehlo abo, bamazi ke: waza wati shwaka kubo." 
Luke24:32 Baza bati omnye kwomnye: Intliziyo yetu ibingatshi na pakati kwetu, nxa ebeteta kuti endleleni, nanxa ebesanekela iziba̔lo?" 
Luke24:33 Baza besuka kwa ngeloxeshana, babuyela e‐Yerusaleme, babafumana bebutene ndawonye abalishumi elinamnye nabebenabo;" 
Luke24:34 abebesiti: Inkosi ivukile ngokwenyaniso, yabonakala ku‐Simone." 
Luke24:35 Kanjalo bona batyela oko bekuhlile endleleni nokokuba yaziswa kubo ekuqezulweni kwesonka. 
Luke24:36 Kekaloku bakuba bebeteta ezizinto, wema u‐Yesu ngokwake pakati kwabo, wati kubo: Uxolo malube kuni!" 
Luke24:37 Koko benokwetuka nokwoyika bebeba bayabona umoya. 
Luke24:38 Waza wati kubo: Yinina ukuba nixalile? kunganina nokuba izicamango zivuke ezintliziyweni zenu? 
Luke24:39 kangelani izandla zam nenyawo zam, ukuba ndim isiqu sam: ndicofeni, nikangele; ngokuba umoya engenanyama namatambo, njengokuba nibona ndinazo mna." 
Luke24:40 Waza wati akuba etshilo wababonisa izandla nenyawo. 
Luke24:41 Kekaloku bengekakolwa ngokuvuya, besiti nqa nokuti nqa, wati kubo: Ninento yokudla na apa?" 
Luke24:42 Bamnikela isiqendu sentlanzi eyojiweyo, nentwana yentlango zobusi." 
Luke24:43 Waza watabata watya ebusweni babo. 
Luke24:44 Wayesiti kubo: Ngawo la amazwi endawatetayo kuni, nxa bendiseko nani, okokuba zifanele ukuzalisekiswa zonke izinto eziba̔liweyo ngam emtetweni ka‐Mosesi, nasebaprofiteni, nasemaculweni." 
Luke24:45 Wandula watyila ingqiqo yabo, ukuba baqonde iziba̔lo," 
Luke24:46 wati kubo: Kuba̔liwe ngokunjalo, bekufanele nangokunjalo ukuba u‐Kristu eve intlungu, nokuba abuye avuke ekufeni ngomhla wesitatu," 
Luke24:47 nokuba kushunyayelwe egameni lake uguquko noxolelwa lwezono pakati kwazo zonke intlanga, kuqalwa e‐Yerusaleme." 
Luke24:48 Nani ke, ningamanqi̔na ezizinto." 
Luke24:49 Kanjalo bona ke, ndiyatuma isibambiso sikabawo pezu kwenu; kodwa hlalani nina esixekweni e‐Yerusaleme, nide nambatiswe amandla evela enyangweni." 
Luke24:50 Waza wabakokela pandle kwada kwase‐Betaniya, wapakamisa izandla zake, wabatamsanqelisa." 
Luke24:51 Kwaye kute ekubatamsanqeliseni kwake, wahlukana nabo, wenyuselwa ezulwini." 
Luke24:52 Baza bambedesha, babuyela e‐Yerusaleme ngovuyo olukulu." 
Luke24:53 Kanjalo bebehlala beko etempileni, bedumisa bebonga utixo. Amene." 
John1:1 EKUQALEKENI ebeko u‐Lizwi, Waye u‐Lizwi ebeko kutixo, ebe ngutixo u‐Lizwi kanjako." 
John1:2 Yena lo ebeko ekuqalekeni kutixo. 
John1:3 Zonke izinto zenziwa nguye; nangapandle kwake akwenziwa nanye into eyenziweyo. 
John1:4 Kuye yena bebuko ubomi; nobomi obo bebulukanyiso lwabantu. 
John1:5 Luti ukanyiso olu lukanye ebumnyameni; kanti ubumnyama abuluqiqanga. 
John1:6 Kwavela umntu etunyiwe ngutixo, ogama lingu‐Johane." 
John1:7 Yena lo wezela ukunqi̔na, ukuba anqi̔ne ngalo ukanyiso, ukuze bonke bakolwe ngaye." 
John1:8 Ebengelulo ukanyiso yena: koko wezayo ukuba anqi̔ne ngalo ukanyiso. 
John1:9 Lona ukanyiso oluyinyaniso belululo olukanyisayo bonke abantu besiza elizweni. 
John1:10 Ebeko elizweni, kanjalo ilizwe lenziwa nguye, kanti ilizwe alimazanga." 
John1:11 Weza kokwake, kanti abake abamamkelanga." 
John1:12 Kodwa bonke abamamkelayo, wapa bona igunya lokuba babe lusapo lukatixo, abo bakolwayo egameni lake:" 
John1:13 abebenga zelwe ngegazi, nangentando yenyama, nangentando yomntu, koko bebezelwe ngotixo." 
John1:14 Waza u‐Lizwi waba yinyama, wahlala pakati kwetu, (sati kekaloku sakangela ubungcwalisa bake, ubungcwalisanjengabo obokupela kwozelweyo evela kutixo,) ezele lufeie nayinyaniso." 
John1:15 U‐Johane wanqi̔na ngaye, wadanduluka, esiti: Ebenguye lo endati ngaye: Ozayo emva kwam, uze kuba pambili kum; ngokuba ebeko ndingekabiko mna." 
John1:16 Nasekuzaleni kwake tina sonke samkela, kwa nofefe pezu kwofefe." 
John1:17 Ngokokuba umteto wanikwa ngo‐Mosesi; kweza ufefe nenyaniso ngo‐Yesu Kristu. 
John1:18 Akuko mutu oke wambona utixo nakanye: unyana okupela kwozelweyo, osesifubeni soyise, oyena wamtyila." 
John1:19 KEKALOKU oku kukunqi̔na kuka‐Johane, xeshekweni ama‐Juda ase‐Yerusaleme atuma abaperisite naba‐Levi, ukuze babuze kuye ukuti: Wena ungubanina?" 
John1:20 Waza wavuma, akakanyela ke; ewe wavuma, esiti: Andinguye u‐Kristu." 
John1:21 Baza babuza kuye ukuti: Uti nina pofu? unguye na u‐Elija? Wayesiti: Andinguye. Bati: Unguye na umprofite lowo? Wapendula wati: Hai. 
John1:22 Bati ngoko kuye: Ungubanina? ukuze sibanike impendulo abo basitumayo: uti nina ngesiqu sako? 
John1:23 Wati: Ndililizwi lodandulukayo entlango: Lungelelanisani indlela kayehova; njengokuba bekutshiwo ngu‐Yisaya umprofite. 
John1:24 Kekaloku abo babetunyiwe bebengabakubo abafarisi. 
John1:25 Baza bambuza, bati kuye: Yinina pofu ukuba ubapitizeshe, ukuba akunguye u‐Kristu, kwa no‐Elija, kwa nomprofite lowo?" 
John1:26 Wapendula kubo u‐Johane, esiti: Mna ndiyabapitizesha ngamanzi: kodwa kumi pakati kwenu oningamaziyo;" 
John1:27 nguye oti, esiza emva kwam, uze kuba pambili kum, endingafanele mna ukuba ndiwutukulule umtya wesihlangu sake." 
John1:28 Ezizinto zenzeka e‐Betabara pesheya kwe‐Yoredane, apo u‐Johane ebebapitizesha kona." 
John1:29 Ngomhla olandelayo u‐Johane wambona u‐Yesu esiza kuye, wati: Kangela imvana katixo, esusayo isono selizwe!" 
John1:30 Nguye lo endati ngaye: Kuza emva kwam umntu, oze kuba pambili kum; ngokuba ebeko ndingekabiko mna." 
John1:31 Ndaye ndingamazi ke: koko ukuze abonakaliswe ko‐Sirayeli, kukona ndezayo mna ndibapitizesha ngamanzi." 
John1:32 Waza wanqi̔na u‐Johane, esiti: Ndibonile umoya esihla njengehobe ezulwini, waza wahlala pezu kwake." 
John1:33 Ndaye ndingamazi ke: koko lowo wanditumayo ukuba ndibapitizeshe ngamanzi, oyena wati kum: Lowo usukuba ubona umoya esihla ehlala pezu kwake, nguye lo obapitizesha ngomoya oyingcwele." 
John1:34 Ndibonile ke, ndinqi̔nile kanjalo ukuba lo unguye unyana katixo." 
John1:35 Kanjako ngomhla olandelayo ebemi u‐Johane, kwa nababini kubadisipile bake." 
John1:36 Waza emkangele u‐Yesu ehamba wati: Kangela imvana katixo! 
John1:37 Bati abobadisipile ababini bamva eteta, bamlandela u‐Yesu." 
John1:38 Wajika ke u‐Yesu, wababona belandela, wati kubo: Nifuna nto nina? Bati bona kuye: Rabi! (oko kukuti ngokukunyushwa, Mfundisi!) uhlala pina?" 
John1:39 Wati kubo: Yizani nibone. Beza babona apo ahlala kona, bahlala kuye imini leyo; yabiyiyure yanga yeyeshumi." 
John1:40 Ebengu‐Andreya umninawe ka‐Simone Petrosi, omnye kwabo babini ababevile ku‐Johane ngo‐Yesu, bamlandela." 
John1:41 Wati yena lo kuqala wafumana umkuluwe wake u‐Simone, wati kuye: Simfumene u‐Mesiya: (okukuti ngokukunyushwa, u‐Kristu.)" 
John1:42 Waza wamzisa ku‐Yesu. Wati u‐Yesu emkangele ke: Wena ungu‐Simone, unyana ka‐Jona; uya kubizwa ngo‐Kefasi; (okuti ukukunyushwa ngo‐Petrosi.)" 
John1:43 Ngomhla olandelayo wanga u‐Yesu angemka ukuya e‐Galili: waza wafumana u‐Filipi, wati kuye: Ndilandele." 
John1:44 Kekaloku u‐Filipi ebengowase‐Betesayida, kwisixeko sika‐Andreya no‐Petrosi." 
John1:45 U‐Filipi wafumana u‐Natanayeli, wati kuye: Lowo kwaba̔lwa ngaye ngu‐Mosesi emtetweni nangabaprofite, simfumene, u‐Yesu unyana ka‐Josefe, owase‐Nazarete." 
John1:46 Waza u‐Natanayeli wati kuye: Kungavela e‐Nazarete into elungileyo yinina? Wati u‐Filipi kuye: Yiza ubone. 
John1:47 U‐Yesu wambona u‐Natanayeli esiza kuye, wati ngaye: Nanku um‐Sirayeli ngenyaniso, ekungeko nkohliso kuye!" 
John1:48 Wati u‐Natanayeli kuye: Uzuze pina ukundazi kwako? Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Engekakubizi u‐Filipi, wakuba ubungapantsikwomkiwane, ndakubona." 
John1:49 Wapendula u‐Natanayeli wati kuye: Rabi! unguye unyana katixo, unguye ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli." 
John1:50 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Ngokokuba ndati kuwe, ndakubona ngapantsi kwomkiwane, uyakolwa na? uya kubona izinto ezinkulu kwezi." 
John1:51 Waza wati kuye; Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuwe: Emveni kwoku niya kubona izulu livulekile, nengelosi zikatixo zinyuka zisihla nokuhla pezu kwonyana wesintu." 
John2:1 KWAZA ngomhla wesitatu kwabako umtshato e‐Kana yase‐Galili; waye unina ka‐Yesu ebekona. 
John2:2 Kwamenywa no‐Yesu, nabadisipile bake, ukuza emtshatweni." 
John2:3 Kwati kwakupela iveyine, wati unina ka‐Yesu kuye: Abanaveyine." 
John2:4 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Ndiyinto nina kuwe, Mfazi? alikafiki ixeshana lam." 
John2:5 Wati unina kubakonzi: Into asukuba eyitsho kuni, yenzeni." 
John2:6 Kwaye kumi kona imipanda yelitye mitandatu, ngesiko lokuhlambulula kwama‐Juda, ibamba ngeminye ibate zimbini umhlaumbi zintatu." 
John2:7 Wati u‐Yesu kubo: Zalisani imipanda ngamanzi. Bayizalisa ke kwada kwakuwo umpeto. 
John2:8 Waza wati kubo: Tululani kaloku, nitwalele kumpati womtendeleko. Batwala ke." 
John2:9 Kekaloku nxa umpati womtendeleko ebevile lomanzi abenzwe iveyine, engazi ukuba ivela pina; (kodwa bebesazi abakonzi abebetulule amanzi:) umpati womtendeleko wambiza umyeni," 
John2:10 wati kuye: Bonke abantu bayabeka iveyine elungileyo kuqala; bati xeshekweni kukolisile ukuselwa, bandule babeke leyo imbi kuyo: wena uyigcinile iveyine elungileyo kwada kwakaloku." 
John2:11 Oku ukuqala kwemimangaliso yake wakwenza u‐Yesu e‐Kana yase‐Galili, wabonakalisa ubungewalisa bake; baza bakolwa kuye abadisipile bake." 
John2:12 Emveni kwoku wehla waya e‐Kapenayume, yena, nonina, nabazalwana bake, nabadisipile bake: baza bahlala kona intsuku ezingeninzi." 
John2:13 KWAYE kube kuba kufupi ipasika yama‐Juda, wati u‐Yesu wenyukela e‐Yerusaleme." 
John2:14 Waza wabafumana etempileni abebetengisa ngenkabi nangezimvu nangamahobe, nabananisi bemali behleli." 
John2:15 Wati akuba ebenze iziniya ngentanjana, wabagxota bonke etempileni, kwa nezimvu nenkabi, wapalaza imali yabananeli, netafile zabo wazipenula;" 
John2:16 nabo abebetengisa ngamahobe watsho kubo ukuti: Susani apa ezizinto: ningayenzi indlu kabawo indlu yentengo. 
John2:17 Baza bakumbula abadisipile bake ukuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Ukuzondelela kwam indlu yako undidlile. 
John2:18 Andula apendula ama‐Juda ati kuye: Ngumqondiso mnina usibonisa wona, usenza ezizinto nje?" 
John2:19 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuwo: Ci̔tani itempile le, ndandiya kubuya ndiyimise pakati kwentsuku ntatu." 
John2:20 Andula ati ama‐Juda: Yiminyaka emashumi mane anamitandatu itempile le ibisakiwa ngayo; nawe woyimisa pakati kwentsuku ntatu na? 
John2:21 Kodwa yena ebesitsho ngayo itempile yomzimba wake. 
John2:22 Ngako okuya abevukile ekufeni, bakumbula abadisipile bake ukuba ebekutsho oku kubo: baza bakolwa sisiba̔lo, nalilizwi abelitetile u‐Yesu." 
John2:23 Kekaloku xeshekweni ebese‐Yerusaleme epasikeni, emtendelekweni, abaninzi bakolwa egameni lake, bebona imimangaliso yake abeyenza." 
John2:24 Kodwa u‐Yesu ngokwake ebengazinikeli kubo, ngenxa yokuba ebesazi abantu bonke," 
John2:25 nangokuba ebengasweli ukuba kunqi̔nwe mntu ngoluntu; kuba ebesazi ngokwake oko kube kuko ebantwini. 
John3:1 Kwaye kuko umntu wakubo abafarisi, ogama lalingu‐Nikodemo, umpati wama‐Juda:" 
John3:2 yena lo weza ku‐Yesu ngobusuku, wati kuye: Rabi! siyazi ukuba ungumfundisi ovele kutixo; ngokuba kungeko mntu ongayenzayo lemimangaliso oyenzayo wena, nxa utixo angenaye." 
John3:3 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuwe: Xeshekweni umntu angazalwanga ngokutsha, akangebone ubukumkani bukatixo." 
John3:4 Wati u‐Nikodemo kuye: Angati nina umntu ukuzalwa akuba mdala? angangena esizalweni sonina ngokwesibini na, azalwe ke?" 
John3:5 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuwe: Xeshekweni umntu angazalwanga ngamanzi na ngumoya, akangangene ebukumkanini bukatixo." 
John3:6 Okuzelweyo yinyama, kuyinyama; nokuzelweyo ngumoya, kungumoya." 
John3:7 Ungabi nakuti nqa ukuba ndati kuwe: Nifanele ukuzalwa ngokutsha. 
John3:8 Umoya uyavutela apo utanda ukuvutela kona, nesandi sawo uyasiva; koko ungazi ukuba uvela pina, nokuba usinga pina: unjalo osukuba ezelwe ngumoya." 
John3:9 Wapendula u‐Nikodemo wati kuye: Zingati nina ezizinto ukubako? 
John3:10 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye. Unguye umfundisi wo‐Sirayeli na, nezizinto akuzazi?" 
John3:11 Ngokwenene, Ngokwenene nditi kuwe: Oko sikwaziyo siyakuteta, noko sikubonileyo siyakunqi̔nela; nokunqi̔na kwetu anikwamkeli." 
John3:12 Ukuba ndinixelele izinto zasemhlabeni, naza anakolwa, noti nina ukukolwa, xeshekweni ndinixelela izinto zasezulwini?" 
John3:13 Kanjalo akuko mntu onyukeleyo ezulwini, kupela lowo wehlayo ezulwini, kwa unyana wesintu osezulwini." 
John3:14 Nanjengokuba u‐Mosesi wapakamisa inyoka entlango, kwa njalo ufanele ukupakanyiswa unyana wesintu;" 
John3:15 ukuze osukuba ekolwa kuye angabubi, koko abe nobomi obungunapakade." 
John3:16 Ngokuba utixo walitanda ilizwe kangaka, wada wanika unyana wake okupela kwozelweyo, ukuze osukuba ekolwa kuye angabubi, koko abe nobomi obungunapakade." 
John3:17 Ngokuba utixo engatumanga unyana wake elizweni, ukuze aligwebe ilizwe; koko wamtuma ukuze ilizwe lisindiswe ngaye." 
John3:18 Okolwayo kuye akanakugwetywa; kodwa ongakolwayo usel’ egwetyiwe, ngokokuba engakolwanga egameni lonyana okupela kwozelweyo katixo." 
John3:19 Kuko oku ke okugwebayo, ukuba ukukanya kungenile elizweni, kanti abantu babutanda ubumnyama ngapezu kwako ukukanya; ngokuba imisebenzi yabo ibikohlakele." 
John3:20 Ngokuba lowo usukuba ekwenza okubi ekutiya ukukanya, engezi ekukanyeni kanjako, ukuze imisebenzi yake ingohlwaywa." 
John3:21 Kodwa lowo uyenza inyaniso uyeza ekukanyeni, ukuze imisebenzi yake ibonakaliswe, ukuba yenziwe kutixo." 
John3:22 EMVENI kwezizinto weza u‐Yesu nabadisipile bake ezweni le‐Judeya; wahlala nabo apo ke, wabapitizesha." 
John3:22 EMVENI kwezizinto weza u‐Yesu nabadisipile bake ezweni le‐Judeya; wahlala nabo apo ke, wabapitizesha." 
John3:23 Waye kekaloku no‐Johane ebapitizesha e‐Enoni kufupi ne‐Salime, kuba bekuko amanzi amaninzi kona: baye besiza abantu, babapitizeshwa." 
John3:24 Ngokuba u‐Johane ebengekaposelwanga entolongweni. 
John3:25 Kwandula kwesuka umbuzo ngecala labadisipile baka‐Johane nama‐Juda ngako ukuhlambulula. 
John3:26 Baza beza ku‐Johane, bati kuye: Rabi! lowo ubenawe pesheya kwe‐Yoredane, omnqi̔neleyo wena, kangela, yena lo uyabapitizesha, bati bonke beze kuye." 
John3:27 Wapendula u‐Johane wati: Umntu akangamkele nto, xeshekweni inganikwanga kuye ivela ezulwini." 
John3:28 Nina ngokwenu niyandinqi̔nela ukuba ndati: Andinguye u‐Kristu, koko nditunyiwe pambi kwake." 
John3:29 Onaye umtshakazi, ungumyeni; kodwa umhlobo womyeni, omiyo esiva nokuva yena, uyavuya kunene ngenxa yelizwi lomyeni: ngako olu uvuyo lwam luzalisekile." 
John3:30 Ufanele yena ukwanda, kodwa ndifanele mna ukuncipa." 
John3:31 Ovela pezulu, upezu kwabo bonke; lowo ungowasemhlabeni, ungowasemhlabeni, eteta nokwasemhlabeni: ovela ezulwini, upezu kwabo bonke;" 
John3:32 noko akubonileyo wakuva, oku uyakunqi̔nela; nokunqi̔na kwake akuko mntu okwamkelayo." 
John3:33 Owamkeleyo ukunqi̔na kwake, uncamatisele okokuba utixo uyinene." 
John3:34 Ngokuba lowo utixo wamtumayo ewateta amazwi katixo: ngokuba utixo enga m niki umoya ngokulinganisa. 
John3:35 Uyise uyamtanda unyana, nento zonke uzinikele esandleni sake." 
John3:36 Okolwayo kunyana, unobomi obungunapakade; kodwa lowo ungakolwayo kunyana, akayi kubona ubomi, koko ingqumbo katixo ihlala pezu kwake." 
John4:1 XESHEKWENI ngoko yabisazi inkosi ukuba abafarisi beva kusitwa u‐Yesu ugqitisile u‐Johane ngokwenza nangokubapitizesha abadisipile," 
John4:2 (nangona bekungengu‐Yesu ngokwake obebapitizesha, bekungabadisipile bake,)" 
John4:3 washiya i‐Judeya, wabuya wemkela e‐Galili." 
John4:3 washiya i‐Judeya, wabuya wemkela e‐Galili." 
John4:4 Ebefanele ukuti ke acande i‐Samariya. 
John4:5 Weza kufika ngoko esixekweni sase‐Samariya esi‐kutiwa yi‐Sikare, kufupi nesahlulo somhlaba esanikwayo ngu‐Yakobi kunyana wake u‐Josefe." 
John4:6 Kekaloku umtombo ka‐Yakobi ubukona. U‐Yesu ngoko, ediniwe ngokuhamba kwake, ebehleli njalo ngasemtonjeni. Ibiyiyure yanga yeyesitandatu." 
John4:7 Weza umfazi wase‐Samariya ukuza kuka̔ amanzi. Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Ndipe ndisele. 
John4:8 (Ngokuba abadisipile bake bebemkile ukuya esixekweni, ukuze batenge ukutya.)" 
John4:9 Wandula wati umfazi wase‐Samariya kuye: Yinina ukuba wena ungum‐Juda nje ucele ukusela kum, ondingum‐Samariyakazi? (Ngokuba ama‐Juda engadlelani nama‐Samariya.)" 
John4:10 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Ukuba ubusazi isipo sikatixo, nokuba ungubanina oti kuwe: Ndipe ndisele; unga ucele kuye, waye enga ete yena wakupa amanzi apilileyo." 
John4:11 Wati umfazi kuye: Nkosi! akunanto yokuka̔ ngayo; kanjalo iqula linzulu: uwazuza pina ngoko lamanzi apilileyo? 
John4:12 umkulu wena kubawo wetu u‐Yakobi na, owasipa eliqula, wasela kulo yena ngokwake, nosapo lwake, nenkomo zake?" 
John4:13 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Osukuba esela kuwo amanzi la, wobuya anxanwe:" 
John4:14 kodwa lowo usukuba esela kulomanzi aya kuwapiwa ndim, akasayi kuza anxanwe napakade; koko lomanzi endiya kumpa wona, oba pakati kwake engumtombo wamanzi empompozela ebomini obungunapakade." 
John4:15 Wati umfazi kuye: Nkosi! ndipe lamanzi, ukuze ndinganxanwa, ndingezi nokuza apa ukuka̔." 
John4:16 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Hamba, biza indoda yako, uze apa." 
John4:17 Wapendula umfazi wati: Andinandoda. Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Ulungisile ukuti: Andinandoda: 
John4:18 ngokuba ubunamadoda amahlanu; nangoku leyo unayo ayiyindoda yako: unyanisile ukutsho oko. 
John4:19 Wati umfazi kuye: Nkosi! ndiyabona ukuba ungumprofite. 
John4:20 Obawo betu babedesha kulentaba; nani niti ise‐Yerusaleme indawo apo kufanele ukubedesha kona. 
John4:21 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Mfazi! kolwa ndim, ukuba ixeshana liyeza, xeshekweni ningayi kuti nakulentaba nase‐Yerusaleme nimbedeshe uyise." 
John4:22 Nina niyabedesha eningakwaziyo: tina siyabedesha esikwaziyo; ngokuba usindiso luvela kuma‐Juda. 
John4:23 Koko ixeshana lisiza, ewe liko ngoku, xeshekweni ababedeshi abayinyaniso baya kumbedesha uyise ngomoya nangenyaniso: ngokuba noyise efuna ukuba abambedeshayo babe ngabanjalo." 
John4:24 Utixo ungumoya; nabo bambedeshayo, bafanele ukubedesha ngomoya nangenyaniso." 
John4:25 Wati umfazi kuye: Ndiyazi ukuba u‐Mesiya uyeza; (o‐kutiwa ngu‐Kristu;) xeshekweni kufika lowo, wosishumayeza into zonke." 
John4:26 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Mna nditetayo kuwe ndinguye. 
John4:27 Bati pezu kwoku bafika abadisipile bake, bati nqa ukuba ebeteta nomfazi: kodwa noko bekungeko owatshoyo ukuti: Ufuna nto nina? umhlaumbi ukuti: Yinina ukuba utete naye?" 
John4:28 Wandula umfazi washiya umpanda wake, wemka waya esixekweni, wati ebantwini:" 
John4:29 Yizani, nibone umntu, owandixelelayo zonke izinto endike ndazenza: lo unguye u‐Kristu na?" 
John4:30 Bandula bapuma esixekweni, beza ukuza kuye." 
John4:31 Kekaloku pakati kwoku abadisipile bake bebemtandaza, besiti: Rabi! yidla." 
John4:32 Koko wati kubo: Mna ndinokutya ndikudle, eningakwaziyo nina." 
John4:33 Bebesiti ngoko abadisipile omnye kwomnye: Kuko omziseleyo into yokudla na? 
John4:34 Wati u‐Yesu kubo: Ukutya kwam kokokuba ndiyenze intando yonditumileyo, nokuba ndiwufeze umsebenzi wake." 
John4:35 Anitsho na ukuti: Kuseko inyanga ezine, kwandul’ ukufika ukuvuna? bona ke, nditi kuni: Pakamisani amehlo enu, nikangele amasimi, ukuba asel’ emhlope kuvunwe." 
John4:36 Uti novunayo uwamkele umvuzo, azibute izixakato zibe zezobomi obungunapakade; ukuze kwa nohlwayelayo novunayo bavuye kunye." 
John4:37 Nakuko oku siya zalisekiswa esositeto esiyinyaniso sokuti: Kuko omnye ohlwayelayo, nomnye ovunayo." 
John4:38 Ndanituma ukuvuna oko ningakusebenzelanga; abanye basebenzile, nani ningenile emisebenzini yabo." 
John4:39 Kekaloku ama‐Samariya amaninzi akwesosixeko akolwa kuye, ngenxa yelizwi lomfazi obenqi̔na ngokuti: Wandixelela zonke izinto endike ndazenza." 
John4:40 Kwa njalo xeshekweni ama‐Samariya atika kuye, ebemtandaza ukuba ahlale kuwo; waza wahlala kona intsuku zambini." 
John4:41 Aza amanye amaninzi ngakumbi akolwa ngenxa yelizwi lake," 
John4:42 ati kumfazi: Akusengenxa yokuteta kwako sikolwayo; ngokuba sivile tina ngokwetu, sazi nokwazi ukuba lo unguye ngenyaniso umsindisi welizwe, u‐Kristu." 
John4:43 Wati kekaloku emveni kwezontsuku mbini wapuma kona, wemka waya e‐Galili." 
John4:44 Ngokuba u‐Yesu ngokwake ebenqi̔nele ukuba umprofite akanakubekwa emzini wakowabo. 
John4:45 Xeshekweni ke wafika e‐Galili, ati ama‐Galili amamkela, ezibonile nje zonke izinto wazenzayo e‐Yerusaleme emtendelekweni: ngokuba nawo ebeye emtendelekweni." 
John4:46 Kwa njalo u‐Yesu wabuya weza e‐Kana yase‐Galili, apo abewenzile amanzi iveyine. Kwabekuko inkosana etile unyana wayo ebesifa e‐Kapenayume." 
John4:47 Yati yona le yakuva ukuba u‐Yesu ebepumile e‐Judeya wafika e‐Galili, yaya kuye, yamtandaza ukuba ehle ampilise unyana wayo: ngokuba ebeza kufa." 
John4:47 Yati yona le yakuva ukuba u‐Yesu ebepumile e‐Judeya wafika e‐Galili, yaya kuye, yamtandaza ukuba ehle ampilise unyana wayo: ngokuba ebeza kufa." 
John4:48 Wandula wati u‐Yesu kuyo: Xeshekweni ningaboni imiqondiso nemimangaliso, anisayi kukolwa." 
John4:49 Yati inkosana kuye: Nkosi! yihla engekabubi umntwana wam. 
John4:50 Wati u‐Yesu kuyo: Hamba; unyana wako upilile. Waza umntu lowo wakolwa lilizwi abelitetile kuye u‐Yesu, wahamba." 
John4:51 Kekaloku nxa ebesehla, izicaka zake zamkaulela, zashumayela zisiti: Umntwana wako upilile." 
John4:52 Wandula wabuza kuzo iyure waqilipala ngayo. Zaza zati kuye: Izolo ngeyure yesixe̔nxe icesine lamyeka. 
John4:53 Wazi ngoko uyise ukuba bekungaleyo iyure abetshilo u‐Yesu kuye ngayo ukuti: Unyana wako upilile. Waza wakolwa yena, nendlu yake yonke." 
John4:54 Lo kanjako ummangaliso wesibini wawenza u‐Yesu, akuba ebevele e‐Judeya wafika e‐Galili." 
John4:54 Lo kanjako ummangaliso wesibini wawenza u‐Yesu, akuba ebevele e‐Judeya wafika e‐Galili." 
John5:1 EMVENI kwezizinto kube kuko umtendeleko wama‐Juda; waza u‐Yesu wenyukela e‐Yerusaleme. 
John5:2 Kuko kekaloku e‐Yerusaleme ngakwelegusha isango icibi, eli‐kutwa ngokwama‐Hebere yi‐Beteseda, linazo intendelezo ezintlanu." 
John5:3 Kuzo ezi bekulele isihlwele esikulu sabayimilwelwe, n emfama, n eziqwala, n abashwabeneyo, belinda ukushukuma kwamanzi." 
John5:4 Ngokuba ibisiti ingelosi ngamaxesha atile yehlela kwelocibi, yazamazamisa amanzi: yena ngoko owangena kuqala emveni kwokuzanyazanyiswa kwamanzi, ebesenzwa epilile, noko wayebanjwa sisifo esinjanina." 
John5:5 Kwabekuko umntu otile kona obesebulwelweni bake iminyaka yamashumi matatu anesibozo. 
John5:6 Akuti u‐Yesu wabona lo elele, wazi nokwazi ukuba kwasekukade enjalo, wati kuye: Unga ungenziwa upilile na?" 
John5:7 Wati umlwelwe kuye ukupendula: Nkosi! andinamntu wokuti, xeshekweni azanyazanyiswa amanzi, andihlisele ecibini: kodwa nxa ndizayo mna, omnye uyandipangela ukuhla." 
John5:8 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Suka, pata uku̔ko lwako, uhambe." 
John5:9 Waselesenziwa epilile kwa oko umntu lowo, wapata uku̔ko lwake, wahamba. Kekaloku ibiyisabata ngemini leyo." 
John5:10 Ayesiti ngoko ama‐Juda kobepilisiwe: Yimini yesabata; akuvunyelwa wena ukuba upate uku̔ko lwako. 
John5:11 Wati ukuwapendula: Lowo wandipilisayo, oyena wati kum: Pata uku̔ko lwako, uhambe." 
John5:12 Abuza ngoko kuye ukuti: Ungubanina lamntu owati kuwe: Pata uku̔ko lwako, uhambe?" 
John5:13 Kodwa lowo wapiliswayo ebengazi ukuba ungubanina: ngokuba u‐Yesu ebenyebelezile, isihlwele sisendaweni leyo nje." 
John5:14 Emveni kwoku u‐Yesu wamfumana etempileni, wati kuye: Kangela, wenziwe upilile: ungabi sona, ukuze ungahlelwa yinto embi kulé." 
John5:15 Wemka umntu lowo, washumayela kuma‐Juda ukuba ngu‐Yesu owampilisayo." 
John5:16 Abesiti ke ama‐Juda ngenxa yoku amtshutshisa u‐Yesu, afuna ukumbulala, ngokokuba ezizinto wabezenza ngemini yesabata." 
John5:17 Kodwa u‐Yesu wati ukuwapendula: Ubawo uyasebenza kwada kwakaloku, nam ndiyasebenza." 
John5:18 Ngenxa yoku ke ama‐Juda abefuna ngakumbi ukumbulala, ngokokuba wabengayapuli isabata kodwa, koko kanjalo wabesiti utixo ungowake uyise, ezilinganisa notixo nje." 
John5:19 Wandula wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuwo: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Unyana akangenze nto ngokwake, uyenza into ambona uyise eyenza kupela; ngokuba izinto asukuba ezenza yena lowo, ezi uyazenza kwa njalo nonyana." 
John5:20 Ngokuba uyise emtanda unyana, ambonise zonke izinto azenzayo yena; waeya kumbonisa imisebenzi emikulu kulé, ukuze niti nqa." 
John5:21 Ngokuba njengokuba uyise ebavusa abafileyo, abadlise ubomi, kwa njalo nonyana uyabadlisa ubomi abo atandayo ukubadlisa ubomi." 
John5:22 Ngokuba kanjako uyise engagwebi mntu, koko ukugweba ekunikele konke kunyana;" 
John5:23 ukuze bonke bambeke unyana, njengokuba bembeka uyise. Lowo ungambeki unyana, akambeki uyise owamtumayo." 
John5:24 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Oti alive ilizwi lam, akolwe kulowo wanditumayo, unobomi obungunapakade, akezi ekugwetyweni kanjalo, koko epumile ekufeni wangena ebomini." 
John5:25 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Ixeshana liyeza, ewe liko ngoku, nxa abafileyo baya kuliva ilizwi lonyana katixo; boti abevayo badle ubomi." 
John5:26 Ngokuba njengokuba uyise enobomi kuye ngokwake, kwa njalo wanika nonyana ukuba abe nobomi kuye ngokwake:" 
John5:27 wamnika negunya lokuba enze ukugweba nako, ngokokuba engunyana wesintu." 
John5:28 Ningakuteli nqa oku; ngokuba ixeshana lisiza, ekukulo bonke abasemancw̔abeni baya kuliva ilizwi lake," 
John5:29 bapume ke; abo bakwenza okulungileyo, ukuya eluvukweni lwobomi; nabo bakwenza okubi, ukuya eluvukweni lwokugwetywa." 
John5:30 Andingenze nto mna ngokwam; njengokuba ndisiva, ndiyagweba: kanjalo ukugweba kwam kulungile; ngokuba ndingafuni intando yam, koko ndifuna intando kabawo owanditumayo." 
John5:31 Ukuba ndiyazinqi̔nela ngokwam, ubunqi̔na bam abuyinene." 
John5:32 Uko omnye onqi̔nayo ngam; ndiyazi ke ukuba ubunqi̔na abunqi̔nayo ngam buyinene. 
John5:33 Nitumile ku‐Johane, waye yena enqi̔nele inyaniso." 
John5:34 Kodwa abuveli emntwini ubunqi̔na endibamkelayo mna; koko ezizinto ndiziteta, ukuze nisindiswe." 
John5:35 Yena lowo ebesiso isibane esivutayo esikanyayo; nani nibe nivuma ukugcoba ngexeshana ekukanyiseni kwake. 
John5:36 Kodwa ubunqi̔na endinabo mna bukulu kobuka‐Johane: ngokuba imisebenzi endiwanikiweyo ngubawo ukuba ndiyifeze, eyona imisebenzi endiyenzayo, iyanqi̔na ngam, ukuba ubawo unditumile." 
John5:37 Naye ubawo owanditumayo, yena ngokwake unqi̔nile ngam, ilizwi lake anizanga nilive nakanye, nokubonakala kwake anikubonanga kanjako," 
John5:38 Nelizwi lake aninalo lona lihlala kuni; ngokuba lowo amtumileyo yena, ningakolwa nguye." 
John5:39 Pengululani iziba̔lo; ngokuba nina niba ninobomi obungunapakade kuzo: kanjalo zizo ezo eziqi̔nayo ngam. 
John5:40 Kanti anivumi ukuza kum, ukuze nibe nabo ubomi." 
John5:41 Andamkeli imbeko kubo abantu. 
John5:42 Koko ndinazi nina, ukuba utando lukatixo aninalo kuni." 
John5:43 Ndize mna egameni likabawo, kanti anindamkeli: ukuba omnye uyeza kwelake igama, yena lowo niya kumamkela." 
John5:44 Ningati nina ukukolwa, nisamkela imbeko abanye kwabanye, nembeko evela kutixo yedwa aniyifuni?" 
John5:45 Ningabi ndiya kuninceteza mna kubawo; kuko onincetezayo, u‐Mosesi, enitemba kuye." 
John5:46 Ukuba nibe nikolwa ngu‐Mosesi nje, ngeniba nikolwa ndim; ngokuba yena waba̔la ngam." 
John5:47 Kodwa ukuba anikolwa zimba̔lo zake, noti nina ukukolwa ngamazwi am?" 
John6:1 EMVENI kwezizinto wemka u‐Yesu waya pesheya kwolwandle lwase‐Galili, kwolwase‐Tiberiyasi." 
John6:2 Kwaye kumlandela isihlwele esikulu, kuba bebebona imimangaliso yake abeyenza pezu kwababesifa." 
John6:3 Waza u‐Yesu wenyukela entabeni apo, wahlala pantsi kona ndawonye nabadisipile bake." 
John6:4 Kekaloku ipasika, umtendeleko wama‐Juda, ibikufupi." 
John6:5 Wandula u‐Yesu wapakamisa amehlo ake, wabona ukuba isihlwele esikulu siyeza kuye, wati ku‐Filipi: Siya kutenga pina izonka, ukuze batye aba?" 
John6:6 (Kuloko wayesitsho emlinga: ngokuba ebesazi yena oko ebeza kukwenza.) 
John6:7 Wati u‐Filipi ukumpendula: Izonka ezimelwa zidenari zimakulu mabini azibanele, ukuze bonke ngabanye batabate intwana." 
John6:8 Wati kuye omnye wabadisipile bake, u‐Andreya umninawe ka‐Simone Petrosi:" 
John6:9 Kuko umfana apa, onezonka zeṙalasi zihlanu nentlanzi zimbini; koko ezi ziyinto nina pakati kwabaninzi kangaka?" 
John6:10 Waza wati u‐Yesu: Yenzani abantu bahlale pantsi. Kekaloku bekuko utyani obuninzi kulondawo. Andula ahlala pantsi amadoda, anga angamawaka mahlanu inani lawo." 
John6:11 Waza u‐Yesu wazitabata izonka, wati akuba ebebulele wababela abadisipile, nabadisipile babab ela abo babehleli pantsi; benje njalo nangentlanzi njengokutanda kwabo." 
John6:12 Xeshekweni ke bebehluti, wati kubadisipile bake: Butani amaqezu aseleyo, ukuze kungalahleki nto." 
John6:13 Babuta ke, bazalisa izitya zalishumi linazibini ngamaqezu kwezozonka zeṙalasi zozihlanu, abesele kubo ababedlile." 
John6:14 Bandula abantu abo, bakubona ummangaliso abewenzile u‐Yesu, bati: Lo unguye ngenyaniso umprofite ozayo elizweni." 
John6:15 Wati ngoko u‐Yesu, esazi ukuba bebeya kuza bamsuse ngamandla, ukuze bamenze ukumkani, wabuya wemkela entabeni yena ngokwake yedwa." 
John6:16 Kwati kwakuba kuhlwile, behla abadisipile bake baya elwandle," 
John6:17 bangena enqanaweni, bahamba bewela ulwandle ngase‐Kapenayume. Kwabesekumnyama ke, waye u‐Yesu ebengekafikile kubo." 
John6:18 Kanjalo ulwandle belusilwa, umoya omkulu uquta nje." 
John6:19 Kwandul’ ukuti, bakuba bebequ̔bile ngemipini izitadiya zanga zimashumi mabini anazihlanu umhlaumbi zimashumi matatu, babona u‐Yesu ehamba pezu kwolwandle, esiza kufupi nenqanawa: basuka boyika." 
John6:20 Kodwa wati kubo: Ndim, musani kwoyika." 
John6:21 Bebetanda ngoko ukumamkela enqanaweni; yaza kwa oko inqanawa yabako ngakulomhlaba abebehambela kuwo. 
John6:22 Ngomnye umhla, isihlwele esibe simi pesheya kwolwandle, sakubona ukuba bekungeko kona omnye umkombe, bekuko lowo bangena kuwo abadisipile bake kwapela, nokuba u‐Yesu akaya kunye nabadisipile bake emkonjeni lowo, koko abadisipile bake bemkayo bodwa;" 
John6:23 (kodwa noko yeza eminye imikombe ivela e‐Tiberiyasi, kufupi nalondawo apo batya isonka kona, yakuba ibibulele inkosi;)" 
John6:24 xeshekweni ngoko sabona isihlwele ukuba u‐Yesu akako kona, kwa nabadisipile bake, bangena nabo ezinqanaweni, beza e‐Kapenayume, bemfuna u‐Yesu." 
John6:25 Baza bakumfumana pesheya kwolwandle bati kuye: Rabi! ufike ninina apa? 
John6:26 Wabapendula u‐Yesu wati: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Niyandifuna, kungengokuba nabona imimangaliso, kungokuba nibe nisitya kwezozonka, nahluta nokuhluta." 
John6:27 Ningasebenzeli okokutya okutshabalalayo, koko sebenz elani okokutya okuhlalayo kude kube bubomi obungunapakade, eniya kupiwa kona ngunyana wesintu: ngokuba lo uyise wamncamatiselayo, kwa utixo." 
John6:28 Bandula bati kuye: Siya kwenza nto nina, ukuze sisebenze imisebenzi katixo?" 
John6:29 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Nguwo lo umsebenzi katixo, wokuba nikolwe kulowo watunywayo nguye." 
John6:30 Bati ngoko kuye: Ngumqondiso mnina uwenzayo wena pofu, ukuze sibone sikolwe kuwe? yinto nina uyisebenzayo?" 
John6:31 Obawo betu batya imana entlango; njengokuba kuba̔liwe ngokuti: Wabanika isonka sivela ezulwini ukuba batye. 
John6:32 Wati ngoko kubo u‐Yesu: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Asi ngu‐Mosesi oninikileyo esosonka sivela ezulwini; ngubawo oninikayo esosonka sivela ezulwini esiyinyaniso." 
John6:33 Ngokuba isonka sikatixo seso sihlayo ezulwini, esinika ubomi elizweni." 
John6:34 Bandula bati kuye: Nkosi! sipe isonka esi kube ngamaxesha onke. 
John6:35 Waza wati kubo u‐Yesu: Mna ndisiso isonka sobomi: ozayo kum, akasayi kuti alambe: nokolwayo kum, akasayi kuti anxanwe napakade." 
John6:36 Koko ndatshoyo kuni ukuti senindibonile, kanti anikolwa." 
John6:37 Konke endikupiwa ngubawo, kuya kuza kum; nalowo uzayo kum andisayi kumlahla." 
John6:38 Ngokuba ndihlile ezulwini, kungekukuba ndiyenze intando yam, kukuba ndiyenze intando yalowo wanditumayo." 
John6:39 Yiyo ke le intando kabawo owanditumayo, yokuba konke endikupiwe nguye ndingalahlekani nanto kuko, nditi ndikuvuse ngomhla wokupela." 
John6:40 Yiyo ke le intando yalowo wanditumayo, yokuba lowo usukuba embona unyana, ekolwa nokukolwa kuye, abe nobomi obungunapakade, nokuba ndimvuse mna ngomhla wokupela." 
John6:41 Andula aṙoṙa ama‐Juda ngaye, kuba ebete: Mna ndisiso isonka esehlayo ezulwini." 
John6:42 Aza ati: Lo asi nguye na u‐Yesu unyana ka‐Josefe, osibaziyo uyise nonina? kuyinina pofu ukuba uti lo: Ndihlile ezulwini?" 
John6:43 Wapendula ngoko u‐Yesu wati kuwo: Ningaṙoṙi pakati kwenu. 
John6:44 Akuko mntu ongezayo kum, xeshekweni ubawo owanditumayo angamtsali: ndandiya kuti mna ndimvuse ngomhla wokupela." 
John6:45 Kuba̔liwe ebaprofiteni ukuti: Boba bonke befundiswa ngutixo. Ngako osukuba evile kubawo, wafunda nokufunda, nyeza kum." 
John6:46 Anditsho ukuba kuko ombonileyo ubawo; lowo uvela kutixo, nguye lo ombonileyo uyise kupela." 
John6:47 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Okolwayo kum, uba nobomi obungunapakade." 
John6:48 Mna ndisiso isonka sobomi. 
John6:49 Oyihlo benu batya imana entlango, bafa nokufa." 
John6:50 Siso esi isonka esihlayo ezulwini, sokuba umntu atye kuso, angafi nokufa." 
John6:51 Mna ndisiso isonka esipilileyo, eso sehlayo ezulwini: ukuba umntu uyatya kuso esisonka, wodla ubomi kude kube ngunapakade: nakanjalo isonka endiya kusinika mna, siyiyo inyama yam, endiya kuyinikela ubomi belizwe." 
John6:52 Andula apikisana ama‐Juda pakati kwawo, esiti: Angati nina lo ukusinika inyama yake siyitye?" 
John6:53 Wati ngoko kuwo u‐Yesu: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Ukuba inyama yonyana wesintu aniyityi, negazi lake aniliseli, aninabo ubomi kuni." 
John6:54 Oti inyama yam ayidle, negazi lam alisele, uba nobomi obungunapakade; ndandiya kuti mna ndimvuse ngomhla wokupela." 
John6:55 Ngokuba inyama yam ikukutya ngenyaniso, negazi lam likukusela ngenyaniso." 
John6:56 Oti inyama yam ayidle, negazi lam alisele, uyahlala kum, nam ndiyahlala kuye." 
John6:57 Njengokuba ubawo opilileyo wanditumayo, nam ndipila ngetuba likabawo; kwa njalo lowo udlayo mna, uya kupila naye ngetuba lam." 
John6:58 Siso esi isonka esehlayo ezulwini: kungenjengokuba oyihlo benu batya imana, bafa nokufa: osidlayo esisonka, uya kupila kude kube ngunapakade." 
John6:59 Ezizinto waziteta endlwini yentlanganiso, efundisa e‐Kapenayume." 
John6:60 Ngako abaninzi kubo abadisipile bake, bakuva oku, bati: Esi isiteto silukuni; singaviwa ngubanina?" 
John6:61 Kodwa u‐Yesu esazi pakati kwake ukuba abadisipile bake bayaṙoṙa ngako oku, wati kubo: Oku kunixakanisa na?" 
John6:62 Pofu xeshekweni nibona unyana wesintu enyukela apo ebefudula ekona —? 
John6:63 Nguwo umoya owenza kudliwe ubomi; yona inyama ayincedi luto: lomazwi endiwatetayo kuni mna, ngawo angumoya nabubomi." 
John6:64 Koko bako inxenye kuni abangakolwayo. Ngokuba ebesazi u‐Yesu kwa sekuqaleni, ukuba bangobanina abangakolwayo, nokuba ungubanina oya kumngcatsha." 
John6:65 Waza wati: Ngenxa yoku nditshilo kuni ukuti: Akuko mntu ongezayo kum, xeshekweni kunganikwanga kuye ngubawo." 
John6:66 Emveni kwoku abaninzi babadisipile bake baya ngomva, ababi sahamba naye." 
John6:67 Wati ngoko u‐Yesu kubo abalishumi linababini: Nani niyafuna ukumka na? 
John6:68 Wandula wati u‐Simone Petrosi ukumpendula: Nkosi! siya kuya kubanina? unawo amazwi obomi obungunapakade. 
John6:69 Kanjalo tina sikoliwe sazi nokwazi ukuba wena unguye u‐Kristu, unyana katixo opilileyo." 
John6:70 Wati u‐Yesu ukubapendula: Andaninyula na nina balishumi linababini? kanti kuni omnye ungoka‐Satane. 
John6:71 Wayesitsho ngo‐Jude Sikariyoti unyana ka‐Simone: ngokuba ebenguye obeza kumngcatsha, engomnye kubo abalishumi linababini." 
John6:71 Wayesitsho ngo‐Jude Sikariyoti unyana ka‐Simone: ngokuba ebenguye obeza kumngcatsha, engomnye kubo abalishumi linababini." 
John7:1 EMVENI kwezizinto ke wabehamba u‐Yesu e‐Galili: ngokuba ebengavumi ukuhamba e‐Judeya, kuba ama‐Juda ebefuna ukumbulala." 
John7:1 EMVENI kwezizinto ke wabehamba u‐Yesu e‐Galili: ngokuba ebengavumi ukuhamba e‐Judeya, kuba ama‐Juda ebefuna ukumbulala." 
John7:2 Kekaloku umtendeleko wama‐Juda, owamapempe, ubukufupi." 
John7:3 Bati ngoko kuye abazalwana bake: Puma apa, uye e‐Judeya, ukuze abadisipile bako nabo bakangele imisebenzi uyenzayo." 
John7:3 Bati ngoko kuye abazalwana bake: Puma apa, uye e‐Judeya, ukuze abadisipile bako nabo bakangele imisebenzi uyenzayo." 
John7:4 Ngokuba kungeko mntu owenza into ngasese, nxa afuna ukuba yena ngokwake abe nokwazeka. Ukuba ezizinto uyazenza, zibonakalise kwilizwe." 
John7:5 Ngokuba nabazalwana bake bebengakolwa kuye. 
John7:6 Wandula wati kubo u‐Yesu; Elam ixesha alikafiki; kodwa elenu ixesha lilungile futi. 
John7:7 Ilizwe alingetiye nina: kodwa mua liyanditiya, ngokuba ndinqi̔na ngalo, ukuba imisebenzi yalo ikohlakele." 
John7:8 Nina nyukelani kuwo umtendeleko lo: mna andikanyukeli kuwo umtendeleko lo; ngokuba elam ixesha alikazalisekile. 
John7:9 Kekaloku akuba etshilo oku, wahlala e‐Galili." 
John7:10 Kodwa xeshekweni bebenyuke abazalwana bake, wandula wenyuka naye waya emtendelekweni, bekungesekuhleni, bekunjengokungati kungasese." 
John7:11 Abesiti ngoko ama‐Juda amfuna emtendelekweni, ati: Upina yena?" 
John7:12 Kwaye kuko nokudumzela okuninzi ngaye pakati kwezihlwele: babesiti ke inxenye: Ulungile; babesiti nabanye: Hai: koko alahlekisa isihlwele. 
John7:13 Kodwa noko bekungeko mntu obeteta ngaye ekuhleni, ngenxa yokwoyika ama‐Juda." 
John7:14 Kekaloku kwakuba kuse kupakati kwomtendeleko, wati u‐Yesu wenyukela etempileni, wafundisa." 
John7:15 Aza ati nqa ama‐Juda, esiti: Ute nina lo ukwazi ufundo, engafundanga nje?" 
John7:16 Wawapendula u‐Yesu, wati: imfundiso yam asi yeyam, yeyalowo wanditumayo." 
John7:17 Ukuba umntu uyavuma ukuyenza intando yake, uya kwazi ngayo imfundiso yam, ukuba ivela kutixo, ukuba nditeta ngokwam, kusinina." 
John7:18 Otetayo ngokwake, uyafuna obake ubungcwalisa; kodwa obufuna ubungcwalisa balowo wamtumayo, yena lo uyinene, kungeko ukungalungi kuye," 
John7:19 u‐Mosesi akaninikanga umteto na? kanti akuko namnye kuni owenzayo umteto. Yinina ukuba nifuna ukundibulala? 
John7:20 Sapendula isihlwele sati: Unedemoni; ngubanina ofunayo ukukubulala? 
John7:21 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Ndawenza umsebenzi wamnye, nani niti nqa nonke." 
John7:22 Ngenxa yoku u‐Mosesi uninikile ulwaluko, kungekukuba luvela ku‐Mosesi, kukuba luvela koyihlo; nani niti ngemini yesabata nimaluse umntu." 
John7:23 Ukuba ukwaluka umntu uyakwamkela ngemini yesabata, ukuze kungapulwa umteto ka‐Mosesi: nindiqumbele na, ngokuba ndimpilisile umntu umzimba wonke ngemini yesabata?" 
John7:24 Ningagwebi ngokubonakalayo, koko ukugweba okulungileyo kugwebeni." 
John7:25 Bandula bati inxenye yabase‐Yerusaleme: Asi nguye na lo, abafuna ukumbulala?" 
John7:26 Kanti nanku eteta ngokukalipa, bengati luto kuye noko. Kanene abapati baqinisile ukwazi na ukuba lo unguye u‐Kristu ngenyaniso?" 
John7:27 Koko lo simazi ukuba uvela pina; kodwa u‐Kristu okuya afikayo, akuko mntu owaziyo ukuba uvela pina." 
John7:28 Wandula wadanduluka u‐Yesu, efundisa etempileni, esiti nokuti: Ewe mna niyandazi, nokuba ndivela pina niyakwazi; kanti andizanga ngokwam, koko owanditumayo uyinyaniso, eniti nina ningamazi." 
John7:29 Kodwa ndiyamazi mna; ngokuba ndivela kuye, kanjalo yena wandituma." 
John7:30 Babefuna ngoko ukumbamba: kanti bekungeko mntu owabeka isandla pezu kwake, ngokuba ixeshana lake belingekafikanga." 
John7:31 Kodwa abaninzi basesihlweleni bakolwa kuye, bati: u‐Kristu okuya afikayo, woka ayenze na imimangaliso emininzi kulé ayenzileyo lo?" 
John7:32 Bati abafarisi beva isihlwele sidumzela ezizinto ngaye: baza abafarisi nabaperisite abakulu batuma amadindili, ukuze ambambe." 
John7:33 Wandula wati kubo u‐Yesu: Lixesha elincinane endisenani ngalo, ndize ndiye kulowo wanditumayo." 
John7:34 Niya kundifuna, kanti aniyi ku ndi fumana; nalapo ndikoyo mna, aningeze nina kona." 
John7:35 Andula ati ama‐Juda pakati kwawo: Lo uza kuya pina, ukuba asiyi kumfumana? uza kuti na aye kwabaci̔takeleyo pakati kwama‐Girike, awafundise ama‐Girike nje?" 
John7:36 Lelanina eli ilizwi walitshoyo ukuti: Niya kundifuna, kanti aniyi ku ndi fumana; nalapo ndikoyo mna, aningeze nina kona?" 
John7:37 Kekaloku ngomhla wokupela, ongomkulu womtendeleko, wema u‐Yesu, wadanduluka esiti: Ukuba uti umntu anxanwe, makeze kum, asele." 
John7:38 Okolwayo kum, njengokuba sisitsho isiba̔lo, imilambo yamanzi apilileyo iya kwela kwa sembilini wake." 
John7:39 (Kodwa oku wakutsho ngomoya, abebeza kumamkela abakolwayo kuye: ngokuba umoya oyingcwele ebengekabiko, kuba u‐Yesu ebengekenzelwe ubungcwalisa.)" 
John7:40 Babesiti ngoko abaninzi basesihlweleni, bakuva isiteto eso: Ngenyaniso lo ungumprofite lowo." 
John7:41 Babesiti abanye: Lo unguye u‐Kristu. Kodwa babesiti abanye: Pofu u‐Kristu uvela e‐Galili na? 
John7:42 Asitshilo na isiba̔lo ukuti, u‐Kristu uvela kwinzalo ka‐Davide, nase‐Beteleheme, emzini apo u‐Davide ebekona?" 
John7:43 Kwabako ngoko impambano pakati kwesihlwele ngenxa yake. 
John7:44 Babefuna ke inxenye kubo ukumbamba; koko bekungeko mntu owabeka izandla pezu kwake. 
John7:45 Andula eza amadindili lawo kubo abaperisite abakulu nabafarisi; abati kuwo bona: Kunganina ukuba animzisanga? 
John7:46 Ati amadindili ukupendula: Akuzanga kutete njalo umntu, njengokuba etete lomntu." 
John7:47 Bandula bati abafarisi ukuwapendula: Nikohlisiwe nani na? 
John7:48 kuko na owakubapati okoliweyo kuye, umhlaumbi owakubafarisi?" 
John7:49 koko isihlwele esi, esingawaziyo umteto, siqalekisiwe." 
John7:50 Wati u‐Nikodemo kubo: (lowo wezayo ngobusuku kuye, engomnye wakubo:)" 
John7:51 Umteto wetu uyagweba umntu na, ukuba awuti tanci uve kuye, uqonde into ayenzayo?" 
John7:52 Bapendula bati kuye: Ungowase‐Galili nawe na? pengulula, ubone ukuba akuvukanga mprofite e‐Galili." 
John7:53 Baza bati bonke ngabanye baya ezindlwini zabo. 
John8:1 Kodwa u‐Yesu waya entabeni yeminquma. 
John8:2 Kekaloku kusasa wabuya wafika etempileni, bati bonke abantu beza kuye; waza wahlala pantsi, wabafundisa." 
John8:3 Kekaloku ababa̔li nabafarisi bazisa kuye umfazi ebanjiwe ekuṙexezeni; baza bakuba bemmisile pakati," 
John8:4 bati kuye: Mfundisi! lomfazi watiwa xafu eṙexeza:
