John8:5 kekaloku emtetweni u‐Mosesi wasiyalela ukuba abanjalo bagityiselwe ngamatye; wena pofu uti nina? 
John8:6 Babesitsho bemlinga, ukuze babe nako ukumnika ityala. Kodwa u‐Yesu watoba pantsi, waba̔la ngomnwe emhlabeni." 
John8:7 Koko xeshekweni bebemana bembuza, wazipakamisa, wati kubo: Ongenasono pakati kwenu, makabe nguye oqala ukuposa ilitye ngakuye." 
John8:8 Waza wabuya watoba pantsi, waba̔la emhlabeni." 
John8:9 Kodwa bona bevile nje, benqi̔niselwa luvalo lwabo kanjalo, bapuma omnye ngomnye, beqala kubo abadala, kwada kwaba ngabokupela: waza u‐Yesu washiywa yedwa, nomfazi emi pakati." 
John8:10 Kekaloku akuba ezipakamisile u‐Yesu, engaboni mntu kupela umfazi lowo, wati kuye: Mfazi! bapina abo abakunika ityala? akuko namnye owakugweba na?" 
John8:11 Wati ke yena: Namnye, Nkosi! Wayesiti u‐Yesu kuye: Nam andikugwebi; hamba, ungabi sona." 
John8:12 Wandula u‐Yesu wabuya wateta kubo, esiti: Mna ndilulo ukanyiso lwelizwe: lowo undilandelayo akasayi kuhamba ebumnyameni, koko aya kuba nalo ukanyiso lwobomi." 
John8:13 Bati ngoko kuye abafarisi: Uyazinqi̔nela ngokwako; ubunqi̔na bako abuyinene. 
John8:14 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kubo: Nakuba ndizinqi̔nela ngokwam, buyinene ubunqi̔na bam; ngokuba ndisazi apo ndavela kona, nalapo ndiya kona: kodwa nina anazi apo ndivela kona, nalapo ndiya kona." 
John8:15 Niyagweba nina ngokwenyama; andigwebi mntu mna. 
John8:16 Kodwa noko ndigwebayo mna, ukugweba kwam kuyinene; ngokuba ndingendedwa, ndim nobawo owanditumayo." 
John8:17 Kanjalo kuba̔liwe nasemtetweni wenu, ukuba ubunqi̔na babantu ababini buyinene." 
John8:18 Mna ndingozinqinela ngokwam, kanjalo uyanqi̔na ngam ubawo owanditumayo." 
John8:19 Babesiti ngoko kuye: Upina uyihlo wako? Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Anindazi mna, anim azi nobawo kanjako: ukuba nibe nindazi mna, ngeniba nimazi nobawo." 
John8:20 Lamazwi wawateta u‐Yesu endaweni yendyebo, efundisa etempileni: kanti bekungeko mntu owambambayo; ngokuba belingekafikanga ixeshana lake." 
John8:21 Wandula u‐Yesu wabuya wati kubo: Mna ndiyemka, naniya kundifuna, kanti niya kufa esonweni senu: apo ndiya kona, aningeze nina." 
John8:22 Abesiti ngoko ama‐Juda: Wozibulala yinina? ukuba esiti: Apo ndiya kona, aningeze nina." 
John8:23 Waza wati kuwo: Nina nivela ngapantsi, mna ndivela pezulu; nina ningabakulo ilizwe eli, mna andingowakulo ilizwe eli." 
John8:24 Ndatsho ngoko kuni ukuti, niya kufa ezonweni zenu; ngokuba xeshekweni ningakolwayo ukuba ndinguye, niya kufa ezonweni zenu." 
John8:25 Andula ati kuye: Ungubanina wena? Waza wati kuwo u‐Yesu: Ndikoko sendisitsho kuni ukuba ndikuko kutabata ekuqaleni. 
John8:26 Ndinezinto ezininzi zokuteta nokugweba ngani: koko owanditumayo uyinene, nam izinto endazivayo kuye, ezi ndiyaziteta kwilizwe." 
John8:27 Akaqonda ukuba ebeteta kubo ngaye uyise. 
John8:28 Wandula wati kuwo u‐Yesu: Xeshekweni nimpakamisile unyana wesintu, oko niya kwazi ukuba ndinguye, nokuba andenzi nto ngokwam, koko nditi, njengokuba bendifundiswe ngubawo, ndizitete njalo ezizinto." 
John8:29 Kanjalo lowo wanditumayo uko nam: ubawo akandishiyanga ndedwa, kuba ndizenza ngamaxesha onke ezozinto zikolekileyo kuye." 
John8:30 Nxa abeteta ezizinto abaninzi bakolwa kuye. 
John8:31 Wabesiti ngoko u‐Yesu kuma‐Juda lawo abekoliwe nguye: Xeshekweni nihlala elizwini lam, ningabadisipile bam ngenyaniso;" 
John8:32 naniya kuyazi inyaniso, iti yona inyaniso inikululekise." 
John8:33 Ati ukumpendula: Siyinzalo ka‐Abrahame, asizanga sibe sebukobokeni kumntu nakanye: uti nina wena ukuti: Niya kwenziwa nikululekile." 
John8:34 Wati u‐Yesu ukuwapendula: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Osukuba esenza isono, ulikoboka lesono." 
John8:35 Olikoboka akahlali endlwini ngonapakade; nguye unyana ohlalayo ngonapakade. 
John8:36 Xeshekweni ngoko unyana anikululekisayo, noba nikululekile ngokwenyaniso." 
John8:37 Ndiyazi ukuba niyinzalo ka‐Abrahame; niyafuna ukundibulala noko, kuba ilizwi lam lingafumani indawo kuni." 
John8:38 Mna ndiyateta oko ndikubonileyo kubawo wam; nani kwa njalo niyakwenza oko nikubonileyo kuyihlo wenu. 
John8:39 Apendula ati kuye: Ubawo wetu ungu‐Abrahame. Wati kuwo u‐Yesu: Ukuba nibe nilusapo luka‐Abrahame, ngeniba niyenza imisebenzi ka‐Abrahame." 
John8:40 Kodwa ngoku niyafuna ukundibulala, umntu oyitetileyo kuni inyaniso, leyo ndayivayo kutixo: oku akakwenza u‐Abrahame." 
John8:41 Nina niyayenza imisebenzi yoyihlo wenu. Andula ati kuye: Asizelwe tina ngombulo: sinobawo emnye, utixo." 
John8:42 Wandula wati kuwo u‐Yesu: Ukuba utixo ebenguyihlo wenu, ngeniba nitanda mna: ngokuba ndapuma ndavela kutixo; ngokuba kanjako ndingezanga ngokwam, nguye lowo owanditumayo." 
John8:43 Kunganina ukuba ningaqondi ukuteta kwam? kukuba ningelive ilizwi lam. 
John8:44 Nina ningabakuye uyihlo u‐Satane, nenkanuko zoyihlo wenu niyatanda ukuzenza. Yena lowo ebengumbulali kwa sekuqaleni, engemanga enyanisweni ke, kuba kungeko nyaniso kuye. Nxa ateta ubuxoki, uyateta kokukokwake: ngokuba elixoki, noyise wabo." 
John8:45 Kodwa mna ngokuba ndiyiteta inyaniso, anikolwa kum." 
John8:46 Ngubanina kuni ondivisa ityala ngesono? Kodwa ukuba ndiyateta inyaniso, kunganina ukuba ningakolwa kum?" 
John8:47 Lowo ungowakuye utixo uyaweva amazwi katixo: ngenxa yoku aniweva nina, kuba ningengabakuye utixo." 
John8:48 Andula apendula ama‐Juda, ati kuye: Asilungisi ukutsho na, ukuba ungum‐Samariya wena, nokuba unedemoni?" 
John8:49 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Andinademoni; koko ndibeka ubawo, nani nidela mna." 
John8:50 Kodwa andibufuni ubungcwalisa bam; kuko oti afune agwebe. 
John8:51 Ngokwenene ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Xeshekweni umntu aligcina ilizwi lam, akasayi kubona ukufa napakade." 
John8:52 Andula ati kuye ama‐Juda: Kaloku siyazi ukuba unedemoni. U‐Abrahame wafa, kwa nabaprofite; kanti wena uti: Xeshekweni umntu aligcina ilizwi lam, akasayi kuva ukufa napakade," 
John8:53 umkulu wena yinina kubawo wetu U‐Abrahame, owafayo? kanjalo abaprofite bafa: uyazenza banina wena?" 
John8:54 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Ukuba ndiyazenzela ubungcwalisa mna ngokwam, ubungcwalisa bam abuluto: ngubawo ondenzela ubungcwalisa, eniti nina ngaye u ngutixo wenu." 
John8:55 Kanti animazanga yena; kodwa mna ndiyamazi: nokuba nditsho ukuti andimazi, ndoba lixoki njengani: koko ndimaziyo, nelizwi lake ndiyaligcina." 
John8:56 U‐Abrahame uyihlo wenu wagcoba ukuba abe nokubona umhla wam; wawubona ke, wavuya nokuvuya." 
John8:57 Andula ati ama‐Juda kuye: Akukabi yiminyaka imashumi mahlanu ubudala bako, no‐Abrahame umbonile nje na?" 
John8:58 Wati kuwo u‐Yesu: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Engekabangako u‐Abrahame, ndiko mna." 
John8:59 Andula acola amatye ukuba amgibisele: kodwa u‐Yesu wafihleka, wapuma etempileni, ecanda pakati kwawo, wadlula njalo ke." 
John9:1 WATI akuba ebedlula wabona umntu obeyimfama ngokuzalwa. 
John9:2 Baza babuza kuye abadisipile bake, besiti: Rabi! ngubanina owabesona, nguye lo, ngabazali bake, kusinina, ukuba abe nokuzalwa eyimfama?" 
John9:3 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Akona naló, ab ona nabazali bake; kukuba kubonakaliswe imisebenzi katixo kuye." 
John9:4 Ndifanele ukusebenza imisebenzi yalowo wanditumayo, nxa imini iseko; buyeza ubusuku, oko kungesetyenzwe mntu." 
John9:5 Xeshekweni ndiselizweni, ndilukanyiso lwelizwe." 
John9:6 Akuba ebetshilo oku, watshica emhlabeni, wenza udaka ngamate, watambisa amehlo oyimfama ngodaka olo," 
John9:7 wati kuye: Hamba uhlambe ecibini le‐Siloha; (okuti ukukunyushwa lelitunyiweyo.) Waya ngoko wahlamba, weza ebona." 
John9:8 Ngako imimelwane, nabo babefudula bembona ukuba uyimfama, babesiti: Lo asi nguye na oti ahlale anqi̔be?" 
John9:9 Bati abanye: Nguye: bati nabanye: Ufana naye. Wati yena: Ndinguye. 
John9:10 Bati ngoko kuye: Atiwa nina ukuvulwa amehlo ako? 
John9:11 Wapendula yena wati: Umntu o‐kutwa ngu‐Yesu wenza udaka, watambisa amehlo am, wati kum: Hamba uye ecibini le‐Siloha, uhlambe. Ndaya ke ndahlamba, ndamkela ukubona." 
John9:12 Bandula bati kuye: Upina yena? Wati: Andazi. 
John9:13 Bamzisa kubafarisi lowo ubefuda eyimfama. 
John9:14 Kekaloku bekuyimini yesabata oko u‐Yesu wenzayo udaka olo, wavula amehlo ake." 
John9:15 Ngako kanjako babuza kuye nabafarisi ukuba watiwa nina ukwamkela ukubona. Wayesiti kubo: Wabeka udaka pezu kwamehlo am, ndaza ndahlamba, ndiyabona ke." 
John9:16 Bati ngoko inxenye kubafarisi: Lomntu akaveli kutixo, ngokuba engagcini imini yesabata. Bati abanye: Angati nina umntu ongumoni ukwenza imimangaliso engakanana? Kwaza kwabako impambano pakati kwabo." 
John9:17 Bati kobeyimfama kanjako: Uti nina wena ngaye, evulile amehlo ako nje? Wayesiti: Ungumprofite." 
John9:18 Ati kekaloku ama‐Juda akakolwa ngaye ukuba ebeyimfama waza wamkela ukubona, ada abiza abazali balowo obekwamkele ukubona." 
John9:19 Aza abuza kubo, esiti: Lo ungunyana wenu na, eniti wazalwa eyimfama? ute nina pofu ukubona ngoku?" 
John9:20 Bapendula kuwo abazali bake bati: Siyazi ukuba lo ungunyana wetu, nokuba wazalwa eyimfama:" 
John9:21 kodwa ukuba ute nina ukubona kaloku, asikwazi; nokuba ungubanina owavula amehlo ake, asimazi tina: usel’ ekulile yena; buzani kuye; wozitetela ngokwake." 
John9:22 Batsho abazali bake, kuba bebesoyika ama‐Juda: ngokuba ama‐Juda ebesel’ evumelene, ukuba, xeshekweni umntu amvumayo ukuba ungu‐Kristu, makaku̔tshwe entlanganisweni." 
John9:23 Ngako oko abazali bake bati: Usel’ ekulile; buzani kuye. 
John9:24 Bandula bambiza ngokwesibini lowamntu obeyimfama, bati kuye: Mnike udumo utixo; siyazi tina ukuba umntu lo ungumoni." 
John9:25 Wandula wapendula yena lowo wati: Ukuba ungumoni na, andikwazi; inye into endiyaziyo, yokuba, ndiyimfama nje, kaloku ndiyabona." 
John9:26 Baza bati kuye kanjako: Wenza nto nina kuwe? wati nina ukuvula amehlo ako? 
John9:27 Wati ukubapendula: Sendinixelele, kanti anivanga; yinina ukuba nifune ukuva kanjako? kanene nani nifuna ukuba ngabadisipile bake na?" 
John9:28 Bandula bamtuka, bati: Wena ungumdisipile walowa; tina kodwa singabadisipile baka‐Mosesi." 
John9:29 Siyazi tina ukuba utixo utetile ku‐Mosesi; kodwa lo asimazi ukuba uvela pina. 
John9:30 Wapendula umntu lowo wati kubo: Pofu lento ingummangaliso okunene, yokuba nina animazi ukuba uvela pina, noko wavulayo amehlo am." 
John9:31 Kekaloku siyazi ukuba aboni utixo akabeva; kodwa ukuba umntu engumbedeshi katixo, esenza nentando yake, yena lo uyamva." 
John9:32 Akuzanga kuviwe kwa napakade ukuba bekuko owavula amehlo obezelwe eyimfama. 
John9:33 Ukuba lo ebengaveli kutixo, ebengenze luto." 
John9:34 Bapendula bati kuye: Wena uzelwe upela ezonweni nje, uyasifundisa tina na ke? Baza bamku̔pela pandle." 
John9:35 Weva u‐Yesu ukuba bebemku̔pele pandle: waza akumfumana wati kuye: Uyakolwa kunyana katixo na? 
John9:36 Wapendula yena wati: Ungubanina, Nkosi! ukuze ndikolwe kuye?" 
John9:37 Wati ke u‐Yesu kuye: Umbonile kambe, kanjalo lo uteta nawe unguye." 
John9:38 Wayesiti: Ndiyakolwa, Nkosi! wambedesha ke." 
John9:39 Waza wati u‐Yesu: Ndeza kwelilizwe kube kukugwetywa, ukuze abo bangaboniyo babone, nabo babonayo benzwe imfama." 
John9:40 Baza abo bakubafarisi abebenaye beva ezizinto, bati kuye: Nati sizimfama na?" 
John9:41 Wati kubo u‐Yesu: Ukuba nibe nizimfama, ngeniba ningenasono; kodwa kaloku niti: Siyabona; ngoko isono senu siseko." 
John10:1 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Lowo ungangeniyo ngesango esibayeni sezimvu, koko ekwela ngayimbi indawo, oyena ulisela nebada." 
John10:2 Kodwa lowo ungenayo ngesango, ungumalusi wezimvu." 
John10:3 Lo umgcinisango uyamvulela; nelizwi lake izimvu ziyaliva: nezake izimvu uyazibiza ngegama ngegama, azikokele pandle." 
John10:4 Naxeshekweni aziku̔payo ezake izimvu, uyahamba pambi kwazo; ziti izimvu zimlandele, ngokuba zilazi ilizwi lake." 
John10:5 Kodwa owasemzini azisayi kumlandela, koko ziya kubaleka kuye; ngokuba zingalazi ilizwi labasemzini." 
John10:6 Lomzekeliso u‐Yesu wawuteta kubo: kodwa bona abaqonda ukuba zibe zisiti nina ezozinto wabeziteta kubo. 
John10:7 Wati ngoko u‐Yesu kubo kanjako: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Mna ndililo isango lezimvu." 
John10:8 Bonke abo abezayo ndingekabiko mna, bangamasela namabada: koko izimvu zingabevanga." 
John10:9 Mna ndililo isango: xeshekweni umntu angena ngam, uya kusindiswa; waeya kungena apume nokupuma, afumane nedlelo." 
John10:10 Olisela uyeza ukuba ebe̔, abulale, atshabalalise, kupela: ndeza mna ukuba babe nobomi, nokuba babe nabo ngobuninzi." 
John10:11 Mna ndinguye umalusi olungileyo: ongumalusi olungileyo ubomi bake uyabubeka pantsi ngenxa yazo izimvu. 
John10:12 Kodwa ongumqeshwa, engengumalusi nje, lowo izimvu zingezezake, uyayibona incu̔ka isiza, azishiye izimvu, abaleke; ize iti incu̔ka iziqwenge, izici̔te izimvu." 
John10:13 Kekaloku ongumqeshwa uyabaleka, ngokuba engumqeshwa, engayikataleli izimvu ke." 
John10:14 Mna ndinguye umalusi olungileyo; nezam izimvu ndiyazazi, kanjalo ndiyaziwa zezam," 
John10:15 njengokuba ubawo endazi mna, nam ndimazi ubawo; nobomi bam ndiyabubeka pantsi ngenxa yazo izimvu." 
John10:16 Nezinye izimvu ndinazo, ezingezezakuso isibaya esi; ezo nazo ndifanele ukuzizisa, nelizwi lam ziya kuliva; kwakuya kubako umhlambi umnye, n omalusi emnye." 
John10:17 Ngenxa yoku ubawo uyanditanda, ukuba ndibubeka pantsi ubomi bam, ukuze ndibuye ndibutabate." 
John10:18 Akuko mntu ondihluta bona, koko ndibubeka pantsi ngokwam. Ndinegunya lokuba ndibubeke pantsi, ndinegunya lokuba ndibuye ndibutabate kanjalo. Lomyalelo ndawamkela kubawo." 
John10:19 Kwabako impambano ngoko kanjako pakati kwama‐Juda ngenxa yeziteto ezi. 
John10:20 Bati ke abaninzi kuwo: Unedemoni, uyageza; yinina ukuba nimve?" 
John10:21 Bati abanye: Lamazwi akangawalowo ungenelwe yidemoni. Idemoni ingavula amehlo abazimfama na? 
John10:22 KEKALOKU kwabako umtendeleko wokutwasiswa e‐Yerusaleme; bekububusika kanjalo. 
John10:23 Waye u‐Yesu ebehamba etempileni entendelezweni ka‐Solomone. 
John10:24 Andula ama‐Juda amngqonga, ati kuye: Uyasibamba sitandabuza kude kube ninina? ukuba unguye u‐Kristu, sixelele ekuhleni." 
John10:25 Wati u‐Yesu ukuwapendula: Ndanixelela, kanti anikolwa: imisebenzi endiyenzayo egameni likabawo, yona le iyanqi̔na ngam:" 
John10:26 kuloko nina ningakolwayo; ngokuba ningezezakuzo izimvu zam, njengokuba bendisitsho kuni." 
John10:27 Izimvu zam ziyaliva ilizwi lam, ndiyazazi zona, ziyandilandela mna:" 
John10:28 ndiyazinika nobomi obungunapakade; azisayi kubu̔ba ke napakade, akuyi kubako ozihlutayo esandleni sam kanjako." 
John10:29 Ubawo ozinikileyo kum, umkulu kubo bonke; akuko namnye ongazihlutayo esandleni sikabawo." 
John10:30 Mna nobawo sibanye. 
John10:31 Andula ama‐Juda abuya acola amatye, ukuze amgibisele ngawo." 
John10:32 Wati u‐Yesu ukuwapendula: Mininzi imisebenzi elungileyo endinibonisileyo ivela kubawo; kungenxa yawupina umsebenzi kuyo enindigibiselayo ngamatye? 
John10:33 Ampendula ama‐Juda, esiti: Asikugibiseli ngamatye ngenxa yomsebenzi olungileyo, kungenxa yokugxeka u‐Tixo; nangokuba wena, ungumntu nje, uzenza utixo." 
John10:34 Wati u‐Yesu ukuwapendula: Akuba̔liwe na emtetweni wenu ukutiwa: Ndite: Ningotixo? 
John10:35 Ukuba abo wati bangotixo, abo ilizwi likatixo leza kubo; (nesiba̔lo asingetshitshiswe;)" 
John10:36 lowo uyise wamngcwalisayo wamtuma elizweni, niti nina ngaye na: Uyagxeka u‐Tixo; ngokuba ndite: Ndingunyana katixo?" 
John10:37 Ukuba andiyenzi imisebenzi kabawo, ningakolwa ndim:" 
John10:38 kodwa ukuba ndiyayenza, nakuba ningakolwayo ndim, kolwani yimisebenzi leyo; ukuze nazi, nikolwe, ukuba ubawo ukum, nokuba mna ndikuye." 
John10:39 Abefuna ngoko kanjako ukumbamba; kanti wapuma esandleni sawo. 
John10:40 Waza wemka wabuya waya pesheya kwe‐Yoredane, kulondawo apo u‐Johane ebebapitizesha kona ekuqaleni; wahlala k o na ke." 
John10:41 Baza abaninzi beza kuye, ababesiti: u‐Johane okunene akenza namnye ummangaliso; kodwa zonke ezozinto wazitetayo u‐Johane ngaye lo, zibe ziyinene." 
John10:42 Baza bakolwa abaninzi kona kuye. 
John11:1 KEKALOKU bekuko umntu otile obesifa, u‐Lazarusi, owase‐Betaniya, owakuwo umzi ka‐Mariya no‐Marita udade wake." 
John11:2 Wayengu lowa‐ Mariya owayitambisayo inkosi ngamafuta mnandi, wazisula inyawo zayo ngenwele zake, omninawe u‐Lazarusi ubesifa." 
John11:3 Batuma ngoko odade bake kuyo, besiti: Nkosi! kangela, lowo umtandayo uyafa." 
John11:4 Kodwa u‐Yesu akuva oko wati: Esisifo asisesokuba kube kukufa, singenxa yobungcwalisa bukatixo, ukuze unyana katixo enzelwe ubungcwalisa ngaso." 
John11:5 Kekaloku u‐Yesu watanda u‐Marita, nodade wake, no‐Lazarusi." 
John11:6 Xeshekweni ngoko weva ukuba uyafa, oko ke wahlala kulondawo ubekuyo intsuku zambini." 
John11:7 Wandula emveni kwoku wati kubadi̔sipile bake: Masihambe siye e‐Judeya kanjako. 
John11:7 Wandula emveni kwoku wati kubadi̔sipile bake: Masihambe siye e‐Judeya kanjako. 
John11:8 Bati kuye abadisipile: Rabi! esand’ ukufuna ama‐Juda ukukugibisela ngamatye nje, ubuye uye kona na?" 
John11:9 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Akuko iyure ezilishumi linambini emini nye na? Xeshekweni umntu ahamba emini, akaku̔beki, kuba ukukanya kwelizwe eli ekubona:" 
John11:10 kodwa xeshekweni umntu ahamba ebusuku, uyaku̔beka, kuba ukukanya kungeko kuye." 
John11:11 Watsho ke; waza emveni kwoku wati kubo: Umhlobo wetu u‐Lazarusi ulele; koko ndiya ukuze ndimvuse. 
John11:12 Bandula bati abadisipile bake: Nkosi! ukuba ulele, uya kupila." 
John11:13 Kodwa u‐Yesu ebetetile ngako ukufa kwake; kanti bona baba uyateta ngako ukulala kwobutongo. 
John11:14 Wandula u‐Yesu ngoko wati kubo ekuhleni: u‐Lazarusi ufile; 
John11:15 kanjalo ndiyavuya ngenxa yenu ukuba ndibe ndingeko kona, ukuze nikolwe; noko masihambe siye kuye." 
John11:16 Wandula u‐Tomasi, o‐kutiwa ngu‐Didimusi, wati kubo abebengabadisipile naye: Masihambe siye nati, ukuze sife kwa naye." 
John11:17 Wati ngoko u‐Yesu akufika, wafumana ukuba ebesel’ eko encw̔abeni intsuku zane." 
John11:18 Kekaloku i‐Betaniya ibikufupi ne‐Yerusaleme, ingaba zizitadiya ezilishumi linazihlanu ukuba kude kwayo." 
John11:19 Baye abaninzi bakuma‐Juda bebefikile ku‐Marita no‐Mariya, ukuze babaku̔ze ngaye umninawe wabo." 
John11:20 Wandula u‐Marita, akuva ukuba u‐Yesu uyeza, waya wamhlangabeza: kodwa u‐Mariya ebehleli endlwini." 
John11:21 Wandula wati u‐Marita ku‐Yesu: Nkosi! ukuba ubulapa, umninawe wam ngeengafanga." 
John11:22 Noko kwa kaloku ndiyazi ukuba oko usukuba ucela kona kutixo, utixo wokunika kuwe." 
John11:23 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Umninawe wako wobuya avuke. 
John11:24 Wati u‐Marita kuye: Ndiyazi ukuba wobuya avuke eluvukweni ngomhla wokupela. 
John11:25 Watsho u‐Yesu kuye ukuti: Mna ndilulo uvuko, ndibubo nobomi: okolwayo kum, nakuba afayo, uya kudla ubomi;" 
John11:26 nosukuba esidla ubomi ekolwa kum, akasayi kufa napakade. Uyakolwa kuko oku na?" 
John11:27 Wati kuye: Ewe, Nkosi! ndikoliwe ukuba wena unguye u‐Kristu, unyana katixo, ozayo elizweni." 
John11:28 Waza akuba ebetshilo wemka, waya wabiza u‐Mariya udade wake ngasese, esiti: Umfundisi ufikile, uyakubiza wena." 
John11:29 Wati yena akuva, wesuka msinya, waya kuye." 
John11:30 (Kekaloku u‐Yesu ebengekangenanga emzini, koko ebekulondawo apo u‐Marita wamhlangabeza kona.)" 
John11:31 Andula ati ama‐Juda abenaye endlwini, abemku̔za ke, akubona u‐Mariya ukuba wesuka ngobunxamo wapuma, amlandela, esiti: Uya encw̔abeni, ukuze alile kona." 
John11:32 Wandula u‐Mariya, akufika apo u‐Yesu ebekona, wambona, wawa pantsi ngasezinyaweni zake, esiti kuye: Nkosi! ukuba ubulapa, ngeengafanga umninawe wam." 
John11:33 Wandula u‐Yesu, akumbona yena elila, nama‐Juda abezile naye elila, wavuswa kakulu emoyeni, wazikataza," 
John11:34 wati: Nimbekile pina? Bati kuye: Nkosi! yiza ubone. 
John11:35 Walila inyembezi u‐Yesu. 
John11:36 Abesiti ngoko ama‐Juda: Kangela, bekukukulu kangakanana ukumtanda kwake!" 
John11:37 Kodwa inxenye kuwo ati: Lo ke owavula amehlo oyimfama, ange engenzanga na nokuba lo angafi?" 
John11:38 Wandula u‐Yesu, evuswa kakulu kanjako pakati kwake, weza encw̔abeni. Belingumqolomba ke; kanjalo ilitye belilele ngakuwo." 
John11:39 Wati u‐Yesu: Susani ilitye: Wati kuye u‐Marita, udade wofileyo: Nkosi! usel’ enuka; ngokuba kuntsuku zine efile." 
John11:40 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Andatsho kuwe na ukuti: Xeshekweni ukolwayo, uya kubona ubungcwalisa bukatixo?" 
John11:41 Bandula basusa ilitye, apo ofileyo ebelele kona. Waza u‐Yesu wapakamisa amehlo ngapezulu, wati: Bawo! ndiyakubulela ukuba undivile." 
John11:42 Kodwa bendisazi ukuba uyandiva ngamaxesha onke: koko ngenxa yesihlwele esimiyo apa nditshilo, ukuze bakolwe ukuba unditumile wena." 
John11:43 Waza akuba ebetshilo wadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, esiti: Lazarusi, puma!" 
John11:44 Waza wapuma ofileyo, ebotshiwe izandla nenyawo ngezibopo zokuncw̔aba: kanjalo ubuso bake bebubotshelwe ngeqiya. Wati u‐Yesu kubo: Mkululeni, nimyeke ahambe." 
John11:45 Bati ngoko abaninzi bakuma‐Juda ababefikile ku‐Mariya, nezinto ezenzwayo ngu‐Yesu bazibona, bakolwa kuye." 
John11:46 Kodwa inxenye kuwo emka aya kubo abafarisi, abaxelela izinto abezenzile u‐Yesu." 
John11:47 Bandula abaperisite abakulu nabafarisi bahlanganisa intlanganiso yamapakati, bati: Siyenza nto nina? ngokuba lomntu esenza imimangaliso emininzi." 
John11:48 Nxa senje nje ukumyeka, bonke baya kukolwa kuye; aeya kuti ama‐Roma eze asihlute kwa nendawo nohlanga." 
John11:49 Waza omnye wakubo, u‐Kayafasi, engumperisite omkulu ngomnyaka lowo, wati kubo: Nina anazi luto," 
John11:50 anikumbuleli kanjalo ukuba kulungele tina, ukuba umntu emnye afe ngenxa yabantu, luze lwonke uhlanga lungabubi." 
John11:51 Oku ke akakuteta ngokwake; koko, engumperisite omkulu ngomnyaka lowo, waprofitesha ukuba u‐Yesu ebeza kufa ngenxa yohlanga olo;" 
John11:52 bekungengenxa yohlanga olo lodwa, bekukukuba ahlanganisele kunye nosapo lukatixo oluci̔takeleyo." 
John11:53 Bandula bati emveni kwemini leyo bacebisana ukuba bambulale. 
John11:54 Ngako u‐Yesu wabengasahambi ekuhleni pakati kwama‐Juda, koko wemka apo waya elizweni elikufupi nentlango, esixekweni esi‐kutiwa yi‐Hefrayime, wahlala kona nabadisipile bake." 
John11:55 KEKALOKU ipasika yama‐Juda ibikufupi: baza benyuka abaninzi ezweni apo baya e‐Yerusaleme ingekabiko ipasika, ukuze bazicokise." 
John11:56 Bandula bamfuna u‐Yesu, bati omnye nomnye bemi etempileni: Niti nina ke? angezi emtendelekweni na?" 
John11:57 Kanjalo nabaperisite abakulu nabafarisi bebenikile umyalelo, wokuba, xeshekweni umntu aziyo apo akona, makaxele, ukuze bambambe." 
John12:1 Wandula u‐Yesu intsuku zintandatu ingekabiko ipasika weza e‐Betaniya, apo ebekona u‐Lazarusi obe efile, lowo wamvusayo ekufeni." 
John12:2 Ngako bamenzela isidlo sokuhlwa kona apo; waye u‐Marita ebekonza; kodwa u‐Lazarusi ebengowabahleli ekutyeni ndawonye naye. 
John12:3 Wandula u‐Mariya, watabata iponti yamafuta mnandi enadusi engcwengileyo, exabiso likulu kunene, watambisa inyawo zika‐Yesu, wazisula inyawo zake ngenwele zake: yati indlu yazaliswa livumba lamafuta lawo." 
John12:4 Wandula wati omnye wakubadisipile bake, u‐Jude Sikariyoti unyana ka‐Simone, obeza kumngcatsha:" 
John12:4 Wandula wati omnye wakubadisipile bake, u‐Jude Sikariyoti unyana ka‐Simone, obeza kumngcatsha:" 
John12:5 Kunganina ukuba lamafuta mnandi abengatengiswe ngamakulu matatu edenari, kwaza kwapiwa amahlwempu?" 
John12:6 Watsho ke, bekungengokuba ebekatalela amahlwempu, bekungokuba ebelisela, wanayo inxowa, watabata oko bekufakwa kuyo." 
John12:7 Wandula wati u‐Yesu; Myeke; uwagcinele imini yokuncw̔atywa kwam. 
John12:8 Ngokuba amahlwempu ninawo wona futi ekuni; kanti aninam futi. 
John12:9 Bazi ngoko abantu abaninzi bakuma‐Juda ukuba ukona: beza ke, bekungengenxa ka‐Yesu yedwa, bekukukuba bambone no‐Lazarusi, lowo wamvusayo ekufeni." 
John12:10 Kodwa abaperisite abakulu bafuna icebo, ukuze bambulale u‐Lazarusi naye;" 
John12:11 kuba abaninzi bebesiti ngaye bemka kuma‐Juda, bakolwa ku‐Yesu." 
John12:12 Ngomhla olandelayo abantu abaninzi abebeze emtendelekweni, bakuva ukuba u‐Yesu uyeza e‐Yerusaleme," 
John12:13 batabata amagatya emiti yepalime, bapuma ukuya kumhlangabeza, badanduluka, besiti: Hosana! Makatanyusanqeliswe ozayo egameni likayehova, ukumkani wo‐Sirayeli!" 
John12:14 Wati kekaloku u‐Yesu, elifumene iqwaṙashana, wahlala pezu kwalo; njengokuba kuba̔liwe ngokuti:" 
John12:15 Ungoyiki, ntombi yase‐Ziyone! bona ke, ukumkani wako uyeza, ehleli pezu kwetole leqwaṙashe." 
John12:16 Kodwa ezizinto abadisipile bake abaziqonda ekuqaleni; koko xeshekweni u‐Yesu ebenzelwe ubungcwalisa, bandula bakumbula ukuba ezizinto zibe ziba̔liwe ngaye, nokuba ezizinto bazenza kuye." 
John12:17 Sasisiti ngoko isihlwele esibe sinaye, okuya wambiza u‐Lazarusi apume encw̔abeni, wamvusa ekufeni, sanqi̔nela kwa oku." 
John12:18 Ngako oko kanjalo isihlwele samhlangabeza, ngokokuba besivile ukuba ebewenzile lommangaliso." 
John12:19 Bati ngoko abafarisi pakati kwabo: Nibona na okokuba anincedi luto? nali ilizwe lipume laya emva kwake. 
John12:20 Kekaloku bekuko ama‐Girike atile pakati kwabo abebenyuka ukuza kubedesha emtendelekweni: 
John12:21 wona la eza ngoko ku‐Filipi, obengowase‐Betesayida e‐Galili, amtandaza, esiti: Nkosi! singa singambona u‐Yesu." 
John12:22 Weza u‐Filipi wamxelela u‐Andreya, nakanjako u‐Andreya no‐Filipi bamxelela u‐Yesu." 
John12:23 Kodwa u‐Yesu wabapendula, esiti: Lifikile ixeshana lokuba unyana wesintu enzelwe ubungcwalisa." 
John12:24 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Xeshekweni ukozo lwenqolowa, lwakuba luwele emhlabeni, lungafi, luhlala lona lulodwa; kodwa xeshekweni lufayo, luvelisa isiqa̔mo ezininzi." 
John12:25 Otandayo ubomi bake, buya kumlahleka; notiyayo ubomi bake kwelilizwe, wobugcina kude kube bubomi obungunapakade." 
John12:26 Ukuba umntu uyandikonza, makandilandele; nalapo ndikona mna, woba kwa lapo nomkonzi wam: naxeshekweni umntu andikonzayo mna, ubawo uya kumbeka yena." 
John12:27 Kaloku umpefumlo wam ukatazekile; ndize nditi nina? Bawo! ndisindise kwelixeshana: koko kungenxa yoku ndezayo kulo elixeshana: 
John12:28 Bawo! lenzele ubungcwalisa igama lako. Kwandula kwavela ilizwi ezulwini, lisiti: Sendilenzele ubungcwalisa, ndobuya ndilenzele ubungcwalisa kanjako." 
John12:29 Saye sisiti isihlwele esibe simi kona, saliva: Kududumile. Babesiti abanye: Ingelosi itetile kuye." 
John12:30 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati: Akungenxa yam elilizwi liveleyo, kungenxa yenu." 
John12:31 Kukaloku ukugwetywa kwelilizwe; kaloku inkosi yelilizwe iya kulahlelwa pandle. 
John12:32 Nam, xeshekweni ndipakanyiswa emhlabeni, bonke ndobatsalela kwa kum." 
John12:33 Oku ke ebekutsho, eqondisa ukuba kukufa okunina abeza kufa ngako." 
John12:34 Sati isihlwele ukumpendula: Tina sivile kuwo umteto, ukuba u‐Kristu uyahlala kude kube ngunapakade; uti nina kanti wena ukuti: Unyana wesintu ufanele ukupakanyiswa? ungubanina lo unyana wesintu?" 
John12:35 Wati ngoko kubo u‐Yesu: Kuselixesha elincinane ukanyiso lunani; hambani nxa nisenalo ukanyiso, ukuze ubumnyama bunganibaqi: kanjalo ohambayo ebumnyameni akazi ukuba uya pina." 
John12:36 Nxa nisenalo ukanyiso, kolwani kulo ukanyiso, ukuze nibe lusapo lwokukanya. Ezizinto waziteta u‐Yesu, waza wemka, wazifihla kubo." 
John12:37 Kodwa nakuba ebeyenze imimangaliso emininzi kangaka pambi kwabo, bebengakolwa kuye;" 
John12:38 ukuze ilizwi lika‐Yisaya umprofite lizaliseke, elo walitshoyo ukuti: Yehova! ngubanina okoliweyo yintshumayelo yetu? nengalo kayehova ityiliwe kubanina?" 
John12:39 Ngako oko bebekohlwa kukukolwa, ngokokuba u‐Yisaya watsho kanjako ukuti:" 
John12:40 Uwamfamekisile amehlo abo, wayenza lukuni intliziyo yabo; bangabi babone ngamehlo, baqonde ngentliziyo, baguquke, ndibapilise." 
John12:41 Kwatshiwo oku ngu‐Yisaya, akubona ubungcwalisa bake, waza wateta ngaye." 
John12:42 Kodwa noko kwa kubo abapati abaninzi bakolwa kuye; koko ngenxa yabafarisi bebenga m vumi, ukuze bangaku̔tshwa entlanganisweni:" 
John12:43 ngokuba bebetanda imbeko yabantu ngapezu kwayo imbeko katixo. 
John12:44 Kanjalo u‐Yesu wadanduluka wati: Okolwayo kum, akakolwa kum, kukulowo wanditumayo:" 
John12:45 nobonayo mna, uyabona owanditumayo." 
John12:46 Ndize elizweni mna ndilukanyiso, ukuze osukuba ekolwa kum angahlali ebumnyameni." 
John12:47 Naxeshekweni umntu evayo amazwi am, angakolwa ke, andimgwebi mna: ngokuba ndingezanga ukuba ndigwebe ilizwe, koko ndize ukuba ndisindise ilizwe." 
John12:48 Owalayo mna, angawamkeli namazwi am, unalowo umgwebayo: ilizwi endalitetayo, lilo elo eliya kumgweba ngomhla wokupela." 
John12:49 Ngokuba ndingatetanga ngokwam; koko ubawo owanditumayo, yena wandinika umyalelo wokuba ndoti nina nokuba ndoteta nto nina." 
John12:50 Kanjako ndiyazi ukuba umyalelo wake ububomi obungunapakade: oko ngoko endikutetayo, njengokuba ubawo etshilo kum, ndiyateta kwa njalo." 
John13:1 KEKALOKU ingekabiko ipasika, wati u‐Yesu, esazi ukuba lifikile ixeshana lake, lokuba emke kwelilizwe aye kuyise, ebatandile abake abebeselizweni, wabatanda kwada kwasekupeleni." 
John13:2 Kwaza kwakubako isidlo sokuhlwa, u‐Satane esel’ efakile nje entliziyweni ka‐Jude Sikariyoti, unyana ka‐Simone, okokuba amngcatshe," 
John13:2 Kwaza kwakubako isidlo sokuhlwa, u‐Satane esel’ efakile nje entliziyweni ka‐Jude Sikariyoti, unyana ka‐Simone, okokuba amngcatshe," 
John13:3 wati u‐Yesu, esazi ukuba zonke izinto uzinikile uyise ezandleni zake, nokuba wapuma kutixo, no kuba uyaya kutixo," 
John13:4 wesuka esidlweni sokuhlwa, wazibeka pantsi ingubo, watabata iqiya, wazibinqa." 
John13:5 Wandula wagalela amanzi esityeni, waqala ukuhlanza inyawo zabadisipile, nokuzisula ngeqiya leyo ubebinqiwe ngayo." 
John13:6 Wada weza ku‐Simone Petrosi: waza wati yena lowo kuye: Nkosi! wena uyahlanza inyawo zam na? 
John13:7 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Oko ndikwenzayo akukwazi ngoku; kodwa uya kukuqonda kamva. 
John13:8 Wati u‐Petrosi kuye: Akusayi kuhlanza inyawo zam kwa napakade. Wati u‐Yesu ukumpendula: Xeshekweni ndingakuhlanzi, akunabukolwane nam." 
John13:9 Wati u‐Simone Petrosi kuye: Nkosi! kungabi zinyawo zam zodwa, kube zizandla nentloko nazo." 
John13:10 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Lowo uhlanjiweyo akasweli luto ngapezu kwokuba zihlanzwe inyawo, koko ehlambululekile epela: nani nihlambululekile, koko ningenjalo nonke." 
John13:11 Ngokuba ebesazi lowo ubemngcatsha; kungenxa yoku wati: Anihlambululekile nonke. 
John13:12 Xeshekweni ngoko ebehlanzile inyawo zabo, wazitabata nengubo zake, wabuya wahlala pantsi, wati kubo: Niyaqonda na into endiyenzileyo kuni?" 
John13:13 Niyandibiza ngokuti, Mfundisi, nangokuti, Nkosi: kanjako niyalungisa ukutsho: ngokuba ndinjalo." 
John13:14 Ukuba ngoko ndizihlanzile mna inyawo zenu, ndiyinkosi nomfundisi, nifanelwe kukuti nani nihlanzelane inyawo." 
John13:15 Ngokuba ndininikile umzekelo, ukuze niti, njengokuba ndenze mna kuni, nenje njalo nani." 
John13:16 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Akuko sicaka esikulu kwinkosi yaso, nomtunywa omkulu kowamtumayo." 
John13:17 Ukuba ezizinto niyazazi, ninetamsanqa xeshekweni nizenzayo." 
John13:18 Anditeti ngani nonke; ndiyabazi mna abo ndabanyulayo; koko kunje ke ukuze sizaliseke isiba̔lo sokuti: Obesidla isonka ndawonye nam, upakamisile isitende sake ngakum." 
John13:19 Emveni kwoku ndiyanixelela kungekehli, ukuze niti, xeshekweni kuhlayo, nikolwe ukuba ndinguye." 
John13:20 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Owamkela osukuba etunywa ndim, uyamkela mna: nowamkela mna, uyamkela owanditumayo." 
John13:21 Akuba ebekutshilo oku u‐Yesu, wakatazeka emoyeni, wanqi̔na, wati: Ngokwenene, ngokwenene nditi kuni, omnye kuni wondingcatsha." 
John13:22 Bandula abadisipile bakangelana, betandabuza ukuba uteta ngobanina?" 
John13:23 Kekaloku bekuhleli ekutyeni esifubeni sika‐Yesu omnye wabadisipile bake, obetandwa ngu‐Yesu." 
John13:24 Wati ngoko u‐Simone Petrosi wakoba kuye lo, ukuba abuze kungaba ngubanina ateta ngaye." 
John13:25 Waza yena wayama esifubeni sika‐Yesu, wati kuye: Nkosi! ungubanina?" 
John13:26 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Ngulowo endiya kunika umtamo kuye, ndakuba ndiwufakile. Waza akuba ebewufakile wawunika ku‐Jude Sikariyoti, unyana ka‐Simone." 
John13:26 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Ngulowo endiya kunika umtamo kuye, ndakuba ndiwufakile. Waza akuba ebewufakile wawunika ku‐Jude Sikariyoti, unyana ka‐Simone." 
John13:27 Kwati emveni kwomtamo, wandula wangena kuye u‐Satane. Wati ngoko u‐Yesu kuye: Oko ukwenzayo, kwenze kamsinyane." 
John13:28 Kekaloku bekungeko mntu pakati kwabahleli ekutyeni owaqonda ukuba watsho kuye nganina. 
John13:29 Ngokuba bebeba inxenye, u‐Jude enenxowa nje, wati u‐Yesu kuye: Tengela umtendeleko izinto esizisweleyo; umhlaumbi, ukuba awape amahlwempu into." 
John13:29 Ngokuba bebeba inxenye, u‐Jude enenxowa nje, wati u‐Yesu kuye: Tengela umtendeleko izinto esizisweleyo; umhlaumbi, ukuba awape amahlwempu into." 
John13:30 Yena ngoko, akuba ebewamkele umtamo, waselepuma: kwaye kububusuku ke." 
John13:31 Ngako xeshekweni ebepumile, wati u‐Yesu: Kaloku unyana wesintu uyenzelwa ubungcwalisa, notixo uyenzelwa ubungcwalisa kuye." 
John13:32 Ukuba utixo uyenzelwa ubungcwalisa kuye, naye utixo uya kwenzela yena ubungcwalisa kuye ngokwake, waeya kumenzela ubungcwalisa kamsinya." 
John13:33 Lusatshana! lixesha elincinane endisenani ngalo. Niya kundifuna; nanjengokuba ndati kuma‐Juda: Apo ndiyayo mna, aningeze nina kona; nditsho nakuni ngoku." 
John13:34 Umyalelo omtsha ndiyawunika kuni, ukuba nitandane; njengokuba nditandile nina, ukuba nani nitandane kwa njalo." 
John13:35 Ngako oku baya kukwazi bonke ukuba ningabadisipile bam, ukuba ninotando omnye kwomnye." 
John13:36 Wati u‐Simone Petrosi kuye: Nkosi! uya pina? Wati u‐Yesu ukumpendula: Apo ndiya kona, akungendilandele kaloku; kodwa uya kundilandela kamva." 
John13:37 Wati u‐Petrosi kuye: Nkosi! kunganina ukuba andingekulandele ngoku? ubomi bam ndobubeka pantsi ngenxa yako. 
John13:38 Wati u‐Yesu ukumpendula: Ubomi bako wobubeka pantsi ngenxa yam na? Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuwe: Inkuku ayisayi kulila, ungekandikanyeli katatu." 
John14:1 MAINGAKATAZEKI intliziyo yenu: niyakolwa kutixo; kolwani nakum. 
John14:2 Endlwini kabawo kuko intlalo ezininzi: ukuba bekungenjalo, ngendinixelele. Ndiyemka ukuya kunilungisela indawo." 
John14:3 Nokuba nditi ndimke ndiye ndinilungisele indawo, ndiyeza kanjako, ndandiya kunamkela kwa kum; ukuze niti, apo ndikona mna, nibe kwa kona nani." 
John14:4 Kanjalo apo ndiya kona niyakwazi, nendlela niyayazi." 
John14:5 Wati u‐Tomasi kuye: Nkosi! asazi ukuba uya pina; singati nina ke indlela ukuyazi? 
John14:6 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Mna ndiyiyo indlela, ndiyiyo nenyaniso, ndibubo nobomi: akuko mntu ozayo kubawo, engezi ngam." 
John14:7 Ukuba benindazile mna, ngeniba nimazile nobawo: nasemveni kwoku niyamazi, nimbonile kanjalo." 
John14:8 Wati u‐Filipi kuye: Nkosi! sibonise uyihlo, kuti oko kusikolise." 
John14:9 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Kukade kangaka ndinani nje, akundazile na noko, Filipi? lowo undibonileyo mna, umbonile ubawo; uti nina ke wena ukuti: Sibonise uyihlo?" 
John14:10 Akukolwa na ukuba ndikuye ubawo, nokuba ubawo ukum? lomazwi enditeta wona kuni, andiwateti ngokwam; kodwa ubawo ohlala kum, nguye oyenzayo imisebenzi." 
John14:11 Kolwani ndim ukuba ndikuye ubawo, nokuba ubawo ukum; okanye, kolwani ndim ngenxa yemisebenzi ngokwayo." 
John14:12 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Okolwayo kum, lomisebenzi endiyenzayo mna uya kuyenza naye; nemikulu kulé uya kuyenza; ngokuba ndimka ukuya kubawo." 
John14:13 Nento enisukuba niyicela egameni lam, yona le ndiya kuyenza; ukuze uyise enzelwe ubungcwalisa kuye unyana." 
John14:14 Xeshekweni into niyicela egameni lam, ndiya kuyenza." 
John14:15 Ukuba niyanditanda, gcinani imiyalelo yam." 
John14:16 Ndandiya kumtandaza ubawo, oya kuninika umonwabisi omnye, ukuze ahlale nani kude kube ngunapakade," 
John14:17 kwa umoya wenyaniso, lowo ilizwe lingemamkele, ngokuba lingamboni, lingamazi nokumazi; kodwa nina niyamazi, ngokuba ehlala kuni, waeya kuba pakati kwenu kanjalo." 
John14:18 Andiyi kunishiya nizinkedama; ndoza kuni. 
John14:19 Kuselixesha elincinane, landule ilizwe lingabi sandibona; kodwa nina niyandibona: ngokuba ndisidla ubomi mna, niya kudla ubomi nani." 
John14:20 Kulowamhla niya kukwazi ukuba ndikuye ubawo, nokuba nina nikum, nokuba mna ndikuni." 
John14:21 Onayo imiyalelo yam, eyigcina nokuyigcina, nguye onditandayo; nalow̔o utanda mna, uya kutandwa ngubawo; ndoti nam ndimtande, ndizityile kuye." 
John14:22 Wati kuye u‐Jude, (engenguye u‐Sikariyoti:) Nkosi! kuhla nganina ukuba uza kuzityila kuti, ungenje njalo kanti kwilizwe?" 
John14:22 Wati kuye u‐Jude, (engenguye u‐Sikariyoti:) Nkosi! kuhla nganina ukuba uza kuzityila kuti, ungenje njalo kanti kwilizwe?" 
John14:23 Wapendula u‐Yesu wati kuye: Ukuba umntu uyanditanda, woligcina ilizwi lam; kanjalo ubawo uya kumtanda, sasiya kuza kuye, senze nentlalo yetu naye." 
John14:24 Lowo unganditandiyo, amazwi am akawagcini: nelizwi enilivayo, asi lelam, le likabawo owanditumayo." 
John14:25 Ezizinto ndizitetile kuni, ndi sa hlala nani." 
John14:26 Kodwa umonwabisi, kwa umoya oyingcwele, oya kutunywa ngubawo egameni lam, yena uya kunifundisa zonke izinto, anikumbuze zonke izinto endazitetayo kuni." 
John14:27 Uxolo ndiyalushiya kuni, olwam uxolo ndiyalunika kuni: akunjengokuba linika ilizwe endinika njalo kuni. Maingakatazeki intliziyo yenu, maingabi nabugwala kanjalo." 
John14:28 Nivile okokuba ndati kuni: Ndiyemka, ndibuye ndize kuni. Ukuba nanditanda, ngenivuyele okokuba ndati: Ndiyemka ukuya kubawo; ngokuba ubawo emkulu kum." 
John14:29 Nakaloku ndinixelele oku kungekehli; ukuze niti, xeshekweni kuhlayo, nikolwe." 
John14:30 Andiyi kuba sateta kakulu nani; ngokuba isiza inkosi yelilizwe, kanti ayinanto kum." 
John14:31 Koko kunje ke ukuze lazi ilizwe okokuba ndiyatanda ubawo; nokuba nditi, njengokuba endiyalele ubawo, ndenje njalo. Sukani, simke apa." 
John15:1 MNA ndinguwo umti weveyine oyinyaniso, nobawo unguye umlimi." 
John15:2 Onke amasebe akum engavelisi iziqa̔mo, wona uyawasusa: nawo onke evelisa iziqa̔mo, wona uyawahlambulula, ukuze avelise iziqa̔mo ezininzi ngakumbi." 
John15:3 Nina nise nihlambululekile, ngetuba lelizwi endilitetileyo kuni." 
John15:4 Hlalani kum, ndihlale nam kuni. Njengokuba isebe lingevelise iziqa̔mo ngokwalo, xeshekweni lingahlali emtini weveyine; kwa njalo nani aninge velise iziqa̔mo, xeshekweni ningahlali kum." 
John15:5 Mna ndinguwo umti weveyine, nina ningawo amasebe: oti ahlale kum, nam ndihlale kuye, yena lo uyavelisa iziqa̔mo ezininzi; ngokuba ngapandle kwam ningenze luto." 
John15:6 Ukuba umntu akahlali kum, uyalahlwa njengesebe, ashwabane; bati abantu bawabute, bawapose emlilweni, atshiswe ke." 
John15:7 Ukuba niti nihlale kum, namazwi am ahlale kuni, niya kucela into enisukuba nitanda uku yi cela, naniya kwenzelwa yona." 
John15:8 Ngako oku uyenzelwa ubungcwalisa ubawo, ukuba nivelise iziqa̔mo ezininzi; naniya kuba ngabadisipile bam." 
John15:9 Njengokuba enditandile mna ubawo, nam ndinitandile nina kwa njalo: hlalani elutandweni lwam." 
John15:10 Ukuba niyagcina imiyalelo yam, niya kuhlala elutandweni lwam; kwa njengokuba mna ndiyigcinile imiyalelo kabawo, ndihlala nokuhlala elutandweni lwake." 
John15:11 Ezizinto ndizitetile kuni, ukuze uvuyo lwam luhlale kuni, nokuba uvuyo lwenu luzaliseke." 
John15:12 Nguwo lo umyalelo wam, owokuba nitandane, kwa njengokuba nditandile nina." 
John15:13 Akuko namnye onotando olukulu kulo olu, lwokokuba umntu abeke pantsi ubomi bake ngenxa yezihlobo zake." 
John15:14 Nina nizizihlobo zam, nxa nizenza zonke izinto endiniyaleleyo." 
John15:15 Andisatsho ukuti nizizicaka; ngokuba isicaka singazi oko ikwenzayo inkosi yaso: kodwa ndite nizizihlobo; ngokuba zonke izinto endizivileyo kubawo ndizazisile kuni. 
John15:16 Nina ananyula mna, koko mna ndanyula nina, ndanimisa, ukuze niye nivelise iziqa̔mo, nokuba iziqa̔mo zenu zibe nokuhlala; ukuze, oko enisukuba nikucela kubawo egameni lam, anipe kona." 
John15:17 Ndiyaniyalela ezizinto, ukuze nitandane." 
John15:18 Ukuba ilizwe liyanitiya, niyazi ukuba litiyile mna lingeka tiyi nina." 
John15:19 Ukuba nibe ningabakulo ilizwe, ilizwe ngeliba litanda abalo; kodwa ngokuba ningengabakulo ilizwe, koko ndaninyulayo elizweni, ngenxa yoku ilizwe liyanitiya." 
John15:20 Kumbulani ilizwi endalitshoyo kuni ukuti: Akuko sicaka esikulu kwinkosi yaso. Ukuba banditshutshisa mna, bonitshutshisa nani; ukuba baligcina ilizwi lam, boligcina nelenu." 
John15:21 Koko ezizinto zonke baya kuzenza kuni ngenxa yegama lam, kuba bengamazi lowo wanditumayo." 
John15:22 Ukuba bendingezanga ndateta kubo, bebengayi kuba nasono; kodwa kaloku abanasilandulo ngaso isono sabo." 
John15:23 Otiyayo mna, uyamtiya nobawo." 
John15:24 Ukuba lomisebenzi bendingayenzanga pakati kwabo, ekungeko mntu omnye oyenzileyo, bebengayi kuba nasono; kodwa kaloku babonile, batiyile nokutiya kwa nam nobawo." 
John15:25 Koko kunje ke ukuze lizaliseke ilizwi eliba̔liweyo emtetweni wabo lokuti: Banditiya kungeko tuba. 
John15:26 Kodwa okuya afikayo umonwabisi, endiya kumtuma kuni evela kubawo, kwa umoya wenyaniso, opumayo kubawo, oyena uya kunqi̔na ngam:" 
John15:27 kanjalo nani ningamanqi̔na, ngokuba ninam kutabata ekuqaleni." 
John16:1 EZIZINTO ndizitetile kuni, ukuze ningaxakaniswa." 
John16:2 Baya kuniku̔pa ezintlanganisweni; ewe kuyeza ixeshana, lokuba lowo usukuba enibulala woba uyanikela isikonzo kutixo." 
John16:3 Nezizinto baya kuzenza kuni, ngokuba bengamazanga ubawo, bengand azanga nam." 
John16:4 Koko ezizinto ndizitetile kuni, ukuze niti, okuya ixeshana lifikayo, nizikumbule ukuba ndanixelela zona: kodwa andinixelelanga ezizinto kwa sekuqaleni, ngokuba bendiko nani." 
John16:5 Kodwa kaloku ndiyemka ukuya kulowo wanditumayo; kanti akuko namnye kuni obuza kum ukuti: Uya pina? 
John16:6 Koko ngokuba ezizinto ndizitetile kuni, usizi luzalisile intliziyo yenu." 
John16:7 Noko ndiyanixelela inyaniso: Kulungele nina ukuba ndimke: ngokuba, xeshekweni ndingemki mna, umonwabisi engayi kuza kuni; kodwa xeshekweni ndiyayo, ndiya kumtuma kuni." 
John16:8 Waeya kuti akufika yena eyise ilizwe ngaso isono, nangabo ubulungisa, nangako ukugwetywa:" 
John16:9 ngaso isono ke, ngokuba bengakolwa kum;" 
John16:10 nangabo ubulungisa, ngokuba ndimka ukuya kubawo, nize ningabi sandibona;" 
John16:11 nangako ukugwetywa, ngokuba inkosi yelilizwe igwetyiwe." 
John16:12 Ndisenazo izinto ezininzi zokuteta kuni, koko ningezinyamezele ngoku." 
John16:13 Kodwa okuya afikayo yena, kwa umoya wenyaniso, uya kunikapela kuyo yonke inyaniso: ngokuba engayi kuteta ngokwake; koko konke asukuba ekuva, uya kuteta kona; nezinto ezizayo uya kuzishumayela kuni." 
John16:14 Oyena uya kundenzela ubungcwalisa; ngokuba eya kwamkela kokwam, akushumayele kuni." 
John16:15 Zonke ezonto anazo ubawo, zizezam: ngenxa yoku ndatsho ukuti, uya kwamkela kokwam, akushumayele kuni." 
John16:16 Lixesha elincinane, nize ningandiboni; lixesha elincinane kanjako, naniya kundibona; ngokuba ndimka ukuya kubawo." 
John16:17 Bati ngoko inxenye kubadisipile bake omnye kwomnye: Yinto nina le ayitshoyo ukuti: Lixesha elincinane, nize ningandiboni; lixesha elincinane kanjako, naniya kundibona; nokuti: Ngokuba ndimka ukuya kubawo?" 
John16:18 Babesiti ngoko: Yinto nina le ayitshoyo ukuti: Lixesha elincinane? asazi ukuba uteta nto nina. 
John16:19 Wazi kekaloku u‐Yesu ukuba bebefuna ukumbuza, waza wati kubo: Niyabuzana ngako oku na, ukuba ndati: Lixesha elincinane, nize ningandiboni; lixesha elincinane kanjako, naniya kundibona?" 
John16:20 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Niya kulila nikale nina, kodwa ilizwe liya kuvuya; naniya kuba lusizi, koko usizi lwenu luya kwenziwa lube luvuyo." 
John16:21 Umfazi okuya azalayo unosizi, ngokuba lifikile ixeshana lake; kodwa okuya amzeleyo umntwana, akasabukumbuli ubunzima, ngenxa yovuyo lwake lwokuba umntu uzalelwe elizweni." 
John16:22 Nani ke kambe ninosizi kaloku; kodwa ndiya kunibona kanjako, yaiya kuvuya intliziyo yenu, novuyo lwenu akuko namnye onihluta lona." 
John16:23 Ngalomini ke aniyi kundibuza nto. Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuni: Oko enisukuba nikucela kubawo egameni lam, uya kunipa kona." 
John16:24 Kwada kwakaloku anicelanga nto egameni lam: celani, naniya kwamkela, ukuze uvuyo lwenu lube luzalisekile." 
John16:25 Ezizinto ndizitetile kuni ngemizekeliso; kodwa ixeshana liyeza, oko ndingayi kuba sateta kuni ngemizekeliso, koko ndiya kushumayela kuni kwa sekuhleni ngaye ubawo." 
John16:26 Ngalomini niya kucela egameni lam: anditsho ke kuni ukuti, ndiya kunitandazela ubawo:" 
John16:27 ngokuba ubawo ngokwake enitanda, kuba nitandile mna, nakolwa ukuba ndapuma kutixo." 
John16:28 Ndapuma kubawo, ndize elizweni ke; kanjako, ndiyalishiya ilizwe, ndiye kubawo." 
John16:29 Bati kuye abadisipile bake: Kangela, kaloku uyateta kwa sekuhleni, ungasateti ngomzekeliso ke." 
John16:30 Kaloku siyazi ukuba uyazazi zonke izinto, ungasweli ukuba ubuzwe mntu kanjalo; ngako oku siyakolwa ukuba wapuma kutixo." 
John16:31 Wati u‐Yesu ukubapendula: Niyakolwa kaloku nje na? 
John16:32 Bona ke, ixeshana liyeza, ewe lifikile ngoku, lokuba niya kuci̔twa, nisiya nonke ngabanye emakayeni enu, niti mna nindishiye ndedwa: andindedwa noko, ngokuba ubawo enam." 
John16:33 Ezizinto ndizitetile kuni, ukuze nibe noxolo kum. Elizweni niya kuba nobunzima; kodwa yomelelani; ndiloyisile ilizwe mna." 
John17:1 LA MAZWI wawateta u‐Yesu, wapakamisa amehlo ake ngasezulwini, wati: Bawo! ixeshana lifikile: menzele ubungcwalisa unyana wako, ukuze nonyana wako akwenzele ubungcwalisa wena:" 
John17:2 kwa njengokuba wamnika igunya pezu kwoluntu lwonke, ukuze bonke usukuba umnikile bona abanike ubomi obungunapakade." 
John17:3 Bubo obu ke ubomi obungunapakade, ukuba bazi wena okupela kwotixo oyinyaniso, no‐Yesu Kristu owabumtuma." 
John17:4 Ndikwenzele ubungcwalisa emhlabeni; ndiwufezile umsebenzi endiwunikiweyo nguwe ukuba ndiwenze. 
John17:5 Nakaloku, Bawo! ndenzele ubungcwalisa kwa kuwe wena, ngobungcwalisa obo endibe ndinabo kuwe lingekabiko ilizwe." 
John17:6 Ndilityilile igama lako kwabobantu endibanikiweyo nguwe kulo ilizwe: bebengabako, waundinikile bona; nelizwi lako baligcinile." 
John17:7 Kaloku bazile ukuba zonke ezonto endizinikiweyo nguwe zivela kwa kuwe. 
John17:8 Ngokuba lomazwi endiwanikiweyo nguwe, ndiwanikile kubo; bati bona bawamkela, bazi ngenyaniso ukuba ndapuma kuwe, bakolwa ukuba wandituma wena." 
John17:9 Ndiyatandazela bona; anditandazeli ilizwe, koko nditandaz ela abo endibanikiweyo nguwe; ngokuba bengabako." 
John17:10 Zonke izinto ke ezizezam zizezako, nezizezako zezam; kanjalo ndenzelwe ubungcwalisa kuzo." 
John17:11 Kekaloku mna andiseselizweni, kanti aba bako elizweni, nam ndiyeza kuwe. Bawo oyingcwele! bagcinele egameni lako abo endibanikiweyo nguwe, ukuze babe banye, njengokuba sibanye tina." 
John17:12 Oko ndibe ndinabo elizweni, ndandibagcinela egameni lako: abo ubanikileyo kum ndabalondoloza, kungatshabalalanga namnye kubo, kutshabalele unyana wentshabalalo kupela; ukuze isiba̔lo sizaliseke." 
John17:13 Kodwa kaloku ndiyeza kuwe; nezizinto ndiyaziteta ndiselizweni, ukuze babe novuyo lwam luzalisekile kubo." 
John17:14 Ndibanikile ilizwi lako; lite ilizwe labatiya, ngokuba bengengabaselizweni, njengokuba ndingengowaselizweni mna." 
John17:15 Anditandazi ukuba ubasuse elizweni, koko nditandaza ukuba ubagcine kuko okukohlakeleyo." 
John17:16 Abangabaselizweni, njengokuba ndingengowaselizweni mna." 
John17:17 Bangcwalise ngayo inyaniso yako; lona ilizwi lako liyinyaniso. 
John17:18 Njengokuba watuma mna elizweni, kwa njalo nam ndatuma bona elizweni." 
John17:19 Nangenxa yabo ndiyazingcwalisa mna ngokwam, ukuze nabo babe bengcwalisiwe enyanisweni." 
John17:20 Kodwa anditandazeli aba bodwa, koko nditandaz ela nabo baya kukolwa kum ngelizwi labo;" 
John17:21 ukuze bonke babe banye; njengokuba wena, Bawo! ukum, nam ndikuwe, baze nabo babe banye kuti; ukuze ilizwe likolwe ukuba wandituma wena," 
John17:22 nobungcwalisa obunikileyo kum, ndibunikile mna kubo; ukuze babe banye, njengokuba sibanye tina;" 
John17:23 mna ndikubo, nawe ukum, ukuze babe befezekile ngokuba banye; nokuze ilizwe lazi ukuba wena wandituma, nokuba wabatanda bona, kwa njengokuba wanditanda mna." 
John17:24 Bawo! abo undinikile bona, nditanda ukuba apo ndikoyo mna, nabo babe kona ndawonye nam; ukuze babone ubungcwalisa bam, obo endandibunikwa nguwe; ngokuba wabunditanda lingekamiswa ilizwe." 
John17:25 Bawo olungileyo! lona ilizwe alakwazi; kodwa mna ndakwazi, bati naba bazi ukuba wena wandituma." 
John17:26 Ndaza ndalazisa kubo igama lako, ndandiya ku l azisa kanjako; ukuze utando owabunditanda ngalo lube kubo, nam ndibe kubo." 
John18:1 WATI u‐Yesu akuba ebetetile la mazwi, wapuma nabadisipile bake waya pesheya kwomlanjana we‐Kidrone, apo bekuko umyezo kona, ekwangena kuwo yena nabadisipile bake." 
John18:2 Kekaloku no‐Jude, owamngcatshayo, wabeyazi indawo leyo; ngokuba bekufuti u‐Yesu wabutelana kona nabadisipile bake." 
John18:2 Kekaloku no‐Jude, owamngcatshayo, wabeyazi indawo leyo; ngokuba bekufuti u‐Yesu wabutelana kona nabadisipile bake." 
John18:3 U‐Jude ngoko, elamkele nje ibandla, namadindili evela kubo abaperisite abakulu nabafarisi, weza kona enezibane, nezikuni, nezikali." 
John18:3 U‐Jude ngoko, elamkele nje ibandla, namadindili evela kubo abaperisite abakulu nabafarisi, weza kona enezibane, nezikuni, nezikali." 
John18:4 Wandula u‐Yesu, esazi zonke izinto ezibe zisiza pezu kwake, wapuma wati kubo: Nifuna banina?" 
John18:5 Bati ukumpendula: u‐Yesu wase‐Nazarete. Wati kubo u‐Yesu: Ndinguye. (Kekaloku no‐Jude owamngcatshayo ebemi ndawonye nabo.) 
John18:5 Bati ukumpendula: u‐Yesu wase‐Nazarete. Wati kubo u‐Yesu: Ndinguye. (Kekaloku no‐Jude owamngcatshayo ebemi ndawonye nabo.) 
John18:6 Xeshekweni ngoko watsho kubo ukuti: Ndinguye; baya ngomva, bawa emhlabeni." 
John18:7 Wandula wabuya wabuza kubo ukuti: Nifuna banina? Baza bati: u‐Yesu wase‐Nazarete. 
John18:8 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Ndatsho kuni ukuti ndinguye: ukuba ngoko niyafuna mna, yekani aba bahambe:" 
John18:9 ukuze lizaliseke ilizwi owalitshoyo ukuti: Abo undinikile bona, akwandilahleka namnye kubo." 
John18:10 Wandula u‐Simone Petrosi enesiṙele nje wasir̔ola, wabeta isicaka somperisite omkulu, wasiti nqam eyokunene indlebe. Laye lingu‐Maluke igama lesicaka eso." 
John18:11 Wati ngoko u‐Yesu ku‐Petrosi: Faka isiṙele sako esinxobeni: indebe endiyinikiweyo ngubawo, ndingayiseli na?" 
John18:12 Bandula ukuti ibandla elo, nenkosiwaka, namadindili ama‐Juda, bambamba u‐Yesu, bamnxiba," 
John18:13 bamr̔olela ku‐Anasi kuqala; ngokuba ebengusomfazi ku‐Kayafasi, obengumperisite omkulu ngomnyaka lowo." 
John18:14 Kekaloku ebengu‐Kayafasi owanika icebo kuma‐Juda, lokuti ku si lungele ukuba umntu emnye afe ngenxa yabantu." 
John18:15 Waza u‐Simone Petrosi wamlandela u‐Yesu, kwa nalomdisipile omnye: waye ke umdisipile lowo esaziwa ngumperisite omkulu, wangena no‐Yesu ekusini lendlu yomperisite omkulu." 
John18:16 Kodwa u‐Petrosi ebemi ngaselucangweni ngapandle. Wandula wapuma lomdisipile omnye, obesaziwa ngumperisite omkulu, wateta kumgcinikazi wocango, wamngenisa u‐Petrosi." 
John18:17 Sandula sati isicakazana esingumgcinikazi wocango ku‐Petrosi: Nawe ungowakubadisipile balomntu na? Wati yena: Andinjalo. 
John18:18 Kekaloku izicaka namadindili bebemi kona, bewubasile umlilo wamalahle, ngokuba bekubanda, bota ke: kanjalo u‐Petrosi ebemi ndawonye nabo, esota naye." 
John18:19 Wandula umperisite omkulu wabuza ku‐Yesu ngabadisipile bake, nangemfundiso yake." 
John18:20 Wati u‐Yesu ukumpendula: Ndateta ekuhleni kwilizwe; ndamana ndifundisa endlwini yentlanganiso nasetempileni, apo ama‐Juda amana ehlangana kona; andateta nto ke ngasese." 
John18:21 Yinina ukuba ubuze kum? buza kubo abandivileyo, ukuba ndateta nto nina kubo: kangela, aba bayakwazi oko ndakutshoyo." 
John18:22 Kekaloku akuba ebetshilo oku, elinye lamadindili elibe limi kufupi lamtywakaza u‐Yesu ngesandla, lisiti: Uyenje njalo na ukumpendula umperisite omkulu?" 
John18:23 Wati u‐Yesu ukulipendula: Ukuba ndateta ngokukohlakeleyo, nqi̔nela ukukohlakala oko: kodwa ukuba ndateta ngokulungileyo, uyandibetela nina?" 
John18:24 Wati u‐Anasi wamtuma enxityiwe ku‐Kayafasi umperisite omkulu. 
John18:25 Kekaloku u‐Simone Petrosi ebemi esota. Bati ngoko kuye: Nawe ungowakubadisipile bake na? Wakanyela yena, wati: Andinjalo." 
John18:26 Wati owasezicakeni zomperisite omkulu, esisalamane salowo wayiti nqam u‐Petrosi indlebe yake: Andakubona na emyezweni ndawonye naye?" 
John18:27 Wandula wabuya wakanyela u‐Petrosi: yasuka yalila inkuku kwa oko. 
John18:28 BANDULA besuka no‐Yesu kwa‐Kayafasi bamr̔olela endlwini yenkosi; kwaye kube kusasa ke; baza bona ngokwabo abangena endlwini yenkosi, ukuze banganco̔liswa, koko ukuze bayitye ipasika." 
John18:29 Wapuma ngoko u‐Pilati waya kubo, wati: Lityala lanina enimnika lona umntu lo?" 
John18:30 Bapendula bati kuye: Ukuba lo ebengengumenzi wokukohlakeleyo, ngesingamnikelanga kuwe." 
John18:31 Wandula wati kubo u‐Pilati: Mtabateni nina, nimgwebe ngokwomteto wenu. Ati ngoko ama‐Juda kuye: Asivunyelwa tina ukuba sifise umntu:" 
John18:32 ukuze ilizwi lika‐Yesu lizaliseke, elo walitetayo eqondisa ukuba kukufa okunina abeza kufa ngako." 
John18:33 Wandula u‐Pilati wangena endlwini yenkosi kanjako, wambiza u‐Yesu, wati kuye: Wena ungukumkani wama‐Juda na?" 
John18:34 Wati u‐Yesu ukumpendula: Oku ukutsho ngokwako, wakuxelelwa ngam ngabanye, kusinina?" 
John18:35 Wati u‐Pilati ukupendula: Ndingum‐Juda nje na? uhlanga lwakowenu nabaperisite abakulu bakunikela kum: yinto nina uyenzileyo? 
John18:36 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Ubukumkani bam asi bubo obakwelilizwe: ukuba ubukumkani bam bube bubobakwelilizwe, abakonzi bam bebeya kulwa, ukuze ndinganikelwa kuma‐Juda: kodwa kaloku ubukumkani bam asi bubo obuvela apa." 
John18:37 Wandula u‐Pilati wati kuye: Ungukumkani na ke? Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Utsho wena ukuba ndingukumkani. Ndizalelwe oku, ndaye ndizele oku ndisiza elizweni, ukuze ndiyinqi̔nele inyaniso. Osukuba engowakuyo inyaniso, uyaliva ilizwi lam." 
John18:38 Wati u‐Pilati kuye: Iyinto nina inyaniso? Waza etshilo oku wabuya wapuma waya kuma‐Juda, wati kuwo: Andifumani tyala kuye." 
John18:39 Kodwa ninalo isiko, lokuba ndinikululele umbanjwa abe mnye epasikeni: nifuna ngoko ukunga ndinganikululela ukumkani wama‐Juda na?" 
John18:40 Bandula bonke badanduluka kanjako, besiti: Kungabi nguló, kube nguye u‐Baraba! Kekaloku u‐Baraba ebelibada." 
John19:1 Wandula u‐Pilati ngoko wamtabata u‐Yesu, wambeta." 
John19:2 Aza amasodati aluka isitsaba ngemitolo, asibeka entlokweni yake, amvatisa ingubo ebomvu," 
John19:3 ati: A, kumkani wama‐Juda! Abemtywakaza ngezandla kanjalo." 
John19:4 Wandula u‐Pilati wabuya wapuma ngapandle, wati kubo: Kangela, ndiyamzisa kuni ngapandle, ukuze nazi ukuba andifumani tyala kuye." 
John19:5 (Wapuma ngoko u‐Yesu ngapandle, esambete isitsaba semitolo, nengubo ebomvu.) Waza wati kubo: Nanku umntu ke!" 
John19:6 Xeshekweni ngoko bambonayo abaperisite abakulu namadindili, badanduluka, besiti: Mkuruseshe, mkuruseshe! Wati u‐Pilati kubo: Mtabateni nina, nimkuruseshe; ngokuba ndingafumani tyala kuye mna." 
John19:7 Ati ama‐Juda ukumpendula: Tina sinomteto, kanjalo ngawo lomteto wetu ufanelwe kukufa, ngokuba wabezenza unyana katixo." 
John19:8 Wandula u‐Pilati akuva elilizwi, woyika ngakumbi," 
John19:9 wabuya wangena endlwini yenkosi, wati ku‐Yesu: Uvela pina? Kodwa u‐Yesu akamnika mpendulo." 
John19:10 Wati ngoko u‐Pilati kuye: Akuteti kum na? akwazi na ukuba ndinegunya lokukurusesha, nokuba ndinegunya lokukukulula?" 
John19:11 Wati u‐Yesu ukupendula: Ubungayi kuba nagunya ngakum nakanye, ukuba ubungalinikwanga livela pezulu: ngako oku lowo wandinikelayo kuwe unesono esikulu ngakumbi." 
John19:12 Emveni kwoku wabefuna u‐Pilati ukumkulula: kodwa ama‐Juda abedanduluka, esiti: Ukuba lo uyamkulula, akunguye umhlobo ka‐Kesare: osukuba ezenza ukumkani uyamca̔sa u‐Kesare." 
John19:13 Wati ngoko u‐Pilati akuva elilizwi, wamzisa u‐Yesu ngapandle, wahlala pantsi pezu kwesihlalo sokugweba endaweni e‐kutiwa Sisandlalwamatye, kodwa ngokwama‐Hebere yi‐Gabata:" 
John19:14 (kekaloku ibiyimini yokulungiselela yasepasikeni, neyure yanga yayeyesitandatu:) waza wati kuma‐Juda: Nanku ukumkani wenu!" 
John19:15 Kodwa adanduluka wona, esiti: Msuse, msuse, mkuruseshe yena! Wati kuwo u‐Pilati: Ndimkuruseshe ukumkani wenu na? Bati ukupendula abaperisite abakulu: Asinakumkani, sino‐Kesare kupela." 
John19:16 Wandula ngoko wamnikela kubo, ukuze akuruseshwe. Baza bamtabata u‐Yesu, bemka naye." 
John19:17 Waza yena etwala ikuruse yake wapuma waya endaweni e‐kutiwa yeyenkankani, leyo kutiwa ngokwama‐Hebere yi‐Gologota;" 
John19:18 apo bamkuruseshela kona, nabanye bebabini ndawonye naye, omnye ngelicala, omnye ngeliya, u‐Yesu epakati." 
John19:19 Kanjako u‐Pilati waba̔la isiba̔lwa, wasibeka pezu kwayo ikuruse. Kwabekuba̔liwe ukuti: Uyesu wasenazarete ukumkani wamajuda." 
John19:20 Esi isiba̔lwa ke ama‐Juda amaninzi asilesesha; ngokuba londawo ibikufupi nesixeko, apo u‐Yesu wakuruseshelwa kona: kwabekuba̔liwe ngokwama‐Hebere, na ngokwama‐Girike, na ngokwama‐Roma." 
John19:21 Baye besiti ngoko abaperisite abakulu bama‐Juda ku‐Pilati: Ungaba̔li ngokuti: Ukumkani wama‐Juda; koko uti, watsho yena ukuti: Ndingukumkani wama‐Juda." 
John19:22 Wati ukupendula u‐Pilati: Oko ndikuba̔lileyo, ndikuba̔lile." 
John19:23 Andula amasodati, okuya abemkuruseshile u‐Yesu, atabata izivato zake, enza izahlulo zazine, sibe sisahlulo sinye kumasodati amanye ngamanye, kwa nengubo yake yapantsi: kekaloku ingubo yake yapantsi ibe ingenamtungo, ilukiwe ipela kutabata pezulu." 
John19:24 Ati ngoko elinye kwelinye: Masingaṙazuli yona, koko masenze amaqashiso ngayo, okuba yoba yekabanina: ukuze isiba̔lo sizaliseke, esiti: Babelana izivato zam, napezu kwengubo yam benza amaqashiso. Ezizinto ke ngoko amasodati lawo azenza." 
John19:25 Kekaloku kube kumi ngakuyo ikuruse ka‐Yesu unina, nodade wonina, u‐Mariya umfazi ka‐Kelopasi, no‐Mariya wase‐Magadala." 
John19:26 Waza u‐Yesu akubona unina, nalomdisipile emi kufupi abemtanda, wati kunina: Mfazi, nanko unyana wako!" 
John19:27 Wandula wati kulomdisipile: Nanko unyoko! Waza umdisipile lowo emveni kweloxeshana wamtabatela ekayeni lake. 
John19:28 Emveni kwoku, esazi u‐Yesu ukuba zonke izinto zise zigqityiwe, ukuze sifezwe isiba̔lo, wati: Ndiyanxanwa." 
John19:29 Kekaloku bekumi kona isitya sizele yiyasine: baza bazalisa ikepekepe ngeyasine, balifaka kwihisope, balisondeza emlonyeni wake." 
John19:30 Wandula u‐Yesu akuba eyamkele iyasine leyo, wati: Kugqityiwe! waza watoba intloko, wanikela umpefumlo." 
John19:31 Andula ati ama‐Juda, ngenxa yokuba ibiyimini yokulungiselela, ukuze imizimba ingahlali ekuruseni ngesabata, (ngokuba ubungumhla omkulu owesabata leyo,) amtandaza u‐Pilati ukuba mayapulwe imilenze yabo, baze basuswe." 
John19:32 Eza ngoko amasodati, ayapula imilenze yowokuqala, neyomnye obekuruseshwe naye." 
John19:33 Kodwa efikile ku‐Yesu, akubona ukuba usel’ efile yena, awayapula imilenze yake;" 
John19:34 koko elinye lamasodati lahlaba icala lake ngomkonto, kwaza kwasekupuma igazi namanzi." 
John19:35 Nalowo obonileyo unqi̔nile, nobunqi̔na bake buyinyaniso: kanjalo uyazi yena ukuba uyateta okuyinene, ukuze nikolwe." 
John19:36 Ngokuba zenzekile ezizinto, ukuze isiba̔lo sizaliseke, sokuti: Aliyi kwapulwa nalinye itambo lake." 
John19:37 Nakanjako esinye isiba̔lo sitsho ukuti: Baya kukangela lowo bamhlabayo. 
John19:38 Kekaloku emveni kwezizinto, u‐Josefe wase‐Arimateya, engumdisipile ka‐Yesu, enjalo kodwa ngasese ngenxa yokwoyika ama‐Juda, wamtandaza u‐Pilati ukuba makasuse umzimba ka‐Yesu: waza u‐Pilati wamvumela. Weza ngoko, wawususa umzimba ka‐Yesu." 
John19:39 Weza kanjalo no‐Nikodemo, lowo wezayo ku‐Yesu ngobusuku ekuqaleni, ezisa impitikezo yemore nekala, zinga iponti zilikulu linye." 
John19:40 Bandula bawutabata umzimba ka‐Yesu, bawubopa ngeqiya zokubopa ndawonye nezimnandi ezo, njengokuba ama‐Juda enesiko lokuncw̔aba." 
John19:41 Kekaloku kulondawo apo ebekuruseshelwe kona bekuko umyezo, nakulomyezo incw̔aba elitsha, ekungazanga kubekwe mntu kulo." 
John19:42 Kwa lapo ngoko, ngenxa yemini yokulungiselela yama‐Juda, kuba libe likufupi incw̔aba elo, bambeka u‐Yesu." 
John20:1 KEKALOKU ngolwokuqala usuku lweveki weza u‐Mariya wase‐Magadala kusasa, kwakuba kusebumnyama, encw̔abeni, wabona ukuba ilitye lisusiwe encw̔abeni." 
John20:2 Wandula wagidima, waya weza ku‐Simone Petrosi, nakulomdisipile omnye obetandwa ngu‐Yesu, wati kubo: Bayisusile inkosi encw̔abeni, asazi ke bayibekile pina." 
John20:3 Wapuma ngoko u‐Petrosi, nalomdisipile omnye, baya ukuya encw̔abeni." 
John20:4 Babegidima ke bobabini kunye: waza lomdisipile omnye wampangela u‐Petrosi, ebaleka ngamendu amakulu kwawake, wafika tanci encw̔abeni:" 
John20:5 wati etobile pantsi wabona iqiya zokubopa zilele; kodwa akangena noko. 
John20:6 Kwandula kweza u‐Simone Petrosi emlandela, wangena encw̔abeni, wabona iqiya zokubopa zilele," 
John20:7 neqiya ebisentlokweni yake, ingalali neqiya zokubopa, koko isongelwe kwenye indawo iyodwa." 
John20:8 Wandula ngoko wangena nalomdisipile omnye, lowo wafika tanci encw̔abeni, wabona naye, wakolwa." 
John20:9 Ngokuba bebengekasazi isiba̔lo, sokuba ufanele ukuvuka ekufeni." 
John20:10 Baza bemka abadisipile abo babuya bagoduka. 
John20:11 Kodwa u‐Mariya ebemi ngasencw̔abeni ngapandle elila; nxa abelila ke, watobela pantsi encw̔abeni," 
John20:12 wabona ingelosi zambini zin ezivato ezimhlope zihleli, enye ngasentloko, enye ngasezinyaweni, apo umzimba ka‐Yesu ubulele kona." 
John20:13 Zaza zati zona kuye: Mfazi! ulilela nina? Wati kuzo: Kuba beyisusile inkosi yam, ndingazi ke bayibekile pina." 
John20:14 Waza akuba etshilo wajikela mva, wambona u‐Yesu emi; kanti ebengazi ukuba nguye u‐Yesu." 
John20:15 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Mfazi! ulilela nina? ufuna banina? Yena eba ungumlimi womyezo, wati kuye: Nkosi! ukuba uyisusile apa, ndixelele apo uyibekile pina, ndaudiya kuyitabata." 
John20:16 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Mariya! Wajika yena, wati kuye: Raboni! (oko kukuti: Mfundisi!)" 
John20:17 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Ungandicu̔kumisi; ngokuba ndingekanyukelanga kubawo: kodwa yiya kubazalwana bam, uti kubo: Ndiyanyukela kuye ubawo wam noyihlo wenu, kwa utixo wam notixo wenu." 
John20:18 Weza u‐Mariya wase‐Magadala washumayela kubadisipile okokuba uyibonile inkosi, nokuba yateta ezizinto kuye." 
John20:19 Kwati kekaloku kwakuba kukuhlwa, ngolosuku ke, ngolwokuqala lweveki, ingcango zivaliwe nje apo abadisipile bebehlanganisene kona ngenxa yokwoyika ama‐Juda, weza u‐Yesu wema pakati, wati kubo: Uxolo malube kuni!" 
John20:20 Waza akuba etshilo wababonisa izandla zake necala lake. Bandula bavuya abadisipile bakuyibona inkosi. 
John20:21 Wandula u‐Yesu wati kubo kanjako: Uxolo malube kuni! njengokuba ubawo enditumile mna, kwa njalo nam ndiyatuma nina." 
John20:22 Waza akuba etshilo wapefumla pezu kwabo, wati kubo: Yamkelani umoya oyingcwele:" 
John20:23 abo nisukuba nizikulula izono zabo, ziyabakululelwa: abo nisukuba nizibamba ezabo, zibambekile." 
John20:24 Kodwa u‐Tomasi, omnye wakubo abalishumi linababini, o‐kutiwa ngu‐Didimusi, ebengeko nabo oko wezayo u‐Yesu." 
John20:25 Baye besiti ngoko kuye abanye abadisipile: Siyibonile inkosi. Kodwa yena wati kubo: Xeshekweni ndingati upa̔u lwezikonkwane ndilubone ezandleni zayo, nomnwe wam ndiwufake elupa̔wini lwezikonkwane, nesandla sam ndisifake ecaleni layo, andisayi kukolwa." 
John20:26 Kekaloku emveni kwentsuku zisibozo abadisipile bake bebepakati kanjako, no‐Tomasi ebenabo. Weza u‐Yesu, ingcango zivaliwe nje, wema pakati, wati: Uxolo malube kuni!" 
John20:27 Wandula wati ku‐Tomasi: Sondeza umnwe wako apa, ukangele izandla zam; sisondeze nesandla sako, usifake ecaleni lam; uz’ ungabi ungakolwa, ube ukolwa." 
John20:28 Waza wapendula u‐Tomasi wati kuye: Nkosi yam notixo wam! 
John20:29 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Ngokokuba undibonile, Tomasi! ukoliwe: banetamsanqa abo abangabonanga, kanti bakoliwe noko." 
John20:30 Neminye imimangaliso ke okunene emininzi wayenza u‐Yesu ebusweni babadisipile bake, engaba̔liweyo kulencwadi:" 
John20:31 kodwa iba̔liwe le, ukuze nikolwe ukuba u‐Yesu unguye u‐Kristu, unyana katixo; nokuze niti nikolwa nibe nobomi egameni lake." 
John21:1 EMVENI kwezizinto wabuya wazibonakalisa u‐Yesu kubadisipile, ngaselwandle lwase‐Tiberiyasi: kwaye kunje ke ukuzibonakalisa kwake:" 
John21:2 Bebeko ndawonye u‐Simone Petrosi, no‐Tomasi okutiwa ngu‐Didimusi, no‐Natanayeli wase‐Kana ese‐Galili, nabo onyana baka‐Zebedi, nabanye kubo abadisipile bake bebabini." 
John21:3 Wati kubo u‐Simone Petrosi: Ndiyahamba ukuya kuloba intlanzi. Bati kuye: Siyeza nati kunye nawe. Bapuma ke, baya bangena enqanaweni kwa oko; kanti ngobobusuku ababamba nto." 
John21:4 Kekaloku kwakuba kuse kusile, wema u‐Yesu elunxwemeni: kodwa bebengazi abadisipile noko ukuba ngu‐Yesu." 
John21:5 Wandula wati kubo u‐Yesu: Bantwana! kuko intlanzi eninayo na? Bati ukumpendula: Hai. 
John21:6 Waza wati kubo: Posani utambo ngelokunene icala lenqanawa, naniya kufumana. Baluposa ke, baza basebekohlwa ukulutsala ngenxa yobaninzi bentlanzi." 
John21:7 Wati ngoko umdisipile lowo obetandwa ngu‐Yesu ku‐Petrosi: Yiyo inkosi. Wandula u‐Simone Petrosi, akuva ukuba yiyo inkosi, wazibinqa ngengubo yake yapezulu, (ngokuba ebeze,) waziwisa elwandle." 
John21:8 Kodwa abanye abadisipile beza ngomkombe, (ngokuba bebengekude nomhlaba, bebengati bazikubite ezimakulu mabini ukuba kude kwabo,) ber̔ola utambo lunentlanzi." 
John21:9 Bandula bati bakupumela emhlabeni, babona umlilo wamalahle umi kona, nentlanzi ilele pezu kwawo, nesonka." 
John21:10 Wati kubo u‐Yesu: Zisani kwezontlanzi nizibambileyo ngoku. 
John21:11 Wenyukela emkonjeni u‐Simone Petrosi, walutsala utambo pezu kwomhlaba, luzelezintlanzi ezinkulu, zilikulu elinamashumi mahlanu anantatu: kanti nangona zibe zininzi kangaka, alwaṙazuka utambo." 
John21:12 Wati kubo u‐Yesu: Yizani nidle. Kekaloku bekungeko namnye wabadisipile obenokukalipa kwokumbuza ukuti: Ungubanina? besazi ukuba yiyo inkosi. 
John21:13 Wandula weza u‐Yesu, watabata isonka eso, wabanika; wenje njalo nangentlanzi." 
John21:14 Eli selilixesha lesitatu wazibonakalisayo u‐Yesu kubadisipile bake, akuba ebevukile ekufeni." 
John21:15 Kekaloku xeshekweni bebedlile, wati u‐Yesu ku‐Simone Petrosi: Simone, nyana ka‐Jona! uyanditanda na ngokukulu kubo aba? Wati kuye: Ewe, Nkosi! uyazi ukuba ndiyakutanda. Wati kuye: Dlisa imvana zam ukutya." 
John21:16 Wati kuye kanjako ngokwesibini: Simone, nyana ka‐Jona! uyanditanda na? Wati kuye: Ewe, Nkosi! uyazi ukuba ndiyakutanda. Wati kuye: Yalusa izimvu zam." 
John21:17 Wati kuye ngokwesitatu: Simone, nyana ka‐Jona! uyanditanda na? Waba lusizi u‐Petrosi ukuba wati kuye ngokwesitatu: Uyanditanda na? Waza wati kuye: Nkosi! uyazazi zonke izinto; uyazi ukuba ndiyakutanda. Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Dlisa izimvu zam ukutya." 
John21:18 Ngokwenene, ngokwenene, nditi kuwe: Okuya ubusemtsha, ubuzibinqa ngokwako, wahamba apo ubutanda ukuhamba kona; kodwa xeshekweni uba mdala, uya kuzolula izandla zako, waeya kuti omnye akubinqe, akuse apo ungatandi ukuya kona." 
John21:19 Oku ke wakutsho, eqondisa ukuba kukufa okunina uya kumenzela utixo ubungewalisa ngako. Waza akuba ebetshilo oku, wati kuye: Ndilandele." 
John21:20 Waza u‐Petrosi, ejikile nje, wabona lomdisipile obetandwa ngu‐Yesu elandela; obete kanjalo wahlala pantsi esidlweni sokuhlwa ngasesifubeni sake, wati: Nkosi! ungubanina okungcatshayo?" 
John21:21 Wati u‐Petrosi ku‐Yesu, akumbona lo: Nkosi! naló wotiwa nina?" 
John21:22 Wati u‐Yesu kuye: Ukuba ndiyatanda okokuba ahlale yena ndide ndize, kuyinto nina kuwe oko? ndilandele wena." 
John21:23 Kwandula kwapuma isiteto esi pakati kwabazalwana, sokuba umdisipile lowo akayi kufa: kanti u‐Yesu akatsho kuye ukuti, akayi kufa; wati: Ukuba ndiyatanda okokuba ahlale yena ndide ndize, kuyinto nina kuwe oko?" 
John21:24 Lo unguye umdisipile onqi̔nayo ngazo ezizinto, owaziba̔layo kanjalo; siyazi ke ukuba ubunqi̔na bake buyinene." 
John21:25 Kuko kwa nezinye izinto ezininzi owazenzayo u‐Yesu, eziti, ukuba beziya kuba̔lwa ezinye ngezinye, ndiba kwa lona ilizwe ngelingazifumaneli indawo incwadi ezibe ziba̔lwa. Amene." 
Acts1:1 INCWADI yapambili ke, Teyofilusi! ndayenza ngako konke waqalayo u‐Yesu kwa nokukwenza nokukufundisa," 
Acts1:2 kwada kwayimini wabenyuswa ngayo, akuba ebebayalele ngomoya oyingcwele abapostile abebanyulile:" 
Acts1:3 abete kanjako wazityila kubo ukuba uhleli, emveni kwokuva kwake intlungu, ngezizatu eziqinileyo ezininzi, ebonakala kubo imihla yamashumi mane, eteta izinto ezingabo ubukumkani bukatixo." 
Acts1:4 Waza ehlanganisene na bo wabayala ukuba mabangemki e‐Yerusaleme, mabalinde isibambiso soyise, — eso, watsho yena, enisivileyo kum:" 
Acts1:5 ngokuba u‐Johane okunene wabapitizesha ngamanzi; kodwa nina nobapitizeshwa ngomoya oyingcwele, intsuku ezingeninzi emveni kwezi." 
Acts1:6 Kwa njalo ke bakuba bebebutene, babuza kuye, besiti: Nkosi! ubuya ubumisele o‐Sirayeli ubukumkani ngelixesha kusinina?" 
Acts1:7 Waza wati kubo: Asi kokwenu ukwazi amaxesha namatuba ubawo awabekileyo ngelake igunya; 
Acts1:8 koko niya kwamkela amandla, akuba umoya oyingcwele ehlile pezu kwenu; naniya kuba ngamanqi̔na am kwa nakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, nakuyo yonke i‐Judeya ne‐Samariya, nakude kube sekupeleni kwomhlaba." 
Acts1:8 koko niya kwamkela amandla, akuba umoya oyingcwele ehlile pezu kwenu; naniya kuba ngamanqi̔na am kwa nakuyo i‐Yerusaleme, nakuyo yonke i‐Judeya ne‐Samariya, nakude kube sekupeleni kwomhlaba." 
Acts1:9 Kekaloku akuba ebetshilo oku, nxa bebekangela bona, wafunqulwa, lati ilifu lamsusa emehlweni abo." 
Acts1:10 Naxeshekweni bebejongela ngasezulwini ekumkeni kwake, bona ke, amadoda amabini ebemi kufupi nabo enezivato ezimhlope;" 
Acts1:11 abesitsho kanjalo ukuti: Madoda ase‐Galili! yinina ukuba nimi nikangela ezulwini? lo u‐Yesu obenyuswa kuni wasiwa ezulwini, uya kuza njalo njengokuba nimbonile esiya ezulwini." 
Acts1:12 Bandula babuyela e‐Yerusaleme bebuya entabeni e‐kutiwa yeyeminquma, emgama wehambo yesabata ukuba kufupi kwayo ne‐Yerusaleme." 
Acts1:13 Bati bakuba bengenile, benyukela enkambilini yapezulu apo bebehlala kona; kwa u‐Petrosi, no‐Yakobi, no‐Johane, no‐Andreya; u‐Filipi, no‐Tomasi; u‐Batolomeyu, no‐Mateyu; u‐Yakobi unyana ka‐Alefeyu, no‐Simone umzeloti, no‐Jude umninawe ka‐Yakobi." 
Acts1:13 Bati bakuba bengenile, benyukela enkambilini yapezulu apo bebehlala kona; kwa u‐Petrosi, no‐Yakobi, no‐Johane, no‐Andreya; u‐Filipi, no‐Tomasi; u‐Batolomeyu, no‐Mateyu; u‐Yakobi unyana ka‐Alefeyu, no‐Simone umzeloti, no‐Jude umninawe ka‐Yakobi." 
Acts1:14 Aba bonke bebezingisa ngentliziyo nye ekutandazeni nasekukungeni, kunye nabafazi no‐Mariya unina ka‐Yesu, nakunye nabazalwana bake." 
Acts1:15 Kekaloku kwezintsuku wesuka wema u‐Petrosi pakati kwabadisipile, (ngati inani lamagama abebendawonye lalilikulu linamashumi mabini,) wati:" 
Acts1:16 Madoda, bazalwana! bekufanele ukuba esisiba̔lo sizaliseke, eso umoya oyingcwele wasitetayo ngapambili ngomlomo ka‐Davide, ngaye u‐Jude obengumkokeli kubo abambambayo u‐Yesu:" 
Acts1:16 Madoda, bazalwana! bekufanele ukuba esisiba̔lo sizaliseke, eso umoya oyingcwele wasitetayo ngapambili ngomlomo ka‐Davide, ngaye u‐Jude obengumkokeli kubo abambambayo u‐Yesu:" 
Acts1:17 ekubeni ebebalwe pakati kwetu, wazuza isabiwo sobukonzi obu." 
Acts1:18 (Lo ke kekaloku watenga intsimi ngomvuzo wenkohlakalo yake; waza ewile ngentloko wacandeka pakati, ati onke amatumbu ake apalaka:" 
Acts1:19 kwasuka kwazeka oku kubo bonke abebemi e‐Yerusaleme, lada labizwa igama lentsimi leyo ngokwakowabo ukuteta ngokuti yi‐Akelidama, oko kukuti yintsimi yegazi.)" 
Acts1:20 Ngokuba kuba̔liwe encwadini yamaculo ukuti: Maibe indlu yake ici̔takele; makungabiko namnye ohlala kuyo: n okuti: Mabutatyatwe ngomnye ubongama bake. 
Acts1:21 Kufanelekile ngoko, ukuba iti enye yalamadoda apelekene nati lonke ixesha inkosi u‐Yesu yangena yapuma ngalo pakati kwetu," 
Acts1:22 ekuqaleni kwayo kulo ubapitizesho luka‐Johane, kwada kwayimini yabinyuswa ngayo kuti, ibe linqi̔na lokuvuka kwayo kunye nati." 
Acts1:23 Baza bamisa ababini, u‐Josefe obizwa ngo‐Barasaba, owatiywa elinye igama elingu‐Yusitusi, no‐Matiya." 
Acts1:24 Batandaza bati: Wena, Nkosi, ozaziyo intliziyo zabo bonke! bonakalisa abe mnye waba babini, lowo umnyulileyo," 
Acts1:25 ukuba atabate isabiwo sobubukonzi nobupostile, ate u‐Jude wapambuka kubo, ukuba aye endaweni yake." 
Acts1:25 ukuba atabate isabiwo sobubukonzi nobupostile, ate u‐Jude wapambuka kubo, ukuba aye endaweni yake." 
Acts1:26 Baza banika amaqashiso abo, lati iqashiso lawa pezu kwake u‐Matiya; waza wabalelelwa nabapostile abalishumi linamnye." 
Acts2:1 KEKALOKU nxa ubusel’ ufika umhla wepentekoste, bebeko kwa bonke ngentliziyo nye endaweni nye." 
Acts2:2 Kwaza kwavela ngokwalama ezulwini isandi njengesomoya uqutela ngamandla, sazalisa yonke indlu apo babehleli kona." 
Acts2:3 Kwaza kwabonakala kubo ilwimi zanga zezomlilo zizahlulahlula, zahlala ngezinye pezu kwabo bonke ngabanye." 
Acts2:4 Baza bazaliswa kwa bonke ngumoya oyingcwele, baqala ukuteta ngezinye inteto, njengokuba umoya wabebanika ukupimisela." 
Acts2:5 Kekaloku kube kuhlala e‐Yerusaleme ama‐Juda, amadoda abubedesho, evela kuzo zonke intlanga ezipantsi kwezulu." 
Acts2:6 Kwati kwakwenziwa lentlokoma, wabutana umhlambi, watiwa piti, kuba bonke ngabanye bebebeva beteta ngokwakowabo ukuteta." 
Acts2:7 Babemangaliswa ke bonke, bati nqa, besiti omnye kwomnye: Bona ke, bonke aba abatetayo asi ngawo ama‐Galili na?" 
Acts2:8 kunganina pofu ukuba sive tina ngabanye ngokwakowetu ukuteta esasizelwe kuko?— 
Acts2:9 ama‐Paratiya, nama‐Medi, nama‐Helami, nabemiyo e‐Mesopotami, nase‐Judeya, nase‐Kapadosiya, e‐Pontusi, nase‐Asiya," 
Acts2:9 ama‐Paratiya, nama‐Medi, nama‐Helami, nabemiyo e‐Mesopotami, nase‐Judeya, nase‐Kapadosiya, e‐Pontusi, nase‐Asiya," 
Acts2:10 nase‐Firijiya, nase‐Pamfiliya, e‐Jipete, nasezahlulweni zase‐Libiya kufupi ne‐Kirene, nabaṙanukeli base‐Roma, kwa ama‐Juda nabangeneyo ebujudeni," 
Acts2:11 ama‐Kirete, nama‐Arabi, — siyabeva beteta ngezetu inteto izinto ezinkulu zikatixo." 
Acts2:12 Babemangaliswa ke bonke, baxakeka, besiti omnye kwomnye: Kungafun’ ukuba yinto nina oku?" 
Acts2:13 Kodwa abanye behleka babesiti: Bazele yiveyine emnandi. 
Acts2:14 Kodwa u‐Petrosi, emi kunye nabalishumi linamnye, wapakamisa ilizwi lake, wapimisela ukuti kubo: Madoda ase‐Judeya, nani nihlalayo e‐Yerusaleme nonke! makwazeke oku kuni, ninikele amazwi am indlebe:" 
Acts2:14 Kodwa u‐Petrosi, emi kunye nabalishumi linamnye, wapakamisa ilizwi lake, wapimisela ukuti kubo: Madoda ase‐Judeya, nani nihlalayo e‐Yerusaleme nonke! makwazeke oku kuni, ninikele amazwi am indlebe:" 
Acts2:15 ngokuba aba benganxili, njengokuba nizindla nina; ngokuba kuyiyure yesitatu yemini." 
Acts2:16 Koko oku kukoko kutetiweyo ngumprofite u‐Joweli, ukutiwa:" 
Acts2:17 Kwakuya kuti emihleni yokupela, utsho utixo, ndogalela kumoya wam pezu kwoluntu lwonke; babeya kuprofitesha onyana benu nentombi zenu; amadodana enu aya kubona imiboniso, namaxego enu aya kupupa amapupa:" 
Acts2:18 ewe, napezu kwezicaka zam, napezu kwezicakakazi zam, ndiya kugalela kumoya wam ngaleyomihla, zaziya kuprofitesha ke." 
Acts2:19 Ndandiya kunika imimangaliso ezulwini pezulu, nemiqondiso pezu kwomhlaba ezantsi, igazi, nomlilo, nenkungu yomsi." 
Acts2:20 Ilanga liya kuguqulwa libe bumnyama, nenyanga ibe ligazi, ungekafiki umhla omkulu okazimlayo kayehova." 
Acts2:21 Kwakuya kuti, bonke abaya kubiza egameni likayehova bosindiswa." 
Acts2:22 Madoda, bo‐Sirayeli! yivani amazwi la: U‐Yesu um‐Nazarete, umntu obonakalisiweyo kuni ukuba uvela kutixo ngezenzo zamandla, nangemimangaliso, nangemiqondiso, owazenzayo utixo ngaye pakati kwenu, njengokuba nisazi nani ngokwenu;" 
Acts2:23 lo, enikelwe ngecebo elimisiweyo nangokwazi okupambili kukatixo, nimtabatile, nambetela ekuruseni ngezandla zabaginwa, nambulala:" 
Acts2:24 ate utixo wamvusa, ekulule intlungu zokufa; ngokokuba bekungenzeki ukuba abanjwe kuko." 
Acts2:25 Ngokuba u‐Davide esiti ngaye: Ndambona uyehova pambili pambi kwam futi, kuba engasekunene kum, ukuze ndingashukunyiswa." 
Acts2:26 Ngenxa yoku intliziyo yam yavuya, nolwimi lwam lwagcoba; nakanjako nenyama yam iya kupumla ngetemba:" 
Acts2:27 kuba ungayi kushiya umpefumlo wam ehadesi, nokuba ungayi kuyekelela oyingcwele yako abone ukubola." 
Acts2:28 Wandazisa indlela zobomi; uya kundizalisa ngovuyo ebusweni bako. 
Acts2:29 Madoda, bazalwana! Ndingateta ndinokukalipa kuni ngaye uyise omkulu u‐Davide, okokuba wabuba yena wancw̔atywa kananjalo, nokuba incw̔aba lake liko pakati kwetu kude kwanamhla nje." 
Acts2:30 Kekaloku engumprofite nje, esazi kanjako ukuba utixo ebefungile kuye ngesifungo sokuti uya kumvusa u‐Kristu, ngokwenyama, kwisiqa̔mo sesinqe sake, ukuza kuhlala pezu kweterone yake;" 
Acts2:31 ekubona oku ngapambili nje, wateta ngako ukuvuka kuka‐Kristu, ukuba umpefumlo wake wabungashiywa ehadesi, nokuba inyama yake yabingaboni ukubola." 
Acts2:32 Yena lo u‐Yesu utixo wamvusa, esingamanqi̔na ako tina sonke." 
Acts2:33 Ngako epakanyiselwe kwesokunene sikatixo, nesibambiso somoya oyingcwele esamkele nje kuyise, ugalele oku enikubonayo nenikuvayo ngoku." 
Acts2:34 Ngokuba u‐Davide engenyukelanga ezulwini; koko esiti yena: Wati uyehova kwinkosi yam: Hlala ngasekunene kum," 
Acts2:35 ndide ndenze intshaba zako zibe sisitulo senyawo zako. 
Acts2:36 Maiti ngoko yonke indlu ka‐Sirayeli iqinise ukwazi, ukuba yena utixo umenzile inkosi no‐Kristu, yena lo u‐Yesu onimkuruseshileyo." 
Acts2:37 Kekaloku bakuva oku, bahlatywa entliziyweni, bati ku‐Petrosi nakwabanye abapostile: Siya kwenza nto nina, madoda, bazalwana?" 
Acts2:38 Waza u‐Petrosi wati kubo: Guqukani, nibapitizeshwe nonke ngabanye egameni lika‐Yesu Kristu, kube kukuxolelwa kwezono, naniya kwamkela isipiwo somoya oyingcwele." 
Acts2:39 Ngokuba isibambiso senzelwe nina, nabantwana benu, nabo bonke abakude, abo abasukuba bebizwa yinkosi utixo wetu." 
Acts2:40 Wabenqi̔nisa nangamanye amazwi amaninzi, wa ba yala, esiti: Zisindiseni kwesisizukulwana esigwenxa." 
Acts2:41 Bandula abo ke abalamkelayo ilizwi lake ngovuyo, babapitizeshwa: kwaza kwongezelelwa kubo ngaleyomini imipefumlo yanga yamawaka matatu." 
Acts2:42 Baye bemana ukuhlala elufundisweni lwabapostile, nasebudlelaneni, nasekuqezulweni kwesonka, nasemitandazweni." 
Acts2:43 Kwasuka kwabako ukwoyika pezu kwayo yonke imipefumlo; kanjalo imimangaliso nemiqondiso emininzi ibisenziwa ngabapostile. 
Acts2:44 Babe ke bonke abakolwayo bendawonye, babala zonke izinto ukuba zizezabo bonke," 
Acts2:45 batengisa ngemfuyo zabo nangempahla zabo, bazahlulahlula kubo bonke, njengoko kusukuba umntu enokuswela ngako." 
Acts2:46 Kanjako, bemana ukuhlala imihla ngemihla ngentliziyo nye etempileni, beqezula isonka ngezindlu ngezindlu kanjalo, babesamkela ukutya kwabo ngomgcobo nangolungelelwano lwentliziyo," 
Acts2:47 bedumisa utixo, benokubukwa nangabo bonke abantu. Yaibe inkosi isongezelela abebesindiswa imihla ngemihla eṙementeni." 
Acts3:1 KEKALOKU u‐Petrosi no‐Johane bebenyukela etempileni kunye ngeyure yokutandaza, ngeyesitoba." 
Acts3:2 Kwaye kutwalwa indoda etile ebisisiqwala kwa sesizalweni sonina, eyabibekwa imihla ngemihla ngasesangweni letempile elikutiwa Lelihle, ukuze icele amalizo kwabo babengena etempileni;" 
Acts3:3 eyati yakubona u‐Petrosi no‐Johane beza kungena etempileni, yatandaza ukuba iwamkele umlizo." 
Acts3:4 Waza u‐Petrosi, ebeke amehlo pezu kwayo kunye no‐Johane, wati: Kangela ngakuti." 
Acts3:5 Yabagqala ke, ilinda ukwamkela into kubo." 
Acts3:6 Wayesiti u‐Petrosi: Isilivere negolide aziko kum; kodwa oko endinako ndiyakupa kona: Egameni lika‐Yesu Kristu um‐Nazarete, suka uhambe." 
Acts3:7 Waza wayibamba ngesokunene isandla, wayisukisa: zasezisomelela inyawo zayo namaqata ayo kwa oko." 
Acts3:8 Yaza isuka ngokutsiba yema yahamba, yangena kunye nabo etempileni, ihamba, itsiba, idumisa utixo." 
Acts3:9 Bati bonke abantu bayibona ihamba, idumisa utixo:" 
Acts3:10 baye beyazi ukuba ingulowo obehlalela amalizo ngasesangweni letempile eli‐Lelihle: baza bazaliswa kukuti nqa nakukumangaliswa pezu kwokuyihleleyo. 
Acts3:11 Kekaloku nxa isiqwala esasipilisiwe sibe sibambelela ku‐Petrosi no‐Johane, bonke abantu babalekela kubo kunye entendelezweni ebizwayo ngokutiwa yeka‐Solomone, besiti nqa kakulu." 
Acts3:12 Waza u‐Petrosi, akubona oko, wapendula ebantwini, wati: Madoda, bo‐Sirayeli! yinina ukuba nikutele nqa oku? kanjalo yinina ukuba nisijonge tina, njengokungati simenzile lo mntu ahambe ngawetu amandla nobubedesho?" 
Acts3:13 Utixo ka‐Abrahame, noka‐Yisake, noka‐Yakobi, utixo wobawo betu, wenzele isicaka sake u‐Yesu ubungcwalisa; enite nina namnikela, namkanyela ngasebusweni buka‐Pilati, akuba ebegwebile yena ukuba akululwe." 
Acts3:14 Kodwa namkanyela oyingcwele nolungileyo, nacela ukuba nipiwe umbulali;"
