Acts3:15 noyimbangi yobomi namfisa, ate utixo wamvusa ekufeni, esingamanqi̔na ako tina." 
Acts3:16 Nangalo ukolo egameni lake, lomntu enimbonayo nenimaziyo igama lake limomelezile: ewe ukolo olungaye lamnika okukupila okufezekileyo pambi kwenu nonke." 
Acts3:17 Nakaloku, bazalwana! ndiyazi ukuba nanikwenza oku ngako ukungazi, njengokuba benje njalo nabapati benu." 
Acts3:18 Kodwa ezonto utixo wazishumayelayo pambili ngomlomo wabo bonke abaprofite bake, zokuba u‐Kristu eve intlungu, uzizalisekisile ngokunjalo." 
Acts3:19 Gqobokani ngoko, niguquke, ukuba zicinywe izono zenu; ukuze kube kufika amaxesha onwabiso evela ebusweni benkosi;" 
Acts3:20 ize itume u‐Yesu Kristu obeshunyayelwe pambili kuni; 
Acts3:21 ekufanele ukuba izulu limamkele kude kube ngamaxesha okuhlaziywa kwezinto zonke, ate utixo wateta ngawo ngomlomo wabo bonke abaprofite bake abangcwele bakudala." 
Acts3:22 Ngokuba u‐Mosesi watsho kubo obawo ukuti: Uyehova, utixo wenu, wonivusela umprofite, kubazalwana benu, njengam: yena niya kumva ngento zonke asukuba eziteta kuni." 
Acts3:23 Kwakuya kuti, yonke imipefumlo esukuba ingamva umprofite lowo, iya kutshatyalaliswa ebantwini." 
Acts3:24 Ewe nabaprofite bonke, kutabata ku‐Samyali nabalandelana kamva, kwa bonke abatetileyo, bashumayela pambili nabo ngalemihla." 
Acts3:25 Nina nilusapo lwabaprofite, nolwocebano owalwenzayo utixo nobawo betu, esiti ku‐Abrahame: Kanjalo ngenzalo yako ziya kutanyusanqelwa zonke izizalwane zomhlaba." 
Acts3:26 Kuni kuqala, utixo, esivusile isicaka sake u‐Yesu, wasituma sibe sinitamsanqela, ekunisongeni nonke ngabanye kwizikohlakalo zenu." 
Acts4:1 Kekaloku nxa bebeteta ebantwini, kwababaqa abaperisite, nenkosi yetempile, nabasadusi," 
Acts4:2 bebindekile ngenxa yokuba bebefundisa abantu, nokuba bebeshumayela ngaye u‐Yesu ukuvuka kwabafileyo." 
Acts4:3 Baza babeka izandla pezu kwabo, babafaka entolongweni kude kube ngomso; ngokuba kube kuse kuhlwile." 
Acts4:4 Kodwa abaninzi bababelivile ilizwi bakolwa; laye lite inani lamadoda langa laba ngamawaka mahlanu. 
Acts4:5 Kwaza kwati ngomso, kwahlanganisana abapati babo, nabadala, nababa̔li, e‐Yerusaleme," 
Acts4:6 no‐Anasi umperisite omkulu, no‐Kayafasi, no‐Johane, no‐Aletsandere, nabo bonke ababesalamana nomperisite omkulu." 
Acts4:7 Baza bakuba bebebamisile pakati, babuza, besiti: Kungawanina amandla, umhlaumbi ngelanina igama, enikwenzile oku nina?" 
Acts4:8 Wandula u‐Petrosi, ezalisiwe ngumoya oyingcwele, wati kubo: Bapati babantu nabadala bo‐Sirayeli!" 
Acts4:9 ukuba tina namhla nje siyabuzwa pezu kwesenzelelo wasenzelwa umlwelwe, ukuba kunganto nina lo upilisiwe;" 
Acts4:10 makwazeke kuni nonke, nakubo bonke abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli, okokuba kungegama lika‐Yesu Kristu um‐Nazarete, lowo nina namkuruseshayo, ate utixo wamvusa ekufeni, kungaye lo ukuba lo mntu umi apa ebusweni benu epilile." 
Acts4:11 Nguye lo ilitye elalideliwe nini baki, elaba yintloko yegumbi." 
Acts4:12 Kanjako akuko lusindiso kuwumbi namnye: ngokuba kungeko nagama limbi ngapantsi kwezulu elinikiweyo pakati kwabantu, esifanele ukusindiswa ngalo." 
Acts4:13 Kekaloku bebona ukukalipa kuka‐Petrosi no‐Johane, beqiqile nokuba bangabantu abangabangenalufundo nabamnyama, bati nqa, babanakana ukuba bebenaye u‐Yesu." 
Acts4:14 Kanjalo bebona umntu obepiliswe emi nabo, bebengenanto yokupika." 
Acts4:15 Kodwa bebayalele ukuba bapume entlanganisweni, bacebisana omnye nomnye," 
Acts4:16 besiti: Siya kwenza nto nina kwababantu? ngokuba okunene kubonakala kubo bonke abemiyo e‐Yerusaleme, ukuba ummangaliso owazekileyo wenzekile ngabo; asingekukanyele ke." 
Acts4:17 Noko, ukuze kungavakaliseki kakulu ngakumbi ebantwini, masibasongele kunene, ize bangabi sateta nakomnye umntu ngeligama." 
Acts4:18 Baza bakuba bebabizile, babayalela ukuba mabangake batete nokuba mabangafundisi ngegama lika‐Yesu." 
Acts4:19 Kodwa u‐Petrosi no‐Johane bapendula bati kubo: Yahlulani, ukuba kufanelekile na ebusweni bukatixo ukuva nina ngapezu kwo kuva utixo:" 
Acts4:20 ngokuba singebe nako ukuti, izinto esizibonileyo nesizivileyo, singaziteti." 
Acts4:21 Kekaloku bepindile ukubasongela babakulula, bengafumani ndawo yokuba bangabohlwaya ngayo, ngenxa yabantu; kuba bonke bebedumisa utixo pezu kwoko kwenzekileyo." 
Acts4:22 Ngokuba ebegqitisile iminyaka emashumi mane ngobudala, lowamntu okube kwenzekile kuye lommangaliso wokupilisa." 
Acts4:23 Baza bekululwe nje baya kowabo, bashumayela konke abaperisite abakulu nabadala babe bekutshilo kubo." 
Acts4:24 Bati ke bakuva, balipakamisela kutixo ilizwi labo ngentliziyo nye, batsho ukuti: Nkosi! nguwe utixo owenzayo izulu, nomhlaba, nolwandle, nento zonke ezikuzo:" 
Acts4:25 owatshoyo ngomlomo ka‐Davide isicaka sako ukuti: Yinina ukuba abaheyideni benza imbutumbutu, nokuba izizwe zacinga izinto ezingendawo?" 
Acts4:26 Okumkani bomhlaba bema, nenkosi zabutana ndawonye, ngakuye uyehova, nangakuye u‐Kristu wake." 
Acts4:27 Ngokuba ngenyaniso kwabutana ngakuso isicaka sako esingcwele u‐Yesu, omtambisileyo, kwa no‐Herodi no‐Pontiyusi Pilati, kunye nabaheyideni nezizwe zo‐Sirayeli," 
Acts4:28 ukwenza konke isandla sako necebo lako lamisela ngapambili ukuba kwenziwe. 
Acts4:29 Nokwakaloku nje, Nkosi! kangela izisongelo zabo, unike ezicakeni zako ukuba zitete ilizwi lako zinokukalipa konke," 
Acts4:30 ngokwolulwa kwesandla sako ukupilisa, nokwenziwa kwemiqondiso nemimangaliso ngalo igama lesicaka sako esingcwele u‐Yesu." 
Acts4:31 Yaza indawo ababe behlanganisene kuyo, bakuba betandazile, yashukunyiswa, bati kwa bonke bazaliswa ngumoya oyingcwele, bateta ilizwi likatixo benokukalipa." 
Acts4:32 KEKALOKU umhlambi wabakoliweyo intliziyo nompefumlo wawo ubumnye: kwaye kungeko namnye obesiti into yabenazo iyeyake, koko zonke izinto zibe zizezabo bonke." 
Acts4:33 Bati abapostile basinika ngamandla amakulu isinqi̔no sabo ngako ukuvuka kwenkosi u‐Yesu; lwaye ufefe olukulu luba pezu kwabo bonke. 
Acts4:34 Ngokuba ke bekungeko mntu obesekusweleni pakati kwabo; ngokuba bonke abebengabafuyi bemihlaba umhlaumbi bezindlu bebetenga ngazo, bawazisa amanani ezinto ezibe zitengiswa," 
Acts4:35 bawabeka ngasezinyaweni zabapostile: kwaza kwabelwa abanye ngabanye, njengoko kusukuba umntu enokuswela ngako." 
Acts4:36 Waza u‐Jose, owatiywa ngabapostile elinye igama elingu‐Banabasi, (okukuti ngokukunyushwa, Unyana wonwabiso,) um‐Levi, owase‐Kiperusi ngokuzalwa," 
Acts4:37 enomhlaba, watenga ngawo, wazisa imali, wayibeka ngasezinyaweni zabapostile." 
Acts5:1 Kodwa indoda etile egama lalingu‐Hananiya, kunye no‐Safira umfazi wayo, yatenga ngemfuyo," 
Acts5:2 yazahlulela kwinani, umfazi wayo esazela oko naye, yasizisa isahlulo esitile, yabeka eso ngasezinyaweni zabapostile." 
Acts5:3 Waza wati u‐Petrosi: Hananiya! yinina ukuba u‐Satane uzalisile intliziyo yako, ukuba uxokise umoya oyingcwele, nokuba uzahlulele kwinani lomhlaba lowo?" 
Acts5:4 Nxa ubusahleli, ubungasahleli ungowako na? nanxa ubutengiswe, ubungabi semandleni ako na? yinina ukuba uyicingile lento entliziyweni yako? akuxokanga ebantwini, koko uxoke kutixo." 
Acts5:5 Wati u‐Hananiya esiva amazwi la, wawa pantsi, wapuma umpefumlo: kwaza kwehla ulwoyiko olukulu pezu kwabo bonke ababesiva ezizinto." 
Acts5:6 Esuka ke amadodana ambopa, aza a m twalela pandle a m ncw̔aba." 
Acts5:7 Kwasekumzuzu wanga wangoweyure ezintatu, wandula umfazi wake, engakwazi oko bekwenzekile, wangena." 
Acts5:8 Waza wapendula u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Ndixelele ukuba umhlaba ubutengelwe okungako na? Wati ke yena: Ewe, okungako." 
Acts5:9 Waza u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Yinina ukuba nivumelene ukulinga umoya wenkosi? bona ke, inyawo zabo bayincw̔abileyo indoda yako zingasemnyango, zaziya kutwalela pandle nawe." 
Acts5:10 Waselesiwa pantsi kwa oko ngasezinyaweni zake, wapuma umpefumlo: angena ke amadodana amfumana efile, aza a m twalela pandle a m ncw̔aba ngasendodeni yake." 
Acts5:11 Kwaza kwehla ulwoyiko olukulu pezu kwayo yonke iṙemente, napezu kwabo bonke ababesiva ezizinto." 
Acts5:12 Kanjako ngezandla zabapostile kwenziwa imiqondiso nemimangaliso pakati kwabantu emininzi: baye beko ngentliziyo nye kwa bonke entendelezweni ka‐Solomone: 
Acts5:13 kodwa abanye bekungeko namnye wabo obenokukalipa kwokuzibandakanyela kubo; koko abantu bebebazukisa: 
Acts5:14 kwaye kusongezelelwa ngakumbi amakolwa kwinkosi, into eninzi neyamadoda neyamankazana:" 
Acts5:15 bada batwalelwa pandle abafayo kuzo zonke izitarate, babekwa pezu kwemandlalo nenku̔ko, ukuze kuti, kwakufika u‐Petrosi, kusibekelele inxenye yabo noko sisitunzi sake sodwa." 
Acts5:16 Kwaye kubutela e‐Yerusaleme into eninzi yabezixeko ezipahlayo, bezisa abafayo nabakatazwa ngomoya abanco̔lileyo, ababepiliswa kwa bonke." 
Acts5:17 Waza wesuka umperisite omkulu, nabo bonke ababenaye, (abebeluhlobo lwabasadusi,) bazaliswa luzondo," 
Acts5:18 babeka izandla zabo pezu kwabapostile, babafaka entolongweni yabamnyama." 
Acts5:19 Kodwa ingelosi yenkosi ngobusuku obo yavula ingcango zentolongo, yabaku̔pa, yati:" 
Acts5:20 Yiyani, nime nitete etempileni ebantwini onke amazwi obubomi." 
Acts5:21 Bati bakuva oko, bangena kusasa etempileni, bafundisa. Kekaloku efikile nje umperisite omkulu, nabo babenaye, babizela ndawonye intlanganiso yamapakati nabo bonke abadala bosapo luka‐Sirayeli, batumela entolongweni ukuba baziswe." 
Acts5:22 Kodwa amadindili akufika akabafumana entolongweni; aza abuya, ashumayela," 
Acts5:23 esiti: Intolongo okunene sayifumana ivaliwe ngokunqaba konke, nabalindi bemi ngapandle pambi kwengcango; kodwa sakuvula, asafumana mntu pakati." 
Acts5:24 Xeshekweni ke umperisite omkulu nenkosi yetempile nabaperisite abakulu baweva lamazwi, bebexakekile pezu kwawo, ukuba kungada kube yinto nina oku." 
Acts5:25 Kwaza kwafika umntu wabashumayeza, esiti: Bona ke, lomadoda enawafakayo entolongweni, asetempileni, emi efundisa abantu." 
Acts5:26 Yandula yemka inkosi yetempile kunye namadindili, yaya yawazisa, inga wazisi ngamandla, ngokuba bebesoyika abantu, ukuze bangagityiselwa ngamatye." 
Acts5:27 Bati bakuba bewazisile, bawamisa entlanganisweni yamapakati: waza umperisite omkulu wababuza," 
Acts5:28 esiti: Asaniyalela kunene na ukuba ningafundisi ngeligama? kanti bona ke, niyizalisile i‐Yerusaleme ngemfundiso yenu, nifuna ukunga ningalizisa pezu kwetu igazi lalomntu kanjako." 
Acts5:29 Kodwa u‐Petrosi n abanye abapostile bapendula bati: Kufanele ukupulapula utixo ngapezu kwabantu. 
Acts5:30 Utixo wobawo betu wamvusa u‐Yesu, enati nina nambulala nimxo̔mile emtini." 
Acts5:31 Yena lo utixo umpakamisele kwesokunene sake abe yinkosi nomsindisi, ukuba anike uguquko ko‐Sirayeli noxolelwa lwezono." 
Acts5:32 Nati singamanqi̔na ake ngezizinto; kwa nomoya oyingcwele kanjalo, ate utixo wamnika kubo abampulapulayo." 
Acts5:33 Kekaloku bakuva oku, bebecunukile kakulu, banxamela ukubabulala." 
Acts5:34 Kodwa wesuka wema umfarisi otile entlanganisweni, ogama lalingu‐Gamaliyeli, umfundisimteto obekekileyo pakati kwabo bonke abantu, waxela ukuba abapostile mabapunyiswe kube mzuzwana;" 
Acts5:35 waza wati kubo: Madoda, bo‐Sirayeli! zilumkeleni ukuba niza kwenza nto nina ngendawo yababantu." 
Acts5:36 Ngokuba pambili kuzo ezintsuku kwesuka u‐Teyuda, esiti ungumntu omkulu, ekwanamatela kuye inani lamadoda anga angamakulu mane; owayebulewe; nabo bonke ababetelela kuye, baci̔teka bati tshabalala." 
Acts5:37 Emveni kwaló kwesuka u‐Jude um‐Galili, emihleni yesiba̔lelo, waku̔kulisa abantu abaninzi emva kwake; owabuba naye; nabo bonke ababetelela kuye, baci̔twa." 
Acts5:37 Emveni kwaló kwesuka u‐Jude um‐Galili, emihleni yesiba̔lelo, waku̔kulisa abantu abaninzi emva kwake; owabuba naye; nabo bonke ababetelela kuye, baci̔twa." 
Acts5:38 Nokwakaloku nje nditi kuni: Gwegwedani kubo ababantu, nibayeke; ngokuba eliqinga umhlaumbi lomsebenzi ukuba uti ube ngowabantu, uya kutshatyalaliswa;" 
Acts5:39 kodwa ukuba ungo katixo, aningewutshabalalise, hleze nike nifunyanwe nisilwa kwa notixo." 
Acts5:40 Beyiswa nguye ke: baza bakuba bebebabizile abapostile, babatyabula, babayalela ukuba bangateti ngegama lika‐Yesu, babandulula." 
Acts5:41 Bati ke ngoko bona bemka bevuya ebusweni bentlanganiso, ngokokuba bebebalwa ngokuba befanele ukupatwa ngokuhlazekileyo ngenxa yegama lake." 
Acts5:42 Kanjalo ngemihla yonke etempileni nakwizindlu ngezindlu, babengapezi ukufundisa nokushumayela u‐Yesu ongu‐Kristu." 
Acts6:1 KWEZINTSUKU ke, bakuba bebesanda abadisipile, kwavuka ukuṙoṙa kwaba‐Girike ngakuma‐Hebere, ngokokuba abahlolokazi bakowabo bebelityalwa ekwabiweni kwemihla ngemihla." 
Acts6:2 Baza abalishumi linababini babiza umhlambi wabadisipile, bati: Akufanelekile kuti, ukuba silishiye ilizwi likatixo, sikonze ezitafileni." 
Acts6:3 Yitini ngoko, bazalwana! nifune kwa kuni amadoda abe sixe̔nxe anqi̔nelwayo kakuhle, azele ngumoya oyingcwele nabubulumko, esiya kuwamisela pezu kwalomcimbi." 
Acts6:4 Kodwa tina somana ukuhlala ekutandazeni, nasebukonzini belizwi." 
Acts6:5 Lati elozwi lakolisa wonke umhlambi: baza banyula u‐Stefane, indoda izele lukolo na ngumoya oyingcwele, no‐Filipi, no‐Pirokoro, no‐Nikanore, no‐Timone, no‐Paramena, no‐Nikolasi, ikolwa lobujuda lase‐Antiyoki;" 
Acts6:6 abati babamisa ebusweni babapostile: baza bakuba bebetandazile babeka izandla pezu kwabo. 
Acts6:7 Labe ilizwi likatixo likula; laye lisandiswa inani labadisipile e‐Yerusaleme kakulu; nesihlwele esikulu sabaperisite sibe silulamela elukolweni. 
Acts6:8 Kekaloku u‐Stefane, ezele lukolo nangamandla, ebesenza imimangaliso nemiqondiso emikulu pakati kwabantu." 
Acts6:9 Kwaza kwesuka abatile babakuyo indlu yentlanganiso e‐kutiwa yeyaba‐Kulule?-?kiswa, neyaba‐Kirene, neyaba‐Aletsandriya, nababo bavela e‐Silisiya nase‐Asiya, bepikisana no‐Stefane." 
Acts6:10 Baye bekohlwa ke ukumelana nobulumko nomoya abeteta ngawo. 
Acts6:11 Bandula bancetezisa amadoda esiti: Simvile eteta amazwi okugxeka ngaku‐Mosesi na ngaku ye utixo. 
Acts6:12 Kanjalo bavuselela abantu, nabadala, nababa̔li, bambaqa, bamqubula, bamr̔olela entlanganisweni yamapakati," 
Acts6:13 bamisa amanqi̔na abuxoki esiti: Lomntu akapezi ukuteta amazwi okugxeka ngakuyo lendawo engcwele na ngaku wo umteto; 
Acts6:14 ngokuba simvile esiti: u‐Yesu lowo, um‐Nazarete, uya kuci̔ta indawo le, aguqule amasiko esasinikelwa wona ngu‐Mosesi." 
Acts6:15 Baza bonke abebehleli entlanganisweni, bejongele kuye, babona ubuso bake njengokungati bubuso bengelosi." 
Acts7:1 Waza wati umperisite omkulu: Kanene ezizinto zinjalo kusinina? 
Acts7:2 Waza wati yena: Madoda, bazalwana nobawo! pulapulani. Utixo wobungcwalisa wabonakala kubawo wetu u‐Abrahame, nxa abese‐Mesopotami, engekahlalanga e‐Karane," 
Acts7:3 wati kuye: Puma elizweni lakowenu, nasezalamaneni zako, uze elizweni endisukuba ndikubonisa lona." 
Acts7:4 Wandula wapuma elizweni lama‐Kaledine, wahlala e‐Karane. Waza wamsusa kona, emveni kwokufa kwoyise, wamfudusela kwelilizwe enihlala kulo nina ngoku." 
Acts7:5 Akamnika lifa ke kulo, enga mnikanga nendawo yokunyatelwa kwonyawo: kanti noko wambekela ngedinga lokuba wolinika kuye libe yimfuyo, nakwinzalo yake emva kwake, nxa abengenamntwana." 
Acts7:6 Waza wateta ngokunje utixo, ukuti: Inzalo yake yopambukela ezweni labasemzini, abaya kuyikonzisa bayipate kakubi iminyaka emakulu mane." 
Acts7:7 Nesosizwe isukuba ikonza kuso, watsho utixo, ndiya kusigweba; yaiya kuti emveni kwoko ipume, ikonze mna kulendawo." 
Acts7:8 Kanjako wamnika ucebano lwolwaluko: kwa njalo ke wazala u‐Yisake, wamalusa ngomhla wesibozo; waza u‐Yisake wazala u‐Yakobi, no‐Yakobi wazala oyise abakulu boshumi linababini." 
Acts7:9 Baza oyise abakulu bezondele u‐Josefe bamtengisela e‐Jipete: kanti utixo ebenaye," 
Acts7:10 wamhlangula kuzo zonke imbandezelo zake, wamnika ufefe nobulumko ebusweni buka‐Faro ukumkani we‐Jipete, owammisa umpati pezu kwe‐Jipete, na pezu kwayo yonke indlu yake." 
Acts7:11 Kekaloku kweza indlala pezu kwalo lonke ilizwe le‐Jipete nele‐Kanane, nobunzima obukulu; baye bengafumani kutya obawo betu." 
Acts7:12 Kodwa akuva u‐Yakobi ukuba iko inqolowa e‐Jipete, watuma obawo betu okwokuqala." 
Acts7:13 Nangokwesibini u‐Josefe wazazisa kubakuluwe bake, bati abalamane baka‐Josefe bazeka ku‐Faro." 
Acts7:14 Waza watuma u‐Josefe wambiza uyise u‐Yakobi eze kuye, nazo zonke izalamane zake, ingamashumi asixe̔nxe anamihlanu imipefumlo yonke." 
Acts7:15 Waza u‐Yakobi wehlela e‐Jipete, wabuba yena, nobawo betu," 
Acts7:16 basuselwa e‐Shekeme, babekwa encw̔abeni abelitengile u‐Abrahame ngenani lemali elusatsheni luka‐Hamore uyise ka‐Shekeme." 
Acts7:17 Kodwa njengokuba libe lisondela ixesha ledinga abelifungile utixo ku‐Abrahame, kwa njalo bakula abantu, bandiswa e‐Jipete," 
Acts7:18 kude kwavuka ukumkani wumbi, obengenakumazi u‐Josefe." 
Acts7:19 Yena lo wenza ngobuqinga kwisizwe sakowetu, wabapata kakubi obawo betu, kuze kulahlwe intsana zabo, ukuba zingagcinwa zihleli." 
Acts7:20 Kwelona xesha wazalwa u‐Mosesi, waye emhle kakulu; owondliwa endlwini kayise inyanga zantatu." 
Acts7:21 Kekaloku akuba ebelahliwe yena, yamcola intombi ka‐Faro, yamondla abe ngunyana kuyo." 
Acts7:22 Waza u‐Mosesi wafundiswa kubo bonke ubulumko bama‐Jipete; wayenamandla ekuteteni nasekwenzeni kanjako. 
Acts7:23 Xeshekweni ke bekumzalisekelwa ixesha leminyaka imashumi mane, kwangena entliziyweni yake ukutyelela kubo abazalwana bake usapo luka‐Sirayeli." 
Acts7:24 Waza akubona omnye obesoniwa, wa m siza, wampindezelela obebandezelwa, wambeta um‐Jipete." 
Acts7:25 Wayesiba abazalwana bake baya kuqonda ukuba utixo wobanika usindiso ngesandla sake: kodwa bona abaqonda. 
Acts7:26 Kanjalo ngomhla olandelayo wazibonakalisa kubo besilwa, wazama ukubalamla, esiti: Madoda! ningabazalwana nina: kuyinina ukuba nonane?" 
Acts7:27 Kodwa lowo ubesona ummelwane wake wamtya̔la, esiti: Ngubanina owamisa wena inkosi nomgwebi pezu kwetu?" 
Acts7:28 ufuna ukubulala mna, njengokuba wambulalayo izolo um‐Jipete?" 
Acts7:29 Waza wesaba u‐Mosesi ngesiteto esi, waba ngowasemzini elizweni le‐Midiyane, apo wazalela kona onyana bababini." 
Acts7:30 Kwaza kwati kwakuzaliseka iminyaka imashumi mane, kwabonakala kuye entlango yasentabeni ye‐Sinai ingelosi yenkosi elangatyeni lomlilo etyolweni." 
Acts7:31 Wati u‐Mosesi akubona, wasitela nqa isibonakalo eso; naxeshekweni ebesondela ukuza kubonela, kweza ilizwi lenkosi kuye, lisiti:" 
Acts7:32 Mna ndi ngutixo woyihlo bako, utixo ka‐Abrahame, notixo ka‐Yisake, notixo ka‐Yakobi. Waza u‐Mosesi wangcangcazela, wabengenakukalipa kwokubonela." 
Acts7:33 Yaza yati inkosi kuye: Tula izihlangu zenyawo zako; ngokuba indawo umiyo kuyo ingumhlaba ongcwele. 
Acts7:34 Ndikolisile ukubona ukupatwa kakubi kwabantu bam abase‐Jipete, nokugula kwabo ndikuvile; ndihle ke ukuba ndibahlangule: yiza ke kaloku, ndokutuma e‐Jipete." 
Acts7:35 Yena lo u‐Mosesi abamkanyelayo, besiti: Ngubanina owamisa wena inkosi nomgwebi? yena lo utixo wamtuma abe yinkosi nomkululi ngesandla sengelosi eyabibonakala kuye etyolweni." 
Acts7:36 Nguye lo owabaku̔payo, eyenzile imimangaliso nemiqondiso elizweni le‐Jipete, naselwandle olubomvu, nasentlango iminyaka imashumi mane." 
Acts7:37 Nguye lo oyena Mosesi owati elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli: Uyehova, utixo wenu, wonivusela umprofite, kubazalwana benu, njengam: yena niya kumva." 
Acts7:38 Nguye lo owabeko entlanganisweni entlango kunye nengelosi ebiteta kuye entabeni ye‐Sinai, na kunye nobawo betu: owamkela amazwi abubomi ukuba awanike kuti:" 
Acts7:39 ababengavumi obawo betu ukumpulapula, koko bamtya̔layo, bati intliziyo zabo babuyela e‐Jipete," 
Acts7:40 esiti ku‐Arone: Senzele otixo, abaya kuhamba pambi kwetu; ngokuba u‐Mosesi lo, owasiku̔payo ezweni le‐Jipete, singamazi ukuba uhlelwe yinto nina." 
Acts7:41 Baza badala itole kwezontsuku, banikela idini kwisitixo eso, bagcoba kuyo imisebenzi yezandla zabo." 
Acts7:42 Wajika ke utixo, wabayekelela ukuba bawukonze umkosi wezulu; njengokuba kuba̔liwe encwadini yabaprofite, ukuti: Imibingo neminikelo niyinikele na kum, iminyaka yamashumi mane, entlango, ndlu ka‐Sirayeli?" 
Acts7:43 kanti nayifunqula intentana ka‐Moleke, nenkwenkwezi yotixo wenu u‐Remfane, imifanekiso enayenzayo ukuba niyibedeshe: ndandiya kunifudusela ele kwe‐Babilone." 
Acts7:44 Obawo betu bebenayo intente yesinqi̔no entlango, njengokuba bekumiselwe ngulowo ubeteta ku‐Mosesi ukuba ayenze ngomfanekiselo abewubonile:" 
Acts7:45 abati kanjalo bayingenisa obawo betu kunye no‐Yoshuwa, beyamkele nje ngokulandelana, ekubambeni kwabo ilizwe labaheyideni, ababegxotwa ngutixo ebusweni bobawo betu, kwada kwayimihla ka‐Davide;" 
Acts7:46 owafumana ufefe pambi kwotixo, wazicelela ukuba afumanele utixo ka‐Yakobi itabanakele." 
Acts7:47 Kodwa u‐Solomone wamakela indlu. 
Acts7:48 Noko yena opezu konke akahlali ezitempileni ezenziweyo ngezandla; njengokuba esitsho umprofite ukuti: 
Acts7:49 Izulu liyiterone yam, nomhlaba usisitulo senyawo zam; yindlu enina niya kundakela yona? utsho uyehova; umhlaumbi yeyipina indawo yokupumla kwam?" 
Acts7:50 isandla sam asazenza ezizinto zonke na? 
Acts7:51 Nina bantamo zilukuni, nabantliziyo nendlebe zingalukanga! niyamelana nomoya oyingcwele ngamaxesha onke; njengokuba bebesenje njalo oyihlo benu, niyenje njalo nani." 
Acts7:52 Nguwupina wabaprofite ongatshutshiswanga ngoyihlo benu? ewe bafisa abo bakushumayela pambili ukuza kwolungileyo; enisand’ ukumngcatsha nokumbulala: 
Acts7:53 nina ke eniwamkeleyo umteto ngezimiselo zengelosi, kanti aniwubambanga." 
Acts7:54 Kekaloku besiva ezizinto, bebecunukile kakulu ezintliziyweni zabo, bamqaqazelela ngamazinyo." 
Acts7:55 Kodwa yena, ezele ngumoya oyingcwele, wabeka amehlo ngasezulwini, wabona ubungcwalisa bukatixo, no‐Yesu emi ngasekunene kwotixo," 
Acts7:56 wati: Bona ke, ndiyabona izulu livulekile, nonyana wesintu emi ngasekunene kwotixo." 
Acts7:57 Baza badanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, baziti vingci indlebe zabo, bati bukuqu ngentliziyo nye pezu kwake," 
Acts7:58 ba m kupela pandle kwesixeko, ba m gibisela ngamatye: ati amanqi̔na abeka pantsi ingubo zawo ngasezinyaweni zendodana ebibizwa ngo‐Saulusi." 
Acts7:59 Baza bamgibisela u‐Stefane ngamatye, ebiza kuyo i‐Nkosi, esiti nokuti: Nkosi Yesu! yamkela umoya wam." 
Acts7:60 Waza waguqa ngamadolo, wadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, esiti: Nkosi! ungamisi kubo esisono. Wati akuba etshilo walala ubutongo." 
Acts8:1 Kekaloku u‐Saulusi ebetakazela ukubulawa kwake. Kwasuka kwabako ngeloxesha intshutshiso enkulu ngakuyo iṙemente ebise‐Yerusaleme: baza bonke batiwa sa emazweni ase‐Judeya ne‐Samariya; kwasala abapostile kupela. 
Acts8:1 Kekaloku u‐Saulusi ebetakazela ukubulawa kwake. Kwasuka kwabako ngeloxesha intshutshiso enkulu ngakuyo iṙemente ebise‐Yerusaleme: baza bonke batiwa sa emazweni ase‐Judeya ne‐Samariya; kwasala abapostile kupela. 
Acts8:2 Kekaloku amadoda abubedesho amncw̔aba u‐Stefane, enza isijwili esikulu pezu kwake." 
Acts8:3 Kodwa u‐Saulusi ebeci̔ta iṙemente, engena kwizindlu ngezindlu, er̔ola namadoda namankazana, wawanikela entolongweni." 
Acts8:4 Bandula abo batiwa sa bacanda indawo zonke, beshumayela ilizwi." 
Acts8:5 WAZA u‐Filipi wehlela esixekweni sase‐Samariya, wabashumayeza u‐Kristu." 
Acts8:6 Zaye izihlwele zinyamekela ezonto zibe zitshiwo ngu‐Filipi ngentliziyo nye, zisiva zibona nokubona imiqondiso abeyenza." 
Acts8:7 Ngokuba omoya abanco̔lileyo, bekala ngelizwi elikulu, bebepuma kwabaninzi abebenabo: kanjako abaninzi ababenesifo sokushwabanisa nabaziziqwala bapiliswa." 
Acts8:8 Kwaza kwabako uvuyo olukulu kwesosixeko. 
Acts8:9 Kwaye kuko indoda etile, egama lalingu‐Simone, ebifudula isenza ngobugqi kwesosixeko, imangalisa abantu base‐Samariya, isiti ingumntu omkulu bo:" 
Acts8:10 ababebambelela kuyo bonke, kwa kuye omncinane kwada kwakuye omkulu, besiti: Le ndoda ingamandla amakulu katixo." 
Acts8:11 Babebambelela kuyo ke, ngenxa yokuba bekukade ibamangalisile ngezinto zayo zobugqi." 
Acts8:12 Kodwa xeshekweni bakolwayo ngu‐Filipi, eshumayela izinto ezingabo ubukumkani bukatixo na ngalo igama lika‐Yesu Kristu, bebebapitizeshwa, kwa namadoda namankazana." 
Acts8:13 Kanjalo u‐Simone wakolwa naye, wati akuba ebapitizeshiwe waman’ ukubako no‐Filipi; waza ebona imiqondiso nemimangaliso emikulu ebisenziwa, wati nqa." 
Acts8:14 Kekaloku kwakuviwa ngabapostile abebese‐Yerusaleme, ukuba i‐Samariya ilamkele ilizwi likatixo, batuma kubo u‐Petrosi no‐Johane:" 
Acts8:15 abati, bakuba behlele kona, babatandazela, ukuze bamkele umoya oyingcwele:" 
Acts8:16 (ngokuba ebengekabawelanga kwa namnye; koko babe bebapitizeshelwe egameni lenkosi u‐Yesu kodwa.) 
Acts8:17 Bandula babeka izandla pezu kwabo, baza bamkela umoya oyingcwele." 
Acts8:18 Wati kekaloku u‐Simone, ebonile okokuba umoya oyingcwele uyanikwa ngokubekwa kwezandla zabapostile, wafuna ukubanikela imali," 
Acts8:19 esiti: Ndipeni nam igunya eli, lokuba lowo ndisukuba ndibeka izandla pezu kwake amkele umoya oyingcwele." 
Acts8:20 Kodwa u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Maiti imali yako kunye nawe ibe yinto yokutshatyalaliswa, ngokokuba isipo sikatixo ubusiba wosizuza ngemali." 
Acts8:21 Akunasahlulo nasabiwo kulendawo: ngokuba intliziyo yako ingalungile ebusweni bukatixo. 
Acts8:22 Guquka ngoko kubo obububi bako, ukunge utixo, ukuba umhlaumbi woyixolelwa inkumbulo yentliziyo yako." 
Acts8:23 Ngokuba ndibona ukuba usenyongweni yobuṙaṙa nasekubanjweni kwenkohlakalo. 
Acts8:24 Waza wapendula u‐Simone wati: Ndikungeleni nina enkosini ukuze kungandihleli nanye yezozinto nitetile ngazo. 
Acts8:25 Bandula bona, bakuba benqi̔nisile bateta ilizwi lenkosi, babuyela e‐Yerusaleme, bashumayela ivangeli emizini emininzi yama‐Samariya." 
Acts8:26 Yati kekaloku ingelosi yenkosi yateta ku‐Filipi, isiti: Suka, uhambele ngasesuyide, ngendlela ehlayo e‐Yerusaleme iye e‐Gaza, leyo ilubala." 
Acts8:27 Wesuka ke wahamba: kekaloku bona ke, umntu wase‐Tiyopiya, umbusi omkulu ka‐Kandase ukumkanikazi wama‐Tiyopiya, obepezu kwayo yonke indyebo yake, obezile e‐Yerusaleme ukuza kubedesha," 
Acts8:28 wabebuya, wati ehleli enqwelweni yake walesesha incwadi yomprofite u‐Yisaya." 
Acts8:29 Waza wati umoya ku‐Filipi: Sondela, uhlangane nalenqwelo." 
Acts8:30 Waza u‐Filipi wagidimela kona, wamva elesesha incwadi yomprofite u‐Yisaya, wati: Uqonda ke na oko ukuleseshayo?" 
Acts8:31 Wati yena: Ndingati nina ukuqonda pofu, ukuba akuko mntu ondikapayo? Waza wambongoza u‐Filipi ukuba akwele ahlale naye." 
Acts8:32 Kekaloku indawo yesiba̔lo abeyilesesha, ibiyilé yokuti: War̔olwa njengegusha isiya ekuxe̔lweni, nanjengokuba imvana ebusweni boyigugulayo isidenge, kwa njalo akavuli umlomo wake:" 
Acts8:33 ebupantsini bake ukugwetyelwa kwake kwasuswa; nesizukulwana sake ngubanina oya kusixela? ngokuba bususwa emhlabeni ubomi bake. 
Acts8:34 Wapendula ke umbusi lowo ku‐Filipi, wati: Ndiyakukunga, umprofite utsho oku ngobanina? ngokwake, ngomntu wumbi, kusinina?" 
Acts8:35 Waza u‐Filipi wavula umlomo wake, waqala kwa kuso isiba̔lo esi, wamshumayeza u‐Yesu." 
Acts8:36 Kekaloku nxa bebehamba endleleni, bafika ngasemanzini atile: waza wati umbusi: Nanga amanzi; ndixakwa yinto nina ukubapitizeshwa?" 
Acts8:37 Wayesiti u‐Filipi: Ukuba uyakolwa ngayo yonke intliziyo yako, kungenzwa. Wayependula wati: Ndiyakolwa ukuba u‐Yesu Kristu unguye unyana katixo." 
Acts8:38 Waza waxela ukuba inqwelo ime: baza bobabini behlela emanzini, kwa no‐Filipi nombusi; wambapitizesha ke." 
Acts8:39 Kekaloku okuya bebenyuke emanzini, umoya wenkosi wamsusa u‐Filipi, wati umbusi akabi sambona: ngokuba ebehamba indlela yake evuya." 
Acts8:40 Kodwa u‐Filipi wafunyanwa e‐Azote: waza ecanda ilizwe washumayela ivangeli kuzo zonke izixeko, wada wafika e‐Kesareya." 
Acts9:1 KEKALOKU u‐Saulusi esapefumla ukusongela nokubulala ngakubo abadisipile benkosi, waya kumperisite omkulu," 
Acts9:2 wacela kuye incwadi zokuya e‐Damakusi, ziba̔l elwa intlanganiso zakona, ukuze ati, ukuba uyafumana abatile abebengabendlela leyo, kwa namadoda namankazana, abazise benxityiwe e‐Yerusaleme." 
Acts9:3 Kekaloku ekuhambeni kwake, kwaye kute nxa ebesoudela e‐Damakusi, kwandula ukuti benge ngakuye ngokwalama inkanyiso ivela ezulwini." 
Acts9:4 Waza ewile ngasemhlabeni weva ilizwi lisiti kuye: Saulusi, Saulusi! unditshutshisela nina?" 
Acts9:5 Wayesiti: Ungubanina, Nkosi? Yayisiti inkosi: Mna ndingu‐Yesu, lowo umtshutshisayo: kunzima kuwe ukukaba ngasezihlabeni." 
Acts9:6 Waza engcangcazela enokuti nqa wati: Nkosi! ufuna ukuba ndenze nto nina? Yaza inkosi yati kuye: Suka, ungene esixekweni; wauya kutyelwa oko ufanele ukukwenza." 
Acts9:7 Kekaloku amadoda abehamba naye ebemi engenakuteta, esiva okunene ilizwi, engaboni mntu kodwa." 
Acts9:8 Waza wesuka u‐Saulusi emhlabeni; kwati kwakuvulwa amehlo ake, akabona mntu; aza emtundeza ngesandla amngenisa e‐Damakusi." 
Acts9:9 Wayentsuku ntatu engenakubona; akadla ke, akasela kanjako." 
Acts9:10 Kwabekuko umdisipile otile e‐Damakusi ogama lalingu‐Hananiya; yaza yati kuye inkosi embonisweni: Hananiya! Wati yena: Nanku mna, Nkosi!" 
Acts9:11 Yati inkosi kuye: Suka, uye esitarateni esibizwa ngokuti Sesite‐ntse, ubuzele endlwini ka‐Jude umntu ogama lingu‐Saulusi, um‐Tarese; ngokuba, bona ke, etandaza;" 
Acts9:11 Yati inkosi kuye: Suka, uye esitarateni esibizwa ngokuti Sesite‐ntse, ubuzele endlwini ka‐Jude umntu ogama lingu‐Saulusi, um‐Tarese; ngokuba, bona ke, etandaza;" 
Acts9:12 oyibonileyo embonisweni indoda egama lingu‐Hananiya ukuba yangena yabeka isandla pezu kwake, ukuze abuye abone." 
Acts9:13 Waza wati u‐Hananiya ukupendula: Nkosi! ndivile kwabaninzi ngayo indoda le, ukuba zingakanana izinto zobubi izenzileyo kubo abangcwele bako e‐Yerusaleme;" 
Acts9:14 nalapa inalo igunya livela kubaperisite abakulu, lokuba inxibe bonke ababiza egameni lako." 
Acts9:15 Kodwa inkosi yati kuye: Hamba; ngokuba lo eyimpahla enyuliweyo kum, yokupata igama lam pambi kwabaheyideni, nokumkani, nosapo luka‐Sirayeli;" 
Acts9:16 ngokuba ndiya kumbonisa ukuba zizinto ezingakanana afanele ukuziva ngenxa yegama lam. 
Acts9:17 Wemka ke u‐Hananiya, waya wangena endlwini leyo; waza wabeka izandla pezu kwake, wati: Mzalwana Saulusi! inkosi inditumile, kwa u‐Yesu owabonakala kuwe endleleni ubusiza ngayo, ukuze ubuye ubone, nokuba uzaliswe ngumoya oyingcwele." 
Acts9:18 Kwandula kwa oko kwawa emehlweni ake zanga zinkwetu, waselekwamkela ukubona ke, wesuka wabapitizeshwa:" 
Acts9:19 waza akuba etabatile ukutya womelezwa. Kekaloku u‐Saulusi wayeko nabadisipile abebese‐Damakusi intsuku ezitile. 
Acts9:20 Waza waseleshumayela u‐Kristu ezindlwini zentlanganiso, ukuba lo unguye unyana katixo." 
Acts9:21 Koko bamangaliswayo bonke ababesiva, bati: Lo asi nguye na owaci̔ta abo babebiza kweligama e‐Yerusaleme, nobezele oku kwa lapa, ukuba abazise benxityiwe pambi kwabaperisite abakulu?" 
Acts9:22 Kodwa u‐Saulusi womelezeka ngakumbi, wawati piti ama‐Juda abehlala e‐Damakusi, eqinisa ngezizatu ukuba lo unguye u‐Kristu." 
Acts9:23 Kwati kwakuzaliseka imihla yamininzi, acebisana ama‐Juda ukuba ambulale:" 
Acts9:24 kodwa ingcebo yawo yazeka ku‐Saulusi. Aza alalela amasango nasemini nasebusuku, ukuze ambulale." 
Acts9:25 Kodwa abadisipile bamtabata ebusuku, ba m hlisela pantsi ngodonga, be m hlisile engobozini." 
Acts9:26 Kekaloku akuba u‐Saulusi ebefikile e‐Yerusaleme, wabelinga ukukolana nabadisipile: kanti bonke bebemoyika, bengakolwa ukuba ungumdisipile." 
Acts9:27 Kodwa u‐Banabasi wamtabata naye, wamzisa kubapostile, wababalisela okokuba ebebonile inkosi endleleni, nokuba yateta kuye; nokokuba ebetetile ngokukalipa egameni lika‐Yesu e‐Damakusi." 
Acts9:28 Waye eko nabo e‐Yerusaleme engena epuma nokupuma," 
Acts9:29 eteta ngokukalipa egameni lenkosi u‐Yesu: kanjalo wateta wabuzisana naba‐Girike; koko bona bebelinga ukumbulala. 
Acts9:30 Kodwa abazalwana, bakwazi oku, bamkapela e‐Kesareya, bamsusa ukuya e‐Tarese." 
Acts9:31 Zandula zati ke iṙemente kuyo yonke i‐Judeya, ne‐Galili, ne‐Samariya, zanoxolo, zakiwa; zaza zihamba ekwoyikeni inkosi, naselwonwabisweni lwo?-? moya oyingcwele, zandiswa." 
Acts9:31 Zandula zati ke iṙemente kuyo yonke i‐Judeya, ne‐Galili, ne‐Samariya, zanoxolo, zakiwa; zaza zihamba ekwoyikeni inkosi, naselwonwabisweni lwo?-? moya oyingcwele, zandiswa." 
Acts9:32 KWAYE kute, akuba u‐Petrosi ebecanda kuzo zonke indawo wehlela nakubo abangcwele abebehlala e‐Luda." 
Acts9:33 Kekaloku wafumana apo umntu otile ogama lingu‐Eneya, obelele eluku̔kweni iminyaka yasibozo, obenesifo sokushwabanisa." 
Acts9:34 Waza u‐Petrosi wati kuye: Eneya! u‐Yesu ongu‐Kristu uyakupilisa; suka, uzandlalele. Waselesuka kwa oko." 
Acts9:35 Baza bambona bonke abebehlala e‐Luda nase‐Sharone, abati baguqukela kwinkosi." 
Acts9:36 Kekaloku bekuko e‐Jopa umdisipilekazi otile ogama lingu‐Tabita, o‐kutiwa ngokukunyushwa ngu‐Dokasi: yena lo ebezele yimisebenzi elungileyo nemilizo abeyenza." 
Acts9:37 Kwaye kute kwezontsuku ke, wabesifa, wabuba: bati bakuba bemhlambile, bambeka enkambilini yapezulu." 
Acts9:38 Kekaloku i‐Luda ikufupi nje ne‐Jopa, bati abadisipile bakuva ukuba u‐Petrosi ukona, batuma amadoda amabini kuye, be m bongoza ukuba makanganqeni ukuza kwa kubo." 
Acts9:39 Wesuka ke u‐Petrosi waya nawo. Oyena akuba efikile bamnyusela kulonkambili yapezulu: baza bema ngakuye bonke abahlolokazi belila, bebonakalisa izivato nengubo abezenza u‐Dokasi, nxa ebesenabo." 
Acts9:40 Kodwa u‐Petrosi wabaku̔pela pandle bonke, waguqa ngamadolo, watandaza; waza wajikela ngasemzimbeni, wati: Tabita! suka. Wawavula ke amehlo ake: wati akubona u‐Petrosi, wesuka wahlala." 
Acts9:41 Waza wamnikela isandla, wamsukisa; wati akuba ebabizile abangcwele nabahlolokazi, wammisa ebusweni babo ehleli." 
Acts9:42 Kwati ke oku kwazeka kuyo yonke i‐Jopa; baza abaninzi bakolwa enkosini. 
Acts9:43 Kwaye kute kekaloku wahlala imihla yamininzi e‐Jopa ku‐Simone otile umsuki wezikumba. 
Acts10:1 Kwabekuko indoda etile e‐Kesareya egama lalingu‐Koroneli, inkosikulu yasebandleni elibizwa ngokuti lelase‐Yitaliya," 
Acts10:2 ebingobedeshekileyo, ebisoyika utixo kunye nendlu yayo yonke, eyabenzela abantu amalizo amaninzi, yatandaza kutixo futi." 
Acts10:3 Lomntu wabona embonisweni kwa sekuhleni, yanga yayiyure yesitoba yemini, ingelosi katixo ukuba yangena kuye, yati kuye: Koroneli!" 
Acts10:4 Waza yena ewabeka amehlo pezu kwayo, esoyika nokwoyika, wati: Yinto nina, Nkosi! Yayisiti kuye: Imitandazo yako nemilizo yako inyukele ibe yinkumbuzo ebusweni bukatixo:" 
Acts10:5 nakaloku watume amadoda e‐Jopa, umeme u‐Simone obizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Petrosi:" 
Acts10:6 lo uyahlala ku‐Simone otile umsuki wezikumba, ondlu ingaselwandle: lo wokutyela into ufanele ukuyenza." 
Acts10:7 Kekaloku xeshekweni yemkayo ingelosi ebiteta ku‐Koroneli, wabiza isibini sezicaka zake, nesodati elibedeshekileyo lakuwo abemana enaye:" 
Acts10:8 waza wati, akuba ebatyele kwa konke, wabatuma e‐Jopa." 
Acts10:9 Kekaloku ngomnye umhla, nxa bebehamba abo, besondela esixekweni, wenyukela u‐Petrosi pezu kwentungo yendlu ukutandaza, ngeyure yesitandatu." 
Acts10:10 Waza walamba kakulu, wanga angatya; kodwa nxa bebelungisa bona, wawelwa lipupaṙa," 
Acts10:11 wabona izulu livulekile, nempahla etile njengeqiya enkulu isihla ngakuye, ibotshelelwe ngamancam omane, ihliselwa pantsi emhlabeni;" 
Acts10:12 ekube kuko pakati kwayo zonke izilo zomhlaba ezinyawo zine, namar̔amncwa, nento ezinambuzelayo, nentaka zezulu." 
Acts10:13 Kwaza kweza ilizwi kuye, lisiti: Suka, Petrosi! xe̔la utye." 
Acts10:14 Kodwa u‐Petrosi wati: Nakanye, Nkosi! ngokuba ndingazanga nditye nanye into engengcwele nenco̔lileyo." 
Acts10:15 Kwabuya kweza ilizwi kuye ngokwesibini, lisiti: Oko akuhlanzileyo utixo, ungakwenzi okungengcwele wena." 
Acts10:16 Oku ke kwenziwa katatu: yaza impahla leyo yabuya yenyuselwa ezulwini. 
Acts10:17 Kekaloku nxa u‐Petrosi ebexakekile pakati kwake, ukuba ungaba yinto nina lomboniso awubonileyo, bona ke, lomadoda abesusiwe ku‐Koroneli, eyifumene ngokubuza indlu ka‐Simone, ema ngapambi kwesango," 
Acts10:18 abiza ke, abuza ukuba u‐Simone obizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Petrosi uyahlala kona na." 
Acts10:19 Esacingela umboniso lowo u‐Petrosi, wati umoya kuye: Bona ke, amadoda amatatu ayafuna wena:" 
Acts10:20 uz’ usuke ngoko, uhle, uye nawo, ungatandabuzi nto; ngokuba ndiwatumile mna." 
Acts10:21 Waza wehla u‐Petrosi waya kulomadoda abesusiwe ku‐Koroneli ukuza kuye, wati: Bona ke, ndinguye enimfunayo; liyinina ituba enilapa ngenxa yalo?" 
Acts10:22 Ati ke wona: u‐Koroneli inkosikulu, indoda elungileyo, emoyikayo utixo, enqi̔nelwayo kakuhle lulo lwonke uhlanga lwama‐Juda kanjalo, wayalwa ngutixo ngengelosi engcwele, ukuba akumemele endlwini yake, nokuba eve amazwi kuwe." 
Acts10:23 Wandula wawabizela pakati, wawamkela endlwini. Waza ngomnye umhla u‐Petrosi wemka nawo, nabatile bakubo abazalwana base‐Jopa bampeleka." 
Acts10:24 Nangomhla olandelayo bangena e‐Kesareya. Waye u‐Koroneli ebalinda, ezibizele ndawonye kuye izalamane zake nezihlobo ezitandekileyo." 
Acts10:25 Kwaza kwati kwakungena u‐Petrosi, u‐Koroneli wamkaulela, wawa pantsi ngasezinyaweni zake, wabedesha." 
Acts10:26 Kodwa u‐Petrosi wampakamisa, esiti: Suka ume; ndikwa ngumntu nam." 
Acts10:27 Wati encokola naye wangena, wafumana abaninzi bebutene ndawonye." 
Acts10:28 Waza wati kubo: Niyazi kakulu nina okokuba kuyinto engafanelekileyo kumntu ongum‐Juda ukukolana nokudlelana nowesinye isizwe: kanti utixo undibonisile ukuba ndingabizi namnye umntu ngokungengcwele nangokunco̔lileyo. 
Acts10:29 Ndeza ngoko ndakumenywa, ndingapikanga ke: ndiyabuza ngako, ukuba yindawo nina nandimemela yona?" 
Acts10:30 Waza u‐Koroneli wati: Sekuntsuku zine ndibe ndizila ukutya kwada kwayileyure; nangeyure yesitoba benditandaza endlwini yam; yaza, bona ke, indoda yema ebusweni bam inesivato esikazimlayo," 
Acts10:31 yati: Koroneli! umtandazo wako uviwe, namalizo ako akunjulwe ebusweni bukatixo:" 
Acts10:32 tuma ngoko e‐Jopa, umeme u‐Simone obizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Petrosi; lo uyahlala endlwini ka‐Simone umsuki wezikumba ngaselwandle, oya kuti akufika atete kuwe." 
Acts10:33 Ndasendisiti ke kwa oko ndatuma kuwe; nawe ulungisile ukuba ufikile. Kaloku ngoko silapa tina sonke ebusweni bukatixo, ukuva zonke izinto uziyalelweyo ngutixo." 
Acts10:34 Waza u‐Petrosi wavula umlomo, wati: Ngokwenyaniso ndiyaqiqa okokuba utixo akanguye oketa abantu;" 
Acts10:35 koko oti kuzo zonke intlanga amoyike, enze ubulungisa, ukolekile kuye." 
Acts10:36 Elozwi walitumayo elusatsheni luka‐Sirayeli, eshumayela uxolo ngo‐Yesu Kristu, (lo u yinkosi yabo bonke,)" 
Acts10:37 niyalazi: e lendawo eyenzekayo kuyo yonke i‐Judeya, iqalwe e‐Galili, emveni kwalo ubapitizesho olwashunyayelwayo ngu‐Johane:" 
Acts10:37 niyalazi: e lendawo eyenzekayo kuyo yonke i‐Judeya, iqalwe e‐Galili, emveni kwalo ubapitizesho olwashunyayelwayo ngu‐Johane:" 
Acts10:38 elingaye u‐Yesu wase‐Nazarete, okokuba utixo wamtambisa ngomoya oyingcwele nangamandla; owacanda ilizwe esenza okulungileyo, epilisa bonke ababebandezelwa ngu‐Satane; ngokuba utixo ebenaye." 
Acts10:39 Nati ke singamanqi̔na ento zonke wazenzayo nasezweni lama‐Juda nase‐Yerusaleme; ate wona ambulala emxo̔mile emtini. 
Acts10:40 Yena lo utixo wamvusa ngowesitatu umhla, wambonakalisa ekuhleni:" 
Acts10:41 bekungekubo bonke abantu, bekukuwo amanqi̔na abebalulwe pambili ngutixo, kuti tina, esatyayo sasela ndawonye naye emveni kwokuvuka kwake ekufeni." 
Acts10:42 Owasiyalezela ukuba sishumayele ebantwini, nokuba sinqi̔nise okokuba unguye obemisiwe ngutixo abe ngumgwebi wabahleliyo nabafileyo." 
Acts10:43 Yena lo bonke abaprofite bayamnqi̔nela, ukuba bonke abakolwayo kuye baya kwamkela ukuxolelwa kwezono ngalo igama lake." 
Acts10:44 Esateta u‐Petrosi amazwi la, umoya oyingcwele wawela bonke ababesiva ilizwi." 
Acts10:45 Baza bamangaliswa abo bakulo ulwaluko abakoliweyo, bonke abebezile no‐Petrosi, ukuba isipiwo somoya oyingcwele sigalelwe napezu kwabaheyideni." 
Acts10:46 Ngokuba bebebeva beteta nge zinye inteto, bezukisa utixo." 
Acts10:47 Wandula wapendula u‐Petrosi, wati: Kuko ongala amanzi na, ukuze aba bangabapitizeshwa, abamamkeleyo umoya oyingcwele njengokuba simamkele nati?" 
Acts10:48 Waza wayalela ukuba babapitizeshwe egameni lenkosi. Bandula bamtandaza ukuba makalibale kona imihla etile. 
Acts11:1 Kekaloku abapostile, nabazalwana abebese‐Judeya, beva ukuba nabaheyideni bebelamkele ilizwi likatixo." 
Acts11:1 Kekaloku abapostile, nabazalwana abebese‐Judeya, beva ukuba nabaheyideni bebelamkele ilizwi likatixo." 
Acts11:2 Baza bati, xeshekweni u‐Petrosi ebenyukele e‐Yerusaleme, abo bakulo ulwaluko bapika naye," 
Acts11:3 besiti: Wabungena kumadoda angalukanga, watya ndawonye nawo." 
Acts11:4 Kodwa waqala u‐Petrosi wabaca̔zela indawo ngendawo, esiti:" 
Acts11:5 Ndibe ndisesixekweni se‐Jopa nditandaza; ndaza ndabona ndikulo ipupaṙa umboniso, impahla etile njengeqiya enkulu isihla, ihliswa ezulwini ngamancam omane, yada yafika kwa kum;" 
Acts11:6 endati ndakubeka amehlo pezu kwayo ndagqala, ndabona izilo zomhlaba ezinyawo zine, namar̔amncwa, nento ezinambuzelayo, nentaka zezulu." 
Acts11:7 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi lisiti kum: Suka, Petrosi! xe̔la utye." 
Acts11:8 Kodwa ndati: Nakanye, Nkosi! ngokuba kungazanga kungene emlonyeni wam nanye into engengcwele nenco̔lileyo." 
Acts11:9 Koko kwandipendula ilizwi ngokwesibini livela ezulwini, lisiti: Oko akuhlanzileyo utixo, ungakwenzi okungengcwele wena." 
Acts11:10 Oku ke kwenziwa katatu: zaza zonke ezonto zabuya zanyuselwa ezulwini. 
Acts11:11 Kwasuka, bona ke, kwa oko kwema amadoda amatatu pambi kwendlu endandikuyo, esusiwe e‐Kesareya ukuza kum." 
Acts11:12 Waza umoya wandixelela ukuba ndiye nawo, ndingatandabuzi nto. Kanjako bandipeleka nabazalwana aba abatandatu, saza sangena endlwini yendoda leyo;" 
Acts11:13 eyasishumayeza okokuba ibibonile ingelosi endlwini yayo, eyema yati kuyo: Tuma amadoda e‐Jopa, umeme u‐Simone obizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Petrosi;" 
Acts11:14 oya kukutyela amazwi, oya kusindiswa ngawo wena, nayo yonke indlu yako." 
Acts11:15 Kekaloku ndakuqala ukuteta, umoya oyingcwele wabawela, njengokuba wabesiw ela nati ekuqaleni." 
Acts11:16 Ndaza ndakumbula ilizwi lenkosi, lokokuba yabisiti: u‐Johane okunene wabapitizesha ngamanzi; kodwa nina nobapitizeshwa ngomoya oyingcwele." 
Acts11:17 Ukuba ngoko utixo wanika kubo isipo esilingana neso wasinika nakuti, bakukolwa kwinkosi u‐Yesu Kristu, bendingubanina pofu mna, ukuba ndibe nako ukumalela utixo?" 
Acts11:18 Bati bakuva ezizinto bayeka, badumisa utixo, besiti: Kwa nje ke nakubo abaheyideni utixo ulunikile uguquko bube bubomi." 
Acts11:19 KEKALOKU abo ke ababetiwe sa ngayo imbandezelo eyabako pezu kwo‐Stefane, bahambela kwa se‐Fenisi, nase‐Kiperusi, nase‐Antiyoki, beteta ilizwi kuma‐Juda odwa kupela." 
Acts11:20 Baye inxenye kubo bengamadoda ase‐Kiperusi nawase‐Kirene, abati bakufika e‐Antiyoki, bateta kuba‐Girike, beshumayela inkosi u‐Yesu." 
Acts11:21 Saye sinabo isandla senkosi; laza inani elikulu lakolwa, laguqukela enkosini." 
Acts11:22 Kwaye kuvakala indaba ezindlebeni zeṙemente ebise‐Yerusaleme ngazo ezizinto: baza basusa u‐Banabasi ukuya kuhambela kwa se‐Antiyoki: 
Acts11:23 owati efikile nje, nofefe lukatixo elubonile, wavuya, wabayala bonke ukuba mabati ngemvume yentliziyo banamatele kwinkosi." 
Acts11:24 Ngokuba ebeyindoda elungileyo, ezele ngumoya oyingcwele nalukolo. Saza isihlwele esikulu songezelelwa kwinkosi." 
Acts11:25 Waza u‐Banabasi wemkela e‐Tarese ukuya kufuna u‐Saulusi; 
Acts11:26 owati akuba emfumene, wamzisa e‐Antiyoki. Kwaza kwati, bahlanganisana neṙemente umnyaka upela, bafundisa isihlwele esikulu: kanjako abadisipile baqala e‐Antiyoki ukubizwa ngegama laba‐Kristu." 
Acts11:27 Kwezintsuku ke kwehla abaprofite e‐Yerusaleme beza e‐Antiyoki. 
Acts11:28 Waza wesuka omnye kubo, ogama lalingu‐Agabusi, waqondisa ngomoya ukuba indlala enkulu iza kubako kulo lonke ilizwe; eyehlayo kanjalo emihleni ka‐Kilodiyusi Kesare." 
Acts11:29 Baza bati abadi sipile, njengokuba umntu ebenamandla, bazimisela abanye ngabanye ukuba batume usizo kubazalwana ababehlala e‐Judeya:" 
Acts11:29 Baza bati abadi sipile, njengokuba umntu ebenamandla, bazimisela abanye ngabanye ukuba batume usizo kubazalwana ababehlala e‐Judeya:" 
Acts11:30 abati oko kanjalo bakwenza, belutumile kubadala ngesandla so‐Banabasi no‐Saulusi." 
Acts12:1 Kekaloku ngalo eloxesha u‐Herodi ukumkani wabeka izandla pezu kwabatile baseṙementeni ukubapata kakubi. 
Acts12:2 Waza wabulala u‐Yakobi umkuluwe ka‐Johane ngesiṙele. 
Acts12:3 Wati akubona ukuba oko kwakolisa ama‐Juda, walekela ukumbamba no‐Petrosi. (Ibiyimihla yezonka ezingenagwele leyo.)" 
Acts12:4 Wati kanjalo akuba embambile, wamfaka entolongweni, wamnikela kwamaqelana amane amasodati amane ukuba amlinde, efuna ukuti emveni kwepasika amr̔olele ebantwini." 
Acts12:5 Kwa njalo ke u‐Petrosi ebegcinwa entolongweni: kodwa utandazo olwomeleleyo belumenzelwa yiṙemente kutixo. 
Acts12:6 Kekaloku xeshekweni u‐Herodi ebeza kumvelisa, kwa ngobobusuku u‐Petrosi ebelele ubutongo pakati kwamasodati amabini, enxityelelwe ngemixokelelwane emibini; nabalindi pambi kwocango bebegcina intolongo." 
Acts12:7 Yaza, bona ke, ingelosi yenkosi yema ngaku ye, nenkanyiso yakanya entolongweni. Yati yona yabambata icala lika‐Petrosi, yamvusa, isiti: Suka ngobunxamo. Yaza imixokelelwane yake yawa ezandleni zake." 
Acts12:8 Yati kanjalo ingelosi kuye: Binqa, ufake izihlangu zako. Wenje njalo ke. Yaza yati kuye: Yiti tyu ingubo yako, undilandele." 
Acts12:9 Wapuma ke, wayilandela; kanti ebengazi ukuba yinyaniso into eyenziwayo yingelosi, kodwa ebeba uyabona umboniso." 
Acts12:10 Bati bakuba bedlulile elokuqala iqela labalindi nelesibini, beza esangweni lentsimbi, elisingela esixekweni, elati lavuleka kubo ngokwalo: baza bapuma, bacanda isitarate sasinye; yandula yaselisimka ingelosi kuye." 
Acts12:11 Waza u‐Petrosi akubuya waziqonda, wati: Kaloku ndiyazi ngenyaniso, ukuba inkosi yatuma ingelosi yayo, yandihlangula esandleni sika‐Herodi, na kuko konke ukukangela kwabantu bama‐Juda." 
Acts12:12 Waza wati akutelekelela, weza endlwini ka‐Mariya unina ka‐Johane, obebizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Maraki, apo abaninzi babe bebutene ndawonye kona betandaza." 
Acts12:13 Kekaloku akuba u‐Petrosi ebeqongqotile elucangweni lwesango, kweza isicakazana ukuza kupulapula, esigama lalingu‐Roda:" 
Acts12:14 esati sakulazi ilizwi lika‐Petrosi, asavula isango ngenxa yovuyo, sangena ngokubaleka, satyela ukuba u‐Petrosi umi pambi kwesango." 
Acts12:15 Bati ke bona kuso: Uyageza. Koko sona sibe siqinisa ukutshoza ukuba kunjalo. Baza bati: Yingelosi yake. 
Acts12:16 Kodwa u‐Petrosi ebemana eqongqota: bati bakuvula, bambona, bamangaliswa ke." 
Acts12:17 Koko yena ebakobele ngesandla ukuba bati tu, wababalisela okokuba yati nina inkosi ukumku̔pa entolongweni. Waza wati: Shumayelani ezizinto ku‐Yakobi, nakubo abazalwana. Waza wemka, waya kwenye indawo." 
Acts12:18 Kekaloku kwakuba kusile, bekuko isipitipiti esingencinane pakati kwamasodati, sokuba u‐Petrosi uhlelwe yinto nina ke." 
Acts12:19 Wati u‐Herodi akuba ebemfunile, engamfumananga nje, wabuza abalindi, waxela ukuba bafiswe. Waza wehla e‐Judeya waya e‐Kesareya, wahlala kona." 
Acts12:19 Wati u‐Herodi akuba ebemfunile, engamfumananga nje, wabuza abalindi, waxela ukuba bafiswe. Waza wehla e‐Judeya waya e‐Kesareya, wahlala kona." 
Acts12:20 Waye u‐Herodi ebejalile ngakuwo ama‐Tire nama‐Tsidone: kodwa eza kuye ngentliziyo nye; ati etomalalisile u‐Balastusi obepezu kwenkambili yokumkani, acela uxolo; ngenxa yokuba ilizwe lawo belizuza ukutya kwelokumkani." 
Acts12:21 Waza u‐Herodi ngemini emiselweyo, esambete isivato sobukumkani, wahlala pantsi esihlalweni esipakamileyo, wenza isiteto kuwo." 
Acts12:22 Bandula abantu bamemeza, besiti: Lilizwi lotixo, asi lelomntu." 
Acts12:23 Yaselimbeta kwa oko ingelosi yenkosi, ngenxa yokokuba akamnika utixo udumo: waza wadliwa zimpetu, wapuma umpefumlo." 
Acts12:24 Kodwa ilizwi likatixo lalikula, lalisandiswa." 
Acts12:25 Bati ke u‐Banabasi no‐Saulusi babuya e‐Yerusaleme, bakuba bebezalisekisile ukonzo lwabo, batabata nabo no‐Johane, owabizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Maraki." 
Acts13:1 KWAYE kube kuko abatile e‐Antiyoki, eṙementeni yakona, abaprofite nabafundisi; kwa u‐Banabasi, no‐Simone, obebizwa ngo‐Nigere, no‐Lukusi wase‐Kirene, no‐Manahene, obesondliwa ndawonye no‐Herodi inkosi, no‐Saulusi." 
Acts13:2 Kekaloku nxa bebesenza isikonzo kwinkosi, bezila ukutya kanjalo, wati umoya oyingcwele: Ndahluleleni ke u‐Banabasi no‐Saulusi kulomsebenzi endibabizeleyo kuwo." 
Acts13:3 Bandula bati, bakuba bezilile ukutya, betandazile nokutandaza, bebekile izandla pezu kwabo babandulula." 
Acts13:4 Aba ke ngoko, betunyiwe ngumoya oyingcwele, behlela e‐Selusiya, besuka kona baselishela e‐Kiperusi." 
Acts13:5 Bati bakuba bebefikile e‐Salamise, bashumayela ilizwi likatixo ezindlwini zentlanganiso zama‐Juda: babe kanjalo beno‐Johane engumkonzi." 
Acts13:6 Baza becandile isiqiti kwada kwase‐Pafosi, bafumana isanuse esitile, umprofite obuxoki, um‐Juda, ogama lalingu‐Bara‐yesu," 
Acts13:7 esibe sinaye umgwebi welozwe, u‐Seregiyo Paulusi, umntu osisazi: yena lo ebabizile u‐Banabasi no‐Saulusi, wanxamela ukuva ilizwi likatixo:" 
Acts13:8 kodwa u‐Elimasi, isanuse, (ngokuba linjalo igama lake ngokukunyushwa,) wamelana nabo, efuna ukumpambukisa umgwebi elukolweni." 
Acts13:9 Waza u‐Saulusi, (o bizwa nango‐Paulusi,) ezalisiwe ngumoya oyingcwele, wabeka amehlo pezu kwake," 
Acts13:10 wati: Wena uzele yiyo yonke inkohliso nabubo bonke ubunginingini, mntwana ka‐Satane, lutshaba lwabo bonke ubulungisa! akuyi kupeza na ukupambukisa indlela ezilungileyo zenkosi?" 
Acts13:11 Nakaloku, bona ke, isandla senkosi sipezu kwako, wauya kuba yimfama, ungaboni ilanga kube mzuzu. Kwasekusiwa pezu kwake kwa oko ubunkungu nobumnyama; waza efumfutisela wafuna abantu bokumtundeza ngesandla." 
Acts13:12 Wandula umgwebi akubona oko kwenzekileyo wakolwa, emangaliswa pezu kwofundiso lwenkosi." 
Acts13:13 Kekaloku nxa o‐Paulusi bandulukayo e‐Pafosi, beza e‐Perega yase‐Pamfiliya. Waza u‐Johane wemka kubo, wabuyela e‐Yerusaleme." 
Acts13:14 Kodwa bona besukile e‐Perega bacanda ilizwe, bafika e‐Antiyoki yase‐Pisidiya, bangena endlwini yentlanganiso ngomhla wesabata, bahlala pantsi." 
Acts13:15 Bati ke emveni kwokuleseshwa kwomteto nabaprofite abapati bendlu yentlanganiso batuma kubo, besiti: Madoda, bazalwana! ukuba ninalo ilizwi lokuyala ukuliteta ebantwini, tetani." 
Acts13:16 Wasuka wema u‐Paulusi, wakoba ngesandla, wati: Madoda, bo‐Sirayeli, nani boyikayo utixo! pulapulani." 
Acts13:17 Utixo wababantu o‐Sirayeli wabaqasha obawo betu; nabantu abo wabapakamisa bakuhlala njengabasemzini ezweni le‐Jipete, wabaku̔pa kulo ngengalo epakamileyo." 
Acts13:18 Wati ixesha langa layiminyaka emashumi mane wanyamezela imikwa yabo entlango. 
Acts13:19 Waza ezici̔tile intlanga ezisixe̔nxe ezweni le‐Kanane, wababela umhlaba wazo ngeqashiso." 
Acts13:20 Nasemveni kwoku wa ba nika abagwebi iminyaka yanga yamakulu mane anamashumi mahlanu, kwada kwako u‐Samyali umprofite." 
Acts13:21 Bati kamva bacela ukumkani; waza utixo wabanika u‐Saule unyana ka‐Kishe, indoda yakwisizwe sika‐Benjamine, iminyaka yamashumi mane." 
Acts13:22 Waza emshenxisile yena, wabavusela u‐Davide abe ngukumkani; owamnqi̔nelayo kanjalo, wati: Ndimfumene u‐Davide unyana ka‐Jese, indoda njengokweyam intliziyo, oya kukwenza konke ukutanda kwam." 
Acts13:23 Kwinzalo yaló utixo njengokwesibambiso wavusela o‐Sirayeli umsindisi, u‐Yesu;" 
Acts13:24 akuba u‐Johane ebeshumayele pambili ubapitizesho lwoguquko kubo bonke abantu bakwa‐Sirayeli, engekafiki yena." 
Acts13:25 Naxeshekweni u‐Johane ebegqibela uhambo lwake, wayesiti: Nizindla ukuba ndingubanina? andinguye; koko, bona ke, kusiza emva kwam ozihlangu zenyawo ndingafanele mna ukuzitukulula." 
Acts13:26 Madoda, bazalwana, lusapo lwesizalwane sika‐Abrahame, nabo pakati kwenu abamoyikayo utixo! litunyiwe kuni ilizwi losindiso olu." 
Acts13:27 Ngokuba abo bemiyo e‐Yerusaleme, nabapati babo, bengamazanga yena lowo, nawo amazwi abaprofite, aleseshwayo ngesabata zonke, ba wa zalisekisile ngoku m gweba." 
Acts13:28 Kanjako bakuba bengafumananga tyala elibang’ ukufa, bacela ku‐Pilati ukuba makabulawe." 
Acts13:29 Naxeshekweni babefezile zonke izinto eziba̔liweyo ngaye, ba m tula emtini, bambeka encw̔abeni." 
Acts13:30 Kodwa utixo wamvusa ekufeni; 
Acts13:31 owabonakala ngemihla emininzi kwabo babenyukile naye e‐Galili nkuza e‐Yerusaleme, abangamanqi̔na ake ebantwini." 
Acts13:32 Natitina siyanishumayeza isibambiso esenzelwa obawo betu," 
Acts13:33 okokuba esi utixo usizalisekisile kuti lusapo lwabo, emvusile nje u‐Yesu; njengokuba kanjalo kuba̔liwe eculweni lesibini ukuti: Ungunyana wam wena, ndikuzele namhla nje." 
Acts13:34 Nokokuba wamvusa ekufeni, angabi saya kubuyela ekuboleni, utshilo ukuti: Ndiya kunipa izibele zika‐Davide eziqinisekileyo." 
Acts13:35 Utingoko nakwelinye iculo: Akuyi kuyekelela oyingcwele yako abone ukubola. 
Acts13:36 Ngokuba ke u‐Davide, akuba ebekonzile isizukulwana sake ngemvume katixo, walala ubutongo, wabekelwa koyise bake, wabona ukubola:" 
Acts13:37 kodwa lowo utixo wamvusayo, akabona kubola." 
Acts13:38 Makwazeke kuni ngoko, madoda, bazalwana! ukuba ngaye lo kuyashunyayelwa kuni ukuxolelwa kwezono:" 
Acts13:39 nokuba ngaye lo osukuba ekolwa uyakululwa kuzo zonke izinto, enibe nikohliwe kukukululwa kuzo ngomteto ka‐Mosesi." 
Acts13:40 Lumkani ngoko, kuze kunganihleli oko kutetiweyo ebaprofiteni ukuti:" 
Acts13:41 Kangelani, nina badeli! niti nqa, niti shwaqe; ngokuba umsebenzi ndiwusebenza emihleni yenu, umsebenzi eningasayi kukolwa nguwo, nakuba umntu ewushumayela kuni." 
Acts13:42 Kekaloku akuba ama‐Juda ebepuma endlwini yentlanganiso, babebongoza abaheyideni ukuba lamazwi atetwe kubo ngesabata yasemva." 
Acts13:43 Kwati kwakuba kundulukile intlanganiso, abaninzi bama‐Juda nababangene ebujudeni ababedeshayo balandela u‐Paulusi no‐Banabasi; abati beteta kubo, babacenga ukuba bamane ukuma elufefeni lukatixo." 
Acts13:44 Kekaloku ngesabata elandelayo, saza kuba sonke isixeko sihlanganisene ukuva ilizwi likatixo." 
Acts13:45 Kodwa ama‐Juda akuzibona izihlwele, azaliswa luzondo, apika ezonto zibe zitetwa ngu‐Paulusi, epika, egxeka nokugxeka." 
Acts13:46 Baza bakalipa u‐Paulusi no‐Banabasi, bati: Bekufanelekile ukuba ilizwi likatixo litetwe kuni ukuqala: kodwa ekubeni nililahlayo, nizigweba nje ukuba anifanele ubomi obungunapakade, bona ke, siyajikela kubaheyideni:" 
Acts13:47 ngokuba inkosi isiyalele ngokunjalo, isiti: Ndikubekele ukuba lukanyiso lwabaheyideni, ukuze ube ngowosindiso kude kube sekupeleni kwomhlaba." 
Acts13:48 Bati abaheyideni besiva ezizinto bavuya, badumisa ilizwi lenkosi: baza bakolwa bonke ababe bemiselwe ubomi obungunapakade." 
Acts13:49 Laye ilizwi lenkosi libe lihanjiswa kulo lonke elozwe. 
Acts13:50 Kodwa ama‐Juda atelekisa amankazana abedeshayo nadumileyo n amadoda amakulu asesixekweni, avusa intshutshiso ngaku‐Paulusi no‐Banabasi, abagxota emideni yawo." 
Acts13:51 Koko bavutululayo utuli lwenyawo zabo ngakuwo, beza e‐Koniyume." 
Acts13:52 Baye abadisipile bezaliswa luvuyo na ngumoya oyingcwele. 
Acts14:1 KWAYE kute e‐Koniyume, bangena kunye endlwini yentlanganiso yama‐Juda, benje njalo ukuteta, ukuba kwakolwa umhlambi omkulu nowama‐Juda nowama‐Girike." 
Acts14:2 Kodwa ama‐Juda abengakolwa avuselela abaheyideni, acapukisa imipefumlo yabo ngakubo abazalwana." 
Acts14:3 Kwa njalo ke bahlala kona ixesha elikulu, beteta ngokukalipa enkosini, ebinqi̔nela ilizwi lofefe lwayo, yanika ukuba imiqondiso nemimangaliso yenziwe ngezandla zabo." 
Acts14:4 Kodwa umhlambi wesixeko wahluleka: baye ke inxenye bengecala lama‐Juda, nenxenye ngecala labapostile." 
Acts14:5 Naxeshekweni kwesuka imvukelo yabaheyideni nama‐Juda kunye, ndawonye nabagwebi babo, ukubapata kakubi nokubagibisela ngamatye," 
Acts14:6 bati bakutelekelela, besabela e‐Lisitira nase‐Derebe, izixeko zase‐Likayoniya, nasezweni langakona;" 
Acts14:7 baye belapo beshumayela ivangeli. 
Acts14:8 Kekaloku indoda etile e‐Lisitira ebingenamandla ezinyaweni zayo yabihleli, ebisisiqwala kwa sesizalweni sonina, ebingazanga ihambe:" 
Acts14:9 yona le yabisiva u‐Paulusi eteta; owabeka amehlo pezu kwayo, waza akubona ukuba inokolo lwokupiliswa," 
Acts14:10 wati ngelizwi elikulu: Suka ume ngenyawo zako upakamile. Yaza yatsiba yahamba. 
Acts14:11 Zati izihlwele zakubona oko abekwenzile u‐Paulusi, zapakamisa ilizwi lazo, zisiti ngokwama‐Likayoniya: Otixo bahlikele kuti befana nabantu." 
Acts14:12 Zaye zibiza ke u‐Banabasi ngo‐Jupitere; no‐Paulusi ngo‐Merekuri, ngokokuba yena ebenguye umteti omkulu." 
Acts14:13 Waza umperisite wo‐Jupitere, obepambi kwesixeko sazo, wazisa inkabi nezitsaba zentyatyambo emasangweni, wafuna ukwenza idini kunye nabantu." 
Acts14:14 Kodwa abapostile, u‐Banabasi no‐Paulusi, bakuva oko, baṙazula izivato zabo, babalekela pakati kwesihlwele, bedanduluka," 
Acts14:15 besiti nokuti: Madoda! yinina ukuba nenze ezizinto? nati singabantu abamilo ifana neyenu, sishumayela kuni ukuba maniguquke kwezizinto ezingendawo niguqukele kuye utixo ohleliyo, owenza izulu, nomhlaba, nolwandle, nento zonke ezikuzo:" 
Acts14:16 owati emaxesheni agqitileyo wayeka intlanga zonke zihambe ngezazo indlela. 
Acts14:17 Kanti ke noko akazishiya engenakunqi̔nelwa, esenza okulungileyo, esinika imvula ivela ezulwini namaxesha acu̔mileyo, ezalisa intliziyo zetu ngokutya nangovuyo." 
Acts14:18 Bati nangokutsho cebetshu bakohlwa ukuyekisa izihlwele, ukuba zingabenzeli idini." 
Acts14:19 Kwaza kwafika ama‐Juda evela e‐Antiyoki nase‐Koniyume, azihenda izihlwele, amgibisela u‐Paulusi ngamatye, amr̔ola ngapandle kwesixeko, esiba ufile." 
Acts14:20 Kodwa nxa abadisipile babemngqongile, wesuka, wangena esixekweni. Waza ngomnye umhla wapuma no‐Banabasi waya e‐Derebe." 
Acts14:21 Bati bakuba beshumayele ivangeli kwesosixeko, bebenzile abadisipile abaninzi kanjalo, babuyela e‐Lisitira, nase‐Koniyume, nase‐Antiyoki:" 
Acts14:22 besomeleza imipefumlo yabadisipile, bebayala ukuba bahlale elukolweni, — nokuba kungazo imbandezelo ezininzi esifanele ukungena ebukumkanini bukatixo." 
Acts14:23 Kekaloku bebabalulele abadala iṙemente ngeṙemente, betandazile kunye nokuzila ukutya, bababekela enkosini abebekoliwe kuyo." 
Acts14:24 Bati bakuba bebecandile i‐Pisidiya, beza e‐Pamfiliya:" 
Acts14:25 baza betetile ilizwi e‐Perega, behlela e‐Ataliya:" 
Acts14:26 baza besuka kona baselishela e‐Antiyoki, apo abebenikelwe elufefeni lukatixo kona ngenxa yomsebenzi ababewufezile." 
Acts14:27 Bati bakufika, behlanganisile iṙemente, baxela konke abekwenzile ngabo utixo, nokokuba ebevulele abaheyideni ucango lwokolo." 
Acts14:28 Baza bahlala kona ixesha elingencinane ndawonye nabadisipile. 
Acts15:1 KEKALOKU abatile abebehlile e‐Judeya, bebefundisa abazalwana, besiti: Ukuba analuki ngesiko lika‐Mosesi, aningesindiswe." 
Acts15:1 KEKALOKU abatile abebehlile e‐Judeya, bebefundisa abazalwana, besiti: Ukuba analuki ngesiko lika‐Mosesi, aningesindiswe." 
Acts15:2 Ngako xeshekweni u‐Paulusi no‐Banabasi babenongxolisano nopikisano olungencinane nabo, bamisela ukuba u‐Paulusi no‐Banabasi, nabanye abatile bakubo, banyukele e‐Yerusaleme kubo abapostile nabadala pezu kwalombuzo." 
Acts15:3 Bandula bona, bepelekelelwe yiṙemente, bacanda i‐Fenisi ne‐Samariya, beshumayela ukuguquka kwabaheyideni: baye besenzela bonke abazalwana uvuyo olukulu." 
Acts15:4 Bati bakufika e‐Yerusaleme, bamkelwa ngembuko yiṙemente nabapostile nabadala, baxela konke abekwenzile ngabo utixo." 
Acts15:5 Kodwa kwesuka kwema abatile bakulo uhlobo lwabafarisi abakoliweyo, besiti: Kufanele ukuba baluke, nokuba bayalezelwe ukugcina umteto ka‐Mosesi." 
Acts15:6 Baza bahlanganisana abapostile nabadala ukuba baqonde lendawo. 
Acts15:7 Kekaloku lwakubako upikisano olukulu, wesuka u‐Petrosi, wati kubo: Madoda, bazalwana! niyazi kakulu nina ukuba kuse kukade wa ndi nyulayo utixo pakati kwetu, ukuba abaheyideni beve ngomlomo wam ilizwi levangeli, bakolwe." 
Acts15:8 Kanjako utixo ozaziyo intliziyo wabanqi̔nela, enikile kubo umoya oyingcwele, njengokuba ebemnikile nakuti;" 
Acts15:9 engenzanga kwahluka pakati kwetu nabo, ehlambulule intliziyo zabo ngokolo." 
Acts15:10 Ngako kaloku yinina ukuba nimlinge utixo, ngokubeka iyokwe pezu kwentamo yabadisipile, abangabanga namandla kwa nobawo nati ukuyitwala?" 
Acts15:11 Koko kungalo ufefe lwenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu esikolwa ukuba siya kusindiswa, kwa ngendawo a baya kusindiswa ngayo bona nabo." 
Acts15:12 Waza wonke umhlambi wati cwaka, wapulapula ku‐Banabasi naku‐Paulusi, betyela leyo imiqondiso nemimangaliso emikulu abeyenzile utixo pakati kwabaheyideni ngabo." 
Acts15:13 Nasemveni kwokuba bebete cwaka bona, wapendula u‐Yakobi, esiti: Madoda, bazalwana! ndipulapuleni." 
Acts15:14 U‐Simone utyele indawo waqala ngayo utixo ukutyelela kubaheyideni, ukuba atabatele igama lake abantu kubo." 
Acts15:15 Kanjako ayalungelelana noku amazwi abaprofite; njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: 
Acts15:16 Emveni kwoku ndiya kubuya, ndandiya kubuya ndilake ipempe lika‐Davide eliwileyo; nengci̔takalo zalo ndobuya ndizake, ndilimise kanjako:" 
Acts15:17 ukuze isisalela sabantu sibe sifuna inkosi, nabo bonke abaheyideni ekubizwe pezu kwabo igama lam, utsho uyehova okwenzayo oku konke." 
Acts15:18 Yaziwa ngutixo yonke imisebenzi yake kwa sekuqalekeni kwexesha. 
Acts15:19 Nditi ngoko ukugweba kwam, masingabakatazi abo bakubo abaheyideni abaguqukela kutixo;" 
Acts15:20 masiba̔le kubo ukuba bazile izinto ezinco̔lisekileyo zezitixo, nombulo, nokuṙwishiweyo, negazi." 
Acts15:21 Ngokuba u‐Mosesi kutabata emaxesheni akudala enabo kuzo zonke izixeko abamshumayelayo, eleseshwa ezindlwini zentlanganiso ngesabata zonke." 
Acts15:22 Kwandula kwanga kulungile kubapostile, nakubadala, kunye nayo yonke iṙemente, ukunyula amadoda kwababo, bawatume e‐Antiyoki kunye no‐Paulusi no‐Banabasi; kwa u‐Jude, obebizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Barasaba, no‐Silasi, amadoda amakulu pakati kwabazalwana;" 
Acts15:22 Kwandula kwanga kulungile kubapostile, nakubadala, kunye nayo yonke iṙemente, ukunyula amadoda kwababo, bawatume e‐Antiyoki kunye no‐Paulusi no‐Banabasi; kwa u‐Jude, obebizwa ngelinye igama elingu‐Barasaba, no‐Silasi, amadoda amakulu pakati kwabazalwana;" 
Acts15:23 beba̔lile ngabo ezizinto zokuti: Abapostile, nabadala, nabazalwana, kubo abazalwana abangabakubo abaheyideni abase‐Antiyoki, nase‐Siriya, nase‐Silisiya, bebulisa." 
Acts15:24 Ngokokuba sivile ukuba abatile abapuma kuti banipitizelisa ngamazwi, bexalisa imipefumlo yenu, besiti nifanele ukwaluka nokugcina umteto, esibe singabanikanga umyalezo wokutsho:" 
Acts15:25 kwanga kulungile kuti, sihlangene nje ngentliziyo nye, ukunyula amadoda atile, siwatume kuni, kunye nabatandwa betu u‐Banabasi no‐Paulusi," 
Acts15:26 abantu abancamileyo ubomi babo ngenxa yegama lenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu. 
Acts15:27 Sibatumile ngoko u‐Jude no‐Silasi, abaya kuti bona ngokwabo ba ni tyele kwa ezizinto ngomlomo." 
Acts15:27 Sibatumile ngoko u‐Jude no‐Silasi, abaya kuti bona ngokwabo ba ni tyele kwa ezizinto ngomlomo." 
Acts15:28 Ngokuba kube kunga kulungile kumoya oyingcwele nakuti, ukuba singabeki pezu kwenu namnye umtwalo omkulu kwezizinto ezifanelekileyo:" 
Acts15:29 Zokuba nizile izinto ezibingelwe izitixo, negazi, nokuṙwishiweyo, nombulo: eniya kuti nizigcina ningazenzi nilungise. Hlalani kakuhle." 
Acts15:30 Bandula bona bakuba bendululwe beza e‐Antiyoki: baza bewuhlanganisile umhlambi, banikela incwadi;" 
Acts15:31 a bati baku yi lesesha, bavuya ngenxa yonwabiso." 
Acts15:32 Baza u‐Jude no‐Silasi, bengabaprofite bona nabo, bayala abazalwana ngokuteta okuninzi, babomeleza." 
Acts15:32 Baza u‐Jude no‐Silasi, bengabaprofite bona nabo, bayala abazalwana ngokuteta okuninzi, babomeleza." 
Acts15:33 Bati bakuba bebenzile umzuzu, bandululwa ngoxolo kubazalwana ukuya kubapostile." 
Acts15:34 Kodwa kwanga kulungile ku‐Silasi ukuba alibale kona. 
Acts15:35 Kanjalo u‐Paulusi no‐Banabasi bebehlala e‐Antiyoki, befundisa beshumayela nokushumayela ilizwi lenkosi, ndawonye nabo nabanye abaninzi." 
Acts15:36 KEKALOKU emveni kwemihla etile wati u‐Paulusi ku‐Banabasi: Makesibuye siye sityelele kubazalwana betu kuzo zonke izixeko, apo silishumayele kona ilizwi lenkosi, sibone ukuba banjanina." 
Acts15:37 Waza u‐Banabasi wanxamela ukutabata nabo u‐Johane obebizwa ngo‐Maraki. 
Acts15:38 Kodwa u‐Paulusi ebeba akufanelekile ukumtabata nabo yena lo, owesuka kubo e‐Pamfiliya, engayanga nabo emsebenzini." 
Acts15:39 Kwabako ngoko ubambano olubukali, bada bahlukana omnye nomnye, wati u‐Banabasi wamtabata u‐Maraki, waselishela e‐Kiperusi." 
Acts15:40 Kodwa u‐Paulusi waqasha u‐Silasi, wemka, enikelwe elufefeni lukatixo ngabazalwana." 
Acts15:41 Waza wacanda i‐Siriya ne‐Silisiya, ezomeleza iṙemente." 
Acts16:1 Waza wafika e‐Derebe nase‐Lisitira: kekaloku bona ke, umdisipile otile ebekona, ogama lingu‐Timote, unyana womfazi otile obengum‐Judakazi okoliweyo, nowoyise obengum‐Girike;" 
Acts16:2 obenqi̔nelwa kakuhle ngabazalwana abebese‐Lisitira nase‐Koniyume. 
Acts16:3 Yena lo u‐Paulusi watanda ukuba apume aye naye; waza wamtabata wamalusa, ngenxa yama‐Juda abekuzo ezondawo; ngokuba onke ebemazi uyise ukuba ungum‐Girike." 
Acts16:4 Bati ke nxa bebezicanda izixeko, babanikela imiteto ebekugwetyiwe ngayo ngabapostile nabadala abebese‐Yerusaleme, ukuba bayibambe." 
Acts16:5 Kwa nje ke iṙemente zibe ziqiniswa elukolweni, zamana zisanda inani lazo imihla ngemihla." 
Acts16:6 Kekaloku bakuba bebecandile i‐Firijiya nelizwe le‐Galati, besalelwa ngumoya oyingcwele ukuteta ilizwi e‐Asiya," 
Acts16:7 bati bakufika e‐Misiya, balinga ukuya e‐Bitiniya; kanti umoya akabavumela." 
Acts16:8 Baza bedlula e‐Misiya behla beza e‐Tirowa. 
Acts16:9 Kwaza kwabonakala umboniso ku‐Paulusi ebusuku: Kwaye kumi indoda etile yase‐Masedoniya, imbongoza, isiti nokuti: Wela uze e‐Masedoniya, usisize." 
Acts16:10 Xeshekweni ke abebonile umboniso lowo, sati kwa oko safuna ukumka siye e‐Masedoniya, siqonda ngawo ukuba inkosi isibizele ukushumayela ivangeli kubo." 
Acts16:11 Ngako sindulukile nje e‐Tirowa, sati ngqo ukuselishela e‐Samotirase, na ngomhla olandelayo e‐Neyapolise." 
Acts16:12 Saza sisuka kona saya e‐Filipi, esisixeko esikulu sesosahlulo sase‐Masedoniya, siyikoloni. Saye sibe sihlala kwesisixeko imihla etile:" 
Acts16:13 sati ke ngomhla wesabata sapuma saya pandle kwesixeko ngasemlanjeni, apo bekulisiko ukuba kutandazwe kona; saza sahlala pantsi, sateta kuwo amankazana abebutene ndawonye." 
Acts16:14 Kwaye kusiva inkazana etile egama lingu‐Lidiya, umtengisikazi w ezivato ezibomvu wasesixekweni se‐Tiyatira, ebibedesha utixo; entliziyo yayivulayo inkosi, ukuba inyamekele izinto ezibe zitetwa ngu‐Paulusi." 
Acts16:15 Yati yona yakuba ibapitizeshiwe, nendlu yayo, yasibongoza, isiti: Ukuba nigwebile ukuti ndinyanisekile kwinkosi, ngenani endlwini yam, nihlale kona. Yaza yasiqu̔ba." 
Acts16:16 Kwaye kute, nxa sibe sisiya endaweni yokutandaza, isicakazana esitile sinomoya wokulaula sasikaulela, esasisenzela inkosi zaso inzuzo enkulu ngokulaula." 
Acts16:17 Sona salandela u‐Paulusi nati, sadanduluka, sisiti: Ababantu bazizicaka zikatixo opezu konke, ezisishumayezayo indlela yosindiso." 
Acts16:18 Oku ke sasikwenza imihla yamininzi. Kodwa u‐Paulusi, ebindekile nje, wajika wati kumoya lowo: Ndiyakuyalela egameni lika‐Yesu Kristu ukuba upume kuso. Waza wapuma kwa ngeloxeshana." 
Acts16:19 Kekaloku inkosi zaso zakubona ukuba itemba lenzuzo yazo limkile, zabamba u‐Paulusi no‐Silasi, zabar̔olela endaweni yentengo pambi kwabapati." 
Acts16:20 Zaza zibangenisile emagoseni zati: Ababantu bayakataza isixeko setu kakulu, bengama‐Juda nje;" 
Acts16:21 abati bashumayele amasiko ekungavunyelwa tina ukuba siwamkele nokuba siwenze, singama‐Roma nje." 
Acts16:22 Saza isihlwele sabasukela kunye; ati amagosa ebahlutile ingubo ngokuṙazula, axela ukuba mababetwe ngentonga." 
Acts16:23 Baza bakuba bebenzele imivimbo emininzi ba ba posela entolongweni, bayalela umlindi wentolongo ukuba abagcine ngokuqinisekileyo:" 
Acts16:24 owati esamkele isiyalelo esinjalo, wabaposela entolongweni yapakati, waqinisa inyawo zabo emtini." 
Acts16:25 Kekaloku pakati kwobusuku u‐Paulusi no‐Silasi bebetandaza, bavuma amaculo kutixo: baye ke ababanjwa bebapulapula." 
Acts16:26 Kwaza kwabako ngokwalama isingcangcazelo somhlaba esikulu, yada yazanyazanyiswa imisekelo yentolongo: zasuka zavuleka ingcango kwa oko zonke, nezinxibo zabo bonke zatukululeka." 
Acts16:27 Wati umlindi wentolongo evukile ebutongweni bake, ebona ukuba ingcango zentolongo zivulekile, war̔ola isiṙele, waza kuzibulala, eba ababanjwa besabile." 
Acts16:28 Kodwa u‐Paulusi wamemeza ngelizwi elikulu, esiti: Ungazenzakalisi; ngokuba silapa kwa sonke." 
Acts16:29 Waza wabiza isibane, watsibela pakati, waba engcangcazela, wawa pantsi pambi kwo‐Paulusi no‐Silasi," 
Acts16:30 wabakokela ngapandle, wati: Zinkosi! ndifanele ukwenza nto nina ukuze ndisindiswe?" 
Acts16:31 Bati ke bona: Kolwa kuyo inkosi u‐Yesu Kristu, wauya kusindiswa wena nendlu yako." 
Acts16:32 Baza bateta kuye ilizwi lenkosi, nakubo bonke abebesendlwini yake." 
Acts16:33 Waza wabatabata naye ngelona ixeshana lobusuku, wahlanza imivimbo yabo, wabapitizeshwa yena nabo bonke abake kwa oko." 
Acts16:34 Wati kanjalo akuba ebanyusele endlwini yake, wababekela ukutya, wagcoba ukuba ekoliwe kutixo, kunye nayo yonke indlu yake." 
Acts16:35 Kekaloku kwakuba kusile, amagosa lawo atuma imisila, esiti: Bakulule abantu abo." 
Acts16:36 Waza umlindi wentolongo wamtyela u‐Paulusi lamazwi, wati: Amagosa atumile ukuti manikululwe; ngako kaloku pumani, nihambe ngoxolo." 
Acts16:37 Kodwa u‐Paulusi wati kuyo: Asityabula ekuhleni singagwetywanga, singabantu abangama‐Roma, asiposela entolongweni: kekaloku ngoku ayasiku̔pa ngasese na? hai kambe; makeze wona ngokwawo asikapele ngapandle." 
Acts16:38 Yati imisila yaxela lamazwi kumagosa: aza oyika akuva ukuba bangama‐Roma," 
Acts16:39 eza ababongoza, abakapela ngapandle, abatandaza ukuba mabemke esixekweni." 
Acts16:40 Bapuma ke entolongweni, baza bangena endlwini ka‐Lidiya: baza bakuba bebebonile abazalwana, babonwabisa, bemka." 
Acts17:1 KEKALOKU bakuba bebecandile i‐Amfipolisi ne‐Apoloniya, beza e‐Tesalonika, apo ibikona indlu yentlanganiso yama‐Juda." 
Acts17:2 Waza u‐Paulusi, njengokuba belinjalo isiko lake, wangena kuwo, wati ngesabata zantatu wateta nawo eziba̔lweni," 
Acts17:3 e z aneka, ebeka pambi kwawo ukuba u‐Kristu ebefanele ukuva intlungu nokuvuka ekufeni, nokuba lo unguye u‐Kristu, u‐Yesu enditi, watsho, ndimshumayele kuni." 
Acts17:4 Aza inxenye kuwo akolwa, adlelana no‐Paulusi no‐Silasi; kwa nomhlambi omkulu wama‐Girike abedeshayo, nenani lamankazana amakulu elingelincinane." 
Acts17:5 Kodwa ama‐Juda angakolwayo eba nozondo, atabatela kuwo amadoda atile azincwangu kumadungudwane asezinkundleni, enza imbutumbutu, apitizelisa isixeko, aṙaula indlu ka‐Yasone, afuna ukubaku̔pela ebantwini." 
Acts17:6 Ati ke engabafumananga, ar̔ola u‐Yasone nabazalwana abatile pambi kwabagwebi besixeko, ememeza ukuti: Aba, abalipitizileyo ilizwe, bafikile nalapa;" 
Acts17:7 ate u‐Yasone ubamkele endlwini: kanjako aba bonke bayenza ngokumelana nemiteto ka‐Kesare, besiti kuko ukumkani wumbi, u‐Yesu." 
Acts17:8 Axalisa isihlwele ke, nabagwebi besixeko, besiva ezizinto." 
Acts17:9 Baza bakuba betabatile isibambiselo ku‐Yasone nakwabanye, babandulula." 
Acts17:10 Bati abazalwana kwa oko batuma u‐Paulusi no‐Silasi ebusuku ukuya e‐Bereya; abati bakufika, baya bangena endlwini yentlanganiso yama‐Juda." 
Acts17:11 Wona la ebegqitisile ngesimo sawo kwawase‐Tesalonika, ekubeni alamkelayo ilizwi ngako konke ukuvuma kwentliziyo, ezibenca iziba̔lo imihla ngemihla, ukuba ezizinto zinjalo kusinina." 
Acts17:12 Ngako ke abaninzi bakuwo bakolwa, nenani lamankazana adumileyo angama‐Girikekazi nelamadoda elingelincinane." 
Acts17:13 Kodwa ama‐Juda ase‐Tesalonika, xeshekweni abesazi ukuba ilizwi likatixo lashunyayelwa ngu‐Paulusi nase‐Bereya, eza nakona evuselela izihlwele." 
Acts17:14 Bandula abazalwana kwa oko bamsusa u‐Paulusi ukuya njengokuba kuyiwa elwandle; kodwa u‐Silasi no‐Timote basala kona. 
Acts17:15 Bati abo bamkapayo u‐Paulusi bamsa e‐Atenesi; baza besamkele isiyalezelo ku‐Silasi no‐Timote, sokuba beze kuye ngokukauleza kakulu, bemka." 
Acts17:16 Kekaloku nxa u‐Paulusi ebebalinda e‐Atenesi, umoya wake ubucapukiswa pakati kwake, ebona isixeko ukuba sizele zizitixo." 
Acts17:17 Ngako ke wabeteta endlwini yentlanganiso kuma‐Juda nakwababedeshayo, nasendaweni yentengo ngemihla yonke wabepikisana nabo bafumanana naye." 
Acts17:18 Baza abafilosofe abatile bakwaba‐Epikure nabakwa‐Stoyike bapika naye. Babesiti ke inxenye: Singafun’ ukuti nina isitetateti esi? kodwa babesiti abanye: Unga ungumshumayeli wotixo basemzini; ngokuba ebeshumayela kubo u‐Yesu novuko lwabafileyo. 
Acts17:19 Baza bamtabata nabo, bamsa kuyo indawo e‐kutiwa yi‐Aripago, besiti: Singaba sisazi na, lolwanina olufundiso olutsha olutetwa nguwe?" 
Acts17:20 ngokuba uzingenisa ezindlebeni zetu izinto ezitile ezimangalisayo: singa singazi ngoko, zingafun’ ukuti nina ezizinto." 
Acts17:21 (Kekaloku bonke abase‐Atenesi, nabasemzini abebeṙanukele kona, bebedlulisa ixesha labo ngokuxela nangokupulapula indaba ezintsha kwapela.)" 
Acts17:22 Waza u‐Paulusi wema pakati kwayo indawo e‐kutiwa yi‐Aripago, wati: Madoda ase‐Atenesi! nditi ngendawo zonke ndibone okokuba nigqitisile ngokuhlonela otixo." 
Acts17:23 Ngokuba ekudluleni, nasekugqaleni izibedeshelo zenu, ndafumana nesibingelo ebekuba̔liwe pezu kwaso ukuti: Kongaziwayo utixo. Oyena ngoko enimbedeshayo ninga m azi, lo ndiyamshumayela kuni." 
Acts17:24 Utixo owenza ilizwe nento zonke ezikulo, lo, eyinkosi yezulu nomhlaba nje, akahlali ezitempileni ezenziweyo ngezandla;" 
Acts17:25 akakonzwa zizandla zabantu kanjako, njengokungati ebeswela into, enguye ngokwake obapa bonke ubomi, nompefumlo, nento zonke;" 
Acts17:26 ote kanjalo wazenza ngegazi linye zonke intlanga zabantu, ukuba bahlale pezu kwobuso bonke bomhlaba, ebalule amaxesha amiselweyo pambili nemida yentlalo yabo;" 
Acts17:27 ukuze bafune inkosi, ukuba ngaba bangati bayiputaputele bayifumane, nakuba ingekude kuti sonke;" 
Acts17:28 ngokuba kukuyo sihleli, sishukuma, sibako, njengokuba nentlabeli ezitile zakowenu zitshilo ukuti: Ngokuba siyinzalo yake nati." 
Acts17:29 Ngako siyinzalo katixo nje, asifanele ukuti oku butixo kunjengegolide, nesilivere, nelitye, into eziqingqiweyo ngobuncibi nangeqinga labantu." 
Acts17:30 Lomaxesha okungazi ke utixo ewanyamezele nje, uti kaloku ayalele bonke abantu kuzo zonke indawo ukuba baguquke." 
Acts17:31 Ngokokuba emisile umhla, okungawo uya kugweba ilizwe ngobulungisa, ngendoda ayibaluleyo, ebenzele bonke isiqiniso ngokuyivusa kwabafileyo." 
Acts17:32 Kekaloku bakuva ngako ukuvuka kwabafileyo, abanye babehleka; kodwa abanye bati: Sobuya sikuve ngale ndawo." 
Acts17:33 Ngokunjalo ke wemka u‐Paulusi pakati kwabo. 
Acts17:34 Kodwa amadoda atile anamatela kuye, akolwa; ekwako pakati kwawo u‐Diyonisi um‐Aripago, nomfazi ogama lingu‐Damarise, nabanye kunye nabo." 
Acts18:1 EMVENI kwezizinto ke, wemka u‐Paulusi e‐Atenesi, weza e‐Korinte;" 
Acts18:2 wafumana kona um‐Juda otile ogama lingu‐Akwila, owase‐Pontusi ngokuzalwa, esand’ ukuvela e‐Yitaliya, no‐Pirisila umfazi wake, (ngenxa yokuba bekuyalelwe ngu‐Kilodiyusi ukuba onke ama‐Juda emke e‐Roma,) waya kubo;" 
Acts18:3 nangenxa yokuba ubuncibi bake bebunjengobabo, wahlala kubo, wasebenza: ngokuba bebengabenzi bentente ubuncibi babo." 
Acts18:4 Waza wapikisa endlwini yentlanganiso ngesabata zonke, weyisa ama‐Juda nama‐Girike." 
Acts18:5 Naxeshekweni u‐Silasi no‐Timote bebehlile e‐Masedoniya, u‐Paulusi ebenyanzelwa emoyeni wake, enqi̔nisela ama‐Juda ukuba u‐Yesu unguye u‐Kristu." 
Acts18:6 Kodwa eca̔sa wona, egxeka nokugxeka, wavutulula izivato zake, wati kuwo: Igazi lenu malibe pezu kwezenu intloko; ndimsulwa mna; ndoti emveni kwakaloku nje ndiye kubaheyideni." 
Acts18:7 Waza wesuka kona, waya wangena endlwini y omntu otile ogama lingu‐Yusitusi, obebedesha utixo, ondlu ibibandakanyene nendlu yentlanganiso." 
Acts18:8 Wati ke u‐Krisipo, umpati wendlu yentlanganiso, wakolwa kwinkosi kunye nayo yonke indlu yake; nabaninzi bakuwo ama‐Korinte besiva babekolwa, babapitizeshwa." 
Acts18:9 Yaza yati inkosi ku‐Paulusi ngomboniso ebusuku: Ungoyiki, uz’ utete, ungati cwaka:" 
Acts18:10 ngokuba ndinawe mna, kwaye kungayi kuwelana nawe namnye ukuze akwenzakalise; ngokuba ndinabantu abaninzi kwesisixeko." 
Acts18:11 Wahlala kona ke umnyaka mnye unenyanga ezintandatu, efundisa pakati kwabo ilizwi likatixo." 
Acts18:12 Kekaloku nxa u‐Galiyone ebengumgwebi pezu kwe‐Akaiya, ati ama‐Juda ngentliziyo nye asukela ngaku‐Paulusi, amsa pambi kwesihlalo sokugweba," 
Acts18:13 esiti: Lo uyahenda abantu ukuba babedeshe utixo ngokungalungelene nomteto. 
Acts18:14 Esaza kuvula umlomo u‐Paulusi, wati u‐Galiyone kuma‐Juda: Ukuba kambe ibiyinto esisenzo esingalungileyo umhlaumbi esesobunginingini obukohlakeleyo, nina ma‐Juda! ngekufanelekile ukuba ndininyamezele;" 
Acts18:15 kodwa ukuba ngumbuzo ngawo amazwi, nangamagama, nangomteto wakowenu, wukangeleni ngokwenu; ngokuba ndingafuni ukuba ngumgwebi wezizinto." 
Acts18:16 Waza wawagxota esihlalweni sokugweba. 
Acts18:17 Asuka onke ama‐Girike ambamba u‐Sositene, umpati wendlu yentlanganiso, ambeta ebusweni besihlalo sokugweba: kanti u‐Galiyone ebengakataleli nanye yezizinto." 
Acts18:18 KEKALOKU u‐Paulusi akuba ebesahleli kona imihla yamininzi, wabulisa abazalwana, waselishela e‐Siriya, benaye u‐Pirisila no‐Akwila, egugule intloko yake e‐Kenkriya; ngokuba ebesenzile isibambiso." 
Acts18:19 Waza wafika e‐Efese, wabashiya abo kona. Kodwa yena ngokwake wangena endlwini yentlanganiso, wateta kuma‐Juda." 
Acts18:20 Wati akutandazwa ngawo ukuba alibale ngakumbi kuwo, akavuma;" 
Acts18:21 koko wawabulisayo, wati: Ndifanele kunene ukuba ndiwubambe umtendeleko ozayo e‐Yerusaleme; kodwa ndobuya ndize kuni, evuma utixo. Waza wanduluka e‐Efese." 
Acts18:22 Wati akuba ebefikele e‐Kesareya, wenyuka, wabulisa iṙemente, wehla waya e‐Antiyoki." 
Acts18:23 Waza elenzile ixesha elitile kona, wemka, ecanda ilizwe le‐Galati ne‐Firijiya indawo ngendawo, esomeleza bonke abadisipile." 
Acts18:24 KEKALOKU um‐Juda otile ogama lingu‐Apolosi, owase‐Aletsandriya ngokuzalwa, iciko lokuteta, obenamandla eziba̔lweni, wafika e‐Efese." 
Acts18:25 Yena lo wayefundisiwe indlela yenkosi; owabesiti ezondelele emoyeni, wateta wafundisa ngokuku̔tala izinto ezingayo inkosi, esazana nobapitizesho luka‐Johane lodwa." 
Acts18:26 Wati lo kanjalo waqala ukuteta ngokukalipa endlwini yentlanganise: abati bakuba bebemvile u‐Akwila no‐Pirisila, bamtabatela kubo, bamca̔zela indlela katixo ngokukolisekileyo ngakumbi." 
Acts18:27 Naxeshekweni ebefuna ukuhambela e‐Akaiya, abazalwana baba̔la kubadisipile bakona, ba ba yala ukuba mabamamkele ngembuko: owati akufika, wabanceda kakulu abo bakoliweyo ngalo ufefe:" 
Acts18:28 ngokuba ebewanyela ama‐Juda ngamandla ekuhleni, ebonakalisa ngeziba̔lo ukuba u‐Yesu unguye u‐Kristu." 
Acts19:1 KWAYE kute nxa u‐Apolosi ebeko e‐Korinte, wati u‐Paulusi ecandile izahlulo zasentla, weza e‐Efese: waza efumene kona abadisipile abatile," 
Acts19:2 wati kubo: Namkela umoya oyingcwele nakukolwa kusinina? Bati bona kuye: Aseva nokuba umoya oyingcwele uko na. 
Acts19:3 Waza wati kubo: Nabapitizeshelwa kwinto nina pofu? Bati bona: Kulo ubapitizesho luka‐Johane. 
Acts19:4 Wati ke u‐Paulusi: u‐Johane okunene wabapitizesha ngobapitizesho lwoguquko, esiti ebantwini, mabakolwe kulowo ozayo emva kwake, oko kukuti, ku‐Yesu ongu‐Kristu." 
Acts19:5 Bati bakuva oku babapitizeshelwa egameni lenkosi u‐Yesu. 
Acts19:6 Waza akuba u‐Paulusi ebebekile pezu kwabo izandla zake, weza umoya oyingcwele pezu kwabo; baza bateta ng ezinye inteto, baprofitesha." 
Acts19:7 Abe ke amadoda lawo inani lonke engati alishumi linamabini. 
Acts19:8 Waza wangena endlwini yentlanganiso, wateta ngokukalipa, inyanga zazintatu, epikisa ecenga ngezinto ezingabo ubukumkani bukatixo." 
Acts19:9 Kodwa xeshekweni abatile baba lukuni, bengakolwa, beteta kakubi ngendlela leyo ebusweni bomhlambi, wemka kubo, wahlula abadisipile, epikisa imihla ngemihla esikolweni somntu ongu‐Tirano." 
Acts19:10 Kwaye kusenziwa oku iminyaka yamibini, bada bonke ababemi e‐Asiya beva ilizwi lenkosi u‐Yesu, kwa nama‐Juda nama‐Girike." 
Acts19:11 Kanjako izenzo zamandla ezingenziwa futi wabezenza utixo ngezandla zika‐Paulusi; 
Acts19:12 kwada kwasiwa kwabafayo iqiya nezikaka zivela emzimbeni wake, zaza izifo zesuka kubo, nomoya abakohlakeleyo bapuma kubo." 
Acts19:13 Bati kekaloku abatile bakuwo ama‐Juda azincibi zokufungisa ezihambahambayo, balinga ukubiza igama lenkosi u‐Yesu pezu kwabo babenomoya abakohlakeleyo, besiti: Siyanifungisa u‐Yesu, lowo u‐Paulusi amshumayelayo." 
Acts19:14 Kwabekuko abatile, onyana baka‐Sikeva, um‐Juda, umperisite omkulu, ababekwenza oku."
