Acts19:15 Kodwa wapendula umoya okohlakeleyo wati: u‐Yesu ndiyamazi, no‐Paulusi ndiyamazi kakulu; kodwa nina, ningobanina?" 
Acts19:16 Waza umntu abekuye umoya okohlakeleyo watsibela pezu kwabo, wenza ngamandla kubo, waboyisa, bada besaba kuleyondlu bezé belinyaziwe." 
Acts19:17 Lento ke yazeka kubo bonke ababemi e‐Efese, nakuma‐Juda, nakuma‐Girike; kwaza kwawa ukwoyika pezu kwabo bonke, laye igama lenkosi u‐Yesu belizukiswa." 
Acts19:18 Kanjalo abaninzi babakoliweyo babesiza bevuma betyela izenzo zabo. 
Acts19:19 Bati nento eninzi yabo bazenza izenzo zokunyanga baqokelela incwadi zabo, bazitshisa ebusweni babo bonke: baza babala amanani azo, bafumana ukuba a ngamaqosha esilivere angamawaka amashumi mahlanu." 
Acts19:20 Bekunjalo lakulayo ilizwi lenkosi ngamandla, loyisa." 
Acts19:21 Xeshekweni ke bekugqityelwe ezizinto, wacinga u‐Paulusi emoyeni wake, ukuba woti, akuba ecandile i‐Masedoniya ne‐Akaiya, aye e‐Yerusaleme, esiti: Emveni kwokuba ndiye kona, ndifanele ukubona ne‐Roma." 
Acts19:22 Waza watuma e‐Masedoniya ababini bakubo ababemkonza, u‐Timote no‐Erastusi, walibala yena ngokwake umzuzu e‐Asiya." 
Acts19:23 Kodwa kwesuka ngeloxesha isipitipiti esingencinane ngayo indlela leyo. 
Acts19:24 Ngokuba umntu otile ogama lalingu‐Demetriyusi, umkandi wesilivere, obezenza itempilana zesilivere zo‐Diyana, wabezenzela incibi inzuzo engencinane;" 
Acts19:25 owazibutela ndawonye, nabasebenzi bezinto ezinjalo, wati: Madoda! niyazi kakulu ukuba kungobuncibi obu esinabo ubutyebi betu." 
Acts19:26 Kanjako niyabona, niyeva nokuva, ukuba akukuyo i‐Efese yodwa, kuza kuba kuyo yonke i‐Asiya, u‐Paulusi lo upambukisile abantu abaninzi ngokucenga kwake, esiti abangotixo abo benzwayo ngezandla:" 
Acts19:27 kuze kungabi kukuba lomsebenzi wetu usemgcipekweni ukuza kwaliwa kodwa, koko kanjalo itempile yotixokazi omkulu u‐Diyana isemgcipekweni ukubalwa ngokuba yinto enganto, buti nobukulu bake buze kuci̔twa, lowo yonke i‐Asiya nelizwe limbedeshayo." 
Acts19:28 Kekaloku bakuva oku baba bezele ngumsindo, badanduluka, besiti: Umkulu u‐Diyana wama‐Efese!" 
Acts19:29 Saza isixeko sonke sazaliswa yimpitizelo; basuka bagalelekela endaweni yokubonela ngentliziyo nye, bebate ṙintyi u‐Gayusi no‐Aristariko, ama‐Masedoniya, abapeleki baka‐Paulusi ekuhambeni." 
Acts19:30 Naxeshekweni u‐Paulusi ebenga angangena ebantwini, abadisipile babengamvumeli." 
Acts19:31 Kanjalo nabatile bakubo abapati base‐Asiya, bengabahlobo bake, batuma kuye, bambongoza ukuba makangazilahleli endaweni yokubonela." 
Acts19:32 Kwa njalo ke abanye bebedanduluka ngento etile, nabanye ngento yimbi: ngokuba intlanganiso ibipitizele; baye abaninzi kubo bebengazi ukuba bebebutene ngenxa yanto nina." 
Acts19:33 Bati inxenye bampumisa u‐Aletsandere esihlweleni, emtya̔lela pambili ama‐Juda. Waza u‐Aletsandere wakoba ngesandla, wafuna ukuzitetelela ebantwini." 
Acts19:34 Kodwa bakunakana ukuba ungum‐Juda, kwesuka izwi nye kubo bonke, bedanduluka iyure zanga zambini, besiti: Umkulu u‐Diyana wama‐Efese!" 
Acts19:35 Waza umba̔li wesixeko, akuba esitutuzele isihlwele, wati: Madoda ase‐Efese! nguwupina umntu pofu ongaziyo ukuba isixeko sama‐Efese singumbedeshi wotixokazi omkulu u‐Diyana, now omfanekiso owileyo ezulwini?" 
Acts19:36 Ngako ezizinto zingenakukanyezwa nje, kufanelekile kuni ukuba niti tu, nokuba ningenzi luto ngokunxama kakulu." 
Acts19:37 Ngokuba niwazisile apa amadoda la, engengabo abapangi betempile, engengabo nabagxeki botixokazi wenu." 
Acts19:38 Ukuba ke ngoko u‐Demetriyusi, nencibi ezinaye, banendawo ngakuye umntu, kubanjwa imihla yamatyala, kuko nabagwebi; mabamemane." 
Acts19:39 Kodwa ukuba niyabuza into ngazo zimbi indawo, ziya kulungiswa entlanganisweni elungelene nomteto." 
Acts19:40 Ngokuba sinengozi yokokuba sonikwa ityala ngayo impitimpiti yanamhla, kungeko tuba nje esingati ngalo sipendulele lembutumbutu." 
Acts19:41 Waza etshilo oku wandulula intlanganiso. 
Acts20:1 KEKALOKU emveni kwokuba bekupelile isipitipiti eso, u‐Paulusi wabizela kuye abadisipile, wababulisa, wemka ukuya kuhambela e‐Masedoniya." 
Acts20:2 Wati ezicandile izahlulo ezo, ebayalile ngokuteta okuninzi kanjalo, weza e‐Girike." 
Acts20:3 Kwati akuba efezile inyanga ezintatu kona, enzelwe ingcebo ngama‐Juda nxa abehlalela ukuselishela e‐Siriya, kwavuka iqinga lokuba wobuya nge‐Masedoniya." 
Acts20:4 Kwaye kumpeleka kwada kwase‐Asiya u‐Sopatere wase‐Bereya; nakuma‐Tesalonika, u‐Aristariko no‐Sekondu; no‐Gayusi wase‐Derebe, no‐Timote; nabase‐Asiya, u‐Tikikusi no‐Trofimo." 
Acts20:5 Aba besandulela basilinda e‐Tirowa. 
Acts20:6 Saza tina saselisha e‐Filipi emveni kwemihla yezonka ezingenagwele, seza kubo e‐Tirowa ngentsuku zantlanu; apo sahlala kona intsuku zasixe̔nxe." 
Acts20:7 Kekaloku ngolwokuqala usuku lweveki, nxa abadisipile bebehlanganisene ukuqezula isonka, u‐Paulusi wateta kubo, ehlalela ukusuka ngomso; wabehambisa isiteto sake kwada kwapakati kwobusuku." 
Acts20:8 Kwaye kuko izibane ezininzi enkambilini yapezulu apo bebehlanganisene kona. 
Acts20:9 Yati indodana etile egama lingu‐Yutikusi ebihlala efenstileni, iwelwa butongo obukulu, nxa u‐Paulusi ebeteta kade, yatoba ngobutongo, yawa pantsi kweyesitatu indawo yapezulu, yacolwa ifile." 
Acts20:10 Kodwa ehlile u‐Paulusi, wawa pezu kwayo, wayibamba ngento engqongayo, wati: Ningenzi ingxolo; ngokuba umpefumlo wayo ukuyo." 
Acts20:11 Waza enyukile, eqezule isonka, etyile, encokolile kade kwada kwati qi̔p’ ukusa, wemka ngokunjalo ke." 
Acts20:12 Bati umfana bamzisa ehleli, bonwatyisiwe kakulu." 
Acts20:13 Kodwa tina sandulela saya enqanaweni, saselishela e‐Asosi, apo besifuna ukumtabata u‐Paulusi kona; ngokuba ebezimisele njalo, etanda ngokwake ukuhamba ngenyawo." 
Acts20:14 Naxeshekweni ebehlangene nati e‐Asosi, samtabata seza e‐Mitilene." 
Acts20:15 Saselisha kona ke, saza ng omhla olandelayo safikela malungana ne‐Kiyo, nangomnye umhla safika e‐Samo; sati silibele e‐Tirogiliyone, seza ng omhla olandelayo e‐Milito." 
Acts20:16 Ngokuba u‐Paulusi ebegwebile ukuselisha ngokudlula e‐Efese, ukuze angabi nakuci̔ta ixesha e‐Asiya; ngokuba ebenxama ukuti, ukuba bekusenzeka kuye, abeko e‐Yerusaleme ngomhla wepentekoste." 
Acts20:17 Wati kekaloku e‐Milito watuma e‐Efese, wabiza abadala beṙemente beze kuye." 
Acts20:18 Naxeshekweni babefikile kuye, wati kubo: Niyazi kakulu nina, kutabata kowokuqala umhla endafika ngawo e‐Asiya, ukuba ndati nina ukubako nani lonke eloxesha;" 
Acts20:19 ndikonza inkosi ndinako konke ukutobeka kwentliziyo, nenyembezi ezininzi, namalingwa, lawo ndehlelwa ngawo ngengcebo zama‐Juda:" 
Acts20:20 okokuba andibambanga mva nanye yezozinto ezilungele ukunceda, koko ndishumayele kuni, ndanifundisa, ekuhleni nangezindlu ngezindlu," 
Acts20:21 ndinqi̔nisa nakuma‐Juda nakuma‐Girike, uguquko olungakuye utixo, nokolo olungakuyo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu." 
Acts20:22 Nakaloku, bona ke, nditi ndibotshiwe emoyeni wam ndiye e‐Yerusaleme, ndingazi izinto eziya kundifikela kona;" 
Acts20:23 ndisazi kupela ukuba umoya oyingcwele kuzo zonke izixeko uyanqi̔nisa, esiti izinxibo nembandezelo ziyandilinda." 
Acts20:24 Koko ndingakatali zezizinto nanye, kanjako andibali ubomi bam ngokuba bunqabile kum, ukuze ndifeze uhambo lwam ngovuyo, nobukonzi endabamkelayo kwinkosi u‐Yesu, ukuba ndinqi̔nise ivangeli yofefe lukatixo." 
Acts20:25 Nakaloku, bona ke, ndiyazi ukuba nina nonke, endahambayo pakati kwenu ndishumayela ubukumkani bukatiko, aniyi kubuya nibone ubuso bam." 
Acts20:26 Ngako ndiyaninqi̔nela kulemini yanamhla, ukuba ndimsulwa kulo igazi labo bonke:" 
Acts20:27 ngokuba ndingabambanga mva nanto, ukuba ndibe ndinganishumayezanga lonke icebo likatixo." 
Acts20:28 Zilumkeleni ngoko, kwa nawo wonke umhlambi enimisiweyo abalindi kuwo ngumoya oyingcwele, ukuba niyaluse iṙemente katixo, ayizuzileyo ngelake igazi." 
Acts20:29 Ngokuba ndikwazi oku mna, ukuba kwoti emveni kwokumka kwam kungene incu̔ka ezinzima pakati kwenu, zingayeki umhlambi." 
Acts20:30 Nakuni ngokwenu kwovuka amadoda eteta izinto ezigwenxa, ukuze ar̔ole abadisipile baye emva kwawo." 
Acts20:31 Ngako oko lindani, nikumbule ukuba iminyaka yamitatu, ebusuku nasemini, andapeza ukuyala bonke ngabanye ndinenyembezi." 
Acts20:32 Nokwakaloku nje, bazalwana! ndiyanibekela kutixo nakwilizwi lofefe lwake, konamandla oku n aka, nokunipa ilifa pakati kwabo bonke abenziwe ngcwele." 
Acts20:33 Andinqwenelanga isilivere, negolide, nesivato samntu." 
Acts20:34 Nani ngokwenu niyazi ukuba izandla ezi zikonzile kuzo intswelo zam, nakubo abebenam." 
Acts20:35 Ndinibonisile zonke izinto, ukuba nisebenza ngokunjalo nifanele ukubaxasa abayimilwelwe, nokuwakumbula amazwi enkosi u‐Yesu, ukuba yena wati: Ukupa kutamsanqelekile ngapezu kwokwamkela." 
Acts20:36 Waza akuba ebetshilo oku, waguqa ngamadolo, watandaza kunye nabo bonke." 
Acts20:37 Kwasuka kwabako ukulila okukulu pakati kwabo bonke; baza bawa pezu kwentamo ka‐Paulusi, bamanga," 
Acts20:38 bedandatekile ngokukodwa pezu kwelozwi abelitshilo ukuti, abayi kubuya babone ubuso bake. Bampelekelela ke enqanaweni." 
Acts21:1 Naxeshekweni bekute ukuba sahlukana nabo sanduluka, sati ngqo ukuselisha seza e‐Kose, na ngomhla olandelayo e‐Rodo, sati sisuka kona seza e‐Patara." 
Acts21:2 Saza sifumene inqanawa iwela ukuya e‐Fenisi, sangena sanduluka." 
Acts21:3 Kekaloku kwakubonakala i‐Kiperusi, sayishiya ngasekohlo, saselishela e‐Siriya, safikela emhlabeni e‐Tire: ngokuba bekulapo inqanawa ibiya kutula umtwalo wayo." 
Acts21:4 Saza sakuba sibafumene abadisipile, salibala kona intsuku zasixe̔nxe; ababesiti ku‐Paulusi ngomoya, makanganyukeli e‐Yerusaleme." 
Acts21:5 Sati okuya bekute ukuba sagqibela ukufeza ezontsuku, semka sahamba, besipelekelela bonke, kunye nabafazi nabantwana, kude kwangapandle kwesixeko; saza saguqa ngamadolo elunxwemeni, satandaza." 
Acts21:6 Saza sakuba sibulisene, saya sangena enqanaweni; bati bona babuyela emakayeni abo." 
Acts21:7 Sati ke tina siyigqibele intselisho yetu sivela e‐Tire, seza kufika e‐Tolemayi; saza sibabulisile abazalwana, sahlala kubo umhla wamnye." 
Acts21:8 Nangomnye umhla u‐Paulusi nati babenaye semka seza e‐Kesareya, sangena endlwini ka‐Filipi umvangeli, obengowabasixe̔nxe, sahlala kuye." 
Acts21:9 Yena ke lo ebenentombi zazine, zizintombi zipela, ezaziprofitesha." 
Acts21:10 Kekaloku nxa sibe silibala kona imihla yamininzi, kwehla e‐Judeya umprofite otile ogama lalingu‐Agabusi;" 
Acts21:10 Kekaloku nxa sibe silibala kona imihla yamininzi, kwehla e‐Judeya umprofite otile ogama lalingu‐Agabusi;" 
Acts21:11 weza ke kuti, watabata umbinqo ka‐Paulusi, wabopa ezake izandla nenyawo, wati: Utsho umoya oyingcwele ukuti: Londoda umbinqo lo ungowayo, ama‐Juda aya kwenje njalo ukuyibopa e‐Yerusaleme, aeya kuyinikela ezandleni zabaheyideni." 
Acts21:12 Naxeshekweni sevayo ezizinto, sambongoza tina, kwa nabo balondawo ukuba, makanganyukeli e‐Yerusaleme." 
Acts21:13 Kodwa u‐Paulusi wati ukupendula: Nenza nina nilila nidanisa intliziyo yam? ngokuba mna sendihlalele ukuba ndingabotshwa kodwa, koko nokuba ndifele e‐Yerusaleme, ngenxa yegama lenkosi u‐Yesu." 
Acts21:14 Kekaloku nxa ebengenakweyiswa, sayeka, sisiti: Intando yenkosi mayenziwe." 
Acts21:15 Sati emveni kwezontsuku sabopa impahla yetu, senyukela e‐Yerusaleme." 
Acts21:16 Kwaya n abatile bakubo abadisipile base‐Kesareya kunye nati, bezisa umntu otile, u‐Mnasone wase‐Kiperusi, obekade engumdisipile, ebesiya kuhlala kuye." 
Acts21:17 KEKALOKU sakufika e‐Yerusaleme, abadisipile basamkela ngovuyo." 
Acts21:18 Wati ng omhla olandelayo wangena u‐Paulusi kunye nati ku‐Yakobi; bebeko bonke abadala nabo. 
Acts21:19 Waza akuba ebabulisile, wabalisa ezozinto utixo ubezenzile pakati kwabaheyideni ngobukonzi bake ezinye ngezinye." 
Acts21:20 Bati bona bakuva, bayidumisa inkosi; baza batsho kuye ukuti: Uyabona, mzalwana! ukuba mangapina amawaka ama‐Juda akoliweyo; kanjako onke ayazondelela umteto:" 
Acts21:21 kekaloku atyelwe ngawe ukuba onke ama‐Juda apakati kwabaheyideni uyawafundisa ukupambuka ku‐Mosesi, usiti makangalusi abantwana bawo, makangahambi ngamasiko kanjalo." 
Acts21:22 Kwotiwa nina ngoko? umhlambi ufanele kunene ukuba ubutane; ngokuba beya kuva ukuba ufikile. 
Acts21:23 Yenza ngoko oku sikutsho kuwe: Kuko kuti amadoda amane enesibambiso pezu kwawo; 
Acts21:24 wona la watabate nawe, uzicokise kunye nawo, uwenzelelele ekunikeleni, ukuze azigugule intloko; baze bonke bazi ukuba ezonto batyelwe zona ngawe aziluto, koko ukuba nawe ngokwako uyahamba ngokubamba umteto." 
Acts21:25 Kodwa abaheyideni abakoliweyo sagweba saba̔la ngabo ukuba bangayigcini into enjalo, kupela ukuba balumkele okubingelwe izitixo, negazi, nokuṙwishiweyo, nombulo." 
Acts21:26 Wandula u‐Paulusi wawatabata na ye amadoda lawo, wati ngomhla olandelayo, akuba ezicokisile kunye nawo, wangena etempileni, esazisa ukuzaliseka kwemihla yokucokisa, kwada kwanikelwa umnikelo ngenxa yawo amanye ngamanye." 
Acts21:27 Kekaloku xeshekweni leyomihla isixe̔nxe ibiza kupela, ati ama‐Juda ase‐Asiya, akumbona etempileni, apitizelisa sonke isihlwele, abeka izandla pezu kwake," 
Acts21:28 edanduluka ngokuti: Madoda, bo‐Sirayeli! ncedani. Nguye lo umntu ofundisayo bonke kuzo zonke indawo ngakubo abantu, nomteto, nalendawo; ote nakanjako wangenisa nama‐Girike etempileni, enco̔lisile lendawo engcwele." 
Acts21:29 (Ngokuba ebesel’ ebonile u‐Trofimo um‐Efese esixekweni kunye naye, abebeba u‐Paulusi wamngenisa etempileni.)" 
Acts21:30 Saza savuselelwa isixeko sonke, kwasuka kwabako imbutumbutu yabantu; baza bambamba u‐Paulusi, bamr̔olela pandle kwetempile; zasezivalwa ke ingcango." 
Acts21:31 Kekaloku nxa bebefuna ukumbulala, zafika indaba kwinkosiwaka yebandla, zokuba i‐Yerusaleme yonke ipitizele:" 
Acts21:32 eyati kwa oko yatabata nayo amasodati nenkosikulu, yehla yaya kubo ngokubaleka. Bati bona bakubona inkosiwaka namasodati, bayeka ukubeta u‐Paulusi." 
Acts21:33 Yandula yasondela inkosiwaka yambamba, yaxela ukuba anxitywe ngemixokelelwane emibini; yaza yabuza ukuba angaba ngubanina, nokuba yinto nina ayenzileyo." 
Acts21:34 Kodwa abanye bebememeza ngento etile, nabanye ngento yimbi, pakati kwesihlwele: yaza yakukohlwa kuyazi inyaniso yendawo ngenxa yesipitipiti, yaxela ukuba asiwe elalini yamasodati." 
Acts21:35 Kwaza kwati, xeshekweni wafika pezu kwezinyukelo, watwalwa ngamasodati ngenxa yokunyanzela kwesihlwele:" 
Acts21:36 ngokuba umhlambi wabantu ubulandela, udanduluka ngokuti: Msuse yena!" 
Acts21:37 Waza u‐Paulusi esakungeniswa elalini yamasodati wati kwinkosiwaka: Ndingateta into kuwe kusinina? Yati ke yona: Uyakwazi ukuteta ngesi‐Girike na? 
Acts21:38 akunguye na kambe lowam‐Jipete owati ngapambili kwezintsuku wenza impitimpiti, wakokela ngasentlango lomadoda amawaka mane abengabagwazi?" 
Acts21:39 Kodwa wati u‐Paulusi: Mna ndingumntu ongum‐Juda, um‐Tarese, umhlali wesixeko esingesesingenaludumo sase‐Silisiya: ndiyakukunga ke, ndivumele ukuba nditete kubo abantu." 
Acts21:40 Kekaloku yakuba imvumele, u‐Paulusi, emi pezu kwezinyukelo, wakoba ngesandla ebantwini. Kwati kwakutwa cwaka kakulu, wateta kubo ngokuteta kwama‐Hebere, esiti:" 
Acts22:1 Madoda, bazalwana nobawo! yivani ukuzitetelela kwam endikuteta kuni ngoku." 
Acts22:2 (Babesitike bakuva ukuba uyateta kubo ngokuteta kwama‐Hebere, bati tu ngakumbi; waza wati:)" 
Acts22:3 Mna ke ndiyindoda engum‐Juda, ndizalelwe e‐Tarese yase‐Silisiya, kodwa ndondlelwe kwisixeko esi ngasezinyaweni zika‐Gamaliyeli, ndifundiswe ngesiko elizalisekileyo lomteto wobawo betu, ndizondelela utixo, njengokuba nina nonke ninjalo namhla:" 
Acts22:4 endite lendlela ndayitshutshisa kwada kwasekufeni, ndinxiba ndinikela ezintolongweni namadoda namankazana;" 
Acts22:5 njengokuba nomperisite omkulu endinqi̔nela, nayo yonke intlanganiso yabadala; endandisamkela kubo nencwadi ziba̔l elwe abazalwana, ndahambela e‐Damakusi, ukuya kuzisa nabo abebekona benxityiwe e‐Yerusaleme, ukuze babetwe." 
Acts22:6 Kwaye kute, nxa ndibe ndihamba, ndisondela e‐Damakusi ngasemini enkulu, kwati benge ngokwalama inkanyiso enkulu ivela ezulwini indingqonga." 
Acts22:7 Ndaza ndawa ngasemhlabeni, ndeva ilizwi lisiti kum: Saulusi, Saulusi! uyanditshutshisela nina?" 
Acts22:8 Ndati ke mna ukupendula: Ungubanina, Nkosi? Yaza yati kum: Mna ndingu‐Yesu um‐Nazarete, lowo umtshutshisayo." 
Acts22:9 Kekaloku abo babenam bayibona okunene inkanyiso, boyika ke; kodwa ilizwi lalowo ubeteta kum abaliva." 
Acts22:10 Ndaza ndati: Ndiya kwenza nto nina, Nkosi? Yayisiti inkosi kum: Suka, uye e‐Damakusi; wauya kutyelwa apo ngazo zonke ezonto umiselwe ukuzenza." 
Acts22:11 Naxeshekweni bendingenakubona ngenxa yobungcwalisa benkanyiso leyo, ndati nditundezwa ngesandla ngabo ababeko nam, ndeza e‐Damakusi." 
Acts22:12 Waza u‐Hananiya otile, indoda ebedeshekileyo ngokwomteto, inqi̔nelwa kakuhle ngawo onke ama‐Juda abehlala kona," 
Acts22:13 weza kum, wema kufupi, wati kum: Mzalwana Saulusi! yamkela ukubona kwako. Ndaza ndati kwa ngeloxeshana ndakangela ngakuye." 
Acts22:14 Waza wati yena: Utixo wobawo betu wamisela wena pambili ukuyazi intando yake, nokumbona olungileyo, nokuliva ilizwi livela emlonyeni wake:" 
Acts22:15 ngokuba uya kuba linqi̔na lake kubo bonke abantu, ngezozinto uzibonileyo nozivileyo." 
Acts22:16 Nakaloku ulibala nganina? suka, ubapitizeshwe, uhlanzwe ezonweni zako, ubiza egameni lenkosi." 
Acts22:17 Kwaza kwati, ndakuba ndibuye ndeza e‐Yerusaleme, nanxa benditandaza etempileni, ndandikulo ipupaṙa," 
Acts22:18 ndabona yona isiti kum: Nxama, upume kamsinya e‐Yerusaleme; ngokuba bengayi kwamkela ukunqi̔na kwako ngam." 
Acts22:19 Ndati ke mna: Nkosi! bayazi bona kakulu ukuba ndibe ndibafaka entolongweni, ndabatyabula kuzo zonke izindlu zentlanganiso, abo babekolwa kuwe:" 
Acts22:20 naxeshekweni belipalazwa igazi lika‐Stefane inqi̔na lako, ndibe ndimi kona kwa nam, ndatakazela ukubulawa kwake, ndazigcina ingubo zabo ababembulala." 
Acts22:21 Yaza yati kum: Hamba; ngokuba ndiya kukutuma kude, ukuya kubaheyideni." 
Acts22:22 Kekaloku bebempulapula kwada kwalelilizwi; baza bapakamisa ilizwi labo, besiti: Msuse emhlabeni onjalo! ngokuba kungafanelekile ukuba adle ubomi." 
Acts22:23 Nxa ke bebedanduluka, belahla ingubo zabo, beposa utuli ngasesibakabakeni," 
Acts22:24 yaxela inkosiwaka ukuba angeniswe elalini yamasodati, yati makaṙoṙonywe ngokubetwa, ukuze iqonde ituba ababememeza kangaka ngakuye ngenxa yalo." 
Acts22:25 Kodwa bakumolulela pambili ngentambo, wati u‐Paulusi kwi nkosikulu ebimi kona: Umntu ongum‐Roma, ongagwetywanga kanjalo, nivunyelwa ukumbeta kusinina?" 
Acts22:26 Yati inkosikulu yakuva oko, yaya yashumayela kwinkosiwaka, isiti: Lumka into uza kuyenza; ngokuba umntu lo engum‐Roma." 
Acts22:27 Yasuka yeza inkosiwaka yati kuye: Ndixelele, ungum‐Roma kusinina? Wati yena: Ewe." 
Acts22:28 Yaza yati inkosiwaka ukupendula: Mna ubuzwe obu ndabuzuza ngenani elikulu lemali. Wati u‐Paulusi: Kodwa mna ndizelwe ndikwa nabo. 
Acts22:29 Kwandula kwa oko kwesuka kuye abo babeza kumṙoṙonya. Kanjako inkosiwaka nayo yoyika, yakuqonda ukuba ungum‐Roma, nangokuba ibimnxibile." 
Acts22:30 Yati ngomnye umhla, ifuna ukuyazi inyaniso yendawo, ukuba uyanikwa ityala ngama‐Juda nganina, yamkulula izinxibo, yaxela ukuba mabeze abaperisite abakulu nayo yonke intlanganiso yamapakati yawo; yaza imhlisile u‐Paulusi yammisa pakati kwabo." 
Acts23:1 Waza u‐Paulusi, ete nama amehlo entlanganisweni, wati: Madoda, bazalwana! mna ukuzipata kwam ndikwenzile pambi kwotixo ngako konke ukuzazela okulungileyo kwada kwayiyo lemini." 
Acts23:2 Waza umperisite omkulu, u‐Hananiya, wabayalela abo babemi kufupi kuye ukuba bambete emlonyeni." 
Acts23:3 Wandula u‐Paulusi wati kuye: Utixo uza kubeta wena, ludonga oluqatyiweyo ngobumhlope! uti wena uhlale na undigweba ngokwomteto, uze ugqita emtetweni uxele ukuba ndibetwe?" 
Acts23:4 Baza abo babemi kufupi bati: Umperisite omkulu katixo uyamtuka na? 
Acts23:5 Wayesiti u‐Paulusi: Bendingazi, bazalwana! ukuba ungumperisite omkulu; ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Umpati wabantu bako akuyi kuteta kakubi ngaye." 
Acts23:6 Kodwa akunakana u‐Paulusi ukuba esinye isahlulo sisesabasadusi, nesinye sesabafarisi, wadanduluka entlanganisweni, esiti: Madoda, bazalwana! mna ndingumfarisi, unyana womfarisi; kungenxa yetemba novuko lwabafileyo endimenywayo." 
Acts23:7 Kwati kwakuba etshilo oku, kwesuka ungxolisano pakati kwabafarisi nabasadusi, waza wahluleka umhlambi." 
Acts23:8 Ngokuba abasadusi besiti akuko luvuko, akuko kwa nengelosi nomoya; kodwa abafarisi bayavuma ezonto zombini." 
Acts23:9 Kwaza kwabako ingxolo enkulu; bati ababa̔li besahlulo sabafarisi besuka, bapika, besiti: Asifumani nto ekohlakeleyo kulomntu; kodwa ukuba kutete umoya kuye, umhlaumbi ingelosi, masingalwi notixo." 
Acts23:10 Kwati kwakubako ungxolisano olukulu, inkosiwaka isoyika ukuba ngabi u‐Paulusi woqwengwa ngabo, yaxela ukuba umkosi uhle umhlasele kwa pakati kwabo, umngenise elalini yamasodati." 
Acts23:11 Kekaloku ngobusuku obulandelayo yema inkosi ngakuye, yati: Yomelela, Paulusi! ngokuba, njengokuba uzinqi̔nisile izinto ezingam e‐Yerusaleme, kwa njalo ufanele ukunqi̔na nase‐Roma." 
Acts23:12 Kwati kwakuba kusile, abatile bakuma‐Juda benza ucebelano, bazibambisa ngesiqalekiso, besiti abayi kutya, abayi kusela kanjalo, bade babulale u‐Paulusi." 
Acts23:13 Babe ke bengapezu kwamashumi mane abo babeyenzile lembambisano; 
Acts23:14 abezayo kubaperisite abakulu nakubadala, bati: Sizibambisile ngesiqalekiso esikulu, ukuba asiyi kuva nto side sibulale u‐Paulusi." 
Acts23:15 Ngako kaloku nina, kunye nentlanganiso yamapakati, bikelani inkosiwaka okokuba imhlisele kuni ngomso, ngokungati niza kuzigongxa ngokukolisa ngakumbi izinto ezingaye; nati ke, engekezi kufupi yena, silungile ukuba simbulale." 
Acts23:16 Kodwa akuva unyana wodade bo‐Paulusi ukulalela kwabo, waya kona wangena elalini yamasodati, washumayeza u‐Paulusi." 
Acts23:17 Waza u‐Paulusi wabiza enye yazo inkosikulu, wati: Yisa indodana le kwinkosiwaka; ngokuba inento etile ukuyishumayela kuyo." 
Acts23:18 Kwa njalo ke yayitabata nayo yayisa kwinkosiwaka, yati: Umbanjwa u‐Paulusi wandibiza, watandaza ukuba lendodana ndiyise kuwe, inento etile ukuyiteta kuwe." 
Acts23:19 Yaza inkosiwaka yayibamba ngesandla, yaya nayo ecaleni ngasese, yabuza ngokuti: Yinto nina onayo ukuyishumayela kum?" 
Acts23:20 Yati ke: Ama‐Juda avumelene ukucela kuwe, okokuba u‐Paulusi umhlisele entlanganisweni yamapakati ngomso, ngokungati aza kubuza into ngaye ngokukolisa ngakumbi." 
Acts23:21 Wena ngoko ungateleli kuwo: ngokuba kulalela yena kuwo, amadoda angapezu kwamashumi mane, azibambisileyo ngesiqalekiso ukuba akayi kutya, akayi kusela kanjalo, ade ambulale u‐Paulusi: nakaloku alungile, elinda isitembiso kuwe." 
Acts23:22 Yandula inkosiwaka yayindulula indodana leyo, i yi yalele ngokuti: Ungatyeli mntu ukuba ezizinto uzibikile kum." 
Acts23:23 Yaza yabiza inkosikulu ezitile zambini, yati: Lungisani amasodati abe makulu mabini, ukuze ahambe ukuya e‐Kesareya, nabakweli bamahashe babe mashumi asixe̔nxe, nabapete intshuntshe babe makulu mabini, kweyesitatu iyure yobusuku;" 
Acts23:24 nize ni ba bekele amahashe, ukuze bamkwelise u‐Paulusi pezu kwawo, bamzise egcinekile ku‐Felitse inkosi." 
Acts23:25 Yaba̔la incwadi inokukutsho: 
Acts23:26 U‐Kilodiyusi Lisiyasi kuyo inkosi edumileyo kakulu u‐Felitse, ebulisa." 
Acts23:27 Lendoda ibanjiwe ngama‐Juda nje, iza kubulawa ngawo kanjalo, nda wa baqa nomkosi, ndayihlangula, ndiqondile ukuba ingum‐Roma." 
Acts23:28 Ndati ndifuna ukulazi ituba abeyinika ityala ngenxa yalo, ndayihlisela entlanganisweni yamapakati yawo:" 
Acts23:29 endayifumana inikwa ityala ngayo imibuzo yomteto wawo, kodwa ingabekelwa ityala lanto efanele ukufa nezinxibo." 
Acts23:30 Kwati kwakuxelwa kum ukuba bekusenziwa ingcebo ngakuyo lendoda ngama‐Juda, ndasuka ndatuma kuwe, ndiyalele nabamnika ityala ukuba batete izinto abanazo ngakuye pambi kwako. Hlala kuhle." 
Acts23:31 Kwa njalo ke amasodati, njengoko kuwamiselweyo, amtabata u‐Paulusi, amsa ngobusuku e‐Antipatrisi." 
Acts23:32 Ati ngomnye umhla, ebashiyele abakweli bamahashe ukuhamba naye, abuyela elalini yamasodati." 
Acts23:33 Bati abo bakufika e‐Kesareya, banikela incwadi kwinkosi, babeka no‐Paulusi pambi kwayo." 
Acts23:34 Yaza inkosi yakuba ileseshile incwadi leyo, yabuza ukuba ungowelipina ilizwana. Yandula yakuqonda ukuba ungowase‐Silisiya," 
Acts23:35 yati: Ndokolisa ukukuva, okuya bafikileyo nabakunika ityala. Yaza yaxela ukuba agcinwe endlwini yobukosi ka‐Herodi." 
Acts24:1 KEKALOKU emveni kwemihla emihlanu, kwehla umperisite omkulu u‐Hananiya kunye nabadala nomteteleli otile u‐Tetulusi, abati bona bamangala kwinkosi ngakuye u‐Paulusi." 
Acts24:2 Wati akubizwa, waqala u‐Tetulusi ukumnika ityala, esiti: Ukuba sizuza uxolo olukulu ngawe, nokuba izenzo ezincedayo kakuhle zisenzelwa uhlanga olu ngokwazalelela kwako," 
Acts24:3 ngamaxesha onke, nakuzo zonke indawo, siyakwamkela ngembuko, Felitse odumileyo kakulu! sinokubulela konke." 
Acts24:4 Kodwa ukuze ndingenzi kade ukukutintela, ndiyakubongoza ukuba usive ngokufutshane ngabo ububele bako." 
Acts24:5 Ngokuba sifumene indoda le ing umfo olinginingini, novuselela impitimpiti pakati kwawo onke ama‐Juda akulo lonke ilizwe, nomkokeli omkulu wolwahlukano lwaba‐Nazarete:" 
Acts24:6 ote kanjako walinga ukuyinco̔lisa itempile; esati tina sambamba, safuna ukumgweba ngokwowetu umteto." 
Acts24:7 Kodwa u‐Lisiyasi inkosiwaka wa si zuma, wa m susa ezandleni zetu ngamandla amakulu," 
Acts24:8 eyalela abamnika ityala ukuba beze pambi kwako: ongati wena ngokwako uqonde kuye ngoku m buza zonke ezizinto esimnika ityala ngazo. 
Acts24:9 Avuma ke nama‐Juda, esitsho ukuti ezizinto ziba njalo." 
Acts24:10 Waza wati u‐Paulusi ukupendula, nxa inkosi ibikobile kuye ukuba atete: Ndisazi kakulu nje ukuba kuminyaka mininzi ungumgwebi kuhlanga olu, ndiyazipendulela ngokucwayita ngakumbi:" 
Acts24:11 ngokuba ungaba nokuqonda ukuba intsuku zam azipezu kwezilishumi linambini, kuseloko ndenyukayo ukuya kubedesha e‐Yerusaleme." 
Acts24:12 Abandifumana ke nakuyo itempile ndipikisana nomntu, umhlaumbi ndisenza imvukelano yesihlwele, nakuzo izindlu zentlanganiso, nasesixekweni:" 
Acts24:13 kanjako abangevelise izizatu ngezozinto abandinika ityala ngazo ngoku. 
Acts24:14 Kodwa oku ndiyakuxela kuwe, ukuba ngokwendlela abati bona lulwahlukano, kwa ngokunjalo ndiyamkonza utixo wobawo bam, ndikolwa zizinto zonke eziba̔liweyo emtetweni nakubaprofite;" 
Acts24:15 ndinetemba ngakuye utixo, abati naba ngokwabo balivumele, lokuba kuya kubako ukuvuka kwabafileyo, kwa nokwabalungileyo nokwabangalungileyo." 
Acts24:16 Nangako oku ndiyaziqelisa, ukuba ndibe nokuzazela okungenetyala lanto ngakuye utixo na ngakubo abantu ngamaxa onke." 
Acts24:17 Kekaloku emveni kweminyaka emininzi, ndafika ukuba ndizise amalizo kuhlanga lwam, nokuba ndinikele iminikelo:" 
Acts24:18 abati pakati kwezizinto bandifumana ndicokisiwe etempileni, kungeko sihlwele, kungeko nesipitipiti, bebengengabo aba, bebengama‐Juda atile ase‐Asiya," 
Acts24:19 afanele ukubako apa pambi kwako, noku ndi nika ityala, ukuba anendawo ngakum." 
Acts24:20 Okanye aba ngokwabo mabatsho, ukuba bafumana ukwenza okungalungileyo kum, nxa bendimi pambi kwentlanganiso yamapakati," 
Acts24:21 ngapandle kwokungalo elilizwi linye, endalibizayo ndimi pakati kwabo: Kungenxa yovuko lwabafileyo endimenywayo nini namhla nje." 
Acts24:22 Waza u‐Felitse akuva oku, ezazi izinto ezingayo indlela leyo ngokukolisa ngakumbi, wabalibazisa, wati: Okuya u‐Lisiyasi inkosiwaka ahlele apa, ndiya kuncamisa ukubuza indawo ezipakati kwenu." 
Acts24:23 Kanjako wayalela inkosikulu ukuba kugcinwe u‐Paulusi, abe nokukululeka kodwa, nokuba ingaleli namnye wabake uku m konza nokuza kuye." 
Acts24:24 Nasemveni kwemihla etile, akufika u‐Felitse kunye no‐Drusila umfazi wake, obengum‐Judakazi, wammemela kuye u‐Paulusi, wamva ngalo ukolo olungakuye u‐Kristu." 
Acts24:25 Naxeshekweni ebeteta ngabo ubulungisa, nobunca̔tu, nokugwetywa okuza kubako, wanokwoyika u‐Felitse, wati ukupendula: Hamba okwakaloku nje; nxa ke ixesha elifanelekileyo ndilizuzileyo, ndokubiza uze kum." 
Acts24:26 Ebetemba kanjako kunye noko, ukuba uya kupiwa imali ngu‐Paulusi, ukuze amkulule: ngako ebemmemela kuye kwa futi ngakumbi, wancokola naye." 
Acts24:27 Kodwa kwakuzaliseka iminyaka yamibini, walandelwa u‐Felitse ebukosini ngu‐Porokiyo Festusi: waza u‐Felitse, efuna ukuzizuzela imibulelo yama‐Juda, wamshiya u‐Paulusi enxityiwe." 
Acts25:1 WANDULA u‐Festusi akuba engene elizwaneni lake, wati emveni kwemihla mitatu wenyuka e‐Kesareya waya e‐Yerusaleme." 
Acts25:2 Kwaza kwamangala kuye umperisite omkulu nabakulu bakuma‐Juda ngaku‐Paulusi, bambongoza," 
Acts25:3 becela into yofefe ngakuye, yokokuba ammemele e‐Yerusaleme, besenza isilalelo endleleni ukumbulala." 
Acts25:4 Kuloko wapendula u‐Festusi, ukuba u‐Paulusi usekugcinweni e‐Kesareya, nokuba yena ngokwake uza kumka kamsinya ukuya kona." 
Acts25:5 Mabati ngoko abanamandla pakati kwenu, watsho ke, behlele kona kunye na m, bayinike ityala indoda le, ukuba kuko into esisono kuyo." 
Acts25:6 Kekaloku akuba ebehleli pakati kwabo imihla engepezu kweshumi, wehla waya e‐Kesareya; waza ngomnye umhla, ehleli pantsi esihlalweni sokugweba, waxela ukuba u‐Paulusi aziswe." 
Acts25:7 Wati akufika, ema ama‐Juda abehlile e‐Yerusaleme ngokungqonga, ebeka amatyala amaninzi anzima ngakuye u‐Paulusi, abekohlwa ukuwaqinisa ngezizatu;" 
Acts25:8 esiti yena ukuzipendulela: Nangakuwo umteto wama‐Juda, nangakuyo itempile, nangakuye u‐Kesare, andonanga nento." 
Acts25:9 Kodwa u‐Festusi, efuna ukuzizuzela imbuko yama‐Juda, wapendula u‐Paulusi, wati: Uyavuma na ukunyukela e‐Yerusaleme, ukuba ubuzwe kona ngezizinto pambi kwam?" 
Acts25:10 Waza wati u‐Paulusi: Ndimi ngasesihlalweni sokugweba sika‐Kesare, apo ndifanele ukubuzwa kona: ama‐Juda andiwenzelanga nto, njengokuba usazi nawe kunene." 
Acts25:11 Ngokuba mna ukuba ndiyenza ngokungalungileyo, nokuba ndenze into efanele ukufa, andizilanduleli ukuba ndingafi; kodwa ukuba akuko nanye yezozinto aba bandinika ityala ngazo, akuko mntu ongandinikelayo kubo. Ndiyamangala ku‐Kesare." 
Acts25:12 Wandula u‐Festusi, akuba ebetetene namapakati ake, wapendula, esiti: Umangele ku‐Kesare na? uya kuya kwa ku‐Kesare." 
Acts25:13 Kekaloku kwakuba kudlulile imihla etile, ukumkani u‐Agiripa no‐Berenike bafika e‐Kesareya ukuza kubulisa u‐Festusi." 
Acts25:14 Naxeshekweni bebelibele kona imihla yamininzi, u‐Festusi wambalisela ukumkani indawo zika‐Paulusi, esiti: Kuko indoda etile eshiyiwe ngu‐Felitse ingumbanjwa;" 
Acts25:15 abati abaperisite abakulu nabadala bama‐Juda, nxa ndandise‐Yerusaleme, bamangala ngayo, becela umgwebo ngakuyo:" 
Acts25:16 endati kubo ukupendula: Asi lisiko kuma‐Roma ukunikela umntu ekububeni, engekati lowo unikwa ityala abe nokubonana nabo bamnikayo ityala, aze azuze ituba lokuzitetelela ngento abekelwa ityala ngayo." 
Acts25:17 Ngako bakuba bebebutele apa, ndingenzanga kulibala ke, ndati ng omhla olandelayo ndahlala esihlalweni sokugweba, ndaxela ukuba iziswe indoda leyo:" 
Acts25:18 abati abaniki betyala bakuma, abavelisa ngakuye nalinye ityala ngezozinto endibe ndizizindlela mna;" 
Acts25:19 kodwa bebenemibuzo etile ngakuye ngalo ubedesho lwakowabo, nangaye otile u‐Yesu obefile, abesitsho u‐Paulusi ukuti uhleli." 
Acts25:20 Ndati kekaloku mna nditandabuzela umbuzo ngako oku, ndabuza kuye ukuba ebenga angaya e‐Yerusaleme na, abuzwe kona ngezindawo." 
Acts25:21 Kodwa akumangala u‐Paulusi ukuba agcinelwe ukugweba kuka‐Auguste, ndaxela ukuba agcinwe ndide ndimtume ku‐Kesare." 
Acts25:22 Waza u‐Agiripa wati ku‐Festusi: Bendinganga nam ndingamva umntu lowo ngokwam. Wati yena: Ngomso uya kumva. 
Acts25:23 Kwandula kwati ngomnye umhla, nxa afikileyo u‐Agiripa no‐Berenike ngenkazimlo enkulu, nanxa bangenileyo endlwini yokupulapulela, kunye nenkosiwaka namadoda amakulu asesixekweni, kwaziswa u‐Paulusi ngokuxela kuka‐Festusi." 
Acts25:24 Waza wati u‐Festusi: Kumkani Agiripa, nani nonke madoda akoyo nati! niyabona lo mntu, ote wonke umhlambi wama‐Juda wanditandaza ngaye, nase‐Yerusaleme nalapa, edanduluka ukuti ange engabi esadla ubomi." 
Acts25:25 Kodwa ndakuqiqa mna ukuba akenzanga nto efanele ukufa, naye yena ngokwake kanjalo emangele ku‐Kesare nje, ndagweba ukuba ndiya kumtuma:" 
Acts25:26 endingenandawo eqinileyo ukuyiba̔la ngaye enkosini yam. Ngako ndimvelisele pambi kwenu, nangokukodwa pambi kwako, Kumkani Agiripa! ukuze nditi, nxa kwenziwe ukubuza oku, ndibe nento ukuyiba̔la." 
Acts25:27 Ngokuba kum kunga kuyinto engafanelekileyo, ukuba kutunywe umbanjwa, kungaziswa namatyala amiswayo ngakuye." 
Acts26:1 Waza u‐Agiripa wati ku‐Paulusi: Uvunyelwa ukuba uzitetele. Wandula u‐Paulusi wolula isandla, wazipendulela, esiti:" 
Acts26:2 Ndiba ndinetamsanqa, kumkani Agiripa! ukuba ndiya kuzipendulela pambi kwako namhla, ngenxa yezinto zonke endinikwa ityala ngazo ngama‐Juda:" 
Acts26:3 ngokukodwa, kuba usazana nawo onke amasiko namabuzo apakati kwama‐Juda: ngako ndiyakukunga ukuba undive ngokunyamezela." 
Acts26:4 Kekaloku ukuhlala kwam kutabata ebutsheni bam, okwabako kwa sekuqaleni pakati kwohlanga lwam e‐Yerusaleme, ayakwazi onke ama‐Juda;" 
Acts26:5 abenokundazi ngapambili kanye, ukuba ebevuma ukunqi̔na, okokuba ngokwohlobo lwembedesho yetu oluzalisekileyo kuzo zonke ndahlala ndingumfarisi." 
Acts26:6 Nakaloku ndimi ndibuzwa pezu kwetemba lesibambiso esenzelwa obawo ngutixo; 
Acts26:7 eziti izizwe zetu ezilishumi linazibini, zikonza uTixo ngokunyameka emini nasebusuku, zitembele ukusizuza: enditi ngenxa yelotemba, kumkani Agiripa! ndinikwe ityala ngama‐Juda." 
Acts26:8 Yinina? kutwa na nini ukuti yinto ekungekolwe yiyo, ukuba utixo uyavusa abafileyo?" 
Acts26:9 Kwa njalo ke mna ngokwam ndaba ndinge ndisenza izinto ezininzi ezica̔sene negama lika‐Yesu wase‐Nazarete: 
Acts26:10 endite oko kanjako ndakwenza e‐Yerusaleme; ewe abaninzi bakubo abangcwele ndabavalela ezintolongweni, ndilamkele igunya kubaperisite abakulu; naxeshekweni bebebulawa, ndanika ilizwi lam ngakubo." 
Acts26:11 Nakuzo zonke izindlu zentlanganiso, ndibabeta futi nje, ndibe ndi ba nyanzela ukugxeka; kanjalo ndibababamela kakulukazi ke, ndibe ndi ba tshutshisa kwada kwakuzo nezixeko ezingapandle." 
Acts26:12 Endandite pakati kwezizinto, nxa bendihambela e‐Damakusi ndinegunya nomyalezo kubo abaperisite abakulu," 
Acts26:13 emini enkulu, kumkani! ndabona endleleni inkanyiso ivela ezulwini, ngapezu kwokukazimla kwelanga, ikanya ngakum nangakubo abebehamba nam ngokungqonga." 
Acts26:14 Kekaloku sakuba siwile pantsi sonke emhlabeni, ndeva ilizwi liteta kum lisiti nokuti ngokuteta kwama‐Hebere: Saulusi, Saulusi! uyanditshutshisela nina? kunzima kuwe ukukaba ngasezihlabeni." 
Acts26:15 Ndaza ndati mna: Ungubanina, Nkosi? Yayisiti yona: Mna ndingu‐Yesu, lowo umtshutshisayo." 
Acts26:16 Kodwa suka, ume ngenyawo zako: ngokuba ndibonakalele oku kuwe, ukuba ndikumisele ube ngumkonzi nenqi̔na, nangezozinto uzibonileyo, nangezo endiya kubonakala kuwe kuzo;" 
Acts26:17 ndikuhlangula ebantwini nasebaheyidenini, endikutuma kubo kaloku;" 
Acts26:18 ukuba uvule amehlo abo, ukuze baguquke ebumnyameni bangene ekukanyeni, nasemandleni ka‐Satane beze kutixo, ukuze bamkele ukuxolelwa kwezono, nelifa pakati kwabenziwe ngcwele, ngalo ukolo olungakum." 
Acts26:19 Kukona, kumkani Agiripa! ndandingenakungeva esosibonakaliso sasezulwini;" 
Acts26:20 koko ndandishumayela kubo abase‐Damakusi kuqala, nase‐Yerusaleme, napakati kwalo lonke ilizwe le‐Judeya, nakubaheyideni, ukuba bagqoboke, baguqukele kutixo, besenza imisebenzi eyelelana nogqoboko." 
Acts26:20 koko ndandishumayela kubo abase‐Damakusi kuqala, nase‐Yerusaleme, napakati kwalo lonke ilizwe le‐Judeya, nakubaheyideni, ukuba bagqoboke, baguqukele kutixo, besenza imisebenzi eyelelana nogqoboko." 
Acts26:21 Abesiti ama‐Juda ngenxa yezizinto, endibambile etempileni, alinga uku ndi bulala." 
Acts26:22 Ngako ndizuzile usizo kutixo nje, ndisemi kwada kwayimini le, ndinqi̔na nakuye omncinane nakuye omkulu, ndingateti nanye into ngapandle kwezo ababete nabaprofite no‐Mosesi ziya kubako;" 
Acts26:23 ukuba u‐Kristu ufanele ukuva intlungu, ukuba woba ngowokuqala kwabavuka kubafileyo, ashumayele ukanyiso kubo abantu nakubo abaheyideni." 
Acts26:24 Kekaloku nxa abezipendulela njalo, wati u‐Festusi ngelizwi elikulu: Uyageza, Paulusi! ufundo oluninzi luyakugezisa." 
Acts26:25 Kodwa yena wati: Andigezi, Festusi odumileyo kakulu! koko ndiwapimisela amazwi enyaniso nawentelekelelo:" 
Acts26:26 ngokuba ukumkani esazi kakulu ngazo ezizinto, enditeta kuye kanjalo ngokukalipa: ngokuba ndinokukolwa kukuba akafihlelwa nanye yezizinto; ngokuba oku kungenziwanga egumbini." 
Acts26:27 Uyakolwa ngabaprofite na, kumkani Agiripa? Ndiyazi ukuba uyakolwa ngabo." 
Acts26:28 Waza u‐Agiripa wati ku‐Paulusi: Upantsi kundicenga ukuba ndibe ngum‐Kristu. 
Acts26:29 Wati u‐Paulusi: Ngendinqwena kutixo, ukuba, nangokupantsi nangokukanye, kungabi nguwe wedwa, kube ngabo bonke abandivayo namhla, babe benjalo njengokuba ndinjalo nam, kupela izinxibo ezi zingabiko." 
Acts26:30 Kwati kwakuba ekutshilo oku, wesuka ukumkani, nenkosi, no‐Berenike, nababehleli nabo." 
Acts26:31 Baza bakuba beye ecaleni, bateta omnye kwomnye, besiti: Lomntu akenzi nto efanele ukufa nezinxibo." 
Acts26:32 Waza u‐Agiripa wati ku‐Festusi: Lomntu ange ekululwe, ukuba ebengamangalanga ku‐Kesare." 
Acts27:1 KEKALOKU xeshekweni bekugwetyiwe ukuba soselishela e‐Yitaliya, kwanikelwa u‐Paulusi, nabanye ababanjwa abatile, kwinkosikulu yasebandleni lika‐Auguste, ogama lalingu‐Juliyusi." 
Acts27:2 Sati singene enqanaweni yase‐Adramitiyume, sifuna ukuselisha ngokwayama indawo zase‐Asiya, sanduluka, u‐Aristariko, um‐Masedoniya wase‐Tesalonika, enati." 
Acts27:3 Nangomnye umhla safikela emhlabeni e‐Tsidone. Waza u‐Juliyusi wampata u‐Paulusi ngobubele, wamvumela ukuba aye kubahlobo, ongiwe ngabo." 
Acts27:4 Sindulukile nakona, saselisha ngapantsi kwe‐Kiperusi, ngenxa yokuba umoya ubuvela pambili." 
Acts27:5 Sati sakuba sicandile ulwandle olwayama i‐Silisiya ne‐Pamfiliya ngokuselisha, seza kufika e‐Mira, isixeko sase‐Lisiya." 
Acts27:6 Yaza inkosikulu, ifumene kona inqanawa yase‐Aletsandriya iselishela e‐Yitaliya, yasingenisa kwa kuyo." 
Acts27:7 Sati sakuba sibe sihamba kuhle ukuselisha imihla yamininzi, cebetshu sikohliwe kukufika malungana ne‐Kenido, umoya ungasivumeli nje, saselisha ngapantsi kwe‐Kirete malungana ne‐Salimoni;" 
Acts27:8 saza sati, cebetshu sikohlwa kukuselisha kufupi kuyo, safika endaweni etile ekutwa Licw̔ebalihle, apo sibe sikufupi kona isixeko se‐Laseya." 
Acts27:9 Kekaloku nxa ixesha elikulu belidlulile, nanxa ukuselisha kube kuse kunengozi, ngenxa yokuba inzilo ibisel’ igqitile, u‐Paulusi wa ba yala," 
Acts27:10 esiti kubo: Madoda! ndiyabona ukuba lentselisho iya kuba nesenzakalo nesilahleko esikulu, singesesomtwalo nesenqanawa kodwa, sisesobomi betu kanjako." 
Acts27:11 Kodwa inkosikulu ibikolwa ngumkokeli wenqanawa nangumniniyo, ngapezu kwokuba ibikolwa zizinto ezibe zitetwa ngu‐Paulusi." 
Acts27:12 Kanjako icw̔eba elo lingalungile nje ukuhlala kwalo ukuba kwenziwe ubusika apo, abaninzi kubo banika icebo lokuba kundulukwe nakona, ukuba kungati bangafikela e‐Fenitse, benze ubusika apo, e licw̔eba lase‐Kirete libe̔ka ngasesuyidentshonalanga nangasenodentshonalanga." 
Acts27:13 Kwati kwakuvutela kakuhle umoya wasesuyide, besiba bazuzile into babeyifuna, besuka, bati nama ukuselisha kufupi e‐Kirete." 
Acts27:14 Kodwa kungekade kamva waquta usihla kuyo umoya oluqwitela, obizwayo ngokuti yi‐Yurokilidone." 
Acts27:15 Kekaloku yakubanjwa inqanawa, ikohlwa kumelana nomoya kanjalo, sancama, saqu̔tywa." 
Acts27:16 Saza sibalekile ngapantsi kwesiqiti esitile esi‐kutwa yi‐Kiloda, cebetshu sawoyisa umkonjana ukuwugcina:" 
Acts27:17 abati bakuba bewufunqulile, benza ngezincedo, bejikelisa enqanaweni ngapantsi; baza besoyika ukuba ngabi baya kuwa pezu kwentlabati, bahlisa imiti yeseli, baqu̔tywa kunjalo." 
Acts27:18 Nxa ke sibe sijingajingiswa kakulu luqwitela, ng omhla olandelayo benza ukulahlwa:" 
Acts27:19 nangowesitatu umhla saposa pandle ngezetu izandla impahla yenqanawa. 
Acts27:20 Kwati kungabonakali nelanga nenkwenkwezi ngemihla emininzi, uqwitela olungencinane lu si bandezela kanjako, kwada kwasuswa kanye lonke itemba lokuba sosindiswa." 
Acts27:21 Kekaloku emveni kwokuba bekuzilwa kade ukutya, wandula wema u‐Paulusi pakati kwabo, wati: Madoda! nibe nifanele ukuba napulapula kum, ningandulukanga e‐Kirete, naza nasinda esisenzakalo nesilahleko." 
Acts27:22 Nokwakaloku nje ndiyaniyala ukuba nibe nokucwayita: ngokuba kungayi kuba kulahlwa kwobomi bomnye umntu kuni, kwoba kokwenqanawa kupela." 
Acts27:23 Ngokuba bekumi ngakum ngobubusuku ingelosi katixo, lowo endingowake, nendimkonzayo," 
Acts27:24 isiti: Ungoyiki, Paulusi! ufanele ukuma pambi kwo‐Kesare; kanjalo bona ke, utixo ukupile bonke abaselisha nawe." 
Acts27:25 Ngako, madoda! yibani nokucwayita; ngokuba ndikolwa ngutixo, ukuba kwoba njalo kwa njengokuba kutetiwe kum." 
Acts27:26 Kodwa sifanele ukuwa pezu kwesiqiti esitile. 
Acts27:27 Kekaloku kwakufika ubusuku beshumi elinesine, nxa sibe siqu̔tywaqu̔tywa elulwandleni lwe‐Adiriya, ngapakati kwobusuku obo babezindla omatrose ukuba bayasondela emhlabeni otile." 
Acts27:28 Baza beposile ilode, bafumana ukuba ifatome zimashumi mabini: bati bakuba begqitile umganyana, beposile ilode nakanjako, bafumana ukuba ifatome zilishumi linantlanu." 
Acts27:29 Bandula besoyika ukuba kungati siya kuwa ematyeni, baposa iyankore zazine ngasemva, banqwena ukuba kusile." 
Acts27:30 Kekaloku nxa omatrose bebefuna ukubaleka enqanaweni, nanxa umkonjana bebewuhlisele elwandle, ezenzisa ukuti baya kuwisa iyankore ngapambili," 
Acts27:31 wati u‐Paulusi kwinkosikulu nakumasodati: Xeshekweni aba bangahlali enqanaweni, aningesindiswe nina." 
Acts27:32 Andula amasodati azinqamla intambo zomkonjana, awuyeka uwe." 
Acts27:33 Kwati kwakuba kube kusaza kusa, u‐Paulusi wabayala bonke ukuba mabakwamkele ukutya, esiti: Namhla ngumhla weshumi elinesine nilinda, nimana nizila ukutya, ningatabatanga luto." 
Acts27:34 Ndiyaniyala ngoko ukuba manitabate ukutya; ngokuba oku kuyelela ukulondolozwa kwenu; ngokuba kungayi kuwa nalunye unwele entloko yamntu wakuni. 
Acts27:35 Wati akuba etshilo, watabata isonka, wabulela kutixo ebusweni babo bonke; waza waqezula, waqala ukutya." 
Acts27:36 Baba bonke ke becwayitile, batabata ukutya nabo." 
Acts27:37 Saye siyimipefumlo emakulu mabini anamashumi asixe̔nxe anamitandatu enqanaweni inani letu sonke. 
Acts27:38 Bati bakuhlutiswa kukutya, bayenza lula inqanawa, beyilahlela elwandle inqolowa." 
Acts27:39 Kekaloku okuya bekusile, babengawazi umhlaba; kodwa babenakana icw̔etyana elitile linalo unxweme, abanxamela ukuti, ukuba kungenzeka, bayitya̔lele kulo inqanawa." 
Acts27:40 Bati bezipunyule iyankore, baziyekela elwandle, bezitukulule imbopelelo zemiti yokukapa kanjako; baza bapakamisa iseli enkulu ngasemoyeni, basingisa elunxwemeni." 
Acts27:41 Kodwa bewele endaweni apo kuhlanganayo ilwandle zimbini, bayinyanzelela kona inqanawa; waza umpambili wati nqi, wahlala ungenakushukuma, kodwa umva ubuqekezwa ngamandla amaza." 
Acts27:42 Laye lilicebo lamasodati ukuba abafise ababanjwa, ukuze kungabiko mntu ongasabayo ngokuhlamba." 
Acts27:43 Kodwa inkosikulu ifuna ukunga ingamlondoloza u‐Paulusi, yawanqanda eqingeni lawo, yaxela ukuba abo bakwaziyo ukuhlamba baziwise tanci, bapumele emhlabeni;" 
Acts27:44 nokuba abanye baye inxenye pezu kwazo iplanke, nenxenye pezu kwezinto ezitile zivela enqanaweni. Kwaza kwati ngokunjalo, bafika bonke emhlabeni besindile." 
Acts28:1 Bati bakuba besindile, bandula baqonda ukuba isiqiti sibizwa nge‐Melita." 
Acts28:2 Baza abemi bakona basenzela ububele obungenziwa futi: ngokuba bepembile umlilo, basamkela sonke, ngenxa yemvula ekoyo, nangenxa yengqele." 
Acts28:3 Kekaloku nxa u‐Paulusi ebebutile inyanda yentsasa, nanxa ebe yi bekile pezu kwomlilo, kwapuma inyoka ngokufudumala, yaziqinisa esandleni sake." 
Acts28:4 Baza abemi bakona bakubona isilo eso silengalenga esandleni sake, bati omnye kwomnye: Okunene ungumbulali umntu lo, ote, nakuba esindile elwandle, impindezelo ayimvumelanga ukuba adle ubomi." 
Acts28:5 Wati kekaloku yena esivutululele emlilweni isilo eso, akeva senzakalo." 
Acts28:6 Koko bona bebekangela ukuba uya kuti adumbe, umhlaumbi awe pantsi ngesiqupe efile: kodwa bakuba bebekangela kade, bengaboni nto embi imhlela, bajika intliziyo, bati ungutixo." 
Acts28:7 Kwa kwezondawo zangakona ibiko imihlaba yoyintloko yesiqiti, ogama lalingu‐Pubiliyo; owasamkelayo, wasihlalisa kuye imihla yamitatu ngobuhlobo." 
Acts28:8 Kwaye kute, uyise ka‐Pubiliyo ebelele ibanjwa licesine nesixaxazo segazi; owati u‐Paulusi wangena kuye, watandaza, wabeka izandla pezu kwake, wampilisa." 
Acts28:9 Kekaloku kwakuba kwenziwe oku, babesiza nabanye abebenezifo esiqitini, bapiliswa:" 
Acts28:10 abasibekayo ngembeko ezininzi kanjalo, bati ekundulukeni kwetu ba si twesa ngezinto ezisilungeleyo." 
Acts28:11 Sada emveni kwenyanga zantatu sanduluka ngenqanawa yase‐Aletsandriya, ebenze ubusika esiqitini, inopa̔u olungu‐Kasitore no‐Polutse." 
Acts28:12 Saza safikela emhlabeni e‐Sirakuse, salibala kona imihla yamitatu." 
Acts28:13 Sisuka apo sazekelela seza kufika e‐Regiyo; wati emveni kwosuku lunye wavuka umoya wasesuyide, saza ngowesibini umhla safika e‐Puteyoli;" 
Acts28:14 apo safumana kona abazalwana, sabongozwa ukuba silibale kubo imihla ibe sixe̔nxe: saya njalo ke ukuya e‐Roma." 
Acts28:15 Baza abazalwana bakuva okwetu bapuma kona, beza kusikaulela kwada kwase‐Apiyoforume, nase‐Tavene‐ntatu; owati u‐Paulusi akubabona, wabulela kutixo, wazuza ukwomelela." 
Acts28:16 Kekaloku okuya sasifikile e‐Roma, yati inkosikulu yanikela ababanjwa kwinkosi yomkosi wakwomkulu: kodwa kwavunyelwa u‐Paulusi ukuba ahlale yedwa, kunye nesodati elimgcinayo." 
Acts28:17 KWAYE kute emveni kwemihla mitatu, u‐Paulusi wababizela ndawonye kuye abakulu bakuma‐Juda. Nxa ke bebebutene, wabesiti kubo: Madoda, bazalwana! nakuba ndingenzanga nto eca̔sene nabantu namasiko obawo betu, ndanikelwa ndingumbanjwa e‐Yerusaleme ezandleni zama‐Roma." 
Acts28:18 Abesiti wona akuba endibuzile, afuna uku ndi kulula, ngenxa yokuba bekungeko tyala elibang’ ukufa kum." 
Acts28:19 Kodwa akupika ama‐Juda, ndanyanzelwa ukumangala ku‐Kesare; kungekukuba ndibe ndinento ukunika uhlanga lwam ityala ngayo." 
Acts28:20 Ngenxa yelituba ngoko ndinibizele kum, lokuba ndi ni bone, nokuba nditete na ni: ngokuba kungenxa yetemba lo‐Sirayeli endifakiwe lomxokelelwane." 
Acts28:21 Baza bona bati kuye: Asamkelanga ncwadi ngawe tina ivela e‐Judeya, akuko mntu wakubazalwana kanjako ote akufika apa washumayela umhlaumbi wateta into ngawe ekohlakeleyo." 
Acts28:21 Baza bona bati kuye: Asamkelanga ncwadi ngawe tina ivela e‐Judeya, akuko mntu wakubazalwana kanjako ote akufika apa washumayela umhlaumbi wateta into ngawe ekohlakeleyo." 
Acts28:22 Kodwa siba kufanelekile ukuba sive kuwe oko ukukumbulayo: ngokuba ngalo ulwahlukano olu kusaziwa siti ukuba luyapikwa kuzo zonke indawo. 
Acts28:23 Kekaloku bemmisele umhla otile nje, kweza kuye endaweni yake yokuhlala abaninzi; owabebaca̔zela ubukumkani bukatixo, wa bu nqi̔nela, wabacenga ngento ezingaye u‐Yesu kanjalo, nakuwo umteto ka‐Mosesi nakubo abaprofite, kwa sekuseni kwada kwahlwa." 
Acts28:24 Baza abanye beyiswa zizinto ezibe zitetwa, kodwa abanye abakolwa." 
Acts28:25 Bati ke bakuba bengavumelene omnye nomnye, banduluka, nxa u‐Paulusi ebetshilo eli lizwi linye lokuti: Ulungisile ukuteta umoya oyingcwele ngo‐Yisaya umprofite kubo obawo betu," 
Acts28:26 esiti: Hamba uye kwababantu, uti: Ngokuva niya kuva, ningezi niqonde; nibona nje niya kubona, ningezi niqiqe:" 
Acts28:27 ngokuba intliziyo yababantu idikiwe, nendlebe bazenze nzima ukuva kwazo, namehlo abo bawacimile; hleze babone ngamehlo, beve ngendlebe, baqonde ngentliziyo, baguquke, ndibapilise." 
Acts28:28 Makwazeke ngoko kuni, ukuba usindiso lukatixo lutunyiwe kubaheyideni, abaya kuva bona." 
Acts28:29 Kute akuba ebetshilo oku, emka ama‐Juda, enopikisano olukulu pakati kwawo." 
Acts28:30 Wati kekaloku u‐Paulusi wahlala iminyaka mibini ipela kweyake indlu eqashiweyo, wabamkela ngembuko bonke ababengena kuye," 
Acts28:31 eshumayela ubukumkani bukatixo, efundisa izinto ezingayo inkosi u‐Yesu Kristu, ngokukalipa konke, engenakwalelwa." 
Romans1:1 UPAULUSI, isicaka sika‐Yesu Kristu, obiziweyo ukuba ngumpostile, owahlulelwe evangelini katixo, —" 
Romans1:2 leyo wayibekelayo ngedinga kwa pambili ngabaprofite bake eziba̔lweni ezingewele," 
Romans1:3 ngaye unyana wake, owazalwa ngenzalo ka‐Davide ngokwenyama," 
Romans1:4 owabonakaliswa ngamandla ukuba ngunyana katixo ngokwomoya wobungcwele ngokuvuka ekufeni, kwa u‐Yesu Kristu inkosi yetu;" 
Romans1:5 esati ngaye samkela ufefe nobupostile, kube kukuva kwokolo pakati kwazo zonke intlanga, ngenxa yegama lake;" 
Romans1:6 enipakati kwazo nani, ningababizwa baka‐Yesu Kristu:—" 
Romans1:7 kubo bonke abase‐Roma, abatandiweyo ngutixo, ababiziweyo ukuba ngabangcwele: Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye utixo ubawo wetu, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
Romans1:8 Nditi ke ukuqala, ndibulela kutixo wam ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu ngenxa yenu nonke, ukuba inkolo yenu iyashunyayelwa kulo lonke ilizwe." 
Romans1:9 Ngokuba utixo elinqi̔na lam, endimkonzayo emoyeni wam kuyo ivangeli yonyana wake, lokokuba ndiyanikankanya ndingayeki," 
Romans1:10 ndikunga ngamaxesha onke emitandazweni yam, ukuba kungati kaloku ndoda ndivulelwe indlela ngentando katixo ukuza kuni." 
Romans1:11 Ngokuba ndilangazelela ukunibona, ukuze ndinabele isipiwo esibumoya, ukuba niqiniswe;" 
Romans1:12 oko kukuti ke, ukuba ndonwatyiswe kunye nani pakati kwenu, ngalo ukolo olukuti ngabanye, kwa nolwenu nolwam." 
Romans1:13 Kodwa anditandi ukuba nibe ningazi, bazalwana! okokuba ndite futi ndacinga ukuza kuni, (kanti ndaxakwa kwada kwakaloku nje,) ukuze ndibe nezixakato napakati kwenu, njengapakati kwabo nabanye abaheyideni." 
Romans1:14 Ndingonetyala kwa kuwo ama‐Girike nakubo abangengama‐Girike, kwa kubo abalumkileyo nakubo ababudenge." 
Romans1:15 Kwa njalo okwam sendilungile ukushumayela ivangeli nakuni base‐Roma. 
Romans1:16 Ngokuba ndingenantloni ngayo ivangeli ka‐Kristu: ngokuba ingamandla katixo lube lusindiswa kubo bonke abakolwayo; kwa kuye um‐Juda ukuqala, nakuye um‐Girike." 
Romans1:17 Ngokuba ubulungisa bukatixo butyilwa kuyo ngokolo kude kube lukolo, njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Kodwa olungileyo uya kupila ngokolo." 
Romans1:18 NGOKUBA kutyilwa umsindo katixo ezulwini ngakuko konke ukungabedeshi nokungalungisi kwabantu, abayibambayo inyaniso kokungalungileyo;" 
Romans1:19 ngokokuba oko okwazekayo ngotixo kubonakele pakati kwabo; ngokuba utixo wakubonakalisa kubo: 
Romans1:20 ngokuba izinto zake ezingabonekiyo ziqiqwa kwa sekudalweni kwelizwe, ziqondwa ngezinto ezenziweyo, kwa amandla ake angunapakade nobutixo bake; ukuze bangabi nakulandula;" 
Romans1:21 ngokokuba, nangona bamaziyo utixo, abamdumisa njengokuba e ngutixo, ababulela kanjako; koko bamata ezicamangweni zabo, yati intliziyo yabo engenakuqonda yenziwa mnyama." 
Romans1:22 Besitsho ukuti bangabalumkileyo baba zizidenge," 
Romans1:23 bati ubungcwalisa bake utixo ongonakaliyo babuguqulela umfanekiso ofana nomntu owonakalayo, nentaka, nezilo ezinyawo zine, nezinto ezinambuzelayo." 
Romans1:24 Ngako oko kanjalo utixo wabayekelela kuzo inkanuko zentliziyo zabo ekunco̔leni, ukuba bahlazekise imizimba yabo pakati kwabo;" 
Romans1:25 ekubeni inyaniso katixo bayiguqulela ubuxoki, nezidalwa bazibedesha bazikonza ngapezu kwomdali, odumisekayo kude kube ngunapakade: Amene." 
Romans1:26 Ngenxa yoku utixo wabayekelela emilweni ehlazekileyo: ngokuba kwa amankazana abo aguqula okwemvelo ukwenza kube kokungalungelene nemvelo: 
Romans1:27 kwa ngokunjalo namadoda, eyeka okwemvelo ukwenza kwinkazana, atsha ekunqweneleni kwawo enye ngakuyo enye, amadoda esenza namadoda okulihlazo, esamkela kwa kuwo ngokwawo impindezelo ebifanele ulahleko lwawo." 
Romans1:28 Kanjako njengokuba bebengatandi ukubamba utixo ekwazini kwabo, utixo wabayekelela eluveni olwaliwayo, ukwenza izinto ezingafanelekileyo;" 
Romans1:29 bezalisiwe kuko konke okungalungileyo, ngumbulo, bubumenemene, bububawa, lulunya; bezele ngumona, lubulalo, lipike, yinkohliso, lulwavela;" 
Romans1:30 bengabagquguli, abahlebi, abatiyi bakatixo, ababandezeli, abaner̔atshi, abazidlayo, abafumanisi bezinto ezikohlakeleyo, abangevayo abazali," 
Romans1:31 abangenakuqonda, abapuli bocebano, abangenalutando lwokuvela, abangaxoliseki, abangenazibele:" 
Romans1:32 abati, nangona bawaziyo ummiso katixo, wokuba abo bazenza izinto ezinjalo bafanele ukufa, bangazenzi kwa zona kodwa, koko kanjalo batakazela abazenzayo." 
Romans2:1 NGAKO oko akunakulandula, mntundini! ungosukuba egweba: ngokuba ngoko umgweba omnye umntu ngako, uzigweba wena ngokwako; ngokuba izinto ezikwa zizo uzenza wena ugwebayo." 
Romans2:2 Kekaloku siyazi ukuba umgwebo katixo ungokwenyaniso ngakubo abazenzayo izinto ezinjalo. 
Romans2:3 Nawe, mntundini! ubagwebayo abo bazenza izinto ezinjalo, xa uzenza kwa zona, uyatelekelelisa oku na, ukuba uya kusinda emgwetyweni katixo?" 
Romans2:4 uyabudela kusinina ubutyebi bobubele bake nonyamezelo lwake nokuzeka kade kwake; ungazi ukuba ububele bukatixo buyakukokela eluguqukweni? 
Romans2:5 uze uti ngokwobulukuni bako nentliziyo engenakugqoboka uzibekele umsindo emhleni womsindo nokutyilwa kwokugweba okulungileyo kukatixo: 
Romans2:6 oya kuvuza abanye ngabanye ngokwemisebenzi yabo; 
Romans2:7 abo ke abati ngokuba nomonde ekwenzeni okulungileyo bafune ubungewalisa, nembeko, nokungaboli, ngobomi obungunapakade:" 
Romans2:8 kodwa kubo abanenkani, abangalulameli inyaniso ke, koko belulamela okungalungileyo, kwobako ingqumbo nomsindo," 
Romans2:9 imbandezelo nobunzima, pezu kwayo yonke imipefumlo yabantu abakwenza okukohlakeleyo, kwa eyama‐Juda kuqala, neyama‐Girike;" 
Romans2:10 kodwa kwobako ubungcwalisa, nembeko, noxolo, kubo bonke abakwenza okulungileyo, kwa kuwo ama‐Juda kuqala, nakuwo ama‐Girike:" 
Romans2:11 ngokuba kungeko ukuketa abantu kuye utixo. 
Romans2:12 Ngokuba bonke abonileyo bengenamteto beya kububa kwa bengenamteto; kanjako bonke abonileyo bepantsi kwomteto baya kugwetywa ngomteto:— 
Romans2:13 ngokuba kungengabo abapulapuli bomteto abalungile pambi kwotixo, kungabo abenzi bomteto abaya kugwetyelwa:" 
Romans2:14 ngokuba okuya abaheyideni, abangenamteto, bazenza ngemvelo izinto zomteto, aba, nakuba bengenamteto, bangumteto kwa kubo ngokwabo;" 
Romans2:15 ekubeni babonakalisayo umsebenzi womteto oba̔liweyo ezintliziyweni zabo, isazeliso sabo sinqi̔nelana nawo, nenkumbulo zabo ezinye nezinye zibanika ityala, okanye zibatetelela:—" 
Romans2:16 emhleni nxa utixo aya kugweba izinto ezifihlakeleyo zabantu ngo‐Yesu Kristu njengokwevangeli yam. 
Romans2:17 Kangela, wena uyabizwa ngokuti ungum‐Juda, uyayama pezu kwomteto, uyaqa̔yisa kutixo," 
Romans2:18 uyayazi intando yake, uyaziqiqa izinto ezigqitiseleyo, ufundiswa nje emtetweni;" 
Romans2:19 kanjalo uyatembela ukuba wena ngokwako ungumkokeli wemfama, ukanyiso lwabasebumnyameni," 
Romans2:20 umluleki wabazidenge, umfundisi wentsana, unesimilo sokwazi nesenyaniso emtetweni:" 
Romans2:21 wena ngoko ofundisayo omnye, akuzifundisi na? wena ushumayelayo ukuba makungebi̔wa, uyeba̔ na?" 
Romans2:22 wena utshoyo ukuti makungaṙexezwa, uyaṙexeza na? wena uzitiyayo izitixo, uyazipanga itempile na?" 
Romans2:23 wena uqa̔yisayo emtetweni, uyamdela utixo na ngokugqita umteto?" 
Romans2:24 Ngokuba igama likatixo ligxekwa pakati kwabaheyideni ngenxa yenu, njengokuba kuba̔liwe." 
Romans2:25 Ngokuba ukwaluka kunceda okunene, xeshekweni uwenza umteto; kodwa xeshekweni ungumgqiti womteto, ukwaluka kwako kwenziwe ukungaluki." 
Romans2:26 Xeshekweni ngoko onokungaluki ayibamba imimiso yomteto, ukungaluki kwake akuyi kubalwa na ngokuba kukwaluka?" 
Romans2:27 Kanjalo onokungaluki ngokuvela, ukuba uyafeza umteto, akayi kugweba wena yinina, oti ngegama nangokwaluka ungumgqiti womteto?" 
Romans2:28 Ngokuba engengum‐Juda, lowo unguye ngokupandle; kanjako akukukwaluka, oko kupandle enyameni:" 
Romans2:29 koko engum‐Juda, lowo unguye ngokupakati; nokwaluka kukokwentliziyo, emoyeni, kungesegameni; okukudunyiswa kungaveli ebantwini, kuvela kutixo." 
Romans3:1 Kuyinto nina pofu ukudlulisela kwom‐Juda? umhlaumbi kuyinto nina ukunceda kwokwaluka? 
Romans3:2 Kuninzi ngendawo zonke: okona kukulu, kukuba kwabekelwa kubo amazwi katixo." 
Romans3:3 Ngokuba kuyinina ukuba abakolwa inxenye? ukungakolwa kwabo kuya kutshitshisa na inyaniseko katixo? 
Romans3:4 Kwanga kungebe njalo! makabe yinene utixo, nakuba bonke abantu bengamaxoki; njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Ukuze ube ugwetyelwa ezitetweni zako, weyise ekumenyweni kwako." 
Romans3:5 Kodwa ukungalungisi kwetu ukuba kuyabonakalisa ubulungisa bukatixo, soti nina ke? Ungongalungileyo na utixo ohlisayo umsindo wake? (Ndiyateta njengokwabantu.)" 
Romans3:6 Kwanga kungebe njalo! ngokuba oko eya kuti nina ukugweba ilizwe? 
Romans3:7 Ngokuba inyaniso katixo ukuba ite ngobuxoki bam yakolisa ukwandela ubungcwalisa bake, yinina ukuba ndisamenywa nam njengomoni?" 
Romans3:8 He, yinina ukuba singa ti, njengokuba kutetwa ngati ngokugxeka, nanjengokuba besitsho inxenye ukuba siti: Masenze okukohlakeleyo, ukuze kuvele okulungileyo? abakugwetywa kufanelekile." 
Romans3:9 Yinina pofu? si ba gqitisele na? Nakanye: ngokuba sise simisile ityala kwa kuma‐Juda nakuma‐Girike, lokuba onke apantsi kwesono;" 
Romans3:10 njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Akuko olungileyo, hai namnye;" 
Romans3:11 akuko oqondayo, akuko ofuna utixo." 
Romans3:12 Bapambukile bonke, bonakele kunye; akuko owenza okulungileyo, akuko noko amnye." 
Romans3:13 Ummizo wabo ulincw̔aba elivulekileyo; bate ngelwimi zabo benza inkohliso; ubuhlungu bamar̔amba bupantsi kwemilomo yabo: 
Romans3:14 abamlomo uzele kukuqalekisa nabubuṙaṙa: 
Romans3:15 inyawo zabo zinamendu ukuya kupalaza igazi; 
Romans3:16 uci̔takalo nosizi lusezindleleni zabo; 
Romans3:17 nendlela yoxolo abayazanga: 
Romans3:18 akuko ukwoyika utixo pambi kwamehlo abo. 
Romans3:19 Kekaloku siyazi ukuba zonke izinto uzitshoyo umteto, uyaziteta kwabo bapantsi kwomteto; ukuze yonke imilomo ivingcwe, nalo lonke ilizwe limelwe kukugweba kukatixo:" 
Romans3:20 ngenxa yokuba kungayi kugwetyelwa namnye umntu ebusweni bake ngemisebenzi yomteto: ngokuba ngawo umteto kuko ukwaziwa kwesono. 
Romans3:21 KODWA kaloku ngapandle kwomteto ubulungisa bukatixo bubonakalisiwe, bunqi̔nelwa ngumteto nabaprofite;" 
Romans3:22 kwa ubulungisa bukatixo ngalo ukolo luka‐Yesu Kristu ngakubo bonke napezu kwabo bonke abakolwayo; ngokuba kungeko ukwahluka: 
Romans3:23 ngokuba bonke bonile, bengafikeleli kubo ubungcwalisa bukatixo;" 
Romans3:24 begwetyelwa ngesisa lufefe lwake ngalo ukululwa olukuye u‐Kristu Yesu; 
Romans3:25 ate utixo wambeka ngapambili ukuba sisihlaulelo ngalo ukolo egazini lake, kube kukubonakaliswa kwobulungisa bake, ngenxa yokuyekelwa kwezono ezibe zenziwe pambili, ekunyamezeleni kukatixo;" 
Romans3:26 kuze kube kukubonakaliswa kwobulungisa bake kwelixesha lakaloku nje, ukuze abe elungile, nxa agwebelayo owaselukolweni luka‐Yesu." 
Romans3:27 Kupina pofu ukuqa̔yisa? Kuvalelwe pandle. Ngowanina umteto? ngowemisebenzi na? Nakanye; koko ngawo umteto wokolo. 
Romans3:28 Siyatelekelelisa ngoko, ukuba umntu uyagwetyelwa lukolo ngapandle kwemisebenzi yomteto." 
Romans3:29 Utixo ungowama‐Juda odwa na? akangowabaheyideni nabo na? Ewe, ngowabaheyideni nabo:" 
Romans3:30 ekubeni ke utixo emnye, oya kugwebela abanokwaluka ngetuba lokolo, nabanokungaluki ngalo ukolo." 
Romans3:31 Umteto pofu siyawutshitshisa ngalo ukolo na? Kwanga kungebe njalo! koko siwumisayo umteto. 
Romans4:1 Pofu siya kuti nina u‐Abrahame ubawo wetu ufumene ngokwenyama? 
Romans4:2 Ngokuba u‐Abrahame ukuba wagwetyelwa ngemisebenzi, unako angaqa̔yisa ngako: koko engenako pambi kwotixo:" 
Romans4:3 ngokuba isiba̔lo sisiti nina? u‐Abrahame wakolwa ngutixo, kwaza kwambalelwa kube kukulunga." 
Romans4:4 Kekaloku lowo usebenzayo, umvuzo awumbalelwa ukuba ngofefe, koko ukuba ngetyala;" 
Romans4:5 kodwa lowo ungasebenziyo, koko ekolwa kulowo ugwebela abangabedeshiyo, ukolo lwake luyambalelwa lube kukulunga." 
Romans4:6 Kwa njengokuba no‐Davide exela ubutamsanqa balomntu utixo abalelayo kuye ukulunga ngapandle kwemisebenzi," 
Romans4:7 esiti: Banetamsanqa abazigqito zixolelweyo, nabazono ziselelweyo;" 
Romans4:8 unetamsanqa umntu uyehova angabaleli kuye isono. 
Romans4:9 Obubutamsanqa ke butetwa pezu kwabanokwaluka na, butetwa napezu kwabanokungaluki kusinina? ngokuba sisiti ukolo lwabalelwa u‐Abrahame lube kukulunga." 
Romans4:10 Lwatiwa nina ke ukubalwa? akuba ebesekwalukeni, akuba ebesekungalukini, kusinina? Ebengesekwalukeni, ebesekungalukini." 
Romans4:11 Waza wamkela upa̔u lwokwaluka, isincamatiselo sokokulunga kwokolo abenalo ekungalukini kwake: ukuze abe nguyise wabo bonke abakolwayo besekungalukini; ukuba ukulunga kubalelwe kubo nabo;" 
Romans4:12 noyise wabanokwaluka, kwabangengabo basekwalukeni kodwa, koko kwabati kanjalo bahambe emikondweni yokolo lwobawo wetu u‐Abrahame abenalo ekungalukini kwake." 
Romans4:13 Ngokuba bekungengawo umteto idinga labek elwa u‐Abrahame nenzalo yake, lokokuba abe yindlalifa yelizwe, bekungako ukulunga kwokolo." 
Romans4:14 Ngokuba abo basemtetweni ukuba bazindlalifa, ukolo lwenziwe into engento yanto, nedinga litshitshisiwe:" 
Romans4:15 ngokuba umteto uzuzisa umsindo; ngokuba apo kungeko kona umteto, kungeko nesigqito." 
Romans4:16 Ngenxa yoku ilifa lelaselukolweni, ukuba libe ngofefe; ukuze idinga libe liqinisekile kuyo yonke inzalo, kungabi kuleyo yasemtetweni yodwa, kube nakuleyo yaselukolweni luka‐Abrahame; ongubawo wetu sonke," 
Romans4:17 (njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Ndikwenzile uyise wentlanga ezininzi,) ebusweni balowo tixo wakolwa kuye, oti abadlise abafileyo ubomi, abize izinto ezingekoyo njengokuba ziko:" 
Romans4:18 owati lakugqita itemba wakolwa ngetemba, ukuba abe nguyise wentlanga ezininzi, njengoko kube kutshiwo: Yoba njalo inzalo yako." 
Romans4:19 Kanjako engebutataka ekukolweni, akakumbulela owake umzimba obusel’ ufile, epants’ ukuba yiminyaka elikulu ubudala bake, kwa nokufa kwesizalo sika‐Sara:" 
Romans4:20 nedinga likatixo akalitandabuzela ngokungakolwa; koko womelezekayo ekukolweni, enika utixo udumo," 
Romans4:21 ekolisile ukukolwa kanjalo ukuba oko akubekele ngedinga unamandla nokukwenza. 
Romans4:22 Kwaza ngoko ke kwambalelwa kube kukulunga. 
Romans4:23 Kekaloku kwakungaba̔lwa ngenxa yake yedwa, ukuti kwambalelwa;" 
Romans4:24 koko kwaba̔lwa nangenxa yetu, ekuya kusibalelwa, tina bakolwayo kulowo owavusa u‐Yesu inkosi yetu ekufeni;" 
Romans4:25 owanikelwa ngenxa yeziposo zetu, waza wavuswa ngenxa yokugwetyelwa kwetu." 
Romans5:1 NGAKO sigwetyelwe ngokolo nje, sinalo uxolo kutixo ngayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu;" 
Romans5:2 esite ngayo kanjalo sanokungeniswa ngokolo kolufefe simi kulo; sivuyelela ngetemba lobungcwalisa bukatixo. 
Romans5:3 Kunge njalo ke kodwa, koko kanjako sivuyelela ezimbandezelweni; sisazi ukuba imbandezelo iyazuzisa umonde," 
Romans5:4 nomonde isazelo, nesazelo itemba;" 
Romans5:5 liti ke itemba lingadanisi, ngokokuba utando lukatixo lugalelwe ezintliziyweni zetu ngumoya oyingcwele owanikwa kuti." 
Romans5:6 Ngokuba u‐Kristu, nxa sibe sisaswele amandla tina, ngexesha elifanelekileyo wafela abangabedeshiyo." 
Romans5:7 Ngokuba cebetshu kukohlwa kubako oya kufela olungileyo: noko kungati umhlaumbi kuko okwa nokukalipa ukufela lowo obubele. 
Romans5:8 Kodwa utixo uyabonakalisa olwake utando ngakuti, ngokokuba, nxa sibe sisengaboni tina, u‐Kristu wasifela." 
Romans5:9 Siya kuti kakulu ngakumbi ngoko, sigwetyelwe nje kaloku ngegazi lake, sisindiswe ngaye emsindweni ozayo." 
Romans5:10 Ngokuba, sizintshaba nje, ukuba saxoliswana notixo ngako ukufa kwonyana wake, siya kuti kakulu ngakumbi, sixoliswene nje, sisindiswe ngobomi bake." 
Romans5:11 Kunge njalo ke kodwa, koko kanjako sivuyelela kutixo ngayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, esite ngayo kaloku samkela uxoliswano." 
Romans5:12 Ngenxa yoku, njengokuba isono sangena elizweni ngaye umntu emnye, nokufa ngaso isono; kwaza ngokunjalo ukufa kwacandela kubo bonke abantu, ngokokuba bonke bebonile:—" 
Romans5:13 Ngokuba kude kwabako umteto bekuko isono elizweni: kodwa isono asibalelwa, nxa kungekoyo umteto." 
Romans5:14 Noko ukufa kwapata ubukosi kwa ku‐Adame kwada kwaku‐Mosesi, kwa pezu kwabo babengonanga ngesigqito esifana nesika‐Adame, ongumfanekiselo walowo obeza kuza." 
Romans5:15 Koko kungenjengokuba sinjalo isiposo, ukuba sinjalo nesipo sofefe. Ngokuba, ukuba ngesiposo somnye bafa abaninzi, kukakulu ngakumbi lute ufefe lukatixo nolupo lwake lwakolisa ukwandela abaninzi ngofefe olulolwomnye umntu engu‐Yesu Kristu." 
Romans5:16 Kanjako akunjengokuba kunjalo ngaye omnye owonayo, ukuba sinjalo isipiwo: ngokuba umgwebo unge siposo sinye kube kukugwetywa, kodwa isipo sofefe singeziposo ezininzi kube kukugwetyelwa." 
Romans5:17 Ngokuba, ukuba ngesiposo somnye ukufa kwapata ubukosi ngaye omnye lowo, kukakulu ngakumbi baya kuti abo babamkelayo ubuninzi bofefe nopiwo lwobulungisa bapate ubukosi ebomini ngaye omnye ongu‐Yesu Kristu. —" 
Romans5:18 Ngako ke, njengokuba umgwebo ngaso isiposo sinye ubufik ela bonke abantu kube kukugwetywa, kwa njalo n esipo sofefe ngesenzo esilungileyo sinye safik ela bonke abantu kube kukugwetyelwa okunobomi." 
Romans5:19 Ngokuba, njengokuba ngako ukungeva kwomntu emnye abaninzi benzwa aboni, kwa njalo nangako ukuva kwomnye abaninzi baya kwenzwa abalungileyo." 
Romans5:20 Kekaloku umteto wangena nawo, ukuze isiposo sandiswe. Kodwa apo sandiswa kona isono, lwakolisa ukwanda kakulu ngakumbi ufefe:" 
Romans5:21 ukuze ke, njengokuba isono sapata ubukosi ekufeni, luti kwa njalo nofefe lupate ubukosi ngabo ubulungisa bube bubomi obungunapakade, ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu inkosi yetu." 
Romans6:1 SOTI nina pofu? Somana ukuma esonweni na, ukuze ufefe lwandiswe?" 
Romans6:2 Kwanga kungebe njalo! Tina safayo ngakwisono, soti nina ukuba sisahlala kuso?" 
Romans6:3 Anazi na, ukuba sonke tina sabapitizeshelwayo ku‐Kristu Yesu sabapitizeshelwa ekufeni kwake?" 
Romans6:4 Sancw̔atyelwa ngoko kunye naye ngako ukubapitizeshwa ekufeni kwake; ukuze ke, njengokuba u‐Kristu ebevuswa kwabafileyo ngabo ubungcwalisa boyise, siti kwa njalo nati sihambe ekuhlaleni okutsha." 
Romans6:5 Ngokuba okunene, ukuba sibe sihlanganisiwe naye ekufaneni kwokufa kwake, soba njalo nakokwokuvuka kwake:" 
Romans6:6 oku sikwazi nje, ukuba umntu wetu omdala wakuruseshwa kunye naye, ukuze umzimba wesono utshatyalaliswe, size tina singabi sakonza esonweni." 
Romans6:7 Ngokuba lowo ufileyo ekululwe esonweni. 
Romans6:8 Kekaloku ukuba safa kunye no‐Kristu, siyakolwa ukuba siya kuti kanjalo sidle ubomi kunye naye:" 
Romans6:9 sisazi ukuba u‐Kristu evusiwe nje kwabafileyo akasafi; ukufa akusenabukosi pezu kwake. 
Romans6:10 Ngokuba ukufa wakufayo, wafela isono kwa kanye; kodwa ubomi abudlayo, uyabudlela utixo." 
Romans6:11 Kwa njalo nani zibaleni ukuba nifile ngakuso isono, kodwa nisidla ubomi ngakuye utixo, ku‐Kristu Yesu inkosi yetu." 
Romans6:12 Masiti ngoko isono singapati ubukosi emzimbeni wenu onokufa, ukuba nisilulamele ezinkanukweni zawo." 
Romans6:13 Kanjako ningamiseli esonweni amalungu enu ukuba zimpahla zokungalungileyo; koko zimiseleni kutixo njengokuba nihleli nivukile kwabafileyo, namalungu enu niwamisele kutixo ukuba zimpahla zobulungisa." 
Romans6:14 Ngokuba isono singayi kuba nabukosi pezu kwenu: ngokuba ningepantsi kwomteto, koko nipantsi kwofefe." 
Romans6:15 Yinina pofu? siya kwona na, kuba singepantsi kwomteto, koko sipantsi kwofefe? Kwanga kungebe njalo!" 
Romans6:16 Anazi na, ukuba lowo nizimisela kuye ukuba zizicaka zoku m va, nizizicaka zake enimvayo; nokuba zezesono kube kukufa, nokuba zezokuva bube bubulungisa?" 
Romans6:17 Kodwa makubulelwe kutixo ukuba, nangona nibe nizizicaka zesono, neva noko ngentliziyo umlinganiselo wofundiso enaninikelwe kuwo;" 
Romans6:18 naza nati, nikululekisiwe kuso isono nje, nenzwa izicaka ebulungiseni." 
Romans6:19 Ndiyateta njengokwabantu ngenxa yobulwelwe benyama yenu. Ngokuba njengokuba amalungu enu nawamisela ukuba zizicaka ekunco̔leni nasekukohlakaleni kube kukukohlakala, kwa njalo kaloku miselani amalungu enu ukuba zizicaka ebulungiseni kube bubungcwele." 
Romans6:20 Ngokuba okuya nibe nizizicaka zesono, nibe nikululekile kubo ubulungisa." 
Romans6:21 Nibe ninesiqa̔mo sinina pofu oko, ngezozinto nizidaneleyo ngoku? ngokuba isipelo sezozinto, kukufa." 
Romans6:22 Kodwa kaloku nikululekisiwe kuso isono, nenzwa izicaka kutixo nje, ninesiqa̔mo senu ngasebungcweleni; nesipelo, ninobomi obungunapakade." 
Romans6:23 Ngokuba umvuzo wesono ukukufa; kodwa isipo sofefe sikatixo sibubomi obungunapakade ngo‐Yesu Kristu inkosi yetu. 
Romans7:1 ANAZI na, bazalwana! (ngokuba nditeta kwabawaziyo umteto,) okokuba umteto unobukosi pezu kwomntu lonke ixesha asahlala ngalo?" 
Romans7:2 Ngokuba umfazi opantsi kwendoda ebotshiwe ngumteto kwindoda yake nxa isahleliyo; kodwa xeshekweni indoda ifileyo, ukululwe kuwo umteto wendoda." 
Romans7:3 Ngako ke, ukuba uba ngowenye indoda, nxa isahleli indoda yake, uya kubizwa ngokuba liṙexezakazi: kodwa xeshekweni indoda yake ifileyo, ukululekile kuwo umteto lowo; ukuze angabi lilo iṙexezakazi, nakuba aba ngowenye indoda." 
Romans7:4 Kwa njalo ke, bazalwana bam! nani nenzwa nifile ngakuwo umteto ngawo umzimba ka‐Kristu; ukuba nina nibe ngabo abomnye, kwa abalowo ubevuswa ekufeni, ukuze nivelisele utixo izixakato." 
Romans7:5 Ngokuba okuya sibe sisenyameni, imilo yezono, ebi vuka ngawo umteto, ibisebenza emalungwini etu, kuze kuveliselwe ukufa izixakato." 
Romans7:6 Kodwa kaloku sikululwe emtetweni, sifile nje ngakuko oko esasibanjelwe kuko; ukuze sibe sikonza ngobutsha bomoya, kungabi ngobudala begama." 
Romans7:7 Soti nina pofu? Umteto usisono na? Kwanga kungebe njalo! Noko, isono bendingasazanga, kupela ngawo umteto: ngokuba unqwenelo ngendingalwazanga, ukuba umteto ubungatsho ukuti: Akuyi kunqwenela." 
Romans7:8 Kodwa isono, sizuzile ituba nje ngawo umyalelo senza kum lwonke unqwenelo. Ngokuba ngapandle kwomteto isono sifile." 
Romans7:9 Nam bendifudula ndipilile ngapandle kwomteto: kodwa kwakufika umyalelo, sabuya sapila isono, ndafa ke mna;" 
Romans7:10 nomyalelo, obungowobomi, wona lo wafunyanwa ndim ukuba ngowokufa." 
Romans7:11 Ngokuba isono sizuzile ituba nje ngawo umyalelo sandilukuhla, sati kwa ngawo sa ndi bulala." 
Romans7:12 Kwa njalo ke umteto ungcwele, nomyalelo ungcwele, unobulungisa, ulungile." 
Romans7:13 Pofu oko kulungileyo kwaba kukufa na kum? Kwanga kungebe njalo! koko isono saba kukufa kum, ukuze sibonakale ukuba sisono, sindenzela ukufa ngako okulungileyo; ukuze isono ngawo umyalelo sibe sibubono ngento egqitisileyo." 
Romans7:14 Ngokuba sisazi ukuba umteto ubumoya: kodwa mna ndibunyama, nditengiselwe ngapantsi kwesono." 
Romans7:15 Ngokuba oko ndikwenzayo ndingakwazi: ngokuba oko ndikutandayo, oku ndingakwenzi; koko oko ndikutiyayo, oku ndikwenza." 
Romans7:16 Kodwa ukuba oko ndingakutandiyo, oku ndiyakwenza, ndiyavumela umteto ukuba ulungile." 
Romans7:17 Kuze kaloku kungabi sendim okwe nzayo kona, kusisono esimiyo kum." 
Romans7:18 Ngokuba ndisazi ukuba akumi kum, oko kukuti enyameni yam, into elungileyo: ngokuba ukutanda kuko ngakum; kodwa ukufeza oko kulungileyo andikufumani." 
Romans7:19 Ngokuba okulungileyo endikutandayo ndingakwenzi; koko okukohlakeleyo endingakutandiyo, oku ndikwenza." 
Romans7:20 Kodwa ukuba oko ndingakutandiyo mna, oku ndiyakwenza, akusendim okwenzayo kona, kusisono esimiyo kum." 
Romans7:21 Ndiyafumana ngoko lomteto, wokuba, nxa nditandayo ukwenza oko kulungileyo, oko kukohlakeleyo kuko ngakum." 
Romans7:22 Ngokuba ndigcoba emtetweni katixo ngokwowapakati umntu: 
Romans7:23 kodwa ndiyabona umteto wumbi emalungwini am, usilwa nomteto woluvo lwam, unditimbela emtetweni wesono osemalungwini am." 
Romans7:24 Hai umntu olusizi endinguye! ngubanina oya kundihlangula emzimbeni wokukufa? 
Romans7:25 Ndiyabulela kutixo ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu inkosi yetu. Ngako ke mna ngokwam nditi ngoluvo ndikonze emtetweni katixo, kodwa ngenyama, emtetweni wesono." 
Romans8:1 NGAKO kaloku akuko kugwetywa kwabo bakuye u‐Kristu Yesu, abati bangahambi ngokwenyama, koko bahambe ngo kwomoya." 
Romans8:2 Ngokuba umteto womoya wobomi kuye u‐Kristu Yesu undikululekisile kuwo umteto wesono nowokufa. 
Romans8:3 Ngokuba oko umteto ubungenamandla ukukwenza, ekubeni ububutataka ngayo inyama, utixo etumile owake unyana ekufaneni kwenyama yesono, nangenxa yesono, wagweba isono enyameni;" 
Romans8:4 ukuze ummiso womteto uzalisekiswe kuti, tina siti singahambi ngokwenyama, koko sihambe ngo kwomoya." 
Romans8:5 Ngokuba abo banjengokwenyama benyamekela izinto zenyama; kodwa abo banjengo kwomoya banyamekela izinto zomoya. 
Romans8:6 Ngokuba inyamekelo yenyama ikukufa; kodwa inyamekelo yomoya ibubomi noxolo. 
Romans8:7 Ngokokuba inyamekelo yenyama ibutshaba ngakuye utixo: ngokuba ingalulameli emtetweni katixo, ingenje njalo kambe kanjako." 
Romans8:8 Abo basenyameni ke abangemkolise utixo. 
Romans8:9 Kodwa nina anisenyameni, koko ni kumoya, ukuba ke umoya katixo umi kuni. Kodwa ukuba umntu akanaye umoya ka‐Kristu, yena lo akangowake." 
Romans8:10 Kekaloku ukuba u‐Kristu ukuni, umzimba okunene ufile ngenxa yesono; kodwa umoya ububomi ngenxa yobulungisa." 
Romans8:11 Nokuba umoya walowo wamvusayo u‐Yesu ekufeni umi kuni, yena owavusa u‐Kristu ekufeni woyidlisa ubomi kwa imizimba yenu enokufa ngaye umoya wake omiyo kuni." 
Romans8:12 Ngako ke, bazalwana! singabanetyala, kungekuyo inyama, ukuba sihlale ngokwenyama." 
Romans8:13 Ngokuba niza kuti, ukuba niyahlala ngokwenyama, nife; kodwa, ukuba niti ngomoya nibulale izenzo zomzimba, niya kudla ubomi." 
Romans8:14 Ngokuba bonke abakokelwayo ngumoya katixo, bona aba bangonyana bakatixo." 
Romans8:15 Ngokuba ningawamkelanga umoya wobukoboka kubuye koyikwe; koko nawamkelayo umoya wobunyana, esiti kwa kuwo sibize ngokuti: Aba. Bawo!" 
Romans8:16 Yena umoya ngokwake uyanqi̔nelana nomoya wetu, okokuba silusapo lukatixo." 
Romans8:17 Kekaloku ukuba silusapo, sizindlalifa kanjalo; sizindlalifa katixo, nendlalifa kunye no‐Kristu; ukuba ke siyeva intlungu kunye naye, ukuze senzelwe ubungcwalisa kwa kunye naye." 
Romans8:18 Ngokuba nditelekelelisa ukuba intlungu zelixesha lakaloku nje aziluto zakulinganiswa nobobungcwalisa buza kutyilwa kuti. 
Romans8:19 Ngokuba ukulangazelela kwokudalwa kulinda ukutyilwa kwonyana bakatixo. 
Romans8:20 Ngokuba ukudalwa bekubekwa pantsi kwokungendawo, (bekungengokuvuma kwako, bekungenxa yalowo wakubekayo pantsi,) ngetemba," 
Romans8:21 ukuba kwa kona ukudalwa kuya kukululekiswa ebukobokeni bolwonakalo, kungeniswe kuyo inkululeko yobungcwalisa bosapo lukatixo." 
Romans8:22 Ngokuba sisazi ukuba konke ukudalwa kugula kunenimba kwa kunye kude kube kaloku nje. 
Romans8:23 Kunge njalo ke kodwa, koko kanjako tina ngokwetu, esinalo ulibo lwomoya, kwa tina ngokwetu siyagula pakati kwetu, silinda ukumiswa kwobunyana, ukukululwa kwomzimba wetu." 
Romans8:24 Ngokuba sisindiswe ngetemba: kodwa itemba elibonwayo alililo itemba; ngokuba oko akubonayo umntu, kuyinina ukuba unako nokukutembela?" 
Romans8:25 Kodwa ukuba oko esingakuboniyo siyakutembela, siyakulinda ngomonde." 
Romans8:26 Ngokunjalo ke nomoya uyanceda izilwelwe zetu: ngokuba singazi ukuba singe sitandazela nto nina njengoko kufanelekileyo; kodwa yena umoya ngokwake uyasitetelela ngezigulo ezingatetekiyo. 
Romans8:27 Naye lowo uzipengululayo intliziyo uyazi into iyiyo inyamekelo yomoya, ukuba ebatetelela abangcwele njengako ukutanda kukatixo." 
Romans8:28 Kanjako siyazi ukuba kwabo batanda utixo zonke izinto ziyasebenza kunye kube kokulungileyo, kwabo bangababiziweyo ngokwemvume yake." 
Romans8:29 Ngokuba abo wabaziyo pambili, wabamisela kwa pambili ukuba bafane nomfanekiso wonyana wake, ukuze abe ngowamazibulo pakati kwabazalwana abaninzi:" 
Romans8:30 nabo wabamiselayo pambili, bona aba wababiza kanjalo: nabo wababizayo, bona aba wabagwebela kanjalo: nabo wabagwebelayo, bona aba wabenzela ubungcwalisa kanjalo." 
Romans8:31 Soti nina ngoko ngezizinto? Ukuba utixo ungecala letu, ngubanina oya kwalana nati?" 
Romans8:32 Lowo ke ongamyekanga owake unyana, koko wamnikelayo ngenxa yetu sonke, kungati nina ukuba akayi kusipa nakunye naye izinto zonke?" 
Romans8:33 Ngubanina oya kumisa ityala ngakubo abaqashwa bakatixo? Utixo nguye ogwebelayo; 
Romans8:34 ngubanina lowo ugwebayo? U‐Kristu nguye owafayo, ewe pezu kwoku, o buye wavuka kanjalo, okwa ngasekunene kwotixo, ositetelelayo kanjako." 
Romans8:35 Ngubanina oya kusahlula elutandweni luka‐Kristu? yimbandezelo na, bubunzima na, yintshutshiso na, yindlala na, bubuzé na, yingozi na, liṙele na?" 
Romans8:36 Njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Ngenxa yako siyabulawa imini yonke; sasibalwa ngokuba zigusha zokuxe̔lwa. 
Romans8:37 Kuloko kwezizinto zonke sigqitisile nasekwoyiseni ngaye lowo wasitandayo. 
Romans8:38 Ngokuba ndikoliwe ukuba kwa nokufa, nobomi, nengelosi, nabanegunya, nabanamandla, nezinto ezikoyo, nezinto eziza kubako," 
Romans8:39 nobude, nobunzulu, nesinye isidalwa esisimbi, aziyi kuba nako ukuba zingasahlula elutandweni lukatixo, olukuye u‐Kristu Yesu inkosi yetu." 
Romans9:1 NDIYATETA inyaniso ku‐Kristu, andixoki, isazeliso sam sinqi̔nelana nam kumoya oyingcwele," 
Romans9:2 ukuba ndinosizi olukulu, nendandateko engapeliyo entliziyweni yam:" 
Romans9:3 ngokuba bendinganqwenayo ukuba mna ngokwam bendiyinto eyahlukanisiweyo no‐Kristu ngenxa yabo abazalwana bam, izalamane zam ngokwenyama:" 
Romans9:4 abangama‐Sirayeli; ekukokwabo ubunyana, nobungcwalisa, nengcebano, nokunikwa kwomteto, nesikonzo, namadinga;" 
Romans9:5 abangababooyise, nokuvela kubo u‐Kristu ngokwenyama, ongutixo pezu kwonke, edumisekile ngonapakade. Amene." 
Romans9:6 Kungenjengokungati ilizwi likatixo litshitshile. Ngokuba kungengabo bonke abavela ku‐Sirayeli, abango‐Sirayeli:" 
Romans9:7 kanjako, abalusapo bonke, ukuba beyinzalo ka‐Abrahame; koko kusitwa: Ku‐Yisake iya kubizwa inzalo yako." 
Romans9:8 Oko kukuti, asi ngabalusapo lwenyama, abalusapo lukatixo; koko ngabalusapo lwedinga ababalelwa ukuba yinzalo." 
Romans9:9 Ngokuba ilizwi ledinga leli lokuti: Ekutwaseni kwelixesha ndiya kuza, waeya kuti u‐Sara abe nonyana." 
Romans9:10 Kunge njalo ke kodwa; koko kanjako nxa u‐Rebeka ebekaulile ngomnye, ngo‐Yisake ubawo wetu;" 
Romans9:11 ngokuba, abantwana bengekazalwanga, bengenzanga nto elungileyo nekohlakeleyo kanjalo, ukuze imvume katixo ngokwoqasho ibe nokuma, ingengemisebenzi, koko ingalowo ubizayo;" 
Romans9:12 bekutiwa kuye: Omkulu wokonza komncinane. 
Romans9:13 Kwa njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: u‐Yakobi ndamtanda, no‐Esau ndamtiya." 
Romans9:14 Soti nina pofu? Kuko ukungalungisi kutixo na? Kwanga kungebe njalo! 
Romans9:15 Ngokuba esiti ku‐Mosesi: Ndoba netaṙu kosukuba endinetaṙu kuye, ndandiya kuba nenceba kosukuba endinenceba kuye." 
Romans9:16 Ngako ke, asi kokwotandayo, asi kokwobalekayo kanjalo, koko kuko kukatixo owenza ngetaṙu." 
Romans9:17 Ngokuba isiba̔lo sisiti ku‐Faro: Ndakuvusela kwa kona oku, ukuba kuwe ndibonakalise amandla am, nokuba igama lam lishunyayelwe emhlabeni wonke." 
Romans9:18 Ngako ke, lowo atandayo, unetaṙu kuye; nalowo atandayo, uyamenza lukuni." 
Romans9:19 Pofu wena woti kum: Usagungqela nina? ngokuba ngubanina omelana nentando yake? 
Romans9:20 Hai gxebe, mntundini! ungubanina wena opind’ ukupendula kutixo? Into edaliweyo iya kutsho na koyidalileyo ukuti: Yinina ukuba wandenza ngokunjalo?" 
Romans9:21 Umbumbi akanamandla pezu kwodongwe na, ukuba ati ngesimba elikwa linye enze enye impahla ibe yenokubekwa, nenye ibe yengenakubekwa?" 
Romans9:22 Kodwa soti nina, ukuba utixo, etanda ukubonakalisa umsindo wake, nokuwazisa amandla ake, wazinyamezela ngokuzeka kade okukulu impahla zomsindo sezilungele intshabalalo:" 
Romans9:23 ukuze kanjalo abazise ubutyebi bobungcwalisa bake pezu kwempahla zetaṙu, abete kwa pambili wazilungisela ubungcwalisa," 
Romans9:24 ate kanjako wazibiza, kwa tina, bekungekuwo ama‐Juda odwa, bekukubo abaheyideni nabo?" 
Romans9:25 Njengokuba kanjalo esiti kweka‐Hosheha: Ndiya kubiza ngabantu bam, abo bebengengabantu bam; nalowo ngotandiweyo, obengengotandiweyo:" 
Romans9:26 kwakuya kuti, endaweni apo bekutiwa kubo: Aningabo abantu bam; kwa kona baya kubizwa ngosapo lwotixo ohleliyo." 
Romans9:27 Kanjako u‐Yisaya uyadanduluka ngo‐Sirayeli ukuti: Nangona inani losapo luka‐Sirayeli lingangentlabati yolwandle, sisisalela esiya kusindiswa:" 
Romans9:28 ngokuba esigqibela isibuzo, esifinyeza ebulungiseni; ngokuba isibuzo esifinyezekileyo eya kusenza uyehova emhlabeni."
