Romans9:29 Nanjengokuba u‐Yisaya etshilo pambili ukuti: Ukuba uyehova wemikosi ubengasishiyelanga inzalo, ngesibe sinjenge‐Sodome, ngesibe sifaniswa ne‐Gomora." 
Romans9:30 Soti nina ngoko? Siti abaheyideni, abebengaputumi ubulungisa, bafumana ubulungisa, kwa ubulungisa obungokolo." 
Romans9:31 Kodwa o‐Sirayeli, beputuma umteto wobulungisa, abafikelela umteto wobungcwalisa." 
Romans9:32 Nganina? Ngokokuba bekungengokolo, bekunjengokungati kungemisebenzi yomteto bebebuputuma: ngokuba baku̔bekayo ngakulo ilitye lokuku̔bekisa;" 
Romans9:33 njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Bona ke, ndiyabeka e‐Ziyone ilitye lokuku̔bekisa, nolwalwa lwokuwisa: kanjalo osukuba ekolwa kulo akayi kudaniswa." 
Romans10:1 BAZALWANA! ukukanuka kwentliziyo yam nokukunga kwam kutixo ngenxa yo‐Sirayeli, kokwokuba basindiswe." 
Romans10:2 Ngokuba ndibanqi̔nela ukuba banokuzondelela utixo, koko kungengokuqonda." 
Romans10:3 Ngokuba ubulungisa bukatixo bengabazi nje, nobabo ubulungisa befuna ukubumisa, abalulamelanga kubo ubulungisa bukatixo." 
Romans10:4 Ngokuba u‐Kristu esisipelo somteto bube bubulungisa kubo bonke abakolwayo. 
Romans10:5 Ngokuba u‐Mosesi ebalisa ubulungisa obungawo umteto, esiti: Umntu ozenze zona uya kupila ngazo." 
Romans10:6 Kodwa ubulungisa obungokolo buyateta ngokuti: Ungatsho entliziyweni yako ukuti: Ngubanina oya kunyukela ezulwini? (oko kukuti, ukuhla no‐Kristu:)" 
Romans10:7 umhlaumbi: Ngubanina oya kuhlela ehadesi? (oko kukuti, ukunyuka no‐Kristu kwabafileyo.)" 
Romans10:8 Koko buti nina? Ilizwi likufupi kuwe, emlonyeni wako, nasentliziyweni yako: oko kukuti, ilizwi lokolo esilishumayelayo;" 
Romans10:9 lokokuba, xeshekweni uti uxele ngomlomo wako inkosi u‐Yesu, ukolwe entliziyweni yako ukuba utixo wamvusa kwabafileyo, uya kusindiswa." 
Romans10:10 Ngokuba ngentliziyo kukolwa kube bubulungisa, nangomlomo kuxelwa kube lusindiswa." 
Romans10:11 Ngokuba isiba̔lo sisiti: Osukuba ekolwa kuye akayi kudaniswa. 
Romans10:12 Ngokuba kungeko ukwahluka pakati kwom‐Juda nom‐Girike; ngokuba ikwa nye inkosi yabo bonke, ibutyebi ngakubo bonke ababizayo kuyo:" 
Romans10:13 ngokuba bonke abasukuba bebiza egameni likayehova beya kusindiswa. 
Romans10:14 Pofu boti nina ukubiza kulowo bangakolwanga kuye? boti nina nokukolwa kulowo abangamvanga? boti nina nokuva bengenamshumayeli? 
Romans10:15 Kanjako boti nina ukushumayela, xeshekweni bangatunywayo? njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Hai ukuba ntle kwazo inyawo zabo abashumayelayo indaba ezimnandi zoxolo, abashumayelayo indaba ezimnandi zezinto ezilungileyo!" 
Romans10:16 Kuloko bebengapulapuli bonke kwindaba ezimnandi ezo. Ngokuba u‐Yisaya esiti: Yehova! ngubanina okoliweyo yintshumayelo yetu? 
Romans10:17 Kukona ukolo luvela ngokuva, nokuva ngalo ilizwi likatixo." 
Romans10:18 Koko ndisiti: Abeva na? Hai gxebe: Intlokoma yabo yapumela kuwo wonke umhlaba, namazwi abo kwa sezipelweni zelizwe." 
Romans10:19 Koko ndisiti: Abazi na o‐Sirayeli? Ukuqala u‐Mosesi uti: Ndonivusela ikwele pezu kwolungelulo uhlanga; pezu kwohlanga olungenakuqonda ndoniqumbisa. 
Romans10:20 Kodwa u‐Yisaya uyakalipa kakulu ati: Ndafunyanwa ngabo babengandifuni; ndabonakaliswa kwabo babengandibuzi. 
Romans10:21 Kodwa ngo‐Sirayeli uti: Yonke imini ndazitwabulula izandla zam ngasebantwini abangevayo nabapikayo. 
Romans11:1 NDITI ngako: Utixo wabalahla na abantu bake? Kwanga kungebe njalo! Ngokuba nam ndingum‐Sirayeli, kwinzalo ka‐Abrahame, kwisizwe sika‐Benjamine." 
Romans11:2 Utixo akabalahla abantu bake obebazi kwa pambili. Anikwazi na oko sikutsho isiba̔lo kuyo imbali ka‐Elija, — okokuba uyakalazela kutixo ngo‐Sirayeli, esiti:" 
Romans11:3 Yehova! abaprofite bako bababulele, nezibingelo zako bazici̔tile; sendisele mna ndedwa, nobomi bam bayabufuna?" 
Romans11:4 Noko iti nina kuye impendulo katixo? Ndizisalisele amadoda amawaka asixe̔nxe, lawo angagobanga dolo ku‐Bali." 
Romans11:5 Kwa njalo ke nakwelixesha lakaloku nje kuko isisalela ngokwoqasho lwofefe. 
Romans11:6 Kodwa ukuba kungofefe, akusengayo imisebenzi; okanye ufefe alubi selulo ufefe: kodwa ukuba kungayo imisebenzi, akuseko ufefe; okanye umsebenzi awusenguwo umsebenzi." 
Romans11:7 Yinina pofu? Oko bakufunayo o‐Sirayeli, oku abakuzuzanga; kodwa abaluqashwa bakuzuza; bati abaseleyo baba lukuni," 
Romans11:8 (njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Utixo wabanika umoya wokwozela, amehlo okuba bangaboni, nendlebe zokuba bangeva;) kwada kwayimini yanamhla." 
Romans11:9 Naye u‐Davide uti: Isitebe sabo masenziwe umgibe, nesibata, nesixakaniso, nempindezelo kubo:" 
Romans11:10 amehlo abo makenziwe mnyama, baza bangaboni; nomhlana wabo uwugobe pantsi futi." 
Romans11:11 Nditi ngako: Baku̔beka na ukuze bawe? Kwanga kungebe njalo! koko ngesiposo sabo usindiso luze kubo abaheyideni, ize bavuselwe ubukwele." 
Romans11:12 Kodwa ukuba isiposo sabo sibubutyebi belizwe, n okuba ukuncipa kwabo kububutyebi babaheyideni, kwoba njalo kangakananina ngakumbi ukuzaliseka kwabo?" 
Romans11:13 Ngokuba nditeta kuni bangabaheyideni: ngendawo yokuba ndingumpostile wabaheyideni, ubukonzi bam ndiyabudumisa;" 
Romans11:14 ukuba kungati ndingabavusela ubukwele abayinyama yam, ndize ndisindise inxenye kubo." 
Romans11:15 Ngokuba ukulahlwa kwabo ukuba kukukuxoliswana kwelizwe, kwoba yinto nina ukwamkelwa kwabo, kupela bubomi buvuka ekufeni?" 
Romans11:16 Kanjalo ukuba isiqalo sentlama singcwele, linjalo nesimba layo; nokuba ingcambo ingcwele, anjalo namasebe." 
Romans11:17 Kodwa ukuba inxenye yamasebe yapulwa, nawe, ungumnquma wasendle nje, wamiliselwa pakati kwawo, waza wabelwa kwingcambo nakukutyeba kwomnquma kunye nawo," 
Romans11:18 ungaqa̔yiseli amasebe. Kodwa ukuba uya wa qa̔yisela, asi nguwe oxasa ingcambo, yingcambo exasa wena." 
Romans11:19 Woti ngako: Amasebe apulwa, ukuze mna ndimiliselwe." 
Romans11:20 Kulungile ke: ngenxa yokungakolwa kwawo apulwa wona, nawe umi ngokukolwa kwako. Ungaqanqalazi, uti woyike:" 
Romans11:21 ngokuba lawo angamasebe ngemvelo ukuba utixo akayekanga wona, lumka hleze kungati angayeki nawe." 
Romans11:22 Kangela ke ngoko ububele nobukali bukatixo: ngakubo abo bawayo, bubukali; kodwa ngakuwe, bububele, xeshekweni umana ukuma ebubeleni bake; okanye nawe wonqanyulwa." 
Romans11:23 Ewe nabo bona, ukuba bati bangamani ukuma ekungakolweni kwabo, baya kumiliselwa: ngokuba utixo enamandla ukubamilisela kanjako." 
Romans11:24 Ngokuba wena ukuba wabunqanyulwa kumnquma ongowasendle ngemvelo, waza wamiliselwa emnqunyeni olungileyo ngokungalungelene nemvelo; kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi abaya kuti aba, aba ngamasebe ngemvelo, bamiliselwe kowabo umnquma?" 
Romans11:25 Ngokuba ndingatandi, bazalwana! ukuba nibe ningayazi imfihlakalo le, ukuze ningaziqa̔yiseli ngobulumko; yokokuba ubulukuni buhlele o‐Sirayeli ngenxenye, kude kungene ukuzaliseka kwabaheyideni;" 
Romans11:26 kuze ngokunjalo bonke o‐Sirayeli basindiswe; njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Kuya kuvela kwi‐Ziyone lowo ungumkululi, waeya kusonga ukungabedeshi ku‐Yakobi;" 
Romans11:27 kanjalo, olu lucebano nabo luvela kum, okuya ndizisusayo izono zabo." 
Romans11:28 Ngokwevangeli, bazintshaba ngenxa yenu; kodwa ngokwoqasho, bangabatandwa ngenxa yoyise:" 
Romans11:29 ngokuba zingenakuguqulwa izipo zikatixo nobizo lwake. 
Romans11:30 Ngokuba njengokuba nani benifudula ningeva utixo, kodwa kaloku nje nifumene ububele ngokungeva kwabo aba;" 
Romans11:31 kwa njalo naba kaloku nje abavanga, ukuze ngobubele obenzelwe nina bona nabo bafumane ububele." 
Romans11:32 Ngokuba utixo ebavalele ndawonye kwa bonke kuko ukungeva, ukuze abe nobubele ngakubo bonke." 
Romans11:33 Hai ukwendela kwobutyebi nobulumko nokwazi kukatixo! ukungapengululeki kwemigwebo yake, nokungalandeki kwendlela zake!" 
Romans11:34 Ngokuba ngubanina owazileyo uluvo lukayehova? umhlaumbi ngubanina omnikileyo icebo? 
Romans11:35 umhlaumbi ngubanina ompangeleyo ngokupa, kuze kubuye kuvuzwe yena?" 
Romans11:36 Kuba into zonke zivela kuye, zingaye, zingenxa yake: kwa kuye makubeko ubungcwalisa kude kube ngunapakade. Amene." 
Romans12:1 NDIYANIKUNGA ngoko, bazalwana! ngezibele zikatixo, ukubaniyimisele imizimba yenu ibe lidini elipilileyo, elingcwele, elikolekileyo kutixo, okusisikonzo senu esifanelekileyo:" 
Romans12:2 nize ningalinganisani nelilizwe likoyo, niti nibe nenziwe ngakumbi ngokuhlaziywa kwoluvo lwenu, ukuba niqiqe into iyiyo intando katixo elungileyo, ekolekieyo, efezekileyo." 
Romans12:3 Ngokuba ndisiti, ngalo ufefe endanikwa lona, kubo bonke abakoyo pakati kwenu, mabangakumbuli ngokupezulu koko bafanele ukukumbula ngako, koko mabakumbule ngokutelekelela, njengokuba utixo wabele abanye ngabanye isilinganiselwa sokolo." 
Romans12:4 Ngokuba kwa njengokuba sinawo amalungu amaninzi emzimbeni mnye, kanti amalungu akanawo umsebenzi mnye onke;" 
Romans12:5 kwa njalo tina, sibaninzi nje, singumzimba mnye ku‐Kristu, namalungu omnye nomnye ngabanye." 
Romans12:6 Kekaloku sinazo izipiwo ngezipiwo ngowofefe esanikwa lona nje, nokuba bubuprofitesho, masoprofiteshe ngokwesaci sokolo lwetu;" 
Romans12:7 nokuba bubukonzi, masisebenze ebukonzini betu: nokuba ngofundisayo, makahlale ekufundiseni kwake;" 
Romans12:8 nokuba ngoyalayo, ekuyaleni kwake: owabayo, makenje njalo ngesisa; opatayo, ngokuku̔tala; owenza ngobubele, ngokucwayita." 
Romans12:9 Utando lwenu malube lolungazenzisiyo. Zondani okukohlakeleyo; namatelani kokulungileyo. 
Romans12:10 Ekutandeni abazalwana, yibani nobubele omnye kwomnye; ekubekeni, yenzani ngokupangelana;" 
Romans12:11 ekuku̔taleni, ninganqeni; zondelelani emoyeni; konzani enkosini;" 
Romans12:12 vuyani etembeni; nyamezelani ebunzimeni; zingisani ekutandazeni; 
Romans12:13 yabelani intswelo zabangcwele; nxamelani imbuko yabasemzini. 
Romans12:14 Tamsanqelisani abo banitshutshisayo: tamsanqelisani, ningqalekisi ke." 
Romans12:15 Vuyani nabo bavuyayo, nilile nabo balilayo." 
Romans12:16 Yibani nokuvumelana omnye nomnye. Ningamyamekeli izinto ezipakamileyo, niti nitobele kwezitobekileyo. Ningaziqa̔yiseli ngobulumko." 
Romans12:17 Ningavuzi mntu ngobubi ngenxa yobubi. Yazalelelani izinto ezifaneleyo ebusweni babantu bonke. 
Romans12:18 Ukuba kungenzeka, maniti okungecala lenu nixolane nabantu bonke." 
Romans12:19 Ninggazipindezeleli ngokwenu, batandwa! niti ninike indawo kuwo umsindo; ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Kukokwam ukupindezela, kwobuyekezwa ndim; utsho uyehova." 
Romans12:20 Ngako xeshekweni utshaba lwako lulambayo, lufunzele; xeshekweni lunxanwayo, luseze: ngokuba usenje njalo uya kufumba amalahle omlilo pezu kwentloko yalo." 
Romans12:21 Ungoyiswa kokukohlakeleyo, uti ukwoyise okukohlakeleyo ngokulungileyo." 
Romans13:1 MAYITI yonke imipefumlo ilulamele kumagunya apezulu kuyo: ngokuba kungeko gunya, kupela elivela kutixo; lomagunya akoyo amisiwe ngutixo." 
Romans13:2 Yena ngoko ozimisa ngakulo igunya, uyamelana nesimiselo sikatixo: kanjalo abo bamelayo baya kuzamkelela umgwebo." 
Romans13:3 Ngokuba abapati bengesisoyikiso kuyo imisebenzi elungileyo, basiso kuyo ekohlakeleyo. Utanda ke na ukuba ungabi nakwoyika lona igunya? yenza oko kulungileyo, wauya kuzuza udunyiswa kwa kulo:" 
Romans13:4 ngokuba umpati engumkonzi katixo kuwe kube kokulungileyo. Kodwa xeshekweni ukwenza oko kukohlakeleyo, yoyika; ngokuba engafumani apate isiṙele: ngokuba engumkonzi katixo, umpindezeli kube ngumsindo kulowo ukwenza okukohlakeleyo." 
Romans13:5 Ngako oko nifanelwe kukuba nilulamele, kungengenxa yomsindo kodwa, kungenxa yesazeliso kanjako." 
Romans13:6 Ngokuba ngenxa yoku kanjalo ninikela iminikelo: ngokuba bengabakonzi bakatixo, behlala besebenza kwa lento." 
Romans13:7 Nikelani ngoko kubo bonke oko kufanele bona: ube ngumnikelo ko fanele umnikelo; ibe yincamlo ko fanele incamlo; lube lulwoyiko ko fanele ulwoyiko; ibe yimbeko ko fanele imbeko. 
Romans13:8 Ningabi netyala lanto emntwini, kupela libe lelokutandana; ngokuba otandayo omnye umntu efezile umteto." 
Romans13:9 Ngokuba oku: Akuyi kuṙexeza; akuyi kubulala; akuyi kuba̔; akuyi kunqi̔na ubunqi̔na obubuxoki; akuyi kunqwenela; nokuba kuko omnye umyalelo, uyafinyezelwa kwesisiteto, kwesokuti: Uyakutanda ummelwane wako njengokuzi tanda kwako." 
Romans13:10 Utando alwenzeli ummelwane ububi: ngako utando lukukufezwa kwomteto. 
Romans13:11 Nako oku masikwenze, silazi ixesha nje, lokokuba lise lilixeshana lokuba sivuke ebutongweni: ngokuba kaloku nje usindiswa lukufupi kuti ngakumbi kokuya saba ngamakolwa." 
Romans13:12 Ubusuku buza kudlula; imini ke iyasondela, masiti ngoko sibeke nxamnye imisebenzi yobumnyama, sambate izixo̔bo zokukanya." 
Romans13:13 Masihambe ngokufanelekileyo, njengasemini; kungabi ngemihlali yobusuku nangokunxila, kungabi ngemipimiso nangobutshinitshini, kungabi ngepike nangozondo." 
Romans13:14 Koko yambatani inkosi u‐Yesu Kristu, nize ningayazaleleli inyama uku feza inkanuko zayo." 
Romans14:1 LOWO ke obutataka elukolweni mamkeleni, kungabi ngenxa yokwahlulwa kwempikiswano kodwa." 
Romans14:2 Omnye uyakolwa kukuba angatya into zonke: yena kodwa obutataka uyatya imifuno. 
Romans14:3 Otyayo makangamdeli ongatyiyo; kanjako ongatyiyo makangamgwebi otyayo: ngokuba utixo emamkele. 
Romans14:4 Ungubanina wena ugwebayo isicaka somnye? kukuyo eyaso inkosi ukuma kwaso umhlaumbi ukuwa kwaso. Kodwa siya kumiswa; ngokuba utixo enamandla ukusimisa. 
Romans14:5 Omnye uyabuka enye imini ngapezu kwenye; omnye uyabuka zonke imini. Mabati abanye ngabanye bakolise ukukolwa kwezabo izimvo. 
Romans14:6 Oyinonelelayo imini, uyayinonelelela inkosi; kanjalo ongayinoneleliyo imini, akayinoneleleli inkosi: otyayo, uyatyela inkosi, ngokuba ebulela kutixo; kanjalo ongatyiyo, akatyeli inkosi, ebulela kutixo naye." 
Romans14:7 Ngokuba kungeko namnye kuti ozidlelayo ubomi ngokwake; kanjako akuko namnye ozifelayo ngokwake. 
Romans14:8 Ngokuba naxeshekweni sidlayo ubomi, sibudlela inkosi; naxeshekweni sifayo, sifela inkosi: ngako nokuba siyadla ubomi, nokuba siyafa, singa benkosi." 
Romans14:9 Ngokuba ngenxa yoku u‐Kristu wafa, wavuka, wabuya wapila, ukuba abe yinkosi neyabafileyo neyabahleliyo." 
Romans14:10 Kodwa wena, yinina ukuba ugwebe umzalwana wako? kanjalo nawe, yinina ukuba udele umzalwana wako? ngokuba siya kuti sonke sime pambi kwesihlalo sokugweba sika‐Kristu." 
Romans14:11 Ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Ndihleli nje, utsho uyehova, otoba kum onke amadolo, zenze imvumo kutixo zonke ilwimi." 
Romans14:12 Ngako ke sonke ngabanye sozipendulela kutixo. 
Romans14:13 Masingabi sagwebana ngoko; niti ngokukumbi nigwebe ukuti aniyi kubekela umzalwana isiku̔bekiso nesiwiso. 
Romans14:14 Ndiyazi, ndiyakolwa kanjalo, kuyo inkosi u‐Yesu, ukuba akuko nto enco̔lileyo ngokwayo: kupela kulowo ubalayo into ukuba inco̔lile, inco̔lile kuye yena." 
Romans14:15 Kodwa ukuba ngenxa yokudla umzalwana wako uyadaniswa, akusahambi ngokwotando. Ungambubisi ngokudla kwako lowo u‐Kristu wamfelayo." 
Romans14:16 Makungagxekwa ke ukulunga kwenu: 
Romans14:17 ngokuba ubukumkani bukatixo bungekukutya nokusela, bububulungisa, noxolo, novuyo kumoya oyingcwele." 
Romans14:18 Ngokuba oti kwezizinto akonze u‐Kristu, ekolekile kutixo, enokubukwa nangabantu." 
Romans14:19 Ngako ke masiputume izinto zoxolo, nezinto eziyelela ukumiswana." 
Romans14:20 Ungawuci̔ti ngenxa yokudla umsebenzi katixo. Zonke izinto okunene zicocekile; noko kukohlakele kulowamntu otyayo ngokuku̔bekisa omnye. 
Romans14:21 Kulungile ukuba ungatyi inyama, nokuba ungaseli iveyine, nokuba ung enzi nto ati ngayo umzalwana wako aku̔bekiswe, umhlaumbi axakaniswe, umhlaumbi abe butataka." 
Romans14:22 Wena uba nokolo na? yiba nalo kwa kuwe ngokwako pambi kwotixo. Unetamsanqa lowo ungazigwebiyo kuko oko akubukayo. 
Romans14:23 Kodwa yena otandabuzayo, xeshekweni atyayo usel’ egwetywa, kuba enga tyi ngokolo: nako konke okungengokolo, kusisono." 
Romans15:1 Kanjalo tina banamandla sifanelwe kukutwala ubutataka babaswel’ amandla, singazikolisi." 
Romans15:2 Masiti sonke ngabanye sikolise abamelwane betu ngoko ku ba lungele kube kukumiswa. 
Romans15:3 Ngokuba no‐Kristu ebengazikolisi; koko, njengokuba kuba̔liwe: Izituko zabo babetuka wena zawa pezu kwam." 
Romans15:4 Ngokuba konke okube kuba̔liwe pambili bekuba̔lelwe okwetu ukufundiswa, ukuze siti ngawo umonde nolwonwabiso lweziba̔lo sibe netemba." 
Romans15:5 Wanga ke utixo womonde nolwonwabiso anganinika okokuba nibe nokuvumelana omnye nomnye njengokuka‐Kristu Yesu: 
Romans15:6 ukuze kwa ngentliziyo nye niti ngomlomo mnye nimdumise yena utixo noyise wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu. 
Romans15:7 Ngako oko yamkelanani, njengokuba no‐Kristu wasamkela tina, kube kukudunyiswa kukatixo." 
Romans15:8 Nditi kekaloku, u‐Yesu Kristu wenziwe umkonzi wolwaluko, ngenxa yenyaniso katixo, kuze kuqiniswe amadinga abebekelwa oyise:" 
Romans15:9 bati ke abaheyideni badumise utixo ngenxa yobubele bake; njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Ngenxa yoku ndobulela kuwe pakati kwabaheyideni, ndicule egameni lako." 
Romans15:10 Uti nakanjako: Vuyani, baheyideni! kunye nabantu bake." 
Romans15:11 Nakanjako: Dumisani uyehova, nonke nina baheyideni! nimbonge, nonke nina zizwe!" 
Romans15:12 Nakanjako, u‐Yisaya uti: Kwobako ingcambo ka‐Jese, novukayo ukuba yinkosi pezu kwabaheyideni; kwa kuyo yona abaheyideni baya kutemba." 
Romans15:13 Wanga ke utixo wetemba anganizalisa ngalo lwonke uvuyo noxolo ekukolweni, nize nikolise ukwanda etembeni, ngamandla omoya oyingcwele." 
Romans15:14 KEKALOKU ndikoliwe ngani, bazalwana bam! kwa mna ngokwam, ukuba nani ngokwenu nizele kukulunga, nizalisiwe kuko konke ukwazi, ninamandla okululekana kanjako." 
Romans15:15 Kodwa ndiba̔lile ngokukalipileyo ngakumbi kuni, bazalwana! ngenxenye, njengonikumbuzayo, ngenxa yofefe endanikwa lona ngutixo," 
Romans15:16 ukuba ndibe ngumkonzi ka‐Yesu Kristu ukuya kubaheyideni, ndisenza isikonzo somperisite evangelini katixo, ukuze ukunikelwa kwabaheyideni kube kukolekile, kungcwalisiwe ngomoya oyingcwele." 
Romans15:17 Ndingaqa̔yisa ngoko ku‐Yesu Kristu ngezozinto zilunge kutixo. 
Romans15:18 Ngokuba ndingayi kuka ndilinge ukuteta ngezozinto angazenzanga u‐Kristu ngam, kuze kuviwe ngabaheyideni, ngelizwi nangesenzo," 
Romans15:19 emandleni emiqondiso nemimangaliso, emandleni omoya katixo; ndide ndati kwa kuyo i‐Yerusaleme nendawo ezipahlayo kwada kwase‐Lirikume, ndakolisa ukushumayela ivangeli ka‐Kristu;" 
Romans15:20 ndizamela kodwa ukuba ndenje nje ukuyishumayela, kungabi lapo u‐Kristu wa sele kankanyelwa kona, ukuze ndingaki pezu kwokuseka kwomnye umntu;" 
Romans15:21 koko, njengokuba kuba̔liwe: Abo kwakungatyelwanga nto ngaye kubo baya kubona; nabo bangevanga baya kuqonda." 
Romans15:22 Ngako oku kanjalo ndibe nditintelwa futi kangaka ekuzeni kuni. 
Romans15:23 Kodwa kaloku nje, ndingasenayo indawo kulamazwe, ndinesilangazelelo kanjako leminyaka mininzi sokuba ndize kuni," 
Romans15:24 xeshekweni kusukuba ndihambela e‐Sipene, ndoza kuni: ngokuba nditemba ukunibona ekudluleni kwam, nokupelekelelwa nini ngakona, xeshekweni nditi kuqala ngenxenye ndikoliswe nini." 
Romans15:25 Kodwa kaloku nje ndiyahambela e‐Yerusaleme, ndikonza abangcwele." 
Romans15:26 Ngokuba kwanga kulungile kwabase‐Masedoniya nakwabase‐Akaiya, ukwenzela amahlwempu pakati kwabangcwele abase‐Yerusaleme umnikelo otile." 
Romans15:27 Kwanga kulungile kubo; kanjalo banetyala kuwo. Ngokuba abaheyideni ukuba babelwe izinto zawo ezibumoya, bafanelwe kuko nokuba bakonze kuwo ezintweni ezibunyama." 
Romans15:28 Ndiya kuti ngoko, nxa ndikufezile oku, nanxa ndisiqinisele kuwo isiqa̔mo esi, ndibuye ngani ukuya e‐Sipene." 
Romans15:29 Kanjalo ndiyazi ukuba ndoti, ndakuza kuni, ndize ekuzaleni kwetamsanqa levangeli ka‐Kristu." 
Romans15:30 Kekaloku ndiyanikunga, bazalwana! ngayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, nangalo utando lwomoya, ukuba nizame kunye nam ekunditandazeleni kutixo;" 
Romans15:31 ukuze ndihlangulwe kubo abangevayo e‐Judeya; nokuze ukonzo lwam olwenzelwa i‐Yerusaleme lube lukole kile kwabangcwele; 
Romans15:31 ukuze ndihlangulwe kubo abangevayo e‐Judeya; nokuze ukonzo lwam olwenzelwa i‐Yerusaleme lube lukole kile kwabangcwele; 
Romans15:32 ukuze ndize ngovuyo kuni ngayo intando katixo, ndifumane ukupumla kunye nani." 
Romans15:33 Wanga ke utixo woxolo angaba nani nonke. Amene. 
Romans16:1 NDIYAMAZISA kuni u‐Fibi udade wetu, ongumkonzikazi waseṙementeni ese‐Kenkriya:" 
Romans16:2 ukuze nimamkele enkosini ngokufanele abangcwele, nokuba nimncede emcimbini asukuba efuna ukunceda kwenu kuwo: ngokuba yena naye ebengumsizi wabaninzi, nowam kanjalo." 
Romans16:3 Bulisani u‐Pirisila no‐Akwila, abasebenzisi bam ku‐Kristu Yesu:" 
Romans16:4 abati ngenxa yobomi bam bazibeka pantsi ezabo intamo: ekungendim ndedwa obulelayo kubo, zizo zonke iṙemente zabaheyideni nazo." 
Romans16:5 Kanjako bulisani iṙemente esendlwini yabo. Bulisani u‐Epenetusi umtandwa wam, osisandulelo sase‐Akaiya kuye u‐Kristu." 
Romans16:6 Bulisani u‐Mariya, owasisebenzela kakulu." 
Romans16:7 Bulisani u‐Andronike no‐Juniyasi, izalamane zam, namabanjwa kunye nam, abadumileyo pakati kwabapostile, aba?-?beku‐Kristu pambili kum kanjalo." 
Romans16:8 Bulisani u‐Ampiliya umtandwa wam enkosini. 
Romans16:9 Bulisani u‐Uribane umsebenzisi wetu ku‐Kristu, no‐Sitaku umtandwa wam." 
Romans16:10 Bulisani u‐Apelesi, obukiweyo ku‐Kristu. Bulisani abakwa‐Aristobulo." 
Romans16:11 Bulisani u‐Herodiyone isalamane sam. Bulisani abakwa‐Narakiso aba senkosini. 
Romans16:12 Bulisani u‐Tirifena no‐Tirifosa, abasebenzayo enkosini. Bulisani u‐Perisi otandiweyo, owasebenzayo kakulu enkosini." 
Romans16:13 Bulisani u‐Rufusi oqashiweyo enkosini, na lowo u ngunina wake nowam." 
Romans16:14 Bulisani u‐Sinkirito, u‐Filegoni, u‐Heremasi, u‐Pateroba, u‐Heremisi, nabazalwana abanabo." 
Romans16:15 Bulisani u‐Filologe no‐Juliya, u‐Nereyusi nodade wake, no‐Limpasi, nabo bonke abangcwele abanabo." 
Romans16:16 Bulisanani ngokwanga okungcwele. Iṙemente zika‐Kristu ziyanibulisa. 
Romans16:17 Kekaloku ndiyanikunga, bazalwana! ukuba nigqale abo bazenzayo imbambaniso nezixakaniso, ngokungalungelene nofundiso enilufundileyo; nize nibapepe." 
Romans16:18 Ngokuba abanjalo bengakonzi inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, koko bekonza isisu sabo; bati kanjalo ngamazwi amnandi nangeziteto ezibongayo bazilukuhle intliziyo zabangenamamenemene." 
Romans16:19 Ngokuba ukuva kwenu kuvakele kubo bonke abantu. Ndiyavuya ngoko pezu kwenu: kodwa ndinga ningaba ngabalumkileyo ngakuko okulungileyo, nabangenamaqokolo ngakuko okukohlakeleyo." 
Romans16:20 Waeya kuti utixo woxolo ahle atyumze u‐Satane ngapantsi kwenyawo zenu. Ufefe lwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu malube nani. Amene. 
Romans16:21 U‐Timote umsebenzisi wam, no‐Lukusi, no‐Yasone, no‐Sosipatere, izalamane zam, bayanibulisa." 
Romans16:22 Mna Teretusi, owaba̔la le ncwadi, ndiyanibulisa enkosini." 
Romans16:23 U‐Gayusi, umbuki wam noweṙemente yonke, uyanibulisa. U‐Erastusi igosa lesixeko uyanibulisa, no‐Kwarito umzalwana wetu." 
Romans16:24 Ufefe lwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu malube nani nonke. Amene. 
Romans16:25 Kekaloku kulowo unamandla okuniqinisa njengokwevangeli yam nokushunyayelwa kuka‐Yesu Kristu, njengokwokutyilwa kwemfihlakalo, ebitiwe cwaka emaxesheni akudala," 
Romans16:26 ete kodwa yabonakaliswa kaloku nje, yaziswa ngazo iziba̔lo zabaprofite, njengokwomyolelo wake utixo ongunapakade, kuzo zonke intlanga kube kukuva kwokolo:" 
Romans16:27 kutixo okupela kwolumkileyo, ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu, okuye makubeko ubungcwalisa kude kube ngunapakade. Amene." 
1Corinthians1:1 UPAULUSI, obiziweyo ukuba ngumpostile ka‐Yesu Kristu ngayo intando katixo, no‐Sositene umzalwana wetu," 
1Corinthians1:2 kubo abayiṙemente katixo ese‐Korinte, abangcwalisiweyo ku‐Kristu Yesu, ababiziweyo ukuba ngabangcwele, kunye nabo bonke ababizayo egameni lenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu kuzo zonke indawo, kwa neyabo neyetu i‐Nkosi:" 
1Corinthians1:3 Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye utixo ubawo wetu, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:4 Ndiyabulela kutixo wam ngamaxesha onke ngani, ngenxa yofefe lukatixo enaninikiwe lona ku‐Kristu Yesu;" 
1Corinthians1:5 ukuba nanite ezintweni zonke natyetyiswa kuye, kuko konke ukuteta nako konke ukwazi;" 
1Corinthians1:6 njengokuba ubunqi̔na buka‐Kristu bebuqiniswa pakati kwenu: 
1Corinthians1:7 nide ningasweli nasinye isipiwo; nilinda ukutyilwa kwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu: 
1Corinthians1:8 oya kuti kanjalo aniqinise kude kube sekupeleni, ningenakunikwa ityala emhleni wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:9 Unyanisekile utixo, enite ngaye nabizelwa ebudlelaneni bonyana wake u‐Yesu Kristu inkosi yetu." 
1Corinthians1:10 KEKALOKU ndiyanikunga, bazalwana! ngalo igama lenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, ukuba nibe nokuteta okukwa kunye nonke, ize zingabiko impambano pakati kwenu, kodwa nibe nizalisekile kolukwa lunye uluvo nakwekwa nye ingcingo." 
1Corinthians1:11 Ngokuba kuxeliwe kum ngani, bazalwana bam! ngabaka‐Kiloyi, ukuba kuko amapike pakati kwenu." 
1Corinthians1:12 Into nditeta yona ke, yeyokuba kutshiwo nini ngabanye ukuti: Mna ndingoka‐Paulusi; nokuti: Mna ndingoka‐Apolosi: nokuti: Mna ndingoka‐Kefasi; nokuti: Mna ndingoka‐Kristu." 
1Corinthians1:13 Wahlukile na u‐Kristu? u‐Paulusi ubenikuruseshelwe na? okunye nibe nibapitizeshelwe na egameni lika‐Paulusi? 
1Corinthians1:14 Ndiyabulela kutixo ukuba ndingabapitizeshanga namnye wakuni, kupela u‐Krisipo no‐Gayusi;" 
1Corinthians1:15 ukuze kungabiko mntu otshoyo ukuti ndabapitizeshela kwelam igama. 
1Corinthians1:16 Ndabapitizesha kodwa nabendlu ka‐Stefana: okupezu kwoku, andazi ukuba ndabapitizesha omnye umntu kusinina." 
1Corinthians1:17 Ngokuba u‐Kristu enganditumanga ukuba ndibapitizeshe, koko wanditumayo ukuba ndiyishumayele ivangeli: kungabi ngabulumko bokuteta, ukuze ikuruse ka‐Kristu ingenziwa into engento yanto." 
1Corinthians1:18 Ngokuba ukuteta kwekuruse kububudenge kwababubayo, kodwa kungamandla katixo kuti basindiswayo." 
1Corinthians1:19 Ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Ndobububisa ubulumko bamalumko, nengqondo yezazi ndoyitshabalalisa." 
1Corinthians1:20 Lipina ilumko? upina umba̔li? upina umpikisi welilizwe likoyo? utixo akabenzanga ubulumko belizwe eli bube bubudenge na? 
1Corinthians1:21 Ngokuba emvenikweni ebulumkweni bukatixo ilizwe belingamazanga utixo ngabo ubulumko balo, kwakolisa utixo ukuti ngabo ubudenge bokushumayela asindise abakolwayo:" 
1Corinthians1:22 ngokokuba ama‐Juda abiza umqondiso, nama‐Girike afuna ubulumko;" 
1Corinthians1:23 kodwa tina sishumayela u‐Kristu ekuruseshiwe; isixakaniso kuma‐Juda, nobudenge kuma‐Girike;" 
1Corinthians1:24 kodwa kwababiziweyo, kwa nama‐Juda nama‐Girike, u‐Kristu engamandla katixo, nobulumko bukatixo." 
1Corinthians1:25 Ngokuba okubudenge bukatixo kulumkile ngapezu kwabantu; nokubutataka bukatixo kunamandla ngapezu kwabantu. 
1Corinthians1:26 Ngokuba nibona ukubizwa kwenu, bazalwana! ukuba asi ngabaninzi abalumkileyo ngokwenyama, asi ngabaninzi abanamandla, asi ngabaninzi abayimiduna:" 
1Corinthians1:27 koko izinto ezibudenge zelizwe wazinyula utixo, ukuze adanise abalumkileyo; nezinto ezibutataka zelizwe wazinyula utixo, ukuze adanise izinto ezomeleleyo;" 
1Corinthians1:28 nezinto ezimnyama zelizwe, nezinto ezidelekileyo, wazinyula utixo, nezinto ezingekoyo ukuze atshabalalise izinto ezikoyo;" 
1Corinthians1:29 kuze kungabiko namnye umntu oqa̔yisayo ebusweni bake. 
1Corinthians1:30 Kodwa ngaye yena nina nikuye u‐Kristu Yesu, owenzelwa tina ubulumko buvela kutixo, kwa nobulungisa, nengcwaliso, nokululo:" 
1Corinthians1:31 ukuze, njengokuba kuba̔liwe: Lowo uqa̔yisayo, makaqa̔yise ku‐yehova." 
1Corinthians2:1 NAM ndakuza kuni, bazalwana! andeza ndishumayela kuni ubunqi̔na bukatixo ngobungangamsha bokuteta nobobulumko." 
1Corinthians2:2 Ngokuba ndagweba ukuti andiyi kuyazi nento pakati kwenu, kupela u‐Yesu Kristu, naye lo ekuruseshiwe." 
1Corinthians2:3 Kanjako ndabendiko kuni ebutatakeni, nasekwoyikeni, nasekututumeleni okuninzi." 
1Corinthians2:4 Kwaye ukuteta kwam nokushumayela kwam bekungengamazwi acengayo obulumko babantu, bekungokubonakaliswa kwomoya nokwamandla:" 
1Corinthians2:5 ukuze ukolo lwenu lungemi ebulumkweni babantu, koko lume emandleni katixo." 
1Corinthians2:6 Kanti siyateta ubulumko pakati kwabafezekileyo; kodwa ubulumko obungebubo obelilizwe likoyo, obungebubo nobabapati belilizwe likoyo, abatshabalalayo:" 
1Corinthians2:7 koko sibuteta ubulumko bukatixo emfihlakalweni, obo bufihlelweyo, owabete utixo pambili engekabiko amaxesha akudala wabumisela ubungcwalisa betu:" 
1Corinthians2:8 okungeko namnye wabapati belilizwe likoyo obazileyo: ngokuba bona ukuba bebebazile, ngebengayikuruseshanga inkosi yobungcwalisa." 
1Corinthians2:9 Koko, njengokuba kuba̔liwe: Izinto ezingabonwanga liliso, nezingaviwanga yindlebe, nezingangenanga entliziyweni yomntu, zezi izinto utixo azilungisele abo bamtandayo." 
1Corinthians2:10 Kodwa utixo uzityilile kuti ngaye umoya wake: ngokuba umoya epengulula izinto zonke, ewe, kwa izinto ezinzulu zikatixo." 
1Corinthians2:11 Ngokuba ngubanina pakati kwabantu owaziyo izinto zomntu, kupela ngumoya womntu okuye? ngokunjalo nezinto zikatixo akuko namnye ozaziyo, kupela ngumoya katixo." 
1Corinthians2:12 Tina kodwa asiwamkelanga umoya welizwe, koko simamkele umoya ovela kutixo; ukuze sizazi ezozinto sizipiweyo ngutixo." 
1Corinthians2:13 Esiti kanjalo sitete kwa zona, kungengamazwi afundisiweyo bubulumko babantu, kungalawo afundisiweyo ngumoya oyingcwele, silinganisela izinto ezibumoya ngezinto ezibumoya." 
1Corinthians2:14 Kodwa umntu wokuvela akazamkeli izinto zomoya katixo; ngokuba zibubudenge kuye; kanjako akangezazi, kuba ziqiqwa ngo kwomoya." 
1Corinthians2:15 Kodwa lowo ungo womoya uyaziqiqa zonke izinto, kanti yena ngokwake akaqiqwa mntu." 
1Corinthians2:16 Ngokuba ngubanina owazileyo uluvo lukayehova, ukuba uya kumfundisa? Kodwa tina sinalo uluvo luka‐Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:1 NAM, bazalwana! bendingetete kuni njengakubo a bomoya, koko njengakubo abenyama, njengakuzo intsana ku‐Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:2 Ndaniseza ubisi, anda namkelisa ukudla: ngokuba nibe ningekabi namandla okukwamkela; ewe nakaloku nje anikabi namandla." 
1Corinthians3:3 Ngokuba nisengabo abenyama: ngokuba ekubeni kukoyo pakati kwenu uzondo, nepike, nembambaniso, aningabenyama na, nihamba nokuhamba njengokwabantu?" 
1Corinthians3:4 ngokuba okuya ati omnye: Mna ndingoka‐Paulusi: nomnye: Mna ndingoka‐Apolosi; aningabo na abenyama? 
1Corinthians3:5 Ngubanina pofu u‐Paulusi, ngubanina no‐Apolosi, kupela ukuba ngabakonzi enakolwayo ngabo, kwa njengokuba inkosi yabanika ngabanye?" 
1Corinthians3:6 Mna ndatyala, u‐Apolosi wanyela, koko ngutixo owamilisayo." 
1Corinthians3:7 Kwa njalo ke notyalayo akaluto, nonyelayo akaluto; eyona nto ngutixo omilisayo." 
1Corinthians3:8 Kanjako otyalayo nonyelayo banye; kodwa omnye nomnye uya kwamkela owake umvuzo ngokwowake umsebenzi. 
1Corinthians3:9 Ngokuba singabasebenzisi bakatixo: nina niyintsimi katixo, nisisakiwo sikatixo." 
1Corinthians3:10 Ndite ngokwofefe lukatixo endanikwa lona, njengomakisi olumkileyo, ndabeka umsekelo, uti ke omnye ake pezu kwawo. Kodwa mabalumke bonke ngabanye ukuba bati nina ukwaka pezu kwawo." 
1Corinthians3:11 Ngokuba kungeko mntu ongabekayo omnye umsekelo ngapandle kwalowo omiyo, oba ngu‐Yesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians3:12 Kekaloku ukuba umntu uyaka pezu kwalomsekelo igolide, isilivere, amatye anqabileyo, imiti, isikota, indiza;" 
1Corinthians3:13 umsebenzi wabanye ngabanye uya kubonakaliswa: ngokuba umhla lowo uya kuwuhlakazela, kuba utyilwa emlilweni; nomsebenzi wabanye ngabanye umlilo lowo wowulinga ukuba ungowanina." 
1Corinthians3:14 Ukuba umsebenzi womntu usahlala, awakileyo pezu kwawo, uya kwamkela umvuzo." 
1Corinthians3:15 Ukuba umsebenzi womntu uya kutshiswa, uya kulahlekelwa ngumvuzo: kanti yena ngokwake uya kusindiswa; ngokunjalo kodwa njengasekucandeni umlilo." 
1Corinthians3:16 Anazi na ukuba niyitempile katixo, nokuba umoya katixo umi kuni?" 
1Corinthians3:17 Ukuba umntu uyonakalisa yona itempile katixo, utixo uya kwonakalisa kwa yena lowo; ngokuba itempile katixo iyingcwele, eniyiyo nina." 
1Corinthians3:18 Makungabiko namnye ozilukuhlayo. Ukuba kuko umntu oba ulilumko pakati kwenu kwelilizwe likoyo, makabe sisidenge, ukuze abe lilumko." 
1Corinthians3:19 Ngokuba ubulumko belizwe eli bububudenge pambi kwotixo. Ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Uyabamba amalumko ebuqokolweni bawo: 
1Corinthians3:20 nakanjako: Uyehova uyazazi izicamango zamalumko, ukuba ziyinto engendawo." 
1Corinthians3:21 Kwa njalo ke makungabiko namnye oqa̔yisayo ebantwini. Ngokuba zonke izinto zizezenu; 
1Corinthians3:22 nokuba ngu‐Paulusi, nokuba ngu‐Apolosi, nokuba ngu‐Kefasi, nokuba lilizwe, nokuba bubomi, nokuba kukufa, nokuba zizinto ezikoyo, nokuba zizinto eziza kubako; zonke zizezenu;" 
1Corinthians3:23 nani, ningabaka‐Kristu; no‐Kristu, ungo katixo." 
1Corinthians4:1 MAKATI umntu enje njalo ukubalela tina, njengokuba singabakonzi baka‐Kristu namagosa emfihlakalo zikatixo." 
1Corinthians4:2 Kanjako kufunelwa emagoseni, ukuba umntu afunyanwe enyanisekile." 
1Corinthians4:3 Kodwa kum yinto encinanana ukuba ndibuzwe nini, umhlaumbi, ngumbuzo wabantu; ewe nam andizibuzi ngokwam:" 
1Corinthians4:4 ngokuba ndingazeli nanto ngakum; noko akungako oku endigwetyelweyo: kodwa lowo undibuzayo u yinkosi. 
1Corinthians4:5 Kwa njalo ke ningagwebi into lingekabiko ixesha, ide ifike inkosi, eya kuti nezinto ezifihlakeleyo zobumnyama azizise ekuhleni, namaqinga entliziyo awabonakalise: bandule oko bonke ngabanye babe nodunyiswa lwabo kutixo." 
1Corinthians4:6 Kekaloku ezizinto bazalwana! ndiziguqulele kwa kum no‐Apolosi ngokuzekelisa ngenxa yenu, ukuze niti kuti nifunde ukuba ningakumbuli ngokupezulu kwoko kuba̔liweyo, ize ningavutelani omnye ngecala lomnye ngakuye wumbi." 
1Corinthians4:7 Ngokuba ngubanina okwenza wahluke? kanjalo yinto nina unayo ongayamkelanga? kodwa ukuba wayamkela, uqa̔yisela nina, njengokungati akwayamkela?" 
1Corinthians4:8 Nise nihlutisiwe, nise nityebile, nipete ubukosi ngapandle kwetu: he, anaba napata ubukosi! ukuze nati sipate ubukosi kunye nani." 
1Corinthians4:9 Ngokuba ndisiba utixo usivelisile tina bapostile sibe ngabokugqibela, njengabo bamiselweyo ukufa: kuba senziwe isibonelo kulo ilizwe, nakuzo ingelosi, nakubo abantu." 
1Corinthians4:10 Tina sizizidenge ngenxa ka‐Kristu, kodwa nina ningabalumkileyo ku‐Kristu; tina sibutataka, kodwa nina nomelele; nina ninokubekwa, kodwa tina sinokudelwa." 
1Corinthians4:11 Siti kude kube kwelixeshana likoyo silambe, sinxanwe, sihambe zé, sintlitekwe, singa bi nandawo yokuhlala eqinileyo," 
1Corinthians4:12 sizame sisebenza ngezetu izandla: situkwa nje, siyatamsanqelisa; sitshutshiswa nje, siyanyamezela;" 
1Corinthians4:13 sigxekwa nje, siyabongoza: senziwe njengenkunkuma yelizwe, njeng enkutu yezinto zonke, kwada kwakaloku nje." 
1Corinthians4:14 Andiziba̔li ezizinto kuni ukunenzela intloni, kodwa njengabantwana bam abatandiweyo ndiyaniluleka." 
1Corinthians4:15 Ngokuba, nangona ningaba nabo abondleli abalishumi lamawaka ku‐Kristu, ningenabo oyise abaninzi noko: ngokuba ku‐Kristu Yesu ndanizalayo mna ngayo ivangeli." 
1Corinthians4:16 Ndiyanikunga ngoko, yibani ngabalandeli bam." 
1Corinthians4:17 Ngenxa yoku ndimtumile kuni u‐Timote, ongumntwana wam otandiweyo, onyanisekileyo enkosini kanjalo, oya kunikumbuza indlela zam ezikuye u‐Kristu, njengokuba ndifundisayo ezindaweni zonke kuzo zonke iṙemente." 
1Corinthians4:18 Kekaloku inxenye bavutelene, njengokungati bendingezi kuni." 
1Corinthians4:19 Kodwa ndohla ndize kuni, xeshekweni inkosi itandayo, ndazi ke, kungabi lilizwi labo bavuteleneyo, kube ngamandla." 
1Corinthians4:20 Ngokuba ubukumkani bukatixo bungemi elizwini, koko bumi emandleni." 
1Corinthians4:21 Kukupina enikutandayo? ndize kuni ndinentonga, ndize ngotando nangomoya wolulamo, kusinina?" 
1Corinthians5:1 KUKOLISILE ukuvakala ukuti umbulo upakati kwenu, ewe umbulo onjalo ukuba awukankanywa napakati kwabaheyideni, wokokuba umntu wakuni unaye umfazi kayise." 
1Corinthians5:2 Nani ke nivutelene, ningatanga nje ngokukumbi nalilela, ukuze akweleliswe kwa pakati kwenu lowo wasenzayo isenzo esi." 
1Corinthians5:3 Ngokuba mna okunene, njengokuba ndingeko ngomzimba, kodwa ndiko ngomoya, ndise ndigwebile, njengokungati bendiko, ngaye lowo owenje njalo ukwenza oku," 
1Corinthians5:4 egameni lenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, nihlanganisene nje nina, kwa nomoya wam, kunye namandla enkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu," 
1Corinthians5:5 ukunikela onjalo ku‐Satane kube kukubujiswa kwenyama, ukuze umoya usindiswe emhleni wenkosi u‐Yesu." 
1Corinthians5:6 Akulungile ukuqa̔yisela kwenu. Anazi na ukuba igwele elincinane liyabilisa lonke isimba lentlama? 
1Corinthians5:7 Gecani ngoko nipumise igwele elidala, ukuze nibe lisimba lentlama elitsha, njengokuba ningabo abangenagwele. Ngokuba ipasika yetu nayo isibingelwe, kwa u‐Kristu." 
1Corinthians5:8 Kwa njalo ke masenze umtendeleko, kungabi ngalo igwele elidala, kungabi nangalo igwele lolunya nobumenemene, kube ngesonka esingenagwele sobunene nenyaniso." 
1Corinthians5:9 Ndiba̔lile kuni encwadini yam ukuba maningakolani nabapimisi: 
1Corinthians5:10 kungabi kanti ngokukanye nabapimisi belizwe eli, mhlaumbi namabawa, mhlaumbi nabapangi, mhlaumbi nabakonzi bezitixo; ngokuba oko nifanele ukupuma elizweni ke." 
1Corinthians5:11 Kodwa kaloku ndiba̔lile kuni ukuba maningakolani naye, xeshekweni umntu obizwa ngegama lomzalwana anguye umpimisi, mhlaumbi olibawa, mhlaumbi umkonzi wezitixo, mhlaumbi umtuki, mhlaumbi olinxila, mhlaumbi umpangi; onjalo maningake nidlelane naye." 
1Corinthians5:12 Ngokuba kuyinto nina kum ukuba nabapandle ndibagwebe? Abapakati anibagwebi na nina? 
1Corinthians5:13 Kodwa abapandle utixo uyabagweba. Ize nikwelelise lo mntu okohlakeleyo kwa kuni nina. 
1Corinthians6:1 KUKO na owenu, enendawo ngakuye omnye, olinga ukuti amangale pambi kwabangalungileyo, anga mangali pambi kwabangcwele?" 
1Corinthians6:2 Anazi na okokuba abangcwele boligweba ilizwe? Kekaloku ukuba lona ilizwe liyagwetywa ngani, nikohliwe na ngamatyala amancinanana?" 
1Corinthians6:3 Anazi na okokuba siya kugweba ingelosi? kangakananina ngakumbi ke izinto zobubomi? 
1Corinthians6:4 Xeshekweni ngoko ninawo amatyala ezinto zobubomi, bahlaliseni abo bangenakubekwa eṙementeni ukuba aba babe ngabagwebi." 
1Corinthians6:5 Ndiyateta oku nize nibe nentloni. Kunjalo na, ukuba akuko kwa namnye umntu olumkileyo pakati kwenu, ongalamlayo pakati kwabazalwana bake?" 
1Corinthians6:6 Hai, umzalwana uyamangalelana nomzalwana, esenje njalo ke pambi kwabangakoliweyo." 
1Corinthians6:7 Sekuko ngoko isiposo kanye pakati kwenu, ukuba ninamatyala omnye nomnye. Yinina ukuba ngokukumbi ningazivumeli ukwoniwa? yinina ukuba ngokukumbi ningazivumeli ukulumkiswa?" 
1Corinthians6:8 Hai, niti nina none nilumkise, ewe kwa nabazalwana benu." 
1Corinthians6:9 Anazi yinina, okokuba abonayo abayi kulidla ilifa lobukumkani bukatixo? Ize ningakohliswa ke: kwa nabapimisi, nabakonzi bezitixo, nabaṙexezi, namahenyu, nabalala namadoda," 
1Corinthians6:10 namasela, namabawa, namanxila, nabatuki, nabapangi, abayi kulidla ilifa lobukumkani bukatixo." 
1Corinthians6:11 Naye nibe ningabanjalo nina inxenye: koko nibe nihlanziwe, koko nibe ningcwalisiwe, koko nibe nigwetyelwe egameni lenkosi u‐Yesu, na kumoya katixo wetu." 
1Corinthians6:12 Zonke izinto ndizivunyelwe, koko zingezizo zonke izinto ezi ndi lungeleyo; zonke izinto ndizivunyelwe, koko ndingayi kubanjwa ngapantsi kwamandla ento nanye." 
1Corinthians6:13 Izinto zokudla zezesisu, nesisu sesezinto zokudla; kanti utixo wotshabalalisa kwa nesi nezo. Umzimba kodwa awungowombulo, ungo wenkosi; nenkosi yeyomzimba." 
1Corinthians6:14 Kanjalo utixo wayivusa inkosi, waeya kuvusa kwa nati ngawo amandla ayo." 
1Corinthians6:15 Anazi na ukuba imizimba yenu ingamalungu ka‐Kristu? Ndiya kutabata amalungu ka‐Kristu ke na, ndiwenze amalungu ompinyiswa? Kwanga kungebe njalo!" 
1Corinthians6:16 Anazi yinina, okokuba lowo unamatelayo kumpinyiswa ungumzimba mnye? ngokuba esiti: Abo babini boba yinyama nye." 
1Corinthians6:17 Kodwa lowo unamatelayo kwinkosi ungumoya mnye. 
1Corinthians6:18 Balekani umbulo. Zonke izono asukuba ezenza umntu, zingapandle kwomzimba; kodwa owenza umbulo, uyonela owake umzimba." 
1Corinthians6:19 Anazi yinina, okokuba umzimba wenu uyitempile yomoya oyingcwele okuni, eninaye evela kutixo, nokuba aningabenu?" 
1Corinthians6:20 Ngokuba benitengiwe ngenani: dumisani ke ngoko utixo, emzimbeni wenu, nasemoyeni wenu, eye katixo yomibini." 
1Corinthians7:1 KEKALOKU ezozinto enaba̔la ngazo kum: Kulungele umntu ukuba angapati umfazi. 
1Corinthians7:2 Kodwa ngenxa yemibulo, mayiti indoda nye ibe nowayo umfazi, ati umfazi mnye abe neyake indoda." 
1Corinthians7:3 Indoda mayinikele emfazini ububele obumfaneleyo; makenje njalo ke nomfazi endodeni. 
1Corinthians7:4 Umfazi akanamandla pezu kwowake umzimba, koko yindoda; kwa njalo ke nendoda ayinamandla pezu kwowayo umzimba, koko ngumfazi." 
1Corinthians7:5 Ize ningalumkisani, kupela umhlaumbi kube lixesha elitile ngokuvumelana, ukuze nizuze ituba lokuzila ukutya nelokutandaza; nandul’ ukubuya nihlangane ndawonye, ukuze u‐Satane anganilingi ngenxa yokuba ningenabunca̔tu." 
1Corinthians7:6 Oku kodwa ndiyakuteta ngendawo yokuvumela, kungengendawo yokuyolela." 
1Corinthians7:7 Ngokuba nditanda ukuba bonke abantu babe njengokuba ndinjalo nam. Koko bonke ngabanye banesabo isipiwo sivela kutixo, omnye ngokunje, omnye ngokunjalo." 
1Corinthians7:8 Kekaloku nditi kwabangatshatileyo nakwabahlolokazi: Kubalungele xeshekweni bahlala kwa njengam. 
1Corinthians7:9 Ukuba kodwa abanabunca̔tu, makutshatwe: ngokuba kulungile ukutshata ngapezu kwokutsha." 
1Corinthians7:10 Nabo batshatileyo ndiyabayalela, ndingendim noko, yinkosi, ukuba umfazi makangahlukani nendoda:" 
1Corinthians7:11 kodwa xeshekweni aka ahlukane nayo, makahlale engendi, umhlaumbi makaxoliswane nendoda yake: nokuba indoda mayingalahli umfazi." 
1Corinthians7:12 Kekaloku abanye nditi mna kubo, ingeyiyo inkosi: Ukuba kuko umzalwana oba nomfazi ongakolwayo, ati yena avume ukuhlala naye, makangamlahli." 
1Corinthians7:13 Kanjalo umfazi osukuba enendoda engakolwayo, iti yona ivume ukuhlala naye, makangayilahli." 
1Corinthians7:14 Ngokuba indoda engakolwayo yenziwe ngcwele emfazini, nomfazi ongakolwayo wenziwe ngcwele endodeni: okanye abantwa na benu banco̔lile; kanti kaloku ba ngcwele." 
1Corinthians7:15 Kodwa ukuba lowo ongakolwayo uyazahlula, makazahlule ke. Umzalwana umhlaumbi udade akabekwa ebukonzweni ezintweni ezinjalo: kodwa utixo usibizile sibe seluxolweni." 
1Corinthians7:16 Ngokuba usazi nganina, mfazi! ukuba akuyi kusindisa indoda yako? umhlaumbi uyazi nganina, ndoda! ukuba akuyi kusindisa umfazi wako?" 
1Corinthians7:17 Kupela, njengokuba utixo wababela bonke ngabanye, njengokuba inkosi ibabizile bonke ngabanye, mabahambe kwa njalo. Ndiyamisela nangokunjalo kuzo zonke iṙemente." 
1Corinthians7:18 Kuko na owabizwa engowalukileyo? makangazenzi ongalukileyo. Kuko na owabizwa esekungalukini, makangaluki." 
1Corinthians7:19 Ukwaluka akuluto, nokungaluki akuluto; eyona nto kukugcinwa kwemiyalelo katixo." 
1Corinthians7:20 Mabati bonke ngabanye bahlale kwa kokokubizwa ababebizwa kuko. 
1Corinthians7:21 Waubizwa ulikoboka na? zungakatali kuko: koko xeshekweni ungaka wenziwe okululekileyo, kupate kona ngakumbi:" 
1Corinthians7:22 ngokuba lowo enkosini obebizwa elikoboka, engumkululekiswa wenkosi: kwa njalo nobebizwa engokululekileyo, ulikoboka lika‐Kristu." 
1Corinthians7:23 Benitengiwe ngenani; ize ningabi ngamakoboka abantu. 
1Corinthians7:24 Mabati bonke ngabanye, bazalwana! bahlale pambi kwotixo kwa koko kuhlala ababebizwa kuko." 
1Corinthians7:25 Kekaloku intombi zipela andinawo umyolelo wenkosi ngazo: kodwa ndiyanika ingcingo yam, njengowamkeleyo ububele kwinkosi ukuba ngonyanisekileyo." 
1Corinthians7:26 Nditi ngoko kulungile oku ngenxa yobunzima obukoyo, — kulungele umntu ukuba njalo." 
1Corinthians7:27 Ubotshelwe emfazini na? zungafuni ukukululwa. Ukululwe emfazini na? zungafuni umfazi. 
1Corinthians7:28 Kodwa xeshekweni uka uzeke, akwonanga; kanjako intombi xeshekweni yendayo, ayonanga. Noko abanjalo boba nembandezelo enyameni: mna kodwa ndiyaniyeka." 
1Corinthians7:29 Kodwa oku ndiyakutsho, bazalwana! ixesha lifinyezelwe oko kuseleyo; ukuze bati abo banabafazi, babe njengokuba bengenabo;" 
1Corinthians7:30 bati abalilayo, babe njengokuba bengalili; bati abavuyayo, babe njengokuba bengavuyi; bati abatengayo, babe njengokuba bengafuyi;" 
1Corinthians7:31 bati abapatayo ilizwe eli, babe njengokuba bengalipati ngokugqitileyo: ngokuba isimilo selizwe eli sidlula." 
1Corinthians7:32 Kodwa ndifuna ukuba nibe ningenazo inkatalelo. Ongazekileyo uyakatalela izinto zenkosi, ukuba woti nina ukukolisa inkosi:" 
1Corinthians7:33 kodwa ozekileyo uyakatalela izinto zelizwe, ukuba woti nina ukukolisa umfazi wake." 
1Corinthians7:34 Kuko kanjalo ukwahluka pakati kwomfazi nentombi. Ongendileyo uyakatalela izinto zenkosi, ukuze abe ngcwele nasemzimbeni nasemoyeni: kodwa owendileyo uyakatalela izinto zelizwe, ukuba woti nina ukukolisa indoda yake." 
1Corinthians7:35 Nako oku ndiyakutsho kube kokwenu ukuncedwa; kungekukuba ndipose isisinga pezu kwenu, kukuba kubeko okufanelekileyo, nokuba kunyanyekelwe inkosi kungenakubideka." 
1Corinthians7:36 Kodwa ukuba kuko oba uyenza ngokungafanelekileyo ngakuyo intombi yake ipela, xeshekweni isel’ ingene ebunkazaneni, nokuba kufanele ukuba nja lo, makenze ngokutanda kwake; akoni: makutshatwe." 
1Corinthians7:37 Kodwa lowo umiyo eqinile entliziyweni yake, enganyanzelwa nto, enamandla nje pezu kweyake intando, ogwebile njalo entliziyweni yake ukuti uya kugcina yona intombi yake ipela, uyalungisa." 
1Corinthians7:38 Kwa njalo ke nalowo owendisayo uyalungisa; kodwa lowo ungendisiyo uyalungisa ngakumbi. 
1Corinthians7:39 Umfazi ubotshiwe ngumteto lonke ixesha indoda yake isahlala ngalo; kodwa xeshekweni indoda yake ifile, ukululekile ukwenda kulowo atandayo; kupela enkosini." 
1Corinthians7:40 Kodwa unetamsanqa elikulu ngakumbi xeshekweni ahlala njalo, ngokweyam ingcingo: kanjako ndiba ndino moya katixo kwa nam." 
1Corinthians8:1 KEKALOKU ngazo izinto ezibingelweyo izitixo, siyazi ukuba sinokwazi sonke. Ukwazi kuyavutelanisa, kodwa utando luyamisa." 
1Corinthians8:2 Ukuba ke umntu uba uyayazi into, akakazi luto njengokuba efanele ukulwazi." 
1Corinthians8:3 Kodwa ukuba umntu uyamtanda utixo, yena lo uyaziwa nguye." 
1Corinthians8:4 Kekaloku ngako ukutyiwa kwezinto ezibingelweyo izitixo ke, siyazi ukuba isitixo asinto yanto elizweni, nokuba akuko utixo wumbi, kupela mnye." 
1Corinthians8:5 Ngokuba nangona kukoyo aba‐kutiwa ngotixo, nokuba basezulwini, nokuba basemhlabeni, (njengokuba kuko otixo abaninzi, nenkosi ezininzi,)" 
1Corinthians8:6 noko kuti kuko utixo mnye, uyise, okuvela kuye izinto zonke, nati tina singenxa yake; nenkosi nye, u‐Yesu Kristu, o kubako ngaye izinto zonke, nati tina singaye." 
1Corinthians8:7 Kuloko kungekubo bonke okukwazi: ngokuba inxenye ngokwazela isitixo, kwa kude kube kaloku nje, besitya njengokungati yinto ebingelweyo isitixo; nesazeliso sabo, sibutataka nje, siyadyojwa." 
1Corinthians8:8 Kodwa ukudla akusikolekisi kutixo: ngokuba naxeshekweni sityayo, singagqitiseli; naxeshekweni singatyiyo, singancipeki." 
1Corinthians8:9 Lumkani kodwa hleze kungati eligunya lenu libe sisiku̔bekiso kubo ababutataka. 
1Corinthians8:10 Ngokuba, xeshekweni umntu akubonayo wena onokwazi uhleli pantsi etempileni yesitixo, singayi kuti na isazeliso sake, ebutataka nje, somelezelwe ukuba kutyiwe izinto ezibingelweyo izitixo;" 
1Corinthians8:11 aze abube umzalwana obutataka ngokwazi kwako, lowo u‐Kristu wafa ngenxa yake?" 
1Corinthians8:12 Kodwa nisona njalo ngakubo abazalwana, nidubula nokudubula isazeliso sabo esibutataka nje, niyona ngakuye u‐Kristu." 
1Corinthians8:13 Ngako oko ukuba ukudla kuyaxakanisa umzalwana wam, andisayi kutya inyama napakade, ukuze umzalwana wam ndingamxakanisi." 
1Corinthians9:1 ANDINGUYE na umpostile? andinguye na okululekileyo? andimbonanga na u‐Yesu Kristu inkosi yetu? aninguwo na umsebenzi wam enkosini nina? 
1Corinthians9:2 Ukuba andingumpostile kwabanye, noko ndinjalo kambe kuni: ngokuba isincamatiselo sobupostile bam sinini enkosini." 
1Corinthians9:3 Kuko oku ukuzitetelela kwam kubo abandibuzayo: 
1Corinthians9:4 Asinalo na igunya lokutya nokusela? 
1Corinthians9:5 asinalo na igunya lokutabata nati udade ongumfazi, njengabo nabanye abapostile, nabazalwana benkosi, no‐Kefasi?" 
1Corinthians9:6 umhlaumbi mna ndedwa no‐Banabasi asinalo na igunya lokuba singasebenzi? 
1Corinthians9:7 Ngubanina oka akonze njengesodati ngokwake ukuvuza? ngubanina otyalayo isitiya semiti yeveyine, aze angatyi kwiziqa̔mo zaso? umhlaumbi ngubanina owalusayo umhlambi, aze angatyi kwamasi omhlambi?" 
1Corinthians9:8 Ndiziteta ezizinto njengokwabantu na? awuziteti ezizinto umteto nawo kusinina? 
1Corinthians9:9 Ngokuba kuba̔liwe emtetweni ka‐Mosesi ukuti: Akukuyifaka umkala inkabi yakubu̔la. Utixo uyakatala zinkabi na? 
1Corinthians9:10 utsho ngenxa yetu kanye kusinina? ewe ngenxa yetu kwaba̔lwa oku: ukuba olimayo efanele ukulima ngetemba; nobu̔layo efanele ukubu̔la ngetemba lokwamkela kwitemba lake. 
1Corinthians9:11 Ukuba tina sanihlwayelela izinto ezibumoya, yinto enkulu na ukuba tina siya kuvuna izinto zenu ezibunyama?" 
1Corinthians9:12 Ukuba abanye bayamkela kw eli gunya pezu kwenu, as amkeli kulo tina kakulu ngakumbi ke na? Noko asilipatanga igunya eli; kuloko zonke izinto sizinyamezela, ukuze singenzeli ivangeli ka‐Kristu into etintelayo." 
1Corinthians9:13 Anazi na, okokuba abo basebenzayo ezintweni ezingcwele bayatya kokwetempile; nokuba abo balindayo esibingelweni bayahlulana nesibingelo?" 
1Corinthians9:14 Kwa njalo nenkosi yamisela abo bashumayelayo ivangeli, ukuba bapile ngokwevangeli." 
1Corinthians9:15 Kodwa mna andipatanga nanye yezizinto; kanjako andiba̔langa ezizinto, ukuze kwenziwe njalo kum: ngokuba kulungele mna ukuba ndife, ngapezu kwokuba asuke umntu alwenze uqa̔yiselo lwam into engento yanto." 
1Corinthians9:16 Ngokuba xeshekweni ndishumayelayo ivangeli, andinako ndingaqa̔yisa ngako; ngokuba ndibekelwa unyanzelo; hai kanjalo ilishwa lam, xeshekweni ndingayishumayeli ivangeli!" 
1Corinthians9:17 Ngokuba lento ukuba ndiyayenza ndivuma, ndinawo umvuzo; kodwa ukuba ndiyayenza ndingavumi, ndipatisiwe ubugosa." 
1Corinthians9:18 Uyinto nina ngoko umvuzo wam? Ngowokuba nditi ekushumayeleni ivangeli ndiyenze ivangeli ka‐Kristu ingamelwa nto, ukuze ndingalipati igunya lam evangelini ngokugqitileyo." 
1Corinthians9:19 Ngokuba ndikululekile nje kubo bonke, ndazenza isicaka kubo bonke noko, ukuze ndizuze abaninzi ngakumbi." 
1Corinthians9:20 Ndaza ndati kuma‐Juda ndaba njengom‐Juda, ukuze ndizuze ama‐Juda; kubo abapantsi kwomteto ndaba njengopantsi kwomteto, ukuze ndibazuze abapantsi kwomteto;" 
1Corinthians9:21 kubo abangenamteto ndaba njengongenamteto, (ndingengongenamteto kutixo, ndipantsi kwomteto ku‐Kristu,) ukuze ndizuze abangenamteto." 
1Corinthians9:22 Kubo ababutataka ndaba njengobutataka, ukuze ndibazuze ababutataka: sendiba zinto zonke kubo bonke, ukuze nditi ngendawo zonke ndisindise inxenye." 
1Corinthians9:23 Oku ke ndiyakwenza ngenxa yevangeli, ukuze ndabelwe kuyo kunye nabo." 
1Corinthians9:24 Anazi na ukuba abo babalekayo emjikelezweni bayabaleka bonke ke, kodwa uba mnye owamkela umvuzo? Yenzani njalo ukubaleka, ukuba nizuze." 
1Corinthians9:25 Kanjako bonke abazamayo ezindlalweni bayenza ngobunca̔tu ezintweni zonke. Kekaloku bona abo ke bayazama ukuze bamkele isitsaba esonakalayo, kodwa tina ukuze samkele esingonakaliyo." 
1Corinthians9:26 Mna ngoko ke ndiyenje njalo ukubaleka, njengokuba kungengendawo engabonakaliyo; ndiyenje njalo ukulwa, njengokuba ndingabeti umoya:" 
1Corinthians9:27 koko ndiwubulala umzimba wam, ndiwukonzise, hleze kungati, ndakuba ndishumayele kwabanye, ndibe mna ngokwam ndingowaliwayo." 
1Corinthians10:1 KEKALOKU anditandi ukuba nibe ningazi, bazalwana! okokuba obawo betu bonke bebepantsi kwelifu, nokuba bonke bacanda ulwandle;" 
1Corinthians10:2 nokuba bonke babapitizeshelwa ku‐Mosesi elifini naselulwandleni; 
1Corinthians10:3 nokuba bonke batya okukwa kunye ukudla okubumoya; 
1Corinthians10:4 nokuba bonke basela olukwa lunye uselo olubumoya; ngokuba bebesela kwiliwa elibumoya libapeleka; laye iliwa elo lingu‐Kristu. 
1Corinthians10:5 Kuloko into eninzi yabo utixo wabengakoliswa ngabo: ngokuba bebewiswa pantsi entlango. 
1Corinthians10:6 Kekaloku ezizinto zenzeka ukuba yimilinganiselo kuti, ukuze ke tina singakanukeli izinto ezikohlakeleyo, njengokuba nabo bona bebekanuka." 
1Corinthians10:7 Kanjako maningabi ngabakonzi bezitixo, njengokuba bebenjalo inxenye yabo; njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Bahlala pantsi abantu ukutya nokusela, baza besuka ukudlala." 
1Corinthians10:8 Kanjako masingenzi umbulo, njengokuba inxenye yabo bebesenza umbulo, baza bawa emini nye amawaka angamashumi mabini anamatatu." 
1Corinthians10:9 Kanjako masingamlingi u‐Kristu, njengokuba nenxenye yabo bebelinga, baza babujiswa zinyoka." 
1Corinthians10:10 Kanjako maningaṙoṙi, njengokuba nenxenye yabo bebeṙoṙa, baza babujiswa ngumtshabalalisi." 
1Corinthians10:11 Kekaloku ezizinto zonke zibe zihlela bona abo ukuba yimilinganiselo: zaza zaba̔lelwa ukululekwa kwetu, tina sifikelweyo zizipelo zelizwe elikoyo." 
1Corinthians10:12 Ngako oko lowo uba umi, makalumke ukuba angawi." 
1Corinthians10:13 Akuko silingo esinibambileyo, kupela sesobuntu; kodwa unyanisekile utixo, ongayi kuvumela ukuba nilingwe ngokupezulu kwamandla enu; koko eya kuyenza kwa kunye nesilingo nendlela yokupuma, ukuba nibe namandla okunyamezela." 
1Corinthians10:14 Ngoko ke, batandwa bam! balekani kuyo inkonzo yezitixo." 
1Corinthians10:15 Ndiyateta njengakubo abalumkileyo; yahlulani nina into endiyitetayo. 
1Corinthians10:16 Indebe yobulelo esibulela yona, asi bubo na ubudlelana begazi lika‐Kristu? Isonka esisiqezulayo, asi bubo na ubudlelana bomzimba buka‐Kristu?" 
1Corinthians10:17 Kuba sisisonka sinye, singumzimba mnye tina singabaninzi; ngokuba sisamkela sonke kwesosonka sinye." 
1Corinthians10:18 Kangelani o‐Sirayeli ngokwenyama: abo bayityayo imibingo abanabudlelana nesibingelo na? 
1Corinthians10:19 Nditi nina pofu? nditi na isitixo siyinto? umhlaumbi nditi na oko kubingelweyo isitixo kuyinto? 
1Corinthians10:20 Hai; koko nditi izinto abazibingayo abaheyideni, bayazibingela idemoni, benga zibing eli utixo: kekaloku anditandi ukuba nibe nobudlelana nedemoni." 
1Corinthians10:21 Aningesele indebe yenkosi, nendebe yedemoni; aningamkele kwitafile yenkosi, nakwitafile yedemoni." 
1Corinthians10:22 Sivusela inkosi ubukwele kusinina? sinamandla amakulu kwawayo yinina? 
1Corinthians10:23 Zonke izinto zindivunyelwe, koko zingezizo zonke izinto ezi ndi lungeleyo: zonke izinto zindivunyelwe, koko zingezizo zonke izinto ezimisayo." 
1Corinthians10:24 Makungabiko namnye ofuna okwake, mabati bonke ngabanye bafune okwomnye." 
1Corinthians10:25 Konke okutengiswayo endaweni yokutengela inyama kutyeni, ningabuzi nto ngenxa yesazeliso:" 
1Corinthians10:26 ngokuba umhlaba ngo kayehova, nokuzala kwawo." 
1Corinthians10:27 Ukuba ke owakubo abangakoliweyo uyanibiza, niti nina nitande ukuya, konke okubekwayo pambi kwenu kutyeni, ningabuzi nto ngenxa yesazeliso." 
1Corinthians10:28 Kodwa xeshekweni kuko oti kuni: Yinto ebingelweyo isitixo le; ningatyi ke, ngenxa yalowo waxelayo, nangenxa yesazeliso: ngokuba umhlaba ngo kayehova, nokuzala kwawo:" 
1Corinthians10:29 nditi ke ngenxa yesazeliso, singesesako nje, sisesalomnye; ngokuba kuyinina ukuba inkululeko yam igwetywe sisazeliso esingesesam?" 
1Corinthians10:30 Ukuba ke mna ngofefe ndiyamkela ku ko, yinina ukuba ndigxekwe ngenxa yoko ndibulela kona?" 
1Corinthians10:31 Ngako nokuba niyatya, nokuba niyasela, nokuba niyenza enye into, konke kwenzeleni ubungcwalisa bukatixo." 
1Corinthians10:32 Yibani ningenzi ngokuku̔bekisa, nakuma‐Juda, nakuma‐Girike, nakuyo iṙemente katixo:" 
1Corinthians10:33 kwa njengokuba nam ndibakolisa bonke kuko konke, ndingafuni nje okwam ukuncedwa, koko okwabo abaninzi, ukuze basindiswe." 
1Corinthians11:1 Yibani ngabalandeli bam, kwa njengokuba nam ndingumlandeli ka‐Kristu." 
1Corinthians11:2 KEKALOKU ndiyanincoma, bazalwana! ukuba nindikumbula ngento zonke, nokuba nizibamba izinikelwa, kwa njengokuba bendizinikele kuni." 
1Corinthians11:3 Kodwa ndifuna ukuba nikwazi, okokuba intloko yamadoda onke ingu‐Kristu; kanjalo intloko yomfazi, yindoda; nentloko ka‐Kristu, ngutixo." 
1Corinthians11:4 Indoda esukuba itandaza umhlaumbi iprofitesha, inento entlokweni, iyahlazisa intloko yayo." 
1Corinthians11:5 Kodwa umfazi osukuba etandaza umhlaumbi eprofitesha, ontloko ingenasigqubutelo, uyahlazisa intloko yake: ngokuba oko kukwa yiyo into ekwa nye nokuguywa kwake." 
1Corinthians11:6 Ngokuba umfazi ukuba akagqubuteli, makagugulwe kanjalo: kodwa ukuba kuyinto embi kumfazi ukuba agugulwe umhlaumbi aguywe, makagqubutele." 
1Corinthians11:7 Ngokuba indoda okunene ingafanelwa kukugqubutela intloko, ingumfanekiso nobungcwalisa bukatixo nje: kodwa umfazi ububungcwalisa bendoda." 
1Corinthians11:8 Ngokuba indoda ingaveli emfazini, koko umfazi evela endodeni." 
1Corinthians11:9 Ngokuba kanjalo indoda ibingadalwanga ngenxa yake umfazi, koko umfazi wadalwa ngenxa yayo indoda." 
1Corinthians11:10 Ngenxa yoku yena umfazi ufanelwe kukuba abe nopa̔u lwamandla pezu kwentloko yake ngenxa yazo ingelosi. 
1Corinthians11:11 Noko ke, indoda ayingapandle kwomfazi, nomfazi akangapandle kwendoda, enkosini." 
1Corinthians11:12 Ngokuba ke njengokuba yena umfazi evela kuyo indoda, kwa njalo nayo indoda ingaye umfazi; kodwa izinto zonke zivela kutixo." 
1Corinthians11:13 Yahlulani nina ngokwenu: kufanelekile na ukuba umfazi atandaze kutixo engenasigqubutelo nje? 
1Corinthians11:14 Kwa kona okwemvelo akunifundisi kusinina, ukuba indoda xeshekweni inenwele ezinde, kulihlazo kuyo," 
1Corinthians11:15 kodwa umfazi xeshekweni anenwele ezinde, kububungcwalisa kuye? ngokuba inwele zake zinikwe kuye zibe sisigubungelo." 
1Corinthians11:16 Kodwa ukuba umntu unga uyatand’ ukupika, asinalo isiko elinjalo tina, azi nalo neṙemente zikatixo kanjako." 
1Corinthians11:17 Kekaloku lento edi ni yalelayo, andi ni ncomi; kuba ukuhlangana kwenu ninga hlanganeli okulungileyo ngakumbi, koko nihlanganela okubi ngakumbi." 
1Corinthians11:18 Ngokuba ukuqala ke, nakuba nihlangana entlanganisweni, ndisiva ukuba ziko impambano pakati kwenu; kanjalo ndiyakolwa kuko ngokwenxenye:" 
1Corinthians11:19 ngokuba kufanele nokuba izahlukano zibe pakati kwenu, ukuze ababukwayo babonakaliswe pakati kwenu." 
1Corinthians11:20 Nakuba ngoko nihlangana ndawonye, akuko ukutya isidlo sokuhlwa senkosi." 
1Corinthians11:21 Ngokuba ekutyeni omnye uyapangela omnye ukutabata esake isidlo sokuhlwa; aze lo alambe, nalowo anxile." 
1Corinthians11:22 Pofu aninazo izindlu zokuba kutyiwe kuselwe kona yinina? niyadela iṙemente katixo, nidanise abasweleyo, kusinina? Nditi nina kuni? ndinincome na kuko oku? Andincomi ke." 
1Corinthians11:23 Ngokuba mna bendikwamkele enkosini oko endati kanjalo ndakunikela kuni: okokuba inkosi u‐Yesu ngobobusuku ibingcatshwa ngabo yatabata isonka; 
1Corinthians11:24 yaza yakuba ibulele yaqezula, yati: Tabatani, nitye; esi singumzimba wam, owapulelwa nina; kwenzeni oku kube kukukunjulwa kwam." 
1Corinthians11:25 Ngokunjalo yatabata nendebe, emveni kwokuba kudliwe, isiti: Lendebe ilucebano olutsha egazini lam; kwenzeni oku, onke amaxesha enisukuba niyisela, kube kukukunjulwa kwam." 
1Corinthians11:26 Ngokuba onke amaxesha enisukuba esisonka nisitya nalendebe niyisela, nikushumayela ukufa kwenkosi, ide ifike." 
1Corinthians11:27 Ngako oko osukuba esitya esisonka umhlaumbi esela indebe yenkosi ngokungafanelekileyo, uya kumelwa lityala lomzimba negazi lenkosi." 
1Corinthians11:28 Kodwa makati umntu azibence, enje njalo ke ukutya kwisonka eso nokusela kwindebe leyo." 
1Corinthians11:29 Ngokuba lowo uti atye asele ngokungafanelekileyo, ezityela eziselela umgwebo, enganakani nje umzimba wenkosi." 
1Corinthians11:30 Ngenxa yoku abaninzi banobutataka nobulwelwe pakati kwenu, bati into eninzi balale kukufa." 
1Corinthians11:31 Ngokuba tina ukuba sibe sizahlula ngokwetu, ngesiba singagwetywa." 
1Corinthians11:32 Kodwa siti sakugwetywa sohlwaywe yinkosi, ukuze singagqibeli ukugwetywa kunye nelizwe." 
1Corinthians11:33 Ngako oko, bazalwana bam! nakuba nihlangana kutyiwe, lindanani." 
1Corinthians11:34 Ukuba ke umntu ulambile, makatye ekaya; ukuze ningahlanganeli ukugwetywa. Nezinto eziseleyo ndoti nxa sukuba ndifika ndizilungise." 
1Corinthians12:1 KEKALOKU ngazo izipiwo ezibumoya, bazalwana! anditandi ukuba nibe ningenakwazi." 
1Corinthians12:2 Niyazi ukuba nibe ningabaheyideni nir̔olelwa ezitixweni ezingenakuteta, njengokuba kusukuba nibe nikokelwa." 
1Corinthians12:3 Ngako oko ndiyanazisa, ukuba akuko mntu eteta ngomoya katixo oti u‐Yesu uyinto eqalekisiweyo: kanjalo akuko mntu ongatshoyo ukuti u‐Yesu u yinkosi, kupela ngomoya oyingcwele." 
1Corinthians12:4 Kuko izipiwo ngezipiwo, kodwa umoya okwa mnye." 
1Corinthians12:5 Kuko nezikonzo ngezikonzo, nenkosi ekwa nye." 
1Corinthians12:6 Kuko namasebenzi ngamasebenzi, kodwa ngutixo okwa mnye okwenzayo konke kubo bonke." 
1Corinthians12:7 Kodwa kuyanikwa kwabanye ngabanye ukubonakaliswa kwomoya kube kukuncedwa. 
1Corinthians12:8 Ngokuba kunikwa komnye ngaye umoya ilizwi lobulumko; nakomnye ilizwi lokwazi ngokwalowo umoya; 
1Corinthians12:9 nakomnye ukolo ngalowo umoya; nakomnye izipiwo zokupilisa ngalowo umoya; 
1Corinthians12:10 nakomnye amasebenzi emimangaliso; nakomnye isiprofitesho; nakomnye ukwahlula omoya; nakomnye intlobo ngentlobo zenteto: nakomnye ukukumsha inteto: 
1Corinthians12:11 kodwa zonke ezi uyazenza oyena mnye umoya okwa nguye lowo, ebabela bonke abanye ngabanye njangokuba evuma." 
1Corinthians12:12 Ngokuba kwa njengokuba umzimba umnye, kanti unawo amalungu amaninzi, kodwa onke amalungu alomzimba mnye, nakuba emaninzi, angumzimba mnye; unjalo no‐Kristu." 
1Corinthians12:13 Ngokuba kanjalo ngomoya mnye tina sonke sabapitizeshelwa emzimbeni mnye, nokuba singama‐Juda, nokuba singama‐Girike, nokuba singamakoboka, nokuba singabakululekileyo; sati ke sonke sasezelwa kumoya mnye." 
1Corinthians12:14 Ngokuba kanjalo umzimba ungelilo ilungu nye, ungawo amaninzi." 
1Corinthians12:15 Xeshekweni lutshoyo unyawo ukuti: Kuba ndingesiso isandla, andiyinto yasemzimbeni; alubi ngenxa yoku lungeyinto yasemzibeni?" 
1Corinthians12:16 Naxeshekweni itshoyo indlebe ukuti: Kuba ndingelilo iliso, andiyinto yasemzimbeni; ayibi ngenxa yoku ingeyinto yasemzimbeni?" 
1Corinthians12:17 Ukuba umzimba upela ubuliliso, bekuya kuba pina ukuva? Ukuba wona upela ubukukuva, bekuya kuba pina ukujoja?" 
1Corinthians12:18 Kodwa kaloku amalungu utixo uwabekile onke amanye ngamanye emzimbeni, njengokuba ebetanda." 
1Corinthians12:19 Kanjako ukuba wona onke ebelilo ilungu nye, ubuya kuba pina umzimba?" 
1Corinthians12:20 Kodwa kaloku ngamaninzi ke amalungu, umnye kanti umzimba." 
1Corinthians12:21 Alingetsho ke iliso esandleni ukuti: Andinakufuna wena; ayingetsho kanjako intloko ezinyaweni ukuti: Andinakufuna nina. 
1Corinthians12:22 Ewe kakulu ngakumbi ke lomalungu omzimba anga abutataka ngapezu kwamanye ayafuneka; 
1Corinthians12:23 nalawo esiba angawo omzimba adumileyo kancinane kwamanye, wona la siyawafaka udumo olukulu ngakumbi; aze amalungu etu angemahle azuze ubuhle obukulu ngakumbi;" 
1Corinthians12:24 kodwa amalungu etu amahle akanaku bu swela: koko utixo awumanyileyo umzimba kunye, elunikile nje udumo olukulu ngakumbi kulo ndawo e lu swelayo:" 
1Corinthians12:25 ukuze kungabiko impambano emzimbeni, koko ati amalungu afane ukukatalelana kwawo." 
1Corinthians12:26 Kanjalo nokuba kuyeva intlungu ilungu linye, kuyeva intlungu onke amalungu kunye nalo; nokuba kuyenzelwa ubungcwalisa ilungu linye, kuyavuya onke amalungu kunye nalo." 
1Corinthians12:27 Kekaloku nina ningumzimba ka‐Kristu, namalungu omnye ngomnye." 
1Corinthians12:28 Kanjako abanye utixo ubabekile eṙementeni, ngokwokuqala abapostile, ngokwesibini abaprofite, ngokwesitatu abafundisi, emva kwoko imimangaliso, kamva izipiwo zokupilisa, intsizo, impato, intlobo ngentlobo zenteto." 
1Corinthians12:29 Ngabapostile bonke na? ngabaprofite bonke na? ngabafundisi bonke na? ngabenzayo imimangaliso bonke na? 
1Corinthians12:30 banezipiwo zokupilisa bonke na? bayateta nge zinye inteto bonke na? bayakumsha bonke na? 
1Corinthians12:31 Kodwa zondelelani izipiwo ezilungileyo ngakumbi: kanti ndisanibonisa indlela egqitisileyo ngokulunga. 
1Corinthians13:1 NAKUBA nditeta ngenteto zabantu nezengelosi, kodwa ndingenalo utando, sendiyixina ehlokomayo, umhlaumbi yisimbali ekencezayo." 
1Corinthians13:2 Kanjalo nakuba ndi nesipiwo sokuprofitesha, ndiqonda nemfihlakalo zonke, nako konke ukwazi; ewe nakuba ndinalo lwonke ukolo, ndide ndizishenxise intaba, kodwa ndingenalo utando, ndiyinto enganto." 
1Corinthians13:3 Kanjalo nakuba ndiyaba yonke impahla yam ngokufunzela amahlwempu, ewe nakuba ndiwunikela umzimba wam ukuze nditshiswe, kodwa ndingenalo utando, andincedwa luto." 
1Corinthians13:4 Utando lunokuzeka kade, lunobubele; utando alunozondo; utando aluzidli, aluvutelani," 
1Corinthians13:5 alwenzi ngokungafanelekileyo, alufuni okwalo, alunakucapukiswa, alutelekeleli ububi;" 
1Corinthians13:6 aluvuyeli okungalungileyo, kodwa luyavuya kunye nayo inyaniso;" 
1Corinthians13:7 luyanyamezela izinto zonke, luyakolwa zizinto zonke, luyatemba izinto zonke, lunomonde ezintweni zonke." 
1Corinthians13:8 Utando alutshitshi napakade: kodwa nokuba ziziprofitesho, ziya kutshabalala; nokuba zinteto, ziya kupela; nokuba kukwazi, kuya kutshabalala." 
1Corinthians13:9 Ngokuba sisazi ngokwenxenye, kanjalo siprofitesha ngokwenxenye." 
1Corinthians13:10 Kodwa xeshekweni kufika oko kufezekileyo, kuya kwandula oko kungokwenxenye kutshabalale." 
1Corinthians13:11 Xeshekweni ndibe ndingumntwana, ndanditeta njengomntwana, ndandikumbula njengomntwana, ndanditelekelela njengomntwana; kodwa ngoku sendiyindoda nje, ndizibekile nxamnye izinto zobuntwana." 
1Corinthians13:12 Ngokuba kaloku nje sibona ngayo incwadi ekusiteni, kodwa oko sobona ubuso ngakubo ubuso: kaloku nje ndiyazi ngokwenxenye, kodwa oko ndiya kwazi ngokukolisekileyo, njengokuba kanjalo bendisaziwa ngokukolisekileyo." 
1Corinthians13:13 Kodwa kaloku nje kuhleli ukolo, itemba, utando, ezizinto zontatu; kanti eyona inkulu pakati kwezi lutando." 
1Corinthians14:1 PUTUMANI utando; niti noko nizondelele izipiwo ezibumoya, kodwa ngokukulu ukuba niprofiteshe." 
1Corinthians14:2 Ngokuba otetayo nge nye inteto engateti ebantwini, koko eteta kutixo: ngokuba kungeko mntu o m vayo; kodwa emoyeni uyaziteta imfihlakalo." 
1Corinthians14:3 Kodwa oprofiteshayo uyateta ebantwini okumisayo, nokuyalayo, nokututuzelayo." 
1Corinthians14:4 Otetayo nge nye inteto, uyazimisa yena; kodwa oprofiteshayo uyamisa iṙemente." 
1Corinthians14:5 Kekaloku nditanda ukuba nina nonke nitete nge zinye inteto, kodwa ngakumbi ukuba niprofiteshe: ngokuba emkulu lowo uprofiteshayo kulowo utetayo nge zinye inteto, ukuba kanti akakumshi, ukuze iṙemente yamkele ukumiswa." 
1Corinthians14:6 Kodwa kaloku, bazalwana! xeshekweni ndiza kuni nditeta nge zinye inteto, ndoninceda nto nina, xeshekweni ndingayi kuteta kuni mhlaumbi ekutyileni, mhlaumbi ekwazini, mhlaumbi ekuprofitesheni, mhlaumbi ekufundiseni?" 
1Corinthians14:7 Kwa nezinto ezingenakudliwa kwobomi zisenza intlokoma, nokuba ngumlozi, nokuba luhadi, noko, xeshekweni zingenzi ukwahluka ekuhlokomeni, kwotiwa nina ukwaziwa oko kulozwayo umhlaumbi oko kubetwayo ngohadi?" 
1Corinthians14:8 Ngokuba kanjako xeshekweni ixilongo liyenza intlokoma engavekiyo, ngubanina oya kuzilungisela ukulwa?" 
1Corinthians14:9 Kwa njalo nani, xeshekweni ningawapimiseli ngolwimi amazwi aqondekayo, kwotiwa nina ukwaziwa oko kutetwayo? ngokuba niya kuba niteta ngasemoyeni." 
1Corinthians14:10 Kungaba kuko intlobo ezininzi kangaka zamazwi elizweni, nekungeko nalinye lazo elingenakuvakala." 
1Corinthians14:11 Xeshekweni ngoko ndingakwazi ukutsho kwelizwi, ndoba ngumsomi kulowo utetayo, naye otetayo woba ngumsomi kum." 
1Corinthians14:12 Kwa njalo nani, ekubeni nizondelele izipiwo ezibumoya, zifuneni ukuba nigqitisele kuze kube kukumiswa kweṙemente." 
1Corinthians14:13 Ngako oko otetayo nge nye inteto makatandaze ukuba akumshe. 
1Corinthians14:14 Ngokuba xeshekweni nditandaza nge nye inteto, umoya wam utandaza, kodwa ingqondo yam iputile." 
1Corinthians14:15 Yinto nina ngoko? Ndiya kutandaza ngomoya wam, kodwa ndiya kutandaza ngengqondo yam nayo: ndiya kucula ngomoya wam, kodwa ndiya kucula ngengqondo yam nayo." 
1Corinthians14:16 Okanye xeshekweni ubulelayo ngomoya, woti nina lowo uhleliyo endaweni yongenalufundo ukutsho ukuti Amene ekubuleleni kwako, into uyitetayo engayazi nje?" 
1Corinthians14:17 Ngokuba wena okunene ulungisa ukubulela, koko yena omnye engamiswa." 
1Corinthians14:18 Ndiyabulela kutixo wam, ndinidlula nonke ngokuteta nge zinye inteto:" 
1Corinthians14:19 noko entlanganisweni nditanda ukuba nditete amazwi abe mahlanu ngayo ingqondo yam, ukuze ndibafundise nabanye, ngapezu kwokuba nditete amazwi abe mawaka alishumi nge nye inteto." 
1Corinthians14:20 Bazalwana! ningabi ngabantwana ekuqondeni: noko elunyeni yibani njengentsana, kodwa ekuqondeni yibani ngabakulileyo." 
1Corinthians14:21 Kuba̔liwe emtetweni, ukuti: Ngabelwimi zimbi, nangemilomo yasemzini, ndiya kuteta kwababantu; kodwa noko abayi kundipulapula, utsho uyehova." 
1Corinthians14:22 Kwa njalo ke ezinye inteto azingumqondiso kwabo bakolwayo, zinguwo kwabangakoliweyo: kodwa isiprofitesho asiyinto yabangakoliweyo, siyinto yabo bakolwayo." 
1Corinthians14:23 Xeshekweni ngoko iṙemente yonke ihlangana ndawonye, bati bonke batete nge zinye inteto, kuze kungene abangenalufundo, umhlaumbi abangakoliweyo, abaya kutsho na ukuti niyageza?" 
1Corinthians14:24 Kodwa xeshekweni bonke baprofiteshayo, kuze kungene umntu ongakoliweyo umhlaumbi ongenalufundo, uyaviswa ityala ngabo bonke, uyagwetywa ngabo bonke;" 
1Corinthians14:25 kuti ngokunjalo izinto ezifihlakeleyo zentliziyo yake zibonakaliswe; waeya kuti ngokunjalo awe ngobuso abedeshe utixo, eshumayela ukuba utixo upakati kwenu ngokwenyaniso." 
1Corinthians14:26 Yinto nina ngoko, bazalwana? Okuya nihlanganayo, uti omnye nomnye wenu abe neculo, abe nemfundiso, abe ne nye inteto, abe nesityilo, abe nesikumsho. Mazenziwe zonke izinto kuze kube kukumiswa." 
1Corinthians14:27 Ukuba ke kuko otetayo nge nye inteto, makube ngababini, umhlaumbi ngabangagqiti abatatu, makube nangokulandelana; ati omnye akumshe." 
1Corinthians14:28 Kodwa xeshekweni kungeko ikumsha, makati cwaka entlanganisweni; aze azitetele yena notixo." 
1Corinthians14:29 Abaprofite ke mabatete ababini umhlaumbi abatatu, bati abanye bahlule." 
1Corinthians14:30 Kodwa xeshekweni kwenziwa isityilo kwomnye ehleli kona, owokuqala makati cwaka." 
1Corinthians14:31 Ngokuba ningaprofiteshayo nonke omnye ngomnye, ukuze bonke bafunde, nokuba bonke bonwatyiswe." 
1Corinthians14:32 Kanjako umoya wabaprofite ululamela kubaprofite. 
1Corinthians14:33 Ngokuba utixo engengowesipitipiti, ungowoxolo, njengakuzo zonke iṙemente zabangcwele." 
1Corinthians14:34 Abafazi benu mabati cwaka ezintlanganisweni: ngokuba kungavunyelwanga bona ukuba batete, koko kuyalelwe ukuba babe sekululameni, njengokuba usitsho nomteto." 
1Corinthians14:35 Nokuba bayafuna ukufunda into, mababuze ekaya kwawabo amadoda: ngokuba kuyinto embi kubafazi ukuba batete entlanganisweni." 
1Corinthians14:36 Ilizwi likatixo lapuma kuni yinina? leza kufika kuni nedwa kusinina? 
1Corinthians14:37 Ukuba kuko umntu oba ungumprofite umhlaumbi ungobumoya, makavume izinto endiziba̔layo ukuba ziyimiyalelo yenkosi." 
1Corinthians14:38 Kodwa ukuba umntu akanakwazi, makabe engenakwazi." 
1Corinthians14:39 Ngako oko, bazalwana! zondelelani ukuprofitesha; nokuteta nge zinye inteto ningakwaleli." 
1Corinthians14:40 Mazenziwe zonke izinto ngokufanelekileyo nanjengokumiselweyo. 
1Corinthians15:1 NDIYANAZISA, bazalwana! ivangeli endayishumayelayo kuni, — kwa leyo enayamkelayo, nenimiyo kuyo," 
1Corinthians15:2 nenisindiswa ngayo, — ngesanina isiteto endayishumayelayo kuni, ukuba niyayibamba, ukuba kanti anifumane nakolwa." 
1Corinthians15:3 Ngokuba ndandinikela kuni ukuqala, oko endati kanjalo ndakwamkela, ukuba u‐Kristu wafela izono zetu, njengokweziba̔lo;" 
1Corinthians15:4 nokuba wancw̔atywa, nokuba uvukile ngomhla wesitatu, njengokweziba̔lo;" 
1Corinthians15:5 nokuba wabonakala ku‐Kefasi, wandula wabonakala kwabalishumi linababini:" 
1Corinthians15:6 wati kamva wabonakala kwabazalwana abapezulu kwabangamakulu mahlanu ngexesha linye, abati into eninzi yabo bahlale kude kube kaloku nje, kodwa inxenye balele kukufa." 
1Corinthians15:7 Wati kamva wabonakala ku‐Yakobi; wandula wabonakala kubapostile bonke. 
1Corinthians15:8 Waza wati emveni kwabo bonke, njengakulowo uzelweyo lingekabiko ixesha, wabonakala nakum." 
1Corinthians15:9 Ngokuba mna ndingomncinane kubo bonke abapostile, ondingafanelekile ukuba ndibizwe ngompostile, ngenxa yokuba ndayitshutshisa iṙemente katixo." 
1Corinthians15:10 Kodwa ngofefe lukatixo ndikoko endikuko: nofefe lwake olwenzelwa mna alwaba yinto engendawo; koko ndagqitisayo kubo bonke ngokusebenza kakulu; ndingendim kodwa, lufefe lukatixo olube lukunye nam." 
1Corinthians15:11 Nokuba ngoko ndim, nokuba ngabo bona, kunjalo ukushumayela kwetu, bekunjalo nokukolwa kwenu." 
1Corinthians15:12 Kekaloku ukuba u‐Kristu uyashunyayelwa ukuba uvukile kwabafileyo, bati nina inxenye pakati kwenu ukuti akuko kuvuka kwabafileyo?" 
1Corinthians15:13 Kodwa ukuba akuko kuvuka kwabafileyo, u‐Kristu naye akavukanga ke:" 
1Corinthians15:14 nokuba u‐Kristu akavukanga, kukona iyinto engendawo intshumayelo yetu, iyinto engendawo nenkolo yenu." 
1Corinthians15:15 Ewe kanjalo siyafunyanwa singamanqi̔na abuxoki katixo; kuba sasinqi̔nile ngaye utixo ukuba wamvusa u‐Kristu; ote akamvusa, ukuba kambe abafileyo abavuki." 
1Corinthians15:16 Ngokuba abafileyo ukuba abavuki, u‐Kristu naye akavukanga ke:" 
1Corinthians15:17 nokuba u‐Kristu akavukanga, yinto engendawo inkolo yenu; nisesezonweni zenu." 
1Corinthians15:18 Kukona nabo balala kukufa ku‐Kristu batshabalala. 
1Corinthians15:19 Ukuba sinokutemba ku‐Kristu kokukudliwa kwobomi kupela, singabakedamelekayo ngapezu kwabantu bonke." 
1Corinthians15:20 Kodwa kaloku u‐Kristu uvukile kwabafileyo, waba sisandulelo sabo balele kukufa." 
1Corinthians15:21 Ngokuba ekubeni ukufa kwezayo ngaye umntu, kweza ngaye umntu nokuvuka kwabafileyo." 
1Corinthians15:22 Ngokuba njengokuba ku‐Adame bonke bafayo, kwa njalo ku‐Kristu bonke baya kudliswa ubomi." 
1Corinthians15:23 Kodwa omnye nomnye ngokwake ukucwangciswa: u‐Kristu esisandulelo; kamva abaka‐Kristu, ekufikeni kwake." 
1Corinthians15:24 Kwandul’ ukubako isipelo, okuya abunikeleyo ubukumkani kuye utixo noyise, okuya atshabalalisile bonke ubupati nalo lonke igunya namandla." 
1Corinthians15:25 Ngokuba efanele ukupata ubukumkani, ade azibeke zonke intshaba zake ngapantsi kwenyawo zake." 
1Corinthians15:26 Utshaba lwokugqibela olutshatyalaliswayo kukufa. 
1Corinthians15:27 Ngokuba kusitwa: Uzibekile pantsi zonke izinto ngapantsi kwenyawo zake. Kodwa okuya atshoyo ukuti zonke izinto zibekiwe pantsi, kusekuhleni ukuba kungapandle kwalowo owabeka pantsi zonke izinto kuye." 
1Corinthians15:28 Kanjalo okuya zonke izinto zibekiwe pantsi kuye, uya kwandula nonyana ngokwake abekwe pantsi kulowo owabeka pantsi zonke izinto kwa kuye, ukuze utixo abe zinto zonke kubo bonke." 
1Corinthians15:29 Okanye baya kwenza nto nina abo babapitizeshelwa abafileyo? Ukuba abafileyo abavuki nakanye, yinina ke ukuba bayabapitizeshelwa abafileyo?" 
1Corinthians15:30 Yinina ukuba nati sisemgcipekweni amaxeshana onke? 
1Corinthians15:31 Ngenyaniso, luqa̔yiso endinalo pezu kwenu kuye u‐Kristu Yesu inkosi yetu, nditi imihla ngemihla ndife!" 
1Corinthians15:32 Ukuba ndati njengokwabantu ndalwa namar̔amncwa e‐Efese, kundinceda nto nina oko? Ukuba abafileyo abavuki, Masitye sisele, ngokuba sisiti ngomso sife." 
1Corinthians15:33 Ize ningakohliswa ke: Izincoko ezikohlakeleyo ziyonakalisa izimilo ezilungileyo. 
1Corinthians15:34 Qabukani ngokulungileyo, nize ningoni; ngokuba inxenye bengenakumazi utixo: ndiyateta oku nize nibe nentloni." 
1Corinthians15:35 Koko kuya kuti umntu: Batiwa nina abafileyo ukuvuswa? kanjako bayeza ngomzimba onjanina? 
1Corinthians15:36 Sidenge! lonto uyihlwayelayo wena ayenzelwa ubomi, xeshekweni ingafi:" 
1Corinthians15:37 nalonto uyihlwayelayo, akuhlwayeli esosibili esiya kubako, koko uhlwayela ukozo lulodwa, kungaba lolwenqolowa, umhlaumbi lolwenye yezinye imbewu:" 
1Corinthians15:38 kodwa utixo uyanika kulo isibili njengokuba etandile, nakuzo zonke imbewu ngezinye ezazo izibili." 
1Corinthians15:39 Yonke inyama ayikwa yiyo yona inyama: koko kuko enye inyama yabantu, enye inyama yenkomo, enye yentlanzi, enye yentaka." 
1Corinthians15:40 Kuko kanjalo imizimba yasezulwini, nemizimba yasemhlabeni: koko ubungcwalisa beyasezulwini buyinto eyodwa, nobeyasemhlabeni buyinto eyimbi." 
1Corinthians15:41 Kuko obunye ubungcwalisa belanga, nobunye ubungcwalisa benyanga, nobunye ubungcwalisa benkwenkwezi: ngokuba inkwenkwezi isahluka kwinkwenkwezi ngobungcwalisa." 
1Corinthians15:42 Kukwa njalo nokuvuka kwabafileyo. Uyahlwayelwa ekuboleni; uyavuswa ekungabolini: 
1Corinthians15:43 uyahlwayelwa ekudelekeni; uyavuswa ebungcwaliseni: uyahlwayelwa ebutatakeni; uyavuswa emandleni: 
1Corinthians15:44 uyahlwayelwa ungumzimba obupefumlo; uyavuswa ungumzimba obumoya. Kuko umzimba obupefumlo; kuko kanjako umzimba obumoya. 
1Corinthians15:45 Kwa njalo ke kuba̔liwe ukuti: Owokuqala umntu u‐Adame waba ngumpefumlo obudla ubomi; owokugqibela u‐Adame waba ngumoya obunika ubomi. 
1Corinthians15:46 Kuloko okubumoya kungekokwokuqala, kukokubupefumlo; okubumoya kokwasemva." 
1Corinthians15:47 Owokuqala umntu uvela emhlabeni, ebuhlabati; owesibini umntu, inkosi, uvela ezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:48 Into uyiyo obuhlabati, bakwa yinto enjalo ababuhlabati nabo: kanjako into uyiyo owasezulwini, bakwa yinto enjalo abasezulwini nabo." 
1Corinthians15:49 Nanjengokuba siwutwele umfanekiso wake obuhlabati, sowutwala nomfanekiso wake owasezulwini." 
1Corinthians15:50 Kodwa oku ndiyakutsho, bazalwana! ukuba yona inyama negazi ayingelidle ilifa lobukumkani bukatixo; kanjako ukubola akulidli ilifa lokungaboli." 
1Corinthians15:51 Bona ke, ndiyanixelela imfihlakalo: Asiyi kulala kukufa sonke, kodwa siya kuguqulwa sonke," 
1Corinthians15:52 ngesiqupe, ngepanyazo leliso, ngexilongo lokugqibela: ngokuba ixilongo liya kuhlokoma, baye abafileyo beya kuvuswa bengenakubola, nati siya kuguqulwa." 
1Corinthians15:53 Ngokuba oku okubolayo kufanele ukuba kwambate ukungaboli, noku okufayo ukuba kwambate ukungafi." 
1Corinthians15:54 Kekaloku okuya oku okubolayo kwambete ukungaboli, n okuya oku okufayo kwambete ukungafi, kuya kwandula kwenzeka elozwi liba̔liweyo ukuti: Ukufa kuginyelwe elwoyisweni." 
1Corinthians15:55 Lupina, Kufa! ulwavila lwako? Lupina, Hadesi! ulwoyiso lwako?" 
1Corinthians15:56 Kekaloku ulwavila lwokufa, sisono; namandla esono, ngumteto." 
1Corinthians15:57 Kodwa makubulelwe kutixo, osinikayo ulwoyiso ngayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu." 
1Corinthians15:58 Ngako oko, bazalwana bam abatandiweyo! yibani niqinile, ningenakushenxiswa, nikolisa ukwanda emsebenzini wenkosi ngamaxesha onke, nisazi nje ukuba umzamo wenu awuyinto engendawo enkosini." 
1Corinthians16:1 KEKALOKU okwayo inkongozelo ngenxa yabangcwele, njengokuba ndandimisele iṙemente zase‐Galati, yenzani njalo kwa nani." 
1Corinthians16:2 Ngowokuqala umhla weveki mabati bonke ngabanye kuni babeke into kubo, bebekela ngoko kusukuba behanjisiwe kakuhle ngako, ukuze kuti ndakufika, zinganduli zenzwe inkongozelo oko." 
1Corinthians16:3 Naxeshekweni ndifikileyo, abo basukuba nibabukayo ndiya kubatuma aba benencwadi ukuya kusa ubabalo lwenu e‐Yerusaleme." 
1Corinthians16:4 Nokuba kuti kufanele ukuba ndihambe nam, baya kuhamba kwa kunye nam." 
1Corinthians16:5 Kodwa ndiya kuza kuni, okuya ndicandileyo i‐Masedoniya; ngokuba ndicanda i‐Masedoniya:" 
1Corinthians16:6 ndize kungati ndihlale kuni, umhlaumbi ndenze kwa ubusika, ukuze ndipelekelelwe nini apo kusukuba ndihambela kona." 
1Corinthians16:7 Ngokuba ndingafuni ukunibona ngoku ekudluleni; kodwa ndiyatemba ukulibala kuni ixesha elitile, xeshekweni kuvunyelwayo yinkosi." 
1Corinthians16:8 Kodwa ndiya kulibala e‐Efese kude kubeko ipentekoste. 
1Corinthians16:9 Ngokuba ndivulelwe ituba elikulu, elisebenzekayo; kanjalo bako abalane abaninzi."
