1Corinthians16:10 Kodwa xeshekweni kufikayo u‐Timote, lumkani ukuba abeko kuni engenakwoyika: ngokuba esebenza umsebenzi wenkosi, njengokuba ndisenje njalo nam." 
1Corinthians16:11 Makungabiko umntu ngoko omdelayo: kodwa mpelekeleleni ngoxolo, ukuba eze kum: ngokuba ndimkangela kunye nabo abazalwana." 
1Corinthians16:12 Kodwa okwake u‐Apolosi umzalwana wetu, ndamkunga kakulu ukuba eze kuni kunye nabo abazalwana: kanti ibingeko kanye intando yokuba eze kaloku nje; kodwa uya kuza okuya anexesha elifanekileyo." 
1Corinthians16:13 Lindani, qinisani ukuma elukolweni, yenzani njengamadoda, yomelelani." 
1Corinthians16:14 Maziti zonke izinto zenu zenzwe ngotando. 
1Corinthians16:15 Kekaloku ndiyanikunga, bazalwana! (niyazi indlu ka‐Stefana, ukuba isisandulelo sase‐Akaiya, nokuba bazimisile ukukonza kwabangcwele,)" 
1Corinthians16:16 ukuba nani nilulamele kwabanjalo, nakubo bonke abanceda emsebenzini, nabazamayo." 
1Corinthians16:17 Ndiyavuyela ukufika kuka‐Stefana no‐Forotunato no‐Akaiyiko; kuba oko bekuswele ngecala lenu bona aba bakwenzelele. 
1Corinthians16:18 Ngokuba bepumzile owam umoya nowenu: bukani ngoko abanjalo. 
1Corinthians16:19 Iṙemente zase‐Asiya ziyanibulisa. U‐Akwila no‐Pirisila bayanibulisa kakulu enkosini, kunye neṙemente esendlwini yabo." 
1Corinthians16:20 Abazalwana bonke bayanibulisa. Bulisanani ngokwanga okungcwele. 
1Corinthians16:21 Umbuliso wam Paulusi ngesam isandla. 
1Corinthians16:22 Ukuba umntu akatandi inkosi u‐Yesu Kristu, makabe yinto eqalekisiweyo. Inkosi iyeza." 
1Corinthians16:23 Ufefe lwenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu malube nani. 
1Corinthians16:24 Utando lwam malube nani nonke ku‐Kristu Yesu. Amene. 
2Corinthians1:1 UPAULUSI, umpostile ka‐Yesu Kristu ngayo intando katixo, no‐Timote umzalwana wetu, kuyo iṙemente katixo ese‐Korinte, kunye nabo bonke abangcwele abakuyo yonke i‐Akaiya:" 
2Corinthians1:2 Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye utixo ubawo wetu, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
2Corinthians1:3 Makabongwe yena utixo noyise wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, yena uyise wezibele notixo walo lwonke ulwonwabiso;" 
2Corinthians1:4 osonwabisayo kuko konke ukubandezelwa kwetu, size sibe namandla ukubonwabisa abo basekubandezelweni noko kunjanina, ngalo ololwonwabiso esonwatyiswayo ngalo kwa tina ngutixo." 
2Corinthians1:5 Kuba njengokuba intlungu zika‐Kristu zikolisa ukusandela, kwa njalo ngaye u‐Kristu lukolisa ukwanda nonwabiso lwetu." 
2Corinthians1:6 Kodwa nokuba siyabandezelwa, kungenxa yokwenu ukwonwatyiswa nokusindiswa, okusebenzayo ekunyamezeleni intlungu ezikwa zizo esizivayo nati; nokuba siyonwatyiswa, kungenxa yokwenu ukwonwatyiswa nokusindiswa." 
2Corinthians1:7 Kanjalo itemba letu liqinisekile ngenxa yenu; sisazi nje ukuba, njengokuba ninobudlelana nazo intlungu, kwa njalo ninobudlelana nalo nonwabiso." 
2Corinthians1:8 Ngokuba ndingatandi ukuba nibe ningazi, bazalwana! ngako ukubandezelwa kwetu esasihlelwa kuko e‐Asiya, okokuba satwaliswa ngento egqitisileyo, pezu kwamandla etu, sada sancama nobomi:" 
2Corinthians1:9 ewe tina ngokwetu sibe sinomgwebo wokufa kwa kuti, ukuze singabi sitembela kokwetu, koko sibe sitembela kutixo ovusayo abafileyo:" 
2Corinthians1:10 owasihlangulayo ekufeni okukulu kangaka, oti kanjalo ahlangule: esitemba kuye ukuba woba esahlangula kanjalo;" 
2Corinthians1:11 nani ninceda kunye ngenxa yetu ngokukunga kwenu, ukuze obobubele sabenzelwayo ngetuba labantu abaninzi lubulelwe ngabaninzi ngenxa yetu." 
2Corinthians1:12 Ngokuba ukuqa̔yisela kwetu kuko oku, kwa ukunqi̔na kwesazeliso setu, okokuba sati kulo ulungelelwano nobunene bukatixo, kwakungekubo ubulumko obubunyama, kwakukulo ufefe lukatixo, sanokuhlala kwetu elizweni, nakakulu ngakumbi ke ngakuni." 
2Corinthians1:13 Ngokuba singaba̔li ezinye izinto kuni, ngapandle kwezo nizileseshayo nenizivumayo; enditemba kanjalo ukuba nozivuma kwa kude kube sekupeleni;" 
2Corinthians1:14 kwa njengokuba nasivumayo ngokwenxenye, ukuba siluqa̔yiselo lwenu, njengokuba nani nilolwetu, emhleni wenkosi u‐Yesu." 
2Corinthians1:15 Kanjako kwesisitembelo ndibe ndifuna ukuza kuni tanci, ukuze nizuze intsikelelo yesibini;" 
2Corinthians1:16 nokudlula ngani ukuya e‐Masedoniya, nokuti ndivela e‐Masedoniya ndize kuni kanjako, ndipelekelelwe nini ukuya e‐Judeya." 
2Corinthians1:16 nokudlula ngani ukuya e‐Masedoniya, nokuti ndivela e‐Masedoniya ndize kuni kanjako, ndipelekelelwe nini ukuya e‐Judeya." 
2Corinthians1:17 Kekaloku nxa ndibe ndifuna oku, ndaka ndenza ngokuqetuka na? izinto endizicingayo, ndiyazicinga ngokwenyama kusinina, ukuze kubeko kum ukuti ewe ewe, nokuti hai hai?" 
2Corinthians1:18 Kodwa utixo enyanisekile nje, ilizwi letu kuni belingengu‐ewe no‐hai." 
2Corinthians1:19 Ngokuba unyana katixo, u‐Yesu Kristu, owashunyayelwa pakati kwenu siti, ndim no‐Silivane no Timote, bekungengu‐ewe no‐hai, koko kwenziwe u‐ewe kuye:" 
2Corinthians1:20 ngokuba amadinga katixo noko maninzi kangakananina, ukuye u‐ewe, ukuye u‐amene, kube bubungcwalisa kutixo ngati tina." 
2Corinthians1:21 Kekaloku lowo osiqinisayo kunye nani ku‐Kristu, nositambisileyo, ngutixo;" 
2Corinthians1:22 ote kanjalo wasincamatisela, wasinika isibambiselo somoya ezintliziyweni zetu." 
2Corinthians1:23 Kodwa mna ndiyambiza utixo abe linqi̔na pezu kwompefumlo wam, ukuba ngokunga ndinganiyeka andabi sa funa ukuza e‐Korinte:" 
2Corinthians1:24 kungekukuba sipata ubukosi pezu kwenkolo yenu, kukuba singabancedi bovuyo lwenu; ngokuba nimiyo ngenkolo." 
2Corinthians2:1 Kodwa ndagweba oku ngokwam ukuti andiyi kubuya ndize kuni ngosizi. 
2Corinthians2:2 Ngokuba mna ukuba ndiyanenza lusizi, ngubanina ke ondivuyisayo, kupela ngulowo owenziwa lusizi ngam?" 
2Corinthians2:3 Kanjalo lento ekwa yiyo yona ndayiba̔la kuni, ukuze nditi ndakufika ndingabi nosizi kubo abo bendifanele ukuba nokuvuya ngabo; ndinokutemba kuni nonke nje, ukuba olwam uvuyo lulolwenu nonke." 
2Corinthians2:4 Ngokuba ndiselubandezelweni olukulu nasebunzimeni bentliziyo ndaba̔la kuni ngenyembezi ezininzi; bekungekukuba nenzwe lusizi, bekukukuba nilwazi olotando endinalo kakulu ngakumbi ke ngakuni." 
2Corinthians2:5 Kodwa ukuba umntu wenzile usizi, akandenzelanga usizi mna, koko ngokwenxenye (ukuze ndingabeki kuye into esindayo) enenzele lona nina nonke." 
2Corinthians2:6 Kwanele onjalo okukwohlwayiwa o kwenziwa ngabo abaninzi. 
2Corinthians2:7 Kwa njalo ke ngelinye icala ni fanele ngakumbi uku m xolela noku m onwabisa, hleze kungati onjalo aginyelwe lusizi oluninzi kakulu." 
2Corinthians2:8 Ngako oko ndiyanikunga ukuba niqinise utando lwenu ngakuye. 
2Corinthians2:9 Ngokuba ndaba̔lela kwa oku kanjalo, ukuze ndikwazi ukulingwa kwenu, ukuba nipulapula ezintweni zonke na." 
2Corinthians2:10 Lowo ke enimxolelayo into, ndiyamxolela nam: ngokuba nam ukuba ndixolele into, lowo ndimxoleleyo, ndamxolela ngenxa yenu, ebusweni buka‐Kristu;" 
2Corinthians2:11 ukuze singalunyukiswa ngu‐Satane: ngokuba amaqinga ake singenakungawazi. 
2Corinthians2:12 Kanjako, ndakufika e‐Tirowa ngenxa yevangeli ka‐Kristu, nanxa bendivulelwe ucango enkosini," 
2Corinthians2:13 ndandingenakupumla emoyeni wam, ekubeni bendingafumani u‐Titusi umzalwana wam; koko ndibabulisile nje ndemkayo ukuya e‐Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:13 ndandingenakupumla emoyeni wam, ekubeni bendingafumani u‐Titusi umzalwana wam; koko ndibabulisile nje ndemkayo ukuya e‐Masedoniya." 
2Corinthians2:14 KODWA makubulelwe kutixo, oti ngamaxesha onke asenze soyise ku‐Kristu, nevumba lokwaziwa kwake alibonakalise ngati kuzo zonke indawo." 
2Corinthians2:15 Ngokokuba silivumba elimnandi lika‐Kristu kuye utixo, pakati kwabo basindiswayo, napakati kwabo babubayo:" 
2Corinthians2:16 kwabanye silivumba lokufa kube kukufa; kwabanye silivumba lobomi bube bubomi. Kanti ngubanina ozilinganele ezizinto? 
2Corinthians2:17 Ngokuba singenjengabo abaninzi, siligxengela ilizwi likatixo nje; koko njengabobunene, koko njenga bakatixo, ebusweni bukatixo, sitetayo ku‐Kristu." 
2Corinthians3:1 Siyaqala kanjako ukuzazisa na? siyaswela kusinina, njeng abanye abatile, incwadi zokwazisa zisiza kuni, umhlaumbi incwadi zokwazisa zivela kuni?" 
2Corinthians3:2 Incwadi yetu nini, iba̔lelwe ezintliziyweni zetu, isaziwa ileseshwa nokuleseshwa ngabo bonke abantu;" 
2Corinthians3:3 nibonakaliswa nje ukuba niyincwadi ka‐Kristu yenziwe ngokukonza kwetu, iba̔liwe kungengeyinke, ku ngomoya katixo ohleliyo, kungesemacwecweni amatye, kusemacwecweni enyama entliziyo." 
2Corinthians3:4 Isitembelo esinjalo ke sinaso ngaye u‐Kristu ngakutixo: 
2Corinthians3:5 kungekukuba silinganele ukutelekelela into ngokwetu, njengokungati kuvela kwa kuti; koko ukulinganela kwetu kuvela kutixo;" 
2Corinthians3:6 owati kanjalo wasenza silinganele ukuba ngabakonzi bocebano olutsha; bengengabegama, bengabomoya; ngokuba igama libulala, kodwa umoya uyanika ubomi." 
2Corinthians3:7 Kodwa ukuba isikonzo sokufa, siba̔lelwe emagameni, siqingqelwe ematyeni, besisebungcwaliseni, lude lukohlwe usapo luka‐Sirayeli kukuti nama ukukangela ngasebusweni buka‐Mosesi, ngenxa yobungcwalisa bobuso bake, obebuya kutshatyalaliswa;" 
2Corinthians3:8 kungati nina ukuba isikonzo somoya asiyi kuti ngakumbi sibe sebungcwaliseni? 
2Corinthians3:9 Ngokuba isikonzo sokugweba ukuba sibungcwalisa, siti isikonzo sobulungisa kakulu ngakumbi sigqitise ngokuba sebungcwaliseni." 
2Corinthians3:10 Ngokuba kwa oko okwenzelwe ubungcwalisa kungenzelwanga ubungcwalisa kuyo lendawo, ngenxa yobungcwalisa obudluliseleyo." 
2Corinthians3:11 Ngokuba oko kutshatyalaliswayo ukuba bekunobungcwalisa, kukakulu ngakumbi oko kuhlalayo kusebungcwaliseni." 
2Corinthians3:12 Ngako sinalo itemba elinjalo nje, siyateta kwa sekuhleni kakulu:" 
2Corinthians3:13 kungenjengokuba u‐Mosesi ebebeka isigubungelo pezu kwobuso bake, ukuze ke usapo luka‐Sirayeli lungati nama ukukangela ngasesipelweni sobekuya kutshatyalaliswa." 
2Corinthians3:14 Koko ingqondo zalo zaba lukuni: ngokuba kwada kwanamhla nje eso sona isigubungelo sisiti ekuleseshweni kwocebano oludala sihlale singahlutywanga, into etshatyalaliswayo ku‐Kristu." 
2Corinthians3:15 Koko kwada kwanamhla, xeshekweni kuleseshwayo u‐Mosesi, kulele isigubungelo pezu kwentliziyo yalo." 
2Corinthians3:16 Kodwa xeshekweni isukuba iguqukela kwinkosi, siyasuswa kanye isigubungelo eso." 
2Corinthians3:17 Kekaloku yona inkosi inguye umoya; nalapo akona yena umoya wenkosi, ikwa kona inkululeko." 
2Corinthians3:18 Kodwa tina sonke, sibukangela nje ngobuso obungagujungelweyo njengasencwadini ubungcwalisa benkosi, siyaguqulelwa kulowo wona umfanekiso kwa kubo obunye ubungcwalisa kude kube kobunye ubungcwalisa, njengokuba buvela kuyo inkosi umoya." 
2Corinthians4:1 NGENXA yoku, sinaso isikonzo esi nje, njengokuba silwamkele ufefe, asinakudinwa;" 
2Corinthians4:2 koko sizalile izinto ezifihlakeleyo zehlazo, singahambi ebuqokolweni, singapati ilizwi likatixo ngobukohliso kanjalo; koko ngokubonakaliswa kwayo inyaniso sizazisa kwisazeliso sabantu bonke ebusweni bukatixo." 
2Corinthians4:3 Kodwa ukuba igujungelwe nevangeli yetu, igujungelwe kubo ababubayo;" 
2Corinthians4:4 ekukubo utixo welilizwe likoyo umfamekisile ingqondo zabangakolwayo, ukuze kungakazimli pezu kwabo ukukanyisa kwevangeli yobungcwalisa buka‐Kristu, ongumfanekiso katixo." 
2Corinthians4:5 Ngokuba singazishumayeli tina, koko sishumayela u‐Kristu Yesu ukuba u yinkosi; nati tina ukuba sizizicaka zenu ngenxa ka‐Yesu." 
2Corinthians4:6 Ngokokuba ngutixo, owaxela ukuba ukukanya kukanye kupuma ebumnyameni, owakanyayo ezintliziyweni zetu kuze kube kukukanyisa kwokwaziwa kwobungcwalisa bukatixo ebusweni buka‐Yesu Kristu." 
2Corinthians4:7 Kodwa sinayo indyebo le ezimpahleni zodongwe, ukuze ubungangamsha bamandla bube bo bukatixo, bungabi bobakuti ke:" 
2Corinthians4:8 sibandezelwa ngamacala onke nje, singaxingekile noko; sixakekile nje, singancami noko;" 
2Corinthians4:9 sitshutshiswa nje, singashiywa noko; sikahlelwe pantsi nje, singabujiswa noko;" 
2Corinthians4:10 simana sikutwala ngamaxesha onke emzimbeni ukufa kwenkosi u‐Yesu, ukuze ubomi buka‐Yesu nabo bubonakaliswe emzimbeni wetu." 
2Corinthians4:11 Ngokuba tina sihleliyo kufuti sinikelwa ekufeni ngenxa ka‐Yesu, ukuze ubomi buka‐Yesu nabo bubonakaliswe enyameni yetu enokufa." 
2Corinthians4:12 Kwa njalo ke ukufa kuyasebenza kuti, kodwa ubomi kuni." 
2Corinthians4:13 Kodwa sinawo lowo wona umoya wokolo, njengoko kuba̔liweyo ukuti: Ndakolwa, kungoko ndatetayo; nati siyakolwa, siti ngoko kanjalo sitete;" 
2Corinthians4:14 sisazi nje ukuba lowo wavusayo inkosi u‐Yesu uya kuti tina nati asivuse ngaye u‐Yesu, asimise kunye nani." 
2Corinthians4:15 Ngokuba izinto zonke zingenxa yenu, ukuze ufefe lwandisiwe nje luti ngabo abaninzi lwenze umbulelo ukolise ukwandela ubungcwalisa bukatixo." 
2Corinthians4:16 Ngako oku asinakudinwa; koko nakuba umntu wetu wapandle ebuba, owapakati noko uyahlaziywa ngemihla ngemihla." 
2Corinthians4:17 Ngokuba ubandezelo lwetu olulula olukoyo kodwa, lusenzela tina ngento egqitisileyo kakulu ngakumbi ubungcwalisa obunzima obungunapakade;" 
2Corinthians4:18 nxa singagqali izinto ezibonwayo, koko sigqala izinto ezingabonwayo; ngokuba izinto ezibonwayo zezomzuzu kodwa, kanti izinto ezingabonwayo zingunapakade." 
2Corinthians5:1 Ngokuba sisazi ukuba siti, xeshekweni indlu yetu yasemhlabeni yolupahla ici̔twayo, sinaso isakiwo sivela kutixo, indlu ingenziwanga ngezandla, ingunapakade, ezulwini." 
2Corinthians5:2 Ngokuba kulo olu sigula, silangazelela ukwambata intlalo yetu evela ezulwini:" 
2Corinthians5:3 ukuba kambe nxa sivete nje asiyi kufunyanwa sizé. 
2Corinthians5:4 Ngokuba tina esikulo olupahla sigula, sitwaliswa ke: ekubeni singafuni ukuhlutyululwa, koko sifuna ukwambatiswa, ukuze oko kunokufa kuginywe bubomi." 
2Corinthians5:5 Kekaloku lowo owasenzela kwa yona lento ngutixo, ote kanjalo wasinika isibambiselo somoya." 
2Corinthians5:6 Sinokwomelela ngoko ngamaxesha onke nje, sisazi nokwazi ukuba siti, nxa sisekaya letu emzimbeni, sikude nekaya letu enkosini;" 
2Corinthians5:7 (ngokuba sihamba ngalo ukolo, singa hambi ngako okubonakalayo;)" 
2Corinthians5:8 siyomelela ke, ewe siyanxamela ukuti ngakumbi sifuduke emzimbeni, sigodukele kwinkosi." 
2Corinthians5:9 Ngako oko siyazamela ukuba siti, nokuba siseko, nokuba siyafuduka, sibe sikolekile kuyo." 
2Corinthians5:10 Ngokuba sifanele tina sonke ukubonakaliswa pambi kwesihlalo sokugweba sika‐Kristu; ukuze bonke ngabanye babuye bamkele izinto ezenziweyo besemzimbeni, ngokwezinto bazenzileyo, nokuba yinto elungileyo, nokuba yinto ekohlakeleyo." 
2Corinthians5:11 KEKALOKU silwazi nje ulwoyikeko lwenkosi, siyacenga abantu: kodwa sibonakalisiwe kutixo; ewe ndiyatemba kanjalo ukuba sibonakalisiwe pakati kwezazeliso zenu." 
2Corinthians5:12 Ngokuba singabuyi sizazise kuni, koko sininika ituba lokuqa̔yisela ngenxa yetu, ukuze nibe nalo ngakubo abati baqa̔yise ebusweni, banga qa̔yisi entliziyweni." 
2Corinthians5:13 Ngokuba nokuba sinobuhilihili, kungenxa katixo; nokuba sinokuqonda kwetu, kungenxa yenu." 
2Corinthians5:14 Ngokuba utando luka‐Kristu lusinyanzela, sigwebile nje oku ukuti, ukuba omnye wafela bonke, kukona bafayo kwa bonke:" 
2Corinthians5:15 kanjalo wafela bonke, ukuze abo bahleliyo bangabi sazihlalela bona, koko bahlal ele lowo ute ngenxa yabo wafa wabuya wavuka." 
2Corinthians5:16 Kwa njalo tina emveni kwakaloku nje asazi ngokwenyama namnye umntu: ewe nokuba simazile ngokwenyama u‐Kristu, noko ngoku asisamazi." 
2Corinthians5:17 Kwa njalo ukuba umntu ukuye u‐Kristu, usisidalwa esitsha: izinto zakudala zidlulile; bona ke, zonke izinto ziba zintsha." 
2Corinthians5:18 Kanjako zonke izinto zivela kutixo, owasixolisana naye ngokwake ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu, wasinika tina isikonzo soxolisano;" 
2Corinthians5:19 esokuti utixo ube ku‐Kristu elixolisana naye ngokwake ilizwe, engabaleli kubo iziposo zabo; wayebekela kuti ilizwi loxolisano." 
2Corinthians5:20 Ngako sizizitunywa esikundleni sika‐Kristu, njengokungati utixo ebe ni kunga ngati: siya ni tandaza esikundleni sika‐Kristu, manixoliswane notixo." 
2Corinthians5:21 Ngokuba lowo ubengasazanga isono wamenza ukuba sisono ngenxa yetu; ukuze tina sibe bubulungisa bukatixo kuye. 
2Corinthians6:1 Kanjalo sisebenza kunye naye nje, nati siya ni kunga ukuba maningafumani nilwamkele ufefe lukatixo." 
2Corinthians6:2 (Ngokuba esiti: Ngexesha elikolekileyo ndikuvile, nangomhla wosindiso ndikusizile. Nali kaloku ixesha elikolekileyo kakuhle, nangu kaloku umhla wosindiso.)" 
2Corinthians6:3 Singaniki tuba lokuxakanisa nje nganye into, ukuze singeyiwa isikonzo:" 
2Corinthians6:4 koko sizibonakalisa ezintweni zonke njengokuba singabakonzi bakatixo, emondeni omninzi, ezimbandezelweni, ezitukutezini, ezixingweni," 
2Corinthians6:5 ezibetweni, ezintolongweni, ezimpitimpitini, emizanyweni, ezimpapanyweni, ezinzilweni;" 
2Corinthians6:6 ebucocweni, ekwazini, ekuzekeni kade, ebubeleni, kumoya oyingcwele, elutandweni olungazenzisiyo," 
2Corinthians6:7 elizwini lenyaniso, emandleni katixo, ngezixo̔bo zobulungisa ngasekunene nangasekohlo," 
2Corinthians6:8 ngembeko nangehlazo, ngodumo olubi nangodumo oluhle: njengabakohlisi, singabenyaniso noko;" 
2Corinthians6:9 njengabangaziwayo, besaziwa kakulu noko; njengababubayo, kanti, bona ke, sihleli; njengabohlwayiwayo, singafiswa noko;" 
2Corinthians6:10 njengabalusizi, kodwa sivuya ngamaxesha onke; njengababuhlwempu, kodwa sityebisa abaninzi; njengabangenanto, sifuya izinto zonke noko." 
2Corinthians6:11 Umlomo wetu uvulekile ngakuni, ma‐Korinte! intliziyo yetu yandisekile." 
2Corinthians6:12 Anixingekile kuti, kodwa nixingekile kuwo umbilini wenu." 
2Corinthians6:13 Kekaloku ukubuyekeza into ekwa yiyo, (ndiyateta njengakubo abantwana bam,) yibani nandisekile nani." 
2Corinthians6:14 Ize ningazifaki iyokwe yimbi ndawonye nabangakolwayo: ngokuba kuko ubukolwane bunina pakati kwobulungisa nokungalungi? nokukanya kunobudlelana bunina kunye nobumnyama? 
2Corinthians6:15 no‐Kristu unemvumelano yanina kunye no‐Beliyali? umhlaumbi okolwayo unesabiwo sanina ndawonye nongakolwayo? 
2Corinthians6:16 netempile katixo inesilungelelano sanina nezitixo? ngokuba nina niyiyo itempile katixo ohleliyo; njengokuba etshilo utixo ukuti: Ndiya kuma kubo, ndihambe pakati kwabo; ndandiya kuba ngutixo wabo, bati bona babe ngabantu kum." 
2Corinthians6:17 Ngako oko pumani kwa pakati kwabo, nibe nahlukile, utsho uyehova, nokunco̔lileyo ningakucu̔kumisi; ndandiya kunamkela," 
2Corinthians6:18 ndibe nguyihlo kuni, niti nina nibe ngonyana nentombi kum, utsho uyehova usomandla." 
2Corinthians7:1 Ngako sinawo lamadinga nje, batandwa! masizihlambulule kuko konke ukudyoba kwenyama nokwomoya, sibufeza ubungcwele nje ekwoyikeni utixo." 
2Corinthians7:2 SAMKELENI; asonanga mntu, asonakalisanga mntu, asilumkisanga mntu." 
2Corinthians7:3 Anditeti oku ukunga ndinganigweba: ngokuba nditshilo pambili ukuti nisezintliziyweni zetu ukuba sife ndawonye nani nokuba sipile ndawonye nani. 
2Corinthians7:4 Kukulu ukukalipa kwam ekuteteni ngakuni, kukulu ukuqa̔yisa kwam ngenxa yenu; ndizalisiwe lulwonwabiso, ndiyapupuma luvuyo kuko konke ukubandezelwa kwetu." 
2Corinthians7:5 Ngokuba okunene sakufika e‐Masedoniya, inyama yetu i̔bingenakupumla, koko sibe sibandezelwa ngamacala onke; ngapandle bekuko izilwo, pakati bekuko izoyiko." 
2Corinthians7:6 Noko ke lowo owonwabisayo abo batobekileyo, kwa utixo, wasonwabisa tina ngokufika kuka‐Titusi;" 
2Corinthians7:6 Noko ke lowo owonwabisayo abo batobekileyo, kwa utixo, wasonwabisa tina ngokufika kuka‐Titusi;" 
2Corinthians7:7 bekungengokufika kwake kodwa, koko bekungako nokwonwabisa wonwatyiswa ngako kuni, esityela ukulangazelela kwenu, ukulila kwenu, ukundizondelela kwenu; ndada ndavuya ngakumbi." 
2Corinthians7:8 Kuba ndisiti, nakuba ndanenza lusizi ngencwadi yam, ndingazohlwayi, nakuba ndibe ndizohlwaya: ngokuba ndibona ukuba incwadi leyo yanenza lusizi, nakuba bekungexeshana kodwa." 
2Corinthians7:9 Kaloku ndiyavuya, kungekukuba nenziwa lusizi, koko ukuba nenziwa lusizi lwada lwaba luguquko: ngokuba nenziwa lusizi ngo kukatixo, ukuze ningalahlekelwa nto ngati." 
2Corinthians7:10 Ngokuba usizi olungo kukatixo luzuzisa uguquko lude lube lusindiswa, eningayi kuzohlwaya ngalo; kodwa usizi lwaselizweni luyazuzisa ukufa." 
2Corinthians7:11 Ngokuba, bona ke, kwa yona lento, yokuba nenziwa lusizi ngo kukatixo, yenza ukuku̔tala okukulu kangakanana kuni! ewe, ukuzitetelela, ewe, ukuqumbela, ewe, ukwoyika, ewe, ukulangazelela, ewe, ukuzondelela, ewe, ukupindezela! Ezintweni zonke nazibonakalisa ukuba nimhlope kulendawo." 
2Corinthians7:12 Kukona, nakuba ndaba̔layo kuni, bekungengenxa yalowo ube wonile, bekungengenxa yalowo ube woniwe kanjalo, bekungenxa yokuba kubonakaliswe kuni ukuniku̔talela kwetu ebusweni bukatixo." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ngenxa yoku sasisonwatyiswa ekwonwatyisweni kwenu; kanjako sakolisa ukuvuya kakulu ngakumbi pezu kwovuyo luka‐Titusi, kuba umoya wake upunyuziwe nini nonke." 
2Corinthians7:13 Ngenxa yoku sasisonwatyiswa ekwonwatyisweni kwenu; kanjako sakolisa ukuvuya kakulu ngakumbi pezu kwovuyo luka‐Titusi, kuba umoya wake upunyuziwe nini nonke." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ngokuba mna ukuba ndike ndaqa̔yisa kuye ngenxa yenu, bendingadaniswa: koko njengokuba sibe siteta zonke izinto kuni ngenyaniso, kwa njalo nokuqa̔yisa kwetu pambi kwo‐Titusi bekufunyanwa ukuba yinyaniso." 
2Corinthians7:14 Ngokuba mna ukuba ndike ndaqa̔yisa kuye ngenxa yenu, bendingadaniswa: koko njengokuba sibe siteta zonke izinto kuni ngenyaniso, kwa njalo nokuqa̔yisa kwetu pambi kwo‐Titusi bekufunyanwa ukuba yinyaniso." 
2Corinthians7:15 Kanjalo umbilini wake ungakuni ngento enkulu ngakumbi, nxa akumbulayo ukuva kwenu nonke, okokuba nati ngokwoyika nangokututumela namamkela." 
2Corinthians7:16 Ndiyavuya ngoko ukuba ezintweni zonke ndinokwomelela ngani. 
2Corinthians8:1 KANJAKO siyanazisa, bazalwana! ufefe lukatixo olunikiweyo eziṙementeni zase‐Masedoniya;" 
2Corinthians8:2 ukuba ekulingeni okukulu kwembandezelo ubuninzi bovuyo lwabo nobuhlwempu obubohlekileyo babo bakolisa ukwandela ubutyebi besisa sabo. 
2Corinthians8:3 Ngokuba ngokwamandla abo, (ndiyanqi̔nela oku,) ewe napezu kwamandla abo bapa ngokwabo ukutanda;" 
2Corinthians8:4 besitandaza ngembongozo eninzi, ukuba samkele ubabalo lwabo, sidlelane nabo ekwabeleni abangcwele." 
2Corinthians8:5 Bekungenjengokuba sibe sitemba, koko bazinikelayo kuqala enkosini, nakuti, ngayo intando katixo:" 
2Corinthians8:6 sada samyala u‐Titusi, ukuba makati, njengokuba ebesel’ eqalile, abe kwa njalo efeza pakati kwenu nofefe olu." 
2Corinthians8:6 sada samyala u‐Titusi, ukuba makati, njengokuba ebesel’ eqalile, abe kwa njalo efeza pakati kwenu nofefe olu." 
2Corinthians8:7 Kodwa, njengokuba nikolisa ukwanda ezintweni zonke, elukolweni, naselizwini, nasekwazini, nakulo lwonke uku̔talo, naselutandweni lwenu kuti, lumkani ukuba nikolise ukwanda nakulo olufefe." 
2Corinthians8:8 Anditeti ngendawo yokuyolela, koko nditeta ngetuba lokuku̔tala kwabanye, ndibulinga nje ubunyaniso botando lwenu kanjalo." 
2Corinthians8:9 Ngokuba nilwazi ufefe lwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, ukuba wati, nangona ebebutyebi, waba buhlwempu ngenxa yenu, ukuze nina ngobuhlwempu bake nibe butyebi." 
2Corinthians8:10 Nakuko oku ndiyanika ingcingo yam: ngokuba oku kunilungele, ekubeni naseniqala nyakenye, kwakungekukwenza kodwa, kwakukuvuma kanjalo." 
2Corinthians8:11 Ize kaloku nifeze nokwenza, ukuze kuti, njengokuba bekuko unxamelo lwokuvuma, kubeko kwa njalo nokufezwa kuko oko eninako." 
2Corinthians8:12 Ngokuba unxamelo ukuba seluko, kungoko asukuba enako umntu akolekileyo, akungoko angenako." 
2Corinthians8:13 Ngokuba ndisitsho kungekukuba kubeko ubulula kwabanye, nembandezelo kuni;" 
2Corinthians8:14 kukuba kuti, ngokulingana, ngelixesha lakaloku nje ubuninzi benu benzelel ele ukuswela kwabo, ukuze nobuninzi babo bube nokwenzelel ela ukuswela kwenu; ukuba kube kukulingana;" 
2Corinthians8:15 njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Obe bute okuninzi akabanga nokupezulu, nobe bute okuncinane akabanga nakuswela." 
2Corinthians8:16 Kodwa makubulelwe kutixo, olubekayo uku̔talo olukwa lulo ngenxa yenu entliziyweni ka Titusi:" 
2Corinthians8:16 Kodwa makubulelwe kutixo, olubekayo uku̔talo olukwa lulo ngenxa yenu entliziyweni ka Titusi:" 
2Corinthians8:17 kuba ebesamkela isiyalo setu; kodwa eba nokuku̔tala ngakumbi nje, wapuma ngokwake ukutanda ukuya kuni." 
2Corinthians8:18 Site kanjalo kunye naye samtuma umzalwana, odunyiswa evangelini lukuzo zonke iṙemente;" 
2Corinthians8:19 kunge njalo ke kodwa, koko kanjako ebebalulwa ziṙemente ukuba ngumpeleki wetu ekuhambeni nalo ubabalo olu, olwabiwa siti kuze kubonakaliswe ubungcwalisa benkosi ngokwayo, nonxamelo lwenu:" 
2Corinthians8:20 sikulumkela oku nje, ukuba kungabiko mntu oṙoṙayo ngati ku lento yobubuninzi obabiwa siti:" 
2Corinthians8:21 sisazalelela izinto ezifaneleyo, kungesebusweni benkosi kodwa, kusebusweni babantu kanjalo." 
2Corinthians8:22 Saye simtumile kunye nabo umzalwana wetu, esimfumeneyo futi ezintweni ezininzi ukuba uku̔tele, kodwa ngoku uku̔tele kakulu ngakumbi, ngesitembelo esikulu a naso ngakuni." 
2Corinthians8:23 Nokuba kubuz elwa u‐Titusi, ulikolwane lam nomsebenzisi wam ngakuni: nokuba kubuzelwa abazalwana betu, bangabatunywa bazo iṙemente, no bungcwalisa buka‐Kristu." 
2Corinthians8:23 Nokuba kubuz elwa u‐Titusi, ulikolwane lam nomsebenzisi wam ngakuni: nokuba kubuzelwa abazalwana betu, bangabatunywa bazo iṙemente, no bungcwalisa buka‐Kristu." 
2Corinthians8:24 Ngako ke isiboniso sotando lwenu, nesoqa̔yiso lwetu ngenxa yenu, sibonakaliseni kubo, nasebusweni bazo iṙemente." 
2Corinthians9:1 Ngokuba ngako ukwabela abangcwele, akufuneki kanye ukuba ndiba̔le kuni:" 
2Corinthians9:2 ngokuba ndisazi unxamelo lwenu, endiqa̔yisayo pezu kwenu ngalo kwabase‐Masedoniya, ukuba i‐Akaiya seilungile nyakenye; kanjalo uzondelelo lwenu lwavusa into eninzi yabo." 
2Corinthians9:3 Kodwa nditumile abazalwana aba, ukuze ukuqa̔yisa kwetu pezu kwenu kungenziwa into engento yanto kuyo lendawo; ukuze ke, njengokuba bendisitsho, nibe senilungile:" 
2Corinthians9:4 hleze kungati, xeshekweni kuzayo abase‐Masedoniya kunye nam, banifumane ningalunganga, kudaniswe tina, (ukuze ndingatsho ukuti nina,) kokukwomelela kwokuqa̔yisa." 
2Corinthians9:5 Ndati ngoko ndaba kufanelekile ukuyala abazalwana aba, ukuba bandulele ukuya kuni, balungise pambili into yesisa senu ebishunyayelwe pambili, ukuba yona le ibe ilungile, kube njengokuba iyinto yesisa, kungabi njengokungati yinto yokuvimba." 
2Corinthians9:6 Kodwa oku ndiyakutsho: Ohlwayelayo ngokuncinane uya kuvuna nangokuncinane; nohlwayelayo ngokuninzi uya kuvuna nangokuninzi. 
2Corinthians9:7 Bonke ngabanye mabape njengokuba bezicingela entliziyweni; kungabi ngosizi, umhlaumbi ngokunyanzelwa: ngokuba utixo etanda opayo ngokucwayita." 
2Corinthians9:8 Kanjako utixo unamandla ukwenza ufefe lwonke lukolise ukunandela, ukuze niti, ninokwanela konke ezintweni zonke ngamaxesha onke, nikolise ukwandela yonke imisebenzi elungileyo;" 
2Corinthians9:9 njengokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Uci̔tile, wapa abasweleyo; ubulungisa bake bumi ngonapakade." 
2Corinthians9:10 Kekaloku wanga angati lowo obabala imbewu kumhlwayeli, nesonka sibe kukudla, ababale andise isihlwayelo senu, akulise iziqa̔mo zobulungisa benu;" 
2Corinthians9:11 nityetyiswa nje ezintweni zonke kube sisisa sonke, esizuzisayo ngati umbulelo kutixo." 
2Corinthians9:12 Ukuba ukwabiwa kwokonzo olu kungazenzeleli intswelo zabangcwele kodwa, koko kanjako kukolisa ukwanda ngayo imibulelo emininzi kutixo;" 
2Corinthians9:13 bakuba besiti, ngaso isazelo sesabiwo esi, badumise utixo ngenxa yolulamelo lwemvumelo yenu kuyo ivangeli ka‐Kristu, nesisa somnikelo wenu kubo, nakubo bonke;" 
2Corinthians9:14 bona nabo ngokwabo ngokunitandazela benilangazelela nje ngenxa yofefe oludluliseleyo lukatixo olukuni. 
2Corinthians9:15 Makubulelwe kutixo isipo sake esingabalisekileyo. 
2Corinthians10:1 KEKALOKU mna Paulusi ngokwam ndiyanikunga ngako ukululama nokutamba kuka‐Kristu, onditi ndisebusweni benu nditobekile pakati kwenu, kodwa nxa ndingekoyo ndinokwomelela ngakuni:" 
2Corinthians10:2 kodwa ndiya ni tandaza, ukuba ndingati nxa ndikoyo ndibe nokwomelela ngobuganga obo, enditelekelelisayo ukukalipa ngabo ngakubo abatile, abasibalelayo njengokungati sibe sihamba ngokwenyama." 
2Corinthians10:3 Ngokuba sisiti, nangona sihamba enyameni, singalwi ngokwenyama:" 
2Corinthians10:4 (ngokuba izikali zokulwa kwetu zingebunyama, koko zinamandla pambi kwotixo kuze kube kukuci̔twa kwazo inqaba:)" 
2Corinthians10:5 sici̔ta nje izicamango, nento zonke ezinde ezipakamayo ngakuko ukwaziwa kukatixo, sitimbela nokutimbela ekuviweni kuka‐Kristu onke amaqinga;" 
2Corinthians10:6 sesilungile nje kanjalo ukupindezelela konke ukungeva, okuya kuzalisekisweyo ukuva kwenu." 
2Corinthians10:7 Nizikangela izinto ngokwokubonakala kwazo na? Ukuba umntu uyazitembela ngokwake ukuba ungoka‐Kristu, makati ngokwake kanjako atelekelele oku, ukuba, njengokuba yena lo ungoka‐Kristu, kwa njalo nati singabaka‐Kristu." 
2Corinthians10:8 Ngokuba naxeshekweni ndiqa̔yisayo ngento enkulu ngakumbi ngalo igunya letu, esanikwa lona yinkosi, libe leloku ni misa, lingabi lelokunici̔ta, andiyi kudana:" 
2Corinthians10:9 ukuze ndingabi nokungati ngendinoyikisa ngencwadi zam. 
2Corinthians10:10 Ngokuba incwadi zake, kutshiwo, ziyinto enkulu, zinamandla; kodwa umzimba wake nxa akoyo ubutataka, nokuteta kwake kuyinto edelekileyo." 
2Corinthians10:11 Makati onjalo atelekelele oku, ukuba, into siyiyo ekuteteni ngencwadi nxa singekoyo, sikwa yinto enjalo kanjako nxa sikoyo ekwenzeni." 
2Corinthians10:12 Ngokuba singalingi ukuzibalelela umhlaumbi ukuzifanisa nenxenye yabazincomayo: koko bona, bezilinganisa pakati kwabo nje, bezifanisa kwa nabo ngokwabo, bengenakuqonda." 
2Corinthians10:13 Kodwa tina asiyi kuqa̔yisa ngendawo engenakulinganiswa, koko ngesilinganiselwa somda esabelwa sona ngutixo ukuba sisilinganiselwa sokuba sifikelele kude kube nakuni." 
2Corinthians10:14 Ngokuba singazoluli ngokugqita esilinganiselweni setu, njengokungati sibe singafikeleli kuni: ngokuba sasesifikile kwada kwaba nakuni evangelini ka‐Kristu:" 
2Corinthians10:15 singaqa̔yisi nje ngendawo engenakulinganiswa emisebenzini yabanye abantu, kodwa sinetemba nje lokuba soti, nxa ukolo lwenu lukulayo, sandiswe pakati kwenu ngokwomda wetu ngento eninzi kakulu," 
2Corinthians10:16 size siyishumayele ivangeli ezindaweni ezisele kwenu, singaqa̔yisi emdeni womnye umntu ngezinto ezise zilungisiwe." 
2Corinthians10:17 Kodwa lowo uqa̔yisayo, makaqa̔yise enkosini." 
2Corinthians10:18 Ngokuba engenguye ozincomayo ngokwake obukwayo, nguye onconywayo yinkosi." 
2Corinthians11:1 AKWABA niyandinyamezela kancinane ebudengeni‐ bam! ewe, kenindinyamezele." 
2Corinthians11:2 Ngokuba ndinobukwele pezu kwenu ngobukwele bukatixo: ngokuba ndinendisele kwindoda inye, ukunimisela ku‐Kristu njeng entombi ipela ecokisekileyo." 
2Corinthians11:3 Kodwa ndiyoyika, hleze kungati, njengokuba yona inyoka yamlukuhla u‐Eva ngobuqokolo bayo, kwa njalo inkumbulo zenu zonakaliswe zipanjukiswe kulo ulungelelwano olungakuye u‐Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:4 Ngokuba lowo uzayo ukuba uyashumayela omnye u‐Yesu esingashumayelanga yena, umhlaumbi ukuba niyamkela umoya wumbi eningamkelanga yena, umhlaumbi ivangeli yimbi eningamkelanga yona, beningalungisayo ukunyamezela." 
2Corinthians11:5 Ngokuba nditelekelelisa ukuba andincipekile nganye into kubo abobapostile abagqitisileyo ngobukulu. 
2Corinthians11:6 Kodwa nokuba ndingongenabuciko ekuteteni, andinjalo ekwazini; koko kuko konke sibonakalisiwe kuni ezintweni zonke." 
2Corinthians11:7 Ndenza isono kusinina ekuzitobiseni kwam ukuze nipakanyiswe nina, ekubeni ndayishumayela kuni ivangeli katixo ndingabizi nto?" 
2Corinthians11:8 Ezinye iṙemente ndazipanga, nditabatile nje umvuzo kwa kuzo, kuze kukonzwe nina." 
2Corinthians11:9 Naxeshekweni bendiko kuni, ndaza ndaswela, ndibe ndingengumtwalo kumntu namnye: ngokuba intswelo zam bazenzelela abazalwana bakuvela e‐Masedoniya; ewe ezintweni zonke ndazigcina ndingabi bunzima kuni, ndandiya kuzigcina njalo kanjako." 
2Corinthians11:10 Inyaniso ka‐Kristu iko kum nje, ukuqa̔yisa oku akuyi kundivingcelwa emazweni ase‐Akaiya!" 
2Corinthians11:11 Nganina? ngokokuba ndinganitandi na? Utixo uyazi. 
2Corinthians11:12 Kodwa oko ndikwenzayo, kwa kona ndiya kukwenza, ukuze ndibanqamle ituba abo bafuna ituba; ukuze bati entweni baqa̔yisa ngayo, bafunyanwe bekwa njengati." 
2Corinthians11:13 Ngokuba abanjalo bengabapostile ababuxoki, abasebenzi abanenkohliso, bezenza ngakumbi babe nesimilo sabapostile baka‐Kristu." 
2Corinthians11:14 Asi yinto yokutelwa nqa kanjalo: ngokuba kwa yena u‐Satane ezenza ngakumbi abe nesimilo sengelosi yokukanya. 
2Corinthians11:15 Asi yinto enkulu ngoko, ukuba abakonzi bake nabo bayazenza ngakumbi babe nesimilo njengabakonzi bobulungisa; abasipelo siya kuba ngokwemisebenzi yabo." 
2Corinthians11:16 Nditi kanjako: Makungabiko mntu oba ndisisidenge; kodwa ukuba noba ndinjalo, ndamkeleni ke noko kwa njengesidenge, ukuze ndike nditi nam ndiqa̔yise kancinane." 
2Corinthians11:17 Oko ndikutetayo, andikuteti ngo kwenkosi, koko ndikuteta njengasebudengeni, kokukwomelela kwokuqa̔yisa." 
2Corinthians11:18 Ekubeni abaninzi baqa̔yisayo ngokwenyama, ndiya kuqa̔yisa nam." 
2Corinthians11:19 Ngokuba ninyamezela izidenge ngokuvuya, nina nizizilumko nje." 
2Corinthians11:20 Ngokuba ninyamezela, akuti umntu anifake ebukobokeni, akuti umntu anidle, akuti umntu anibambe, akuti umntu azipakamise, akuti umntu anibete ebusweni." 
2Corinthians11:21 Nditsho ngokwendeleko, njengokungati sibe sibutataka tina. Kodwa into asukuba umntu enokukalipa ngayo, (ndiyateta ngobudenge,) ndinokukalipa kwa nam." 
2Corinthians11:22 Bangama‐Hebere na? ndinjalo nam. Bangama‐Sirayeli na? ndinjalo nam. Bayinzalo ka‐Abrahame na? ndinjalo nam. 
2Corinthians11:23 Bangabakonzi baka‐Kristu na? (nditeta ndihiliza nje,) ndinjalo mna ngokupezulu: ndisemizanyweni kakulu ngakumbi, ndinemivimbo ngento epezu kwembaliso, ndisezintolongweni kakulu ngakumbi, kufuti ndisekufeni:" 
2Corinthians11:24 kuma‐Juda ndati kahlanu ndamkela imivimbo engamashumi mane kuyekwa mnye; 
2Corinthians11:25 ndabetwa ngentonga katatu; ndagityiselwa ngamatye kanye; ndapukelwa yinqanawa katatu; ndenze ubusuku nemini enzulwini yolwandle: 
2Corinthians11:26 ngokuhamba futi; ngengozi ngemilambo, ngengozi ngamabada, ngengozi zivela kwisizwe sakowetu, ngengozi zivela kubaheyideni, ngengozi esixekweni, ngengozi entlango, ngengozi elulwandleni, ngengozi pakati kwabazalwana ababuxoki:" 
2Corinthians11:27 ekuzameni nasekudinisweni, ekupapameni futi, ekulambeni nasekunxanweni, ekuzileni ukutya futi, engqeleni nasebuzéni." 
2Corinthians11:28 Kungeko ezozinto zingapandle, kuko ukuxinwa endinako imihla ngemihla, ukukatalelwa kweremente zonke." 
2Corinthians11:29 Ngubanina obutataka, ndize ndingabi butataka na mna? Ngubanina oxakaniswayo, ndize ndingatshi na kwa mna?" 
2Corinthians11:30 Ukuba ndifanele ukuqa̔yisa, ndiya kuqa̔yisa ngezinto zobulwelwe bam." 
2Corinthians11:31 Yena utixo noyise wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, odumisekayo kude kube ngunapakade, uyazi ukuba andixoki." 
2Corinthians11:32 E‐Damakusi inkosi yabantu ngapantsi kwake u‐Areta ukumkani ibilinda isixeko sama‐Damakusi ifuna ukundibamba; 
2Corinthians11:33 ndaza ndahliswa ngesituba engobozini ngodonga, ndasinda ezandleni zayo." 
2Corinthians12:1 Ukuqa̔yisa kambe akundilungele: ngokuba ndiya kuza kuzo izibonakalo nezityilo zenkosi. 
2Corinthians12:2 Ndiyamazi umntu ku‐Kristu, kuse kuyiminyaka elishumi linesine (nokuba ebesemzimbeni na, andikwazi; nokuba ebengapandle kwomzimba na, andikwazi; utixo uyazi;) onjalo esuselwe kwa kulo elesitatu izulu." 
2Corinthians12:3 Ewe ndiyamazi umntu onjalo, (nokuba ebesemzimbeni, nokuba ebengapandle kwomzimba kusinina, andikwazi; utixo uyazi;)" 
2Corinthians12:4 ukuba wasuselwa eparadisi, waza weva amazwi angatetekiyo, lawo angavunyelwayo umntu ukuba awatete." 
2Corinthians12:5 Ngaye onjalo ndiya kuqa̔yisa; kodwa ngam isiqu sam andiyi kuqa̔yisa, kupela ezilwelweni zam." 
2Corinthians12:6 Ngokuba xeshekweni ndifuna ukuqa̔yisa, andiyi kuba sisidenge; ngokuba ndiya kuteta inyaniso: kodwa ndiyayeka, kuze kungabiko mntu ondibalelayo ngokupezulu kwoko abonayo ukuba ndikuko, umhlaumbi akuvayo kum." 
2Corinthians12:7 Kanjalo ukuze ndingazipakamisi ngokugqitileyo ngabo ubungangamsha bezityilo ezo, kwanikwa kum ameva enyameni yam, ingelosi ka‐Satane ukuba indintliteke, ukuze ndingazipakamisi ngokugqitileyo." 
2Corinthians12:8 Ngayo lento ndayikunga inkosi katatu, ukuba imke kum." 
2Corinthians12:9 Yayisiti kum: Ufefe lwam lwanele wena; ngokuba amandla am efezekiswa ebutatakeni. Ngokuvuya kakulu ngoko ndiya kuti ngokukumbi ndiqa̔yise ezilwelweni zam, ukuze amandla ka‐Kristu ahlale pezu kwam" 
2Corinthians12:10 Ngako oko ndikoliwe kakuhle ezilwelweni, ezitukweni, ezitukutezini, ezintshutshisweni, ezixingweni, ngenxa ka‐Kristu: ngokuba okuya ndibutataka, kwa oko ndinamandla." 
2Corinthians12:11 Ndiba sisidenge ndiqa̔yisa nje; nina nandinyanzela: ngokuba mna ndinge ndinconyiwe nini: ngokuba bendingancipekile nganye into kubo abobapostile abagqitisileyo ngobukulu, nokuba ndiyinto enganto." 
2Corinthians12:12 Okunene imiqondiso yongumpostile yabisenziwa pakati kwenu ngawo wonke umonde, ngemiqondiso nemimangaliso nezenzo zamandla." 
2Corinthians12:13 Ngokuba kuyinto nina enibe niswelekile ngayo ngapezu kwezinye iṙemente, kupela ukuba mna ngokwam ndibe ndingengumtwalo kuni? Ndixoleleni esisono." 
2Corinthians12:14 Nali ixesha lesitatu sendihlalela ukuza kuni; ndaye ndingayi kuba ngumtwalo kuni: ngokuba ndingafuni izinto zenu, koko ndifuna nina: ngokuba abantwana bengafaneli ukubekelela oyise, koko oyise befanele ukubekel ela abantwana." 
2Corinthians12:15 Mna kanti ndiya kuvuya kakulu ukugqibela nokugqityelwa ngenxa yemipefumlo yenu; nakuba nditi, ndakutanda nina kakulu ngakumbi, nditandwe kancinane ngakumbi." 
2Corinthians12:16 Kodwa makube njalo, andaba nzima pezu kwenu mna: noko ndinamaqokolo nje, ndanibamba ngenkohliso." 
2Corinthians12:17 Ndanilumkisa ngaye omnye wabo endibatumileyo kuni yinina? 
2Corinthians12:18 Ndambongoza u‐Titusi aye kuni, ndaza ndatuma kunye naye umzalwana wetu. Waka wanilumkisa u‐Titusi na? asahamba kokwa mnye umoya na? asa hamba kwekwa minye imikondo na?" 
2Corinthians12:18 Ndambongoza u‐Titusi aye kuni, ndaza ndatuma kunye naye umzalwana wetu. Waka wanilumkisa u‐Titusi na? asahamba kokwa mnye umoya na? asa hamba kwekwa minye imikondo na?" 
2Corinthians12:19 Niba na kanjako siyazitetelela kuni? Siyateta ebusweni bukatixo ku‐Kristu: kodwa zonke izinto, bazalwana! siyazenz ela ukumiswa kwenu." 
2Corinthians12:20 Ngokuba ndisoyika, hleze kungati ndakufika, ndifumane nina ningeyinto enditandayo ukuba nibe yiyo, nditi nam ndifunyanwe nini ndiyinto eningatandiyo ukuba ndibe yiyo; hleze kungati kubeko amapike, inzondelano, imisindo, inkani, intlebo, amagqugulo, imvutelano, izipitipiti:" 
2Corinthians12:21 hleze ati utixo wam, ndakubuya ndifike, anditobise pakati kwenu, ndize ndililele abaninzi abase bonile, bengagqobokanga kanti ngenxa yobunco̔la nombulo nobutshinitshini ababenzayo." 
2Corinthians13:1 LIXESHA lesitatu eli endiza kuni. Ngomlomo wamanqi̔na amabini umhlaumbi amatatu onke amazwi aya kumiswa. 
2Corinthians13:2 Senditshilo ke, nditsho pambili na lapa, njengokungati bendiko ngokwesibini, kanti ndingeko nje ndiyaba̔la kaloku, kubo abo base bonile, nakubo abanye bonke, ukuti, xeshekweni ndibuya ndifike, andiyi ku ba yeka:" 
2Corinthians13:3 ekubeni niwufuna umlingo wokuba ngu‐Kristu oteta ngam, ongebutataka ngakuni, koko enamandla pakati kwenu." 
2Corinthians13:4 Ngokuba nangona ebekuruseshwa ngobutataka, uyadla ubomi noko ngamandla katixo. Ngokuba nati sibutataka kuye, koko siya kudla ubomi kunye naye ngamandla katixo ngakuni." 
2Corinthians13:5 Zibenceni, ukuba niselukolweni kusinina; zilingeni. Anizazeli ngokwenu na, ukuba u‐Yesu Kristu ukuni? ukuba kambe aningabo abaliwayo." 
2Corinthians13:6 Kodwa ndiyatemba ukuba niya kwazi ukuba tina asingabo abaliwayo. 
2Corinthians13:7 Kekaloku ndiyatandaza kutixo ukuba ningenzi nanye into ekohlakeleyo; kungekukuba tina sibonakale singababukwayo, koko kukuba nina nikwenze oko kufanelekileyo, nakuba besiya kuti tina sibe njengabaliwayo." 
2Corinthians13:8 Ngokuba singeyenze into ukumela inyaniso, koko ukunceda inyaniso." 
2Corinthians13:9 Ngokuba sivuya, sakuba tina sibutataka, nani ninamandla: kanjalo oku nako siyakunqwena, kwa inzaliseko yenu." 
2Corinthians13:10 Ngenxa yoku ndiyaba̔la ezizinto ndingeko nje, ukuze nditi, nxa ndikoyo, ndingenzi ngobukali, njengokwegunya endanikwa lona yinkosi, libe lelokumisa, lingabi lelokuci̔ta." 
2Corinthians13:11 Okuseleyo, bazalwana! vuyani, yibani nizalisekile, yibani nisonwatyiswa, yibani nokuvumelana, yibani noxolo; waeya kuti utixo wotando noxolo abeko nani." 
2Corinthians13:12 Bulisanani ngokwanga okungcwele. 
2Corinthians13:13 Bonke abangcwele bayanibulisa. 
2Corinthians13:14 Ufefe lwenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu, notando lukatixo, nodlelano lwomoya oyingcwele, malube nani nonke. Amene." 
Galatians1:1 UPAULUSI umpostile, (kungaveli ebantwini, kungengaye umntu kanjalo, kungaye u‐Yesu Kristu, notixo uyise, owamvusa ekufeni,)" 
Galatians1:2 nabo bonke abazalwana abanam, kuzo iṙemente zase‐Galati:" 
Galatians1:3 Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye utixo uyise, nenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu," 
Galatians1:4 owazinikelayo ngenxa yezono zetu, ukuze asihlangule kulo elikoyo ilizwe elikohlakeleyo, ngokwentando yake utixo nobawo wetu," 
Galatians1:5 okuye makubeko ubungcwalisa kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene. 
Galatians1:6 Nditi nqa ukuba nipambuka kamsinya kangaka kulowo owanibizayo ngofefe luka‐Kristu, nipambuk ela kwiyimbi ivangeli:" 
Galatians1:7 engeyiyo enye noko; kupela bako inxenye abanipitizelisayo, abafuna ukuyiguqula ivangeli ka‐Kristu kanjalo." 
Galatians1:8 Kodwa nakuba siti tina, umhlaumbi iti ingelosi yasezulwini ishumayele kuni ivangeli epambana naleyo sayishumayela kuni, maibe yinto eqalekisiweyo." 
Galatians1:9 Njengokuba sitshilo pambili, kwa njalo kaloku ndibuya nditi: Ukuba umntu uyanishumayeza ivangeli epambana naleyo nayamkelayo, makabe yinto eqalekisiweyo." 
Galatians1:10 Ngokuba kaloku nditomalalisa abantu, utixo, kusinina? umhlaumbi ndifuna ukukolisa abantu na? ngokuba abantu ukuba ndibe ndisakolisa bona, ndinge ndingabi ndisisicaka sika‐Kristu." 
Galatians1:11 Kekaloku ndiyanazisa, bazalwana! ivangeli eyabishunyayelwa ndim ukuba ayingokwabantu." 
Galatians1:12 Ngokuba mna bendingayamkelanga emntwini, bendingayifundiswanga nakanjako, koko ndayamkelayo ngaso isityilo sika‐Yesu Kristu." 
Galatians1:13 Ngokuba benivile ukumila kwam bendifudula ndinako ebujudeni, okokuba ndibe nditshutshisa iṙemente katixo ngento egqitisileyo, ndayici̔ta;" 
Galatians1:14 nokuba ndamana ndihambisa ebujudeni ngapezu kwabaninzi abebeyintanga nye nam esizweni sakowetu, ndizondelela kakulu ngakumbi nje izinikelo zobawo bam." 
Galatians1:15 Kodwa akutanda utixo, owandahlulayo kwa sezizalweni sikama̔, wa ndi biza ngalo ufefe lwake," 
Galatians1:16 ukuba atyile unyana wake pakati kwam, ukuze ndishumayele yena pakati kwabaheyideni; ndati kwa oko, andabuzana nayo inyama negazi," 
Galatians1:17 andanyukela e‐Yerusaleme kanjako kubo abebengabapostile pambili kum, koko ndemkayo ndaya e‐Arabi, ndaza ndabuyela e‐Damakusi kanjako." 
Galatians1:18 Ndandula ndati, emveni kweminyaka mitatu, ndenyukela e‐Yerusaleme ukuya kwazana no‐Petrosi, ndalibala kuye intsuku zalishumi linantlanu." 
Galatians1:19 Kodwa omnye wakubo abapostile andambona, kupela u‐Yakobi umzalwana wenkosi." 
Galatians1:20 Kekaloku izinto endiziba̔layo kuni, bona ke, nditi ebusweni bukatixo andixoki." 
Galatians1:21 Emveni kwoko ndeza emazweni ase‐Siriya nawase‐Silisiya. 
Galatians1:22 Kodwa ndahlala ndingaziwa ngobuso kwiṙemente zase‐Judeya eziku‐Kristu. 
Galatians1:22 Kodwa ndahlala ndingaziwa ngobuso kwiṙemente zase‐Judeya eziku‐Kristu. 
Galatians1:23 Bebesiva ke kupela ukuba kwatiwa: Lowo ubefudula esitshutshisa, uyalushumayela kaloku ukolo abefudula eluci̔ta." 
Galatians1:24 Baza bamdumisa utixo kum. 
Galatians2:1 Emveni kwoko, kuse kudlulile iminyaka elishumi linamine, ndabuya ndenyuka ndaya e‐Yerusaleme kunye no‐Banabasi, ndatabata na m no‐Titusi." 
Galatians2:1 Emveni kwoko, kuse kudlulile iminyaka elishumi linamine, ndabuya ndenyuka ndaya e‐Yerusaleme kunye no‐Banabasi, ndatabata na m no‐Titusi." 
Galatians2:2 Ndenyuka ke ngokwesityilo, ndabaxoxela ivangeli leyo ndiyishumayelayo pakati kwabaheyideni, kodwa ndabaxox ela bebodwa abo babenokuduma, hleze kungati ndibe ndifumana ndibaleka, umhlaumbi ndibe ndifumane ndabaleka." 
Galatians2:3 Koko kwa u‐Titusi obenam, nangona ebengum‐Girike, ebenganyanzelwa ukwaluka:" 
Galatians2:3 Koko kwa u‐Titusi obenam, nangona ebengum‐Girike, ebenganyanzelwa ukwaluka:" 
Galatians2:4 kunje nje, ngenxa yabo abazalwana ababuxoki abangenisiweyo ngasese, abo abangena ngokunyebeleza ukuza kuhlola inkululeko yetu esinayo ku‐Kristu Yesu, ukuze basifake ebukobokeni:" 
Galatians2:5 esati asatelela kubo ngolulamelo lwetu ngexeshana noko linye, ukuze inyaniso yevangeli iman’ ukuhlala kuni." 
Galatians2:6 Kodwa kubo abo babebalwa ukuba nokuduma, — into kusukuba bebeyiyo, asi nto enkulu kum; utixo akabuki isiqu samntu, — mna okunene abo babenokuduma abandibonisa luto;" 
Galatians2:7 koko bati ngelinye icala, nxa babona ukuba ndipatisiwe ivangeli yokungaluki, kwa njengokuba u‐Petrosi epatisiwe e yokwaluka," 
Galatians2:8 (ngokuba lowo wasebenzayo ku‐Petrosi ngakubo ubupostile bokwaluka, wasebenza nakum ngakubo abaheyideni,)" 
Galatians2:9 nxa kanjalo baluqonda ufefe endanikwa lona, u‐Yakobi, no‐Kefasi, no‐Johane, abebebalwa ukuba zintsika, bazinikela mna no‐Banabasi izandla zokunene zobudlelana; ukuze tina siye kubaheyideni, nabo bona baye kwabanokwaluka:" 
Galatians2:10 befuna kupela ukuba sibe siwakumbulela amahlwempu; endati kwa yona lento ndanxamela ukuyenza nam. 
Galatians2:11 Kodwa akufika u‐Petrosi e‐Antiyoki, ndamelana naye ngasebusweni, kuba ebesekugwetyweni." 
Galatians2:12 Ngokuba ebesiti, bengekafiki abatile bevela ku‐Yakobi, watya ndawonye nabaheyideni; kodwa bakufika bona, ebehlehla wazahlula, esoyika abo basekwalukeni." 
Galatians2:13 Kanjalo amanye ama‐Juda nawo ahanahanisa kunye naye; wada no‐Banabasi waku̔kuliswa na wo ngohanahaniso lwawo. 
Galatians2:14 Koko okuya ndabona ukuba abalungisi ukuhamba ngokwenyaniso yevangeli, ndati ku‐Petrosi ebusweni babo bonke: Ukuba wena, ungum‐Juda nje, uyahlala ngesiko labaheyideni, unga hlali ngesiko lama‐Juda, kuyinina ukuba uyanyanzela abaheyideni ukuzekela emasikweni obujuda?" 
Galatians2:15 Tina singama‐Juda ngemvelo, asingaboni bakubaheyideni;" 
Galatians2:16 kanti sisazi nje ukuba umntu akagwetyelwa ngemisebenzi yomteto, ugwetyelwa ngalo ukolo luka‐Yesu Kristu kupela, sati tina nati sakolwa ku‐Kristu Yesu, ukuze sigwetyelwe ngokolo luka‐Kristu, kungabi ngemisebenzi yomteto; ngenxa yokuba kungayi kugwetyelwa namnye umntu ngemisebenzi yomteto." 
Galatians2:17 Kodwa ukuba siti, nxa sifuna ukugwetyelwa kuye u‐Kristu, sifunyanwe nati ngokwetu ukuba ngaboni, kanene u‐Kristu ungumkonzi wesono na? Kwanga kungebe njalo!" 
Galatians2:18 Ngokuba izinto endazici̔tayo ukuba zona ezi ndibuya ndizimise, ndizibonakalisa ukuba ndingumgqiti." 
Galatians2:19 Ngokuba mna ngawo umteto ndafa ngakuwo umteto, ukuze ndidle ubomi ngakuye utixo." 
Galatians2:20 Ndikuruseshiwe kunye no‐Kristu: akusendim ke mna obudlayo ubomi, kodwa u‐Kristu uyabudla ubomi kum; nobomi endibudlayo ngoku enyameni, ndiyabudla elukolweni, kolwonyana katixo, owanditandayo, waza wazinikela ngenxa yam." 
Galatians2:21 Andilububisi ufefe lukatixo; ngokuba ubulungisa ukuba bungawo umteto, kukona u‐Kristu wafayo kungeko tuba." 
Galatians3:1 MAGALATINDINI abudenge! ngubanina owaninyangayo, ukuba ningayilulameli inyaniso, ekupambi kwamehlo enu u‐Yesu Kristu waba̔lelwa ekuhleni pakati kwenu ekuruseshiwe?" 
Galatians3:2 Yona lento kupela ndifuna ukufunda kuni: Bekungemisebenzi yomteto na enamkela umoya, bekungokuva kwokolo kusinina?" 
Galatians3:3 Nibudenge kakulu kangaka na? niqalile kumoya nje, niti na kaloku nifeze kwinyama?" 
Galatians3:4 Intlungu ezininzi kangaka nifumane naziva na? ukuba kambe kufumana kunjalo ke. 
Galatians3:5 Lowo ngoko onibabalayo umoya, nowenzayo izenzo zamandla pakati kwenu, kungemisebenzi yomteto, kungokuva kwokolo, kusinina?" 
Galatians3:6 Kwa njengokuba u‐Abrahame wakolwa ngutixo, kwaza kwambalelwa kube kukulunga." 
Galatians3:7 Yazini ngoko ukuba abo baselukolweni, bona aba balusapo luka‐Abrahame." 
Galatians3:8 Kanjako isiba̔lo, sibona ngapambili nje ukuba utixo uyabagwebela abaheyideni ngokolo, sashumayela kwa pambili indaba ezilungileyo ku‐Abrahame, sisiti: Ziya kutanyusanqelwa ngawe zonke intlanga." 
Galatians3:9 Kwa njalo ke abo baselukolweni bayatanyusanqelwa kunye no‐Abrahame okolwayo. 
Galatians3:10 Ngokuba bonke abangabakuyo imisebenzi yomteto bepantsi kwesiqalekiso: ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Uqalekisiwe osukuba engahlali kuzo zonke izinto eziba̔liweyo encwadini yomteto ukuba azenze. 
Galatians3:11 Kodwa, ukuba emtetweni akuko mntu ogwetyelwayo pambi kwotixo, kusekuhleni; kuba. Olungileyo uya kupila ngokolo." 
Galatians3:12 Kekaloku umteto awuveli elukolweni; koko, Umntu ozenzayo zona uya kupila ngazo." 
Galatians3:13 U‐Kristu wasikulula esiqalekisweni somteto, ngokwenziwa isiqalekiswa esikundleni setu, (ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Uqalekisiwe osukuba exo̔meka emtini,)" 
Galatians3:14 ukuze itamsanqa lika‐Abrahame lize kufika kubaheyideni kuye u‐Kristu Yesu; ukuze sisamkele isibambiso somoya ngalo ukolo. 
Galatians3:15 Bazalwana! ndiyateta njengokwabantu: Ukuba lucebano lwomntu, noko lwakuba luqinisiwe, akuko mntu olububisayo umhlaumbi olwalekelayo into." 
Galatians3:16 Kekaloku amadinga ebetetwa ku‐Abrahame, nakuyo inzalo yake. Akatsho ukuti: Nakuzo inzalo, njengokuba ebeteta ngazo ezininzi; koko njengokuba ebeteta ngayo enye: Nakuyo inzalo yako, enguye u‐Kristu." 
Galatians3:17 Nditsho ke oku ukuti, ucebano oluqinisiwe pambili ngutixo, luqinis elwa u‐Kristu, umteto, obubako emveni kweminyaka engamakulu mane anamashumi matatu, awulutshitshisi, ukuba ulitshabalalise idinga." 
Galatians3:18 Ngokuba ilifa ukuba livela emtetweni, alisaveli edingeni: kodwa utixo walipa u‐Abrahame ngalo idinga." 
Galatians3:19 Uti nina pofu umteto? Ubusongezwa ngenxa yezigqito, ide ifike inzalo ebekelweyo idinga, wamiselwa ngazo ingelosi, esandleni somlamli." 
Galatians3:20 Kekaloku umlamli akangowomnye; kodwa utixo umnye. 
Galatians3:21 Pofu umteto umela amadinga katixo na? Kwanga kungebe njalo! ngokuba ke, ukuba bekunikiwe umteto onamandla okunika ubomi, okunene ubulungisa bunge buvele emtetweni." 
Galatians3:22 Koko isiba̔lo sabavalela ndawonye kwa bonke ngapantsi kwesono, ukuze idinga elingokolo luka‐Yesu Kristu lunikwe kwabo bakolwayo." 
Galatians3:23 Kekaloku lungekafiki ukolo, sibe sigcinwa sivalelwe ndawonye ngapantsi kwomteto sigcin elwa ukolo olube luza kutyilwa." 
Galatians3:24 Kwa njalo ke umteto ubungumkapeli wetu ku‐Kristu, ukuze sigwetyelwe ngokolo." 
Galatians3:25 Kodwa ukolo selufikile nje, asisabi ngapantsi kwomkapeli." 
Galatians3:26 Ngokuba ningonyana bakatixo nonke ngalo ukolo kuye u‐Kristu Yesu. 
Galatians3:27 Ngokuba nonke nina enabapitizeshelwayo ku‐Kristu, namambata u‐Kristu." 
Galatians3:28 Akuko um‐Juda, akuko nom‐Girike; akuko ikoboka, akuko nokululekileyo; akuko indoda nenkazana: ngokuba nina nonke nibanye kuye u‐Kristu Yesu." 
Galatians3:29 Kodwa ukuba ningabaka‐Kristu, kukona niyinzalo ka‐Abrahame, nendlalifa ngokwedinga." 
Galatians4:1 KEKALOKU nditi: Lonke ixesha oyindlalifa asengumntwana ngalo, akahluki kwikonza nganto, nakuba eyinkosi yako konke;" 
Galatians4:2 koko engapantsi kwabondli namagosa, kude kube lixesha elimisiweyo nguyise." 
Galatians4:3 Kwa njalo nati, okuya sibe singabantwana, sibe sisebukonzweni ngapantsi kwazo iziqalelo zelilizwe:" 
Galatians4:4 kodwa okuya ukuzaliseka kwexesha bekufikile, wati utixo watuma unyana wake, ezelwe ngomfazi, ezelwe ngapantsi kwomteto," 
Galatians4:5 ukuze abo babengapantsi kwomteto abakulule, ukuze sibamkele ubunyana." 
Galatians4:6 Kanjalo ukuba ningonyana, wati utixo watumela ezintliziywenu zenu umoya wonyana wake, ebiza ukuti: Aba, Bawo!" 
Galatians4:7 Kwa njalo ke akusabi likonza, ungunyana; nokuba ungunyana, uyindlalifa katixo ngaye u‐Kristu kanjako." 
Galatians4:8 Kodwa oko okunene, ningamazi nje utixo, nakonza abo bangengotixo ngemvelo." 
Galatians4:9 Kodwa kaloku, nakuba nimazile utixo, ewe pezu kwoku nakuba naziwe ngutixo, yinina ukuba nibuya niguqukele kwezoziqalelo ezibutataka ezibuhlwempu, enifuna ukuzikonza kanjako ngokutsha?" 
Galatians4:10 Niyaku̔tala ukugcina imihla, nenyanga, namaxesha, neminyaka." 
Galatians4:11 Ndinokwoyika ngani, ukuba kungati ndifumane ndanisebenzela." 
Galatians4:12 Ndiyanitandaza, bazalwana! yibani njengam, kuba nam ndiba njengani. Anandona nganto." 
Galatians4:13 Ewe niyazi ukuba bekungenxa yobulwelwe benyama yam endayishumayela ivangeli kuni matanci: 
Galatians4:14 nesilingo sam esibe sisenyameni yam anasidela, anasicekisa nokusicekisa; koko nandamkelayo njengengelosi katixo, njengo‐Kristu Yesu." 
Galatians4:15 Bebubobanina ngoko ubutamsanqa enati ninabo? kuba ndininqi̔nela okokuba ninge nite, ukuba bekusenzeka, nawadonyula amehlo enu, nawapa mna." 
Galatians4:16 Ndize ndaba lutshaba lwenu na, ndinitetela inyaniso nje?" 
Galatians4:17 Bayanizondelela ke, kungengandawo efanelekileyo; ewe bayafuna ukunivalela ngapandle, ukuze nibazondelele bona." 
Galatians4:18 Kodwa kulungile ukuba kuzondelelelwe ngokufanelekileyo ngamaxesha onke, kungekokuya ndikoyo kuni kodwa." 
Galatians4:19 Lusatshana lwam! endinenimba yokunizala kanjako, ade u‐Kristu afanekiselwe kuni," 
Galatians4:20 bendingatandayo okunene ukubako kuni kaloku, nokuguqula ilizwi lam, kuba ndixakekile ngani." 
Galatians4:21 Ndixeleleni, nina nitandayo ukuba ngapantsi kwomteto, aniwuva na umteto?" 
Galatians4:22 Ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuba u‐Abrahame ebenonyana ababini; omnye ngekobokakazi, nomnye ngomfazi okululekileyo." 
Galatians4:23 Koko lowo wekobokakazi ebezelwe ngokwenyama; kodwa lowo womfazi okululekileyo wazalwa ngalo idinga. 
Galatians4:24 Eziti ezizinto zitetwa ngokulinganisela: ngokuba aba bafazi bezingcebano ezimbini; olunye luvela entabeni ye‐Sinai, luzalela ubukoboka, oluti lona lungu‐Hagare:" 
Galatians4:25 (ngokuba eli gama u‐Hagare liyintaba ye‐Sinai e‐Arabi:) kanjalo uyalungelelana ne‐Yerusaleme ekoyo ngoku, eti ke ikonze ndawonye nabantwana bayo." 
Galatians4:26 Kodwa i‐Yerusaleme epezulu ikululekile, eti yona inguma̔ wetu sonke." 
Galatians4:27 Ngokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Vuya, ludlolokazi olungazaliyo! gqabuka udanduluke, wena ungenanimba! kuba bebaninzi abantwana balowo oyedwa ngapezu kwabalowo onendoda." 
Galatians4:28 Kodwa tina, bazalwana! njengokuba u‐Yisake ebenjalo, singabantwana bedinga." 
Galatians4:29 Kuloko njengokuba oko lowo ubezelwe ngokwenyama watshutshisa lowo ubezelwe ngo kwomoya, kukwa njalo nakaloku." 
Galatians4:30 Noko siti nina isiba̔lo? Gxota ikobokakazi nonyana walo; ngokuba unyana wekobokakazi engasayi kulidla ilifa ndawonye nonyana womfazi okululekileyo. 
Galatians4:31 Ngako ke, bazalwana! asingabantwana bekobokakazi, singabake umfazi okululekileyo." 
Galatians5:1 QINISANI ukuma ngoko kulonkululeko usenzile sikululekile ngayo u‐Kristu, nize ningabuyi nibanjelwe eyokweni yobukoboka." 
Galatians5:2 Kangela, mna Paulusi nditi kuni: Xeshekweni nalukayo, u‐Kristu akayi kuninceda luto." 
Galatians5:3 Ewe ndiyanqi̔na kanjako kumntu osukuba esaluka, ukuba unetyala lokuba awenze wonke umteto." 
Galatians5:4 Nahlukanisiwe no‐Kristu, nina enifun’ ukugwetyelwa emtetweni; niwile elufefeni." 
Galatians5:5 Ngokuba tina ngaye umoya silinda itemba lobulungisa ngokolo. 
Galatians5:6 Ngokuba kuye u‐Kristu Yesu kungekukwaluka okunamandla nganto, kungekukungaluki nakanjako, kulukolo olusebenzayo ngalo utando." 
Galatians5:7 Nibe nibaleka kakuhle; ngubanina owaninqandayo ukuba ningayilulameli inyaniso? 
Galatians5:8 Esisicengo asiveli kulowo unibizayo. 
Galatians5:9 Igwele elincinane liyabilisa lonke isimba lentlama. 
Galatians5:10 Mna ke ndinokutemba ngakuni enkosini, ukuba aniyi kunyamekela into yimbi: kodwa lowo unipitizelisayo uya kutwala ukugwetywa kwake, noko angubanina." 
Galatians5:11 Kodwa mna, bazalwana! ukuba ndisashumayela ulwaluko, yinina ukuba ndisatshutshiswa? kukona sitshabaleleyo izixakaniso sekuruse." 
Galatians5:12 Akwaba bebeya kuzinqamla ke kuni abo banixalisayo! 
Galatians5:13 Ngokuba nina benibizelwe inkululeko, bazalwana! ize kodwa ninga pati inkululeko yenu ibe lituba kwinyama, niti nikonzelane ngalo utando." 
Galatians5:14 Ngokuba wona umteto wonke uzalisekiswa kwilizwi linye, kwelokuti: Uya kutanda ummelwane wako njengokuzi tanda kwako." 
Galatians5:15 Kodwa ukuba niti nilumane nidlane, lumkani ukuba ningagqityelwa omnye ngomnye." 
Galatians5:16 Kekaloku nditi: Hambani ngomoya, naye ningayi kwandula inkanuko yenyama niyifeze." 
Galatians5:17 Ngokuba yona inyama ikanukela ngakuye umoya, naye umoya ekanukela ngakuyo inyama: ezi ke ziyapambana enye nenye, ukuze ningazenzi izinto enisukuba nitanda ukwenza zona." 
Galatians5:18 Kodwa ukuba niyakokelwa ngumoya, aningapantsi kwomteto." 
Galatians5:19 Kekaloku imisebenzi yenyama iyabonakala, eyiyo enje: uṙexezo, umbulo, ubunco̔la, ubutshinitshini," 
Galatians5:20 inkonzo yezitixo, ukutakata, ubutshaba, amapike, inzondelano, imisindo, inkani, imbambaniso, izahlukano," 
Galatians5:21 umona, izibulalo, ukunxila, imihlali yobusuku, nezinto ezinjengezi; enditi pambili ngazo kuni, kwa njengokuba ndise nditshilo kanjako, abo bazenzayo izinto ezinjalo abayi kulidla ilifa lobukumkani bukatixo." 
Galatians5:22 Kodwa isiqa̔mo somoya silutando, uvuyo, uxolo, ukuzeka kade, ububele, ukulunga, inkolo," 
Galatians5:23 ululamo, ubunca̔tu; ekungeko mteto omela izinto ezinjalo." 
Galatians5:24 Bate kekaloku abaka‐Kristu inyama bayikurusesha kunye nemilo yayo nenkanuko zayo. 
Galatians5:25 Ukuba siyabudla ubomi ngomoya, masiti kanjalo sihambe ngomoya." 
Galatians5:26 Masingabi ngabazidlayo, sitelekisana, sinomona omnye kwomnye." 
Galatians6:1 BAZALWANA! xeshekweni umntu aka abaqelwe sisiposo, yitini nina ninga bomoya nilungise onjalo emoyeni wolulamo; wena uzigqala nje, hleze nawe uzingwe." 
Galatians6:2 Twalani omnye ubunzima bomnye, niti ngokunjalo niwufeze umteto ka‐Kristu." 
Galatians6:3 Ngokuba umntu ukuba uba uyinto, nxa angento, ekohlisa eyake intliziyo." 
Galatians6:4 Kodwa bonke ngabanye mabalinge owabo umsebenzi, baye beya kuti oko babe nako bangaqa̔yisayo ngako kokwabo bodwa, kungekokwabanye abantu." 
Galatians6:5 Ngokuba bonke ngabanye beya kutwala owabo umtwalo. 
Galatians6:6 Kodwa makati lowo ufundiswayo ilizwi abelane nalowo ufundisayo kuzo zonke izinto ezilungileyo. 
Galatians6:7 Ize ningakohliswa ke: utixo akanakuhlekwa; ngokuba oko asukuba ekuhlwayela umntu, kona oku uya kukuvuna kanjalo." 
Galatians6:8 Kuba ohlwayelelayo eyake inyama eya kuti kwa kuyo inyama avune ulwonakalo: kodwa ohlwayelelayo umoya woti kwa kuye umoya avune ubomi obungunapakade. 
Galatians6:9 Kodwa masingadinwa sisenza okulungileyo; ngokuba siya kuti ngexesha elifanelekileyo sivune, ukuba kaloku asicubuki." 
Galatians6:10 Ngako ke, njengokuba sinalo ituba, masenze oko kulungileyo kubo bonke, kube kakulu kodwa kubo abangabendlu yokolo." 
Galatians6:11 BONANI amagama amakulu kangakanana endiba̔lileyo ngawo kuni ngesam isandla. 
Galatians6:12 Bonke abafunayo ukwenza ukubonakala okuhle enyameni, bona aba bayaninyanzela ukwaluka; kukodwa ukuze bangatshutshiselwa ikuruse ka‐Kristu." 
Galatians6:13 Ngokuba kwa bona abalukayo bengabambi umteto ngokwabo; koko befuna ukuba nina naluke, ukuze baqa̔yise enyameni yenu." 
Galatians6:14 Kodwa makube le kum ukuba ndiqa̔yise, kupela ndiqa̔yise ekuruseni yenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, ekungaye ilizwe likuruseshiwe kum, nam ndikuruseshiwe kwilizwe." 
Galatians6:15 Ngokuba kuye u‐Kristu Yesu kungekukwaluka okunamandla nganto, kungekukungaluki nakanjako, kusisidalwa esitsha." 
Galatians6:16 Nabo bonke abahambayo ngalommiso, uxolo malube pezu kwabo, nobubele, napezu kwobu‐Sirayeli bukatixo." 
Galatians6:17 Kaloku makungabi sabiko mntu ondikatazayo: ngokuba mna ndizitwala izibanda zenkosi u‐Yesu emzimbeni wam. 
Galatians6:18 Ufefe lwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu malube nomoya wenu, bazalwana! Amene." 
Ephesians1:1 UPAULUSI, umpostile ka‐Yesu Kristu ngayo intando katixo, kubo abangcwele abase‐Efese nabakolwayo ku‐Kristu Yesu:" 
Ephesians1:2 Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kutixo ubawo wetu, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
Ephesians1:3 Makabongwe yena utixo noyise wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, owasitamsanqelayo ngawo onke amatamsanqa abumoya kwezasezulwini indawo ku‐Kristu:" 
Ephesians1:4 njengokuba wasiqashayo kuye lingekamiswa ilizwe, ukuba sibe singcwele simsulwa pambi kwake elutandweni;" 
Ephesians1:5 esimisele ukumiswa kwobunyana kwa pambili nje ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu kwa kuye ngokwake, ngokwenkoliso yentando yake," 
Ephesians1:6 kube kukudunyiswa kwobungcwalisa bofefe lwake, ekukulo wasipa ufefe kotandiweyo;" 
Ephesians1:7 esiti kuye sinalo ukululwa ngalo igazi lake, uxolelwa lweziposo zetu, ngokwobutyebi bofefe lwake," 
Ephesians1:8 owalwenzayo lukolise ukusandela kubo bonke ubulumko nobutelekelelo; 
Ephesians1:9 esazisile nje imfihlakalo yentando yake, ngokwenkoliso yake owazicingelayo yona ngokwake," 
Ephesians1:10 ngalo ulwabo lwenzaliseko yamaxesha, kuze kubuye kuhlanganiselwe ndawonye zonke izinto kuye u‐Kristu, nezo zisezulwini nezo zisemhlabeni, kwa kuye yena;" 
Ephesians1:11 ekukuye kanjalo sazuziswa ilifa, simiselwe pambili nje ngokwemvume yake ozenzayo zonke izinto ngokwecebo lentando yake;" 
Ephesians1:12 ukuze tina sibe ngenxa yokudunyiswa kwobungcwalisa bake, tina ke esitembileyo pambili kuye u‐Kristu:" 
Ephesians1:13 ekukuye nani, nakuva ilizwi lenyaniso, ivangeli yosindiswa lwenu, — ekukuye, nakukolwa kanjalo, nancanyatiselwa ngomoya oyingcwele wedinga," 
Ephesians1:14 osisibambiselo selifa letu, kube kukukululwa kwemfuyo yake etengiweyo, kube kukudunyiswa kwobungcwalisa bake." 
Ephesians1:15 Ngenxa yoku nam, ndakuva inkolo eninayo kwinkosi u‐Yesu, notando lwenu olungakubo bonke abangcwele," 
Ephesians1:16 andipezi ukubulela ngenxa yenu, ndinikankanya nje emitandazweni yam;" 
Ephesians1:17 ukuba utixo wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, uyise wobungcwalisa, aninike umoya wobulumko nesityilo, ekumazini yena;" 
Ephesians1:18 amehlo engqondo yenu ekanyiselwe nje, ukuba nazi into liyiyo itemba lobizo lwake, nento buyiyo ubutyebi bobungcwalisa belifa lake pakati kwabo abangcwele," 
Ephesians1:19 nento buyiyo ubukulu obudluliseleyo bamandla ake ngakuti tina sikolwayo, ngokwokusebenza kwamandla obomelelo bake," 
Ephesians1:20 oko wakusebenzayo ku‐Kristu, akumvusa kwabafileyo; waza wamhlalisa kwesokunene sake kwezasezulwini indawo," 
Ephesians1:21 pezulu pezu kwabo bonke ubupati, negunya, namandla, nobukosi, nawo onke amagama abizwayo, kungekwelilizwe likoyo lodwa, kukwelo liza kuza nalo;" 
Ephesians1:22 wabeka pantsi zonke izinto ngapantsi kwenyawo zake; wamnika abe yintloko pezu kwezinto zonke kwiṙemente," 
Ephesians1:23 eti yona ingumzimba wake, ubuzala balowo uzalisayo konke ngako konke." 
Ephesians2:1 NANI nifile nje ngeziposo nangezono, —" 
Ephesians2:2 enibe nifudula nihamba kuzo ngokwesiko lelizwe eli, ngokwompati wobukosi basesibakabakeni, womoya osebenzayo kaloku elusatsheni lwokungeva;" 
Ephesians2:3 esasite kwa tina sonke safudula sinokuhlala kwetu pakati kwalo ezinkanukweni zenyama yetu, sisenza inqweno zenyama nezenkumbulo, saye sibe singabantwana bomsindo ngemvelo, kwa njengabo nabanye:" 
Ephesians2:4 kodwa utixo, etyebile etaṙwini nje, ngenxa yotando lwake olukulu owasitanda ngalo," 
Ephesians2:5 kwa okuya sibe sifile ngeziposo zetu, wasipilisa kunye no‐Kristu, (nisindiswe lufefe,)" 
Ephesians2:6 wasivusa kunye naye, wasihlalisa kunye naye kwezasezulwini indawo, ku‐Kristu Yesu;" 
Ephesians2:7 ukuze ati emaxesheni azayo abonakalise ubutyebi obudluliseleyo bofefe lwake ebubeleni ngakuti ku‐Kristu Yesu. 
Ephesians2:8 Ngokuba nisindiswe lufefe ngalo ukolo; kungaveli nje oku ngokwenu, kusisipo sikatixo;" 
Ephesians2:9 kungengemisebenzi, ukuze kungaqa̔yiswa mntu:" 
Ephesians2:10 ngokuba sisisenzwa sake, sidalelwe imisebenzi elungileyo ku‐Kristu Yesu, eyabilungiselelwa pambili ngutixo, ukuze sihambe kuyo." 
Ephesians2:11 Ngako oko kumbulani, ukuba nina fudula ningabaheyideni enyameni nje, e‐kutiwa ningabanokungaluki ngabo kutiwa bangabanokwaluka okwenziwayo ngezandla enyameni," 
Ephesians2:12 ukuba ke ngeloxesha nibe ningenaye u‐Kristu, nahlukene nobuzwe bo‐Sirayeli, ningazani nazo ingcebano zedinga, ningenalo itemba, ningenaye utixo elizweni;" 
Ephesians2:13 kodwa kaloku ku‐Kristu Yesu, nina enibe nifudula nikude senizisiwe kufupi ngegazi lika‐Kristu." 
Ephesians2:14 Ngokuba yena eluxolo lwetu, owabenza bobabini babe banye, nodonga lwapakati lwesahlukaniso waluci̔ta," 
Ephesians2:15 ubutshaba ebutshabalalisile nje enyameni yake, kwa umteto wemiyalelo isemimiselweni; ukuze abo babini abadale babe ngumntu omtsha emnye kwa kuye yena, esenza uxolo nje;" 
Ephesians2:16 nokuba abaxolisane notixo bobabini emzimbeni mnye ngayo ikuruse, ebubulele ubutshaba nje kwa kuyo:" 
Ephesians2:17 waza weza washumayela uxolo kuni enibe nikude, nakubo abo babekufupi:" 
Ephesians2:18 kuba ngaye yena sinokungeniswa sobabini ngomoya emnye kuye uyise. 
Ephesians2:19 Ngako ke, anisengabasemzini nabapambukeli, ningabobuzwe bunye kunye nabangcwele, nabendlu katixo," 
Ephesians2:20 nakelwe nje pezu kwokuseka kwabapostile nabaprofite, yena u‐Yesu Kristu ngokwake elilitye eliyintloko yegumbi;" 
Ephesians2:21 esiti kuye sonke isakiwo silinganiswa sihlanganiselwa kunye sikule sibe yitempile engcwele enkosini; 
Ephesians2:22 eniti kuyo nani nakiwe kunye nibe yindawo yokuhlala katixo kuye umoya. 
Ephesians3:1 NGENXA yalendawo mna Paulusi, umbanjwa ka‐Kristu Yesu ngenxa yenu baheyideni, —" 
Ephesians3:2 ukuba kambe nivile ulwabo lwofefe lukatixo olwanikwa kum ngakuni; 
Ephesians3:3 okokuba wati ngesityilo wandazisa imfihlakalo, njengokuba ndiba̔lile pambili ngokufutshane," 
Ephesians3:4 eningati kwa ngako, nakulesesha, nikunakane ukuqonda kwam emfihlakalweni ka‐Kristu," 
Ephesians3:5 ebite kwizimbi izizukulwana ayaziswa konyana babantu, njengoko ityiliweyo kaloku kubapostile bake abangcwele nabaprofite ngomoya;" 
Ephesians3:6 yokuba abaheyideni bazindlalifa kunye, nabomzimba okwa mnye, nababelwane bedinga lake, kuye u‐Kristu, ngayo ivangeli;" 
Ephesians3:7 endaba ngumkonzi wayo, njengokwesipiwo sofefe lukatixo, endanikwa sona njengokwokusebenza kwamandla ake." 
Ephesians3:8 Kwa kum, endimncinane kwabancinane kubo bonke abangcwele, lwanikwa ufefe olu, lwokuba ndibushumayele pakati kwabaheyideni ubutyebi obungalandekiyo buka‐Kristu," 
Ephesians3:9 nokuba ndibonise bonke abantu into buyiyo ubudlelane bemfihlakalo, ete kwa sekuqalekeni kwamaxesha akudala yafihlelwa kutixo, owadala zonke izinto ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu;" 
Ephesians3:10 ukuze kwaziswe kaloku kwabanobupati nakwabanegunya kwezasezulwini indawo ngayo iṙemente ubulumko obupindapindiweyo bukatixo," 
Ephesians3:11 ngokwemvume yasemaxesheni akudala, leyo wayenzayo ku‐Kristu Yesu inkosi yetu;" 
Ephesians3:12 esiti kuye sinokukalipa kwetu nokungeniswa kwetu, ngobuganga, ngalo ukolo olukuye." 
Ephesians3:13 Ngako oko ndiyanibongoza ukuba maningabohli ezimbandezelweni zam ngenxa yenu, eziti zona zibubungcwalisa benu." 
Ephesians3:14 Ngenxa yalendawo ndiyagoba amadolo am kuye uyise wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu," 
Ephesians3:15 ekuvela kwa kuye ukubizwa kwazo zonke izizalwane ezisezulwini nezisemhlabeni ngegama," 
Ephesians3:16 ukuba ati ngokwobutyebi bobungcwalisa bake, aninike ukwomelezelwa ngamandla ngaye umoya wake kowapakati umntu," 
Ephesians3:17 aze u‐Kristu ahlale ngalo ukolo ezintliziyweni zenu; nina nendele nisekelwe nokusekelwa elutandweni nje; 
Ephesians3:18 ukuze ke nikolise ukuba namandla ukuqiqa, kunye nabo bonke abangcwele, ukuba buyinto nina ububanzi, nobude, nobunzulu, nobupakamo, —" 
Ephesians3:19 nokulwazi utando luka‐Kristu olunqabeleyo ukwazi, ukuze nizaliswe kude kube kuko konke ukuzala kukatixo." 
Ephesians3:20 Kekaloku kuye onamandla ukwenza ngokupezulu kwizinto zonke, ngokupezulu kakulu ngakumbi kwezo sizicelayo nesizicamngcayo, ngokwamandla asebenzayo kuti," 
Ephesians3:21 kuye lowo makubeko ubungcwalisa eṙementeni, ku‐Kristu Yesu, kuzo zonke izizukulwana kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene." 
Ephesians4:1 NDIYANIKUNGA ngoko, mna endingumbanjwa enkosini, ukuba nihambe ngokufanele olobizwa nabizwayo ngalo," 
Ephesians4:2 ninako konke ukutobeka kwentliziyo nokululama, ninokuzeka kade, ninyamezelana elutandweni," 
Ephesians4:3 ninxamela ukugcina ubunye bomoya embanjweni woxolo. 
Ephesians4:4 Kuko umzimba umnye, nomoya emnye, njengokuba kanjalo nibe nibiziwe etembeni linye lobizwa lwenu;" 
Ephesians4:5 inkosi inye, ukolo lunye, ubapitizesho lunye;" 
Ephesians4:6 utixo noyise wabo bonke emnye, opezu kwabo bonke, nangabo bonke, nakuni nonke." 
Ephesians4:7 Kodwa kuti tina sonke abanye ngabanye kwanikwa ufefe esinalo ngesilinganiselo sesipo sika‐Kristu. 
Ephesians4:8 Ngako oko uti: Akunyukela enyangweni, watimba amatinjwa, wanika izipiwo ebantwini. (" 
Ephesians4:9 Kekaloku lento yokuti wenyuka, yinto nina ke kupela ukuba wati kanjalo matanci wehlela ezindaweni zapantsi zomhlaba?" 
Ephesians4:10 owehlayo, nguyena kanjalo owenyukela pezulu pezu kwawo onke amazulu, ukuze azalise izinto zonke.)" 
Ephesians4:11 Waza yena ngokwake wanika abanye babe ngabapostile, nabanye babe ngabaprofite, nabanye babe ngabavangeli, nabanye babe ngabalusi nabafundisi;" 
Ephesians4:12 kuze kuzalisekiswe abangcwele, ngenxa yomsebenzi wobukonzi, ngenxa yokwakiwa kwomzimba ka‐Kristu;" 
Ephesians4:13 side siti tina sonke sifikelele kubunye bokolo nobokwaziwa kwonyana katixo, kwindoda ekulileyo, kumlinganiso wobude bobuzala buka‐Kristu:" 
Ephesians4:14 ukuze singabi sengabantwana, sijingajingiswa siqu̔tywaqu̔tywa yiyo yonke imimoya yemfundiso, ekunyangeni kwabantu, ebuqokolweni obuyelela ubuqinga bolahlekiso;" 
Ephesians4:15 kodwa siti, sibamba inyaniso elutandweni nje, sikulele kwa kuye ezintweni zonke, oyintloko, u‐Kristu:" 
Ephesians4:16 okuye uti umzimba wonke, ulinganiswa uhlanganiselwa kunye ubandakanywa nokubandakanywa ngawo onke amalungu kunikwa ukwonga ngawo, ngokwokusebenza okulingana nendawo zonke ezinye ngezinye, wenze ukukula kwawo umzimba uze uzake elutandweni." 
Ephesians4:17 OKU ke ndiyakutsho, ndikunqi̔ne enkosini, ukuba ningabi sahamba njengokuba besenje njalo nabanye abaheyideni ukuhamba, ekumateni kwoluvo lwabo," 
Ephesians4:18 benziwe mnyama ekuqondeni kwabo, bahlukene nobomi bukatixo, ngenxa yokungazi okukubo, ngenxa yobulukuni bentliziyo yabo:" 
Ephesians4:19 abate bebujelwe kukuva nje bazilahlela ebutshinitshinini, kuze kwenziwe ubunco̔la bonke ngobubawa." 
Ephesians4:20 Kodwa nina animfundanga u‐Kristu ngokunjalo; 
Ephesians4:21 ukuba nite kambe neva yena, nafundiswa kuye, njengokuba injalo inyaniso ku‐Yesu;" 
Ephesians4:22 ukuba niti, okwokumila kwenu kwapambili, nimtule umntu omdala, oman’ ukwonakala ngokwenkanuko zenkohliso," 
Ephesians4:23 nibe nihlaziywa emoyeni woluvo lwenu; 
Ephesians4:24 nize nimambate umntu omtsha, ote ngokufuza utixo wadalwa ebulungiseni nasebungcweleni benyaniso." 
Ephesians4:25 Ngako oko, senibeka nxamnye nje ubuxoki, tetani inyaniso nonke ngabanye nommelwane wenu; kuba singamalungu omnye nomnye." 
Ephesians4:26 Qumbani, ize ningoni ke: ilanga malingatshoni pezu kwengqumbo yenu;" 
Ephesians4:27 ninganiki indawo ku‐Satane kanjalo. 
Ephesians4:28 Oba̔yo makangabi seba̔: kodwa ngokukumbi makasebenze, esenza oko kulungileyo ngezandla zake, ukuze abe nako ukwabela lowo unokuswela." 
Ephesians4:29 Makungapumi nakunye ukuteta okubolileyo emlonyeni wenu, makube koko kusukuba kulungele ukumiswa kwokuswela okukoyo, ukuze kunike ufefe kwabakuvayo;" 
Ephesians4:30 ize ke ningamdanisi umoya oyingcwele katixo, enanite kuye nancanyatiselelwa imini yokukululwa." 
Ephesians4:31 Makukweleliswe kuni bonke ubuṙaṙa, nomsindo, noqumbo, nengxolo, nogxeko, kunye nalo lwonke ulunya;" 
Ephesians4:32 kodwa yibani ninobubele omnye kwomnye, ninenceba, nixolelana, njengokuba ete notixo ku‐Kristu waxolela nina." 
Ephesians5:1 Yitini ngoko nibe ngabalandeli bakatixo, njengabantwana abatandiweyo;" 
Ephesians5:2 nihambe elutandweni, njengokuba no‐Kristu wasitandayo tina, wazinikela ngenxa yetu, umnikelo nedini kutixo, abe livumba elimnandi." 
Ephesians5:3 Kodwa umbulo, nako konke ukuncóla, nokubawa, makungake kukankanywe pakati kwenu, njengokuba kufanele abangcwele;" 
Ephesians5:4 kwa nobuṙeletyo, nokubidiza, nokucika, izinto ezingafanelekileyo; koko ngokukumbi makubeko ukubulela." 
Ephesians5:5 Ngokuba oku ninokukwazi, ukuba akuko namnye owenza umbulo, umhlaumbi onco̔lileyo, umhlaumbi olibawa, elingumkonzi wezitixo, onalo ilifa ebukumkanini bake u‐Kristu notixo." 
Ephesians5:6 Makungabiko mntu onikohlisayo ngamazwi angendawo: ngokuba ngenxa yezizinto umsindo katixo usiza pezu kwalo usapo lwokungeva. 
Ephesians5:7 Ize ngoko ningabi ngamakolwane alo. 
Ephesians5:8 Ngokuba benifudula nibumnyama, kodwa kaloku nikukukanya enkosini: hambani njengabantwana bokukanya, (" 
Ephesians5:9 ngokuba isiqa̔mo somoya sikuko konke ukulunga, nobulungisa, nenyaniso,)" 
Ephesians5:10 nilinga ukuba yinto nina ekolekileyo kwinkosi. 
Ephesians5:11 Ize ke ningabi nabudlelana nayo imisebenzi eputileyo yobumnyama, keniti kodwa ngokukumbi niyohlwaye." 
Ephesians5:12 Ngokuba izinto ezenziwayo ngabo ngasese, kuyinto embi nokuziteta." 
Ephesians5:13 Kodwa zonke ezi zinto zakuba zisohlwayiwa, ziyabonakaliswa kuko ukukanya: ngokuba konke okubonakalisayo kukukukanya." 
Ephesians5:14 Ngako oko uti: Vuka wena uleleyo! usuke kwabafileyo, waeya kuti u‐Kristu akukanyisele." 
Ephesians5:15 Lumkani ngoko ukuba niti nina ukuhamba ngokuku̔tala, kungabi njengabangalumkileyo, kube njengabalumkileyo," 
Ephesians5:16 nizitengela ituba nje, kuba imihla mibi." 
Ephesians5:17 Ngenxa yoku ningabi zizidenge, nibe niqonda into iyiyo intando yenkosi." 
Ephesians5:18 Kanjalo ninganxili yiveyine, okukoyo ngako ububedengu; niti nizaliswe ngomoya;" 
Ephesians5:19 niteta omnye nomnye ngamaculo, nangengoma zokudumisa, nangezivumo ezibumoya, nivuma nicula nokucula entliziyweni yenu kwinkosi," 
Ephesians5:20 nibulela ngamaxesha onke ngenxa yazo zonke izinto kuye utixo noyise, egameni lenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu," 
Ephesians5:21 nilulamela omnye kwomnye ekwoyikeni utixo. 
Ephesians5:22 Nina bafazi! lulamelani kwawenu amadoda, njengakuyo inkosi;" 
Ephesians5:23 ngokuba indoda iyintloko yomfazi wayo, njengokuba naye u‐Kristu eyintloko yeṙemente, ekwa nguye ongumsindisi womzimba." 
Ephesians5:24 Kukona njengokuba yona iṙemente ilulamela ku‐Kristu, kwa njalo nabo abafazi mabalulamele kwawabo amadoda kuko konke." 
Ephesians5:25 Nina madoda! tandani abenu abafazi, njengokuba naye u‐Kristu wayitanda iṙemente, wazinikela ngenxa yayo;" 
Ephesians5:26 ukuze ayenze ngcwele, e yi hlanzile nje ngokuhlamba kwamanzi elizwini," 
Ephesians5:27 ukuze ayimisele kwa kuye ibungcwalisa, yona iṙemente, ingenabala, ingenambimbi, ingenanye yezinto ezinjalo; koko ukuze ibe ngcwele, ibe msulwa." 
Ephesians5:28 Ngokunjalo amadoda afanelwa kukutanda abawo abafazi, njengeyawo imizimba. Otandayo owake umfazi, uyazitanda yena." 
Ephesians5:29 Ngokuba kungeko mntu owaka watiya eyake inyama; uti ayondle, ayonge, njengokuba nayo inkosi isenzela njalo iṙemente:" 
Ephesians5:30 kuba singamalungu omzimba wayo, kwinyama yayo, nakwamatambo ayo." 
Ephesians5:31 Ngenxa yoku umntu uya kushiya uyise nonina, anamatele emfazini wake, boti abo babini babe yinyama nye." 
Ephesians5:32 Imfihlakalo le yenkulu; mna kodwa ndiyateta ndibeka kuye u‐Kristu nakuyo iṙemente. 
Ephesians5:33 Noko ke nani abanye ngabanye, makati omnye nomnye enje njalo ukutanda owake umfazi njengokuba ezi tanda yena; naye umfazi, makahlonele indoda yake." 
Ephesians6:1 Nina bantwana! yivani abazali benu enkosini; ngokuba oku kufanelekile. 
Ephesians6:2 Beka uyihlo nonyoko, (oti lo ungumyalelo wokuqala unedinga,)" 
Ephesians6:3 ukuze kulunge kuwe, nokuba uhlale kade emhlabeni apa." 
Ephesians6:4 Nani, boyise! ningavuseli abantwana benu ingqumbo; niti nibondlele ekululekeni nasekuyaleni kwenkosi." 
Ephesians6:5 Nina makonza! yivani abazinkosi zenu ngokwenyama, ninokwoyika nokututumela, ngolungelelwano lwentliziyo yenu, nisenjenjalo njengakuye u‐Kristu;" 
Ephesians6:6 kungabi ngenkonzo yamehlo njengabakolisabantu, kube njengamakonza ka‐Kristu; nisenza intando katixo kwa ngentliziyo;" 
Ephesians6:7 nikonza ngokutanda, njengakuyo inkosi, kungekubo abantu;" 
Ephesians6:8 nisazi nje ukuba into elungileyo asukuba eyenza umntu, yona le uya kubuya ayamkele kwinkosi, nokuba ulikonza, nokuba ungokululekileyo." 
Ephesians6:9 Nani, zinkosi! izinto ezikwa zizo zenzeni kuwo, niyeka ukusongela: nisazi nje ukuba kwa neyenu inkosi isezulwini, nokuba akuko ukuketa abantu kuyo." 
Ephesians6:10 OKO kuseleyo, bazalwana bam! yibani nokwomelezeka enkosini, nasemandleni obomelelo bayo." 
Ephesians6:11 Yambatani konke ukuxo̔ba kukatixo, ukuba nibe namandla ukuma ngakuwo amaqinga ka‐Satane." 
Ephesians6:12 Ngokuba ukulwa kwetu kungengakuyo inyama negazi, kungakubo abanobupati, ngakubo abanegunya, ngakubo abapatilizwe bobumnyama belilizwe likoyo, ngakubo omoya benkohlakalo kwezasezulwini indawo." 
Ephesians6:13 Ngenxa yoku tabatani konke ukuxo̔ba kukatixo, ukuze nibe namandla ukumela emhleni ombi, nokuti nikufezile kwa konke nje nime." 
Ephesians6:14 Yimani ngoko, nisibinqile isinqe senu ngenyaniso, nisambete nesigcinisifuba sobulungisa," 
Ephesians6:15 nenyawo zenu nizifakile izihlangu zokulungiselela kwevangeli yoxolo; 
Ephesians6:16 pezu kwazo zonke ezizinto, nilitabatile ikaka lokolo, eniya kuba namandla ngalo ukucima zonke intolo ezitshayo zokohlakeleyo;" 
Ephesians6:17 nize namkele umnqwazi wosindiso, nesiṙele somoya, esililizwi likatixo;" 
Ephesians6:18 nitandaza ngamaxesha onke kumoya ngako konke ukutandaza nokukunga, nipapamela kwa yona lento, kuko konke ukuzingisa nokukunga ngenxa yabo bonke abangcwele;" 
Ephesians6:19 nikung ela kwa nam, ukuba ndinikwe ilizwi ekuvuleni umlomo wam, ndize nditi ngokukalipa ndiyazise imfihlakalo yevangeli," 
Ephesians6:20 enditi ngenxa yayo ndisisitunywa emxokelelwaneni; ukuba kuyo nditete ngokukalipa, njengoko ndifanele ukuteta ngako." 
Ephesians6:21 Kodwa ukuze nizazi nani indawo zam, ukuba kunjanina ukuhlala kwam, uya kunazisa zonke izinto u‐Tikikusi, ongumzalwana otandiweyo nomkonzi onyanisekileyo enkosini;" 
Ephesians6:22 endimtumele kwa yona lento kuni, yokuba nikuqonde okwetu, nokuba azonwabise intliziyo zenu." 
Ephesians6:23 Uxolo malube kubo abazalwana, notando ndawonye nokolo, luvela kutixo uyise nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
Ephesians6:24 Ufefe malube nabo bonke abatandayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu kokungenakwonakala. Amene. 
Philippians1:1 UPAULUSI no‐Timote, izicaka zika‐Yesu Kristu, kubo bonke abangcwele ku‐Kristu Yesu abase‐Filipi, kunye nabalindi nabakonzi:" 
Philippians1:2 Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye utixo ubawo wetu, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
Philippians1:3 Ndiyabulela kutixo wam pezu kwako konke ukunikumbula kwam," 
Philippians1:4 ndisenza ukukunga kwam ngovuyo, ngamaxesha onke, kuzo zonke izikungo zam ngenxa yenu nonke," 
Philippians1:5 pezu kwobudlelana benu ngakuyo ivangeli kuselokwomhla wokuqala kwada kwakaloku nje; 
Philippians1:6 ndinokutemba kwa yona lento, ukuba lowo uqalileyo kuni umsebenzi olungileyo, uya ku wu feza kude kube ngumhla ka‐Yesu Kristu;" 
Philippians1:7 kwa njengokuba kufanelekile kum ukuba ndikumbule oku ngani nonke, ngenxa yokuba ndinani entliziyweni yam; nina nonke nje, nasekubanjweni kwam, nakuko ukutetelela nokuqinisa ivangeli, ningababelwa kolwam ufefe kunye nam." 
Philippians1:8 Ngokuba utixo elinqi̔na lam, ukuba nditi nina ukunilangazelela nonke embilini ka‐Yesu Kristu." 
Philippians1:9 Kanjalo oku ndiyakutandazela, ukuba utando lwenu lukolise ukwanda ngento enkulu kakulu ngakumbi ekwazini na kuko konke ukuva," 
Philippians1:10 ukuze niziqiqe izinto ezigqitiseleyo, ukuba nibe ningcwengekile ningenatyala kude kube semhleni ka‐Kristu;" 
Philippians1:11 nizalisiwe ziziqa̔mo zobulungisa, ezingaye u‐Yesu Kristu, kube kukudunyiswa nokubongwa kukatixo." 
Philippians1:12 Kekaloku ndifuna ukunga ningazi, bazalwana! ukuba indawo zam zihlele ukuhanjiswa kwevangeli ngapezu kwokutintelwa kwayo;"
