Philippians1:13 ide yati imibambo yam yaba ibonakala ku‐Kristu kuyo yonke ilali yomkosi wakomkulu, nakubo bonke abanye;" 
Philippians1:14 nokuba into eninzi yabo abazalwana, bezuza itemba enkosini ngemibambo yam, bayakalipa kakulu ngakumbi ukuliteta ilizwi bengenakwoyika." 
Philippians1:15 Inxenye okunene iyashumayela u‐Kristu ngenxa yomona nepike, nenxenye kanjalo ngenxa yenkolelo:" 
Philippians1:16 abanye ke bayashumayela u‐Kristu ngenkani, beng enzi ngendawo engcwengileyo, beba baya kwongezelela ubunzima emibanjweni yam;" 
Philippians1:17 kodwa abanye bayamshumayela ngotando, besazi ukuba ndimiselwe ukutetelela ivangeli." 
Philippians1:18 Yinto nina pofu? noko ngendawo zonke, nokuba kungokuzenzisa, nokuba kungenyaniso, u‐Kristu uyashunyayelwa; nakuko oku ndiyavuya, ewe, ndoman’ ukuvuya kanjalo." 
Philippians1:19 Ngokuba ndisazi ukuba oku kwoba yinzuziso yosindiswa lwam, ngako ukukunga kwenu nokwonga kwomoya ka‐Yesu Kristu," 
Philippians1:20 njengokwokulangazelela nokutemba kwam, ukuba andiyi kudaniswa nganto, koko ukuba ngokukalipa konke, njengasemaxesheni onke, kwa njalo nakaloku, u‐Kristu uya kuzukiswa emzimbeni wam, nokuba kungokudliwa kwobomi, nokuba kungokufa." 
Philippians1:21 Ngokuba kum ukudla ubomi kungu‐Kristu, nokufa kuyinzuzo." 
Philippians1:22 Kodwa ukuba ukudla ubomi enyameni, ukuba oku kusisiqa̔mo somsebenzi wam, sendingazi ke ukuba ndiya kuqasha nto nina." 
Philippians1:23 Ngokuba ndixingiswa zezizinto zombini, ndinayo inkanuko yokunduluka, nokubako no‐Kristu; ngokuba oko kugqitisile kakulu ngokulunga." 
Philippians1:24 Kodwa ukuhlala enyameni kuyafuneka ngakumbi ngenxa yenu. 
Philippians1:25 Kanjalo ndinokutemba oku nje, ndiyazi ukuba ndiya kuhlala ndilibale apa kunye nani nonke kube kukuhanjiswa kwenu nokuvuya elukolweni," 
Philippians1:26 ukuze uqa̔yiselo lwenu lukolise ukwanda ku‐Yesu Kristu kum, ngako ukubako kwam kuni kanjako." 
Philippians1:27 Kupela ke, ukuzipata kwenu makube kokufanele ivangeli ka‐Kristu; uknze nditi, nokuba ndiyeza ndinibone, nokuba ndihlala ndingeko, ndikuve okwenu, ukuba nimi emoyeni mnye, nizamela ukolo lwevangeli kwa kunye ngentliziyo nye," 
Philippians1:28 ningenakwetuswa nganto ngabalane benu: okuti oko kubo kusisiboniso sentshabalalo, kodwa kuni kusesosindiswa, kunje nje kuvela kutixo:" 
Philippians1:29 ngokokuba kwapiwa nina ukuti ngenxa ka‐Kristu, kungabi kukuba nikolwe kuye kodwa, kukuba niti kanjako ngenxa yake nive intlungu:" 
Philippians1:30 ninako okona ukulwa nje enakubonayo okunjalo kum, nenivayo kaloku ukuba kukum." 
Philippians2:1 UKUBA ngoko kuko ulwonwabiso ku‐Kristu, ukuba kuko intutuzelo yotando, ukuba kuko ubudlelana bomoya, ukuba kuko inceba nezibele," 
Philippians2:2 zalisani uvuyo lwam, ukuba nibe nokuvumelana, ninotando olukwa lulo, ninompefumlo mnye, ninyamekela into ekwa nye;" 
Philippians2:3 ning enzi luto ngokwenkani umhlaumbi ngokwokuzidla, koko ngokutobeka kwentliziyo abanye bebalela abanye ukuba bayabagqitisela." 
Philippians2:4 Maniti nonke ngabanye ningagqali ezenu izinto, koko nonke ngabanye nigqale nezabanye." 
Philippians2:5 Lenyamekelo okunene maibeko kuni, ebiko nakuye u‐Kristu Yesu:" 
Philippians2:6 obete, esebumeni bukatixo nje, akaba kuyinto yokubanjwa ukulingana kwake notixo," 
Philippians2:7 koko wazincipekisa, watabata ubume besicaka, wenziwa ekufaneni kwabantu;" 
Philippians2:8 waza efunyenwe enesimilo njengomntu, wazitobisa, waba elulamile kwada kwasekufeni, ewe ekufeni kwekuruse." 
Philippians2:9 Ngako oko kanjalo utixo wampakamisa kakulu, wampa igama elipezulu kuwo onke amagama;" 
Philippians2:10 ukuze egameni lika‐Yesu kutobe onke amadolo, awe zinto zasezulwini, nawezasemhlabeni, nawezapantsi kwomhlaba;" 
Philippians2:11 nokuba zonke ilwimi zivume ukuba u‐Yesu Kristu u yinkosi, kube kukudunyiswa kukatixo uyise." 
Philippians2:12 Kwa njalo ke, bazalwana bam! njengokuba nibe nilulamile ngamaxesha onke, kungabi njengokuya ndikoyo kodwa, kube kaloku kakulu ngakumbi okuya ndingekoyo, fezani olwenu usindiswa ninokwoyika nokututumela:" 
Philippians2:13 ngokuba utixo enguye osebenzayo kuni, kwa nokutanda nokwenza, ngenxa yenkoliso yake." 
Philippians2:14 Zonke izinto zenzeni ningenakuṙoṙa nokupikisana; 
Philippians2:15 ukuze nibe ningenatyala, ningenamaqokolo, nilusapo lukatixo olungohlwayekiyo, pakati kwaso isizukulwana esigoso nesigwenxa, eniti pakati kwabo nibonakale njengezikanyiso elizweni," 
Philippians2:16 nisolulisa ilizwi lobomi; ndize ndibe nento yokuqa̔yisela emhleni ka‐Kristu, ukuba andifumane ndabaleka, andifumane ndasebenza kanjako." 
Philippians2:17 Koko ukuba ndika nditululwe pezu kwedini nesikonzo senkolo yenu, ndivuya, ndivuyelane nani nonke." 
Philippians2:18 Nangenxa yelituba vuyani nani, nivuyelane nam." 
Philippians2:19 Kodwa ndiyatemba enkosini u‐Yesu ukutuma kuni u‐Timote kamsinya, ukuze nditi nam ndinyamnyeke, ndakukwazi okwenu." 
Philippians2:20 Ngokuba ndingenamnye ontliziyo ifana neyam, oya kuti ngobunyaniso akatalele okwenu." 
Philippians2:21 Ngokuba bonke abanye befuna ezabo izinto, benga funi izinto zika‐Kristu Yesu." 
Philippians2:22 Kodwa ukulingwa kwake niyakwazi, okokuba wati, njengokuba umntwana ekonza kuyise, wakonzela ivangeli kunye nam." 
Philippians2:23 Yena lo ngoko ndiyatemba ukumtuma kwa oko, nxa sukuba sendibona izinto eziya kundihla." 
Philippians2:24 Kodwa ndiyatembela enkosini, ukuba ndoti kwa mna ngokwam ndize kamsinya." 
Philippians2:25 Noko ndaba kufanelekile ukutuma u‐Epafrodito umzalwana wam, ongumsebenzi nesodati kunye nam, kodwa umtunywa wenu, nomkonzi kwintswelo yam, ukuza kuni:" 
Philippians2:26 ekubeni ebelangazelela nina nonke, wadandateka kakulu, ngenxa yokuba benivile ukuba ebesifa." 
Philippians2:27 Ngokuba okunene ebesifa epants ukufa: koko utixo ebenobubele ngakuye; bekungengakuye yedwa, bekungakum kanjalo, ukuze ndingabi nosizi pezu kwosizi." 
Philippians2:28 Ndinxamele ngakumbi ngoko ukumtuma, ukuze niti nakumbona nibuye nivuye, nditi nam ndibe lusizi ngento encinane ngakumbi." 
Philippians2:29 Mamkeleni ngoko enkosini ngovuyo lwonke, nize abanjalo nibabeke:" 
Philippians2:30 ngokuba ngenxa yomsebenzi ka‐Kristu wasondela kwada kwasekufeni, enganonelelanga ubomi bake, ukuze akwenzelele ukusweleka kwenkonzo yenu ngakum." 
Philippians3:1 OKO kuseleyo, bazalwana bam! vuyani enkosini. Ukuziba̔la izinto ezikwa zizo kuni, okunene kum akuyindiniso, kodwa kuni kuyingciniso." 
Philippians3:2 Lumkani abazinja, lumkani abasebenzi abakohlakeleyo, lumkani abalunqumlo." 
Philippians3:3 Ngokuba tina singabalwaluko, esiti sikonze utixo ngomoya, sivuyelele ku‐Kristu Yesu, singatembeli enyameni;" 
Philippians3:4 nangona bendingaba nesitembelo kanti nasenyameni. Ukuba kuko omnye umntu oba unako ukutembela enyameni, ndigqitisile mna;" 
Philippians3:5 ndingowalukileyo ngomhla wesibozo, ndingowaseluhlangeni luka‐Sirayeli, ndingowesizwe sika‐Benjamine, um‐Hebere kuma‐Hebere; ngokwomteto ndingum‐Farisi;" 
Philippians3:6 ngokwozondelelo nditshutshisa iṙemente; ngokwobulungisa obusemtetweni ndihleli ndingenatyala. 
Philippians3:7 Kuloko ezonto ezibe ziyinzuzo kum, zona ezi ndizibalile ngenxa ka‐Kristu ukuba zisisilahleko." 
Philippians3:8 Hai gxebe okunene nditi kanjalo ndizibala zonke ukuba zisisilahleko ngenxa yendluliselo yokwaziwa kuka‐Kristu Yesu inkosi yam; endalahlekelwa zizinto zonke ngenxa yake, nendizibala ukuba ziyinkunkuma, ukuze ndizuze u‐Kristu," 
Philippians3:9 ndifunyanwe kwa kuye, ndingenabo obam ubulungisa obuvela emtetweni, koko ndinabo bona obungalo ukolo luka‐Kristu, kwa ubulungisa obuvela kutixo ngokolo olo;" 
Philippians3:10 ukuze ndimazi yena, namandla ovuko lwake, nobudlelana bentlungu zake, ndifanekiselwa ekufeni kwake nje," 
Philippians3:11 ukuba kungati ndingafikelela eluvukweni lwabafileyo. 
Philippians3:12 Kungekukuba ndise ndifumene, umhlaumbi ndise ndifezekisiwe; kodwa ndisaputuma, ukuba ndingati kanjalo ndikubambe oko endandibanjelwa kona kanjalo ngu‐Kristu Yesu." 
Philippians3:13 Bazalwana! andizibaleli mna ukuba sendibambile: lento kodwa ndiyayenza, izinto ezisemva ndizilibala nje, nezinto ezipambili ndisolulela kuzo," 
Philippians3:14 ndiyaputuma ke ngakuwo umlinganiso ndiputum ela umvuzo wobizo lwapezulu lukatixo ku‐Kristu Yesu. 
Philippians3:15 Masiti ngoko sonke tina esingabafezekileyo sibe nokukumbula okunjalo: nokuba niyakumbula ngento ngokukumbi, kwa yona le utixo woyityila kuni." 
Philippians3:16 Kodwa noko, apo sifikele kona, masihambe ngommiso okwa nguwo, masikumbule into ekwa yiyo." 
Philippians3:17 Yibani ngabalandeli bam kwa kunye, bazalwana! nigqale abo abenje njalo ukuhamba njengokuba ninati singumzekelo. (" 
Philippians3:18 Ngokuba abaninzi behamba, endibe ndisitsho futi kuni ngabo, nenditshoyo kaloku ndilila nje, ukuti bazintshaba zekuruse ka‐Kristu:" 
Philippians3:19 abakupela kuyintshabalalo, aba tixo usisisu sabo, n aba bungcwalisa busehlazweni labo, abanyamekela izinto zasemhlabeni.)" 
Philippians3:20 Ngokuba obetu ubuzwe busezulwini; apo kanjalo silinda ukuvela kwomsindisi kona, inkosi u‐Yesu Kristu:" 
Philippians3:21 oya kwenza ngakumbi isimilo somzimba wobupantsi betu, ukuba wenziwe wona ufane nomzimba wobungcwalisa bake, ngokwokusebenza anamandla ngako nokuzibeka pantsi kwake zonke izinto." 
Philippians4:1 Ngako oko, bazalwana bam abatandiweyo nabalangazelelweyo, luvuyo lwam nesitsaba sam! qinisani njalo ukuma enkosini, batandwa!" 
Philippians4:2 U‐Wodiya ndiyamyala, no‐Sintike ndiyamyala, ukuba babe nokuvumelana enkosini." 
Philippians4:3 Ewe ndiyakutandaza nawe, sinxulumane senyaniso! ukuba ubancede aba bafazi, ekubeni bazamayo kunye nam evangelini, ndawonye naye no‐Kilemente, nabanye abasebenzisi bam, abamagama asencwadini yobomi." 
Philippians4:4 Vuyani enkosini ngamaxesha onke: ndobuya nditi: Vuyani. 
Philippians4:5 Ukululama kwenu makwazeke kubo bonke abantu. Inkosi ikufupi. 
Philippians4:6 Ningabi nasitukutezi nganto; koko kuko konke ngokutandaza nangokukunga ndawonye nokubulela maziti ingcelo zenu zaziswe kutixo: 
Philippians4:7 lwaye uxolo lukatixo, oludlulayo konke ukuqonda, luya kugcina intliziyo zenu nenkumbulo zenu ku‐Kristu Yesu." 
Philippians4:8 Oko kuseleyo, bazalwana! izinto ezisukuba ziyinene, izinto ezisukuba zibekeka, izinto ezisukuba zifanelekile, izinto ezisukuba zicokisekile, izinto ezisukuba zitandeka, izinto ezisukuba zinokuduma okuhle; ukuba kuko into elungileyo, nokuba kuko into eyindumiso, zitelekeleleni ezizinto." 
Philippians4:9 Ezonto kanjalo enizifundileyo nazamkela, nenizivileyo nazibona kum, zona ezi zenzeni: waye utixo woxolo eya kuba nani." 
Philippians4:10 KEKALOKU ndavuya enkosini kakulu, ukuba kaloku nide nabuya nahluma ukundinonelela kwenu; enibe ninyamekela kwa kona, kodwa nibe ningenalo ituba." 
Philippians4:11 Kungekukuba nditeta ngokwokuswela: ngokuba ndifundile mna ukuti, kulontlalo endikuyo, ndibe nokukolwa." 
Philippians4:12 Ndiyakwazi ke ukuba sekutotyweni, ndiyakwazi kanjalo ukuba nobuninzi: kuko konke nasezintweni zonke ndikolisile ukufundiswa kwa nokuhluta nokulamba, kwa nokuba nobuninzi nokuba nokuswela." 
Philippians4:13 Zonke izinto ndingazenza kulowo undomelezayo, ku‐Kristu." 
Philippians4:14 Kodwa nalungisa noko, ukuba naninobudlelana nobunzima bam." 
Philippians4:15 Kanjako niyazi nani, ma‐Filipi! ukuba ekuqalweni kwevangeli, okuya ndemkayo e‐Masedoniya, akwabako nanye iṙemente eyabelana nam ngendawo yokupa nokwamkela, kupela nina nedwa:" 
Philippians4:16 kuba nase‐Tesalonika, kwa kanye nakabini, natumela ukuswela kwam kum." 
Philippians4:17 Kungekukuba ndifuna isipiwo, koko ndifuna isiqa̔mo esikwandela ukubalelwa kwenu." 
Philippians4:18 Kodwa sendinazo into zonke, ndinobuninzi: ndizalisekile, ndizamkele nje ku‐Epafrodito izinto ezavela kuni, ivumba elimnandi, idini elikolekileyo, eliyolela utixo kakulu." 
Philippians4:19 Kodwa utixo wam uya kuzalisa konke ukuswela kwenu ngokwobutyebi bake ebungcwaliseni ku‐Kristu Yesu. 
Philippians4:20 Kekaloku kwa kuye utixo nobawo wetu makubeko ubungcwalisa kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene. 
Philippians4:21 Bulisani bonke abangcwele ku‐Kristu Yesu. Abazalwana abanam bayanibulisa. 
Philippians4:22 Bona abangcwele bonke bayanibulisa, kodwa abenje njalo kakulu bangabo basendlwini ka‐Kesare." 
Philippians4:23 Ufefe lwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu malube nani nonke. Amene. 
Colossians1:1 UPAULUSI, umpostile ka‐Yesu Kristu ngayo intando katixo, no‐Timote umzalwana wetu," 
Colossians1:2 kubo abangcwele nabazalwana abakolwayo ku‐Kristu abase‐Kolose: Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye utixo ubawo wetu, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
Colossians1:3 Siyabulela kuye utixo noyise wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, sinitandazela ngamaxesha onke," 
Colossians1:4 siyivile nje inkolo yenu ku‐Kristu Yesu, notando e ninalo kubo bona bonke abangcwele," 
Colossians1:5 ngenxa yetemba enibekelelwe lona ezulwini, elo nevayo ngalc pambili elizwini lenyaniso levangeli;" 
Colossians1:6 eze kubako kuni, njengokuba iko nakulo lonke ilizwe; eti kanjalo ivelise izixakato, njengokuba isenje njalo napakati kwenu, kuselokwomhla ena yi va ngawo, naza nalwazi ufefe lukatixo ngenyaniso:" 
Colossians1:7 njengokuba kanjalo benifundile ku‐Epafrasi, isicaka kunye nati esitandiweyo, ongumkonzi onyanisekileyo ka‐Kristu ngenxa yenu;" 
Colossians1:8 owati kanjalo waxela kuti utando lwenu kumoya. 
Colossians1:9 Ngenxa yako oku nati, kuselokwomhla sevayo, asipezi ukunitandazela, nokucela ukuba nizaliswe ngokwaziwa kwentando yake kubo bonke ubulumko nokuqonda okubumoya;" 
Colossians1:10 ukuze nihambe ngokufanele inkosi kube kukukolisa konke, nivelisa izixakato kuyo yonke imisebenzi elungileyo, nikulela ekumazini utixo;" 
Colossians1:11 nisomelezwa ngabo bonke ubomelelo, ngokwamandla obungcwalisa bake, kube kuko konke ukunyamezela nokuzeka kade ndawonye novuyo;" 
Colossians1:12 nibulela kuyise owasenza silinganele isabiwo selifa labangcwele ekukanyeni: 
Colossians1:13 owasihlangulayo egunyeni lobumnyama, wa si fudusela ebukumkanini bonyana wotando lwake;" 
Colossians1:14 okuye sinalo ukululwa ngalo igazi lake, uxolelwa lwezono zetu:" 
Colossians1:15 ongumfanekiso wotixo ongabonekiyo, umzalwatanci kuzo zonke izidalwa:" 
Colossians1:16 ngokuba kuye kwadalwa zonke izinto, ezo zisezulwini nezo zisemhlabeni, ezo zibonekayo nezo zingabonekiyo, nokuba zezineterone, nokuba zezinobukosi, nokuba zezinobupati, nokuba zezinegunya, — zonke izinto zidaliwe ngaye, nangenxa yake:" 
Colossians1:17 kanjalo yena upambili kuzo zonke izinto, nakuye’zonke izinto zimana zimi." 
Colossians1:18 Kanjako nguye oyintloko yomzimba, yeṙemente; osiso isiqalo, umzalwatanci kwabafileyo, ukuze yena abe ngomkulu ezintweni zonke:" 
Colossians1:19 ngokuba ebetanda u‐Yise ukuba bonke ubuzala buhlale kuye; 
Colossians1:20 nokuba ati ngaye zonke izinto azixolisane naye yena, elwenzile uxolo nje ngalo igazi lekuruse yake, — kwa ngaye ke, nokuba zezo zisemhlabeni, nokuba zezo zisezulwini." 
Colossians1:21 Nani nina, nakuba nibe nifudula ningabasemzini nabazintshaba eluveni lwenu kuyo imisebenzi ekohlakeleyo, noko kaloku unixolisene naye" 
Colossians1:22 emzimbeni wenyama yake ngako ukufa kwake, ukuze animise nibangcwele, nibamsulwa, ningenakunikwa ityala, ebusweni bake:" 
Colossians1:23 ukuba kambe nimana ukuma elukolweni, nisekelwe, niqinile nokuqina, ningashenxiswa nje kanjalo etembeni levangeli, leyo nayivayo, eyashunyayelwa kuko konke ukudalwa okungapantsi kwezulu; endaba ngumkonzi wayo mna Paulusi." 
Colossians1:24 Enditi kaloku ndivuye ezintlungwini zam ngenxa yenu, ndizalisekise izinto eziswelekileyo zembandezelwa zika‐Kristu enyameni yam ngenxa yomzimba wake, oyiyo iṙemente:" 
Colossians1:25 endaba ngumkonzi wayo mna ngokwolwabo lukatixo olwanikwa kum ngakuni, ukuba ndikolise ukushumayela ilizwi likatixo, —" 
Colossians1:26 imfihlakalo ebifihlelwe amaxesha akudala nezizukulwana, kodwa kaloku ibonakalisiwe kubangcwele bake:" 
Colossians1:27 abete utixo watanda ukubazisa into buyiyo ubutyebi bobungcwalisa bemfihlakalo le pakati kwabaheyideni; engu‐Kristu pakati kwenu, itemba lobungcwalisa:" 
Colossians1:28 esiti tina simshumayele, siluleka bonke abantu, sifundisa nokufundisa abantu bonke ngobulumko bonke; ukuze simise bonke abantu befezekile ku‐Kristu Yesu;" 
Colossians1:29 endizamela kona kanjalo, ndikandanisa ngokwokusebenza kwake, okusebenzayo kum ngamandla." 
Colossians2:1 NGOKUBA ndifuna ukuba nikwazi ukulwa okukulu kangakanana endinako ngenxa yenu, nabo abase‐Lawodikeya, nabo bonke abangabonanga ubuso bam enyameni;" 
Colossians2:2 ukuze intliziyo zabo zonwatyiswe, bebandakanywa elutandweni nje, nakude kube bubo bonke ubutyebi bengqiniso ezalisekileyo yengqondo, kude kube kukwaziwa kwemfihlakalo yake utixo noyise, neka‐Kristu;" 
Colossians2:3 okukoyo kuye zonke indyebo zobulumko nezokwazi zifihlekile. 
Colossians2:4 Kekaloku oku ndiyakutsho, ukuze kungabiko onibukuqayo ngokuteta okuhendayo." 
Colossians2:5 Ngokuba nangona ndingeko ngenyama, ndiko nani noko ngomoya, ndivuya nje ndibona nokubona ukulungelana kwenu, nokuti nqi kwenkolo yenu ku‐Kristu." 
Colossians2:6 Njengokuba ngoko benimamkele u‐Kristu Yesu oyinkosi, kwa njalo hambani kuye:" 
Colossians2:7 nendele nisakelwa nokwakelwa kuye, niqiniswa kanjalo elukolweni, kwa njengokuba nibe nifundiswa, nikolisa ukwanda kulo ngombulelo." 
Colossians2:8 Lumkani kungabiko mntu oya kutimba nina ngayo ifilosofe nenkohliso engendawo, ngokwesinikelo sabantu, ngokweziqalelo zelizwe, kungengokuka‐Kristu." 
Colossians2:9 Ngokuba kuye kuhleli bonke ubuzala bobutixo busemzimbeni. 
Colossians2:10 Kanjalo nizalisekile kuye; oyintloko yabo bonke ubupati negunya; 
Colossians2:11 okuye kanjako nibe nalukile ngokwaluka okungenziwanga ngezandla, ekutulweni kwomzimba wezono zenyama, ekwalukeni kuka‐Kristu;" 
Colossians2:12 nincw̔atyiwe nje kunye naye ekubapitizeshweni, okuko kanjako nibe nivuswa kunye naye ngalo ukolo lwokusebenza kukatixo, owamvusayo kwabafileyo." 
Colossians2:13 Nani nifile nje eziposweni zenu nasekungalukini kwenyama yenu, wanipilisa kwa kunye naye, enixolele zonke iziposo zenu;" 
Colossians2:14 esicimile isiba̔lo siteta ngakuti ngemimiselo yaso, esibe sica̔sana nati, waza wasisusa endleleni, esibetele ekuruseni yake;" 
Colossians2:15 wati ebahlubile nje abanobupati nabanegunya wenza isibonelo ngabo kwa sekuhleni, ebavuyelela kwa kuyo." 
Colossians2:16 Makungabiko mntu ngoko onigwebayo ekutyeni, imhlaimbi ekuseleni, imhlaimbi endaweni yomtendeleko, imhlaimbi yenyanga etwasileyo, imhlaimbi yesabata;" 
Colossians2:17 ezisisitunzi sezinto eziza kuza, kodwa wona umzimba ungoka‐Kristu." 
Colossians2:18 Makungabiko namnye onilahlekisana nomvuzo wenu, efuna ukwenje njalo ekutobekeni kwentliziyo nasekubedeshweni kwazo ingelosi, ehlola izinto angazibonanga, efumana evutelaniswa luluvo lwenyama yake," 
Colossians2:19 engabambeleli koyintloko kanjalo, okuye uti umzimba wonke, usongiwa ubandakanywa nokubandakanywa ngawo amalungu nemisipa, ukule ngenkuliso katixo." 
Colossians2:20 Ukuba ngoko nafa kunye no‐Kristu nahlukana nazo iziqalelo zelizwe, yinina ukuba niti, njengokungati nibe nihlala elizweni, nizibeke ngapantsi kwemimiselo, —" 
Colossians2:21 Ningapati, ningake nive, ningacu̔kumisi kanjako," 
Colossians2:22 (izinto ezizezokutshatyalaliswa zonke ekugqityelweni kwazo,) — ngokweziyalelo nezifundiso zabantu?" 
Colossians2:23 Eziti ezonto zinodumo lwokuba zibubulumko, ekubedesheni okuzenzayo, nasekutobekeni kwentliziyo, nasekubandezelweni kwomzimba, kungekwinto enobomi, ziyelela ukudikwa kwenyama." 
Colossians3:1 UKUBA ngoko nibe nivuswa kunye no‐Kristu, funani izinto ezipezulu, apo u‐Kristu akona, ehleli ngasekunene kwotixo." 
Colossians3:2 Nyamekelani izinto ezipezulu, ninga nyamekeli izinto ezisemhlabeni." 
Colossians3:3 Ngokuba nafayo, nobomi benu bona bufihlelwe kunye no‐Kristu kutixo." 
Colossians3:4 Okuya u‐Kristu, obubomi betu, uya kubonakaliswa, niya kwandula oko nani nibonakaliswe kunye naye ebungcwaliseni." 
Colossians3:5 Fisani ngoko amalungu enu asemhlabeni; umbulo, ubunco̔la, ukuva okubi, inkanuko ekohlakeleyo, nobubawa, obuti bona buyinkonzo yezitixo:" 
Colossians3:6 ekungenxa yezizinto umsindo katixo uza pezu kwalo usapo lwokungeva; 
Colossians3:7 enanifudula nihamba pakati kwalo nani, okuya nibe nihlala kuzo." 
Colossians3:8 Kodwa kaloku zibekeni nxamnye nani zonke ezi, uqumbo, umsindo, ulunya, ugxeko, ukuteta okuhlazekileyo emlonyeni wenu." 
Colossians3:9 Ningaxoki omnye kwomnye, nimtulile nje umntu omdala kunye nezenzo zake," 
Colossians3:10 namambata omtsha, ohlaziyelwa ngasekwazini ngokwomfanekiso walowo wamdalayo:" 
Colossians3:11 apo kungeko kona um‐Girike nom‐Juda, ukwaluka nokungaluki, um‐Babare n om‐Sitiya, ikoboka n okululekileyo; koko u‐Kristu ezinto zonke, nakubo bonke." 
Colossians3:12 Yambatani ngoko, njengabaqashwa bakatixo, abangcwele nabatandiweyo, inceba zetaṙu, ububele, ukutobeka kwentliziyo, ululamo, ukuzeka kade;" 
Colossians3:13 ninyamezelana, nixolelana, ukuba kuko omnye onesikalazo ngakuye omnye; njengokuba naye u‐Kristu ebexolela nina, nisenje njalo nani." 
Colossians3:14 Kodwa pezu kwazo zonke ezizinto yambatani utando, olungumbambo wemfezeko." 
Colossians3:15 Kanjako uxolo lukatixo malube nokupata ezintliziyweni zenu, enibe nibizelwa kulo kanjako emzimbeni mnye; nize nibe nokubulela." 
Colossians3:16 Ilizwi lika‐Kristu malikolise ukuma kuni, nifundisana nilulekana ngobulumko bonke, ngamaculo, nangengoma zokudumisa, nangezivumo ezibumoya, nivuma ngofefe ezintliziyweni zenu enkosini." 
Colossians3:17 Nako konke enisukuba nikwenza ngelizwi umhlaumbi ngesenzo, zonke izinto zenzeni egameni lenkosi u‐Yesu, nibulela kuye utixo noyise ngayo yona." 
Colossians3:18 Nina bafazi! lulamelani kwawenu amadoda, njengokuba kufanelekile enkosini." 
Colossians3:19 Nina madoda! tandani abafazi benu, nize ningabi buṙaṙa ngakubo." 
Colossians3:20 Nina bantwana! yivani abazali benu ngenxa zonke; ngokuba oku kukolekile enkosini. 
Colossians3:21 Nina boyise! ningacapukisi abantwana benu, ukuze bangadani." 
Colossians3:22 Nina makonza! yivani ngenxa zonke abazinkosi zenu ngokwenyama; kungabi ngokukonza kwamehlo njengabakolisabantu, kube ngolungelelwano lwentliziyo, nisoyika utixo." 
Colossians3:23 Nako konke enisukuba nikwenza, kwenzeni kwa ngentliziyo, njengakuyo inkosi, kungekubo abantu;" 
Colossians3:24 nisazi nje ukuba niya kuwamkela kwinkosi umvuzo welifa: ngokuba niyikonza inkosi u‐Kristu. 
Colossians3:25 Kodwa owonayo uya kubuya amkele oko wona ngako: kanjako akuko ukuketwa kwabantu. 
Colossians4:1 Nina zinkosi! yenzelani amakonza enu oko kufanelekileyo noko kulingeneyo; nisazi nje ukuba nani ninayo inkosi ezulwini. 
Colossians4:2 Zingisani ekutandazeni, nilinda nje kuko ngombulelo;" 
Colossians4:3 nitandaza kunye nako oko nangenxa yetu, ukuba utixo asivulele ucango lwelizwi, size siyitete imfihlakalo ka‐Kristu, endisekubanjweni ngenxa yayo kanjalo;" 
Colossians4:4 ukuze ndiyibonakalise, njengoko ndifanele ukuteta ngako." 
Colossians4:5 Hambani ngobulumko ngakubo abapandle, nizitengela ituba nje." 
Colossians4:6 Ukuteta kwenu makube ngofefe ngamaxesha onke, kuvakalisiwe ngetyuwa, ukuze nikwazi ukuba nifanele ukuti nina ukupendula bonke abanye ngabanye." 
Colossians4:7 ZONKE indawo zam uya kunazisa zona u‐Tikikusi, ongumzalwana otandiweyo, nomkonzi onyanisekileyo, nesicaka kunye nam enkosini:" 
Colossians4:8 endimtumele kwa yona lento kuni, yokuba aqonde okwenu, azonwabise intliziyo zenu;" 
Colossians4:9 kunye no‐Onesimusi, umzalwana wetu onyanisekileyo notandiweyo, ongowakowenu. Baya kunazisa konke okwalapa." 
Colossians4:10 U‐Aristariko, umbanjwa kunye nam, uyanibulisa; kwa no‐Maraki, isalamane sika‐Banabasi, enaniyamkele imiyalelo ngaye; (xeshekweni ezayo kuni, mamkeleni;)" 
Colossians4:11 no‐Yesu, o‐kutiwa ngu‐Yusitusi, abangabo basekwalukeni. Aba bodwa bangabasebenzisi bam ngasebukumkanini bukatixo, abate baba sisonwabiso kum." 
Colossians4:12 U‐Epafrasi, ongowakowenu, isicaka sika‐Kristu, uyanibulisa, enizamela kakulu ngamaxesha onke emitandazweni yake, ukuba nime nifezekile nizalisekile kuyo yonke intando katixo." 
Colossians4:13 Ngokuba ndimnqi̔nela ukuba unozondelelo olukulu ngenxa yenu, nabo base‐Lawodikeya, nabo base‐Herapolisi." 
Colossians4:14 U‐Luke, igqiṙa elitandiweyo, uyanibulisa; Kwa no‐Demasi." 
Colossians4:14 U‐Luke, igqiṙa elitandiweyo, uyanibulisa; Kwa no‐Demasi." 
Colossians4:15 Bulisani abazalwana abase‐Lawodikeya, no‐Nimfasi, neṙemente esendlwini yake." 
Colossians4:16 Naxeshekweni incwadi le ileseshiwe pakati kwenu, yenzani ukuba ileseshwe naseṙementeni yama‐Lawodikeya, nokuba nani niyileseshe leyo ivela e‐Lawodikeya." 
Colossians4:17 Kanjalo yitini kuye u‐Arikipo: Lumkela ubukonzi owabubamkela enkosini, ukuba ubufeze." 
Colossians4:18 Umbuliso wam Paulusi ngesam isandla. Kumbulani imibambo yam. Ufefe malube nani. Amene. 
1Thessalonians1:1 UPAULUSI, no‐Silivane, no‐Timote, kwiṙemente yama‐Tesalonika e kutixo uyise nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu: Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye utixo ubawo wetu, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
1Thessalonians1:2 Siyabulela kutixo ngamaxesha onke ngenxa yenu nonke, sinikankanya emitandazweni yetu;" 
1Thessalonians1:3 singayeki ukukumbula umsebenzi wenu wokolo, nomzamo wotando, nomonde wetemba enkosini yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, ebusweni bake utixo nobawo wetu:" 
1Thessalonians1:4 sisazi nje, bazalwana abatandiweyo ngutixo! ukunyulwa kwenu;" 
1Thessalonians1:5 kuba ivangeli yetu ibingezanga kuni emazwini odwa, koko yezayo nasemandleni, na kumoya oyingcwele, nasekuqiniseni okuninzi; kwa njengokuba nisazi ukuba saba ngabanjanina pakati kwenu ngenxa yenu." 
1Thessalonians1:6 Nani naba ngabalandeli betu, na benkosi, nilamkele nje ilizwi ebunzimeni obuninzi, kunye novuyo lwomoya oyingcwele;" 
1Thessalonians1:7 nada naba yimizekelo kubo bonke abakolwayo e‐Masedoniya nase‐Akaiya. 
1Thessalonians1:8 Ngokuba kwa kuni livakalisiwe ilizwi lenkosi kungekuyo i‐Masedoniya ne‐Akaiya yodwa, koko nakuzo zonke indawo inkolo yenu engakuye utixo ipumile; side singafaneli tina ukuteta into." 
1Thessalonians1:9 Ngokuba bona ngokwabo beshumayela ngati ukuba bekunjanina ukungena esibe sinako kuni, nokuba nati nina ukuguqukela kutixo niguquka ezitixweni, ukumkonza utixo opilileyo oyinyaniso," 
1Thessalonians1:10 nokumlinda unyana wake evela ezulwini, ate wamvusa ekufeni, kwa u‐Yesu, osihlangulayo emsindweni ozayo." 
1Thessalonians2:1 Ngokuba nisazi nina ngokwenu, bazalwana! ukungena kwetu kuni, ukuba bekungeyinto engenanto:" 
1Thessalonians2:2 koko nakubeni sibe sibulalekile pambili sapatwa kakubi, njengokuba nisazi, e‐Filipi, sibe sinokukalipa kutixo wetu ukuyiteta kuni ivangeli katixo ekulweni okuninzi." 
1Thessalonians2:3 Ngokuba ukuyala kwetu kungaveli elulahlekweni, kungaveli nasebunco̔leni, kungengenkohliso kanjalo:" 
1Thessalonians2:4 koko njengokuba sibukiwe ngutixo ukuba siyipatiswe ivangeli, siteta kwa njalo; kungengokufuna ukukolisa abantu, ku ngokufuna ukukolisa utixo, ozilingayo intliziyo zetu." 
1Thessalonians2:5 Ngokuba kanjako singezanga sipate amazwi enywelezo, njengokuba nisazi, kwa nesigushelo sobubawa; utixo ulinqi̔na;" 
1Thessalonians2:6 singafuni nje imbeko ebantwini kanjalo, kwa nakuni nakwabanye, nangona sibe singaba sibunzima kuni, njengabapostile baka‐Kristu." 
1Thessalonians2:7 Kodwa sibe sinokutamba pakati kwenu, njengokuba umanyisikazi ebondla abake abantwana;" 
1Thessalonians2:8 kwa njalo, sinilangazelela kakulu nje, sibe sinxamela ukunabela ingeyiyo ivangeli katixo yodwa, iyiyo eyetu imipefumlo nayo, ngenxa yokuba nibe nitandekile kuti." 
1Thessalonians2:9 Ngokuba nikumbula, bazalwana! ukuzama kwetu nokudiniswa kwetu: ngokuba, sisebenza ebusuku nasemini nje, size singabi bunzima kumntu wakuni, sibe siyishumayela kuni ivangeli katixo." 
1Thessalonians2:10 Ningamanqi̔na nina, kwa notixo, ukuba sati nina ukwenza ngobungcwele nangobulungisa nangokungenatyala kuni nikolwayo;" 
1Thessalonians2:11 kwa njengokuba nisazi, okokuba nina nonke abanye ngabanye, njengokuba uyise epata abake abantwana, saniyala, sa ni tutuzela, sa ni nqi̔nisa," 
1Thessalonians2:12 ukuba nihambe ngokufanele utixo, onibizelayo kobake ubukumkani nobungcwalisa." 
1Thessalonians2:13 Ngenxa yoku siyabulela kutixo nati singayeki, ukuba nakulamkela kuti ilizwi lentshumayelo, e likatixo, nalamkela lalingelilizwi labantu, koko, njengokuba linjalo ngenyaniso, lalililizwi likatixo, eliti kanjako lisebenze kuni nikolwayo." 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ngokuba nina, bazalwana! naba ngabalandeli bazo iṙemente zikatixo ezise‐Judeya ku‐Kristu Yesu, ekubeni nani naziva intlungu ezikwa zizo ngabesizwe sakowenu, njengokuba bona nabo bezivile ngama‐Juda:" 
1Thessalonians2:14 Ngokuba nina, bazalwana! naba ngabalandeli bazo iṙemente zikatixo ezise‐Judeya ku‐Kristu Yesu, ekubeni nani naziva intlungu ezikwa zizo ngabesizwe sakowenu, njengokuba bona nabo bezivile ngama‐Juda:" 
1Thessalonians2:15 ate abulala kwa nenkosi u‐Yesu nabawo abaprofite, asitshutshisa tina kanjalo; engamkolisi utixo, eca̔sene nabantu bonke nakanjako;" 
1Thessalonians2:16 esalela ukuteta kubaheyideni ukuba basindiswe; ukuze azalisekise izono zawo ngamaxesha onke. Kodwa umsindo uwafikele kude kugqitywe. 
1Thessalonians2:17 KODWA tina, bazalwana! sihlutiwe kuni ixesha elifutshane nje, ngobuso, bekungengentliziyo, sati kakulu ngakumbi sanxamela ukubona ubuso benu ngenkanuko enkulu." 
1Thessalonians2:18 Ngako oko safuna ukuza kuni, kwa mna Paulusi, nakanye nakabini; kanti u‐Satane wasitintela." 
1Thessalonians2:19 Ngokuba yinto nina itemba letu, mhlaumbi uvuyo lwetu, mhlaumbi isitsaba setu sokuqa̔yisela? Aninjalo nani kusinina ebusweni benkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu ekufikeni kwayo?" 
1Thessalonians2:20 Ewe nini ubungcwalisa betu novuyo lwetu. 
1Thessalonians3:1 Ngako oko sakuba singasenako ukunyamezela, saba kulungile ukuba sishiywe e‐Atenesi sedwa;" 
1Thessalonians3:2 saza satuma u‐Timote, umzalwana wetu, nomkonzi katixo, nomsebenzisi wetu evangelini ka‐Kristu, ukuya kuniqinisa, nokuniyala ngalo ukolo lwenu," 
1Thessalonians3:3 ukuba kungabiko mntu oshukunyiswayo pakati kwezimbandezelo; ngokuba nisazi ngokwenu ukuba simiselwe kwa kona. 
1Thessalonians3:4 Ngokuba okunene, okuya sibe sinani, sibe sisitsho pambili kuni ukuti siza kubandezelwa; njengokuba kanjalo kwaza kubako, na njengokuba nisazi." 
1Thessalonians3:5 Ngenxa yoku, ndakuba nam ndingasenako ukunyamezela, ndatuma ukuba ndiqonde ukolo lwenu, hleze kungati umlingi abe enilingile, uze ufumane usenzwa umzamo wetu." 
1Thessalonians3:6 Kodwa ngoku akufika u‐Timote kuti evela kuni, waza wasishumayeza indaba ezilungileyo zokolo lwenu notando lwenu, nokokuba ninokusikumbula okulungileyo ngamaxesha onke, nilangazelela ukusibona tina, kwa njengokuba nati sisenje njalo ukunibona nina," 
1Thessalonians3:7 sati ngenxa yoku, bazalwana! sonwatyiswa pezu kwenu, kuko konke ukubandezelwa kwetu nobunzima betu, ngalo ukolo lwenu:" 
1Thessalonians3:8 kuba kaloku sibudla ubomi, nxa niqinisa ukuma nina enkosini." 
1Thessalonians3:9 Ngokuba singanibuyisela kutixo umbulelo omnina, pezu kwalo lonke uvuyo esivuya ngalo ngenxa yenu ebusweni botixo wetu," 
1Thessalonians3:10 ebusuku nasemini sitandaza kakulu ngakumbi nje ukuba sibubone ubuso benu, nokuba sikwenzelele okuswelekileyo elukolweni lwenu?" 
1Thessalonians3:11 Kekaloku yena ngokwake utixo nobawo wetu, nayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, wanga angondisa indlela yetu kuni." 
1Thessalonians3:12 Nani ke yanga ingati yona inkosi inenze nanele nikolise ukwanda elutandweni lwenu omnye ngakwomnye nangakubo bonke abantu, kwa njengokuba nati sisenje njalo ngakuni;" 
1Thessalonians3:13 ukuze iqinise intliziyo zenu zibe zingenatyala ebungcweleni, ebusweni bake utixo nobawo wetu, ekufikeni kwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu ndawonye nabo bonke abangcwele bayo." 
1Thessalonians4:1 OKO kuseleyo ke, bazalwana! siyanitandaza si ni yale enkosini u‐Yesu, ukuba niti, njengokuba nikwamkele kuti okokuba nifanele ukuti nina ukuhamba nokukolisa utixo, kwa njalo nikolise ukwanda kuko ngakumbi." 
1Thessalonians4:2 Ngokuba nisazi iziyalelo zinina esaninika zona ngayo inkosi u‐Yesu. 
1Thessalonians4:3 Ngokuba oku kuyintando katixo, ukungcwaliswa kwenu, ukuba nizile umbulo:" 
1Thessalonians4:4 ukuba ati omnye nomnye wenu akwazi ukubamba eyake impahla ebungcweleni nasekubekweni; 
1Thessalonians4:5 kungabi ekuveni okubi kwenkanuko, kwa njengokuba besenje njalo nabaheyideni abangamaziyo utixo;" 
1Thessalonians4:6 ukuba kungabiko oti agqite alumkise umzalwana wake kulendawo: ngokokuba inkosi ingumpindezeli ngazo zonke ezizinto, njengokuba kanjalo besinixelele pambili sa ni nqi̔nisela." 
1Thessalonians4:7 Ngokuba utixo engasibizelanga ubunco̔la, koko esibizile ukuba sibe sebungcweleni." 
1Thessalonians4:8 Ngako ke lowo walayo, akali umntu, koko esala utixo, ote kanjako wasinika umoya wake oyingcwele." 
1Thessalonians4:9 Kekaloku ukutanda abazalwana aninakuswela ukuba ndiba̔le kuni ngako; ngokuba nina ngokwenu ndifundiswa ngutixo ukuba nitandane: 
1Thessalonians4:10 ewe okunene niyakwenza kwa kona ngakubo bonke abazalwana abakuyo yonke i‐Masedoniya. Kodwa siyanikunga, bazalwana! ukuba nikolise ukwanda ngakumbi;" 
1Thessalonians4:11 nokuba nizamele ukuba sekuzoleni, nokuyenza eyenu imicimbi, nokusebenza ngezenu izandla, njengoko saniyalelayo:" 
1Thessalonians4:12 ukuze nihambe ngokufanelekileyo ngakubo abapandle, niti kanjalo ningabi nakuswela luto." 
1Thessalonians4:13 KODWA anditandi ukuba nibe ningenakwazi, bazalwana! ngabo balele kukufa, ukuze ningabi lusizi, njengokuba benjalo nabanye abangenalo itemba." 
1Thessalonians4:14 Ngokuba sakukolwa ukuba u‐Yesu wafa wabuya wavuka, kwa njalo abo balala kukufa ngaye u‐Yesu utixo wobazisa kunye naye." 
1Thessalonians4:15 Ngokuba oko sikutsho kuni elizwini lenkosi, ukuba tina bahleliyo abo basalela ekufikeni kwenkosi asisayi kupangela abo balala kukufa:" 
1Thessalonians4:16 kuba yona inkosi ngokwayo iya kuhla ezulwini ngendanduluko, ngelizwi lengelosi enkulu, nangexilongo likatixo, bati abafileyo ku‐Kristu bavuke tanci;" 
1Thessalonians4:17 sandule ukuti tina bahleliyo abo baseleyo sisuselwe kwa kunye nabo emafini ukuya kukaulela inkosi esibakabakeni; nangokunjalo siya kubako nenkosi ngamaxesha onke. 
1Thessalonians4:18 Ize niti ngoko nonwabisane ngalamazwi. 
1Thessalonians5:1 Kodwa amaxesha namatuba, bazalwana! aninakuswela ukuba kuba̔lwe kuni ngawo." 
1Thessalonians5:2 Ngokuba nikolisa ukwazi ngokwenu ukuba wona umhla wenkosi uyenje njalo ukuza njengesela ebusuku. 
1Thessalonians5:3 Ngokuba xeshekweni baya kuti: Kuko uxolo nokunqaba; iti oko ibafikele imbujiswa ngokwalama, njengokuba inimba ifik ela umfazi omitiyo; baye bengayi kusinda nakanye." 
1Thessalonians5:4 Kodwa nina, bazalwana! anisebumnyameni, ukuze umhla lowo unibaqe njengesela." 
1Thessalonians5:5 Nina nonke nilusapo lwokukanya, nilusapo lwemini: tina asingabobusuku, asingabobumnyama kanjako." 
1Thessalonians5:6 Ngako ke masingalali butongo, njengokuba besenje njalo nabanye; masiti silinde siqabuke." 
1Thessalonians5:7 Ngokuba abo balalayo belala ebusuku; nabo banxilayo benxila ebusuku. 
1Thessalonians5:8 Kodwa tina singabemini nje, masiqabuke, sisambete isigcinisifuba sokolo notando, netemba losindiswa libe ngumnqwazi:" 
1Thessalonians5:9 kuba utixo engasimiselanga umsindo, koko wasimis ela ukuzuza usindiswa ngayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu," 
1Thessalonians5:10 owasifelayo, ukuze ke, nokuba kuti sivuke, nokuba kuti silale, sidle ubomi kwa kunye naye." 
1Thessalonians5:11 Ngako oko yonwabisanani, nimisane, kwa njengokuba nisenje njalo." 
1Thessalonians5:12 KEKALOKU siyanitandaza, bazalwana! ukuba nibazi abo basebenzayo pakati kwenu, abanipatayo enkosini, abanilulekayo;" 
1Thessalonians5:13 nokuba nibabuke kakulu ngakumbi elutandweni ngenxa yomsebenzi wabo. Yibani nokuxolana pakati kwenu. 
1Thessalonians5:14 Kanjako siyaniyala, bazalwana! lulekani ababugaxagaxa, tutuzelani abantliziyo zinokudana, xasani abo babutataka, yibani nokuzeka kade kubo bonke." 
1Thessalonians5:15 Lumkani ukuba kungabiko mntu opindezelayo kwomnye ngobubi ngenxa yobubi; niti ngamaxesha onkemiputume oko kulungileyo, kwa omnye ngakwomnye, nangakubo bonke abantu." 
1Thessalonians5:16 Vuyani ngamaxesha onke. 
1Thessalonians5:17 Tandazani ningayeki. 
1Thessalonians5:18 Bulelani ezintweni zonke: ngokuba oku kuyintando katixo ku‐Kristu Yesu ngakuni. 
1Thessalonians5:19 Ningacimi umoya. 
1Thessalonians5:20 Ningadeli iziprofitesho. 
1Thessalonians5:21 Lingani izinto zonke; bambani leyo ilungileye. 
1Thessalonians5:22 Zilani zonke intlobo zenkohlakalo. 
1Thessalonians5:23 Kekaloku yena utixo woxolo ngokwake wanga anganingcwalisa isiqu sipela: ewe umoya nompefumlo nomzimba wenu wonke upela maugcinwe ube ungenatyala ekufikeni kwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu. 
1Thessalonians5:24 Unyanisekile lowo unibizayo, oya kuti kanjalo akwenze." 
1Thessalonians5:25 Bazalwana! sitandazeleni. 
1Thessalonians5:26 Bulisani bonke abazalwana ngokwanga okungcwele. 
1Thessalonians5:27 Ndiyanifungisa inkosi ukuba lencwadi ileseshwe kubo bonke abazalwana abangcwele. 
1Thessalonians5:28 Ufefe lwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu malube nani. Amene. 
2Thessalonians1:1 UPAULUSI, no‐Silivane, no‐Timote, kwiṙemente yama‐Tesalonika e kutixo ubawo wetu nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu:" 
2Thessalonians1:2 Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye utixo ubawo wetu, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians1:3 Sifanelwe kukubulela kutixo ngamaxesha onke ngenxa yenu, bazalwana! njengokuba kufanelekile, ukuba ukolo lwenu lukula kakulu, nokuba utando lwomnye nomnye wenu nonke omnye ngakwomnye lukolisa ukwanda;" 
2Thessalonians1:4 side tina ngokwetu siqa̔yise ngani eziṙementeni zikatixo, ngenxa yomonde wenu nokolo kuzo zonke intshutshiso zenu nemibandezelo eniyinyamezelayo:" 
2Thessalonians1:5 oku sisiboniso sokugweba okulungileyo kukatixo, nize nibalwe ukuba nifanele ubukumkani bukatixo, enivayo intlungu ngenxa yabo kanjalo;" 
2Thessalonians1:6 ukuba ke kulungile pambi kwotixo ukuvuza abo banibandezelayo ngembandezelo," 
2Thessalonians1:7 nani nina enibandezelwayo ngokupumla ndawonye nati, ekutyilweni kwenkosi u‐Yesu ivela ezulwini ndawonye nengelosi zamandla ayo" 
2Thessalonians1:8 emlilweni odangazelayo, isenza impindezelo kubo abangamaziyo utixo, nakubo abangalulameli ivangeli yenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu:" 
2Thessalonians1:9 aboti ukubetwa kwabo, boba nembujiswa engunapakade, bekude ebusweni benkosi, nasebungcwaliseni bobomelelo bayo;" 
2Thessalonians1:10 okuya iya kufika ukuza kwenzelwa ubungcwalisa kubangcwele bayo, nokutelwa nqa kubo bonke abakolwayo, (kuba bekukolwa kuko ukunqina kwetu kuni,) emhleni lowo." 
2Thessalonians1:11 Esiti ngako sitandaze kanjalo ngamaxesha onke ngenxa yenu, ukuba utixo wetu anibale ukuba nifanele ubizwa lwenu, nokuba azalisekise konke ukukolisa kwokulunga nomsebenzi wokolo ngamandla;" 
2Thessalonians1:12 ukuze igama lenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu lenzelwe ubungcwalisa kuni, niti nani nenzelwe ubungcwalisa kuye, ngokwofefe lwake utixo wetu nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:1 KEKALOKU siyanitandaza, bazalwana! pezu kwokufika kwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, nokuhlanganisana kwetu kuye," 
2Thessalonians2:2 ukuba ningashukunyiswa kamsinya ekuqondeni kwenu, ningabi navuso kanjako, nangawo umoya, nangalo ilizwi, nangayo incwadi, njengokungati ivela kuti, njengeyokuti seukufupi umhla ka‐Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:3 Makungabiko mntu onilukuhlayo nganye indawo: kuba umhla lowo ungayi kuza, xeshekweni kungeziyo upambuko tanci, aze atyilwe umntu wesono, unyana wentshabalalo;" 
2Thessalonians2:4 lowo umelayo, ozipakamisa pezulu pezu kwako konke oku‐kutiwa ngutixo umhlaumbi yinto yokubedeshwa, ade ati njengotixo ahlale pantsi etempileni katixo, ezibonakalisa ukuba u ngutixo." 
2Thessalonians2:5 Anikumbuli na ukuba, nxa bendiseko kuni, ndandinixelela ezizinto?" 
2Thessalonians2:6 Nakaloku oko kubambayo niyakwazi, ukuze kutyilwe yena kwelake ixesha." 
2Thessalonians2:7 Ngokuba yona imfihlakalo yokukohlakala isel’ isebenza: kuko kodwa obambayo ngoku ade asuswe endleleni. 
2Thessalonians2:8 Waeya kwandula oko atyilwe okohlakeleyo lowo, oyena iya kuti inkosi imgqibele ngomoya womlomo wayo, imtshabalalise ngokukazimla kwokufika kwayo;" 
2Thessalonians2:9 okufika kungokwokusebenza kuka‐Satane kuwo onke amandla nemiqondiso nemimangaliso yobuxoki," 
2Thessalonians2:10 nakuyo yonke inkohliso yokungalungi kubo abo babubayo: ngenxa yokuba bengalwamkelanga utando lwenyaniso ukuze basindiswe. 
2Thessalonians2:11 Nangenxa yoku utixo wobatumela ukusebenza kwolahlekiso, ukuze bakolwe lulwimi:" 
2Thessalonians2:12 ukuba bagwetywe bonke abati abakolwa yinyaniso, batanda ukungalungi kanti." 
2Thessalonians2:13 Kodwa tina sifanelwe kukubulela kutixo ngamaxesha onke ngenxa yenu, bazalwana abatandiweyo yinkosi! ukuba utixo kwa sekuqalekeni waniqashela ukusindiswa ngokungcwalisa kwomoya nangenkolo enyanisweni;" 
2Thessalonians2:14 anibizileyo kuko ngayo ivangeli yetu, kube kukuzuzwa kwobungcwalisa benkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu." 
2Thessalonians2:15 Ngako ke, bazalwana! yimani niqine, nizibambe izinikelwa enanifundiswa zona, nokuba bekungalo ilizwi, nokuba bekungayo incwadi yetu." 
2Thessalonians2:16 Kodwa yona ngokwayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, naye utixo nobawo wetu, owasitandayo, wa si nika ulwonwabiso olungunapakade netemba elilungileyo ngofefe," 
2Thessalonians2:17 wanga angonwabisa intliziyo zenu, aniqinise kuwo onke amazwi nezenzo ezilungileyo." 
2Thessalonians3:1 OKO kuseleyo, bazalwana! sitandazeleni, ukuba ilizwi lenkosi libe nokuhamba nokudunyiswa, njengokuba linjalo nakuni;" 
2Thessalonians3:2 nokuba sihlangulwe ebantwini abasangeneyo abakohlakeleyo; ngokuba ukolo lungenabo bonke. 
2Thessalonians3:3 Kodwa inyanisekile inkosi, eya kuniqinisa, i ni gcine kuyo inkohlakalo." 
2Thessalonians3:4 Ewe siyatembela enkosini pezu kwenu, ukuba izinto esiniyalelayo ngazo niyazenza, nokuba niya kuzenza kanjalo." 
2Thessalonians3:5 Kodwa yona inkosi yanga ingazikapela intliziyo zenu elutandweni lukatixo, nasemondeni ka‐Kristu." 
2Thessalonians3:6 Kekaloku siyaniyalela, bazalwana! egameni lenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, ukuba nizishenxise kubo bonke abazalwana behamba ngobugaxagaxa, benga hambi ngokwesinikelwa abasamkelayo kuti." 
2Thessalonians3:7 Ngokuba ngokwenu nisazi ukuba nifanele ukuti nina ukusilandela: kuba sasingahlali ngobugaxagaxa pakati kwenu; 
2Thessalonians3:8 asadla isonka kumntu ngesisa kanjako, bekusekuzameni nasekudinisweni, sisebenza ubusuku nemini nje, size singabi bunzima kumntu wakuni:" 
2Thessalonians3:9 kungekukuba singenalo igunya, kukukuba sizenze umzekelo kuni, nize nisilandele." 
2Thessalonians3:10 Ngokuba naxeshekweni sibe sinani, sasiniyalela kwa lento yokuti, ukuba kuko ongatandi ukusebenza, makangadli kanjako." 
2Thessalonians3:11 Ngokuba sisiva ukuba bako inxenye behamba pakati kwenu ngobugaxagaxa, bengasebenzi luto, koko bezifaka ezintweni ezingezezabo." 
2Thessalonians3:12 Kekaloku abo banjalo siyabayalela sibakunge ngayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, ukuba basebenze benokuti tu, badle esabo isonka." 
2Thessalonians3:13 Kodwa nina, bazalwana! maningadinwa kukwenza okulungileyo." 
2Thessalonians3:14 Kodwa ukuba kuko umntu ongevayo ilizwi letu ngayo lencwadi, gqalani lomntu, ningakolani naye, ukuze enzelwe intloni." 
2Thessalonians3:15 Kanti ninga m bali ukuba ulutshaba, niti ni m luleke njengomzalwana." 
2Thessalonians3:16 Kekaloku inkosi yoxolo ngokwayo yanga inganinika uxolo futi ngendawo zonke. Inkosi maibe nani nonke. 
2Thessalonians3:17 Umbuliso wam Paulusi ngesam isandla, okungumqondiso kuzo zonke incwadi: kunjalo ukubala kwam." 
2Thessalonians3:18 Ufefe lw e nkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu malube nani nonke. Amene. 
1Timothy1:1 UPAULUSI, umpostile ka‐Yesu Kristu, ngokwomyolelo katixo umsidisi wetu nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu itemba letu," 
1Timothy1:2 kuye u‐Timote, owam umntwana wenyaniso elukolweni: Ufefe, ububele, n oxolo, luvela kuye utixo ubawo wetu, no‐Kristu Yesu inkosi yetu." 
1Timothy1:3 Njengokuba ndabendikukunga ukuba uman’ ukuhlala e‐Efese, nxa bendihambela e‐Masedoniya, ukuze uyalele abatile ukuba mabangafundisi ufundiso olulumbi," 
1Timothy1:4 nokuba mabanganyamekeli intsomi neziba̔lelwa zokuzalwa ezingenangqibo, eziti ezonto zizuzise imibuzo ngapezu kwokuba zizuzise ukumisa kukatixo okuselukolweni, ndiyenje njalo nakaloku." 
1Timothy1:5 Kodwa isipelo sesiyalelo silutando luvela kwintliziyo ecocekileyo, nakwisazeliso esilungileyo, nakwinkolo engazenzisiyo;" 
1Timothy1:6 abate inxenye beposene nazo batyekela ekutetateteni okungendawo," 
1Timothy1:7 befuna ukuba ngabafundisi bomteto, bengaqondi noko kwa nezonto bazitshoyo, nezonto baqinisa ukutshoza ngazo." 
1Timothy1:8 Siyazi kodwa ukuba umteto ulungile, xeshekweni umntu awupatayo ngokwomteto;" 
1Timothy1:9 sikwazi nje oku, okokuba umteto awudalelwa umntu olungileyo, koko udal elwa abalahlimteto nabangenakululamela, abangabedeshiyo naboni, abangenabungcwele nabaginwa, ababeti boyise nababeti bonina, ababulali babantu," 
1Timothy1:10 abapimisi, abalala namadoda, abeba̔yo abantu, amaxoki, abaxokisa ukufunga, nokuba kuko into yimbi epambana nofundiso oluyinene;" 
1Timothy1:11 njengokwevangeli yobungcwalisa botixo osikelelweyo, endapatiswayo yona mna." 
1Timothy1:12 Kanjalo ndiyabulela kulowo wandomelezayo, u‐Kristu Yesu inkosi yetu, ukuba wandibala ukuba ndinyanisekile, endimisele ubukonzi obu nje;" 
1Timothy1:13 endibe ndifudula ndingumgxeki, nomtshutshisi, nombandezeli: kuloko ndamkelayo ububele, kuba ndakwenza ngokungazi ndisekungakolweni;" 
1Timothy1:14 ewe ufefe lwenkosi yetu lwaba luninzi ngento egqitisileyo ndawonye nokolo notando olukuye u‐Kristu Yesu. 
1Timothy1:15 Linyanisekile elilizwi, lifanele konke ukwamkelwa kanjako, lokuba u‐Kristu Yesu weza elizweni ukuza kusindisa aboni; endingomkulu kubo bonke mna." 
1Timothy1:16 Kuloko ngenxa yoku ndabamkela ububele, ukuze kwa kum ndingomkulu nje u‐Yesu Kristu abonakalise konke ukuzeka kade kwake, ukubenzela umlinganiso abo baya kukolwa kuye kube bubomi obungunapakade." 
1Timothy1:17 Kekaloku kukumkani wobunapakade, kongonakaliyo, kongabonekiyo, kokupela kwolumkileyo utixo, makubeko udumo nobungcwalisa kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene." 
1Timothy1:18 Esi isiyalelo ndiyasibekela kuwe, nyana Timote! njengokweziprofitesho ezandulisayo ngawe, ukuba uyenze ngazo leyo mfazwe ilungileyo;" 
1Timothy1:19 unenkolo nje, nesazeliso esilungileyo; abate inxenye besilahlile nje badaka ngalo ukolo:" 
1Timothy1:20 abangabakubo u‐Himeneyo no‐Aletsandere, endabanikelayo ku‐Satane, ukuze bafundiswe ngokwohlwaywa ukuba bangagxeki." 
1Timothy2:1 NDITI ke okwokuqala ndiyale ukuba kwenziwe izikungo, imitandazo, izitaṙuziso, n emibulelo, ngenxa yabantu bonke;" 
1Timothy2:2 ngenxa yabo okumkani nabo bonke abasebukosini; ukuze sihlale ngokuhlala okuxolileyo nokuzolileyo kubo bonke ububedesho nokuzibeka. 
1Timothy2:3 Ngokuba oku kulungile, kukolekile ebusweni bomsindisi wetu utixo kanjako;" 
1Timothy2:4 otandayo ukuba bonke abantu basindiswe, nokuba beze ekwaziweni kwenyaniso." 
1Timothy2:5 Ngokuba kuko utixo emnye; kuko kanjalo umlamli emnye pakati kwotixo nabantu, umntu u‐Kristu Yesu," 
1Timothy2:6 owazinikayo ukuba yintlaulelo ngenxa yabantu bonke, — okusisinqi̔no sokunqi̔nelwa kwawaso amaxesha;" 
1Timothy2:7 endite mna ndamiselwa sona ukuba ngumshumayeli nompostile, (ndiyateta inyaniso ku‐Kristu, andixoki,) umfundisi wabaheyideni elukolweni nasenyanisweni." 
1Timothy2:8 Ndinga ke angati wona amadoda atandaze kuzo zonke indawo, epakamisa izandla ezingcwele, engenakuqumba nokupikisana:" 
1Timothy2:9 ngokunjalo ndinga bangati nabo abafazi bazihombe ngokuvata okufanelekileyo, benentloni nobutelekelelo; kungabi ngempote, umhlaumbi ngegolide, umhlaumbi ngeperule, umhlaumbi ngezivato ezixabiso likulu," 
1Timothy2:10 kuti, — okufaneleyo abafazi bexela ukuba bayabedesha utixo, kube ngayo imisebenzi elungileyo." 
1Timothy2:11 Makati umlazi ngokuti tu afunde ngolulamelo lwonke. 
1Timothy2:12 Kodwa andivumeli umfazi ukuba afundise, nokuba abe namandla pezu kwendoda, nditi makabe nokuti tu." 
1Timothy2:13 Ngokuba u‐Adame ebedalwe kuqala, wandul’ ukudalwa u‐Eva kamva." 
1Timothy2:14 Kanjako u‐Adame ebengakohliswanga, kodwa umfazi ekohlisiwe nje wangena esigqitweni." 
1Timothy2:15 Noko uya kusindiswa ngokuzalwa kwomntwana, xeshekweni bahlalayo elukolweni, naselutandweni, nasebungcweleni, ndawonye nobutelekelelo." 
1Timothy3:1 LINYANISEKILE elilizwi: Ukuba umntu uyanqwenela ubusebenzi bomlindi, uyakanuka umsebenzi olungileyo." 
1Timothy3:2 Kekaloku ongumlindi ufanele ukuba abe ngongenakukalazelwa, abe yindoda yomfazi mnye, abe yinca̔tu, abe nobutelekelelo, abe nokumila okufanelekileyo, abe ngumbuki wabasemzini, abe elungele ukufundisa;" 
1Timothy3:3 angabi ngohlala kade pezu kweveyine, angabi ngumbeti, angabi ngonxamela inzuzo embi, abe enokutamba, engangxoli, engatandi imali," 
1Timothy3:4 epata kakuhle eyake indlu, enabantwana bake besekululameleni ndawonye nokuzibeka konke;" 
1Timothy3:5 (kodwa ukuba umntu akazi ukuyipata eyake indlu, woti nina ukuyigcina iṙemente katixo?)" 
1Timothy3:6 angabi ngosandula ukugqoboka, hleze ati ekukumele lir̔atshi eyele ekugwetyweni kuka‐Satane." 
1Timothy3:7 Ufanele ukuti nakanjako abe nobunqi̔na obuhle buvela kubo abapandle, ukuze angeyeli ekutukweni nasemgibeni ka‐Satane." 
1Timothy3:8 Ngokunjalo mabati abakonzi babe nokuzibeka, bangabi namilomo mibini, bangazilahleli kwiveyine eninzi, banganxameli inzuzo embi;" 
1Timothy3:9 bebamba imfihlakalo yokolo ngesazeliso esicocekileyo. 
1Timothy3:10 Nabo aba ke mabalingwe kuqala; bandule oko benze umsebenzi wabakonzi, ukuba abanikwa tyala lanto." 
1Timothy3:11 Ngokunjalo mabati abafazi babe nokuzibeka, bengengabancetezi, benobunca̔tu, benyanisekile ezintweni zonke." 
1Timothy3:12 Abakonzi mababe ngamadoda omfazi mnye, bepata kakuhle ababo abantwana nezabo izindlu." 
1Timothy3:13 Ngokuba abo balungisileyo ukwenza umsebenzi wabakonzi bezizuzela isimo esilungileyo, nenkalipo enkulu elukolweni olukuye u‐Kristu Yesu." 
1Timothy3:14 Ezizinto ndiyaziba̔la kuwe, nditemba nje ukuza kuwe kamsinyane;" 
1Timothy3:15 kodwa ukuba ndiyalibala kade, ukuze wazi ukuba ufanele ukuti nina ukuzipata endlwini katixo, eti yona iyiṙemente katixo ohleliyo, intsika nesiza senyaniso." 
1Timothy3:16 Nangapandle kwokupikwa inkulu imfihlakalo yobubedesho: utixo wabonakaliswa enyameni, wagwetyelwa emoyeni, wabonwa zingelosi, washunyayelwa pakati kwabaheyideni, kwakolwa kuye elizweni, wenyuselwa pezulu ebungcwaliseni." 
1Timothy4:1 KODWA umoya utsho kwa sekuhleni ukuti, kuya kupambuka inxenye emaxesheni asemva elukolweni, benyamekela omoya abalahlekisayo, nemfundiso zedemoni," 
1Timothy4:2 ngobuhanahaniso babatet’ ubuxoki, abanesabo isazeliso sitshiselwe," 
1Timothy4:3 besalela ukuba kutshatwe, bexela ukuba kuzilwe izinto zokudla, ate utixo wazidalela abo bakolwayo nabayaziyo inyaniso ukuba batabate kuzo ngombulelo." 
1Timothy4:4 Kuba zonke izidalwa zikatixo zilungile, kungeko nto kanjalo efanel’ ukulahlwa, ukuba iyamkelwa ngombulelo;" 
1Timothy4:5 ngokuba isenzwa ngcwele ngalo ilizwi likatixo notaṙuziso. 
1Timothy4:6 Ukuba ezizinto uyazibeka pambi kwabo abazalwana, uya kuba ngumkonzi olungileyo ka‐Yesu Kristu, usondlelwa emazwini okolo, nawolofundiso olungileyo ululandeleyo." 
1Timothy4:7 Kodwa intsomi ezingengcwele ezibuxegokaziṙa zale; uz’ uti ke wena uziqelisele ububedesho. 
1Timothy4:8 Ngokuba ukuqeliswa kwomzimba kunceda ngokuncinane; kodwa ububedesho bunceda ngenxa zonke, ekubeni bunaso isitembiso sobubomi bakaloku nje, nesobo buza kubako." 
1Timothy4:9 Linyanisekile elilizwi, lifanele konke ukwamkelwa kanjako." 
1Timothy4:10 Ngokuba kona oku sikusebenzela sikutukelwa nokukutukelwa, kuba sitembile kutixo ohleliyo, ongumsindisi wabo bonke abantu, engulowo kakulu ke wamakolwa." 
1Timothy4:11 Yalelani ngezizinto uzifundise. 
1Timothy4:12 Makungabiko mntu obudela ubutsha bako, uti ube ngumzekelo kuwo amakolwa, ekuteteni, ekumileni, elutandweni, emoyeni, enkolweni, ebucocweni." 
1Timothy4:13 Yiti, ndide ndifike, uzibekisele ukulesesha, ukuyala, ukufundisa." 
1Timothy4:14 Uze ungabi ungakataleli isipiwo esikuwe, owabunikwa sona ngabo ubuprofitesho ndawonye nokubekwa kwezandla zentlanganiso zabadala." 
1Timothy4:15 Cingela ezizinto; hlala ukuzo; ukuze ukuhanjiswa kwako kube kubonakala kubo bonke. 
1Timothy4:16 Zigqale wena nokufundisa kwako; uman’ ukuma kuzo: ngokuba oku ukwenza nje, uya kuti nawe uzisindise nabo abakuvayo." 
1Timothy5:1 INDODA endala ungayitetisi ngobukali, uti uyiyale njengoyihlo; amatsha njengabaninawe;" 
1Timothy5:2 amankazana amadala njengonyoko; amatsha njengodade, ebucocweni bonke." 
1Timothy5:3 Beka abahlolokazi abangabahlolokazi ngenene. 
1Timothy5:4 Ukuba kodwa kuko umhlolokazi onabo abantwana umhlaumbi abazukulwana, mabafunde kuqala ukwenza ngobubedesho kokwabo, babuyisele abazali babo: ngokuba oku kulungile, kukolekile ebusweni bukatixo kanjako." 
1Timothy5:5 Kodwa uti lowo ungumhlolokazi ngenene, oshiyiwe yedwa, atembe kutixo, aman’ ukuhlala ekukungeni nasekutandazeni ebusuku nasemini:" 
1Timothy5:6 kanti lowo upila ngobuyolo, ufile nxa ahleliyo." 
1Timothy5:7 Nezizinto yalela ngazo, ukuze babe bengenakukalazelwa." 
1Timothy5:8 Ukuba kodwa kuko umntu ongabazaleleli abake, nakakulu ke abendlu yake, ulukanyele ukolo, umbi kongakolwayo kanjalo." 
1Timothy5:9 Makungabalelwa abe ngumhlolokazi opantsi kweminyaka emashumi matandatu ubudala bake, umfazi wendoda nye," 
1Timothy5:10 enqi̔nelwa kakuhle ngemisebenzi elungileyo: ukuba wabondla abantwana, ukuba wabamkela endlwini abasemzini, ukuba wazihlamba inyawo zabangcwele, ukuba wabasiza ababandezelweyo, ukuba wati nama ukulandela yonke imisebenzi elungileyo." 
1Timothy5:11 Kodwa abahlolokazi abatsha bale; ngokuba okuya bavukele u‐Kristu ngobutshinitshini befuna ukwenda," 
1Timothy5:12 benokugwetywa, kuba ukolo lwabo lwokuqala belulahlile." 
1Timothy5:13 Bati kanjalo kunye noko bafunde ukuba ngamavila, behambahamba kwizindlu ngezindlu; bengengamavila ke kodwa, koko kanjako bengamaṙoboṙobo nabazifakayo ezintweni zabanye, beteta izinto ezingafanelekileyo." 
1Timothy5:14 Ndinga bangati ngoko abahlolokazi abatsha bende, bazale abantwana, bapate indlu, bangavuleli umalane ituba lokutuka." 
1Timothy5:15 Ngokuba bese betyekile inxenye ukuya emva kwo‐Satane. 
1Timothy5:16 Ukuba kuko ikolwa umhlaumbi ikolwakazi elinabo abahlolokazi, malibasize, ize ingatwaliswa iṙemente, ukuze ibasize abo bangabahlolokazi ngenene." 
1Timothy5:17 Mabati abadala abapatayo kakuhle babalwe ukuba bafanele imbeko epindiweyo, kube ngabo kakulu ke abasebe, nzayo elizwini naselufundisweni." 
1Timothy5:18 Ngokuba sisitsho isiba̔lo ukuti: Inkabi yakubu̔la akukuyifaka umkala; nokuti: Umsebenzi ufanele umvuzo wake. 
1Timothy5:19 Ungakwamkeli ngakuye ongumdala ukunikwa kwetyala, ngapandle kwokuba kungomlomo wamanqi̔na amabini umhlaumbi amatatu." 
1Timothy5:20 Abo bonayo bohlwaye ebusweni babo bonke, ukuze abanye nabo babe nokwoyika." 
1Timothy5:21 Ndiya ku yala kunene pambi kwake utixo, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu, nengelosi ezinyuliweyo, ukuba uzibambe ezizinto ungenakugweba pambili, ungenzi luto ngokuketa abantu." 
1Timothy5:22 Unganxami ukubeka izandla emntwini; kanjako ungabi nabudlelana nezono zabanye abantu. Zigcine ucokisekile. 
1Timothy5:23 Ungabi sengumseli wamanzi, uti upuze intwana yeveyine ngenxa yesisu sako nezilwelwe zako ezifuti." 
1Timothy5:24 Izono zabanye abantu ziyabonakala kwa sekuhleni, zi b andulela ukuya ekugwebeni; nabanye kambe ziyabalandela ngasemva." 
1Timothy5:25 Ngokunjalo nayo imisebenzi elungileyo yabanye iyabonakala ekuhleni; naleyo ingenjalo ayingefihleke. 
1Timothy6:1 MABATI abo basukuba bengamakonza ngapantsi kweyokwe babalele abazo inkosi ukuba zifanele imbeko yonke, ukuze kungagxekwa igama likatixo nofundiso lwake." 
1Timothy6:2 Kanjako abo banazo inkosi ezikolwayo, mabanga zi deli, kuba zingabazalwana; koko mabati ngakumbi ba zi konze, kuba bengamakolwa nabatandwa abo balwamkelayo uncedo lwesenzelelo sabo. Uti ezizinto uzifundise uziyale." 
1Timothy6:3 Ukuba kuko umntu ongumfundisi wofundiso olulumbi, oti kanjako angavumeli amazwi anobomi, a wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, nofundiso oluyelelana nobubedesho," 
1Timothy6:4 ukukumele lir̔atshi, engazi luto kakulu noko, koko egeza ngemibuzo nezipikisano ngamazwi, okuvela kuzo umona, ipike, ingxeko, iziṙano ezikohlakeleyo," 
1Timothy6:5 ingxolisano ezigwenxa zabantu abaluvo lwonakeleyo, abalahlekene nenyaniso kanjalo, beba ububedesho buyinzuzo. Gwegweda kubo abanjalo." 
1Timothy6:6 Kodwa ububedesho ndawonye nokutomalala buyinzuzo enkulu. 
1Timothy6:7 Ngokuba singangenanga nanto elizweni; kusekuhleni ukuba kanjako asingepume nanto. 
1Timothy6:8 Kodwa sakuba sinezinto zokutya nezokwambata, masitomalale zizo ezi." 
1Timothy6:9 Kodwa abo banga bangaba zizityebi bayeyela ekulingweni, nasemgibeni, nasezinkanukweni ezininzi ezibudenge ezenzakalisayo, eziti ke zona zibantywilise abantu embujisweni nasentshabalalweni." 
1Timothy6:10 Ngokuba ukutanda imali kuyingcambo yabo bonke ububi; abate inxenye beyinqwenela balahleka kulo ukolo, bazibadluza ngentsizi ezininzi." 
1Timothy6:11 Wena kodwa, ndoda katixo! baleka ezizinto; uze uputume ubulungisa, ububedesho, ukolo, utando, umonde, ululamo." 
1Timothy6:12 Yilwa ukulwa okulungileyo kwokolo; bubambe ubomi obungunapakade, owabubizelwa kubo kanjalo, wayivuma imvumo elungileyo pambi kwamanqi̔na amaninzi." 
1Timothy6:13 Ndiyakuyala ebusweni bukatixo ozipilisayo izinto zonke, na sebusweni buka‐Kristu Yesu, owayinqi̔nayo pambi kwo‐Pontiyusi Pilati imvumo elungileyo," 
1Timothy6:14 ukuba uwugcine umyalelo ube ungenabala, ungenakukalazelwa, kude kubeko ukubonakala kwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu;" 
1Timothy6:15 aya kubonakalisa kona kwawake amaxesha, lowo ungosikelelweyo nongokupela kwosomandla, onguye ukumkani kakumkani nenkosi kankosi;" 
1Timothy6:16 ongokupela kwonokungafi, ehleli ekukanyeni okungenakusondelwa, ekungeko namnye umntu owambonayo, ekungeko ongambonayo kanjako: okuye makubeko udumo namandla angunapakade. Amene." 
1Timothy6:17 Abazityebi kwelilizwe lakaloku nje bayalele ukuba bangaqanqalazi, bangatembi ebutyebini obungenakuqina kanjako, bati batembe kutixo ohleliyo, osinikayo ngobuninzi zonke izinto kudliwe ukuyola ngazo;" 
1Timothy6:18 ukuba benze ngobubele, batyebe emisebenzini elungileyo, banxamele ukwahlulahlula, batande ukwabela;" 
1Timothy6:19 beziqwebela umsekelo olungileyo bekangela ixesha elizayo, ukuze babambe ubomi obungunapakade." 
1Timothy6:20 Wa Timote! gcina oko kubekelweyo kuwe, ukupepa nje ukubadaza okungengcwele nokuca̔sa kwokwazi okubizwa njalo ngobuxoki;" 
1Timothy6:21 abate inxenye bexela ukuba banako baposisa ngalo ukolo. Ufefe malube nawe. Amene. 
2Timothy1:1 UPAULUSI, umpostile ka‐Yesu Kristu ngayo intando katixo, ngokwesitembiso sobomi obuku‐Kristu Yesu," 
2Timothy1:2 kuye u‐Timote umntwana wam otandiweyo: Ufefe, nobubele, n oxolo, luvela kuye utixo uyise, no‐Kristu Yesu inkosi yetu." 
2Timothy1:3 Ndiyabulela kutixo, endimkonzayo komakulu bam ngesazeliso esicocekileyo, ukuba singenakuyeka isikumbulo endinaso ngawe ezikungweni zam ebusuku nasemini," 
2Timothy1:4 ndilangazelela ukukubona, ndikumbulela inyembezi zako nje, ukuze ndizaliswe luvuyo;" 
2Timothy1:5 ndakuba ndikumbula ukolo olungazenzisiyo olukuwe, olona lwemayo kuqala kunyokokulu u‐Loyise, nakunyoko u‐Yunike, endikolwa kanjako ukuba lumi nakuwe." 
2Timothy1:6 Enditi ngenxa yalendawo ndikukumbuze ukuba usivuselele isipo sikatixo, esikoyo kuwe ngokubekwa kwezandla zam." 
2Timothy1:7 Ngokuba utixo engasinikanga umoya wobugwala, koko wasinika owamandla, nowotando, nowokuzikalimela." 
2Timothy1:8 Ize ngoko ungabi nantloni ngabo ubunqi̔na benkosi yetu, nangam kanjako umbanjwa wayo; uti ubuve ubunzima kunye nam ngenxa yayo ivangeli ngokwamandla katixo:" 
2Timothy1:9 owasisindisayo, wa si biza ngokubiza okungcwele, bekungengokwemisebenzi yetu, bekungokweyake imvume nofefe olwanikwa kuti ku‐Kristu Yesu engekabiko onke amaxesha akudala," 
2Timothy1:10 kodwa lubonakalisiwe kaloku ngako ukubonakala kwomsindisi wetu u‐Yesu Kristu, owatshabalalisa ukufa, wazisa ekuhleni ubomi nokungaboli ngayo ivangeli;" 
2Timothy1:11 endamiselwa yona ndibe ngumshumayeli, nompostile, nomfundisi wabaheyideni:" 
2Timothy1:12 enditi kanjalo ngenxa yalendawo ndizive ezizinto: andinantloni noko; ngokuba ndimazi lowo endibekile kuye itemba lam, ndikolwa kanjako ukuba unamandla ukugcina oko ndikubekeleyo kuye kude kube ngumhla lowo." 
2Timothy1:13 Wubambe umlinganiso wamazwi anobomi, owabuweva kum, elukolweni naselutandweni olukuye u‐Kristu Yesu." 
2Timothy1:14 Leyonto ilungileyo ebibekelwa kuwe yigcine ngaye umoya oyingcwele omiyo kuti. 
2Timothy1:15 Uyakwazi oku, okokuba bapambuka kum bonke abo base‐Asiya; abangabakubo ngu‐Figelo no‐Heremogenisi." 
2Timothy1:16 Yanga ingati inkosi inike ububele kwindlu ka‐Onesiforo; kuba futi wandonwabisa, engabanga nantloni ngawo umxokelelwane wam kanjalo:" 
2Timothy1:17 koko wati akufika e‐Roma, wandifuna ngokuku̔tala ngakumbi, wa ndi fumana." 
2Timothy1:18 Yanga inkosi inganika kuye ukuba afumane ububele kwinkosi kuwo umhla lowo: nezinto ezingakanana abekonza ngazo e‐Efese, uyazazi wena kakulu ku m." 
2Timothy2:1 WENA ngoko nyana wam! yomelezeka elufefeni olukuye u‐Kristu Yesu. 
2Timothy2:2 Nezozinto wabuziva kum ebusweni bamanqi̔na amaninzi, zona ezi zibekele kubantu abanyanisekileyo, abo ke abaya kuba namandla okufundisa nabanye." 
2Timothy2:3 Wena ngoko nyamezela ubunzima njengesodati elilungileyo lika‐Yesu Kristu. 
2Timothy2:4 Akuko mntu ekonza njengesodati oziṙintyelayo ngemicimbi yokudliwa kwobomi; ukuze akolise lowo wamqeshayo abe lisodati. 
2Timothy2:5 Naxeshekweni kanjako kulwayo umntu ezindlalweni, akafakwa isitsaba xeshekweni angalwanga ngokwomteto." 
2Timothy2:6 Umlimi osebenzayo ufanele ukwamkela kuqala kwiziqa̔mo. 
2Timothy2:7 Qonda izinto endizitshoyo: yanga ke inkosi ingakunika ingqiqo ezintweni zonke. 
2Timothy2:8 Kumbula u‐Yesu Kristu njengokuba evusiwe ekufeni, owakuyo inzalo ka‐Davide, ngokwevangeli yam:" 
2Timothy2:9 ekuyo ndibuvayo ubunzima njengomenzi wenkohlakalo kude kube zizinxibo; kodwa lona ilizwi likatixo alinxityiwe noko. 
2Timothy2:10 Ngenxa yoku zonke izinto ndiyazinyamezela ngenxa yabo abaqashwa, ukuze nabo bona baluzuze usindiswa olukuye u‐Kristu Yesu ndawonye nobungcwalisa obungunapakade." 
2Timothy2:11 Linyanisekile elilizwi: Ukuba ke safa kunye na ye, siya kubudla ubomi kunye na ye kanjako:" 
2Timothy2:12 ukuba siyanyamezela, siya kupata ubukosi kunye na ye kanjako: ukuba siya m kanyela, naye lowo wosikanyela tina:" 
2Timothy2:13 ukuba asinyanisekile tina, uyahlala enyanisekile lowo noko; akangezikanyele yena." 
2Timothy2:14 Ba kumbuze ezizinto, u ba yala kunene nje pambi kwenkosi ukuba bangapikisani ngamazwi, okungenakunceda nganto, kube kukweyeliselwa kwabevayo." 
2Timothy2:15 Nxamela ukuzimisa kutixo ubukiwe, ungumsebenzi ongadanele nto, ulungisa ukwaneka ilizwi lenyaniso." 
2Timothy2:16 Kodwa ukubadaza okungengcwele kunxweme: ngokuba beya kuhambisa ngento enkulu ngakumbi ekungabedeshini; 
2Timothy2:17 nelizwi labo liya kudla njengesiboliso: abangabakubo ngu‐Himeneyo no‐Fileto," 
2Timothy2:18 abate ngayo inyaniso baposisa, besiti ukuvuka kwabafileyo sekuhlile kade, bewisa ukolo lwenxenye kanjalo." 
2Timothy2:19 Noko ke umsekelo ote nqi katixo umi, unaso isincamatiselo esi: Inkosi iyabazi abangabayo: nakanjako: Mabemke kokungalungileyo bonke abalikankanyayo igama lika‐Kristu." 
2Timothy2:20 Kodwa endlwini enkulu aziko impahla zegolide nezesilivere zodwa, ziko ezemiti nezodongwe nazo; ezinye ke zibe zezinokubekwa, nezinye zibe zezingenakubekwa." 
2Timothy2:21 Xeshekweni ngoko umntu azihlambululayo kwezi, uya kuba yimpahla yokubekwa, yenziwe ngcwele, nenokunceda kunene kumninindlu, ilungiselwe yonke imisebenzi elungileyo." 
2Timothy2:22 Kodwa inkanuko zobutsha zibaleke; uze uputume ubulungisa, ukolo, utando, uxolano nabo babizayo kwinkosi ngentliziyo ecocekileyo." 
2Timothy2:23 Kodwa imibuzo ebudenge ebadamekileyo yale, usazi nje ukuba iyazivelisa impikiswano." 
2Timothy2:24 Kanjalo isicaka senkosi asifanele ukupika; koko sifanele ukuti sibe sinokutamba ngakubo bonke, silungele ukufundisa, sinyamezela ububi," 
2Timothy2:25 sibaluleka ngolulamo abo babambanayo naso: ukuba umhlaumbi utixo angabanika uguquko kube kukwaziwa kwenyaniso," 
2Timothy2:26 baze babuye bavuke emgibeni ka‐Satane, bebanjiwe nje nguye ukwenza intando yake." 
2Timothy3:1 YAZI kanjalo oku, okokuba emihleni yokugqibela iya kuza kubako imihla enzima." 
2Timothy3:2 Ngokuba abantu beya kuba ngabazitandayo, abatanda imali, abazidlayo, abaqanqalazayo, abagxeki, abangevayo abazali, abangenakubulela, abangenabungcwele," 
2Timothy3:3 abangenalutando lwokuvela, abangaxoliseki, abancetezi, abangenabunca̔tu, izibovubovu, abatiya abalungileyo," 
2Timothy3:4 ingcatsha, injubaqa, abakukumele lir̔atshi, bengabatanda imihlali ngapezu kwokuba bangabatanda utixo;" 
2Timothy3:5 benaso isimilo sobubedesho, kodwa amandla abo bewakanyele: deda kubo abanjalo." 
2Timothy3:6 Ngokuba bengabakubo aba abo bakaselayo ezindlwini, batimbe amankazana azidenge, etweswe zizono, er̔olwa zinkanuko ngenkanuko," 
2Timothy3:7 emana efunda, kanti engenamandla okuza ekwaziweni kwenyaniso napakade." 
2Timothy3:8 Kekaloku njengokuba u‐Jane no‐Jambere bebemelana no‐Mosesi, kwa njalo nabo aba bayamelana nenyaniso; abantu abaluvo lwonakele kanye, bengabaliwayo ngalo ukolo." 
2Timothy3:9 Kuloko bengayi kuhambisa ngento enkulu ngakumbi; ngokuba ubugeza babo buya kubonakala kubo bonke kwa sekuhleni, njengokuba nobabo abo bebunjalo." 
2Timothy3:10 Kodwa wena ute nama ukulanda eyam imfundiso, impato, imvume, ukolo, ukuzeka kade, utando, umonde," 
2Timothy3:11 intshutshiso, intlungu; — intlungu ezinjengezo zandihlelayo e‐Antiyoki, e‐Koniyume, e‐Lisitira; intshutshiso ezinjengezo ndazinyamezelayo; kanti inkosi yandihlangula kuzo zonke." 
2Timothy3:12 Ewe, bonke abatanda ukuhlala ngobubedesho ku‐Kristu Yesu baya kutshutshiswa nabo." 
2Timothy3:13 Kodwa abantu abakohlakeleyo nabanyangi baya kuhambisela kokubi ngakumbi, bekohlisa bekohliswa nokukohliswa." 
2Timothy3:14 Wena kodwa hlala kwezonto uzifundileyo noziqiniselweyo, usazi nje lowo wazifunda kuye;" 
2Timothy3:15 nokokuba uti kutabata ebuntwaneni bako uzazile iziba̔lo ezingcwele, ezinamandla ukukwenza ulumkele usindiswa ngalo ukolo olukuye u‐Kristu Yesu." 
2Timothy3:16 Zonke iziba̔lo zinikwa ngokupefumlela kukatixo, zinceda kanjalo ukuba kufundiswe, ukuba kohlwaywe, ukuba kulungiswe, ukuba kululekwe ebulungiseni;" 
2Timothy3:17 ukuze indoda katixo ibe ifezekile, ilungiselelwe yonke imisebenzi elungileyo ngokuzalisekileyo." 
2Timothy4:1 Ndiya ku yala kunene ngoko pambi kwotixo, na pambi kwenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu, oya kugweba abahleliyo nabafileyo ekubonakaleni kwake na sekufikeni kwobukumkani bake:" 
2Timothy4:2 shumayela ilizwi; nyameka ngexesha elifanelekileyo, na ngexesha elingafanelekileyo; yohlwaya, tetisa, yala, ngako konke ukuzeka kade nokufundisa." 
2Timothy4:3 Ngokuba ixesha liya kubako okuya bangayi kunyamezela ufundiso olunobomi; koko beya kuti ngokwezabo inkanuko bazifumbele abafundisi, bebaba indlebe nje;" 
2Timothy4:4 babeya kusonga indlebe zabo kuyo inyaniso ke, baze batyekele ngasezintsomini." 
2Timothy4:5 Kodwa wena qabuka ezintweni zonke, nyamezela ubunzima, yenza umsebenzi womvangeli, kolisa ukufeza ubukonzi bako." 
2Timothy4:6 Ngokuba mna ndise ndinokutululwa, nexesha lokunduluka kwam likufupi." 
2Timothy4:7 Ukulwa okulungileyo ndikulwile, uhambo lwam ndilugqibile, ukolo ndilugcinile." 
2Timothy4:8 Okuseleyo, kuyandibekelelwa isitsaba sobulungisa, eso inkosi, umgwebi olungileyo, iya kusinika kum emhleni lowo; kungekum ke ndedwa, kukubo bonke abatandayo ukubonakala kwayo nabo." 
2Timothy4:9 NXAMELA ukuza kum kamsinya: 
2Timothy4:10 ngokuba u‐Demasi endishiyile ngokulitanda elilizwe lakaloku nje, waya e‐Tesalonika; u‐Kiresike uye e‐Galati, u‐Titusi uye e‐Dalamati." 
2Timothy4:10 ngokuba u‐Demasi endishiyile ngokulitanda elilizwe lakaloku nje, waya e‐Tesalonika; u‐Kiresike uye e‐Galati, u‐Titusi uye e‐Dalamati." 
2Timothy4:11 Ngu‐Luke yedwa okoyo nam. Tabata u‐Maraki, umzise kwa nawe: ngokuba enokunceda kunene kum ebukonzini." 
2Timothy4:11 Ngu‐Luke yedwa okoyo nam. Tabata u‐Maraki, umzise kwa nawe: ngokuba enokunceda kunene kum ebukonzini." 
2Timothy4:12 Kodwa u‐Tikikusi ndamtuma ukuya e‐Efese. 
2Timothy4:13 Longubo ndayishiyayo e‐Tirowa ku‐Karipo, yiti wakuza uwuzise nawe, kwa nazo incwadi, na ngokukodwa zona izintsu." 
2Timothy4:14 U‐Aletsandere inci̔bi yobedu wandenzela ububi obuninzi: yanga inkosi ingamvuza ngokwemisebenzi yake. 
2Timothy4:15 Oyena mlumkele nawe; ngokuba emelene namazwi etu kakulu. 
2Timothy4:16 Ngokwokuqala ukuzitetelela kwam akwabiko namnye owandivelelayo, koko bonke bandishiyayo: kwanga kungebalelwe kubo." 
2Timothy4:17 Kodwa inkosi yema ngakum, yandomeleza; ukuze intshumayelo iti ngam ikolise ukufezwa, nokuba bonke abaheyideni babe nokuva: kanjako ndahlangulwa emlonyeni wengonyama." 
2Timothy4:18 Yaiya kuti inkosi indihlangule kuyo yonke imisebenzi ekohlakeleyo, i ndi sindise ndize ebukumkanini bayo basezulwini: ekuyo makubeko ubungcwalisa kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene." 
2Timothy4:19 Bulisa u‐Pirisila no‐Akwila, nabendlu ka‐Onesiforo." 
2Timothy4:20 U‐Erastusi wasala e‐Korinte; kodwa u‐Trofimo ndamshiya e‐Milito esifa. 
2Timothy4:21 Nxamela ukuza bungekabiko ubusika. Uyakubulisa u‐Yubulo, no‐Pudena, no‐Laino, no‐Kilodiya, nabo abazalwana bonke." 
2Timothy4:22 Inkosi u‐Yesu Kristu maibe nomoya wako. Ufefe malube nani. Amene. 
Titus1:1 UPAULUSI, isicaka sikatixo, nompostile ka‐Yesu Kristu, ngokwokolo lwabaqashwa bakatixo nokwaziwa kwenyaniso eyelelana nobubedesho," 
Titus1:2 etembeni lobomi obungunapakade, owayete utixo ongenakuxoka wabubekela ngedinga engekabiko onke amaxesha akudala," 
Titus1:3 kodwa walibonakalisa kwawake amaxesha ilizwi lake ngentshumayelo, endapatiswa yona ngokwomyolelo womsindisi wetu utixo;" 
Titus1:4 kuye u‐Titusi, owam umntwana wenyaniso ngokwokolo olulolwabo bonke: Ufefe, ububele, n oxolo, luvela kuye utixo uyise, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu umsindisi wetu." 
Titus1:5 Ngenxa yalendawo ndakushiya e‐Kirete, ukuba uhambise ukuzilungisa ezonto zisaswelekileyo, ubamise abadala kuzo zonke izixeko, njengoko ndakuyalelayo:" 
Titus1:6 ukuba kuko onganikwa tyala lanto, eyindoda yomfazi mnye, enabantwana abakolwayo, bengenakunikwa tyala labubedengu, bengengabangenakululamela kanjalo." 
Titus1:7 Ngokuba ongumlindi efanele ukuba abe ngonganikwa tyala lanto, njengokuba eligosa likatixo; angabi ngonenkani, angabi ngoqumba msinya, angabi ngohlala kade pezu kweveyine, angabi ngumbeti, angabi ngonxamela inzuzo embi," 
Titus1:8 abe ngumbuki wabasemzini, umtandi wabalungileyo, enobutelekelelo, enobulungisa, enobungcwele, enobunca̔tu:" 
Titus1:9 ebambelela kwilizwi elinyanisekileyo njengokufundiswa kwake, ukuze abe namandla kwa nokuyala ngemfundiso enobomi, nokwanyela abapikayo." 
Titus1:10 Ngokuba kuko abafumana beteta nabakohlisi abaninzi abangenakululamela, abona banjalo kakulu bengabo basekwalukeni;" 
Titus1:11 abamilomo ifanele ukutiwa vingci, ekubeni baziwisayo izindlu zipela, befundisa izinto ekungafanele ukuba bazifundise, ngenxa yenzuzo embi." 
Titus1:12 Watsho umntu wakuwo, umprofite wakowawo, ukuti: Ama‐Kirete ngamaxoki futi, ngamar̔amncwa amabi, zizisu ezinqenayo." 
Titus1:13 Ubunqi̔na obu buyinene. Yiti ngenxa yelituba ubohlwaye ngobukali, ukuze babe bepilile elukolweni:" 
Titus1:14 benganyamekeli intsomi zakuma‐Juda nemiyalelo yabantu abapambukayo kwinyaniso. 
Titus1:15 Kubo abacocekileyo zonke izinto zicocekile: kodwa kubo abanco̔lisekileyo nabangakolwayo akuko nto ecocekileyo; koko kunco̔lisekile kwa noluvo lwabo nesazeliso sabo. 
Titus1:16 Bayaxela ukuba bayamazi utixo; kodwa emisebenzini yabo baya m kanyela, bengabazondekayo, nabangevayo, nangakuyo yonke imisebenzi elungileyo benokwaliwa." 
Titus2:1 WENA kodwa teta ezonto zifaneleyo ufundiso olunobomi: 
Titus2:2 ukuba amaxego abe zinca̔tu, enokuzibeka, enobutelekelelo, epilile elukolweni, elutandweni, emondeni:" 
Titus2:3 ukuba ngokunjalo amaxegokazi ati ekumileni abe njengokufanele ubungcwele, engengabancetezi, engengamakonza kwiveyine eninzi, engabafundisi bokulungileyo;" 
Titus2:4 ukuze aluleke abafazi abatsha batande amadoda abo, batande abantwana babo," 
Titus2:5 babe nobutelekelelo, babe becokisekile, babe ngabahlala endlwini, babe belungile, babe belulamela kwawabo amadoda, ukuze ilizwi likatixo lingagxekwa." 
Titus2:6 Ngokunjalo amadoda amatsha wayale ukuba enze ngokutelekelela: 
Titus2:7 uzibonakalisa ngokwako nje ngento zonke ukuba ngumlinganiselo wemisebenzi elungileyo; ubonakalisa ekufundiseni kwako okungonakaliswayo, ukuzibeka," 
Titus2:8 ukuteta okunobomi okungenakugwetywa, ukuze oca̔sayo enzelwe intloni, engenanto embi yokuteta ngani." 
Titus2:9 Amakonza wayale ukuba alulamele kwezawo inkosi, abe ezintweni zonke ekolekile kuzo, engapiki," 
Titus2:10 engashinti, koko ebonakalisa yonke inyaniseko elungileyo; ukuze aluhombe ufundiso lwomsindisi wetu utixo ezintweni zonke." 
Titus2:11 Ngokuba lubonakele ufefe lukatixo oluzisa usindiso kubo bonke abantu," 
Titus2:12 lusifundisa ukuba siti, sikanyele nje ukungabedeshi nenkanuko zasemhlabeni, sihlale ngobutelekelelo nangobulungisa nangobubedesho kwelilizwe lakaloku nje;" 
Titus2:13 silinda itemba elibutamsanqa nokubonakala kwobungcwalisa bake utixo omkulu nomsindisi wetu u‐Yesu Kristu," 
Titus2:14 owazinikela tina, ukuze asikulule kuko konke ukukohlakala, azihlambululele abantu abangabake kanye, bezondelele imisebenzi elungileyo." 
Titus2:15 Teta ezizinto, uyale, wohlwaye ngamandla onke. Makungabiko mntu okudelayo." 
Titus3:1 BAKUMBUZE ukuba balulamele kwabanobukosi nakwabanegunya, babe nokupulapula, babe belungele yonke imisebenzi elungileyo," 
Titus3:2 bangagxeki mntu, bangabi ngabangxoli, babe nokutamba, bebonakalisa ululamo lwonke ngakubo bonke abantu." 
Titus3:3 Ngokuba tina nati sibe sifudula sibudenge, singeva, silahleka, sikonza inkanuko nemihlali emininzi, sihlala elunyeni nasemoneni, sitiyeka, sitiyana." 
Titus3:4 Kodwa okuya kwabonakalayo ububele bomsindisi wetu utixo notando lwake ngasebantwini," 
Titus3:5 bekungengemisebenzi yobulungisa esayenzayo tina, bekungokwetaṙu lake wasisindisayo, ngako ukuhlamba kwokuzalwa‐kutsha nokuhlaziya kwomoya oyingcwele;" 
Titus3:6 ate wamgalela pezu kwetu ngobuninzi ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu umsindisi wetu; 
Titus3:7 ukuze ke, sigwetyelwe nje ngofefe lwake, sibe zindlalifa ngokwetemba lobomi obungunapakade." 
Titus3:8 Linyanisekile elilizwi; nezizinto ndinga ungaqinisa ukutshoza ngazo, ukuze abo bakoliweyo kutixo bakatalele ukuku̔tala emisebenzini elungileyo. Zizo ezi izinto ezilungileyo nezinokunceda ebantwini." 
Titus3:9 Kodwa imibuzo ebudenge, neziba̔lelwa zokuzalwa, namapike, nezipikisano ngawo umteto, zinxweme; ngokuba zingenakunceda, zingendawo kanjalo." 
Titus3:10 Umntu ongumahlukanisi, yiti emveni kwesesinye nesesibini isiluleko, umale;" 
Titus3:11 usazinje ukuba lowo unjalo upanjukisiwe kanye, esona nokwona, ezigweba yena ngokwake." 
Titus3:12 XESHEKWENI ndiya kumtuma kuwe u‐Aratema, umhlaumbi u‐Tikikusi, nxamela ukuza kum e‐Nikopolisi: ngokuba ndigwebile ukuba ndiya kwenza ubusika kwa lapo." 
Titus3:13 U‐Zenasi umqondisimteto, no‐Apolosi, nxamela ukubahambisa ekuhambeni kwabo, kuze kungasweleki nto kubo." 
Titus3:14 Kanjalo mabafunde nabetu ukuku̔tala emisebenzini elungileyo ngenxa yentswelo ezifanele ukubako, ukuze bangabi ngabaputileyo." 
Titus3:15 Bonke abanam bayakubulisa. Bulisa abo basitandayo elukolweni. Ufefe malube nani nonke. Amene. 
Philemon1:1 UPAULUSI, umbanjwa ka‐Kristu Yesu, no‐Timote umzalwana wetu, ku‐Filemone umtandwa wetu nomsebenzisi wetu," 
Philemon1:2 naku‐Afiya umtandwakazi wetu, naku‐Arikipo olisodati kunye nati, nakuyo iṙemente esendlwini yako:" 
Philemon1:3 Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye utixo ubawo wetu, nenkosi u‐Yesu Kristu." 
Philemon1:4 Ndiyabulela kutixo wam, ndikukankanya amaxesha onke emitandazweni yam," 
Philemon1:5 ndisiva nje utando lwako nokolo, olo unalo ngakuyo inkosi u‐Yesu, nangakubo bonke abangcwele;" 
Philemon1:6 ukuba ubudlelana bokolo lwako bube busebenza ekwaziweni kwako konke okulungileyo okukuni, busebenz ela u‐Kristu Yesu." 
Philemon1:7 Ngokuba sinalo uvuyo oluninzi nonwabiso elutandweni lwako, kuba umbilini wabangcwele upunyuziwe ngawe wena, mzalwana!" 
Philemon1:8 Ngako oko, nangona ndinalo ukalipo oluninzi ku‐Kristu lwokuba ndikuyalele oko kufanelekileyo," 
Philemon1:9 noko ngenxa yotando nditi ngokukumbi ndi ku kunge; ndingonjalo nje njengo‐Paulusi elixego, ndingumbanjwa ka‐Yesu Kristu ngoku nakanjako." 
Philemon1:10 Ndiyakukunga ngenxa yowam umntwana, endimzeleyo ekubanjweni kwam, u‐Onesimusi;" 
Philemon1:11 obefudula engancedi luto kuwe, kodwa kaloku enokunceda kunene kwa kuwe nakum;" 
Philemon1:12 endimbuyisileyo. Zuti ke wena umamkele, oko kukuti owam umbilini:" 
Philemon1:13 endibe ndifuna mna ukunga ndingambambezela apa kum, ukuze ati esikundleni sako andikonze emibanjweni yevangeli:" 
Philemon1:14 kodwa ngapandle kwokuvumela kwako ndabendingatandi ukwenza into, ukuze isenzo sako esilungileyo singabi njengokungati singokunyanzelwa, koko sibe ngokuvuma," 
Philemon1:15 ngokuba kungati umhlaumbi ngenxa yoku wemka kube lixeshana, ukuba ubuye ube naye ngonapakade;" 
Philemon1:16 engasenjengekonza, koko epezulu kwikonza, engumzalwana otandiweyo, kakulu ke kum, kodwa kangakananina ngakumbi kuwe, nasenyameni na senkosini?" 
Philemon1:17 Ukuba ngoko uyandibala ukuba likolwane, mamkele njengam." 
Philemon1:18 Ukuba kodwa ukwonile umhlaumbi unetyala kuwe ngento, yona le yibalele kum:" 
Philemon1:19 mna Paulusi ndibalile ngesam isandla, ndiya kuhlaula mna: ukuba ndingatsho kuwe ukuti unetyala lesiqu sako kum pezu kwayo." 
Philemon1:20 Ewe, mzalwana wam! mandizuze uncedo kuwe enkosini: wupumze umbilini wam enkosini." 
Philemon1:21 Nditembela ekuveni kwako nje ndiba̔lile kuwe, ndisazi ukuba uya kwenza napezulu kwoko ndikutshoyo." 
Philemon1:22 Kanjalo kunye noko ndilungisele indawo yokuhlala: ngokuba ndinetemba lokuba ndiya kupiwa kuni ngayo imitandazo yenu. 
Philemon1:23 Kuyakubulisa u‐Epafrasi, ongumbanjwa kunye nam ku‐Kristu Yesu;" 
Philemon1:24 u‐Maraki, u‐Aristariko, u‐Demasi, u‐Luke, abangabasebenzisi bam." 
Philemon1:24 u‐Maraki, u‐Aristariko, u‐Demasi, u‐Luke, abangabasebenzisi bam." 
Philemon1:25 Ufefe lwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu malube nomoya wenu. Amene. 
Hebrews1:1 NGEZAHLULO ezininzi nangendawo ezininzi etetile nje utixo kudala kubo obawo ngabo abaprofite," 
Hebrews1:2 ute kulemihla yokugqibela wateta kuti ngonyana, ammisileyo ukuba yindlalifa yezinto zonke, okungaye kanjalo wawenza amazwe akoyo:" 
Hebrews1:3 owati, eyinkazimlo yobungcwalisa bake nemfano yesiqu sake, epata nokupata zonke izinto ngelizwi lamandla ake, eyenzile ngokwake nje intlanjululwa yezono zetu, wahlala pantsi ngasekunene kwobukulukazi enyangweni yapezulu;" 
Hebrews1:4 egqitisile ngokunjalo kuzo ingelosi, njengoko alizuzileyo ngelifa igama elidluliseleyo ngapezu kwazo." 
Hebrews1:5 Ngokuba kwiyipina yazo ingelosi ebeka watsho ukuti: Ungunyana wam wena, ndikuzele namhla nje? nakanjako: Mna ndiya kuba nguyise kuye, naye woba ngunyana kum?" 
Hebrews1:6 Naxeshekweni kanjako amngenisayo umzalwa‐tanci elizweni, uti: Mazimbedeshe yena zonke ingelosi zikatixo." 
Hebrews1:7 Nangazo ingelosi uti: Owenza ingelosi zake umoya, nabakonzi bake ilangatye lomlilo." 
Hebrews1:8 Kodwa ngaye unyana kutshiwo ukuti: Iterone yako, Tixo! yohlala kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade; intonga yobukumkani bako yintonga yokulunga;" 
Hebrews1:9 utandile ubulungisa, watiya inkohlakalo; ngako oko utixo, kwa utixo wako, wakutambisa ngeoli yovuyo ngapezu kwamakolwane ako." 
Hebrews1:10 Nokuti: Wena kwa sekuqalekeni, Nkosi! wabeka ukuseka kwomhlaba: namazulu angumsebenzi wezandla zako:" 
Hebrews1:11 zotshabalala zona, kodwa wena uhlala uko; ewe zonke ziya kuguga njengengubo;" 
Hebrews1:12 wauya kuzisonga njengesivato, zaziya kuguqulwa ke: kanti wena ukwa nguwe; neminyaka yako ayisayi kupela." 
Hebrews1:13 Kodwa kwiyipina yazo ingelosi uke watsho ukuti: Hlala ngasekunene kum, ndide ndenze intshaba zako zibe sisitulo senyawo zako?" 
Hebrews1:14 Zona zonke azingomoya abakonzayo na, betunyelwa ukwenza inkonzo ngenxa yabo abaya kuzuza usindiso?" 
Hebrews2:1 Ngako oko sifanele ukuzinyamekela kakulu ngakumbi izinto esizivileyo, hleze sike sipulukane nazo." 
Hebrews2:2 Ngokuba ilizwi elibe litetwe zingelosi ukuba libe liqinisekile, nokuba konke ukugqita nokungeva kwamkela umvuzo ofanelekileyo,"
