Hebrews2:3 soti nina tina ukusinda sakuba singakataleli usindiso olukulu kangaka; olwati, lutetiwe yinkosi nje ukuqala kwalo, lwaqiniselwa kuti ngabo ba yi vayo;" 
Hebrews2:4 utixo enqi̔nelana na bo kwa ngemiqondiso, nangemimangaliso, nangezenzo zamandla ezininzi, nangezabelo zomoya oyingcwele, njengokwentando yake?" 
Hebrews2:5 NGOKUBA engalibekanga pantsi kwazo ingelosi ilizwe eliza kuza, elona siteta ngalo." 
Hebrews2:6 Kodwa omnye wanqi̔nisa endaweni etile, esiti: Uyinina umntu, lento umkumbulayo; kwa nonyana woluntu, lento umnonelelayo?" 
Hebrews2:7 wamenza abe ngapantsi kancinane kuzo ingelosi; wamvatisa ngobungcwalisa nangodumo, wammisa pezu kwemisebenzi yezandla zako:" 
Hebrews2:8 uzibekile pantsi zonke izinto ngapantsi kwenyawo zake. Ngokuba, ekubeni wazibekayo ngapantsi kwake zonke izinto, akashiya nanye ingabekwanga ngapantsi kwake. Kodwa ngoku asikaboni zonke izinto zibekiwe pantsi kwake." 
Hebrews2:9 Siyambona kodwa u‐Yesu, owenziwa abe ngapantsi kancinane kuzo ingelosi, ngenxa yobuhlungu bokufa, evatisiwe ngobungcwalisa nangodumo, ukuze ati ngofefe lukatixo abavele ukufa kwa bonke." 
Hebrews2:10 Ngokuba bekufanelekile kuye, ekungenxa yake ziko zonke izinto, nekungaye ziko zonke izinto, akuzisa onyana abaninzi ebungcwaliseni, ukuba afezekise imbangi yosindiswa lwabo ngazo intlungu." 
Hebrews2:11 Ngokuba kwa nalowo ungcwalisayo nabo bangcwaliswayo bevela kuye omnye bonke: ekungenxa yalendawo akanantloni ukubabiza ngabazalwana," 
Hebrews2:12 esiti: Ndoshumayela igama lako kubazalwana bam; pakati kwentlanganiso ndovuma amaculo kuwe. 
Hebrews2:13 Nakanjako: Ndoba nditembela kuye. Nakanjako: Bona ke mna nabantwana endibapiweyo ngutixo. 
Hebrews2:14 Ukuba ngoko bona abantwana bevela nenyama negazi, naye ngokwake kwa ngokunjalo watabata kuzo, ukuze ati ngako ukufa atshabalalise lowo unamandla okufa, oko kukuti, u‐Satane," 
Hebrews2:15 akulule abo abebete ngokwoyika ukufa babanjelwa ebukobokeni lonke ixesha lokudla kwabo ubomi. 
Hebrews2:16 Ngokuba okunene engazincedi ingelosi, koko eyinceda inzalo ka‐Abrahame." 
Hebrews2:17 Kukona abefanelwa kukuba afane nabazalwana bake ngento zonke, ukuze abe ngumperisite omkulu onofefe nonyanisekileyo ezintweni ezilunge kutixo, aze enzele izono zabantu isizi." 
Hebrews2:18 Ngokuba ekokubeni avile intlungu yena ngokwake akulingwa, angabasiza abo balingwayo." 
Hebrews3:1 NGAKO oko, bazalwana abangcwele, abalwamkeleyo ubizo lwasezulwini! gqalani lowo ungumpostile nomperisite omkulu wemvumelo yetu, u‐Kristu Yesu;" 
Hebrews3:2 obe enyanisekile kulowo wammisayo, njengokuba naye u‐Mosesi ebenjalo kuyo yonke indlu yake." 
Hebrews3:3 Ngokuba yena lo ebalelwe ukuba ufanele ubungcwalisa obukulu ngakumbi ngapezu kwo‐Mosesi, kwa njengoko anodumo olukulu kolwendlu lowo wayenzayo yona." 
Hebrews3:4 Ngokuba zonke izindlu zisenziwa ngotile; kodwa owazenzayo izinto zonke ngutixo. 
Hebrews3:5 Kanjalo u‐Mosesi okunene ebenyanisekile kuyo yonke indlu yake, njengesicaka, kube kukunqi̔nwa kwezinto eziya kutetwa;" 
Hebrews3:6 kodwa u‐Kristu, njengonyana pezu kwendlu yake; esiyiyo indlu yake tina, xeshekweni kambe ukalipo noqa̔yiselo lwetemba letu silubamba luqinisekile kude kube sekupeleni." 
Hebrews3:7 Ngoko, njengokuba esiti umoya oyingcwele, Namhla nje, nakuliva ilizwi lake," 
Hebrews3:8 maningazenzi lukuni intliziyo zenu, njengasengcapukisweni, ngomhla wokulinga entlango;" 
Hebrews3:9 okuya oyihlo benu bandilinga, bandivavanya, baza babona imisebenzi yam iminyaka yamashumi mane." 
Hebrews3:10 Ngoko bendiqumbele isizukulwana eso, ndati: Bayalahleka futi ngentliziyo; abazazanga indlela zam kanjako." 
Hebrews3:11 Ndada ndafunga emsindweni wam ukuti: Abasayi kungena ekupumleni kwam. 
Hebrews3:12 Lumkani, bazalwana! hleze kuke kubeko komnye wenu intliziyo ekohlakeleyo wokungakolwa, ekumkeni kuye utixo ohleliyo." 
Hebrews3:13 Koko yalanani imihla ngemihla, nxa kusabizwayo ngokuti ngumhla wanamhla; ukuze kungabiko mntu wakuni owenziwa lukuni ngenkohliso yesono." 
Hebrews3:14 Ngokuba singabamamkeleyo u‐Kristu, xeshekweni kambe isiqalo sokwomelela kwetu sisibambayo siqinisekile kude kube sekupeleni:" 
Hebrews3:15 ekubeni kutshiwo ukuti: Namhla nje, nakuliva ilizwi lake, maningazenzi lukuni intliziyo zenu njengasengcapukisweni." 
Hebrews3:16 Pofu bebengobanina abati bakuva bacapukisa? bebengengabo na bonke kanti abapumayo e‐Jipete ngo‐Mosesi? 
Hebrews3:17 Kanjalo bebengobanina wabaqumbelayo iminyaka yamashumi mane? bebengengabo na abonayo, abamizimba yawayo entlango?" 
Hebrews3:18 Kanjalo wafunga kobanina ukuba abayi kungena ekupumleni kwake, kupela kubo ababengevanga?" 
Hebrews3:19 Kwa njalo siyabona ukuba babekohliwe kukungena ngenxa yokungakolwa. 
Hebrews4:1 Masoyike ngoko hleze kekuti, idinga lokungena ekupumleni kwake li si shiyelwa nje, kubeko umntu wakuni onga akafikeleli kuko." 
Hebrews4:2 Ngokuba nati sishunyayeziwe indaba ezilungileyo ngako, kwa njengabo; koko ilizwi lokushunyayelwa kwako belingabancedanga bona, lingamanyiwe nenkolo nje kwabo ba li vayo." 
Hebrews4:3 Ngokuba tina bakoliweyo singena ekupumleni oko, njengokuba etshilo ukuti: Ndada ndafunga emsindweni wam ukuti: Abasayi kungena ukupumleni kwam: nakuba imisebenzi yake ibigqityiwe kwa sekumisweni kwelizwe." 
Hebrews4:4 Ngokuba etshilo endaweni etile ngawo umhla wesixe̔nxe ngokuti: Waza wapumla utixo ngomhla wesixe̔nxe kuyo yonke imisebenzi yake. 
Hebrews4:5 Nakule ndawo kanjako: Abasayi kungena ekupumleni kwam. 
Hebrews4:6 Ukuba ngoko lisasala idinga lokuba inxenye iya kungena kuko, nokuba abo bashunyayezwa indaba ezilungileyo ngako matanci bengangenanga ngenxa yokungeva:—" 
Hebrews4:7 Kanjako uyabalula umhla otile ngokuti, Namhla nje, esitsho kwelika‐Davide emveni kwexesha elikulu kangaka, njengokuba kutshiwo ukuti: Namhla nje, nakuliva ilizwi lake, maningazenzi lukuni intliziyo zenu." 
Hebrews4:8 Ngokuba u‐Yoshuwa ukuba wabanika ukupumla, ngeeba engateti ngomnye umhla emveni kwezizinto." 
Hebrews4:9 Ngako ke kusasalela abantu bakatixo upumlo. 
Hebrews4:10 Ngokuba lowo ungenileyo ekupumleni kwake, ute yena naye wapumla emisebenzini yake, kwa njengokuba utixo wapumla kweyake. —" 
Hebrews4:11 Masiti ngoko sinxamele ukungena kokuya ukupumla; ukuze kungabiko mntu owayo ngawo lowo wona umlinganiso wokungeva. 
Hebrews4:12 Ngokuba ilizwi likatixo lipilile, lisebenza ngamandla, libukali ngakumbi pezu kweziṙele zonke ezintlangoti zimbini, lihlaba kude kube kukwahlulwa nokwompefumlo nokwomoya, nokwamalungu nokwomongo, lilungele ukuqiqa izicingo nenkumbulo zentliziyo." 
Hebrews4:13 Kanjalo akuko sidalwa esisiteleyo ebusweni bake; kodwa zonke izinto zizé zityilekile emehlweni alowo esiya kupendulela kuye. 
Hebrews4:14 KEKALOKU sinaye umperisite omkulu ongaka ecandile amazulu nje, u‐Yesu unyana katixo, masiyibambe imvumelo yetu." 
Hebrews4:15 Ngokuba singenaye umperisite omkulu ongenamandla okuvana nati ezilwelweni zetu, kodwa obe elingiwe ngento zonke ngokufana nati, engenasono kodwa." 
Hebrews4:16 Masiti ngoko sisondele kuyo iterone yofefe sinokalipo, ukuze silamkele itaṙu, silufumane ufefe kuze kusizwe ngexesha elifanelekileyo." 
Hebrews5:1 Ngokuba umperisite omkulu osukuba ecatshulwa ebantwini emiselwa abantu ezintweni ezilunge kutixo, ukuze anikele neminikelo namadini ngenxa yezono;" 
Hebrews5:2 ongenzayo ngobubele ngakubo abangaziyo nabalahlekayo, ekubeni naye ngokwake epahlwa bubutataka." 
Hebrews5:3 Nangenxa yabo obu ufanelwa kukuti, njengokuba esenz ela abantu, kwa njalo azenzele naye ngokwake iminikelo ngenxa yezono." 
Hebrews5:4 Kanjako akuko mntu ozitabatelayo lembeko, koko ngulowo ubizwayo ngutixo, njengokuba ebebizwa no‐Arone." 
Hebrews5:5 Kwa njalo naye u‐Kristu akazizukisa ukuba enziwe umperisite omkulu, koko nguye owateta kuye esiti: Ungunyana wam wena, ndikuzele namhla nje." 
Hebrews5:6 Njengokuba esiti nakwelinye iculo: Wena ungumperisite kude kube ngunapakade ngesimo sika‐Makizedeki. 
Hebrews5:7 Owati emihleni yenyama yake, ezinikele nje izikungo nembongozo kulowo ubenamandla ukumsindisa ekufeni, ndawonye nokukala okukulu nenyembezi, eviwe nokuviwa ngoko wakwoyikayo," 
Hebrews5:8 nangona abengunyana, wafunda ululamelo ngentlungu wazivayo;" 
Hebrews5:9 waza efezekisiwe waba yimbangi yosindiso olungunapakade kubo bonke abamlulamelayo; 
Hebrews5:10 ebiziwe ngutixo ngokuti ungumperisite omkulu ngesimo sika‐Makizedeki. 
Hebrews5:11 Esinendawo ezininzi zokuteta ngaye, nezinzima ukuca̔zwa, ekubeni nidangeleyo ngokuva." 
Hebrews5:12 Ngokuba naxeshekweni ninge nisiti ngenxa yexesha nibe ngabafundisi, nibuya nifanele ukuba umntu anifundise iziqalelo zokuqala zamazwi katixo; ewe ningabo abafanele ubisi, ninge ngabo abafanele ukutya okuqinileyo." 
Hebrews5:13 Ngokuba lowo usukuba esela ubisi engenabuciko elizwini lobulungisa; ngokuba engumntwana. 
Hebrews5:14 Kodwa ukutya okuqinileyo kukokwabo abafezekileyo, kwabo abati ngenxa yokuqela banezimvo zabo ziqeliselwe ukuqiqa okulungileyo nokukohlakeleyo." 
Hebrews6:1 Ngako oko sishiya nje isifundiso sokuqalela sika‐Kristu, masihambise ngakuyo imfezeko; singabeki kanjako umsekelo woguquko lwokuguquka emisebenzini efileyo, nowenkolo ngakuye utixo;" 
Hebrews6:2 owofundiso lwembapitizesho, nowokubekwa kwezandla, nowokuvuka kwabafileyo, nowokugwetywa okungunapakade." 
Hebrews6:3 Kanjalo oku siya kukwenza, ukuba kambe kuyavunyelwa ngutixo." 
Hebrews6:4 Ngokuba kunqabele abo babekanyisiwe kanye, beva upiwo lwasezulwini, baba ngabamkeleyo umoya oyingcwele," 
Hebrews6:5 beva ilizwi elilungileyo likatixo, namandla elizwe eliza kuza," 
Hebrews6:6 baza bapambuka noko, ukuba babuye bahlaziywe lude lube luguquko, ekubeni bati bazikuruseshele ngokutsha unyana katixo, bamhlazise ekuhleni." 
Hebrews6:7 Ngokuba umhlaba oyiselayo imvula isiza futi pezu kwawo, ovelisa imifuno elungele abo ulinywa nokulinywa ngenxa yabo kanjalo, ulamkela itamsanqa kutixo;" 
Hebrews6:8 kodwa lowo upumisayo imitolo nezipingo uyaliwa, ukufupi nokuqalekiswa; osipelo sesokuba utshiswe." 
Hebrews6:9 Kodwa siyazitembela ngani, bazalwana! izinto ezilungileyo kwezi, ezilandelana nosindiso, nakuba siteta njalo." 
Hebrews6:10 Ngokuba utixo engenguye ongenabulungisa, ukuba alibale umsebenzi wenu, nomzamo wenu wotando, enilubonakalisileyo ngakulo igama lake, senibakonzile nje abangcwele, nisabakonza kanjalo." 
Hebrews6:11 Kodwa siyakanuka ukuba niti nonke ngabanye olo lona uku̔talo nilubonakalisele ukuqiniswa okuzalisekileyo kwetemba kude kube sekupeleni; 
Hebrews6:12 ukuze ningabi nakudangala, kodwa nibe ngabalandeli babo abati ngako ukukolwa nokuzeka kade balidle ilifa lamadinga." 
Hebrews6:13 Ngokuba utixo akumbekela u‐Abrahame idinga, ekubeni bekungeko namnye omkulu kuye angamfungayo, wazifunga kwa yena," 
Hebrews6:14 esiti: Ngenyaniso ndokutamsanqela kakulu, ndokwandisa kakulu kanjako." 
Hebrews6:15 Kwa njalo akuba ezeke kade wazuza ukufezwa kwedinga. 
Hebrews6:16 Ngokuba abantu okunene befunga lowo umkulu kubo, siti isifungo sokuqinisa senz ele bona ukupela kwako konke ukupika." 
Hebrews6:17 Owayete ngoko utixo, efuna ukunga angababonisa abazindlalifa zokubekiweyo ngedinga kakulu ngakumbi ukungaguquleki kwecebo lake, walamla ngesifungo;" 
Hebrews6:18 ukuze siti, ngazo indawo ezimbini ezingaguqulekiyo, ekungenzeki kuzo ukuba axoke utixo, sibe nolwonwabiso olwomeleleyo tina sisabeleyo ukulibamba itemba elibekwa pambi kwetu;" 
Hebrews6:19 esinalo njengeyankore yompefumlo, linqabile, liqinisekile, lingena kokupakati kwekuselo kanjako;" 
Hebrews6:20 apo wangena kona u‐Yesu engumanduleli ngenxa yetu, enziwe umperisite omkulu ngesimo sika‐Makizedeki kude kube ngunapakade." 
Hebrews7:1 NGOKUBA yena lo u‐Makizedeki, ukumkani we‐Saleme, umperisite katixo opezu konke, owakaulela u‐Abrahame ebuya ekubetweni kwabo okumkani wamtamsanqela;" 
Hebrews7:2 okuye u‐Abrahame wabela kwa isiqingata seshumi kuko konke; enguye kuqala ngokukunyushwa ukumkani wobulungisa, nasemva kwoko nokumkani we‐Saleme, okukuti, ukumkani woxolo;" 
Hebrews7:3 engenayise, engenanina, engenakuba̔lelwa ngokuzalwa, engenasiqalo semihla, engenasipelo sokudliwa kwobomi; kodwa efanekisiwe nonyana katixo; uyahlala engumperisite ngonapakade." 
Hebrews7:4 Gqalani ke ukuba umkulu kangakanana lo mntu, okuye u‐Abrahame ubawo omkulu wanika kwa isiqingata seshumi kuwo amaxoba." 
Hebrews7:5 Nabo okunene bakubo onyana baka‐Levi, ababamkelayo ubuperisite, banomyalezo wokuba batabate izishumi kubo abantu ngokwomteto, oku kukuti, kubo abzalwana babo, nangona bapumayo esinqeni sika‐Abrahame;" 
Hebrews7:6 kodwa lowo ungabalelwayo ukuba uvela kubo, utabatile izishumi ku‐Abrahame, watamsanqela lowo ubenawo amadinga:" 
Hebrews7:7 nangapandle kwako konke ukupikwa, okuncinane kuyatanyusanqelwa kokukulu." 
Hebrews7:8 Kanjalo apa bayatabata izishumi abantu ababubayo; kodwa apo uyazitabata onqi̔nelwayo ukuba uhleli. 
Hebrews7:9 Kanjako, ukuba ndingaba nokutsho, ute no‐Levi, ozamkela izishumi, wanika izishumi ngaye u‐Abrahame:" 
Hebrews7:10 ngokuba ebeseko esinqeni soyise, oko u‐Makizedeki wamkaulelayo." 
Hebrews7:11 Ukuba ke ngoko ufezeko beluko ngobuperisite bakuba‐Levi, (ngokuba abantu bebenikwe umteto pezu kwabo,) bekusafunwa nto nina, ukuba kuvuke umperisite wumbi ngesimo sika‐Makizedeki, nokuba angabizwa ngesimo sika‐Arone?" 
Hebrews7:12 Ngokuba ubuperisite buguqulwa nje, kufanelekile ukuba kube kukuguqulwa kwomteto nawo." 
Hebrews7:13 Ngokuba lowo ezizinto zitetwa ngaye engowesimbi isizwe, ekungeko mntu wakuso okonzileyo esibingelweni." 
Hebrews7:14 Ngokuba kubonakala kwa sekuhleni ukuba inkosi yetu yapuma kwesika‐Juda; isizwe angasitetelanga luto u‐Mosesi ngabo ubuperisite. 
Hebrews7:15 Kanjalo oku kusabonakala ekuhleni kakulu ngakumbi; ukuba kuvukile umperisite wumbi ngokufana no‐Makizedeki," 
Hebrews7:16 owenziwe njalo, kungengokwomteto womyalelo obunyama, koko kungokwamandla obomi n obungenakupela." 
Hebrews7:17 Ngokuba enqi̔na esiti: Wena ungumperisite kude kube ngunapakade ngesimo sika‐Makizedeki. 
Hebrews7:18 Ngokuba kuko okunene ukubujiswa kwomyalelo owandulelayo, ngenxa yobutataka bawo nokungancedi kwawo;" 
Hebrews7:19 ngokuba umteto ungafezekisanga luto; kodwa kuko ukungeniswa kwetemba elilungileyo ngakumbi, esiti ngalo sisondele kutixo." 
Hebrews7:20 Kanjako njengoko bekungengapandle kwesifungo abesenziwa umperisite; ( 
Hebrews7:21 ngokuba bona benziwe abaperisite ngapandle kwesifungo; kodwa yena wenziwe ngesifungo, ngaye lowo ubesiti kuye: Uyehova ufungile, akayi kuguquka: Wena ungumperisite kude kube ngunapakade ngesimo sika‐Makizedeki:)" 
Hebrews7:22 kwa ngokunjalo u‐Yesu wenziwe umbambisi wocebano olulungileyo ngakumbi. 
Hebrews7:23 Kanjako bona, ngabaninzi abenziwe abaperisite, ngenxa yokuba bexakwa ngokufa ukuhlala kade:" 
Hebrews7:24 kodwa yena, ngenxa yokuba ehlala kude kube ngunapakade, unobuperisite obungenakugqitela kwabanye." 
Hebrews7:25 Kukona angati kanjalo agqibele ukusindisa abo bezayo ngaye kutixo, kuba ehleli amaxesha onke ukubatetelela." 
Hebrews7:26 Ngokuba umperisite onjalo ebesifanekele, ongcwele, ongenatyala, onganco̔lisekileyo, owahlukile kwaboni, opakanyiselwe pezulu pezu kwamazulu;" 
Hebrews7:27 ongafaneleyo ukuti ixesha ngexesha, njengabaperisite abakulu abo, anikele amadini kube tanci ngenxa yezake izono, kube kamva ngenxa ye zabantu; ngokuba oku wakwenza kwa kanye, akuzinikela yena." 
Hebrews7:28 Ngokuba umteto ubamisa abantu benobutataka ukuba ngabaperisite abakulu; kodwa ilizwi lesifungo, esibe sisemveni kwomteto, liyamisa unyana, efezekisiwe kude kube ngunapakade." 
Hebrews8:1 KEKALOKU eyona nto inkulu kwezozinto zite-wayo, yeyokuba sinonjalo engumperisite omkulu, ohleli pantsi ngasekunene kweterone yobukulukazi emazulwini;" 
Hebrews8:2 umkonzi weyingcwele indawo, nowetabanakele eyinyaniso, leyo iyimisileyo inkosi, engenguye umntu." 
Hebrews8:3 Ngokuba osukuba engumperisite omkulu emiselwa ukuba anikele iminikelo namadini: kukona kufanelekile ukuba naye lo abe nento angayinikelayo. 
Hebrews8:4 Ngokuba yena ukuba ebeko emhlabeni, ngeengabi engumperisite nakanye, sebeko nje abaperisite abanikelayo iminikelo ngokwomteto;" 
Hebrews8:5 abati bona basikonze isifanekiso nesitunzi sezinto zasezulwini, kwa njengokuba u‐Mosesi ebeyalwa ngutixo, akuba ebeza kuyenza itabanakele; ngokuba esiti: Lumka ukuba uzenze zonke izinto ngomfanekiselo ububoniswa wona entabeni:" 
Hebrews8:6 kodwa kaloku uzuzile isikonzo esidluliseleyo ngakumbi, kwa ngendawo lugqitisele ngakumbi ngayo ucebano angumlamli walo, oluqinisiwe lona pezu kwamadinga alungileyo kwa wolunye." 
Hebrews8:7 Ngokuba olo lwokuqala ukuba belungenanto yokweyiwa, ngekungafunelwanga olwesibini indawo." 
Hebrews8:8 Ngokuba e lw eya nje lona esiti kubo: Bona ke, imihla iyeza, utsho uyehova, nxa ndiya kwenzela indlu ka‐Sirayeli nendlu ka‐Juda ucebano olutsha:" 
Hebrews8:9 lungenjengalo ucebano endalwenzayo noyise babo, emhleni ndabendibamba isandla sabo, ukuba ndibapumise elizweni le‐Jipete; ngokuba bona bebengahlalanga elucebanweni lwam, nam andabakatalela, utsho uyehova." 
Hebrews8:10 Ngokuba lulo olu ucebano endiya kulwenza nendlu ka‐Sirayeli emveni kwalomihla, utsho uyehova: Ndiya kubeka imiteto yam engqondweni yabo, napezu kwentliziyo yabo ndoyiba̔la; ndandiya kuba ngutixo wabo, bati bona babe ngabantu bam." 
Hebrews8:11 Baye bengasayi kufundisa omnye ummelwane wake, nomnye umzalwana wake, esiti: Yazi uyehova; ngokuba bonke beya kundazi, kwa kuye omncinane wabo kude kube kuye omkulu wabo." 
Hebrews8:12 Ngokuba ndiya kuba netaṙu kuko ukungalungi kwabo, nezono zabo nezigqito zabo andisayi kubuya ndizikumbule." 
Hebrews8:13 Ekubeni ati: Ucebano olutsha; ulwenzile ludala olwokuqala. Kodwa oko kwenziwayo okudala nokwalupeleyo, kukufupi nokutiwa shwaqe." 
Hebrews9:1 Kekaloku nalo olwokuqala ke lwalunezimiselo zesikonzo, nendawo eyingcwele yasemhlabeni." 
Hebrews9:2 Ngokuba itabanakele ibilungisiwe, eyokuqala, ekuyo bekuko ikandelare, netafile, nezonka zokubonakala; e‐kutiwa yeyingcwele." 
Hebrews9:3 Nasemva kwekuselo lesibini bekuko itabanakele e‐kutiwa yeyingcwele, yezingcwele," 
Hebrews9:4 inesiqu̔melo segolide, netyeya yocebano ifakiwe igolide ngamacala onke, ekuyo bekuko isitya segolide sinayo imana, nentonga ka‐Arone eyahlumayo, namacwecwe ocebano;" 
Hebrews9:5 napezulu pezu kwayo bekuko ikerubime zobungcwalisa zisibekelela isihlalo sofefe: izinto ekungetetwe ngazo kaloku indawo ngendawo. 
Hebrews9:6 Kekaloku ezizinto zilungisiwe njalo nje, bahlala besiya kweyokuqala itabanakele abaperisite besenza izikonzo zabo;" 
Hebrews9:7 kodwa kweyesibini uya kanye emnyakeni mnye umperisite omkulu yedwa, engangeni engenalo igazi, alinikelayo ngenxa yake, na ngenxa yeziposo zabantu:" 
Hebrews9:8 umoya oyingcwele ekubonakalisa nje oku, ukuba indlela yeyingcwele yezingcwele ingekatyilwa, xeshekweni itabanakele yokuqala isenokuma:" 
Hebrews9:9 engumfanekiselo ngenxa yexesha elikoyo, elo kunikelwa iminikelo namadini ngalo, izinto ezingemfezekiseyo ngokwesazeliso lowo ukonzayo:" 
Hebrews9:10 ezimiyo kupela pezu kwezinto zokudla, nezokusela, nentlambo ngentlambo, nokugwetyelwa kwenyama, zibekelwa kude kube lixesha lokulungisa." 
Hebrews9:11 Kodwa u‐Kristu efikile nje engumperisite omkulu wezinto ezilungileyo eziza kuza, ute ngayo itabanakele enkulu efezekileyo ngakumbi, ingenziwanga ngezandla, oko kukuti, ingeyeyako okukudalwa," 
Hebrews9:12 kungengalo igazi lebokwe nelamatole, kodwa kungalo elake igazi, wangena kwa kanye kweyingcwele indawo, ezuzile inkululo engunapakade." 
Hebrews9:13 Ngokuba igazi lenkabi nebokwe, notutu lwetokazi lufefa abanco̔lileyo, ukuba oku kuyahlanza kube kukuhlanjululwa kwenyama;" 
Hebrews9:14 kwoba kangakananina ngakumbi liya kuti igazi lika‐Kristu, owati ngomoya ongunapakade wazinikela emsulwa kutixo, lihlambulule isazeliso senu emisebenzini efileyo, nize nimkonze utixo ohleliyo?" 
Hebrews9:15 Kanjalo ngenxa yoku ungumlamli wocebano olutsha, ukuba ke, ukufa kwenzelwe nje ukululwa lwezigqito ezibe zipantsi kwocebano lwokuqala, abo babiziweyo bamkele ukudliwa kwedinga lelifa elingunapakade." 
Hebrews9:16 Ngokuba apo sikona isiyolelo, kufanelekile ukuba kuhle ukufa kwomyoleli:" 
Hebrews9:17 ngokuba isiyolelo siqinisekile bakuba abantu befile; ekubeni singaki sibe namandla okuya asahleli umyoleli. 
Hebrews9:18 Kukona nalo ucebano lwokuqala lungatwasiswanga lungenagazi: 
Hebrews9:19 ngokuba xeshekweni bekutetiwe yonke imiyalelo ngokwomteto ngu‐Mosesi kubo bonke abantu, wati etabatile igazi lamatole nebokwe, ndawonye namanzi, noboya begusha obubomvu, nehisope, wafefa kwa yona incwadi nabo bonke abantu," 
Hebrews9:20 esiti: Lilo eli igazi locebano eniluyalezelweyo ngutixo. 
Hebrews9:21 Nayo itabanakele, nazo zonke impahla zesikonzo, wazifefa ngegazi kwa ngokunjalo." 
Hebrews9:22 Kanjako kuza kuba zizinto zonke ezihlanjulwayo ngegazi ngokwomteto; nangapandle kwokupalazwa kwegazi akuko uxolelo. 
Hebrews9:23 Bekufanelekile ngoko ukuba izifanekiso zezinto ezisezulwini zihlanjululwe ngezizinto, kodwa zona ezasezulwini ngamadini alungileyo ngakumbi pezu kwawo la." 
Hebrews9:24 Ngokuba u‐Kristu engangenanga kweyingcwele indawo eyenziweyo ngezandla, e sisifanekiselo seyinyaniso, koko engene kwa kulo izulu, ukuti kaloku abonakale ebusweni bukatixo ngenxa yetu:" 
Hebrews9:25 enga ngenanga kanjalo ukuba azinikele futi, njengokuba umperisite omkulu engena kweyingcwele indawo iminyaka ngeminvaka enegazi elingelelake;" 
Hebrews9:26 ngokuba oko ngeeba evile intlungu futi kutabata ekumisweni kwelizwe: kodwa kaloku ute kanye ekugqityelweni kwamaxesha wabonakaliselwa ukubujiswa kwesono ngokuzenza idini. 
Hebrews9:27 Kanjako njengokuba kumiselwa abantu bafe kube kanye, nasemveni kwoko kubeko ukugwetywa;" 
Hebrews9:28 kwa njalo u‐Kristu, enikelwe nje kanye ukuba atwale isono sabaninzi, wobonakala ngokwesibini engenasono lube lusindiswa kubo abo bamlindayo." 
Hebrews10:1 Ngokuba umteto unesitunzi nje sezinto ezilungileyo eziza kuza, ungenawo wona umfanekiso wendawo, awungeze uti ngawo wona amadini abamana bewanikela futi iminyaka ngeminyaka abo basondelayo ubafezekise." 
Hebrews10:2 Okanye ngeenganqamkanga na ukunikelwa, ngenxa yokuba abakonzayo, behlanjululwe nje kanye, bengasenaso isazelo sezono?" 
Hebrews10:3 kuloko kukoyo ngawo ukukunjulwa kwezono iminyaka ngeminyaka: 
Hebrews10:4 ngokuba kungenzeki ukuba igazi lenkabi nebokwe lisuse izono. 
Hebrews10:5 Ngako oko akungena elizweni uti: Umbingo nomnikelo ubungawutandi, kodwa umzimba uwulungisele mna:" 
Hebrews10:6 amadini okutshiswa nawesono akuwakolelanga. 
Hebrews10:7 Ndandul’ ukuti: Nanku ndisiza, (emqulwini wencwadi kuba̔liwe ngam,) ukuyenza intando yako, Tixo!" 
Hebrews10:8 Esiti pambili nje: Umbingelo nomnikelo namadini okutshiswa nawesono akuwatandanga, akuwakolelanga kanjako; anikelwayo wona njengokwomteto;" 
Hebrews10:9 utshilo oko ukuti: Nanku ndisiza ukuyenza intando yako, Tixo! — uyasusa okwokuqala, ukuze amise okwesibini." 
Hebrews10:10 Esiti ngayo lontando senzwe ngcwele tina ngokunikelwa kwomzimba ka‐Yesu Kristu kwa kanye. 
Hebrews10:11 Kanjalo osukuba engumperisite umi imihla ngemihla esenza isikonzo, enikela futi amadini akwa ngawo wona, angesuseyo izono nakanye;" 
Hebrews10:12 kodwa yena, elinikele nje idini linye ngenxa yezono libe ngunapakade, wahlala pantsi ngasekunene kwotixo," 
Hebrews10:13 elinda ixesha eliseleyo zide intshaba zake zenzwe isitulo senyawo zake: 
Hebrews10:14 ngokuba ngomnikelo umnye ubafezekisile kude kube ngunapakade abo benziwa ngcwele. 
Hebrews10:15 Uti kanjako nomoya oyingcwele asinqi̔nele oku. Ngokuba, emvenikweni abetshilo pambili ukuti:" 
Hebrews10:16 Lulo olu ucebano endiya kulwenza nabo emveni kwalomihla, utsho uyehova: Ndiya kubeka imiteto yam pezu kwentliziyo yabo, napezu kwengqondo zabo ndoyiba̔la; —" 
Hebrews10:17 uti: Nezono zabo nezigqito zabo andisayi kubuya ndizikumbule. 
Hebrews10:18 Kekaloku apo kukona ukuxolelwa kwezi, akuseko umnikelo ngenxa yesono." 
Hebrews10:19 NGAKO ke, bazalwana! sinalo nje ukalipo lwokungena kweyingcwele indawo sinegazi lika‐Yesu," 
Hebrews10:20 ngendlela entsha epilileyo asitwasisele yona, ngalo ikuselo, oko kukuti, inyama yake;" 
Hebrews10:21 si nomperisite omkulu nje pezu kwendlu katixo kanjako; 
Hebrews10:22 masisondele sinentliziyo yenyaniso ekuqiniseni okuzalisekileyo kwokolo, sihlanziwe intliziyo zetu eluvalweni olukohlakeleyo, nomzimba sihlanjiwe ngamanzi amhlope:" 
Hebrews10:23 siti imvumelo yetemba letu siqinise ukuyibamba ingenakushukuma; ngokuba enyanisekile lowo owabeka amadinga: 
Hebrews10:24 siti kanjalo sikumbulelane ukuba sivuselele utando nemisebenzi elungileyo: 
Hebrews10:25 singashiyi nje ukuzihlanganisana kwetu, njengokuba linjalo isiko lenxenye, koko siyalana: nisenje njalo kakulu ngakumbi, njengoko nibonayo ukuba umhla uyasondela." 
Hebrews10:26 Ngokuba, xeshekweni sonayo ngokuvuma, emveni kwokuba sikwamkele ukwaziwa kwenyaniso, kungasabi sasala idini ngenxa yezono;" 
Hebrews10:27 kodwa kuko ukulinda okwoyikekileyo kakulu kwokugwetywa, nozondo oluvutayo luza kubadla abaca̔sayo." 
Hebrews10:28 Umntu akulahla umteto ka‐Mosesi, wafa ngapandle kwetaṙu ngamanqi̔na amabini umhlaumbi amatatu:" 
Hebrews10:29 kukubetwa okubi ngakumbi kangakananina niba uya kubalelwa ukuba ufanele kona, lowo ute unyana katixo wamnyatela pantsi, negazi locebano walibala ukuba yinto enco̔lileyo, elo wenziwa ngcwele ngalo, nomoya wofefe wamdela?" 
Hebrews10:30 Ngokuba simazi owatshoyo ukuti: Kukokwam ukupindezela, kwobuyekezwa ndim; utsho uyehova. Nakanjako: Uyehova uya kulungisa abantu bake." 
Hebrews10:31 Kuyinto eyoyikekileyo ukweyela ezandleni zotixo ohleliyo. 
Hebrews10:32 Kodwa zikumbuzeni imihla yangapambili, enanite kuyo, nakukanyiswa, nanyamezela ukulwa okukulu nentlungu:" 
Hebrews10:33 ngenxenye, ukuba nibe nisenziwa isibonelwa ngezituko nangembandezelo; nangenxenye, ukuba naba ngamakolwane abo babesekuhlaleni okunjalo." 
Hebrews10:34 Ngokuba nibe nivana nam ekubanjweni kwam, navumela ngovuyo ukupangwa kwempahla zenu, nisazi ukuba ninayo kuni ngokwenu imfuyo elungileyo ngakumbi ezulwini nehlala ihleli." 
Hebrews10:35 Ize ningaposi nxamnye ngoko ukalipo lwenu, olunawo umvuzo omkulu." 
Hebrews10:36 Ngokuba nifanele ukuba nomonde, ukuze niti, nakuba niyenzile intando katixo, nikwamkele okubekiweyo ngedinga." 
Hebrews10:37 Ngokuba kuselixeshana elincinanana, waeya kwand’ ukuti lowo uzayo eze, angalibali ke." 
Hebrews10:38 Kodwa olungileyo uya kupila ngokolo: kanti xeshekweni ahlehlayo, umpefumlo wam awukoliswa nguye." 
Hebrews10:39 Tina kodwa asingababo bahlehlela entshabalalweni, koko singababo bakolwayo kube kukusindiswa kwompefumlo." 
Hebrews11:1 KEKALOKU ukolo lusisiqiniso sezinto ezitenjwayo, lusisiboniso sendawo ezingabonwayo." 
Hebrews11:2 Ngokuba kulo olu abadala bebenqi̔nelwe kakuhle. 
Hebrews11:3 Ngalo ukolo siyaqonda ukuba kudaliwe amazwe akoyo ngelizwi likatixo, zide zati izinto ezibonwayo azavela kwizinto ezibonakalayo." 
Hebrews11:4 Ngalo ukolo u‐Abele walinikela kutixo idini elikulu ngakumbi ngapezu kwo‐Kayine, ekungalo wanqi̔nelwa ukuba ulungile, utixo eyinqi̔nela nje iminikelo yake: kanjako kwa ngalo, nakuba efile, usateta." 
Hebrews11:5 Ngalo ukolo u‐Enoki wasuswa ukuba angakuboni ukufa; waza akwafunyanwa, ngenxa yokuba utixo ebemsusile; ngokuba engekasuswa ebenqi̔nelwa ukuba ukolisile utixo." 
Hebrews11:6 Kodwa ngapandle kwokolo akwenzeki uku m kolisa: ngokuba lowo usondelayo kutixo efanele ukukolwa kukuba uko, nokuba uba ngumvuzi wabo bamfunayo." 
Hebrews11:7 Ngalo ukolo u‐Nowa, akuyalwa ngutixo ngezinto ezingekabonwayo, wati ngokwoyika walungisela ukusindiswa kwendlu yake inqanawa; abete ngayo wagweba ilizwe, waza waba yindlalifa yobulungisa obungokwokolo." 
Hebrews11:8 Ngalo ukolo wapulapula u‐Abrahame, akubizwa ukuba apume aye kulondawo ubeya kuda ayamkele ibe lilifa; wapuma ke, engazi kakulu apo aya kona." 
Hebrews11:9 Ngalo ukolo wapambukela ezweni ledinga, njengakwelabasemzini, emi ezintenteni ndawonye no‐Yisake no‐Yakobi, abebezindlalifa kunye naye zedinga elikwa lilo lona:" 
Hebrews11:10 ngokuba ebekangela esosixeko sinemisekelo, esimaki nome?-?enzi ngutixo." 
Hebrews11:11 Ngalo ukolo kwa naye u‐Sara wamkela amandla okukaula, waza wazala seligqitile nje ixesha elifanelekileyo lobudala, ekubeni waba unyanisekile lowo owabeka idinga." 
Hebrews11:12 Ngako oko kwavela kwa kuyo indoda nye, ebifile ke nakanjako, abanjengenkwenkwezi zezulu ukuba baninzi, nanjengentlabati eselunxwemeni lwolwandle engenakubalwa." 
Hebrews11:13 Aba bonke bafa beselukolweni, bengakwamkelanga nje ukufezwa kwamadinga, koko bawabonayo ekude, bakolwa ngawo, ba wa bulisa, baxela ukuba bangabasemzini nabaṙanukeli emhlabeni." 
Hebrews11:14 Ngokuba abo bateta into ezinjalo, bebonakalisa ekuhleni ukuba bayalifuna ilizwe lakowabo." 
Hebrews11:15 Kanti ukuba ke bebekumbula elo bapuma kulo, ngebeba bezuzile ituba lokubuya." 
Hebrews11:16 Kaloku kodwa bayalinqwenela elilungileyo ngakumbi, oko kukuti, elasezulwini. Ngako oko utixo akanantloni ngabo ukuba abizwe ngotixo wabo: ngokuba ebalungisele isixeko." 
Hebrews11:17 Ngalo ukolo ute u‐Abrahame ekulingweni kwake wamnikela u‐Yisake, waza lowo ubezamkelele amadinga wamnikela okupela kwonyana wake," 
Hebrews11:18 obekutshiwo ngaye ukuti: Ku‐Yisake iya kubizwa inzalo yako; 
Hebrews11:19 etelekelelisa ukuba utixo unamandla oku m vusa nakwabafileyo, owayete kanjalo ngomfanekiselo wabuya wamamkela kwa kona." 
Hebrews11:20 Ngalo ukolo u‐Yisake watamsanqela u‐Yakobi no‐Esau ngezinto eziza kuza. 
Hebrews11:21 Ngalo ukolo u‐Yakobi ekufeni kwake watamsanqela onyana baka‐Josefe bobabini; waza wazitoba pezu kwencam yomsimelelo wake. 
Hebrews11:22 Ngalo ukolo u‐Josefe akuza kufa wakankanya ukupuma kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, wayalela ngamatambo ake." 
Hebrews11:23 Ngalo ukolo u‐Mosesi, akuba ebezelwe, wafihlwa ngoyise inyanga zantatu, ngenxa yokuba babona umntwana ukuba umhle; aboyika ummiso wokumkani kanjalo." 
Hebrews11:24 Ngalo ukolo u‐Mosesi, akuba ebekulile, wala ukubizwa ngonyana wentombi ka‐Faro;" 
Hebrews11:25 eqasha ngakumbi ukupatwa kakubi kunye nabantu bakatixo, ngapezu kwokuba nobuyolo besono obuhlala mzuzu kodwa;" 
Hebrews11:26 ebala isitukelwa sika‐Kristu ukuba sibubutyebi obukulu kwindyebo zase‐Jipete: ngokuba ebekangela ngakuwo umvuzo. 
Hebrews11:27 Ngalo ukolo wayishiya i‐Jipete, engoyikanga nje umsindo wokumkani; ngokuba wazingisayo, njengokuba ebona lowo ungabonekiyo." 
Hebrews11:28 Ngalo ukolo wayenza ipasika nokutshizwa kwegazi, ukuze lowo ubetshabalalisa amazibulo angabacu̔kumisi." 
Hebrews11:29 Ngalo ukolo bacanda ulwandle olubomvu njengokuba kudlulwa emhlabeni owomileyo; ati ama‐Jipete akulinga ukwenje njalo antywiliswa. 
Hebrews11:30 Ngalo ukolo indonga ze‐Jeriko zawa, zakuba zibe zingqongiwe imini zasixe̔nxe." 
Hebrews11:31 Ngalo ukolo u‐Rakabi umpinyiswa akabuba kunye nabo babengakolwanga, akuba ebezamkele intlola ngoxolo." 
Hebrews11:32 Ndize ndalekele ukuti nina ke? Ngokuba ixesha liya kundiswelela ukuba ndiyabalisa ngaye u‐Gideyone, no‐Baraki no‐Samsone, no‐Jefeta, no‐Davide, no‐Samyali, nabaprofite:" 
Hebrews11:33 abati ngalo ukolo boyisa izikumkani, benza ubulungisa, bazuza ukufezwa kwamadinga, bavingca imilomo yengonyama," 
Hebrews11:34 bacima amandla omlilo, basinda uhlangoti lweṙele, bomelezeka bepuma ebutatakeni, baba buṙoti ekulweni, baci̔ta imikosi yabasemzini." 
Hebrews11:35 Abafazi babuya bamkela abafi babo ngokuvuka kwabo. Bati ke abanye bolulelwa ukubulawa, bekwalile nje ukukululwa, ukuze bazuze ukuvuka okulungileyo ngakumbi:" 
Hebrews11:36 bati nabanye beva ukuhlekwa nokubetwa, napezu kwoko ukunxitywa nokufakwa entolongweni;" 
Hebrews11:37 bagityiselwa ngamatye, basikwa kubini ngesaṙa, bazingwa, bafa ngokubulawa liṙele; bahambahamba benezintsu zegusha, benezintsu zebokwe, besekusweleni, bebandezelwa, bepatwa kakubi;" 
Hebrews11:38 (elalibe ilizwe lingabafanele;) bedungudela ezintlango, nasezintabeni, nasemiqolombeni, naseminxunyeni yomhlaba." 
Hebrews11:39 Kekaloku aba bonke, benqi̔nelwe kakuhle nje ngalo ukolo, abakwamkela obekubekiwe ngedinga;" 
Hebrews11:40 utixo esazalelele tina into elungileyo ngakumbi nje, ukuze bona bangafezekiswa ngapandle kwetu." 
Hebrews12:1 NGAKO oko ke nati, sinesihlwele esikulu kangaka samanqi̔na sisipahla nje, masibeke nxamnye imitwalo yonke, naso isono esiṙaulayo kakuhle, siti ngomonde sibaleke ugqatso esilubekelwayo," 
Hebrews12:2 sikangela ngakuye oyimbangi nomfezekisi wokolo lwetu, u‐Yesu, owati ngenxa yovuyo olube lubekwa pambi kwake wayinyamezela ikuruse, elidelile ihlazo nje, waza wahlala pantsi ngasekunene kweterone katixo." 
Hebrews12:3 Ngokuba telekelelani lowo okunyamezeleyo ukupika okunjalo ngaboni ngakuye yena, ukuze ningadinwa ngokuncama emipefumlweni yenu." 
Hebrews12:4 Anikamelanga kwada kwaligazi nisilwa nesono; 
Hebrews12:5 kanjako nisilibele isiyalo esitetayo kuni njengakubo onyana: Nyana wam! ungadeli ukwohlwaya kukayehova; zungancami ke wakutetiswa nguye: 
Hebrews12:6 ngokuba esiti uyehova lowo amtandayo amohlwaye, nabo bonke onyana abamkelayo ababete." 
Hebrews12:7 Ukuba ukwohlwaywa niyakunyamezela, uti utixo anipate njengonyana; ngokuba nguwupina ongunyana ati uyise angamohlwayi?" 
Hebrews12:8 Kodwa ukuba nihlala ningenakwohlwaywa, abati bonke bakwamkele, kukona ningabantwana besisu, ningengabo onyana." 
Hebrews12:9 Kanjalo ke sibe sinabo oyise benyama yetu abasohlwayayo, saza sabahlonela: sesingayi kuti kakulu ngakumbi ke na silulamele kuye uyise womoya, size sibudle ubomi?" 
Hebrews12:10 Ngokuba bona okunene bebesiti imihla yamincinane basohlwaya njengokuba bekunga kulungile kubo; kodwa yena uyasohlway ela ukuncedwa kwetu, ukuba samkele kubo ubungcwele bake." 
Hebrews12:11 Kekaloku akuko kwohlwaywa ixesha kukoyo ngalo okunga kuyinto yovuyo, koko kunga kuyinto yosizi: noko kamva kuyanika isiqa̔mo esiluxolo sobulungisa kwabo baqeliswayo ngako." 
Hebrews12:12 Ngako oko pakamisani izandla ezipolelweyo, namadolo acubukileyo;" 
Hebrews12:13 nize nenzele inyawo zenu indlela ezilungeleleneyo, ukuze okuqwalelayo kungatyekiswa, kodwa ngokukumbi kupiliswe." 
Hebrews12:14 Putumani uxolo ngakubo abantu bonke, nabo ubungcwele, ekungeko namnye oya kuyibona inkosi engenabo:" 
Hebrews12:15 nilumka nje kungabiko mntu oposana nofefe lukatixo; kungabiko nanye ingcambo yobuṙaṙa ihluma nje e ni katazayo, kuze kuti ngayo banco̔liswe abaninzi;" 
Hebrews12:16 kungabiko mntu ongumpimisi, umhlaumbi umginwa, njengo‐Esau, owati ngenxa yesidlo sinye watengisa ngobuzibulo bake:" 
Hebrews12:17 ngokuba nisazi ukuba nasemveni kwoko, akufuna ukulizuza itamsanqa, waliwa; ngokuba engafumananga ndawo yokuguquka, nakuba walifunayo enenyembezi." 
Hebrews12:18 Ngokuba ningasondelanga entabeni epatekayo, etshayo ngomlilo, nasesitokotokweni, nasebumnyameni, naseluquteni," 
Hebrews12:19 nasesandini sexilongo, nasentlokomeni yamazwi, abati abo babeweva bazilandulela ukuba kwalekelwe ukutetwa kubo:" 
Hebrews12:20 ngokuba bebengenyamezeleyo oko bekuyalelwayo: Nokuba sisilo kodwa esicu̔kumisayo intaba, siya kugityiselwa ngamatye, umhlaumbi siya kuhlatywa ngomkonto:" 
Hebrews12:21 kanjako umbonakalo lowo ube woyikekile kangaka, u‐Mosesi wati: Ndinokwoyika okukulu nokungcangcazela." 
Hebrews12:22 Koko nisondeleyo entabeni ye‐Ziyone, nasesixekweni sotixo ohleliyo, e‐Yerusaleme yasezulwini, nakumawakawaka engelosi," 
Hebrews12:23 kwintlanganiso enkulu, nakwiṙemente yamazibulo aba̔lelweyo ezulwini, nakuye utixo umgwebi wabo bonke, nakomoya babalungileyo abafezekisiweyo," 
Hebrews12:24 nakuye u‐Yesu umlamli wocebano olutsha, nasegazini lokufefwa eliteta izinto ezilungileyo ngakumbi pezu kwelika‐Abele." 
Hebrews12:25 Lumkani ukuba ningali lowo utetayo. Ngokuba abo bamalayo obeteta amazwi katixo emhlabeni ukuba abasinda ke, soti kakulu ngakumbi tina singasindi, sakupambuka kobevela ezulwini:" 
Hebrews12:26 olizwi lake oko lashukumisa umhlaba, kodwa kaloku ubekile idinga lokuti: Kusekanye ndizamazamisayo kungenguwo umhlaba wodwa, kulilo izulu nalo." 
Hebrews12:27 Kekaloku lento yokuti, Kusekanye, iyaxela ukuguqulwa kwezozinto zinokushukunyiswa, njengokwezinto ezenziweyo, ukuze zihlale zihleli ezozinto ezingenakushukunyiswa." 
Hebrews12:28 Ngako oko ubukumkani obungenakushukuma sibamkela nje, masibambe ufefe, esingati ngalo simkonze utixo ngendawo ekolekileyo, sinohlonelo nolwoyiko olubedeshekileyo:" 
Hebrews12:29 ngokuba kwa utixo wetu engumlilo odlayo. 
Hebrews13:1 UKUTANDA abazalwana makuhlale kubako. 
Hebrews13:2 Imbuko yabasemzini ningayilibali: ngokuba bete ngayo inxenye bazamkela ingelosi bengazazi. 
Hebrews13:3 Bakumbuleni ababanjwa, njengababanjwa kunye nabo; n abapatwa kakubi, njengokuba nani niseko emzimbeni." 
Hebrews13:4 Ukutshata makube kubekekile pakati kwabo bonke, nesilili masibe singanco̔liswa: abapimisi kodwa nabaṙexezi utixo wobagweba." 
Hebrews13:5 Ukumila kwenu makube kokungenakutanda imali; nize nitomalale zizinto ezikoyo: ngokuba ete yena: Andisayi kukuyeka, andisayi kukushiya kanjalo." 
Hebrews13:6 Side somelele tina ukuti: Uyehova ungumsizi wam, andiyi kwoyika into endiya kwenzelwa yona ngumntu." 
Hebrews13:7 Kumbulani abakokeli benu, abo baliteta kuni ilizwi likatixo; niti, nigqala nje isipelo sokuhlala kwabo, nilandele ukolo lwabo." 
Hebrews13:8 U‐Yesu Kristu izolo nanamhla ukwa nguye, nakude kube ngunapakade." 
Hebrews13:9 Ningaqu̔tywaqu̔tywa ngemfundiso ezininzi nezasemzini: ngokuba kulungile ukuba intliziyo iqiniswe ngokolo, kungabi ngezinto zokudla, abangancedwanga luto abo bahamba kuzo." 
Hebrews13:10 Sinaso isibingelo, abangenagunya lokuba batye kokwaso abo bayikonzayo itabanakele." 
Hebrews13:11 Ngokuba ezozilo igazi lazo lingeniswa ngenxa yesono kweyingcwele indawo ngomperisite omkulu, imizimba yazo ezi iyatshiswa ngapandle kwomnquba." 
Hebrews13:12 Ngako oko naye u‐Yesu, ukuze abantu abenze ngcwele ngelake igazi, weva ukufa ngapandle kwesango." 
Hebrews13:13 Masiti ngoko ke sipumele kuye ngapandle kwomnquba, sitwala nje isitukelwa sake." 
Hebrews13:14 Ngokuba singenasixeko apa esinokuhlala, koko sifuna eso siza kuza." 
Hebrews13:15 Masiti ngoko ngaye yena sinikele idini lendumiso ngamaxesha onke kutixo, oko kukuti, isixakato somlomo ubulela egameni lake." 
Hebrews13:16 Kodwa ukwenza okulungileyo nokwabela abanye ningakulibali: ngokuba utixo ekoliswa ngamadini anjalo kakulu. 
Hebrews13:17 Baveni abakokeli benu, ni ba lulamele: ngokuba bona bepapama pezu kwemipefumlo yenu, njengabo abaya kuzipendulela; ukuze bakwenze oku benovuyo, bengenakugula kanti; ngokuba kungalungele nina oku." 
Hebrews13:18 Sitandazeleni: ngokuba sinokutemba ukuba sinaso isazeliso esilungileyo, sifuna nje ukuhlala kakuhle ezintweni zonke." 
Hebrews13:19 Kanjalo ndiya ni kunga kakulu ngakumbi ukuba nikwenje njalo, ukuze ndibuyiselwe kuni kamsinyane." 
Hebrews13:20 Kekaloku utixo woxolo, owamnyusayo kwabafileyo umalusi wezimvu, lowo umkulu, enegazi locebano olungunapakade, inkosi yetu u‐Yesu," 
Hebrews13:21 wanga anganizalisekisa kuyo yonke imisebenzi elungileyo, nize niyenze intando yake, ekwenza kuni oko kukolekileyo ebusweni bake, ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu; okuye makubeko ubungcwalisa kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene." 
Hebrews13:22 Kanjalo ndiyanikunga, bazalwana! linyamezeleni elilizwi lokuyala; ngokuba ndiba̔lile kuni ngokufutshane." 
Hebrews13:23 Yazini ukuba umzalwana wetu u‐Timote ukululwe: endiya kuti, ukuba uyafika kamsinyane, ndize naye ukunibona." 
Hebrews13:24 Bulisani bonke abakokeli benu, nabo bonke abangcwele. Bayabulisa nina abo base‐Yitaliya." 
Hebrews13:25 Ufefe malube nani nonke. Amene. 
James1:1 UYAKOBI, isicaka sikatixo ne senkosi u‐Yesu Kristu, kuzo izizwe ezilishumi linazibini ezici̔takeleyo, ebulisa." 
James1:2 Yitini luvuyo lwonke, bazalwana bam! xeshekweni niwelayo emalingweni amaninzi;" 
James1:3 nisazi nje ukuba ukulingwa kwokolo lwenu kuyazuzisa umonde. 
James1:4 Kodwa wona umonde maube nomsebenzi ofezekileyo, ukuze nibe nifezekile nizalisekile, ningasweleki nganto." 
James1:5 Kodwa ukuba kuko owenu uswele ubulumko, makacele kutixo oti bonke abape ngesisa, angatetisi ke; waeya kubupiwa." 
James1:6 Makacele kodwa ngokolo, engatandabuzi nto; ngokuba otandabuzayo efana neliza lolwandle liqu̔tywa ngumoya lizanyazanyiswa." 
James1:7 Makangabi pofu lowamntu uya kwamkela into kuyo inkosi: 
James1:8 umntu ontliziyo mbini uyajingajinga kuzo zonke indlela zake. 
James1:9 Makaqa̔yise ke umzalwana osebupantsini, ebupakanyweni bake;" 
James1:10 kodwa osisityebi, ebupantsini bake; kuba njengembali yenca eya kudlula." 
James1:11 Ngokuba liti lakupuma ilanga kunye nokufudumala okutshisayo, landule libunise inca, nembali yayo ivutuluke, nobuhle bokubonakala kwayo butshabalale; ngokunjalo naye osisityebi uya kushwabana ezihambeni zake." 
James1:12 Unetamsanqa umntu onyamezelayo ukulingwa; kuba eya kuti akuba ebukiwe asamkele isitsaba sobomi, eso inkosi ibatembisile abayitandayo ngaso." 
James1:13 Makangatsho umntu akuzingwa ukuti: Ndizingwa ngutixo: ngokuba utixo engazingeki kokukohlakeleyo; kanjalo yena ngokwake akazingi mntu. 
James1:14 Kodwa umntu uyazingwa, akuti akukuliswe yeyake inkanuko, ahendwe." 
James1:15 Yandule yona inkanuko nxa ikaulileyo izale isono; siti ke isono sakugqitywa sizale ukufa. 
James1:16 Ize ningaposisi, bazalwana bam abatandiweyo!" 
James1:17 Zonke izipo ezilungileyo nazo zonke izipiwo ezifezekileyo zivela pezulu, zisihla kuyise wezikanyiso, okuye kungeko kuguquleka nesitunzi sokujika." 
James1:18 Ngokutanda kwake wasizala ngelizwi lenyaniso, ukuba sibe sisandulelo esitile sezidalwa zake." 
James1:19 Ngoko ke, bazalwana bam abatandiweyo! mabati bonke abantu ngabanye banxamele ukuva, balibalele ukuteta, balibalele ukuqumba." 
James1:20 Ngokuba ukuqumba kwomntu kungazuzisi ubulungisa bukatixo. 
James1:21 Ngako oko, senibeka nxamnye nje konke ukunco̔la nokupupuma kwobumenemene, maniti ngolulamo nilamkele ilizwi elityaliweyo ku ni, elinamandla okuyisindisa imipefumlo yenu." 
James1:22 Kodwa yibani ngabenzi belizwi, ningabi ngabapulapuli kodwa, nizibukuqa nje." 
James1:23 Ngokuba lowo usukuba engumpulapuli welizwi, engengumenzi kanti, yena lo ufana nomntu ebonela ubuso bake bokuvela encwadini;" 
James1:24 ngokuba ezibonele, wemka ke, waza walibala msinya ukuba ebenjanina." 
James1:25 Kodwa lowo uti akangele emtetweni ofezekileyo wenkululeko, ahlale esenje njalo, yena lo engenguye umpulapuli onokulibala nje, enguye umenzi womsebenzi, yena lo woba netamsanqa ekwenzeni kwake." 
James1:26 Ukuba kuko oba uyabedesha utixo pakati kwenu, ongakalimeli ulwimi lwake, koko ekohlisa intliziyo yake, imbedesho yalo mntu yinto engendawo." 
James1:27 Imbedesho ecocekileyo enganco̔lisekileyo pambi kwake utixo noyise yiyo le; yokuba umntu alunguze inkedama nabahlolokazi ebunzimeni babo, n okuba azigcine engenabala kokwelizwe." 
James2:1 BAZALWANA bam! ningabambi ukolo lwayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, i‐Nkosi yobungcwalisa, ngokuketa abantu." 
James2:2 Ngokuba xeshekweni kungena entlanganisweni yenu umntu onemisesane yegolide enezivato ezihle, kuze kungene nolihlwempu enezivato ezonakeleyo," 
James2:3 nandule nikangele ngakulowo uzambeteyo izivato ezihle, niti kuye: Hlala wena apa kakuhle; nize niti kolihlwempu: Yima wena paya, umhlaumbi hlala apa ngapantsi kwesitulo sam senyawo:" 
James2:4 anikwenzanga ke na ukwahluka pakati kwenu, naba ngabagwebi abazicamango zikohlakeleyo?" 
James2:5 Yivani, bazalwana bam abatandiweyo! utixo akanyulanga yinina abangamahlwempu elilizwe babe betyebile elukolweni, nendlalifa zobukumkani abatembisile bona abamtandayo?" 
James2:6 Nina kodwa nimdelile olihlwempu. Asi zizo izityebi na ezinibandezelayo, eziti kanjalo zinir̔olele ematyaleni?" 
James2:7 Aziligxeki na zona elogama lilungileyo enibizwe ngalo? 
James2:8 Ukuba ke niyawufeza umteto odumileyo kakulu, ngokwesiba̔lo esiti: Uya kutanda ummelwane wako njengokuzi tanda kwako; niyalungisa:" 
James2:9 kodwa ukuba niyaketa abantu, niyenza isono, niboniswa ngumteto nje ukuba ningabagqiti." 
James2:10 Ngokuba umntu oya kuti, noko aya kugcina umteto wonke, aposise ng endawo inye, uyamelwa lityala ngazo zonke." 
James2:11 Ngokuba yena watshoyo ukuti: Ungaṙexezi, watsho nokuti: Ungabulali. Kekaloku ukuba uya kuti, nangona ungayi kuṙexeza, ubulale, usel’ ungumgqiti womteto." 
James2:12 Nenje njalo ukuteta, nenje njalo ukwenza, njengabo abaya kugwetywa ngawo umteto wenkululeko." 
James2:13 Ngokuba eya kuba nokugwetywa okungenabubele lowo ungenzanga ngobubele: kanti ububele buyavuyelela ukugweba. 
James2:14 Kunceda nto nina, bazalwana bam! xeshekweni atshoyo umntu ukuti unalo ukolo, kodwa akanayo imisebenzi? ukolo olo lungamsindisa na?" 
James2:15 Xeshekweni ke umzalwana umhlaumbi udade bazé, baswele nokudla kwemihla ngemihla," 
James2:16 aze atsho omnye wakuni kubo ukuti: Hambani ngoxolo, ndifudumale, nihlute; niti noko ningabapi ezonto ezifanele umzimba; kunceda nto nina ke oko?" 
James2:17 Kwa njalo nokolo, xeshekweni lungenayo imisebenzi, lufile, lulodwa nje." 
James2:18 Koko kuya kuti umntu: Wena unokolo, nam ndinemisebenzi: ndibonise ukolo lwako lungenamisebenzi yako, nam ndiya kubonisa wena ngemisebenzi yam ukolo lwam." 
James2:19 Uyakolwa ukuba utixo umnye; uyalungisa; ziti zona idemoni zikolwe nazo, zingcangcazele noko." 
James2:20 Kodwa ufuna ukuqonda na, mntundini unyabileyo! ukuba ukolo lungenamisebenzi lufile?" 
James2:21 U‐Abrahame ubawo wetu wabengagwetyelwa ngemisebenzi yinina, akumnikela u‐Yisake unyana wake pezu kwaso isibingelo?" 
James2:22 Uyabona ukuba ukolo lube lusebenza kunye nemisebenzi yake, n okuba ngayo imisebenzi ukolo lwake lwafezekiswa." 
James2:23 Saza sazalisekiswa isiba̔lo esiti: u‐Abrahame wakolwa ngutixo, kwaza kwambalelwa kube kukulunga; waza wabizwa ngomhlobo katixo." 
James2:24 Niyabona ngako ukuba umntu uyagwetyelwa ngemisebenzi, kungengokolo lodwa." 
James2:25 Ngokunjalo ke naye u‐Rakabi umpinyiswa wabengagwetyelwa ngemisebenzi yinina, akuzamkela izitunywa, waza wazindulula ngenye indlela?" 
James2:26 Ngokuba njengokuba umzimba ungenamoya ufile, kwa njalo ukolo lungenamisebenzi lufile nalo." 
James3:1 NINGABI ngabafundisi abaninzi, bazalwana bam! nisazi ukuba siya kuzuza ukugwetywa okukulu ngakumbi ke." 
James3:2 Ngokuba siposisa kwa sonke ngendawo ezininzi. Ukuba kuko ongaposisiyo emazwini, yena lo ungumntu ofezekileyo, enamandla ukukalimela kwa wonke umzimba." 
James3:3 Bona ke, imikala yamahashe siyayifaka emilonyeni yawo ukuba asive, siti wonke umzimba wawo siwusonge." 
James3:4 Bona ke, nenqanawa, nangona zinkulu kangaka, ziqu̔tywa nokuqu̔tywa ngumoya onamandla, ziyasongwa ngumti wokukapa omncinane kakulu noko, apo kusukuba unxamelo lwomkokeli lunga zingaya kona." 
James3:5 Kwa njalo nolwimi lulilungwana oluncinane, kanti luyateta izinto ezinkulu. Bona ke, umlilo omncinane ulipemba igoqo elikulu kangakanana lenkuni!" 
James3:6 Nalo lona ulwimi lungumlilo, lulilizwe lenkohlakalo: luhlala njalo ke ulwimi pakati kwamalungu etu, oludyobayo umzimba wonke, lutshisa injikelezo yemvelo, lutshiswa lona sisihogo somlilo." 
James3:7 Ngokuba zonke intlobo zezilo, nezentaka, nezezinto ezinambuzelayo, nezezinto eziselwandle, ziyoyiswa, ewe zoyisiwe luluntu:" 
James3:8 kodwa lona ulwimi akuko namnye umntu ongalwoyisayo; lusisikohlakalo esingenakuqojoshwa, luzele bubuhlungu obufisayo." 
James3:9 Ngalo lona siyambonga yena utixo noyise, nangalo lona siyaqalekisa abantu abenziweyo ngokufana notixo." 
James3:10 Kwa kuwo umlomo mnye kupuma ukubonga nokuqalekisa. Ezizinto, bazalwana bam! ngazingabi njalo." 
James3:11 Umtombo uyampompoza na kwa kulo ituba linye amanzi amnandi naṙaṙa? 
James3:12 Umkiwane, bazalwana bam! ungavelisa amanquma na, umhlaumbi umti weveyine amakiwane na? Kwa njalo ke akuko mtombo ongavelisayo amanzi atyuwa namnandi." 
James3:13 Ngubanina olumkileyo onokwazi pakati kwenu? makayibonakalise ngokumila okulungileyo imisebenzi yake ekululameni kwobulumko. 
James3:14 Kodwa ukuba ninozondo oluṙaṙa nenkani entliziyweni yenu, ize ningaqa̔yisi ningaxoki ngakuyo inyaniso." 
James3:15 Obu abububo ubulumko obuhlayo buvela pezulu, bubobasemhlabeni, bobobuntu, bobobudemoni." 
James3:16 Ngokuba apo kukoyo uzondo nenkani, kuko kwa kona impitimpiti nazo zonke izenzo ezibi." 
James3:17 Kodwa ubulumko obuvela pezulu buti ke ukuqala bucocekile, band’ ukuba luxolo, butambile, bucengeka kakuhle, buzele bububele nezixakato ezilungileyo, bungenakwahlula, bungenakuhanahanisa." 
James3:18 Kekaloku isixakato sobulungisa siyahlwayelwa eluxolweni ngabo abalwenzayo uxolo. 
James4:1 ZIVELA pina imfazwe nembambano pakati kwenu? Aziveli kwa lapa na, kwa seziyolweni zenu ezilwayo pakati kwamalungu enu?" 
James4:2 Niyakanuka, kanti aninanto; niyabulala, niyazondela nokuzondela, kanti aningezuze; niyabambana nenze imfazwe, kodwa aninanto, ngenxa yokuba ningaceli." 
James4:3 Niyacela, ningamkeli ke, ngokuba nicela kakubi, ukuze nici̔tele eziyolweni zenu." 
James4:4 Nina baṙexezi nabaṙexezikazi! anazi na ukuba ubuhlobo nelilizwe bububutshaba notixo? Ngako osukuba efuna ukunga angaba sisihlobo selilizwe, uhlala elutshaba lukatixo." 
James4:5 Niba isiba̔lo sifumana siteta na? Umoya omiyo kuti uyakanuka ngomona na? 
James4:6 Kodwa uyapa ufefe olukulu ngakumbi. Sitsho ngoko ukuti: Utixo uyamelana nabaner̔atshi, kodwa abatobekileyo uyabapa ufefe." 
James4:7 Ngako ke lulamelani kuye utixo. Maleni u‐Satane, waeya kunibaleka." 
James4:8 Sondelani kutixo, waeya kusondela kuni. Hlambululani izandla, nina boni! nizicokise intliziyo, nina bantliziyo mbini!" 
James4:9 Yibani lusizi, nilile, nenze isijwili. Ukuhleka kwenu makuguqulwe kube kukulila, nokuvuya kwenu kube kukukedama." 
James4:10 Zitobeni ebusweni bayo inkosi, yaiya kunipakamisa." 
James4:11 Ningahlebani, bazalwana! Omhlebayo umzalwana wake, amgwebe umzalwana wake, uyawuhleba umteto, awugwebe umteto: kodwa ukuba uyawugweba umteto, akunguye umenzi womteto, unguye umgwebi." 
James4:12 Kuko umnikamteto emnye, onamandla okusindisa nokububisa: ungubanina wena ogweba omnye umntu?" 
James4:13 Yizani kaloku nina nitshoyo ukuti: Soya namhla umhlaumbi ngomso esixekweni salapa, senze kona umnyaka ube mnye, sitengise, siqwebe inzuzo;" 
James4:14 ningakwazi nje kanti okwangomso: ngokuba bunjanina ubomi benu? bukwa yiyo inkungu ebonakalela ixeshana elincinane, ize yand’ ukuti shwaka:" 
James4:15 endaweni yokutsho kwenu ukuti: Ukuba inkosi iyatanda, sesiya kuti sipile, sikwenze oku umhlaumbi oko." 
James4:16 Kodwa kaloku niyaqa̔yisa ekuzidleni kwenu: konke ukuqa̔yisa okunjalo kukohlakele. 
James4:17 Ngako owaziyo ukwenza okulungileyo, angakwenzi ke, kusisono kuye." 
James5:1 YIZANI kaloku nina zityebi! yenzani isijwili nigulele intsizi zenu eziza kunihlela. 
James5:2 Ubutyebi benu bubolile, nezivato zenu sezidliwe ngamanundu." 
James5:3 Igolide yenu nesilivere yenu igxwalile; woti ke umhlwa wazo ube sisinqi̔no ngakuni, uyidle inyama yenu njengomlilo. Nibekele indyebo emihleni yokugqibela." 
James5:4 Bona ke, umvuzo wabasebenzi abawavunileyo amasimi enu, obandeziweyo nini ngokulumkisa, uyabiza; nezikalo zabavunileyo zingenile ezindlebeni zayo inkosi yemikosi." 
James5:5 Nipilile kamnandi emhlabeni apa, nahlala ngobuyolo; nizondlile intliziyo zenu njengasemini yokuxe̔la." 
James5:6 Nigwebile, nibulele olungileyo; akamelani nani." 
James5:7 Yitini ngoko, bazalwana! nizeke kade kude kufike inkosi. Bona ke, umlimi uyalinda iziqa̔mo ezinqabileyo zomhlaba, ezeka kade pezu kwazo, zide zamkele eyapambili neyasemva imvula." 
James5:8 Yitini nani nizeke kade; ziqiniseni intliziyo zenu; kuba ukufika kwenkosi sekukufupi. 
James5:9 Ningaṙoṙelani, bazalwana! ukuze ningagwetywa. Nanku umgwebi emi pambi kwocango." 
James5:10 Batabateni, bazalwana bam! babe ngumzekelo wokuva ubunzima, nowokuzeka kade, abaprofite abatetileyo ngegama lenkosi." 
James5:11 Bona ke, siti banetamsanqa abo banyamezelayo. Ukunyamezela kuka‐Jobi nikuvile, nesipelo senkosi nisibonile, ukuba yona inkosi inezibele kakulu, inenceba." 
James5:12 Kodwa pezu kwento zonke, bazalwana bam! ningafungi; ninga fungi izulu, nomhlaba, nesinye isifungo simbi: kodwa u‐ewe wenu makabe ngu‐ewe, no‐hai abe ngu‐hai; ukuze ningeyeli ekugwetyweni." 
James5:13 Kuko na obuvayo ubunzima pakati kwenu? makatandaze. Kuko na ocwayitileyo? makavume amaculo. 
James5:14 Kuko na ofayo pakati kwenu? makabizele abadala beṙemente; mabatandaze bona pezu kwake, bemtambisile ngeoli egameni lenkosi:" 
James5:15 wauya kuti umtandazo wokolo umsindise lowo ufayo, iti ke inkosi impakamise; nokuba wenzile izono, uya kuxolelwa." 
James5:16 Xelelanani iziposo zenu, nitandazelane, ukuze nipiliswe: sinamandla kakulu isikungo solungileyo ekusebenzeni kwaso," 
James5:17 u‐Elija ebengumntu wemilo efana neyetu, wanyameka ukutandaza ukuba kungani mvula: kwaza akwana mvula emhlabeni lowo yaminyaka mitatu inenyanga zintandatu." 
James5:18 Ubuye watandaza kanjalo, laza izulu lanika imvula, wati umhlaba wapumisa iziqa̔mo zawo." 
James5:19 Bazalwana! ukuba umntu pakati kwenu uyalahleka kuyó inyaniso, aze ati omnye amguqule," 
James5:20 makaqonde ukuba lowo uguqulayo umoni elulahlekweni lwendlela yake, uya kusindisa umpefumlo ekufeni, agubungele isininzi sezono." 
1Peter1:1 UPETROSI, umpostile ka‐Yesu Kristu, kubo abaṙanukeli abaci̔takalele e‐Pontusi, e‐Galati, e‐Kapadosiya, e‐Asiya, nase‐Bitiniya," 
1Peter1:2 abanyuliweyo ngokwokwazi okupambili kukatixo uyise, ekungcwaliseni kwomoya, kube kukuva nokufefezwa kwegazi lika‐Yesu Kristu: Lwanga ufefe noxolo lunganandiselwa." 
1Peter1:3 Makabongwe yena utixo noyise wenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, ote ngokwobuninzi bobubele bake wasizala ngokutsha kube litemba elipilileyo ngako ukuvuka kuka‐Yesu Kristu ekufeni," 
1Peter1:4 kube lilifa elingonakaliyo, elinganco̔lisekileyo, elingagugiyo, linilindiselwe ezulwini," 
1Peter1:5 nina nigcinelwayo emandleni katixo ngalo ukolo kude kubeko usindiswa olulungele ukutyilwa exesheni lokugqibela: 
1Peter1:6 onigcoba ngako kakulu, nangona kaloku ngomzuzwana, ukuba kufanelekile, niselusizini ngamalingwa amaninzi," 
1Peter1:7 ukuze ukulingwa kwokolo lwenu, kunqabile kakulu nje ngapezu kwokwegolide etshabalalayo, eti noko ilingwe ngomlilo, kufunyanwe kube ludumiso, nembeko, nobungewalisa, ekutyilweni kuka‐Yesu Kristu:" 
1Peter1:8 eniti ningambonanga nje, nimtande; okuye, nangona kaloku ninga m boniyo, nikolwa nje noko, niyagcoba ngovuyo olungatetekiyo oluzele bubungcwalisa;" 
1Peter1:9 nisamkela isipelo sokolo lwenu, usindiswa lwemipefumlo yenu." 
1Peter1:10 Abate ngalo olosindiswa babuza bapanda kunene abaprofite abebeprofitesha ngalo ufefe lumis elwe nina; 
1Peter1:11 bapengulula ukuba lixesha elinina umhlaumbi elinjanina abexela ngalo umoya ka‐Kristu obekubo, enqi̔na ngapambili intlungu zimis elwe u‐Kristu, nobungcwalisa obuya kulandela:" 
1Peter1:12 okwatyilwa kubo, ukuba bebengazi tet eli bona, kodwa bebetetela tina ezizinto, ezityelweyo kuni kaloku ngabo banishumayezile ivangeli ngomoya oyingcwele esusiwe ezulwini; izinto ingelosi zikanukayo ukukangela kuzo." 
1Peter1:13 Ngako oko binqani amanqe oluvo lwenu, niqabuke, nilutembele ngokuzalisekileyo olofefe luniziselwayo ekutyilweni kuka‐Yesu Kristu;" 
1Peter1:14 niti njengabantwana bokuva, ningabi nilinganisana nenkanuko zangapambili ekungazini kwenu;" 
1Peter1:15 koko, njengokuba engcwele lowo wanibizayo, nibe ngcwele kwa nani kuko konke ukumila kwenu;" 
1Peter1:16 ngenxa yokuba kuba̔liwe ukuti: Yibani ngcwele, ngokuba ndingcwele mna." 
1Peter1:17 Nokokuba nibiza konguyihlo, oti engabuki isiqu samntu agwebe ngokwomsebenzi wabanye ngabanye, hlalani ixesha lokupambukela kwenu ninokuhlonela;" 
1Peter1:18 nisazi nje ukuba bekungengazo izinto ezonakalayo, isilivere umhlaumbi igolide, enakululwayo kuko ukumila kwenu okungendawo kuvela koyihlo benu," 
1Peter1:19 bekungalo igazi elinqabileyo lika‐Kristu, njengelemvana emsulwa engenabala;" 
1Peter1:20 obete okunene waziwa ngapambili lingekamiswa ilizwe, kodwa wabonakaliswa ngalamaxesha okugqibela ngenxa yenu," 
1Peter1:21 eniti ngaye nikolwe kutixo, owamvusayo ekufeni, wamnika ubungcwalisa, ukuze ukolo lwenu netemba lenu libe kuye utixo." 
1Peter1:22 Kekaloku imipefumlo yenu niyicokisile nje ekuyiveni inyaniso ngaye umoya kuze kube kukutanda abazalwana okungazenzisiyo, nyamekani kunene ukutandana ngentliziyo ecocekileyo;" 
1Peter1:23 nizelwe ngokutsha nje, kungengambewu eyonakalayo, kungengonakaliyo, ngalo ilizwi likatixo elipilileyo elihlala lihleli kude kube ngunapakade." 
1Peter1:24 Ngokuba uluntu lwonke lunjengenca, nabo bonke ubungcwalisa bomntu bunjengembali yenca: yona inca iyabuna, nembali yayo iyavutuluka;" 
1Peter1:25 kodwa ilizwi lenkosi lihlala lihleli kude kube ngunapakade. Lilo eli ke ilizwi elishunyayelweyo ngevangeli kuni. 
1Peter2:1 Ngako ke senibeka nxamnye nje lwonke ulunya, nayo yonke inkohliso, nobuhanahaniso, nomona, nako konke ukuhleba," 
1Peter2:2 njengentsana ezisand’ ukuzalwa, nqwenelani ubisi olungagxengelwayo lwaselizwini, ukuze nikule ngalo;" 
1Peter2:3 ukuba ke nivile ukuba inkosi inobubele. 
1Peter2:4 Eniti, nisondela kuyo, njengakulo ilitye elipilileyo, lilahliwe okunene ngabantu, kodwa pambi kwotixo linyuliwe, linqabile," 
1Peter2:5 kwa nani, njengamatye apilileyo, nakiwe niyindlu ebumoya, nibubuperisite obuyingcwele, kuze kunikelwe amadini abumoya, ekolekile kakuhle kutixo ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu." 
1Peter2:6 Ngoko kanjako kuko indawo esiba̔lweni yokuti: Bona ke, ndiyabeka e‐Ziyone ilitye eliyintloko yegumbi, linyuliwe, linqabile: kanjalo okolwayo kulo akasayi kudaniswa." 
1Peter2:7 Kukokwenu ngoko oko kunqabileyo, nina nikolwayo; kodwa abangevayo kukokwabo oko kutiwa: Ilitye babelilahlile abaki, elona laba yintloko yegumbi," 
1Peter2:8 nelitye lokuku̔bekisa, nolwalwa lwokuwisa; kwa kubo abaku̔bekayo bengaliva nje ilizwi; abebemiselwa kona kanjako." 
1Peter2:9 Kodwa nina nisisizukulwana esinyuliweyo, nibubuperisite obubukumkani, nisisizwe esingcwele, ningabantu abayimfuyo etengiweyo; ukuze nibalise izinto zamandla zalowo wanibizayo nipume ebumnyameni ningene ekukanyeni kwake okungummangaliso:" 
1Peter2:10 nina enibe nifudula ningengabantu, kodwa kaloku ningabantu bakatixo; enibe ningafumananga ububele, kodwa kaloku nifumene ububele." 
1Peter2:11 BATANDWA! ndiya ni yala njengabapamkukeli nabaṙanukeli, ukuba nizile inkanuko zasenyameni, ezilwayo ngakuwo umpefumlo;" 
1Peter2:12 ninako ukumila kwenu nje pakati kwabo abaheyideni kufanelekile; ukuze ke, kwa kuko oko banihlebayo ngako njengabenzi bokukohlakeleyo, bati ngezenzo zenu ezifanelekileyo bakuzibonela badumise utixo emhleni wokunonelelwa kwabo." 
1Peter2:13 Lulamelani ngoko kuzo zonke izidalelwa zasebantwini, ngenxa yayo inkosi: nokuba kube kukumkani, njengakopezulu;" 
1Peter2:14 nokuba kube sezinkosini, njengakubo abatunyiweyo nguye kube kukwohlwaywa kwabenzi bokukohlakeleyo, nokunconywa kwabenzi bokulungileyo." 
1Peter2:15 Ngokuba injalo intando katixo, ukuba niti ngokwenza okulungileyo nikuti cwaka ukungazi kwabantu abazizidenge:" 
1Peter2:16 njengabakululekileyo, kanti ningenako ukukululeka kwenu njengesigubungelo sobumenemene, koko ninako njengamakonza katixo." 
1Peter2:17 Bekani abantu bonke. Tandani ubuzalwana. Yoyikani utixo. Bekani ukumkani. 
1Peter2:18 Nina zicaka! lulamelani kuzo inkosi zenu ngokuhlonela konke; kungabi kuzo ezilungileyo nezitambileyo zodwa, kube nakuzo ezigwenxa." 
1Peter2:19 Ngokuba oku kuyinto enokubukwa, ukuba umntu ngenxa yokwazela utixo uyazinyamezela intsizi, niziva nje ngokupatwa ngokungalungileyo." 
1Peter2:20 Ngokuba ludumo lunina, ukuba niya kuti, nxa nisona nandul’ ukubetwa, ninyamezele? Koko ukuba niya kuti, nxa nisenza okulungileyo nandul’ ukuva intlungu, ninyamezele, oku kuyinto enokubukwa pambi kwotixo." 
1Peter2:21 Ngokuba nibizelwe kwa oku: kuba no‐Kristu esivele tina intlungu, esishiyela umlinganiso, ukuze nilandele emikondweni yake:" 
1Peter2:22 ongenzanga sono, nekungafunyanwanga nkohliso emlonyeni wake:" 
1Peter2:23 obesiti akutukwa akapindezela ngokutuka; akuva intlungu akasongela; kodwa wazilahlela kulowo ugwebayo ngokulungileyo: 
1Peter2:24 owati izono zetu yena ngokwake wazitwala emzimbeni wake pezu kwomti, ukuze siti, sifile nje ngakuzo izono, sibe sisidla ubomi ngakubo ubulungisa: okungayo imivimbo yake napiliswa." 
1Peter2:25 Ngokuba nibe ninjengegusha ezilahlekayo; koko kaloku nibuyele kuye umalusi nomlindi wemipefumlo yenu. 
1Peter3:1 Ngokunjalo, nina bafazi! lulamelani kwawenu amadoda; ukuze ke, ukuba kuko angalivayo ilizwi, azuzwe ngokumila kwabafazi bawo kungeko ukuteta;" 
1Peter3:2 akubonela ukumila kwenu okucokisekileyo kunokuhlonela. 
1Peter3:3 Abakuhomba makungabi koko kungapandle, njengo kwokupota inwele, nokwokufaka igolide, nokwokwambata izivato;" 
1Peter3:4 koko makube ngumntu ositeleyo wentliziyo, ngo kuhomba okungonakaliyo kwomoya olulamileyo nozolileyo, olixabiso elikulu ebusweni bukatixo." 
1Peter3:5 Ngokuba bebefudula besenje njalo nabafazi abangcwele, abebetemba kuye utixo, ukuzihomba kwabo, belulamela kwawabo amadoda:" 
1Peter3:6 njengokuba u‐Sara wamvayo u‐Abrahame, embiza ngenkosi; enizintombi zake nina, nakuba nisiti nikwenze okulungileyo, ningoyiki nasinye isituso." 
1Peter3:7 Ngokunjalo, nina madoda! hlalani na bo ngokufanelene nokwazi, ninike umfazi imbeko njengokuba eyimpahla ebutataka ngakumbi, nanjengokuba nizindlalifa kunye zofefe lwobomi, ukuze imitandazo yenu ingabi nakutintelwa." 
1Peter3:8 UKUPELA ke, yibani nonke nivumelana, nivelana ngobubele, nitandana njengabazalwana, ninenceba, ninobuhlobo:" 
1Peter3:9 ningapindezeli ngobubi ngenxa yobubi, umhlaumbi ngokutuka ngenxa yokutuka; kodwa ngelinye icala nitamsanqelisa; nisazi nje ukuba nabizelwa kwa oku, ukuze nizuze itamsanqa." 
1Peter3:10 Ngokuba onxamela ukutanda ubomi, nokubona imihla elungileyo, makapezise ulwimi lwake kokukohlakeleyo, nomlomo wake ukuba ungateti inkohliso:" 
1Peter3:11 makapepe okukohlakeleyo, enze okulungileyo; makafune uxolo, aluputume ke." 
1Peter3:12 Kuba amehlo kayehova epezu kwabalungisayo, nendlebe zake zi bek elwa ukukunga kwabo: kodwa ubuso bukayehova bungakubo abakwenzayo okukohlakeleyo." 
1Peter3:13 Ngubanina ke oya kunenza ububi, xeshekweni ningabalandeli bokulungileyo?" 
1Peter3:14 Koko nokuba ningaba nisiva intlungu ngenxa yobulungisa, ninetamsanqa ke. Ize ningoyiki ngokwoyika kwabo, ningaxaliswa kanjako;" 
1Peter3:15 kodwa uyehova utixo mngcwaliseni ezintliziyweni zenu. Kanjalo hlalani nilungele ukunika impendulo kubo bonke abalibizayo kuni ituba letemba elipakati kwenu ngokululama nangokuhlonela: 
1Peter3:16 ninaso isazeliso esilungileyo; ukuze ke, kwa kuko oko banihlebayo ngako njengabenzi bokukohlakeleyo, badaniswe abo bakuxokayo ukumila kwenu okulungileyo ku‐Kristu." 
1Peter3:17 Ngokuba kulungile ngakumbi ukuba niti, yakutanda intando katixo, nive intlungu ngokwenza okulungileyo, ngapezu kwokuba nive intlungu ngokwenza okukohlakeleyo." 
1Peter3:18 Ngokuba no‐Kristu weva intlungu kwa kanye ngenxa yezono, olungileyo evela abangalungileyo, ukuze asizise kutixo, efisiwe inyama nje, kodwa epilisiwe ngomoya;" 
1Peter3:19 okungaye kanjako waya washumayela komoya abasekuvalelweni," 
1Peter3:20 bakuba fudula bebengenakuva, oko kube kulinda ukuzeka kade kukatixo emihleni ka‐Nowa, nxa inqanawa ibilungiswa, okukuyo imipefumlo emincinane, oko kukuti esibozo, yasindiswa icanda amanzi:" 
1Peter3:21 okuti okufanekiselwa ngawo kusisindise kaloku nati, kwa ubapitizesho, (kungekukususwa kwokunco̔la kwenyama, kukupendula kwesazeliso esilungileyo ngakuye utixo,) ngako ukuvuka kwake u‐Yesu Kristu;" 
1Peter3:22 oba ngasekunene kwotixo, eyile ezulwini; ingelosi, nabanegunya, nabanamandla, bebekiwe pantsi kuye." 
1Peter4:1 Ngako ekubeni u‐Kristu wasivelayo tina intlungu enyameni, nani zixo̔beni ngayo inkumbulo ekwa yiyo; ngokuba ovileyo intlungu enyameni enqamkile kwisono;" 
1Peter4:2 ukuze ixesha elisaseleyo lokuhlala enyameni angabi sapila ngenkanuko zabantu, koko apile ngentando katixo." 
1Peter4:3 Ngokuba lisanele ixesha eligqitileyo lobomi betu lokuba safeza inkanuko zabaheyideni, nxa sibe sihamba kuzo izinto zobutshinitshini, inkanuko ezimbi, izinxalo zeveyine, imihlali yobusuku, iziselelwano, nenkonzo ezibuntshontsho zezitixo:" 
1Peter4:4 abatelwa nqa oku, ukuba ningabaleki kunye nabo ukungena ekukukuleni kwobubedengu okukwa kuko, be ni gxeka nje:" 
1Peter4:5 abaya kupendulela kulowo osel’ ehlalela ukugweba abahleliyo nabafileyo. 
1Peter4:6 Ngokuba ngenxa yoku ivangeli yashunyayelwa nakwabafileyo, ukuze bagwetywe ngokwabantu enyameni, kodwa badle ubomi ngo kwotixo emoyeni." 
1Peter4:7 Kodwa ukupela kwezinto zonke sekukufupi: yenzani ngoko ngokutelekelela, niqabuke ngasemitandazweni." 
1Peter4:8 Kodwa pezu kwento zonke yibani notando olunyamekileyo omnye ngakwomnye: kuba utando luya kugubungela isininzi sezono. 
1Peter4:9 Yenzelanani ngembuko yabasemzini, kungeko ukuṙoṙa." 
1Peter4:10 Mabati bonke ngabanye, njengokuba besamkele isipiwo, bakonzane kwa ngaso, njengamagosa alungileyo ofefe olupindapindiweyo lukatixo." 
1Peter4:11 Osukuba eteta, makatete njengamazwi katixo; osukuba ekonza, makakonze njengokwobomelelo obubatyalwayo ngutixo: ukuze ezintweni zonke adunyiswe utixo ngaye u‐Yesu Kristu, okukokwake ubungcwalisa namandla kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene." 
1Peter4:12 Batandwa! ningatelwa nqa ukutsha okukoyo pakati kwenu kube kukulingwa kwenu, njengokungati into emangalisayo ibinihlela:" 
1Peter4:13 niti, njengoko ninobudlelana nazo intlungu zika‐Kristu ngako, nivuye; ukuze kanjalo ekutyilweni kwobungcwalisa bake nivuye ngokugcoba kakulu." 
1Peter4:14 Ukuba niyatukelwa igama lika‐Kristu, ninetamsanqa ke; kuba u?-? moya wobungcwalisa no katixo epumla pezu kwenu: ngokwabo bona uyagxekwa, kodwa ngokwenu nina uyadunyiswa." 
1Peter4:15 Noko makungabiko mntu wakuni ovayo intlungu njengokuba engumbulali, mhlaimbi elisela, mhlaimbi engumenzi wokukohlakeleyo, mhlaimbi engozifaka emicimbini yabanye abantu." 
1Peter4:16 Kodwa ukuba kuko ovayo intlungu njengokuba engum‐Kristu, makangadani; kodwa makadumise utixo kulendawo." 
1Peter4:17 Ngokuba ixesha lifikile lokokuba ukugwetywa kuqalwe ngayo indlu katixo: kodwa ukuba kuqalwa ngati, soba yinto nina ke isipelo sabangayivayo ivangeli katixo?" 
1Peter4:18 Nokuba olungileyo cebetshu uyasindiswa, yena ongabedeshiyo nomoni uya kubonakala pina?" 
1Peter4:19 Ngoko ke nabo abevayo intlungu ngokwentando katixo, mababekele imipefumlo yabo kuye, njengakumdali onyanisekileyo, ekulungiseni." 
1Peter5:1 ABADALA abapakati kwenu ndiyabayala, ondinguye umdali kunye nabo, nenqi̔na lentlungu zika‐Kristu, nonobudlelana nabo ubungcwalisa obuza kutyilwa kanjalo." 
1Peter5:2 Yalusani umhlambi katixo opakati kwenu, ni wu nonelele, kungabi ngokunyanzelwa, kube ngokuvuma; kungabi ke ngenxa yenzuzo embi, kube ngonxamelo lwentliziyo;" 
1Peter5:3 kungabi ke njengokuba nizipata ngobukosi izahlulo zelifa lika‐Tixo, kube njengokuba niyimizekelo kumhlambi." 
1Peter5:4 Noza niti, akubonakaliswa umalusi omkulu, namkele isitsaba sobungcwalisa esingashwabaniyo." 
1Peter5:5 Ngokunjalo, nina batsha! lulamelani kubo abadala. Ewe nonke lulamelani omnye kwomnye, nambate ukutobeka kwentliziyo: ngokuba utixo emelana nabaner̔atshi, kodwa abatobekileyo uyabapa ufefe." 
1Peter5:6 Zitobeni ngoko ngapantsi kwaso isandla esinamandla sikatixo, ukuze anipakamise ngexesha elifanelekileyo;" 
1Peter5:7 sonke isitukutezi senu nisilahlele kuye nje, kuba enikatalela." 
1Peter5:8 Qabukani, nilinde; kuba u‐Satane utshaba lwenu, njengayo ingonyama ekonyayo, ehambahamba, efuna lowo angamginyayo:" 
1Peter5:9 oyena nimale nite nqi elukolweni, nisazi nje ukuba intlungu ezikwa zizo ziyafezwa kubo ubuzalwana benu obuselizweni." 
1Peter5:10 Kekaloku utixo wofefe lwonke, owasibizelayo ebungcwaliseni bake obungunapakade ku‐Kristu Yesu, wanga angati ngokwake, nakuba nivile intlungu kancinane, anizalisekise, aniqinise, anomeleze, anisekele." 
1Peter5:11 Kwa kuye makubeko ubungcwalisa namandla kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene. 
1Peter5:12 Ngaye u‐Silivane, umzalwana onyanisekileyo kuni, njengokuba nditelekelelisa, ndiba̔lile ngokufutshane, ndiyala, ndinqi̔na nokunqi̔na ukuba lulo ufefe oluyinyaniso lukatixo olu nimiyo kulo." 
1Peter5:13 Iṙemente ese‐Babilone eqashiweyo kunye nani, iyanibulisa: kwa no‐Maraki unyana wam." 
1Peter5:14 Bulisanani ngokwanga kwotando. Uxolo malube kuni nonke nikuye u‐Kristu Yesu. Amene. 
2Peter1:1 USIMONE Petrosi, isicaka nompostile ka‐Yesu Kristu, kubo abo baluzuzileyo kwa lona ukolo lufana nolwetu ukuba lunqabile kwalo ebulungiseni bake utixo nomsindisi wetu u‐Yesu Kristu:" 
2Peter1:2 Ufefe noxolo lwanga lunganandiselwa ekwaziweni kwake utixo, no‐Yesu inkosi yetu." 
2Peter1:3 Ukuba amandla ake abutixo esipile zonke izinto ezi lung ele ubomi nobubedesho, ngako ukwaziwa kwalowo owasibizayo ngabo ubungcwalisa namandla;" 
2Peter1:4 okungazo sipiwe izitembiso ezikulu kunene ezinqabileyo, ukuze niti ngezi nibe nobudlelana nawo ummilo obutixo, nisindile nje kulo ulwonakalo oluselizweni ngayo inkanuko;" 
2Peter1:5 kwa ngenxa yako oku ke, senisongeza konke ukuku̔tala nje, yalekelani kulo ukolo lwenu ulwomelelo, nakulo ulwomelelo lwenu ukwazi," 
2Peter1:6 nakuko ukwazi kwenu ubunca̔tu, nakubo ubunca̔tu benu umonde, nakuwo umonde wenu ububedesho," 
2Peter1:7 nakubo ububedesho benu ukutanda abazalwana, nakuko ukutanda abazalwana kwenu utando." 
2Peter1:8 Ngokuba ezizinto ukuba ziko kuni, zisanda nokwanda, zinenza ukuba ninganqeni nokuba ningaputi ekwaziweni kwayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu." 
2Peter1:9 Kanti ke lowo zingeko kuye ezizinto uyimfama, ekohlwa kubona kude, selelibele nje intlanjululwa yezono zake zapambili." 
2Peter1:10 Ngako oko, bazalwana! nxamelani ngakumbi ukubizwa nokunyulwa kwenu ukukwenza kuqinisekile; ngokuba nisenza oku ke ningasayi kuza niwe:" 
2Peter1:11 ngokuba ngokunjalo niya kwenzelelwa ukungena ebukumkanini obungunapakade bayo inkosi yetu nomsindisi wetu u‐Yesu Kristu ngokukolisa. 
2Peter1:12 Ngako oko andiyi kulibala ukunikumbuza futi ngezizinto, nangona niti nizazi, niqiniselwe kwinyaniso eninayo." 
2Peter1:13 Kodwa ndiba kufanelekile, lonke ixesha ndiseko ngalo kulo olupahla, ukuba ndinivuse ngoku ni kumbuza;" 
2Peter1:14 ndisazi nje ukuba ukubekwa pantsi kwalo upahla lwam kuza kubako kamsinya, kwa njengokuba inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu yandibonisayo." 
2Peter1:15 Kodwa ndiya kuzama ukuba nibe nako kanjalo ngamaxesha onke emveni kwokufa kwam ezizinto ukuzikumbula. 
2Peter1:16 Ngokuba besingalandelanga intsomi ezenziweyo ngobuqinga, sakunazisa amandla nokufika kwenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu, koko sibe singababoneli bobukulu bayo." 
2Peter1:17 Ngokuba yamkelayo udumo nobungcwalisa kutixo uyise, kwakuziswa kuyo ilizwi elinjalo livela kubo ubungcwalisa obubungangamsh, lisiti: Lo ungunyana wam otandiweyo, endikolisiweyo kakuhle nguye." 
2Peter1:18 Nelilizwi saliva tina lakuziswa livela ezulwini, oko sibe sinaye entabeni engcwele." 
2Peter1:19 Kanjalo sinalo ilizwi lobuprofitesho liqinisekile ngakumbi, enilungisa ukulinyamekela, njengaso isibane sikanya endaweni emnyama, kude kuti qi̔p’ ukusa, kupume nekwezi, ezintliziyweni zenu:" 
2Peter1:20 oku kuqala nikuqonda nje, ukuba akuko siprofitesho sesiba̔lo esisesokwaso ukutyilwa:" 
2Peter1:21 ngokuba kungezanga kuziswe isiprofitesho ngentando yomntu; koko abantu abangcwele bakatixo batetayo, bequ̔tywa ngumoya oyingcwele." 
2Peter2:1 KODWA kwabekuko nabaprofite ababuxoki pakati kwabantu, njengokuba kuya kubako abafundisi ababuxoki napakati kwenu, abo abaya kuti ngokunyebelezisa bangenise izahlukaniso ezitshabalalisayo, bekanyela nenkosi yabatengayo, ezihlisela intshabalalo ezayo kamsinya." 
2Peter2:2 Baye abaninzi beya kulandela imikwa yabo etshabalalisayo; okungetuba labo indlela yenyaniso iya kugxekwa. 
2Peter2:3 Kanjalo ngokubawa baya kunenza intengo ngamazwi abebezekayo; abakugwetywa kwabo kuse kukade kungazilazili, nokutshabalala kwabo kunganqwalazi." 
2Peter2:4 Ngokuba ke, ukuba utixo akayeka ingelosi zakwona, koko eziwisele esihogweni somlilo emixokelelwaneni yesitokotoko wazinikelayo ukugcinelwa ukugwetywa;" 
2Peter2:5 nokuba akayeka ilizwe lakudala, koko wamlondolozayo u‐Nowa umshumayeli wobulungisa nabanye abasixe̔nxe, akuzisa umsingakazi pezu kwelizwe labangabedeshiyo;" 
2Peter2:6 nokuba izixeko ze‐Sodome ne‐Gomora eziguqule nje zibe ngumtutu wazigweba ngengci̔takalo, ezimisa zibe ngumlinganiso kwabaya kwenza ngokungabedeshi:" 
2Peter2:7 no‐Lote olungileyo, edinisekile kukumila okubutshinitshini kwabakohlakeleyo, wamhlangula; (" 
2Peter2:8 ngokuba lo mntu olungileyo, ngokubona nangokuva, emi pakati kwabo, wakataza umpefumlo wake olungileyo imihla ngemihla ngezenzo zabo ezingendawo;)" 
2Peter2:9 iyakwazi inkosi ukuhlangula ababedeshekileyo ekulingweni, nokugcinela abangalungileyo umhla womgwebo ukuba bohlwaywe;" 
2Peter2:10 nakakulu ke abo bahambayo ngokulandela inyama enkanukweni yokunco̔lileyo, badele nobukosi. Basile, banenkani, aboyiki ukugxeka abasebungcwaliseni:" 
2Peter2:11 apo ingelosi, ezigqitisileyo ngobomelelo nangamandla, zingazisiyo isincetezo esigxekayo ngakubo pambi kwenkosi." 
2Peter2:12 Kodwa aba, njengezilo ezingatelekeleliyo, ezilandela okwemvelo, ezenzelweyo ukubanjwa nokubulawa, begxeka izinto abangazaziyo, bogqibela ukwonakala elwonakalweni lwabo," 
2Peter2:13 beza kwamkela nje umvuzo wokungalungileyo: bebala ububedengu basemini ukuba bungumhlali; bengamabala nezipako; befeketa ezinkohlisweni zabo, nxa badlayo nani emitendelekweni;" 
2Peter2:14 benamehlo ezele luṙexezo, engenako ukuyeka isono: behenda imipefumlo ejingayo, benentliziyo iqeliselwe ukubawa, bengabantwana boqalekiso:" 
2Peter2:15 abati beyishiyile nje indlela elungileyo, balahleka, balandela indlela ka‐Bilame unyana ka‐Bosori, owatanda umvuzo wokungalungileyo;" 
2Peter2:16 kodwa wohlwayelwa ukugqita kwake umteto: iqwaṙashe elisidenge, liteta ngelizwi lomntu, lalela ubugeza bomprofite lowo." 
2Peter2:17 Aba bayimitombo engenamanzi, bangamafu equ̔tywayo luqwitela; ekugcinelwe bona isitokotoko sobumnyama kude kube ngunapakade." 
2Peter2:18 Ngokuba besiti, beteta nje amazwi okuzidla angendawo, bahende ngenkanuko zenyama, ngezinto zobutshinitshini, abo babesindile kanye kubo abahlalayo elulahlekweni;" 
2Peter2:19 bebatembisa nje inkululeko, bona ngokwabo bengamakonza olwonakalo: ngokuba lowo umntu oyiswayo nguye, ekonziswa nguye lo kanjalo." 
2Peter2:20 Ngokuba, emvenikweni basindileyo kwizinco̔liso zaselizweni ngokwaziwa kwayo inkosi nomsindisi u‐Yesu Kristu, ukuba ke babuya baṙintyelwe zizo, boyiswe, okwokupela kwabo kubi ngakumbi kokwokuqala." 
2Peter2:21 Ngokuba ngekuba kubalungele ukuba babe bengayazanga indlela yobulungisa, ngapezu kwokuba bati, emvenikweni bayazileyo, baguquke kuwo umyalelo ongcwele obunikelwe kubo." 
2Peter2:22 Kodwa kubahlele okwomzekeliso oyinyaniso: Inja ibuyele emhlanzweni wayo; nehangukazi ebihlanjiwe, endaweni yokuqikileka eludakeni." 
2Peter3:1 LENCWADI yesibini, batandwa! ndiyayiba̔la kuni kaloku; enditi kuzo zombini ndiluvuse uluvo lwenu olungcwengekileyo ngoku ni kumbuza:" 
2Peter3:2 ukuba nikumbule wona amazwi abetetiwe pambili ngabo abaprofite abangcwele, nawo umyalelo wetu tina bapostile bayo inkosi nomsindisi;" 
2Peter3:3 oku kuqala nikuqonda nje, ukuba kuya kuvela emihleni yokugqibela abahleki, behamba ngokwezabo inkanuko," 
2Peter3:4 besiti nokuti: Sipina isitembiso sokufika kwayo? ngokuba kuseloko obawo balala kukufa, zonke izinto ziman’ ukuhlala njengokuba zibe zihleli njalo kwa sekuqalekeni kwokudalwa." 
2Peter3:5 Ngokuba oku bekufihlelwa ngabomi, okokuba amazulu ebeko kudala, nomhlaba ubumi ngokupuma emanzini nangokuba pakati kwamanzi, ngelizwi likatixo;" 
2Peter3:6 ekungawo wona ilizwe laloko, ligalelelwe ngamanzi nje, latshabalala:" 
2Peter3:7 kodwa awakaloku amazulu nomhlaba abekelwe kwa ngalo lona ilizwi, egcinelwa umlilo kude kube ngumhla wokugweba nowokutshabalala kwabantu abangabedeshiyo." 
2Peter3:8 Kodwa le into inye maningayifihlelwa, batandwa! yokokuba umhla mnye pambi kwenkosi unjengayo iminyaka eliwaka, nokuba iminyaka eliwaka injengawo umhla mnye." 
2Peter3:9 Yona inkosi ayilibaleli okwesitembiso sayo, njengokuba besiba inxenye kukulibala; kuloko inokuzeka kade ngakuti, ingafuni ukuba namnye atshabalale, ifuna ukuba bonke bangene elugqobokweni ke." 
2Peter3:10 Kodwa umhla wenkosi uya kufika njengokuba isela lifika ebusuku; okukuwo amazulu odlula ngesandi esikulu, neziqaleko zisitsha nje zoci̔teka, nawo umhlaba nemisebenzi ekuwo wotshiswa." 
2Peter3:11 Kekaloku ezizinto zonke zinokuci̔teka nje, nifanele ukuba ngabanjanina kuko konke ukumila okungcwele nobubedesho," 
2Peter3:12 nilinda ninxamisa nokunxamisa ukufika kwawo umhla katixo, okungenxa yawo amazulu evuta nje oci̔teka, neziqaleko zisitsha nje zonyibilika?" 
2Peter3:13 Kodwa tina, ngokwesitembiso sake, siyalinda amazulu amatsha nomhlaba omtsha, okuhlala kona ubulungisa." 
2Peter3:14 Ngako oko, batandwa! ezizinto nizilinda nje, zamani ukuba nifunyanwe nguye eluxolweni, ningenabala, ningohlwayeki;" 
2Peter3:15 nokuzeka kade kwenkosi yetu kubaleni ukuba kulusindiso: njengokuba nomzalwana wetu otandiweyo u‐Paulusi, ngokwobulumko obunikiwe kuye, waniba̔lelayo;" 
2Peter3:16 njengokuba eba̔lile nakuzo zonke incwadi zake, eteta kuzo ngezizinto; okukoyo pakati kwazo ezitile ezinzima ukuba ziqondwe, abati bona abangafundileyo nabajingayo bazijikajikise, njengokuba bezenze njalo nezinye iziba̔lo, kuze kube kokwabo ukutshabalala." 
2Peter3:17 Nina ngoko, batandwa! nizazi nje ezizinto ngapambili, lumkani, hleze niti, niku̔kulisiwe ngolahlekiso lwabakohlakeleyo nje, niwe kokwenu ukuqina." 
2Peter3:18 Kodwa kulani elufefeni nasekwaziweni kwayo inkosi yetu nomsindisi wetu u‐Yesu Kristu: okuye makubeko ubungcwalisa nakaloku nakude kube ngunapakade. Amene. 
1John1:1 OKUBE kuko kwa sekuqalekeni, osikuvileyo, osikubonileyo ngamehlo etu, oko sakukangelayo, nezandla zetu zakupatayo, ngelizwi lobomi; (" 
1John1:1 OKUBE kuko kwa sekuqalekeni, osikuvileyo, osikubonileyo ngamehlo etu, oko sakukangelayo, nezandla zetu zakupatayo, ngelizwi lobomi; (" 
1John1:2 ewe ubomi obo babonakaliswa, sasi bu bonile, siyanqi̔na ke, sishumayele kuni ubomi obo obungunapakade, obube buko kuyise, baza babonakaliswa kuti;)" 
1John1:2 ewe ubomi obo babonakaliswa, sasi bu bonile, siyanqi̔na ke, sishumayele kuni ubomi obo obungunapakade, obube buko kuyise, baza babonakaliswa kuti;)" 
1John1:3 oko sikubonileyo nesikuvileyo siyakushumayela kuni, ukuze nani nibe nobudlelana nati; nobudlelana betu okunene bunaye uyise kwa nonyana wake u‐Yesu Kristu."
