Jude1:2 Ububele, noxolo, notando lwanga lunganandiselwa." 
Jude1:3 Batandwa! ndisenza konke ukuku̔tala nje ukuba̔la kuni ngalo usindiso olulolwabo bonke, bendiba kufanelekile ukuba ndiba̔le kuni, ndiniyala ukuba ninyameke ukupikela ukolo olwanikelwa kwa kanye kubo abangcwele." 
Jude1:4 Ngokuba bengenile ngokunyebeleza abantu abatile, ababe kudala bebalulelwe okukugwetywa, abangabedeshiyo, ufefe lwotixo wetu beluguqule lube bubutshinitshini, nokupela kwenkosi utixo nenkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu bemkanyela." 
Jude1:5 Kodwa ndifuna ukunga ndinganikumbuza, nangona nise nikwazi oku, ukuba inkosi, seibasindisile nje abantu elizweni le‐Jipete, yati kamva yabubisa abangakoliweyo." 
Jude1:6 Nazo ingelosi, ezo zingagcinanga isimo sazo sokuqala, koko ziyishiyile eyazo intlalo, izigcinele umgwebo womhla omkulu ngemibambo engunapakade ngapantsi kwesitokotoko." 
Jude1:7 Njengokuba i‐Sodome ne‐Gomora, nezixeko zangakuzo, zizilahlele nje embulweni ngendawo efana nabo, ziputume inyama yimbi kanjalo, zibekelwa ukuba ngumlinganiso, zibuva ubuhlungu bomlilo ongunapakade." 
Jude1:8 Ngokunjalo noko ke bati ababapupi nabo, banco̔lise inyama, badele ubukosi, bagxeke abasebungcwaliseni." 
Jude1:9 Kanti u‐Mikaheli ingelosi enkulu, okuya epikisana no‐Satane ebepika ngawo umzimba ka‐Mosesi akalinga ukuzisa ngakuye isincetezo sokugxeka, koko watshoyo ukuti: Inkosi maikutetise." 
Jude1:10 Kodwa bona aba ezozinto abangazaziyo bayazigxeka; nezozinto abati, njengezilo ezingatelekeleliyo, baziqonde ngemvelo, ngazo ezi bayazonakalisa." 
Jude1:11 Hai nbunzima babo! ukuba behambile endleleni ka‐Kayine, bagalelekela elulahlekweni luka‐Bilame ngenxa yomvuzo, babuba ekupikeni kuka‐Kora." 
Jude1:12 Bona aba bazizidyobo ezidlweni zenu zotando, besitya nani emitendelekweni bengenakwoyika, bezondla bona: bangamafu angenamanzi, equ̔tywaqu̔tywa ngumoya; bayimiti epululekileyo, ingenaziqa̔mo, ifile kabini, idonyulwe ngengcambu;" 
Jude1:13 bangamaza alwayo olwandle, eke̔puza awawo amahlazo; bazinkwenkwezi ezibangazekayo, ekugcinelwe zona isitokotoko sobumnyama kude kube ngunapakade." 
Jude1:14 Kanjalo u‐Enoki, owesixe̔nxe emva kwo‐Adame, wabaprofiteshela nabo aba, esiti: Bona ke, inkosi yeza inamawakawaka abangcwele bayo," 
Jude1:15 ukwenza ukugweba ngakubo bonke, nokuvisa ityala bonke abangabedeshiyo pakati kwabo ngazo zonke izenzo zabo ezingabedeshekileyo ababezenzile ngokungabedeshi, nangazo zonke izinto ezilukuni ababezitetile ngakuyo aboni abangabedeshiyo." 
Jude1:16 Bona aba bangabaṙoṙayo, bangabeyayo, behamba ngokwenkanuko zabo; abamlomo uteta amazwi okuzidla, bebeka abantu ngenxa yenzuzo." 
Jude1:17 Kodwa nina, batandwa! kumbulani wona amazwi abetetiwe pambili ngabo abapostile benkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu;" 
Jude1:18 ukuba bebesiti kuni kuya kubako abahleki exesheni lokugqibela, behamba ngokwezabo inkanuko ezingabedeshekileyo." 
Jude1:19 Ngabo aba abazahlukanisayo, bengabobuntu bodwa, bengenaye umoya." 
Jude1:20 Kodwa nina, batandwa! nizaka nje pezu kwokolo lwenu olungcwelekazi, nitandaza kumoya oyingcwele," 
Jude1:21 zigcineleni elutandweni lukatixo, nibulinda ububele bayo inkosi yetu u‐Yesu Kristu bude bube bubomi obungunapakade." 
Jude1:22 Abanye ke okunene yibani nobubele kubo, nisahlula;" 
Jude1:23 abanye kodwa basindiseni ngokwoyika, nibahlasela emlilweni, niyitiya nengubo edyojiweyo yinyama." 
Jude1:24 Kekaloku kulowo unamandla okunilondoloza ningenakuku̔beka, nokunimisa nimsulwa pambi kwobungcwalisa bake eluvuyweni olukulu," 
Jude1:25 kokupela kwolumkilevo utixo umsindisi wetu, makubeko ubungcwalisa nobukulukazi, amandla negunya, nakaloku nakude kube ngunapakade. Amene." 
Revelation1:1 ISITYILO sika‐Yesu Kristu, eso utixo wasinikayo kuye, ukuba abonise izicaka zake izinto ezifanele ukubako kamsinya: waza watuma wasazisa ngayo ingelosi yake kwisicaka sake u‐Johane;" 
Revelation1:2 owanqi̔nayo ilizwi likatixo, nobunqina buka‐Yesu Kristu, nazo zonke izinto wazibonayo." 
Revelation1:3 Unetamsanqa lowo uleseshayo, nabo bevayo amazwi esisiprofitesho, bagcine ezonto eziba̔liweyo kuso; ngokuba ixesha likufupi." 
Revelation1:4 UJOHANE kuzo iṙemente zosixe̔nxe ezise‐Asiya: Ufefe malube kuni, noxolo, luvela kuye okoyo, obeko, ozayo; nakubo omoya bosixe̔nxe abapambi kweterone yake;" 
Revelation1:5 nakuye u‐Yesu Kristu, inqi̔na eliyinene, umzalwa‐tanci kwabafileyo, nenkosi yokumkani bomhlaba. Kuye owasitandayo, wasihlanza kuzo izono zetu egazini lake;" 
Revelation1:6 waza wasenza okumkani nabaperisite kuye utixo noyise wake: kuye makubeko ubungcwalisa namandla kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene. 
Revelation1:7 Bona ke, uyeza namafu, aye amehlo onke eya kumbona, nabo abo bamhlabayo; kanjalo zonke izizwe zomhlaba ziya kusenza isijwili ngakuye. Ewe, Amene." 
Revelation1:8 Mna ndingu‐Alefa no‐Omega, isiqalo nesipelo, itsho inkosi e ngutixo, ekoyo, ebiko, ezayo, usomandla." 
Revelation1:9 Mna Johane, onguye nomzalwana wenu, nolikolwane kunye nani embandezelweni, nakubo ubukumkani nomonde ka‐Yesu Kristu ndibe ndisesiqitini esibizwa nge‐Patimo, ngenxa yelizwi likatixo, nangenxa yobunqi̔na buka‐Yesu Kristu." 
Revelation1:10 Ndaba kumoya ngemini yenkosi; ndaza ndeva emva kwam ilizwi elikulu, njengelexilongo," 
Revelation1:11 lisitsho ukuti: Mna ndingu‐Alefa no‐Omega, owokuqala nowokugqibela; nokuti: Oko ukubonayo kuba̔le encwadini, u yi tume kuzo iremente zosixe̔nxe ezise‐Asiya: kuyo i‐Efese, nakuyo i‐Simurena, nakuyo i‐Peregamo, nakuyo i‐Tiyatira, nakuyo i‐Saradise, nakuyo i‐Filadelafiya, nakuyo i‐Lawodikeya." 
Revelation1:12 Ndaza ndajika ukuba ndibone ilizwi elo elatetayo nam. Ndati ndakuba ndijikile ndabona ikandelare zegolide zasixe̔nxe," 
Revelation1:13 napakati kwazo ikandelare zosixe̔nxe ofana nonyana wesintu, evete ingubo ifikela ezinyaweni, ebinqiwe ngasemabeleni ngombinqo wegolide." 
Revelation1:14 Kanjalo intloko yake nenwele zake zazimhlope, njengoboya obumhlope begusha, njengayo ingqweqwe; namehlo ake aenjengalo ilangatye lomlilo:" 
Revelation1:15 nenyawo zake zazifana nexina ekazimlayo, njengokungati zazivuta esidlangalaleni; nelizwi lake lalinjengelizwi lamanzi amaninzi." 
Revelation1:16 Wayepete esandleni sake sokunene inkwenkwezi zasixe̔nxe; nakuwo umlomo wake kwakupuma iṙele elintlangoti zimbini elibukali; nobuso bake babunjengokuba ilanga likanya emandleni alo. 
Revelation1:17 Ndati kekaloku ndakumbona, ndawa ngasezinyaweni zake ngokungati ndifile. Waza wabeka isandla sake sokunene pezu kwam, esiti kum: Ungoyiki; mna ndingowokuqala nowokugqibela;" 
Revelation1:18 ndingopilileyo, kanti ndibe ndifile; kanjalo, bona ke, ndipilile kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade: Amene: kanjako ndinazo izilotile zehadesi nezokufa." 
Revelation1:19 Ziba̔le ezonto wazibonayo, nezo zikoyo, nezo ziza kubako emveni kwazo ezi." 
Revelation1:20 Imfihlakalo yenkwenkwezi zosixe̔nxe wazibonayo kwesokunene sam nekandelare zosixe̔nxe zegolide: zona inkwenkwezi zosixe̔nxe zizingelosi zeṙemente zosixe̔nxe; nazo ikandelare zosixe̔nxe wazibonayo ziziremente ezisixe̔nxe. 
Revelation2:1 KUYO ingelosi yeṙemente yase‐Efese ba̔la ngokuti: Utsho lowo uzibambayo inkwenkwezi zosixe̔nxe kwesokunene sake, ohambayo pakati kwazo ikandelare zosixe̔nxe zegolide, ukuti:" 
Revelation2:2 Ndiyazi imisebenzi yako, nomzamo wako, nomonde wako, nokokuba akungenyamezele abakohlakeleyo; nokuba ubalingile abo batshoyo ukuti bangabapostile, kanti abangabo, wabafumana ukuba bangamaxoki:" 
Revelation2:3 ewe wanyamezela, unomonde ke, uzamile ngenxa yegama lam kanjalo, akudinwanga ke." 
Revelation2:4 Koko ndinako oku ngakuwe, ukuba utando lwako lwokuqala ulushiyile." 
Revelation2:5 Kumbula ngoko apo uwe kona, uguquke, wenze eyokuqala imisebenzi: okanye, ndiyeza kuwe msinya, ndandiya kukwelelisa ikandelare yako endaweni yayo, ukuba akuguquki." 
Revelation2:6 Koko oku unako, ukuba uyatiya imisebenzi yaba‐Nikolasi, enditiya yona nam." 
Revelation2:7 Onendlebe makeve into umoya ayitshoyo kuzo iṙemente: Owoyisayo ndiya kumnika ukuba adle kuwo umti wobomi, opakati kwayo iparadisi katixo." 
Revelation2:8 Nakuyo ingelosi yeṙemente yase‐Simurena ba̔la ngokuti: Utsho owokuqala nowokugqibela, lowo ube ufile, waza wabuya wapila, ukuti:" 
Revelation2:9 Ndiyazi imisebenzi yako, nombandezelwa wako, nobuhlwempu bako, (utyebile noko,) nokugxeka kwabo abati bangama‐Juda kwa bona, kanti abangawo, bayintlanganiso ka‐Satane." 
Revelation2:10 Ungoyiki nanye yezonto uza kuziva zona: bona ke, u‐Satane uza kuniposa inxenye entolongweni, ukuze nilingwe: naniya kuba nembandezelo imihla elishumi: yiba unyanisekile kude kube sekufeni, ndandiya kukunika isitsaba sobomi." 
Revelation2:11 Onendlebe makeve into umoya ayitshoyo kuzo iṙemente: Owoyisayo akasayi kwenzakaliswa ngokufa kwesibini. 
Revelation2:12 Nakuyo ingelosi yeṙemente yase‐Peregamo ba̔la ngokuti: Utsho lowo unalo iṙele elintlangoti zimbini elibukali ukuti: 
Revelation2:13 Ndiyazi imisebenzi yako, nalapo uhlala kona, apo iterone ka‐Satane ikona; kanjalo uyalibamba igama lam, akukanyelanga ke ukolo lwam, kwa nakuleyo imihla u‐Antipasi ubelinqi̔na lam elinyanisekileyo kuyo, owabulawa pakati kwenu, apo u‐Satane ahlala kona." 
Revelation2:14 Koko ndinako okuncinane ngakuwe, ukuba unabo kona abalubambayo ufundiso luka‐Bilame, owabefundisa u‐Balaki ukuposa isiku̔bekiso pambi kwosapo luka‐Sirayeli, sokuba lutye okubingelweyo izitixo, nokuba lwenze umbulo." 
Revelation2:15 Kwa njalo nawe unabo abalubambayo ufundiso lwaba‐Nikolasi, endilutiyayo." 
Revelation2:16 Guquka; okanye, ndiyeza kuwe msinya, ndandiya kulwa nabo ngeṙele lomlomo wam." 
Revelation2:17 Onendlebe makeve into umoya ayitshoyo kuzo iṙemente: Owoyisayo ndiya kumnika ukuba adle kuyo imana efihlakeleyo; ndandiya kumnika ilitye elimhlope, napezu kwelitye elo igama elitsha liba̔liwe, ekungeko mntu olaziyo, kupela ngulowo olamkelayo." 
Revelation2:18 Nakuyo ingelosi yeṙemente yase‐Tiyatira ba̔la ngokuti: Utsho unyana katixo, omehlo anjengalo ilangatye lomlilo, nenyawo zake zifana nexina ekazimlayo, ukuti:" 
Revelation2:19 Ndiyazi imisebenzi yako, notando lwako, nokonzo lwako, nenkolo yako, nomonde wako, nezenzo zako ukuba ezasemva zikulu kwezokuqala." 
Revelation2:20 Koko ndinako okuncinane ngakuwe, ukuba uvumela umfazi lowo, u‐Jezebele, oti yena ungumprofitekazi, ukufundisa nokulahlekisa izicaka zam, ukuba zenze umbulo, nokuba zitye okubingelweyo izitixo." 
Revelation2:21 Ndaza ndamnika ixesha, ukuze aguquke kuwo umbulo wake; kanti akaguqukanga." 
Revelation2:22 Bona ke, ndiyamposela emandlalweni, nabo barexezayo ndawonye naye embandezelweni omkulu, ukuba abaguquki kuzo izenzo zabo:" 
Revelation2:23 nabantwana bake ndobabulala ngokufa: zaziya kuqonda iṙemente zonke ukuba mna ndingulowo upengululayo izintso nentliziyo; ndandiya kuninika nonke ngabanye ngokwemisebenzi yenu. 
Revelation2:24 Kodwa nditi kuni, kwa kubo abanye abase‐Tiyatira, bonke abangenalo ufundiso olu, nabo basukuba bengazazanga izinto ezinzulu zika‐Satane, njengokuba besitsho: Andiyi kubeka pezu kwenu omnye umtwalo." 
Revelation2:25 Kodwa ke oko ninako, kubambeni ndide ndifike." 
Revelation2:26 Nalowo woyisayo, oyigcinayo kude kube sekupeleni imisebenzi yam kanjalo, ndonika yena igunya pezu kwentlanga;" 
Revelation2:27 waeya kuzipata ngentonga yesincete; njengazo imbiza zombumbi ziya kuqekezwa; kwa njengokuba nam ndamkela kuye ubawo: 
Revelation2:28 ndandiya kumnika ikwe̔zi lomso. 
Revelation2:29 Onendlebe makeve into umoya ayitshoyo kuzo iṙemente. 
Revelation3:1 Nakuyo ingelosi yeṙemente yase Saradise ba̔la ngokuti: Utsho lowo unabo omoya bosixe̔nxe bakatixo, nazo inkwenkwezi zosixe̔nxe, ukuti: Ndiyazi imisebenzi yako, ukuba unegama lokuba upilile, kanti ufile." 
Revelation3:2 Yiba ulinda, uziqinise izinto eziseleyo, ezo ziza kufa: ngokuba ndingafumananga imisebenzi yako ukuba izalisekile ebusweni bukatixo." 
Revelation3:3 Kumbula ngoko ukuba ute nina ukwamkela, nokuba wati nina ukuva, ugcine, uguquke. Ukuba ke akulindi, ndokuzuma njengesela, waungayi kwazi yiyipina iyure endiya kukuzuma ngayo." 
Revelation3:4 Koko unawo amagama amancinane nase‐Saradise angadyobanga izivato zawo; babeya kuhamba nam ben ezivato ezimhlope, kuba befanele." 
Revelation3:5 Owoyisayo, yena lo uya kwambeswa ngezivato ezimhlope: kanjalo andisayi kucima igama lake encwadini yobomi; ndandiya kuvuma igama lake ebusweni bukabawo, nasebusweni bengelosi zake." 
Revelation3:6 Onendlebe makeve into umoya ayitshoyo kuzo iremente. 
Revelation3:7 Nakuyo ingelosi yeremente yase‐Filadelafiya ba̔la ngokuti: Utsho oyingcwele, oyinyaniso, onesilotile sika‐Davide, oti avule kungabiko ovalayo, avale kungabiko ovulayo, ukuti:" 
Revelation3:8 Ndiyazi imisebenzi yako; bona ke, ndinikile pambi kwako ucango oluvulekileyo, ekungeko ongaluvalayo, ngokuba unawo amandla amancinane, nelizwi lam uligcinile, negama lam akulikanyelanga." 
Revelation3:9 Bona ke, ndinika abo bakuyo intlanganiso ka‐Satane, abo bati bona bangama‐Juda, kanti abangawo, koko bexoka; bona ke, ndiya kubenza ukuba beze babedeshe pambi kwenyawo zako, baze baqonde ukuba ndikutandile mna." 
Revelation3:10 Ngokokuba uligcinile ilizwi lomonde wam, kwa nam ndokugcina wena kulo ixeshana lokulingwa, eliya kuza pezu kwelimiwayo lonke, ukuza kulinga abo bemiyo pezu kwomhlaba." 
Revelation3:11 Bona ke, ndiyeza msinya: bamba oko unako, ukuze kungabiko otabata isitsaba sako." 
Revelation3:12 Owoyisayo, yena ndiya kumenza intsika etempileni yotixo wam, aze angabi sapuma kona: ndandiya kuba̔la pezu kwake igama lotixo wam, negama lesixeko sotixo wam, le‐Yerusaleme entsha, eso sihlayo ezulwini kuye utixo wam; kwa negama lam elitsha." 
Revelation3:13 Onendlebe makeve into umoya ayitshoyo kuzo iremente. 
Revelation3:14 Nakuyo ingelosi yeṙemente yase‐Lawodikeya ba̔la ngokuti: Utsho u‐Amene, inqi̔na eliyinene eliyinyaniso, isiqalo sesidalwa sikatixo, ukuti:" 
Revelation3:15 Ndiyazi imisebenzi yako, ukuba akubandi, akushushu kanjako; akwaba ububanda, umhlaumbi ubushushu!" 
Revelation3:16 Kwa njalo ke, ngokokuba ulidikidiki, ungabandi nje, ungashushu kanjako, ndiya kukuhlanza emlonyeni wam." 
Revelation3:17 Ngokokuba usiti: Ndityebile, sendizuze ubutyebi, andiswele luto ke; ungazi kanti ukuba unguye olusizi, okedamelekayo, olihlwempu, oyimfama, ozé:" 
Revelation3:18 ndiyakunika icebo lokuba utenge kum igolide icokisiwe ngomlilo, ukuze utyebe; nezivato ezimhlope, ukuze wambeswe, nokuba lingabonakaliswa ihlazo lobuzé bako; nesitambiso sokutambisa amehlo ako, ukuze ubone." 
Revelation3:19 Abo sukuba ndibatanda, ndiyabatetisa ndibohlwaye: zondelela ngoko, uguquke." 
Revelation3:20 Bona ke, ndimi ngaselucangweni, ndiqongqota nokuqongqota: xeshekweni umntu evayo ilizwi lam, avule ucango, ndiya kungena kuye, ndidle naye, ati yena adle nam." 
Revelation3:21 Owoyisayo ndiya kumnika ukuba ahlale nam eteroneni yam, njengokuba nam ndoyisayo, ndaza ndahlala nobawo eteroneni yake." 
Revelation3:22 Onendlebe makeve into umoya ayitshoyo kuzo iremente. 
Revelation4:1 EMVENI kwoku ndabona, kekaloku bona ke, bekuko ucango luvulekile ezulwini, nelizwi lokuqala, elo ndalivayo njengelexilongo liteta nam, lisiti: Nyukela apa, ndandiya kukubonisa izinto ezifanele ukubako emveni kwezi." 
Revelation4:2 Ndasendisiti kwa oko ndaba kumoya: kekaloku bona ke, iterone ibimi ezulwini, napezu kweterone leyo bekuko omnye ehleli." 
Revelation4:3 Lowo ke obehleli ukubonakala kwake ebefana nelitye lejasipidi nelerubi: kwaye kuko nomnyama ungqonga iterone leyo, ufana nelitye lesamagide ukubonakala kwawo." 
Revelation4:4 Kanjalo bekuko zingqonga iterone leyo ezinye iterone zimashumi mabini anane: napezu kweterone ezo ndabona abadala abamashumi mabini anabane behleli, bezambete izivato ezimhlope; baye benazo ezintlokweni zabo izitsaba zegolide." 
Revelation4:5 Nakuyo iterone leyo kupuma imibane, nendudumo, namazwi: kanjalo bekuko izibane zomlilo zisixe̔nxe zivuta pambi kweterone leyo, ezingabo omoya bosixe̔nxe bakatixo." 
Revelation4:6 Kwaye kuko kanjako pambi kweterone leyo ulwandle oluyiglasiṙa, lufana nekrisitale: napakati kwayo iterone, nangento eyingqongayo iterone, bekuko izidalwa ezipilileyo ezine zizele ngamehlo ngapambili nangasemva." 
Revelation4:7 Esokuqala isi dalwa esipilileyo besifana nengonyama; esesibini isidalwa esipilileyo besifana netole lenkomo; esesitatu isidalwa esipilileyo sibe sinobuso baso njengomntu; esesine isidalwa esipilileyo besifana noko̔zi lubaleka. 
Revelation4:8 Kanjalo izidalwa ezipilileyo zozine, zonke ngazinye, zibe zinamapiko amatandatu ezinye ngezinye ngokungqonga, zizele ngamehlo pakati, zingenakupumla nasemini nasebusuku, zisiti: Ingcwele, ingcwele, ingcwele inkosi e ngutixo engusomandla, ebiko, ekoyo, ezayo." 
Revelation4:9 Naxeshekweni ezozidalwa ezipilileyo zinikela udumo, nembeko, nombulelo, kulowo uhleli pezu kweterone leyo, kulowo upilileyo kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade," 
Revelation4:10 bati abadala bomashumi mabini anabane bawe pambi kwalowo uhleli pezu kwayo iterone, babedeshe lowo upilileyo kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade, bapose izitsaba zabo pambi kwayo iterone, besiti:" 
Revelation4:11 Ufanele, Nkosi! ukwamkela udumo, nembeko, namandla: ngokuba wena uzidalile izinto zonke ezikoyo ngenxa yentando yako, ezazidalelwe yona kanjalo." 
Revelation5:1 NDAZA ndayibona kwesokunene isandla salowo uhleli pezu kwayo iterone incwadi, iba̔liwe pakati nangapandle, incanyatiselwe ngezincamatiselo zisixe̔nxe." 
Revelation5:2 Kanjako ndayibona ingelosi eyomeleleyo ishumayela ngelizwi elikulu, isiti: Ngubanina ofanele ukuvula incwadi le, nokukumla izincamatiselo zayo?" 
Revelation5:3 Kwaza akwabiko namnye, nasezulwini, nasemhlabeni, napantsi kwomhlaba, obenamandla okuvula incwadi leyo, kwa nokuyikangela." 
Revelation5:4 Kekaloku mna ndibe ndilila kakulu, kuba bekungafunyanwanga namnye ofanele ukuvula nokulesesha incwadi leyo, nokuyikangela kanjalo." 
Revelation5:5 Waza omnye wabadala abo wati kum: Ungalili; bona ke, ingonyama eyeyakuso isizwe sika‐Juda, ingcambo ka‐Davide, yoyisile ukuyivula incwadi, nokukumla izincamatiselo zayo zosixe̔nxe." 
Revelation5:6 Ndaza ndabona, kekaloku bona ke, pakati kwayo iterone nezidalwa ezipilileyo zozine, napakati kwabadala abo, bekuko imvana imi njengokungati ibingiwe, inempondo ezisixe̔nxe namehlo asixe̔nxe, angabo omoya bosixe̔nxe bakatixo abatunyelweyo emhlabeni wonke." 
Revelation5:7 Yeza yayitabata incwadi kwesokunene isandla salowo uhleli pezu kwayo iterone. 
Revelation5:8 Kekaloku okuya yayitabatayo incwadi, izidalwa ezipilileyo zozine nabadala bomashumi mabini anabane bawa pambi kwayo imvana, bepete abanye ngabanye igitare, nefiyali zegolide zizele ziziqu̔miso, eziyiyo imitandazo yabangcwele." 
Revelation5:9 Baye bevuma iculo elitsha, besiti: Ufanele ukuyitabata incwadi, nokunqika izincamatiselo zayo; ngokuba wabingwayo, wasitengela utixo ngegazi lako, kuzo zonke izizwe, nenteto, nabantu, nentlanga," 
Revelation5:10 wasenza okumkani nabaperisite kutixo wetu; sasiya kupata ngobukumkani emhlabeni. 
Revelation5:11 Ndaza ndabona, ndaliva ilizwi lengelosi ezininzi zingqonga iterone nezidalwa ezipilileyo nabadala; lalibe inani lazo lingamashumimawaka amashumimawaka, namawaka amawaka;" 
Revelation5:12 zisiti ngelizwi elikulu: Ifanele imvana ebingiweyo ukwamkela amandla, nobutyebi, nobulumko, nobomelelo, nembeko, nodumo, nombongo." 
Revelation5:13 Nazo zonke izidalwa ezisezulwini, nasemhlabeni, napantsi kwomhlaba, nezo zipezu kwolwandle, nento zonke ezikuzo, ndaziva zisiti: Kulowo uhleli pezu kwayo iterone, nakuyo imvana, makubeko umbongo, nembeko, nodumo, namandla, kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Revelation5:14 Zaye izidalwa ezipilileyo zozine zibe zisiti: Amene. Bati kekaloku abadala bomashumi mabini anabane bawa pantsi, babedesha lowo upilileyo kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Revelation6:1 NDAZA ndabona xeshekweni imvana yasinqikayo esinye kuzo izincamatiselo ezo, ndeva esinye kuzo izidalwa ezipilileyo zozine sisiti njengelizwi lodudumo: Yiza ukangele." 
Revelation6:2 Ndaza ndabona, kekaloku bona ke, ihashe elimhlope, nalowo uhleli pezu kwalo epete isipeta: kwaye kunikwa kuye isitsaba; wapuma ke esoyisa, nokuba oyise." 
Revelation6:3 Naxeshekweni yasinqikayo esesibini isincamatiselo, ndeva esesibini isidalwa esipilileyo sisiti: Yiza ukangele." 
Revelation6:4 Kwaza kwapuma elinye ihashe, libomvu: nakulowo uhleli pezu kwalo kwanikwa ukususa uxolo emhlabeni, nokuba babulalane; wanikwa ke isiṙele esikulu." 
Revelation6:5 Naxeshekweni yasinqikayo esesitatu isincamatiselo, ndeva esesitatu isidalwa esipilileyo sisiti: Yiza ukangele. Ndaza ndabona, kekaloku bona ke, ihashe elimnyama, nalowo uhleli pezu kwalo epete isilinganiselo esandleni sake." 
Revelation6:6 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi pakati kwazo izidalwa ezipilileyo zozine lisiti: Ibekile ibe nye yenqolowa ngedenari, nebekile zibe ntatu zeṙalasi ngedenari; uze ungenzakalisi ioli neveyine." 
Revelation6:7 Naxeshekweni yasinqikayo isincamatiselo sesine, ndeva ilizwi lesesine isidalwa esipilileyo lisiti: Yiza ukangele." 
Revelation6:8 Ndaza ndabona, kekaloku bona ke, ihashe elilubelu, nalowe uhleli pezu kwalo, igama lake lingu‐Kufa; kanjalo u‐Hadesi uyalandela naye. Kwaye kunikwa kubo igunya lokuba babulale, pezu kwesesine isiqingata somhlaba, ngeṙele, nangendlala, nangokufa, nangawo amar̔amncwa omhlaba." 
Revelation6:9 Naxeshekweni yasinqikayo esesihlanu isincamatiselo, ndayibona ngapantsi kwaso isibingelo imipefumlo yabo babebulewe ngenxa yelizwi likatixo, nangenxa yobunqi̔na abebepete bona." 
Revelation6:10 Baye bedanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, besiti: Kwoda kube ninina, Nkosi eyingcwele eyinyaniso! ungagwebi ungapindezeleli igazi letu kubo abemiyo pezu kwomhlaba?" 
Revelation6:11 Kwaza kwanikwa kubo abanye ngabanye ingubo ezimhlope, kwatshiwo kubo ukuti mababe besapumla kube lixesha elincinane, bade bazalisekiswe inani labo nabo abazizicaka kunye nabo nabazalwana babo, abaya kubulawa kwa njengabo bona." 
Revelation6:12 Ndaza ndabona xeshekweni yasinqikayo isincamatiselo sesitandatu, kekaloku bona ke, kusuke kwabako isingcangcazelo esikulu somhlaba; lati ilanga laba mnyama njengentlakantlaka yoboya, nenyanga yaba njengegazi," 
Revelation6:13 nenkwenkwezi zawa ngasemhlabeni, njengokuba umkiwane uvutulula amakiwane awo asebusika, wakungcangcazeliswa ngumoya omkulu." 
Revelation6:14 Laza izulu lahluka njengencwadi yakusongwa; nazo zonke intaba neziqiti zakweleliswa ezindaweni zazo. 
Revelation6:15 Kanjako okumkani bomhlaba, nemiduna, nezityebi, nenkosiwaka, nabanamandla, nawo onke amakonza, nabo bonke abakululekileyo, bazifihlela emiqolombeni nasemaweni entaba:" 
Revelation6:16 besitsho ezintabeni nasemaweni ukuti: Siweleni, nisifihle kubo ubuso balowo uhleli pezu kweterone, nakuwo umsindo wemvana;" 
Revelation6:17 ngokuba ufikile umhla omkulu womsindo wayo; ngubanina ke ongemayo? 
Revelation7:1 NASEMVENI kwezizinto ndabona ingelosi zane zimi emagumbini omane omhlaba, zibamba imimoya yomine yomhlaba, ukuze kungavuteli moya pezu kwomhlaba, napezu kwolwandle, napezu kwamnye umti." 
Revelation7:2 Ndaza ndabona enye ingelosi inyuka empumalanga, ipete isincamatiselo sotixo opilileyo: yadanduluka ke ngelizwi elikulu kuzo ingelosi zone, ekwanikwa kuzo ukwenzakalisa umhlaba nolwandle," 
Revelation7:3 isiti: Ningenzakalisi umhlaba, nolwandle, nemiti, side sincamatisele izicaka zotixo wetu pezu kwamabunzi azo." 
Revelation7:4 Ndaza ndeva inani labancanyatiselweyo: amawaka alikulu linamashumi mane anamawaka mane ngapandle ebencanyatiselwe kuzo zonke izizwe zosapo luka‐Sirayeli. 
Revelation7:5 Kuso isizwe sika‐Juda amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. Kuso isizwe sika‐Rubene amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. Kuso isizwe sika‐Gadi amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. 
Revelation7:6 Kuso isizwe sika‐Ashere amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. Kuso isizwe sika‐Nefatali amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. Kuso isizwe sika‐Manase amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. 
Revelation7:7 Kuso isizwe sika‐Simone amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. Kuso isizwe sika‐Levi amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. Kuso isizwe sika‐Yisakare amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. 
Revelation7:8 Kuso isizwe sika‐Zebulone amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. Kuso isizwe sika‐Josefe amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. Kuso isizwe sika‐Benjamine amawaka alishumi linamabini ebencanyatiselwe. 
Revelation7:9 Emveni kwoku ndabona, kekaloku bona ke, isihlwele esikulu, ekungeko namnye ongasibalayo, sivela kuzo zonke intlanga, nezizwe, nabantu, nenteto, bemi pambi kweterone napambi kwemvana, bezambete ingubo ezimhlope, ben amagatya emiti yepalime ezandleni zabo;" 
Revelation7:10 baye bedanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, besiti: Usindiso malube kuye utixo wetu ohleli pezu kweterone, nakuyo imvana." 
Revelation7:11 Zazibe zite zonke ingelosi zema zingqonga iterone, nabadala, nezidalwa ezipilileyo zozine, zawa pambi kwayo iterone ngobuso bazo, zabedesha utixo," 
Revelation7:12 zisiti: Amene. Makubeko umbongo, nodumo, nobulumko, nombulelo, nembeko, namandla, nobomelelo, kuye utixo wetu kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. Amene." 
Revelation7:13 Waza wapendula omnye wakubo abadala abo, esiti kum: Aba bazambeteyo ingubo ezimhlope, bangobanina bona? bavela pina kanjalo?" 
Revelation7:14 Ndaza ndatsho kuye ukuti: Nkosi! uyazi wena. Waza wati kum: Bona aba bangabavelayo kuleyo imbandezelo enkulu, abate bazihlanza ingubo zabo, bazenza mhlope egazini layo imvana." 
Revelation7:15 Bako ngenxa yoku pambi kweterone katixo, bamkonze emini nasebusuku etempileni yake: waye lowo uhleli pezu kwayo iterone eya kubakusela." 
Revelation7:16 Abasayi kuba salamba, abasayi kuba sanxanwa kanjako; kungababaleleli nelanga, nabunye ubushushu:" 
Revelation7:17 ngokuba imvana epakati kwayo iterone iya kubalusa, ibakokele kuyoimitombo epilileyo yamanzi; waye utixo eya kusula zonke inyembezi emehlweni abo." 
Revelation8:1 NAXESHEKWENI yasinqikayo isincamatiselo sesixe̔nxe, kwatiwa cwaka ezulwini kwanga kusisiqingata seyure." 
Revelation8:2 Ndaza ndabona ingelosi ezo zisixe̔nxe ezimiyo ebusweni bukatixo: kwaye kunikwa kuzo amaxilongo asixe̔nxe. 
Revelation8:3 Yandula yeza enye ingelosi, yema ngasesibingelweni, ipete isiqu̔melo sego lide; kwaye kunikwa kuyo into eninzi yeziqu̔miso, ukuze i yi nikele kunye nemitandazo yabangcwele bonke pezu kwesibingelo segolide pambi kwayo iterone." 
Revelation8:4 Waza wenyuka umsi weziqu̔miso, kunye nemitandazo yabangcwele, esandleni sengelosi pambi kwotixo." 
Revelation8:5 Yaza ingelosi leyo yasitabata isiqu̔melo, yasizalisa kuwo umlilo wesibingelo, wa wu posela emhlabeni: kusuke kwabako amazwi, nendudumo, nemibane, nesingcangcazelo somhlaba." 
Revelation8:6 Zaza ingelosi ezo zosixe̔nxe, zipete amaxilongo lawo osixe̔nxe, zazilungisa ukuze zihlokomise." 
Revelation8:7 Yati eyokuqala ingelosi yahlokomisa; kusuke kwabako izico̔to nomlilo zipitikeziwe negazi, zaposelwa emhlabeni: saza isiqingata sesitatu sayo imiti satshiswa, nabo bonke utyani obuluhlaza batshiswa." 
Revelation8:8 Yati eyesibini ingelosi yahlokomisa; kwaye kunjengokungati intaba enkulu isitsha ngomlilo yaposelwa elwandle: sisuke isiqingata sesitatu solwandle saba ligazi: 
Revelation8:9 saza safa isiqingata sesitatu sazo izidalwa eziselwandle, ezo zinokudliwa kwobomi; kanjalo isiqingata sesitatu sazo inqanawa sabujiswa." 
Revelation8:10 Yati eyesitatu ingelosi yahlokomisa; kwaza kwawa ezulwini inkwenkwezi enkulu ivuta njengesibane, yawa pezu kwesiqingata sesitatu sayo imilambo, napezu kwayo imitombo yamanzi;" 
Revelation8:11 negama lenkwenkwezi leyo kutwa ngu‐Mhlonyane: saza isiqingata sesitatu sawo amanzi saba ngumhlonyane: bati abantu abaninzi bafa ngamanzi lawo, kuba enziwa ṙaṙa." 
Revelation8:12 Yati eyesine ingelosi yahlokomisa; kwaza kwabetwa isiqingata sesitatu selanga, nesiqingata sesitatu senyanga, nesiqingata sesitatu senkwenkwezi; ukuze kwenziwe mnyama isiqingata sesitatu sazo, iti imini ingabonakali isiqingata sesitatu sayo, nobusuku bube kwa njalo." 
Revelation8:13 Ndaza ndabona, ndeva ingelosi etile ibaleka ngamapiko pakati kwezulu isiti ngelizwi elikulu: Ilishwa, ilishwa, ilishwa, kubo abemiyo pezu kwomhlaba, ngawo amanye amazwi exilongo lengelosi zontatu eziseza kuhlokomisa!" 
Revelation9:1 YATI eyesihlanu ingelosi yahlokomisa; ndaza ndabona inkwenkwezi iwile ezulwini ngasemhlabeni: kwaye kunikwa kuyo isilotile sesihogo sesinzulu. 
Revelation9:2 Yaza yasivula isihogo sesinzulu; kwenyuka umsi esihogweni, njengomsi wesidlangalala esikulu; lenziwa mnyama ilanga nesibakabaka ngomsi wesihogo." 
Revelation9:3 Nakuwo umsi lowo kwapuma inkumbi zapum ela emhlabeni: kwaye kunikwa kuzo amandla njengokuba benamandla onomadudwane bomhlaba. 
Revelation9:4 Kwaza kwatshiwo kuzo ukuti mazingenzakalisi utyani‐bomhlaba, kwa nanye into eluhlaza, kwa namuye umti; kupela mazenzakalise abobantu bodwa abangenaso izincamatiselo sikatixo pezu kwamabunzi abo." 
Revelation9:5 Kwaye kunikwa kuzo ukuba zingababulali, koko ukuba bambelwe inyanga zibe ntlanu: nokumbela kwazo bekunjengako ukumbela kwonomadudwane, akuhlaba umntu." 
Revelation9:6 Nakuyo imihla leyo abantu bofuna ukufa, kanti abayi kukufumana; babeya kunqwenela ukunga bangafa, kanti ukufa kwobaleka kubo." 
Revelation9:7 Kanjalo izimilo zenkumbi ezo zibe zifana namahashe elungiselwe imfazwe: napezu kwentloko zazo bekunjengokungati zizitsaba zifana negolide; nobuso bazo bebunjengobuso babantu. 
Revelation9:8 Zazinenwele njengenwele zamankazana; namazinyo azo ebenjengawengonyama. 
Revelation9:9 Zazinezigcinisifuba njengezigcinisifuba zesincete; nesandi samapiko azo besinjengesandi senqwelo zinamahashe amaninzi ebalekela ekulweni. 
Revelation9:10 Zazinemisila ifana nonomadudwane; kanjalo bekuko ilwavila emisileni yazo: namandla azo ebengawokuba zenzakalise abantu inyanga zibe ntlanu. 
Revelation9:11 Zazinayo ibe ngukumkani pezu kwazo ingelosi yesinzulu, egama ngokwama‐Hebere lingu‐Abadone, nangokwama‐Girike inegama elingu‐Apoliyone." 
Revelation9:12 Ilishwa lesinye ligqitile: bona ke, kuseza amashwa amabini emveni kwoku." 
Revelation9:13 YATI eyesitandatu ingelosi yahlokomisa; ndaza ndeva ilizwi livela ezimpondweni zone zesibingelo segolide esipambi kwotixo," 
Revelation9:14 lisiti kuyo eyesitandatu ingelosi ebipete ixilongo: Kulula ezongelosi zone ezibotshiweyo ngasemlanjeni omkulu um‐Ferate. 
Revelation9:15 Zaza zakululwa ezongelosi zone ezibe zilungiselwe leyo iyure, nomhla, nenyanga, nomnyaka, ukuze zibulale isiqingata sesitatu sabantu." 
Revelation9:16 Kekaloku inani lemikosi yabakweli bamahashe bebengamakulu mabini amawaka amawaka: ndeva ke inani labo. 
Revelation9:17 Kwaye kungokunje ndabona amahashe lawo kulomboniso, nabo bahleli pezu kwawo, benezigcinisifuba ezibumliloṙa, nezibuyasinte, nezibusufure: nentloko zamahashe lawo zibe zinjengazo intloko zengonyama; nakuyo imilomo yawo kwapuma umlilo, nomsi, nesufure." 
Revelation9:18 Ngazo ezizinto zontatu kwabulawa isiqingata sesitatu sabantu, ngomlilo, nangomsi, nangesufure, ezipumayo emilonyeni yawo." 
Revelation9:19 Ngokuba amandla awo ekuwo umlomo wawo, nakuyo imisila yawo: ngokuba imisila yawo ifana nenyoka, inazo intloko, nangazo zona ayenzakalisa." 
Revelation9:20 Bati kekaloku abanye abantu, abo babengabulawanga ngezibeto ezi, abaguquka noko kuyo imisebenzi yezandla zabo, ukuze bangazibedeshi idemoni, nezitixo zegolide, nezesilivere, nezexina, nezamatye, nezemiti, ezikohlwa nakukubona, nakukuva, nakukuhamba;" 
Revelation9:21 abaguquka kanjako kuzo izibulalo zabo, nakuzo izitakato zabo, nakuwo umbulo wabo, nakuyo imibado yabo." 
Revelation10:1 Ndaza ndabona enye ingelosi eyomeleleyo isihla ezulwini, ilambete ilifu; kwaye kuko umnyama pezu kwentloko yayo; ubuso bayo bebunjengalo ilanga, nenyawo zayo bezinjengentsika zomlilo;" 
Revelation10:2 kanjalo ibipete esandleni sayo incwadana ivulekile: yaza yabeka unyawo lwayo lwokunene pezu kwolwandle, nolwokohlo pezu kwomhlaba," 
Revelation10:3 yadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, njengoko ingonyama ikonyayo: naxeshekweni yadandulukayo, zateta zona indudumo zisixe̔nze amazwi azo." 
Revelation10:4 Kekaloku xeshekweni indudumo zisixe̔nxe ezo bezitetile amazwi azo, bendiza kuba̔la. Ndaza ndeva ilizwi livela ezulwini lisiti kum: Ncamatisela ezonto zatetwayo zindudumo zosixe̔nxe, ungaziba̔li zona ezi." 
Revelation10:5 Yaza yati ingelosi, leyo ndayibonayo imi pezu kwolwandle napezu kwomhlaba, yapakamisa isandla sayo ngasezulwini," 
Revelation10:6 yafunga lowo upilileyo kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade, owadalayo izulu nezinto ezikulo, nomhlaba nezinto ezikuwo, nolwandle nezinto ezikulo, ukuba akusayi kuba seko xesha;" 
Revelation10:7 koko kuya kuti emihleni yelizwi leyesixe̔nxe ingelosi, yakuza kuhlokomisa, kwandul’ ukufezwa imfihlakalo katixo, njengokuba eshumayele kuzo izicaka zake abaprofite." 
Revelation10:8 Laza elolizwi ndalivayo livela ezulwini labuya lateta nam, lati: Yiya utabate loncwadana ivulekileyo esandleni sayo ingelosi emiyo pezu kwolwandle napezu kwomhlaba." 
Revelation10:9 Ndasuka ndaya kwingelosi leyo, ndati kuyo: Ndinike loncwadana. Yayisiti kum: Tabata, uyidle ugqibe, yaiya kusenza ṙaṙa isisu sako, koko emlonyeni wako iya kuba mnandi njengobusi." 
Revelation10:10 Ndaza ndayitabata loncwadana kuso isandla sengelosi leyo, ndayidla ndagqiba; yaibe emlonyeni wam injengobusi ukuba mnandi; naxeshekweni bendiyityile, saba ṙaṙa isisu sam." 
Revelation10:11 Yayisiti kum: Ufanele ukuba ubuye uprofiteshe ngabo abantu, nentlanga, nenteto, nokumkani abaninzi." 
Revelation11:1 Ndaza ndanikwa ingcongolo ifana nentonga; yati ingelosi leyo yema, isiti: Suka, ulinganise itempile katixo, nesibingelo, nababedeshayo pakati kwayo." 
Revelation11:2 Kanjalo ibala elingapandle kwayo itempile liyeke, uze ungalinganisi lona; ngokuba linikwe kubo abaheyideni: nesixeko esiyingcwele baya kusinyatela inyanga zibe ngamashumi mane anambini." 
Revelation11:3 Ndandiya kunika amanqi̔na am omabini, ukuba aprofiteshe imihla ibe liwaka linamakulu mabini anamashumi matandatu, ezambete ingubo ezintlakantlaka." 
Revelation11:4 Wona la ayiminquma leyo yomibini, nekandelare zombini, ezimiyo ebusweni botixo womhlaba." 
Revelation11:5 Nokuba kuko ofuna ukuwenzakalisa, umlilo uyapuma emlonyeni wawo, uzigqibele intshaba zawo: nokuba kuko ofuna ukuwenzakalisa, ufanele ukubulawa ngokunjalo." 
Revelation11:6 Wona la anamandla okuba alivingce izulu, ukuze kungani imvula emihleni yokuprofitesha kwawo: anamandla kanjako pezu kwawo amanzi, okuba awaguqule abe ligazi, nokuba awubete umhlaba ngezibeto zonke, nxa asukuba etanda ukwenje njalo." 
Revelation11:7 Naxeshekweni afezileyo isinqi̔no sawo, loti ir̔amnco elipumayo esinzulwini lenze imfazwe nawo, liwoyise, liwabulale." 
Revelation11:8 Nezidumbu zawo ziya kubako esitarateni sesixeko esikulu, esiti ngobumoya sibizwa nge‐Sodome nange‐Jipete, apo kanjalo inkosi yetu yabikuruseshelwa kona." 
Revelation11:9 Baye ke bona abakubo abantu, nezizwe, nenteto, nentlanga, beya kubona izidumbu zawo imihla mitatu inesiqingata somhla, bangavumeli ukuba izidumbu zawo zibekwe emancw̔abeni." 
Revelation11:10 Babeya kuti abemiyo pezu kwomhlaba bawavuyele, bagcobe, batumelane amabaso, kuba aba abaprofite ababini bambela abemiyo pezu kwomhlaba." 
Revelation11:11 Nasemveni kwalomihla mitatu inesiqingata somhla, umoya wobomi uvela kutixo wangena kuwo, asuka ema ngenyawo zawo; kwaza ukwoyika okukulu kwawa pezu kwabo abebewabonela." 
Revelation11:12 Kanjalo eva ilizwi elikulu livela ezulwini lisiti kuwo: Nyukelani apa. Aza enyukela ezulwini ngelifu; zati intshaba zawo zawabonela. 
Revelation11:13 Nakuyo leyo iyure kusuke kwabako isingcangcazelo esikulu somhlaba, sati isiqingata seshumi sesixeko eso sawa, kwabulawa ke kwesosingcangcazelo somhlaba amawaka asixe̔nxe abantu: baza abaseleyo baba nokwoyika, banika udumo kuye utixo wezulu." 
Revelation11:14 Ilishwa lesibini ligqitile: bona ke, ilishwa lesitatu liyeza msinya." 
Revelation11:15 YATI eyesixe̔nxe ingelosi yahlokomisa; kwaza kwabako amazwi amakulu ezulwini, esiti: Ubukumkani belilizwe buse bubobayo inkosi yetu, nobo‐Kristu wayo; waeya kupata ngobukumkani kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Revelation11:16 Baza̔ abadala bomashumi mabini anabane, abahleli ebusweni bukatixo pezu kweterone zabo, bawa ngobuso babo, babedesha utixo," 
Revelation11:17 besiti: Siyabulela kuwe. Nkosi Tixo Somandla, okoyo, obuko, ozayo! ukuba uwatabatile amandla ako amakulu, wapata ngobukumkani." 
Revelation11:18 Zite intlanga zaqumba, kufikile ke umsindo wako, nexesha labafileyo, ukuba bagwetywe, nokuba unike umvuzo wazo kwizicaka zako abaprofite, nakubo abangcwele, nakubo abaloyikayo igama lako, kubo abancinane nakubo abakulu, uze ubabubise abo bawububisayo umhlaba." 
Revelation11:19 Yaza yavulwa itempile katixo ezulwini, yabonakala netyeya yocebano lwake etempileni yake; kusuke kwabako imibane, namazwi, nendudumo, nesingcangcazelo somhlaba, nezico̔to ezikulu." 
Revelation12:1 KWAZA kwabonakala umqondiso omkulu ezulwini; inkazana yambete ilanga, inenyanga pantsi kwenyawo zayo, nesitsaba senkwenkwezi zilishumi linambini pezu kwentloko yayo;" 
Revelation12:2 iti imiti nje yakala, inenimba, inobuhlungu bokuba izale." 
Revelation12:3 Kwaza kwabonakala omnye umqondiso ezulwini; kekaloku bona ke, inamba enkulu ebomvu, inentloko zisixe̔nxe nempondo zilishumi, nekrone zisixe̔nxe pezu kwentloko zayo." 
Revelation12:4 Uti umsila wayo war̔ola isiqingata sesitatu senkwenkwezi zezulu, wazikahlela emhlabeni. Yaza inamba leyo yema pambi kwalonkazana iza kuzala, ukuze iti yakuzala imdle umntwana wayo." 
Revelation12:5 Yada yazala umntwana obudoda, oza kupata intlanga zonke ngentonga yesincete; wati umntwana wayo wasuselwa kuye utixo neterone yake." 
Revelation12:6 Yaza lonkazana yesabela entlango, apo ibinendawo ilungisiwe ngutixo, ukuze yondliwe kona imihla ibe liwaka linamakulu mabini anamashumi matandatu." 
Revelation12:7 Kwaye bekuko ukulwa ezulwini; u‐Mikaheli nengelosi zake balwa ngakuyo inamba; yalwa inamba nayo, nengelosi zayo," 
Revelation12:8 kanti azoyisa, nendawo yazo ayabi safunyanwa ezulwini." 
Revelation12:9 Yaza yakahlelwa lonamba enkulu, lonyoka yakudala, ebizwa ngo‐Mncetezi nango‐Satane, ekohlisayo elimiwayo lonke, yakahlelwa emhlabeni, nengelosi zayo zakahlelwa ndawonye nayo." 
Revelation12:10 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi elikulu lisiti ezulwini: Kaloku usindiso, namandla, nobukumkani buse bubobake utixo wetu, negunya lelika‐Kristu wake; ngokuba ekahlelwe pantsi umnikityala wabazalwana betu, obebanika ityala ebusweni botixo wetu emini nasebusuku." 
Revelation12:11 Bati bona bamoyisa ngenxa yegazi lemvana, nangenxa yelizwi lobunqi̔na babo; abatanda ke ubomi babo kwada kwakukufa." 
Revelation12:12 Ngako oko gcobani, nina mazulu, nani nihlala kuwo! Kwoba nzima kubo abemayo umhlaba nolwandle! ngokuba u‐Mncetezi ehlele kuni, enomsindo omkulu, esazi nje ukuba lixesha elincinane analo." 
Revelation12:13 Yati kekaloku inamba leyo, yakubona ukuba ikahlelwe emhlabeni, yatshutshisa lonkazana eyazalayo umntwana obudoda." 
Revelation12:14 Kwaza kwanikwa lonkazana amapiko amabini okozi olukulu, ukuze ibaleke iye entlango, endaweni yayo, apo isondliwa kona ixesha, namaxesha, nesiqingata sexesha, ifihlwe ebusweni bayo inyoka." 
Revelation12:15 Yaza inyoka yawaku̔pela emva kwenkazana kuwo umlomo wayo amanzi njengomlambo, ukuze iyenze yona ikukuliswe ngumlambo." 
Revelation12:16 Kanti umhlaba wayisiza inkazana, wati umhlaba wakamisa umlomo wawo, wawuginya umlambo lowo inamba yawuku̔payo kuwo umlomo wayo." 
Revelation12:17 Yaza yaqumba inamba leyo ngakuyo lonkazana, yapuma ukuya kwenza imfazwe nabaseleyo benzalo yayo, abayigcinayo imiyalelo katixo, abanabo ubunqi̔na buka‐Yesu kanjako." 
Revelation13:1 NDAZA ndema pezu kwentlabati yolwandle, ndabona ir̔amnco linyuka elwandle, linentloko zisixe̔nxe nempondo zilishumi, napezu kwempondo zalo ikrone zilishumi, napezu kwentloko zalo igama lokugxeka." 
Revelation13:2 Kekaloku ir̔amnco elo ndalibonayo libe lifana nengwe, nenyawo zalo zinjengezebere, nomlomo walo unjengomlomo wengonyama; yati ke yona inamba yalinika amandla ayo neterone yayo, negunya elikulu." 
Revelation13:3 Ndaza ndabona enye yentloko zalo njengokungati ibulalelwe ukufa; kanti inxeba lokufa lalo lapoliswa: wati wonke umhlaba walandela ir̔amnco elo ngokuti nqa. 
Revelation13:4 Baza bayibedesha inamba eyalinikayo ir̔amnco igunya: balibedesha ir̔amnco kanjalo, besiti: Ngubanina ofana ner̔amnco? ngubanina ongalwayo nalo?" 
Revelation13:5 Kwaye kunikwa lona umlomo uteta izinto ezinkulu nezigxeko; lanikwa negunya lokuba lifeze inyanga zibe ngamashumi mane anambini. 
Revelation13:6 Laza lavula umlomo walo ukuteta ugxeko ngakuye utixo, ukuba ligxeke igama lake, netabanakele yake, nabo abahlala ezulwini." 
Revelation13:7 Kwanikwa lona kanjako ukuba lenze imfazwe nabo abangcwele, nokuba liboyise; lanikwa negunya pezu kwazo zonke izizwe, nenteto, nentlanga." 
Revelation13:8 Babeya kulibedesha bonke abemiyo pezu kwomhlaba, abamagama angaba̔lwanga encwadini yobomi yemvana ebingiweyo kwa sekumisweni kwelizwe." 
Revelation13:9 Osukuba enendlebe, makeve." 
Revelation13:10 Osukuba ehlanganisa amatinjwa, uya ekutinjweni; osukuba ebulala ngesiṙele, ufanele yena ukubulawa ngesiṙele. Nangu ke umonde nenkolo yabangcwele." 
Revelation13:11 Ndaza ndabona elinye ir̔amnco linyuka emhlabeni, elibe linempondo ezimbini zifana nezemvana, lateta njengenamba." 
Revelation13:12 Negunya lelokuqala ir̔amnco lonke liyalipata ebusweni balo; kanjalo liyenza umhlaba nabemiyo kuwo ukuba babedeshe ir̔amnco lokuqala, elo inxeba lokufa lalo lapoliswayo." 
Revelation13:13 Liyenza nemiqondiso emikulu, lide liwenze nomlilo uhle ezulwini uze emhlabeni pambi kwabantu." 
Revelation13:14 Liti kanjako libakohlise abemiyo pezu kwomhlaba, ngenxa yemiqondiso leyo lanikwayo ukuyenza ebusweni balo ir̔amnco; lisitsho kubo abemiyo pezu kwomhlaba, ukuba mabalenzele umfanekiso elor̔amnco elibe linalo inxeba lesiṙele, lapila noko." 
Revelation13:15 Kwaye kunikwa kulo ukuba linike umpefumlo kuwo umfanekiso wer̔amnco elo, ukuze ke wona umfanekiso wer̔amnco elo ube nokuteta, wenze nokuba abo basukuba bengabedeshi umfanekiso wer̔amnco babulawe." 
Revelation13:16 Kanjalo liyabenza ukuba bonke, abancinane nabakulu, nabazityebi nabangamahlwempu, nabakululekileyo namakonza, babekelwe upa̔u pezu kwesandla sabo sokunene, umhlaumbi pezu kwamabunzi abo;" 
Revelation13:17 nokuba kungabiko mntu ongati atenge umhlaumbi atengele, kupela ngulowo unalo upa̔u olo, umhlaumbi igama ler̔amnco, umhlaumbi inani legama lalo." 
Revelation13:18 Nabu ke ubulumko. Lowo unokuqonda makabale lona inani ler̔amnco: ngokuba lilinani lomntu; kekaloku inani lalo lingamakulu matandatu anamashumi matandatu anesitandatu. 
Revelation14:1 NDAZA ndabona, kekaloku bona ke, yona imvana imi pezu kwentaba ye‐Ziyone, benayo abangamawaka alikulu linamashumi mane anesine, benegama loyise wayo liba̔liwe pezu kwamabunzi abo." 
Revelation14:2 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi livela ezulwini, njengelizwi lamanzi amaninzi, nanjengelizwi lodudumo olukulu; ndeva nelizwi lababeti begitare bebeta kuzo igitare zabo;" 
Revelation14:3 bavuma langa liculo elitsha pambi kwayo iterone, napambi kwezidalwa ezipilileyo zozine nabadala abo; kwaye kungeko namnye ongalifundayo iculo elo, kupela ngabo abangamawaka alikulu linamashumi mane anesine, abebetengiwe kuwo umhlaba." 
Revelation14:4 Aba bangabo abebengadyojwanga ngamankazana; ngokuba befana nentombi zipela. Aba bangabo abalandelayo imvana apo isukuba isiya kona. Aba bebetengiwe kubo abantu, babe lulibo kuye utixo nakuyo i mvana." 
Revelation14:5 Akwafunyanwa ke ubuxoki emlonyeni wabo: ngokuba bemsulwa pambi kweterone katixo. 
Revelation14:6 NDAZA ndabona enye ingelosi ibaleka ngamapiko pakati kwezulu, inayo ivangeli engunapakade, ukuba iyishumayele kubo abemiyo pezu kwomhlaba, nakuzo zonke intlanga, nezizwe, nenteto, nabantu," 
Revelation14:7 isiti ngelizwi elikulu: Yoyikani utixo, nimnike udumo; ngokuba ifikile iyure yokugweba kwake: nimbedeshe lowo wenzayo izulu, nomhlaba, nolwandle, nemitombo yamanzi." 
Revelation14:8 Yaza enye ingelosi yalandela, isiti: Iwile, iwile i‐Babilone, esosixeko esikulu, ngokuba isezile zonke intlanga kuyo iveyine yomsindo wombulo wayo." 
Revelation14:9 Yaza eyesitatu ingelosi yazilandela, isiti ngelizwi elikulu: Osukuba ebedesha ir̔amnco nomfanekiso walo, amkele upa̔u pezu kwebunzi lake, umhlaumbi esandleni sake," 
Revelation14:10 kwa yena uya kusela kuyo iveyine yomsindo katixo, esel’ igalelwe ingapitikezwanga endebeni yoqumbo lwake; waeya kumbelwa ngomlilo nesufure, ebusweni bazo ingelosi ezingcwele, nasebusweni bayo imvana:" 
Revelation14:11 uti umsi wokumbelwa kwabo unyuke kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade; abanakupumla ke nasemini nasebusuku, abo babedeshayo ir̔amnco nomfanekiso walo, nosukuba elwamkela upa̔u lwegama lalo." 
Revelation14:12 Nangu ke umonde wabangcwele: naba ke abagcinayo imiyalelo katixo nokolo luka‐Yesu. 
Revelation14:13 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi livela ezulwini, lisiti kum: Ba̔la ukuti: Banetamsanqa abafileyo abafelayo enkosini emveni kwoku. Ewe, utsho umoya, ukuze bapumle kuyo imizamo yabo; iti imisebenzi yabo ilandele kwa nabo." 
Revelation14:14 Ndaza ndabona, kekaloku bona ke, ilifu elimhlope, napezu kwelifu elo omnye ehleli, efana nonyana wesintu, enesitsaba segolide pezu kwentloko yake, neṙenqa elibukali esandleni sake." 
Revelation14:15 Kanjalo enye ingelosi yapuma etempileni, idanduluka ngelizwi elikulu kulowo ubehlala pezu kwelifu, isiti: Ku̔pa iṙenqa lako, uvune; ngokuba lifikile kuwe ixeshana lokuvuna, sise sivutiwe nje isivuno somhlaba." 
Revelation14:16 Waza lowo ubehlala pezu kwelifu wafaka iṙenqa lake emhlabeni, wavunwa ke umhlaba." 
Revelation14:17 Yaza enye ingelosi yapuma etempileni esezulwini, ineṙenqa elibukali nayo." 
Revelation14:18 Kanjalo enye ingelosi yapuma ivela esibingelweni, inegunya pezu kwomlilo waso, yabiza ngesimemezo esikulu kuleyo ibinalo iṙenqa elibukali, isiti: Ku̔pa iṙenqa elibukali lako, ubute izipa zomti weveyine womhlaba; ngokuba idreyive zawo zigqibele ukuvutwa." 
Revelation14:19 Yaza ingelosi leyo yafaka iṙenqa layo emhlabeni, yabuta idreyive zomti weveyine womhlaba, ya zi posela esincinezelweni seveyine esikulu somsindo katixo." 
Revelation14:20 Saza saxovulwa isincinezelo seveyine ngapandle kwesixeko; kwapuma ke igazi kuso isincinezelo seveyine kwada kwakuyo imikala yamahashe, kwamgama wezitadiya eziliwaka linamakulu matandatu." 
Revelation15:1 NDAZA ndabona omnye umqondiso ezulwini, omkulu, ongummangaliso; ingelosi zisixe̔nxe, zinazo izibeto zisixe̔nxe zokugqibela; ngokuba kuzo zona umsindo katixo ufeziwe." 
Revelation15:2 Ndaza ndabona lwanga lulwandle oluyiglasiṙa lupitikeziwe nomlilo; nabo babezuzile ulwoyiso pezu kwer̔amnco, napezu kwomfanekiso walo, napezu kwopa̔u lwalo, pezu kwenani legama lalo, bemi ngakulo ulwandle oluyiglasiṙa, bepete igitare zikatixo." 
Revelation15:3 Bati bavume iculo lika‐Mosesi isicaka sikatixo, neculo layo imvana, besiti: Mikulu yimimangaliso imisebenzi yako, Nkosi Tixo Somandla! zilungile, ziyinyaniso indlela zako, Kumkani wentlanga!" 
Revelation15:4 Ngubanina ongayi kwoyika wena, Nkosi! adumise igama lako? ngokuba enguwe wedwa oyingcwele: ngokuba zonke intlanga ziya kuza, zibedeshe pambi kwako; ngokuba izigwebo zako zibonakalisiwe." 
Revelation15:5 Nasemveni kwoku ndabona, kekaloku bona ke, yavulwa itempile yetabanakele yesinqi̔no ezulwini." 
Revelation15:6 Zaza zapuma ezongelosi zisixe̔nxe zinazo izibeto zosixe̔nxe etempileni apo, zivete izivato zeqiya ezimhlope ezikazimlayo, zibinqiwe ngasezifubeni ngemibinqo yegolide." 
Revelation15:7 Sati kekaloku esinye kuzo izidalwa ezipilileyo zozine sanikela ezongelosi zisixe̔nxe ifiyali zegolide ezisixe̔nxe, zizele ngumsindo katixo, opilile kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Revelation15:8 Yaza itempile yazaliswa ngomsi uvela ebungcwaliseni bukatixo, nasemandleni ake; kwaye kungabiko namnye ongangenayo etempileni, kude kwafezwa ezozibeto zisixe̔nxe zengelosi ezo zisixe̔nxe." 
Revelation16:1 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi elikulu livela etempileni apo, lisiti kuzo ingelosi zosixe̔nxe: Hambani, niye nigalele ifiyali zomsindo katixo emhlabeni." 
Revelation16:2 Yapuma ke eyokuqala, yagalela ifiyali yayo pezu kwomhlaba; kusuke kwabako itumba elibi elinzima ebantwini abanalo upa̔u lwer̔amnco, nababedeshayo umfanekiso walo." 
Revelation16:3 Yaza eyesibini ingelosi yagalela ifiyali yayo elulwandleni; lusuke lwaba ligazi njengelofileyo; yati yonke imipefumlo enokudliwa kwobomi yafa kulo ulwandle. 
Revelation16:4 Yaza eyesitatu ingelosi yagalela ifiyali yayo emilanjeni nasemitonjeni yamanzi; asuka aba ligazi. 
Revelation16:5 Ndaza ndeva ingelosi yamanzi lawo isiti: Ulungile, Nkosi! okoyo, obuko, oya kuza kubako, kuba wenje nje ukugweba." 
Revelation16:6 Kuba bepalazile igazi labangcwele nelabaprofite, nawe igazi ulinikile kubo basele; ngokuba befanele." 
Revelation16:7 Ndeva kwa nenye isesibingelweni isiti: Ewe, Nkosi Tixo Somandla! iyinyaniso ilungile imigwebo yako." 
Revelation16:8 Yaza eyesine ingelosi yagalela ifiyali yayo pezu kwelanga; kwaye kunikwa kuyo ukuba itshise abantu ngomlilo. 
Revelation16:9 Batshiswa ke abantu ngobushushu obukulu, baligxeka igama likatixo onamandla pezu kwezibeto ezi; kanti abaguquka ukuba bamnike udumo." 
Revelation16:10 Yaza eyesihlanu ingelosi yagalela ifiyali yayo pezu kweterone yalo ir̔amnco; busuke baba bumnyama ubukumkani balo; baza bahlafuna ilwimi zabo ngenxa yobuhlungu," 
Revelation16:11 bamgxeka utixo wezulu ngenxa yentlungu zabo nangenxa yamatumba abo; kanti abaguquka kuzo izenzo zabo. 
Revelation16:12 Yaza eyesitandatu ingelosi yagalela ifiyali yayo pezu kwawo umlambo omkulu um‐Ferate; ati ke atsha amanzi awo, ukuze ilungiselelwe indlela yokumkani basempumalanga." 
Revelation16:13 Ndaza ndabona bepuma emlonyeni wenamba, nasemlonyeni wer̔amnco, nasemlonyeni womprofite obuxoki, omoya abatatu abanco̔lileyo befana namasele." 
Revelation16:14 Ngokuba bengomoya bedemoni besenza imiqondiso, abapuma ukuya kubo okumkani bomhlaba nabelimiwayo lonke, ukubahlanganisela ekulweni kwalowo umhla omkulu katixo usomandla." 
Revelation16:15 Bona ke, ndiyeza njengokuba lisiza isela. Unetamsanqa lowo ulindayo, azigcine izivato zake, ukuba angabi ehamba zé, kuze kubonwe ubuhlazo bake." 
Revelation16:16 Baza babahlanganisela endaweni ebizwa ngokwama‐Hebere ngokuti yi‐Harimegido. 
Revelation16:17 Yaza eyesixe̔nxe ingelosi yagalela ifiyali yayo esibakabakeni; kwati ke kwapuma ilizwi elikulu etempileni yezulu, kuyo iterone, lisiti: Kwenzekile." 
Revelation16:18 Kwaza kwabako amazwi, nendudumo, nemibane; kwabako nesingcangcazelo somhlaba esikulu, ekungabangako esinjalo kuseloko abantu bebeko pezu kwomhlaba, isingcangcazelo esingako, esikulu kangaka." 
Revelation16:19 Saza isixeko esikulu sahluka kutatu, nezixeko zentlanga zawa; nayo i‐Babilone enkulu yakunjulwa pambi kwotixo, ukuba ayinike indebe yeveyine yomsindo woqumbo lwake." 
Revelation16:20 Zati zonke iziqiti zesaba, nentaba azafunyanwa." 
Revelation16:21 Kanjalo izico̔to ezikulu, zilingana netalente ukuba nzima kwazo, zehla ezulwini pezu kwabantu: baza abantu bamgxeka utixo ngenxa yesosibeto sezico̔to; ngokuba sikulu isibeto sazo kakulu." 
Revelation17:1 YAZA enye kuzo ingelosi ezisixe̔nxe ezibe zinazo ifiyali ezo zisixe̔nxe yeza yateta nam, isiti kum: Yiza apa; ndokubonisa ukugwetywa kwompinyiswa omkulu ohleli pezu kwawo amanzi amaninzi;" 
Revelation17:2 lowo okumkani bomhlaba benza umbulo naye, nabemi bomhlaba banxiliswa ngeveyine yombulo wake." 
Revelation17:3 Yaza yandisa entlango, emoyeni; ndaza ndabona inkazana ihleli pezu kwer̔amnco elibomvumnyama, lizele ngamagama okugxeka, linentloko zisixe̔nxe nempondo zilishumi." 
Revelation17:4 Yaibe lonkazana yambete izivato ezibomvu nezibomvumnyama, ihonjisiwe ngegolide, nangamatye anqabileyo, nangeperule, inendebe yegolide esandleni sayo, izele zizinto ezibuntshontsho nabubunco̔la bombulo wayo;" 
Revelation17:5 negama liba̔liwe pezu kwebunzi layo, lokuti: Imfihlakalo, i‐babilone enkulu, unina wabapinyiswa nowezinto ezibuntshontsho zomhlaba." 
Revelation17:6 Ndati lonkazana ndayibona inxilile ligazi labangcwele, naligazi lamanqi̔na ka‐Yesu: ndati nqa ke, ndakuyibona, ngokuti nqa kakulu." 
Revelation17:7 Yaza yati kum ingelosi leyo: Wati nqa nganina? Ndokuxelela imfihlakalo yalonkazana, neyer̔amnco eliyitweleyo, elinentloko zisixe̔nxe nempondo zilishumi." 
Revelation17:8 Ir̔amnco elo walibonayo, libe liko, kanjalo aliko; liza kuti ke linyuke esinzulwini, liye entshabalalweni; babeya kuti nqa abemiyo pezu kwomhlaba, abamagama angaba̔lwanga kuyo incwadi yobomi kwa sekumisweni kwelizwe, bakubona ir̔amnco elo, elibe liko, elingekoyo kanjalo, elikoyo noko." 
Revelation17:9 Nantsi ke ingqondo enobulumko. Intloko zisixe̔nxe ezo, zizintaba ezisixe̔nxe, ekupezu kwazo ihleli inkazana leyo." 
Revelation17:10 Zingokumkani abasixe̔nxe kanjalo: abahlanu sebewile, omnye useko, omnye akakafiki; woti akufika, afanele ukuhlala umzuzwana." 
Revelation17:11 Kanjako ir̔amnco elo, elibe liko, elingekoyo kanjalo, kwa lona lingowesibozo, lingowakubo abasixe̔nxe kanjalo, eliya entshabalalweni." 
Revelation17:12 Nempondo zilishumi ezo wazibonayo, zingokumkani abalishumi, abangekabamkeli ubukumkani ke; koko belamkela igunya njengokumkani iyure inye ndawonye ner̔amnco elo." 
Revelation17:13 Aba banayo ingcingo inye, babeya kunikela amandla abo negunya labo kulo ir̔amnco." 
Revelation17:14 Aba baya kulwa nayo imvana, yoti ke imvana iboyise; kuba i yinkosi kankosi nokumkani kakumkani; kwa nabo abanayo, bengababiziweyo, nabaqashiweyo, nabanyanisekileyo." 
Revelation17:15 Yaza yati kum: Amanzi lawo wawabonayo, apo umpinyiswa ahleli kona, angabantu, nendimba, nentlanga, nenteto." 
Revelation17:16 Nempondo zilishumi ezo wazibonayo pezu kwalo ir̔amnco, boti aba bamtiye umpinyiswa, bamci̔takalise bamenze abe ze̔, bayidle inyama yake, bamtshise yena ngomlilo:" 
Revelation17:17 ngokuba utixo ebekile ezintliziyweni zabo ukuyenza ingcingo yake, nokuvumelana, nokulinika ir̔amnco ubukumkani babo, ade afezwe amazwi katixo." 
Revelation17:18 Nenkazana leyo wayibonayo, isesosixeko esikulu, esipata ngobukumkani pezu kwabo okumkani bomhlaba." 
Revelation18:1 NASEMVENI kwezizinto ndabona enye ingelosi isihla ezulwini, inalo igunya elikulu; wati umhlaba wakanyiswa ngobungcwalisa bayo." 
Revelation18:2 Yaza yadanduluka ngamandla, ngelizwi elikulu, isiti: Iwile, iwile i‐Babilone enkulu, yaba yindawo yokuhlala yedemoni, nesikundla sabo bonke omoya abanco̔lileyo, nesikundla sazo zonke intaka ezinco̔lileyo nezitiyekileyo:" 
Revelation18:3 ngokuba intlanga zonke ziselile kuyo iveyine yomsindo wombulo wayo, nokumkani bomhlaba benza umbulo nayo, nabatengi bomhlaba batyeba ngenxa yobukulu bobuyolo bayo." 
Revelation18:4 Ndaza ndeva elinye ilizwi livela ezulwini, lisiti: Pumani kuyo, bantu bam! ukuze ningabi nabudlelana nezono zayo, nokuze ningamkeli kuzo izibetwa zayo:" 
Revelation18:5 ngokuba izono zayo zilandelene kude kwasezulwini, nezenzo zayo ezingalungileyo utixo uzikumbule." 
Revelation18:6 Vuzani yona njengokuba nayo ivuzile nina, nipindise kuyo okupindiweyo ngokwemisebenzi yayo: endebeni yapitikezayo kuyo, yipitikezeleni okupindiweyo." 
Revelation18:7 Njengoko izizukisile yapila ngobuyolo ngako, yenzeleni kwa ngokunjalo ututumbo nosizi: ngokuba isitsho entliziyweni yayo ukuti: Nidhleli ndingukumkanikazi, andinguye umhlolokazi, andisayi kubona lusizi." 
Revelation18:8 Ngako oko kwa semhleni mnye ziya kufika izibetwa zayo, ukufa, nosizi, nendlala, yaiya kutshiswa ngomlilo; ngokuba yomelele inkosi utixo eyigwebayo." 
Revelation18:9 Babeya kuti okumkani bomhlaba, abawenza umbulo bapila ngobuyolo nayo, bayililele, benze isijwili pezu kwayo, okuya bawubonayo umsi wokutsha kwayo," 
Revelation18:10 bemi bekude ngenxa yokwoyika ututumbo lwayo, besiti: Yo, yo, esosixeko esikulu i‐Babilone, esosixeko esomeleleyo! kuba kwiyure inye kufikile ukugwetywa kwako." 
Revelation18:11 Boti nabatengi bomhlaba balile bakale pezu kwayo, kuba intengelo yabo kungaseko mntu oyitengayo:" 
Revelation18:12 intengelo yegolide, neyesilivere, neyamatye anqabileyo, neyeperule, neyeqiya eshiceneyo, neyencawe ebomvu, neyesilike, neyencawe ebomvumnyama; nemiti yonke enuka mnandi, nempahla zonke zopondo lwendlovu, nempahla zonke zemiti enqabileyo kakulu, nezexina, nezesincete, nezamatye akazimlayo;" 
Revelation18:13 nekinamone, nento zokuqu̔misa, namafuta amnandi, nentlakamhlope, neveyine, neoli, nomgubo ocolekileyo, nenqolowa, nenkomo, negusha; neyamahashe, neyenqwelo, neyamakoboka; nemipefumlo yabantu." 
Revelation18:14 Ziti iziqa̔mo zenkanuko yompefumlo wako zimkile kuwe, nazo zonke izinto zako ezityebileyo nezintle zimkile kuwe, waungasayi kubuya uzifumane." 
Revelation18:15 Bona abatengi bezizinto, abatyeba ngayo, baya kuma bekude ngenxa yokwoyika ututumbo lwayo, belila, bekala," 
Revelation18:16 besiti nokuti: Yo, yo, esosixeko esikulu, esibe sambete izivato zeqiya eshiceneyo, nezibomvu, nezibomvumnyama, sahonjiswa ngegolide, nangamatye anqabileyo, nangeperule!" 
Revelation18:17 kuba kwiyure inye buci̔takele ubutyebi obungaka. Kanjako bonke abakokeli benqanawa, nabo bonke abahambayo ezinqanaweni, nomatrose, nabo bonke abasebenzayo elwandle, bema bekude," 
Revelation18:18 badanduluka, bebona umsi wokutsha kwayo, besiti: Sisipina isixeko esifana nesisixeko esikulu?" 
Revelation18:19 Baza baposa utuli ezintlokweni zabo, badanduluka, belila bekala nokukala, besiti: Yo, yo, esosixeko esikulu, abati kuso batyeba bonke ababenazo inqanawa elwandle ngenxa yendyebo yaso enqabileyo! kuba kwiyure inye sici̔takele." 
Revelation18:20 Gcoba pezu kwaso, wena zulu! na ni bapostile nabaprofite abangcwele! kuba utixo enipindezelele kwa kuso." 
Revelation18:21 Yaza ingelosi eyomeleleyo yafunqula ilitye njengelitye lokusila ukuba likulu kwalo, yalikahlela elwandle, isiti: Iya kwenziwa njalo ukuwiswa ngamandla i‐Babilone esosixeko esikulu, yayingasayi kuba safunyanwa." 
Revelation18:22 Kanjalo ilizwi lababeti begitare, nelabaculi, nelabagwali, nelabahlokomisa amaxilongo, alisayi kuba saviwa pakati kwako; nenci̔bi, noke ubunci̔bi bazo bunjanina, ayisayi kuba safunyanwa nanye pakati kwako; nentlokoma yelitye lokusila ayisayi kuba safunyanwa pakati kwako;" 
Revelation18:23 nokukanya kwesibane akusayi kuba sabonakala pakati kwako; nelizwi lomyeni nelomtshakazi alisayi kuba saviwa pakati kwako: ngokuba abatengi bako bebeyimiduna yomhlaba; ngokuba ngokutakata kwako zalahlekiswa intlanga zonke. 
Revelation18:24 Kwaza kwafunyanwa kuyo igazi labaprofite nelabangcwele, nelabo bonke ababuleweyo pezu kwomhlaba." 
Revelation19:1 NASEMVENI kwezizinto ndeva ilizwi elikulu lesihlwele esikulu ezulwini, sisiti: Haleluya! Usindiso, nobungcwalisa, nembeko, namandla, kuyo inkosi utixo wetu!" 
Revelation19:2 kuba iyinyaniso ilungile imigwebo yayo; kuba imgwebile umpinyiswa omkulu, lowo wawonakalisayo umhlaba ngombulo wake, yapindezela igazi lezicaka zayo kaso isandla sake." 
Revelation19:3 Batsho ke ngokwesibini ukuti: Haleluya! Uti kekaloku umsi wake unyuke kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. 
Revelation19:4 Baza abadala bomashumi mabini anabane, nezidalwa ezipilileyo zozine, bawa pantsi babedesha utixo ohleli pezu kwayo iterone, besiti: Amene; Haleluya!" 
Revelation19:5 Kanjako lapuma ilizwi eteroneni, lisiti: Dumisani utixo wetu, nonke nina zicaka zake, nani nimoyikayo, nabancinane nabakulu!" 
Revelation19:6 Ndaza ndeva okungati lilizwi lesihlwele esikulu, nokungati lilizwi lamanzi amaninzi, nokungati lilizwi lendudumo ezinamandla, besiti: Haleluya! kuba ipete ngobukumkani inkosi, utixo ongusomandla" 
Revelation19:7 Masiti sivuye, sigcobe, siyinike udumo; ukuba ufikile umtshato wemvana, nokuba umfazi wayo ezilungisile." 
Revelation19:8 Kwaye kunikwa kuye ukuba ambeswe ngeqiya eshiceneyo, emsulwa, ekazimlayo: ngokuba leqiya eshiceneyo izizenzo ezilungileyo zabangcwele." 
Revelation19:9 Yayisiti kum: Ba̔la ukuti: Banetamsanqa abo bamenyelwayo esidlweni somtshato wayo imvana. Yayisiti kum: Wona la angawo amazwi ayinyaniso katixo. 
Revelation19:10 Ndaza ndawa pambi kwenyawo zayo ukuba ndiyibedeshe. Yayisiti kum: Lumka ungenje njalo: ndisisicaka kunye nawe nakunye nabazalwana bako abanabo ubunqi̔na buka‐Yesu; mbedeshe utixo: ngokuba ubunqi̔na buka‐Yesu bungumoya wobuprofitesho. 
Revelation19:11 NDAZA ndabona izulu livulekile; kekaloku bona ke, ihashe elimhlope, nalowo uhleli pezu kwalo, ebizwa ngobunene nangobunyaniso, oti agwebe enze imfazwe ebulungiseni." 
Revelation19:12 Aye amehlo ake enjengelangatye lomlilo, napezu kwentloko yake bekuko ikrone ezininzi; ebenegama liba̔liwe, ekungeko namnye olaziyo, kupela nguye ngokwake." 
Revelation19:13 Waye eyambete ingubo isindiwe ngegazi; negama lake libizwa ngokuti lilizwi likatixo. 
Revelation19:14 Kanjalo imikosi yasezulwini ibimlandela ipezu kwamahashe amhlope, bevete iqiya eshiceneyo, emhlope, emsulwa." 
Revelation19:15 Nakuwo umlomo wake kupuma iṙele elibukali, ukuze ati ngalo azibete intlanga: enguye oya kuzipata ngentonga yesincete: enguye osixovula isincinezelo seveyine sayo iveyine yomsindo neyoqumbo lukatixo usomandla." 
Revelation19:16 Kanjalo unalo pezu kwengubo yake napezu kwetanga lake igama lake liba̔liwe lokuti: Ukumkani kakumkani nenkosi kankosi. 
Revelation19:17 Ndaza ndabona ingelosi etile imi elangeni; yaza yadanduluka ngelizwi elikulu, isitsho kuzo zonke intaka ezibalekayo ngamapiko pakati kwezulu ukuti: Yizani nizihlanganisele esidlweni sotixo omkulu;" 
Revelation19:18 ukuze niyidle inyama yokumkani, nenyama yenkosiwaka, nenyama yamaṙoti, nenyama yamahashe neyabo bahleli pezu kwawo, nenyama yabo bonke, abakululekileyo namakonza, nabancinane nabakulu." 
Revelation19:19 Ndaza ndabona ir̔amnco elo, nokumkani bomhlaba, nemikosi yabo ihlanganisene ukwenza imfazwe ngakuye lowo uhleli pezu kwehashe, nangakuwo umkosi wake." 
Revelation19:20 Kwaza kwabanjwa ir̔amnco elo, nomprofite obuxoki ndawonye nalo, lowo owenza imiqondiso ebusweni balo, abete ngayo wabakohlisa abo balwamkelayo upa̔u lwer̔amnco, nabo bawubedeshayo umfanekiso walo. Aba bobabini baposwa bepilile ecibini lomlilo elivutayo ngesufure." 
Revelation19:21 Nabo abaseleyo babulawa ngalo iṙele lalowo uhleli pezu kwehashe, eloṙ ele lipumayo emlonyeni wake: zaza intaka zonke zadikwa yinyama yabo." 
Revelation20:1 Ndaza ndabona ingelosi isihla ezulwini, ipete isilotile sesinzulu nomxokelelwane omkulu esandleni sayo." 
Revelation20:2 Yaza yayibamba inamba, lonyoka yakudala, enguye u‐Mncetezi no‐Satane, yayinxibela iwaka leminyaka," 
Revelation20:3 yayiposela esinzulwini, yayivalela, yabeka isincamatiselo pezu kwayo, ukuze ingabi sazikohlisa intlanga, lide lifezwe elowaka leminyaka: nasemveni kwoko ifanele ukukululwa ixesha elincinane." 
Revelation20:4 Ndaza ndazibona iterone, bati bahlala pezu kwazo, banikwa ukugweba: ndabona nemipefumlo yabebenqunyulwe intloko ngezembe ngenxa yobunqi̔na buka‐Yesu, nangenxa yelizwi likatixo, nabo basukuba bengalibedeshanga ir̔amnco, kwa nomfanekiso walo, ababengalwamkelanga kanjalo upa̔u lwalo pezu kwebunzi labo napezu kwesandla sabo; baza bapila bapata ubukumkani ndawonye no‐Kristu iwaka leminyaka." 
Revelation20:5 Kodwa abanye abafileyo ababuya bapile lide lafezwa elowaka leminyaka. Lulo olu uvuko lwokuqala. 
Revelation20:6 Unetamsanqa uyingcwele lowo unesabiwo eluvukweni lwokuqala: abanjalo ukufa kwesibini akunagunya pezu kwabo, koko beya kuba ngabaperisite bakatixo nabaka‐Kristu, bapate ubukumkani ndawonye naye iwaka leminyaka." 
Revelation20:7 Kekaloku nxa lifezwe elowaka leminyaka, u‐Satane wokululwa entolongweni yake," 
Revelation20:8 waeya kupuma ukuya kukohlisa intlanga ezisemagumbini omane omhlaba, u‐Goge no‐Magoge, ukubahlanganisela emfazweni; abanani lingangentlabati yolwandle." 
Revelation20:9 Bati banyukela pezu kwobubanzi bomhlaba, baṙaula umnquba wabangcwele, nesixeko esitandiweyo: kwaza kwehla umlilo kutixo uvela ezulwini, wabagqibela." 
Revelation20:10 Kanjako u‐Satane obebakohlisa waposelwa ecibini lomlilo nesufure, apo kukona iṙamnco nomprofite obuxoki; babeya kumbelwa emini nasebusuku kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade." 
Revelation20:11 Ndaza ndabona iterone emhlope enkulu, nalowo uhleli pezu kwayo, ezati umhlaba nezulu zabaleka ebusweni bake: kwaza akwafunyanelwa zona indawo." 
Revelation20:12 Ndabona kanjalo abafileyo, abancinane nabakulu, bemi pambi kwotixo; zaza zavulwa incwadi: kwavulwa nenye incwadi, eyeyobomi: bati abafileyo bagwetywa ngezozinto ezibe ziba̔liwe ezincwadini ezo, ngokwemisebenzi yabo." 
Revelation20:13 Lwaza ulwandle lwanikela abafileyo abebekulo; kanjalo ukufa nehadesi zanikela abafileyo abebekuzo: bagwetywa ke bonke ngabanye ngokwemisebenzi yabo. 
Revelation20:14 Kwaza kwaposwa ukufa nehadesi ecibini lomlilo. Kuko oku okwesibini ukufa. 
Revelation20:15 Nosukuba engafunyanwanga eba̔liwe encwadini yobomi waposelwa ecibini lomlilo. 
Revelation21:1 NDAZA ndabona izulu elitsha nomhlaba omtsha; ngokuba elokuqala izulu nowokuqala umhlaba ubudlulile; nolwandle aluseko. 
Revelation21:2 Ndaza mna Johane ndasibona isixeko esiyingcwele, i‐Yerusaleme entsha, sisihla kutixo sivela ezulwini, silungisiwe njengomtshakazi ehonjelwe indoda yake." 
Revelation21:3 Ndaza ndeva ilizwi elikulu livela ezulwini, lisiti: Bona ke, itabanakele katixo inabantu, waeya kuhlala nabo; bona boba ngabantu bake, naye utixo ngokwake woba nabo, e ngutixo wabo." 
Revelation21:4 Kanjalo utixo uya kusula zonke inyembezi emehlweni abo: nokufa akuyi kuba seko; nosizi, nokulila, nobuhlungu abuyi kuba seko: ngokuba izinto zokuqala zimkile." 
Revelation21:5 Waza watsho lowo uhleli pezu kwayo iterone ukuti: Bona ke, ndizenza ntsha zonke izinto. Wayesiti kum: Ba̔la; kuba lamazwi eyinyaniso eyinene." 
Revelation21:6 Waza watsho kum ukuti: Kwenzekile. Mna ndingu‐Alefa no‐Omega, isiqalo nesipelo. Lowo onxanwayo ndompa mna kuwo umtombo wamanzi obomi ngesisa." 
Revelation21:7 Owoyisayo wolidla ilifa lento zonke; ndandiya kuba ngutixo wake, naye yena woba ngunyana wam." 
Revelation21:8 Kodwa abanobugwala, nabangakolwayo, nabatiyekileyo, nababulali, nabapimisi, nabatakati, nabakonzi bezitixo, nawo onke amaxoki, bona boba nesabiwo sabo ecibini elivutayo ngomlilo nangesufure; okukuko okwesibini ukufa." 
Revelation21:9 Kwaza kweza kum enye yengelosi zosixe̔nxe ezibe zinazo ifiyali zosixe̔nxe ezibe zizele zizibeto zosixe̔nxe zokugqibela, yateta nam, isiti: Yiza apa; ndokubonisa umtshakazi, umfazi wayo imvana" 
Revelation21:10 Yaza yandisa emoyeni kuyo intaba enkulu ende, yandibonisa esosixeko esikulu, i‐Yerusaleme eyingcwele, sisihla ezulwini kutixo," 
Revelation21:11 sinabo ubungcwalisa bukatixo: nesikanyiso saso sibe sifana nalo ilitye elinqabileyo kakulu, njengalo ilitye lejasipidi libengezela njengekrisitale:" 
Revelation21:12 sinalo kanjalo udonga olukulu olude; sinawo amasango alishumi linamabini, nengelosi ezilishumi linambini ngakuwo amasango lawo, namagama eba̔liwe pezu kwawo, angawo awezizwe ezilishumi linazibini zosapo luka‐Sirayeli;" 
Revelation21:13 engasempumalanga amasango matatu, engasenode amasango matatu, engasesuyide amasango matatu, engasentshonalanga amasango matatu." 
Revelation21:14 Kanjako lona udonga lwesixeko belunemisekelo elishumi linamibini, nakuyo yona bekuko amagama abapostile abalishumi linababini bayo imvana." 
Revelation21:15 Kekaloku lowo ubeteta nam ebenayo ingcongolo yegolide, ukuze asilinganise isixeko, namasango aso, nodonga lwaso." 
Revelation21:16 Sona isixeko simi sinamacala mane; nobude baso bungaka njengokuba bunjalo ububanzi baso: waza wasilinganisa isixeko ngengcongolo leyo kude kwazizitadiya ezingamawaka alishumi linesibini: ubude nobubanzi nobupakamo baso buyalingana. 
Revelation21:17 Waza walulinganisa udonga lwaso, ikubite zalikulu linamashumi mane anane, ngomlinganiso womntu, onguwo owengelosi." 
Revelation21:18 Nesakiwo sodonga lwaso sibe siyijasipidi: nesixeko sona besiyigolide engcwele, sifana neglasi engcwele." 
Revelation21:19 Nemisekelo yodonga lwesixeko ibihonjiwe ngamatye anqabileyo intlobo zonke: umsekelo wokuqala ubuyijasipidi; owesibini ubuyisafire; owesitatu ubuyikalekidone; owesine ubuyisamagide; 
Revelation21:20 owesihlanu ubuyisadonutse: owesitandatu ubuyirubi; owesixe̔nxe ubuyikrusolite; owesibozo ubuyiberule; owesitoba ubuyitopaze; oweshumi ubuyikrisoprase; oweshumi linesinye ubuyiyasinte; oweshumi linesibini ubuyiyametisite. 
Revelation21:21 Namasango olishumi linamabini ebeziperule ezilishumi linambini; onke amasango elinye ngelinye lali senziwa ngeperule yanye: nesitarate sesixeko besiyigolide engcwele, engati yiglasi ekanyisekayo." 
Revelation21:22 Kekaloku andabona tempile pakati kwaso: ngokuba inkosi utixo usomandla iyitempile yaso, nayo imvana." 
Revelation21:23 Kanjako isixeko eso asifuni ilanga, kwa nenyanga, ukuze zikanye pakati kwaso: ngokuba ubungcwalisa bukatixo bebusikanyisa, nayo imvana isisibane saso." 
Revelation21:24 Zaye intlanga zabasindiswayo ziya kuhamba ekukanyeni kwaso; nokumkani bomhlaba bayazisela kuso ubungcwalisa babo nodumo lwabo. 
Revelation21:25 Ati amasango aso angaki avalwe emini: ngokuba kungayi kubako busuku kona. 
Revelation21:26 Kwaye kuziselwa kuso ubungcwalisa nodumo lwentlanga. 
Revelation21:27 Kuti kanjalo kungaki kungene kuso nanye into enco̔lisayo, neyenzayo okubuntshontsho nokubuxoki; kupela ngabo bodwa ababa̔liweyo encwadini yobomi yemvana." 
Revelation22:1 Waza wandibonisa umlambo ongcwele wamanzi obomi, okazimlayo njengekrisitale, upuma kuyo iterone katixo ne yemvana." 
Revelation22:2 Pakati kwesitarate saso, nangelicala nangeliya lomlambo, bekuko umti wobomi, uhlanza intlobo ezilishumi linambini zeziqa̔mo, unika ukuqa̔ma kwawo inyanga ngenyanga: namagqabi awo umti lowo abengawokupiliswa kwentlanga." 
Revelation22:3 Kwaye kungayi kuba seko isiqalekiso: kanjalo iterone katixo ne yemvana yoba kuso: nezicaka zake ziya kumkonza: 
Revelation22:4 zaziya kubona ubuso bake; negama lake loba pezu kwamabunzi azo. 
Revelation22:5 Akuyi kubako busuku kona kanjako; abafuni ke isibane nokukanya kwelanga; kuba inkosi utixo ibakanyisele: babeya kupata ngobukumkani kude kube ngunapakade kanapakade. 
Revelation22:6 WAZA wati kum: Lamazwi ayinene ayinyaniso: kanjalo inkosi, utixo wabaprofite abangcwele, itumile ingelosi yayo ukuza kubonisa izicaka zayo izinto ezifanele ukubako kamsinya." 
Revelation22:7 Bona ke, ndiyeza msinya. Unetamsanqa lowo uwagcinayo amazwi aso isiprofitesho salencwadi." 
Revelation22:8 Nam Johane ndinguye obezibona ezizinto waziva. Ndite ndakuba ndivile ndabona, ndawa pantsi ukuba ndibedeshe pambi kwenyawo zengelosi ebindibonisa ezizinto." 
Revelation22:9 Yayisiti kum: Lumka ungenje njalo: ngokuba ndisisicaka kunye nawe, nakunye nabazalwana bako abaprofite, nakunye nabawagcinayo amazwi alencwadi: mbedeshe utixo." 
Revelation22:10 Yayisiti kum: Ungawancamatiseli amazwi aso isiprofitesho salencwadi; ngokuba ixesha lawo likufupi. 
Revelation22:11 Yena owenza okungalungileyo, makabe esakwenza okungalungileyo; naye onco̔lileyo, makabe esanco̔lile; naye olungileyo, makabe esalungile; naye ongcwele, makabe esangcwaliswa." 
Revelation22:12 Bona ke, ndiyeza msinya; nomvuzo wam unam, ukuba ndivuze bonke ngabanye njengokuba umsebenzi wabo uya kuba njalo." 
Revelation22:13 Mna ndingu‐Alefa no‐Omega, isiqalo nesipelo, owokuqala nowokugqibela." 
Revelation22:14 Banetamsanqa abayenzayo imiyalelo yake, ukuze babe negunya pezu kwawo umti wobomi, baze bati ngamasango aso bangene esixekweni." 
Revelation22:15 Kodwa ngapandle kuko abazinja, nabatakati, nabapimisi, nababulali, nabakonzi bezitixo, nosukuba etanda esenza ubuxoki." 
Revelation22:16 Mna Yesu nditumile ingelosi yam ukuza kunqi̔na ezizinto kuni ngazo iṙemente. Mna ndiyingcambo nenzalo ka‐Davide, ikw̔ezi lomso elikazimlayo." 
Revelation22:17 Batsho nomoya nomtshakazi ukuti: Yiza. Naye ovayo makati: Yiza. Naye onxanwayo makeze. Naye otandayo makatabate amanzi obomi ngesisa. 
Revelation22:18 Ngokuba ndinqi̔na mna kubo bonke abevayo amazwi aso isiprofitesho salencwadi: Ukuba umntu uti ongeze kuzo ezizinto, utixo uya kwongeza kuye izibeto eziba̔liweyo kulencwadi;" 
Revelation22:19 nokuba umntu uti asuse kuwo amazwi ayo incwadi yesiprofitesho esi, utixo uya kususa isabiwo sake kuwo umti wobomi, nakuso isixeko esiyingcwele, nakwezozinto ziba̔liweyo kulencwadi." 
Revelation22:20 Uti lowo unqi̔nayo ezizinto: Ewe, ndiyeza msinya. Amene. Ewe, yiza, Nkosi Yesu."
